1.title: FR - Enquêtes codées : San Francisco - S01E01 - Presidio
1.plot: Millie Harcourt and Jean McBrian travel to San Francisco and join forces with two American codebreakers to pursue a serial killer from their war days.

1.title: FR - Enquêtes codées : San Francisco - S01E02 - Wake
1.plot: The search for the killer terrorising the Fillmore district continues. Millie, Jean, Iris and Hailey are under pressure to work out who the killer is so they can stop them before they strike again.

1.title: FR - Enquêtes codées : San Francisco - S01E03 - Charlotte's Web
1.plot: As Iris struggles with husband Marcus’ imminent deployment overseas, she and the other women delve into the mysterious death of a friend - and uncover a marriage built on lies and deception.

1.title: FR - Enquêtes codées : San Francisco - S01E04 - Madhouse
1.plot: After a seemingly innocent man is charged with murder, the women become involved in a tangled suburban tragedy, racing to find both the true killer and the methods before the scent goes cold. Meanwhile, Jean grapples with how to build a new life for herself.

1.title: FR - Enquêtes codées : San Francisco - S01E05 - Not Cricket
1.plot: A bloodied and battered stranger collapses on Millie and Jean's doorstep, dragging them into a mysterious criminal underworld.

1.title: FR - Enquêtes codées : San Francisco - S01E06 - Iron in War
1.plot: Having uncovered a covert system of police corruption, the women must go it alone, crafting a complex sting operation in order to draw out two warring factions and see justice done.

1.title: FR - Enquêtes codées : San Francisco - S01E08 - In for a Pound
1.plot: A death in the Big Bop Club brings an international incident right to their doorstep, while the women grapple with Jean's sudden disappearance.

meta.plot: Deux détectives britanniques et leurs homologues américaines utilisent leur talent en cryptologie et leur intelligence inouïe pour enquêter sur différents meurtres.

À Weimar, la jeune Dörte découvre avec effroi et délices l'aventure artistique du Bauhaus, fondé par Walter Gropius. Cette série alerte et romanesque retrace les débuts de l'école, son ouverture ambivalente aux femmes et ses méthodes d'enseignement révolutionnaires.

1.title: FR - Bauhaus : Un temps nouveau - S01E01 - After the War
1.plot: Eager students arrive at the Bauhaus art school in Weimar.

1.title: FR - Bauhaus : Un temps nouveau - S01E02 - The Prince of Thebes
1.plot: Master Itten introduces students to his exercise and dietary regime.

1.title: FR - Bauhaus : Un temps nouveau - S01E03 - The March Dead
1.plot: A military coup threatening Germany comes to Weimar.

1.title: FR - Bauhaus : Un temps nouveau - S01E04 - The Women's Course
1.plot: Gropius invites certain students to help him create the Sommerfeld House.

1.title: FR - Bauhaus : Un temps nouveau - S01E05 - Court of Honor
1.plot: Walter's relationship with Dörte gives rise to rumours and allegations.

1.title: FR - Bauhaus : Un temps nouveau - S01E06 - The End at Weimar
1.plot: The survival of the Bauhaus rests on the success of their exhibition showcase.

meta.plot: Un crime violent a été commis dans une clinique psychiatrique. La victime, Ana, une jeune femme de 28 ans avait été internée contre son gré et devait sortir le lendemain du soir où elle a été assassinée. On l’a retrouvée étouffée et… le cœur arraché. Angèle, jeune et brillante inspectrice de police est chargée de l’enquête. A-t-elle affaire au crime d’un fou ou à celui d’un « normopathe » parfaitement lucide qui s’applique à le faire passer pour l’acte d’un dément ?

1.title: FR - À l'intérieur - S01E01 - À Agnès D.
1.plot: Ana is found dead, her heart torn out, just before she was to leave the psychiatric hospital where she had been sectioned. A first investigation for Angèle Maury, one she'll have to conduct alone. But how to question the mentally ill? Can they be believed? Was the murderer a patient?

1.title: FR - À l'intérieur - S01E02 - Ariane
1.plot: Angèle discovers a worrying detail: she and Ana were both born in the same year and on same day. The autopsy reveals that Ana had had consensual sexual relations before her death. Another patient in the clinic is pregnant but has absolutely no memory of having had sex. Coincidence?

1.title: FR - À l'intérieur - S01E03 - Maxime
1.plot: Angèle hopes to find answers in Ana's personal diary, but most of it is illegible. The patients are very disturbed and fear a new tragedy. As Ana continuously appears to her, Angèle is disconcerted by Simon, a schizophrenic patient who is also terribly seductive.

1.title: FR - À l'intérieur - S01E04 - Rose
1.plot: Maxime is in a coma, knocked out as he was about to reveal the murderer's name. Only Rose, the clairvoyant, can now help Angèle but she has isolated herself and refuses all contact. Obsessed by Ana, fascinated by Simon, Angèle is slipping gently "to the other side".

1.title: FR - À l'intérieur - S01E05 - Simon
1.plot: Maxime comes out of the coma and reveals the murderer's name to Angèle. Shocked by the revelation, she decides to say nothing, convinced that he's lying. Meanwhile, those around Angèle question her lucidity. Commissioner Favard, having discovered that she had hidden the truth from him, takes her off the case.

1.title: FR - Aux Animaux la guerre - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: In a small town in Vosges, one remaining factory keeps people afloat. But when the managers announce a redundancy plan, everything crumbles.

1.title: FR - Aux Animaux la guerre - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Things get increasingly complicated for Martel. Rita takes her brother Greg in after a breakup. Bruce gets involved in a dangerous deal.

1.title: FR - Aux Animaux la guerre - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Martel and Bruce attempt to carry out an abduction, but it ends in a fiasco when the young woman escapes and finds her way to Rita.

1.title: FR - Aux Animaux la guerre - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: While seeing his mother, Martel learns that the Benbareks have also paid a visit. Vélocia's management files a complaint against Rita.

1.title: FR - Aux Animaux la guerre - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Rita lies in hospital after an attack at her home. Things are no better for Martel, especially when a tragic event adds to his growing problems.

1.title: FR - Aux Animaux la guerre - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: While living with Martel, Rita questions what she knows about him and finds a damning photo. Alone again, Martel can no longer contain his rage.

meta.plot: Championne des causes perdues, chargée de trouver un accord de fermeture d’usine dans les Vosges, l’inspectrice du travail Rita sait qu’elle ne sauvera au mieux que quelques salariés sur la centaine laissée sur le carreau. Un soir, les phares de sa vieille voiture éclairent une jeune fille courant à demi nue… Deux ouvriers désespérés - deux pauvres types comme Martel, le syndicaliste qui planque ses tatouages, et Bruce, le bodybuilder sous stéroïdes - ont eu la mauvaise idée de kidnapper une fille sur les trottoirs de Strasbourg pour la revendre à deux caïds qui font la pluie et le beau temps entre Épinal et Nancy.
Dans ce docu-série, la légende du foot Diego Maradona vole au secours de l'équipe locale de Culiacán, fief d'El Chapo. Peut-être se sauvera-t-il lui-même dans la foulée.

1.title: FR - Maradona in Mexico - S01E01 - Arrival
1.plot: Dorados, Culiacán's local team, are at the bottom of the table when Maradona arrives, looking for a fresh start. Experts predict disaster.

1.title: FR - Maradona in Mexico - S01E02 - One Of Us
1.plot: Maradona is generous and warm towards his players. Many, like him, come from poor families. But the passionate coach also has a temper.

1.title: FR - Maradona in Mexico - S01E03 - Dreams
1.plot: The Dorados supporters are thrilled with Maradona's coaching. Suddenly, Dorados look like contenders, an unlikely prospect just a year ago.

1.title: FR - Maradona in Mexico - S01E04 - Bitter Rivals
1.plot: Dorados are on the verge of gaining promotion to Liga MX when Maradona blows his top at the referees. Still, hope reigns, and the team keeps fighting.

1.title: FR - Maradona in Mexico - S01E05 - Nightmares
1.plot: At the start of a new season, Maradona checks into a clinic in Buenos Aires, leaving the team on its own. Rumors swirl and the team grows anxious.

1.title: FR - Maradona in Mexico - S01E06 - An Unlikely Home
1.plot: A reporter compares Maradona's Culiacán gig with his heroic work in Naples. The team can use the inspiration in the face of its latest challenge.

1.title: FR - Maradona in Mexico - S01E07 - One Last Push
1.plot: Against all odds, Maradona gets Dorados to the final again to face an old foe. Will the team make the leap to Liga MX?

1.title: FR - Illegals - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Illegals - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Illegals - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Illegals - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Illegals - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Illegals - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - Illegals - S01E07 - Episode 7
FR - Illegals - S01E08 - Episode 8
FR - Illegals - S01E09 - Episode 9
FR - Illegals - S01E10 - Episode 10

meta.plot: Quand une unité de renseignements polonaise découvre qu'un attentat se prépare grâce à une arme de l'arsenal soviétique, un agent est envoyé enquêter. Mais celui-ci ne s'attend pas à découvrir que les hautes sphères de l'état polonais sont elles-mêmes impliquées.

Adaptée des romans de Chris Ryan, cette mini série suit les aventures des forces spéciales anglaises en 2003, au Moyen-Orient, lors de guerre d'Irak.  La section 20 du MI-6 déploie ses moyens pour combattre le terrorisme. Les agents de terrain les plus efficaces parcourent le globe pour éradiquer les menaces.

1.title: FR - Strike Back - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Still haunted by the memory of a disastrous Special Forces mission which he led in 2003, John Porter is given an opportunity to redeem himself by returning to Iraq to rescue a kidnapped TV reporter.

1.title: FR - Strike Back - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: After locating the terrorist safe house Katie is being held in, Porter is also taken prisoner, and Hugh Collinson and a team at Section 20 have to act quickly before it is too late.

1.title: FR - Strike Back - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Collinson sends Porter undercover to Zimbabwe on a mission to break a former British soldier who was involved in a political assassination out of a high-security Harare jail.

2.title: FR - Strike Back - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: British sergeant Michael Stonebridge recruits help from Ex-Delta Force operative Damien Scott when an agent named John Porter is kidnapped by a Pakistani terrorist. The two then uncover clues to a possible terrorist attack at a New Delhi hotel and they race there to foil it.

2.title: FR - Strike Back - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: An Indian general decides to hold off on the assault on a New Delhi hotel that has been under siege when he learns that Scott and Stoneridge are in the hotel and they have ID'd the weapons scientist known as Mahmood.

2.title: FR - Strike Back - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: Section 20 tracks Latif to South Africa, when a former IRA terrorist Daniel Connolly, targets a weapons-system designer. Scott switches places with a computer hacker and finds himself being lured into a dangerous honey trap.

2.title: FR - Strike Back - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: Scott manages to pass Connolly's explosive test and works on bypassing a security code. Bratton contacts Marshall.

2.title: FR - Strike Back - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: There is trouble looming for Claire. Scott and Stonebridge attempt to locate a global arms dealer.

2.title: FR - Strike Back - S02E06 - Episode 6
2.plot: Grant travels to Khartoum when Sinclair and Scott are arrested. Clare is offered a choice by Tahir of either death or starting a new life as his partner. Stonebridge blames himself for Kate's death/ Crawford reveals that Latif has embedded a spy at the top of Western intelligence but refuses to reveal the person's identity until Clare is returned alive.

2.title: FR - Strike Back - S02E07 - Episode 7
2.plot: An MI6 agent called John Allen ends up takeing Stonebridge and Scott from Vienna on a dangerous mission to Kosovo.

2.title: FR - Strike Back - S02E08 - Episode 8
2.plot: In Kosovo, Stonebridge, Scott and four hostages find themselves in dire straits after being double-crossed by KFOR soldiers and the drug lord Hasani.

2.title: FR - Strike Back - S02E09 - Episode 9
2.plot: Scott and Stonebridge head to Chechnya to track down Latif and a stockpile of chemical weapons.

2.title: FR - Strike Back - S02E10 - Episode 10
2.plot: In the season finale, Stonebridge and Scott are in a race against time to find a pair of suicide bombers targeting Budapest.

3.title: FR - Strike Back - S03E01 - Episode 1
3.plot: Damian Scott is sent to Mogadishu, Somalia to rescue British diplomats after they are kidnapped by warlord Huseyin Waabri. Meanwhile Michael Stonebridge adapts to his new career outside Section 20.

3.title: FR - Strike Back - S03E02 - Episode 2
3.plot: Scott learns that one of the hostages is a high-ranking military intelligence operative and that Waabri is planning to sell nuclear devices in South Africa.

3.title: FR - Strike Back - S03E03 - Episode 3
3.plot: Scott and Stonebridge track down a radical Islamic cleric in order to recover the nuclear devices, but are sidetracked by a CIA air strike and hostile locals.

3.title: FR - Strike Back - S03E04 - Episode 4
3.plot: Scott and Stonebridge prepare for an attack by Al Qaeda while holed up in an Algerian farmhouse with the nomad leader and the wounded courier. Meanwhile, back at headquarters, Dalton is called on the carpet for her relationship with the courier.

3.title: FR - Strike Back - S03E05 - Episode 5
3.plot: The trail of the missing nuclear triggers leads to Cape Town, South Africa, where kidnappers abduct the children of an expatriate munitions expert to force him to cooperate.

3.title: FR - Strike Back - S03E06 - Episode 6
3.plot: Stonebridge seeks revenge on Craig Hanson after he turns up in Cape Town, South Africa. Meanwhile, Scott reconnects with a Mossad agent who's been following their case, but with a different set of orders; Knox hustles Evans to a secret installation and explains how he intends to turn his country into a world power.

3.title: FR - Strike Back - S03E07 - Episode 7
3.plot: Knox extricates a political leader from a Zimbabwe prison, and the unit tries to catch up with the escapee by tracking his activist daughter.

3.title: FR - Strike Back - S03E08 - Episode 8
3.plot: Unrest spreads after the assassination attempt on political leader Lutulu, while Stonebridge questions the shooter in an isolated police station and looks for a safe way out.

3.title: FR - Strike Back - S03E09 - Episode 9
3.plot: Knox plans on unloading nuclear bombs into politically unstable African nations, while Matlock reveals why he joined Knox.

3.title: FR - Strike Back - S03E10 - Episode 10
3.plot: In order to stop Knox, Scott comes to Bryant for assistance. Meanwhile Stonebridge has trouble focusing on the mission as he is bent on revenge. Section 20 get assistance from South African police to stop Knox's plot.

4.title: FR - Strike Back - S04E01 - Episode 1
4.plot: Enjoying a long-deserved vacation, Scott and Stonebridge are recalled after a fellow Section 20 member dies while pursuing the elusive terrorist al-Zuhari in Beirut. A new lead sends them into the remote jungles of Colombia in pursuit of a known associate of al-Zuhari’s and deep in territory controlled by a powerful drug cartel.

4.title: FR - Strike Back - S04E02 - Episode 2
4.plot: Out of options and hunted by the resourceful cartel, Section 20 goes for a longshot and attempts an assault in downtown Bogota, hoping to obtain intel on one of al-Zuhari’s key people. Meanwhile, Dalton looks for the source that exposed her team in Beirut, but discovers a surprising ally and a piece of al-Zuhari’s plan.

4.title: FR - Strike Back - S04E03 - Episode 3
4.plot: Although they are uncertain of others’ loyalties, the team must work with an asset in Beirut to get a lead on James Leatherby, a dangerous and unpredictable operative with ties to al-Zuhari.

4.title: FR - Strike Back - S04E04 - Episode 4
4.plot: Section 20 attempts a risky rescue for a potential new ally. Now veering close to the edge, but determined to find the truth, Dalton goes AWOL with a detainee.

4.title: FR - Strike Back - S04E05 - Episode 5
4.plot: While recovering from a shocking turn of events, Section 20 faces a different threat: a new enemy joining forces with an old one. Locke draws Kamali in closer to the team. Scott looks for an old friend, while Stonebridge gets closer to a new one.

4.title: FR - Strike Back - S04E06 - Episode 6
4.plot: Section 20 is torn between devoting their resources to the mission or saving one of their own. Stonebridge's health continues to affect him in the field. Al-Zuhari's network moves forward quickly, striking close. Kamali explains why yet another threat is emerging.

4.title: FR - Strike Back - S04E07 - Episode 7
4.plot: The team tracks stolen property to Russia, where Scott and Stonebridge continue their side careers as "outlaws." As Stonebridge's health continues to deteriorate, they discover new mysteries about a piece of Al-Zuhari's plan. Kamali worries that his cover identity may not hold.

4.title: FR - Strike Back - S04E08 - Episode 8
4.plot: Scott looks for an escape from Black Bear Prison, while Locke becomes suspicious of Kamali. The team races to locate Stonebridge, whose condition grows more dire when he encounters Al-Zuhari's plan firsthand. Continuing his vendetta, Ulyanov closes in on Scott and Stonebridge.

4.title: FR - Strike Back - S04E09 - Episode 9
4.plot: Scott and Stonebridge try to keep their promise to protect Ester; Richmond and Martinez follow an Al-Zuhari associate; the team sets out to stop an infiltrator before he reaches a populated area.

4.title: FR - Strike Back - S04E10 - Episode 10
4.plot: Scott and Stonebridge face a new pivotal player in Al-Zuhari's plan, and with an imminent attack looming, the team resorts to questionable measures, sparking conflict within the unit.

5.title: FR - Strike Back - S05E01 - Episode 1
5.plot: The daughter of Thailand's British ambassador is kidnapped, so Stonebridge, Scott and the rest of the team sign up for another do-or-die trying adventure.

5.title: FR - Strike Back - S05E02 - Episode 2
5.plot: Section 20 try to track down the real culprits behind the embassy attack, starting with getting information from gangster Ray McQueen.

5.title: FR - Strike Back - S05E03 - Episode 3
5.plot: Locke works out that his long-time friend is working with the dangerous Yakuza and Office 39. Scott needs protect his son after they find themselves enemy fire.

5.title: FR - Strike Back - S05E04 - Episode 4
5.plot: Scott has a serious talk with his son whilst the rest of Section 20 form an uneasy alliance with a couple of CIA mercenaries as they go after Shiro and Mei Foster.

5.title: FR - Strike Back - S05E05 - Episode 5
5.plot: Scott and Stonebridge make a major mistake and fall into the clutches of North Korean agent Li-Na, leaving Locke having to defy orders to get them out.

5.title: FR - Strike Back - S05E06 - Episode 6
5.plot: Scott and Stonebridge make a major mistake and fall into the clutches of North Korean agent Li-Na, leaving Locke having to defy orders to get them out.

5.title: FR - Strike Back - S05E07 - Episode 7
5.plot: The battle with Li-Na is now in Europe, as Section 20 look for a way to get back on her trail. Locke ends up getting an unexpected chance to confront his nemesis.

5.title: FR - Strike Back - S05E08 - Episode 8
5.plot: The team find out that Li-Na is planning to mount a nuclear attack in Europe. Locke puts himself in the firing line after he neglects the mission in order to avenge his son's murder.

5.title: FR - Strike Back - S05E09 - Episode 9
5.plot: Locke takes Section 20 off the radar, as they defy Whitehall to travel to Geneva where he is convinced that Li-Na and Kwon are preparing to attack the United Nations HQ.

5.title: FR - Strike Back - S05E10 - Episode 10
5.plot: Scott and Stonebridge are stranded in the Alps with the mercenaries in pursuit. Scott knows that the CIA hide weapons caches across Europe, so they find a telephone at the farm of a retired Austrian soldier Oscar (Wolf Kahler) to call Christy Bryant (Stephanie Vogt), a past acquaintance from Vengeance, for the location of the nearest one, at a nearby dam.

6.title: FR - Strike Back - S06E01 - Episode 1
6.plot: A dangerous terrorist is on the loose and it's up to Section 20 to find him.

6.title: FR - Strike Back - S06E02 - Episode 2
6.plot: Section 20 start to close in on terrorist Omair Idrisi and his wife Jane Lowry, but the team is forced to extract devious arms dealer Morgan Ives from Libya.

6.title: FR - Strike Back - S06E03 - Episode 3
6.plot: As Jane Lowry surfaces in Budapest, Mac and Wyatt are forced to go undercover to infiltrate a dangerous group of white supremacists that has something she needs.

6.title: FR - Strike Back - S06E04 - Episode 4
6.plot: Things aren't looking good for Mac. He's blown his cover and is now facing certain death. Donovan digs into Zarin's past... and she doesn't like what she learns.

6.title: FR - Strike Back - S06E05 - Episode 5
6.plot: Section 20 must stop Lowry and Dr Markov from making and unleashing a deadly chemical weapon. In desperate need of intel, Novin infiltrates a drug lord's home.

6.title: FR - Strike Back - S06E06 - Episode 6
6.plot: Locked, loaded and set to resume their high-stakes mission, Section 20 are back. And they've got a big problem on their hands.

6.title: FR - Strike Back - S06E07 - Episode 7
6.plot: It's Section 20 vs Jane Lowry in a race to get to Omair Idrisi. It's a mission that hurls comms officer Jensen into extreme danger. Contains sexual scenes.

6.title: FR - Strike Back - S06E08 - Episode 8
6.plot: Watch out for a massive twist as Jensen digs into Project Tenebrae. Things don't go to plan for Mac and Wyatt as they storm a black site in search of Idrisi.

6.title: FR - Strike Back - S06E09 - Episode 9
6.plot: The team run into trouble as they race to get Idrisi back across Europe. The surprises keep coming as they learn the truth about Jensen and Project Tenebrae.

6.title: FR - Strike Back - S06E10 - Episode 10
6.plot: Section 20 are desperate to clear their names. And to do so, they hatch a big and wreckless plan.

7.title: FR - Strike Back - S07E01 - Episode 1
7.plot: Reuniting for what they think is a routine "cleanup" exercise in Malaysia, Gracie Novin, Samuel Wyatt and Thomas "Mac" McAllister learn that a British operative in possession of intel about a downed Russian plane has been killed in Kuala Lumpur.

7.title: FR - Strike Back - S07E02 - Episode 2
7.plot: Section 20 forges an uneasy alliance with Zarkova in hopes of tracking down a stolen nuclear warhead in Kuala Lumpur; the group grows frustrated when Police Inspector Amy Leong pulls them off the job after a false alarm.

7.title: FR - Strike Back - S07E03 - Episode 3
7.plot: Section 20's search for the missing nuclear warhead leads them to India, where three scientists have been kidnapped by a militant; the team gains valuable intel on Anjali Vartak, a rich Hindu with a personal vendetta against Muslims.

7.title: FR - Strike Back - S07E04 - Episode 4
7.plot: As Wyatt is tortured by Vartak's henchmen, Mac presses her corrupt lawyer to hand over an encrypted hard drive that might hold clues to the whereabouts of a pair of "nuclear suitcases."

7.title: FR - Strike Back - S07E05 - Episode 5
7.plot: Following a high-speed jungle ambush in Myanmar, the suitcase nukes end up in the hands of a brutal Rwandan drug lord with a jealous streak; Colonel Beshnov, the Russian Alpha Group leader, surprises Pavel with a revelation about Zarkova.

7.title: FR - Strike Back - S07E06 - Episode 6
7.plot: Novin and Zarkova find themselves at the mercy of corrupt police, while Mac and Wyatt take temporary refuge in a local village; Coltrane finally learns the location of the suitcase nukes, but the revelation comes at a high price.

7.title: FR - Strike Back - S07E07 - Episode 7
7.plot: As Wyatt convalesces, Coltrane, Mac and Novin embark on a covert, 24-hour mission inside Russia to extract an FSB analyst with potentially vital information. Katrina questions Pavel's true identity, but chooses to stand by her commanding officer.

7.title: FR - Strike Back - S07E08 - Revolution: Episode 8
7.plot: Coltrane defends his decision to go rogue with S20. After tailing Hassan and the nuclear suitcase to a deserted shopping mall in Jakarta, Wyatt and Novin face down threats from Komodo soldiers and, later, Colonel Aldo and his insurgents.

7.title: FR - Strike Back - S07E09 - Episode 9
7.plot: In pursuit of Pavel, Section 20 clashes with two other Russian renegades, Natasha Petrenko and Artem Orlov, as they attempt to purchase sophisticated software designed to short-circuit a ghost satellite containing precious cargo.

7.title: FR - Strike Back - S07E10 - Revolution: Episode 10
7.plot: Section 20 faces an ultimate dilemma as it battles Pavel and his team of Russian turncoats for keys to Soviet-era missiles thought to have been destroyed years earlier.

8.title: FR - Strike Back - S08E01 - Episode 1
8.plot: Section 20 are thrown back into combat when a rescue mission unleashes a conspiracy. Series eight of the action-chocked Sky original.

8.title: FR - Strike Back - S08E02 - Episode 2
8.plot: A double cross turns an already dangerous mission deadly as Section 20 board an enemy-packed train to stop the bioweapon's sale.

8.title: FR - Strike Back - S08E03 - Episode 3
8.plot: The team run into an old ally as they're thrown headlong into a dangerous race to stop the cyberweapon falling into Jihadist hands.

8.title: FR - Strike Back - S08E04 - Episode 4
8.plot: Novin is in danger, but saving their soldier isn't Section 20's only mission. The enemy is closing in on the cyberweapon. Fast.

8.title: FR - Strike Back - S08E05 - Episode 5
8.plot: The team race to stop Zayef from terrorist attack that could kill thousands. For Mac, the mission has never been more personal.

8.title: FR - Strike Back - S08E06 - Episode 6
8.plot: Mac's life outside of the army might seem happy, but the emotional strain of what happened in Munich starts to take a heavy toll.

8.title: FR - Strike Back - S08E07 - Episode 7
8.plot: Section 20 are sent on a military mission to Bosnia to grab a jihadi financier who could lead them to Zayef Hajdari.

8.title: FR - Strike Back - S08E08 - Episode 8
8.plot: Section 20 successfully destroys the Albanian Mafia's weapons stash, but can they get the truth out of Zayef before it's too late?

8.title: FR - Strike Back - S08E09 - Episode 9
8.plot: CIA agent Carolyn Fortier convinces Section 20 to bring in their soldier alive, but the mission goes wrong when Russian forces arrive.

8.title: FR - Strike Back - S08E10 - Episode 10
8.plot: It's never been more personal. Section 20 embark on their final-ever mission as they fight to stop Arianna Demachi's plans in Europe.

meta.plot: Elevée dans la jungle depuis la mort de ses parents, Sheena a développé d'étranges pouvoirs lui permettant de se transformer à volonté, comme les Barbapapas, en n'importe quel animal. Ainsi elle peut se fondre dans la jungle et la défendre contre les nombreux individus qui veulent la détruire.

1.title: FR - Sheena - S01E01 - Sheena
1.plot: Sheena and Cutter meet for the first time in a most unusual way after Sheena sabotages Cutter's plane and it crashes down into the jungle.

1.title: FR - Sheena - S01E02 - Fallout
1.plot: After a U.S. defense department satellite crashes into the jungle, it's up to Sheena, Cutter and Cutter's old nemesis, Tyler, to track down and deprogram the satellite before the area is bombed by the military.

1.title: FR - Sheena - S01E03 - Revenge of the Jirds
1.plot: The cargo of coffee that Cutter was hired to deliver turns out to be a shipment of smuggled animals from the jungle known as Jirds.

1.title: FR - Sheena - S01E04 - A Rite of Passage
1.plot: A group of rogue gorillas terrorize villages throughout the jungle. As Sheena prepares to fight them off she discovers a secret Kali has been hiding. Consequently, Sheena must choose between her friend and the safety of her village.

1.title: FR - Sheena - S01E05 - Tourist Trap
1.plot: Cutter takes a group of tourists for the ride of their lives when they run into and are captured by a band of virus smugglers.

1.title: FR - Sheena - S01E06 - Buried Secrets
1.plot: A volcano in the LaMistas is causing seismic earthquakes. While rescuing animals from danger, Sheena finds an old stachel buried in the ground that triggers memories of her parents¹ death.

1.title: FR - Sheena - S01E07 - The Lost Boy
1.plot: When an evil corporation tries to steal the land of the peaceful Souman tribe, Sheena helps them fight back.

1.title: FR - Sheena - S01E08 - Wild Thing
1.plot: Sheena is trapped in a half-animal state and it's up to Cutter to find her before an obsessed trophy hunter gets to her first.

1.title: FR - Sheena - S01E09 - Doing as the Romans
1.plot: When N'Gama's troops kidnap a young woman from Kali's village for him to marry, Sheena must don western clothing and infiltrate N'Gama's palace to rescue the girl.

1.title: FR - Sheena - S01E10 - The Children of the LaMistas
1.plot: Sheena comes face to face with an old enemy. As she plans her revenge, she finds an old friend in trouble and uncovers a bizarre experiment.

1.title: FR - Sheena - S01E11 - Prey
1.plot: When Sheena enlists Cutter's help to stop the illegal rare game hunt, she finds that the animals aren't the only ones being pursued.

1.title: FR - Sheena - S01E12 - Divas of the Jungle
1.plot: Cutter is in heaven when some supermodels need his guidance through the jungle for a photo shoot. But when the photographer turns the shoot into a rescue operation, not everyone is who they seem to be.

1.title: FR - Sheena - S01E13 - Forbidden Fruit
1.plot: Sheena and Cutter, on a search for two missing botanists in a remote and highly dangerous part of the LaMistas, find a very hostile environment with a secret that could pit them against each other in a fight to the death.

1.title: FR - Sheena - S01E14 - The Fool Monty
1.plot: When a well-known TV icon captures footage of the Darak'Na for his show, sparking a tribal war, it's up to Sheena to keep the peace, and her secret, intact.

1.title: FR - Sheena - S01E15 - Sanctuary
1.plot: A civil war breaks out in Kamdeera when a rebel army takes over part of the country. Sheena and Cutter are caught in the middle, between rescuing refugees trapped in a sanctuary and helping a small force of UN soldiers, cut off from back-up battle the rebels. The situation looks bleak, but Sheena's got plans of her own.

1.title: FR - Sheena - S01E16 - Jewel
1.plot: Sheena steals Cutter's prized signed footballs to coerce him into helping her find the Kamada tribe's sacred jewel.

1.title: FR - Sheena - S01E17 - Friendly Fire
1.plot: Sheena's old friend, Tuli, returns to the LaMistas in search of a plant that may cure radiation poisoning. But when Tuli is gravely injured by her cutthroat rival, Sheena is compelled to put aside her resentment and save her friend's life.

1.title: FR - Sheena - S01E18 - Between a Rock and a Hard Place
1.plot: When Tuma, the leader of the Kiptalamis, attacks a peaceful meeting between the leaders of the four tribes, Sheena discovers that he wants sole ownership of a sacred rock shared by the tribes and will kill any one who gets in the way of his destiny.

1.title: FR - Sheena - S01E19 - Tyler Returns
1.plot: When a young friend of Sheena's is killed in a bombing, Cutter's old friend Tyler reappears to lead a mission to assassinate the terrorist responsible.

1.title: FR - Sheena - S01E20 - Unsafe Passage
1.plot: When an attack on the village leads to Kali's kidnapping, can Sheena rescue her before she is sold into modern day slavery without become a prisoner herself?

1.title: FR - Sheena - S01E21 - Marabunta
1.plot: Sheena and Cutter find themselves surrounded by billions of killer ants which block their every means of escape.

1.title: FR - Sheena - S01E22 - Cult of One
1.plot: When a young girl and a government official die in a fiery car bomb, Sheena discovers a religious cult with murderous intent.

2.title: FR - Sheena - S02E01 - Rendezvous
2.plot: Sheena's efforts to save an Interpol agent from a ruthless drug lord spark a romance.

2.title: FR - Sheena - S02E02 - The Feral King
2.plot: Sheena and Cutter are enlisted to hunt for a jungle boy who is the heir to a fortune.

2.title: FR - Sheena - S02E03 - Mind Games
2.plot: Kali faces off against an old nemesis that tries to gain control over Sheena in order to exert domination over all the LaMistas.

2.title: FR - Sheena - S02E04 - Collateral Damage
2.plot: Sheena and Cutter befriend a CIA sniper who is the target of some rogue intelligence operatives.

2.title: FR - Sheena - S02E05 - Meltdown in Maltaka
2.plot: Cutter and Mendelsohn team up to help a female boxer to realize her dream of being a champion.

2.title: FR - Sheena - S02E06 - The Treasure of Sienna Mende
2.plot: A female jewel thief helps Cutter and Sheena locate a hidden treasure that could help a drought-stricken tribe.

2.title: FR - Sheena - S02E07 - The Darkness
2.plot: A mythic rogue beast is enlisted in an effort to steal a large government payroll.

2.title: FR - Sheena - S02E08 - Still Hostage After All These Years
2.plot: When a terrorist kidnapping threatens an important peace mission and stops the flow of a lifesaving vaccine to the village, Cutter's ex-wife is called in to negotiate.

2.title: FR - Sheena - S02E09 - Return of the Native
2.plot: Jealousy arises when Sheena's first love returns to Maltaka to open a long awaited school.

2.title: FR - Sheena - S02E10 - The Maltaka Files
2.plot: Alleged UFO sightings expose an attempt to sell illicit uranium to the highest bidder.

2.title: FR - Sheena - S02E11 - Stranded in the Jungle
2.plot: As the participants in a multi-million-dollar survival game are endangered by a coup, Sheena meets someone who might provide some important clues about her past.

2.title: FR - Sheena - S02E12 - Coming to Africa
2.plot: Sheena and Cutter protect a princess from a plot to disrupt her arranged marriage.

2.title: FR - Sheena - S02E13 - The World According to Mendelsohn
2.plot: Mendelsohn is asked to help a tribe that thinks he is a legendary wise man.

FR - Agatha Christie - Dix petits nègres - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Ten strangers are drawn away from their lives to an isolated rock off the Devon coast.

1.title: FR - Agatha Christie - Dix petits nègres - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: As the sun rises and sets on the island and its solitary mansion, the number of guests is whittled down by their invisible enemy – to seven, to six, to five…

1.title: FR - Agatha Christie - Dix petits nègres - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Cut down to half their original number, the guests of Soldier Island are in danger of losing their minds to fear and anxiety.

meta.plot: Dix personnes sont invitées sur une île isolée par un mystérieux hôte. Mais, petit-à-petit, les invités se font assassiner un-par-un. Le meurtirer serait-il parmi eux ?

Adèle Zimmer, psychologue talentueuse, rejoint la police fédérale comme consultante sur les cas de disparitions inquiétantes. Son fils a disparu il y a 6 mois mais elle n’a pas abandonné sa propre enquête. Elle va devoir faire équipe avec l’inspecteur Luca Dosco, un flic impulsif mais qui respecte les règles. Adèle, au contraire, pratique des méthodes peu orthodoxes pour résoudre une affaire. Et son talent pour percer les gens à jour fait ses preuves. Ce duo improbable, et que tout oppose, va devoir s’apprivoiser pour mener à bien leurs enquêtes.

meta.plot: Ils veulent vivre heureux, avec beaucoup d’enfants, mais ce ne sera pas tous les jours un conte de fées ! Avec la naissance de leur premier bébé ensemble, Samia et Nicolas rêvent de former un foyer serein, paisible et harmonieux. Mais le quotidien s’annonce plus compliqué que prévu et les obstacles nombreux… A commencer par le choix du prénom du nouveau-né qui se transforme en véritable cassetête. Car chez les Rousseau-Bensaid, outre Samia et Nicolas, il faut aussi compter avec les frères, les sœurs, les ex, les grands-parents, les copains… Des gens aussi sympathiques qu’envahissants. Il sera difficile d’accorder tout ce petit monde et de faire régner l’harmonie dans cette nouvelle famille.

meta.plot: Burnt out on office politics, Agatha Raisin retires early to a picturesque village in the Cotswolds and soon finds a second career as an amateur detective investigating mischief, mayhem, and murder in her deceptively quaint town.

1.title: FR - Agatha Raisin - S01E01 - The Walkers of Dembley
1.plot: A walker is found dead on a local baronet's land soon after he declares war on her rambling group for trespassing on his land. Eager to solve the crime, Agatha convinces James that they should pose as a married couple and go undercover in the victim's walking group.

1.title: FR - Agatha Raisin - S01E02 - Hell's Bells
1.plot: Bell-ringer Amanda Ballard is found hanged in the belfry with a suicide note left beside her, but Agatha is not convinced she took her own life and enlists a reluctant Roy to help her research the case.

1.title: FR - Agatha Raisin - S01E03 - The Wellspring of Death
1.plot: Roy lures Agatha back into the world of PR. She represents a local mineral water company -- but a murder there throws a spanner in the works.

1.title: FR - Agatha Raisin - S01E04 - The Potted Gardener
1.plot: Agatha springs into action when James's girlfriend Mary is found dead shortly before the village gardening competition.

1.title: FR - Agatha Raisin - S01E05 - The Vicious Vet
1.plot: Agatha and James spring into action when the local vet and village heartthrob is found dead, the day after he and Agatha went on a date.

1.title: FR - Agatha Raisin - S01E06 - The Day the Floods Came
1.plot: The murder of a bride throws the village into shock. Ignoring warnings Agatha investigates, but soon finds she's in desperate danger.

1.title: FR - Agatha Raisin - S01E07 - Witch of Wyckhadden
1.plot: Love is in the air for Agatha, but when a local mystic is found bludgeoned to death, she becomes embroiled in a most mysterious case.

2.title: FR - Agatha Raisin - S02E01 - Agatha Raisin and the Wizard of Evesham
2.plot: Now back in her quaint Cotswolds hamlet, Agatha suspects her hair salon's arrogant stylist is blackmailing clients with their darkest secrets.

2.title: FR - Agatha Raisin - S02E02 - Agatha Raisin and the Fairies of Fryfam
2.plot: Looking to get away for a few days, Agatha rents a cottage in Fryfam, a village where mythical fairies are said to live. Before Agatha can start relaxing, however, she is employed by a local woman to prove that her wealthy husband is having an affair.

2.title: FR - Agatha Raisin - S02E03 - Agatha Raisin and the Curious Curate
2.plot: The arrival of a handsome new curate causes a stir in the village, but when murder strikes, one of Agatha's friends becomes the prime suspect. As she works to clear her friend's name, Agatha's love life gets in the way of her investigation.

3.title: FR - Agatha Raisin - S03E01 - Agatha Raisin & the Haunted House
3.plot: Agatha opens her own detective agency, but potential clients aren't exactly breaking down the door of her new office. In search of new business, Agatha and James visit Ivy Hall, a house said to be haunted since the English Civil War. Are the strange sounds and unexplained footsteps heard at night truly supernatural, or is someone trying to scare the obnoxious owner out of her home?

3.title: FR - Agatha Raisin - S03E02 - Agatha Raisin & the Deadly Dance (Part 1)
3.plot: A scathing article in the paper harms Agatha's business, until Charles's wealthy friend hires the agency to investigate death threats against her daughter. After disaster strikes the daughter's engagement party, Agatha enrolls in dance lessons to try to outmaneuver the culprit.

3.title: FR - Agatha Raisin - S03E03 - Agatha Raisin & the Deadly Dance (Part 2)
3.plot: The case grows more complex when a would-be assassin dies in Agatha's kitchen, but who was the target: him or Agatha? Toni continues her search for the missing dog, and Charles and Roy pull an all-nighter in the pub.

3.title: FR - Agatha Raisin - S03E04 - Agatha Raisin & the Love From Hell (Part 1)
3.plot: James vanishes after a blazing row with Agatha in a pub; leaving behind only a trail of blood and a dead body, everyone is left fearing the worst.

1.title: FR - Zoe et Raven - S01E01 - Raven
1.plot: When her sister Rosie goes missing after arriving at their grandfather's home, Zoe scours the area, meets some locals and has a scary encounter.

1.title: FR - Zoe et Raven - S01E02 - Close Up
FR - Zoe et Raven - S01E03 - Spying on Pin
FR - Zoe et Raven - S01E04 - Pony Camp!
FR - Zoe et Raven - S01E05 - The Sleepover
FR - Zoe et Raven - S01E06 - Horse Thief Hero
FR - Zoe et Raven - S01E07 - Emerald
FR - Zoe et Raven - S01E08 - Pony Prom
FR - Zoe et Raven - S01E09 - The Search
FR - Zoe et Raven - S01E10 - Show-down

2.title: FR - Zoe et Raven - S02E01 - Rivals
2.plot: When rival riding school Holloway steals Bright Fields' recently won County Cup, Zoe and Pin must steal it back before Mia's press interview begins.

2.title: FR - Zoe et Raven - S02E02 - Golden Boy
2.plot: The gang sees Pin in a new light. On his last day, Marcus confesses a guilty secret to Rosie. Becky says a heartfelt goodbye to her longtime crush.

2.title: FR - Zoe et Raven - S02E03 - Maid of the Island
2.plot: Things get out of hand during a jousting match at the annual Maid of the Island tournament when Zoe and Mia face off against Gaby from Holloway.

2.title: FR - Zoe et Raven - S02E04 - Truth or Dare
2.plot: At a beach party, a game of truth or dare forces Zoe to face her feelings for Pin, and a horse race on the sand leads her to betray Raven's trust.

2.title: FR - Zoe et Raven - S02E05 - Sweet 16
2.plot: At Zoe's 16th birthday bash, Gaby stirs up trouble between Pin and Marcus, Rosie plays matchmaker, and Mia gathers proof of Callum's bad behavior.

2.title: FR - Zoe et Raven - S02E06 - Runaway
2.plot: Zoe takes Raven to a private spot to win his forgiveness. Becky, Ben and Rosie stumble upon a mysterious discovery. Mia overhears an upsetting chat.

2.title: FR - Zoe et Raven - S02E07 - Bob
2.plot: A fire brings an unlikely hero to the rescue. Gaby reveals her painful past to Zoe and Pin. Jade comes through for Becky during a time of need.

2.title: FR - Zoe et Raven - S02E08 - Gaby
2.plot: Gaby secretly trains on Raven, but Zoe's kindness makes her feel guilty. Rosie and Ben hunt for treasure in the tunnels. Pin makes plans with his mom.

2.title: FR - Zoe et Raven - S02E09 - Road Trip
2.plot: After Zoe and Pin miss the ferry to Nationals, they get a ride in Grandpa Frank's van. But an empty gas tank leads to an unplanned stop at a fair.

2.title: FR - Zoe et Raven - S02E10 - Nationals
2.plot: At Nationals, Pin does things his way, Becky cures Jade's fear of performing, Rosie uncovers an old family secret, and James tries to sabotage Raven.

3.title: FR - Zoe et Raven - S03E01 - Wild Horses
3.plot: The arrival of Zoe's mischievous cousin complicates the Bright Fields gang's attempts to impress the new mayor.

3.title: FR - Zoe et Raven - S03E02 - Hunted
3.plot: Pin leads the charge to find a skittish wild horse before the mayor does. The first Breakfast Club meeting leaves some riders champing at the bit.

3.title: FR - Zoe et Raven - S03E03 - Ariel
3.plot: Zoe and Gaby try to figure out what's wrong with Ariel. Marcus faces obstacles ahead of his trainer exam, and Mia undermines Susie.

3.title: FR - Zoe et Raven - S03E04 - The Tea Party
3.plot: The gang gallops into action after inviting the mayor to tea at the castle. As they train for tryouts, Zoe and Gaby grow increasingly competitive.

3.title: FR - Zoe et Raven - S03E05 - Foal O'Clock
3.plot: Bright Fields prepares to welcome a new four-legged guest, but Gaby's rivalry with Zoe could put the highly anticipated arrival at risk.

3.title: FR - Zoe et Raven - S03E06 - Pony Safari
3.plot: When Winnie's snobby schoolmates show up at Pony Camp, Zoe does everything possible to keep them busy. Meanwhile, Marcus pushes Mia to face her fears.

3.title: FR - Zoe et Raven - S03E07 - Tryouts
3.plot: Gaby's need to win at tryouts jeopardizes her friendship with Zoe. Jade seeks answers when she loses track of the wild horses.

3.title: FR - Zoe et Raven - S03E08 - Princess
3.plot: As Zoe and her friends narrow down the list of suspects in their search for the wild horses, Pin becomes more and more unwell.

3.title: FR - Zoe et Raven - S03E09 - Victory Parade
3.plot: Jade and Becky go sleuthing at the castle, Zoe makes a decision about her future, and Callum's obnoxious behavior gets on Gaby's nerves.

3.title: FR - Zoe et Raven - S03E10 - S.O.S.
3.plot: Zoe reaches out to her friends for help, Aaron lives out his cowboy dreams, and the gang finally solves the mystery of the wild horses' disappearance.

meta.plot: Une Californienne de 15 ans passe l'été sur une île au large de l'Angleterre, dans la maison d'enfance de sa mère, où elle se lie d'amitié avec un cheval mystérieux.

seasonsMeta.name: The Crab with the Golden Claws

meta.plot: Mr Bean turns simple everyday tasks into chaotic situations and will leave you in stitches as he creates havoc wherever he goes.

1.title: FR - Mr. Bean - S01E01 - Mr. Bean
1.plot: Mr. Bean attends a mathematics exam, where he tries to copy from a student under the nose of the invigilator, when he realizes that he has studied the wrong maths equations. Afterwards, he surreptitiously changes into his swimming trunks so as not to be noticed by someone sitting nearby at a beach. And later struggles to stay awake during a church service and obnoxiously sings the refrain of the hymn "All Creatures of Our God and King," much to the annoyance of the man sitting next to him, Mr. Sprout.

1.title: FR - Mr. Bean - S01E02 - The Return of Mr. Bean
1.plot: Mr. Bean goes to a department store and buys various items. Afterwards, he goes to a fancy restaurant where he tries to dispose his awful-tasting meal. And finally, Bean goes to a Royal greeting and gets into mischief.

1.title: FR - Mr. Bean - S01E03 - The Curse of Mr. Bean
1.plot: Mr. Bean goes to a swimming pool, where he finds himself scared to death on the high diving board. When he's done, he tries several different ways to get his car out of the parking garage after he realizes he doesn't have enough money to do it the normal way. After that, he sits on a park bench and uses an unusual method of making himself a sandwich. Finally, he goes to a cinema and tries to survive a terrifying horror movie with his girlfriend.

1.title: FR - Mr. Bean - S01E04 - Mr. Bean Goes to Town
1.plot: Mr. Bean purchases a new TV, only to experience a spot of reception trouble. He then takes a stroll in the park to try out his new camera, which is promptly stolen. This leads to an identity parade, where Bean does his best to discover the identity of the camera thief. Later, Bean's night on the town spells disaster for a stage magician. Lastly, Mr. Bean shows off his dancing skills at Club Phut.

1.title: FR - Mr. Bean - S01E05 - The Trouble with Mr. Bean
1.plot: Mr. Bean, late for his dental appointment, tries to get dressed and clean his teeth whilst on the way. After arriving just in time for the appointment, he ends up administering an anesthetic to the hapless dentist. After visiting the dentist, Bean has a picnic in the park, where he tangles with a pesky fly and a remote-control toy boat.

1.title: FR - Mr. Bean - S01E06 - Mr. Bean Rides Again
1.plot: At the bus stop, Mr. Bean tries his best to revive a heart attack victim before using an ambulance to jump-start his own mini-car. Later, when posting a letter, he loses his only stamp, but that doesn't stop him from sending his letter anyway. Whilst preparing for his holiday, Mr. Bean demonstrates a novel (if not entirely efficient) method of packing, then disposes of a bothersome train passenger, and tries to entertain an airsick boy during a plane flight.

1.title: FR - Mr. Bean - S01E07 - Merry Christmas Mr. Bean
1.plot: While Christmas shopping, Mr. Bean purchases a bulky string of tree lights before making a shambles of a department store toy section. He later manages to acquire a free turkey and Christmas tree, and attempts to conduct a Salvation Army band. Finally, during Christmas dinner, Bean has quite a surprise in store for his long-suffering girlfriend.

1.title: FR - Mr. Bean - S01E08 - Mr. Bean in Room 426
1.plot: Mr. Bean goes to a hotel where he causes trouble and seeks competition in his hotel neighbor. After he eats some spoiled oysters, he wakes up at night from some loud noise and ends up being locked out of his room.

1.title: FR - Mr. Bean - S01E09 - Do-It-Yourself Mr. Bean
1.plot: On New Year's Eve, Bean hosts his very own party with his friends Rupert and Hubert, but it isn't long before his guests discover that there is more fun at the party next door and trick Bean into letting them go. The following morning on New Year's Day, Bean buys some new tools and a large recliner armchair at the January sales of a department store and has a unique way of driving home. He then tries painting his flat himself and starts off the new year with a bang.

1.title: FR - Mr. Bean - S01E10 - Mind the Baby, Mr. Bean
1.plot: On his way to the Southsea funfair, Mr. Bean accidentally becomes lumbered with a baby boy with no idea of how or where he came from, forcing him to try having fun at the fair with the baby. Throughout the day, the baby manages to survive Bean's unique style of mishaps before eventually being reunited with his mother.

1.title: FR - Mr. Bean - S01E11 - Back to School Mr. Bean
1.plot: Mr. Bean attends an open day of a local school, where he unleashes his usual brand of chaos in the various classes he visits. Afterwards, Bean's day soon takes a sombre turn when he finds that his Mini isn't parked where he left it and is crushed by an Army Tank during the demonstration.

1.title: FR - Mr. Bean - S01E12 - Tee Off, Mr. Bean
1.plot: After causing chaos at the town launderette while having his laundry cleaned, Bean tries his hand at mini golf, but after being told by the course's owner that he can only touch the ball with the club and not with his hands, Bean's poor aim leads him on an elaborate tour around town before ultimately returning to the course several hours later with a final score of 3,427 strokes.

1.title: FR - Mr. Bean - S01E13 - Goodnight, Mr. Bean
1.plot: At a hospital waiting room, Bean uses various methods to skip ahead of the queue but his antics backfire. Later at a park, he decorates Queen's Guard, so that he can take a picture. And at the end of the day, Bean tries to cure his insomnia with some unusual methods at home.

1.title: FR - Mr. Bean - S01E14 - Hair by Mr. Bean of London
1.plot: At a barbershop, Mr. Bean inadvertently holds the fort for the barber when he is distracted by a phonecall, resulting in him giving several customers terrible haircuts. Later, Bean heads to a fête, where he cheats at all the games and enters Teddy into a children's pet show, where his inanimacy allows Bean to pass all the obedience tests with flying colours. And finally, after a train journey, Bean accidentally loses his ticket and unsuccessfully tries to sneak out past the station's guard inside a mail bag.

1.title: FR - Mr. Bean - S01E15 -
FR - Mr. Bean - S01E16 -

meta.plot: Un enfant disparu lance quatre familles dans une quête éperdue pour trouver des réponses. La chasse au coupable fait émerger les péchés et les secrets d'une petite ville.

1.title: FR - Dark - S01E01 - Secrets
1.plot: In 2019, a local boy's disappearance stokes fear in the residents of Winden, a small German town with a strange and tragic history.

1.title: FR - Dark - S01E02 - Lies
1.plot: When a grim discovery leaves the police baffled, Ulrich seeks a search warrant for the power plant. A mysterious stranger checks into the hotel.

1.title: FR - Dark - S01E03 - Past and Present
1.plot: It's 1986, and Ulrich's brother, Mads, has been missing for a month. Confusion reigns as past and present intertwine.

1.title: FR - Dark - S01E04 - Double Lives
1.plot: Bizarre occurrences give Charlotte a sense of déjà vu, and she suspects Peter is hiding something. Franziska snaps when Magnus confronts her.

1.title: FR - Dark - S01E05 - Truths
1.plot: Hannah takes her obsession with Ulrich too far. The stranger asks Regina to deliver an important package. Martha is torn between Jonas and Bartosz.

1.title: FR - Dark - S01E06 - Sic Mundus Creatus Est
1.plot: Ulrich looks to the past for answers and dredges up disturbing family secrets. Armed with new tools, Jonas probes the cave's murky depths.

1.title: FR - Dark - S01E07 - Crossroads
1.plot: Ulrich questions a frail and frightened Helge in the nursing home. Jonas searches for Mikkel, but the stranger warns him about meddling with the past.

1.title: FR - Dark - S01E08 - As You Sow, So You Shall Reap
1.plot: In 1953, the disfigured bodies of two boys are exhumed at a construction site, the future location of Winden's nuclear power plant.

1.title: FR - Dark - S01E09 - Everything Is Now
1.plot: Ulrich runs afoul of the law, Helge tries to dodge Egon Tiedemann, Claudia harnesses the cave's powers, and Katharina lashes out at Hannah.

1.title: FR - Dark - S01E10 - Alpha and Omega
1.plot: Peter gets a shock. Jonas learns the truth about his family, but there are more surprises still to come. Helge makes a sacrifice.

2.title: FR - Dark - S02E01 - Beginnings and Endings
2.plot: Six months after the disappearances, the police form a task force. In 2052, Jonas learns that most of Winden perished in an apocalyptic event.

2.title: FR - Dark - S02E02 - Dark Matter
2.plot: Clausen and Charlotte interview Regina. The Stranger takes Hannah to 1987, where Claudia has an unnerving encounter and Egon visits an old nemesis.

2.title: FR - Dark - S02E03 - Ghosts
2.plot: In 1954, a missing Helge returns, but he'll only speak to Noah. In 1987, Claudia brings the time machine to Tannhaus, and Egon questions Ulrich again.

2.title: FR - Dark - S02E04 - The Travelers
2.plot: Jonas meets an ominous figure. While the kids comb the cave for answers, the adults gather in the bunker to share what they know about the travelers.

2.title: FR - Dark - S02E05 - Lost and Found
2.plot: In 1987, Ulrich seizes an opportunity. The kids return to the cave with the time machine, and Jonas learns of a loophole that could change the future.

2.title: FR - Dark - S02E06 - An Endless Cycle
2.plot: Armed with a plan to prevent the apocalypse, Jonas travels to 2019. During the Nielsens' anniversary party, Ulrich sneaks off with Hannah.

2.title: FR - Dark - S02E07 - The White Devil
2.plot: Martha meets the Stranger and learns his true identity. Claudia tries to prevent Egon's death in 1987. Hannah travels to 1954 to see Ulrich.

2.title: FR - Dark - S02E08 - Endings and Beginnings
2.plot: On the day of the apocalypse, Clausen executes a search warrant at the power plant as Jonas and Claudia use the time machine to connect past and future.

3.title: FR - Dark - S03E01 - Deja-vu
3.plot: In 2019, Jonas emerges from the cave into a strange but familiar world: the town of Winden, reeling from the recent disappearance of a young boy.

3.title: FR - Dark - S03E02 - The Survivors
3.plot: Martha travels to 1888 to warn her friends about the 2020 disaster. Winden residents past and present search for their missing loved ones.

3.title: FR - Dark - S03E03 - Adam and Eva
3.plot: Charlotte and Ulrich try to piece together what happened in the bunker. In different times and worlds, Jonas and Martha work to gain each other's trust.

3.title: FR - Dark - S03E04 - The Origin
3.plot: Martha and Jonas travel to 2052 and get a glimpse of a grim future. In 1954, two residents of Winden go missing, and Hannah receives surprising news.

3.title: FR - Dark - S03E05 - Life and Death
3.plot: In 2020, a visitor delivers a warning to Claudia. The day before the apocalypse, Jonas begins to question Eva's motives.

3.title: FR - Dark - S03E06 - Light and Shadow
3.plot: Adam holds Martha captive in 2020. On the day of the apocalypse, an increasingly frantic Martha begs Bartosz for his help.

3.title: FR - Dark - S03E07 - Between the Time
3.plot: Across three centuries, Winden's residents continue their desperate quest to alter their fate and save their loved ones.

3.title: FR - Dark - S03E08 - The Paradise
3.plot: Claudia reveals to Adam how everything is connected — and how he can destroy the knot.

FR - Scarlet Heart [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Zhang Xiao is a typical modern day 9-to-5 white-collar worker struggling day to day to advance her career. Her dreams of the future mirrored those of any modern day city worker - a home, travel and love. One day, Zhang Xiao's life changes dramatically when she is involved in a car accident and her soul is transported into the past. She wakes to finds herself in the imperial residence of the eighth prince, Yinsi, during the reign of Kangxi Emperor of the Qing Dynasty. She is tended by maidservants who refer to her as Second Miss Ma'ertai Ruoxi, 16-year old daughter of a Manchu aristocrat and younger sister of the eighth prince's concubine Ma'ertai Roulan, and tell her that she is recuperating from a fall.

1.title: FR - Scarlet Heart [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: The fourth prince, Yinzhen, brings some medicine for Ruoxi and asks her to cherish her life. Having recovered, Ruoxi volunteers to read letters to her elder sister but is ridiculed for not knowing many of the words. Determined not to seem illiterate, she begins to study but is persuaded by the tenth prince, Yin'e, to go horse riding. Being unable to ride, Ruoxi fears that that she would be revealed as an impostor but she is fortunate that Yinsi has selected the best horse for her. On Yin'e's birthday, Yinsi selects Roulan to manage the celebrations. Before the celebrations, Ruoxi and Gororo Mingyu, younger sister of Yinsi's wife Gororo Minghui's, argue over a rabbit that Ruoxi had captured but had been stolen by Mingyu. Ruoxi uses Yin'e's hound to get revenge on Mingyu but inadvertently injures the prince in their resulting fight. Yin'e's birthday celebrations are a success and Ruolan is soundly praised by all the attendees except Minghui.

1.title: FR - HAPPY! - S01E01 - Saint Nick
1.plot: A hit man must partner with an imaginary blue winged horse to rescue a missing child.

1.title: FR - HAPPY! - S01E02 - What Smiles Are For
1.plot: Sax crashes a high-stakes poker game to win guns and cash for an escape from New York as Happy tries to convince him he's a father. Ex-wife Amanda and ex-lover Merry team up to rescue Hailey.

1.title: FR - HAPPY! - S01E03 - When Christmas Was Christmas
1.plot: Sax journeys through a dark past while he and Happy track his daughter. Merry and Amanda make a chilling discovery. Very Bad Santa coerces information out of Hailey about her dad.

1.title: FR - HAPPY! - S01E04 - Year of the Horse
1.plot: Sax and Happy follow their fortunes to Chinatown. Blue's sister shows up seeking revenge for the murder of her sons. Merry's search draws her ever closer to Very Bad Santa.

1.title: FR - HAPPY! - S01E05 - White Sauce? Hot Sauce?
1.plot: Sax and Happy go separate ways following a destructive family reunion; Merry is under investigation by Internal Affairs. Hailey and children are introduced to a far more terrifying prison.

1.title: FR - HAPPY! - S01E06 - The Scrapyard of Childish Things
1.plot: Sax and Happy embark on lonely journey in which Sax stumbles on a new plan to negotiate for his daughter's release and Happy takes solace in the welcoming arms of another Imaginary Friend.

1.title: FR - HAPPY! - S01E07 - Destroyer of Worlds
1.plot: Finally reunited, Sax and Happy make one last push to save Hailey. Amanda pursues a dangerous lead all by herself. Blue and Isabella come to blows over a dark family secret.

1.title: FR - HAPPY! - S01E08 - I Am the Future
1.plot: With Christmas approaching, Sax and Happy are locked in a climatic confrontation to rescue Hailey from Very Bad Santa's lair as Merry sets out to save Amanda from a far more powerful foe.

2.title: FR - HAPPY! - S02E01 - The War on Easter
2.plot: Sax is clean...ish... but somehow the filth just seems to find him.

2.title: FR - HAPPY! - S02E02 - Tallahassee
2.plot: Hailey spends a day with dad. These mitzvahs are murder.

2.title: FR - HAPPY! - S02E03 - Some Girls Need a Lot of Repenting
2.plot: A simple B&E, they said. Introducing the captivating Bebe DeBarge. A very Smoothie Easter Egg Hunt.

2.title: FR - HAPPY! - S02E04 - Blitzkrieg!!!
2.plot: Who the hell is Dayglo Doug? Sax, Merry & Happy enter a geriatric death trap. Don't eat the jelly.

2.title: FR - HAPPY! - S02E05 - 19 Hours and 13 Minutes
2.plot: Sax ate the jelly. Trips B, D, all of it. And on Hailey's birthday. Amanda makes a breakthrough.

2.title: FR - HAPPY! - S02E06 - Pervapalooza
2.plot: Meet Janet, you ape. Happy moves way past the (imaginary) Friend Zone. Sax and Merry get slimy.

2.title: FR - HAPPY! - S02E07 - Arlo and Marie
2.plot: This is one F-d up family dinner.

2.title: FR - HAPPY! - S02E08 - A Friend of Death
2.plot: Smoothie + Hailey take a trip into the past. Sax hits rock bottom. Good thing Happy brought a cake.

2.title: FR - HAPPY! - S02E09 - Five Chicken Fingers and a Gun
2.plot: Amanda's blessed day arrives. Sax and Amanda will have to play Smoothie's game to get to Hailey.

2.title: FR - HAPPY! - S02E10 - Resurrection
2.plot: Season Finale. Sonny's Eggtacular = lit. Sax, Amanda, Happy save Hailey from worse than death.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S01E01 - AKA Ladies Night
1.plot: Jessica Jones is hired to find a pretty NYU student who's vanished, but it turns out to be more than a simple missing persons case.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S01E02 - AKA Crush Syndrome
1.plot: Jessica vows to prove Hope's innocence, even though it means tracking down a terrifying figure from her own past.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S01E03 - AKA It's Called Whiskey
1.plot: It won't be easy to acquire or deploy, but Jessica thinks she's found a weapon to use against Kilgrave. Luke and Jessica bond over their similarities.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S01E04 - AKA 99 Friends
1.plot: A new case demands attention as Jessica tries to find out who's spying on her for Kilgrave. Trish's radio show yields unexpected consequences.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S01E05 - AKA The Sandwich Saved Me
1.plot: Despite Jessica's objections, Trish's new friend Simpson gets involved in the hunt for Kilgrave. Jessica recalls a pivotal moment in her life.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S01E06 - AKA You're a Winner!
1.plot: Luke hires Jessica to help him find someone who may have skipped town, but she fears he'll learn too much about her history in the process.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S01E07 - AKA Top Shelf Perverts
1.plot: Malcolm, Simpson and Trish go rogue to prevent Jessica from carrying out an extreme plan to outwit Kilgrave.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S01E08 - AKA WWJD?
1.plot: Jessica experiences a strange homecoming courtesy of Kilgrave. Hograth's conflict with her estranged wife reaches a tipping point.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S01E09 - AKA Sin Bin
1.plot: Just when Jessica has Kilgrave right where she want's him, Hogarth's involvement complicates the situation. Details of Kilgrave's past emerge.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S01E10 - AKA 1,000 Cuts
1.plot: A discovery has the potential to change the entire game - if Jessica can refuse Kilgrave's offer.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S01E11 - AKA I've Got the Blues
1.plot: Jessica searches morgues for clues. Trish goes all out to keep Simpson from getting in Jessica's way. Malcolm has an epiphany.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S01E12 - AKA Take a Bloody Number
1.plot: The hunt for Kilgrave reunites Jessica with Luke. Trish receives some unexpected information about Simpson and Jessica.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S01E13 - AKA Smile
1.plot: Jessica and Luke get help from someone else in the neighborhood. Kilgrave gears up for a major test of powers against Jessica.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S02E01 - AKA Start at the Beginning
2.plot: While Jessica deals with a rival PI and a paranoid would-be client, Trish digs up a medical file that could unlock the mystery of Jessica's powers.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S02E02 - AKA Freak Accident
2.plot: Jessica sets out to find Dr. Kozlov and makes a startling discovery. Trish recruits Malcolm for backup as she visits a figure from her past.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S02E03 - AKA Sole Survivor
2.plot: As her visions intensify, Jessica visits an abandoned clinic, where she stumbles on a new lead. Jeri faces an ultimatum after her secret gets out.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S02E04 - AKA God Help the Hobo
2.plot: Between anger management classes and tabloid scandals, Jessica and Trish track down a third patient linked to IGH. Oscar extends an olive branch.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S02E05 - AKA The Octopus
2.plot: Backed into a corner, Jessica's forced to share her intel on the killer. A groggy Trish tries to pull herself together before an important meeting.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S02E06 - AKA Facetime
2.plot: Jessica gate-crashes an exclusive country club on the hunt for the killer, and Trish's new addiction begins to spiral out of control.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S02E07 - AKA I Want Your Cray Cray
2.plot: Flashbacks shed new light on the aftermath of the family's car accident and reveal a painful turning point in Jessica's adult life.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S02E08 - AKA Ain't We Got Fun
2.plot: While Jessica debates her next move, Malcolm confronts Trish about her erratic behavior, and Jeri makes contact with a healer.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S02E09 - AKA Shark in the Bathtub, Monster in the Bed
2.plot: The shooting forces Jessica to rethink her plans. Meanwhile, Oscar asks for help with a family crisis, and Trish's frustrations finally boil over.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S02E10 - AKA Pork Chop
2.plot: Jeri finagles a deal for her new client in exchange for Karl's location. Trish forges ahead with her own investigation. A prison guard crosses a line.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S02E11 - AKA Three Lives and Counting
2.plot: Shocked by her own actions and haunted by visions of Kilgrave, Jessica worries she's turning into a monster. Trish's plans for Karl become clear.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S02E12 - AKA Pray for My Patsy
2.plot: As Jessica and Dorothy wait anxiously for updates on Trish, a call from Costa brings alarming news. Jeri hatches a plan to get her revenge.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S02E13 - AKA Playland
2.plot: Waking up in unfamiliar surroundings, Jessica once again finds herself torn between two worlds and facing an impossible choice.

3.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S03E01 - AKA The Perfect Burger
3.plot: As Jessica focuses on helping the helpless, Dorothy Walker shows up at Alias to beg for help finding a missing Trish.

3.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S03E02 - AKA You're Welcome
3.plot: Tensions run high between Jessica and Trish as Trish hones her new catlike skills and scours the city for a chance to be a hero.

3.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S03E03 - AKA I Have No Spleen
3.plot: Itching to get back out on the streets and find her attacker, Jessica defies her doctor's advice. Jeri reconnects with her college flame Kith.

3.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S03E04 - AKA Customer Service is Standing By
3.plot: Jessica learns there's more to Erik than meets the eye as they track down three potential attackers. Malcolm digs up dirt on Kith's husband.

3.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S03E05 - AKA I Wish
3.plot: Teaming up with Trish to stake out Sallinger, Jessica makes a startling discovery. Jeri's plot to expose Peter yields unexpected consequences.

3.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S03E06 - AKA Sorry Face
3.plot: As the police sift through the gruesome crime scene, Jessica and Trish race to find Sallinger's latest captive.

3.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S03E07 - AKA The Double Half-Wappinger
3.plot: Jessica and Trish go on a road trip to dig into Sallinger's past and unearth a horrifying discovery.

3.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S03E08 - AKA Camera Friendly
3.plot: When Sallinger posts a video teasing his next crime, Jessica responds with her own media play. Jeri demands that Malcolm identify the masked woman.

3.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S03E09 - AKA I Did Something Today
3.plot: After a shocking blow, Jessica's forced to choose between protecting Trish and destroying Sallinger. Jeri seizes a chance to get back in Kith's life.

3.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S03E10 - AKA Hero Pants
3.plot: Jessica wrestles with her emotions as she tries to untangle herself from a murder investigation.

3.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S03E11 - AKA Hellcat
3.plot: Trish revisits her troubled childhood with Dorothy while plotting to stop Sallinger and stamp out evil across the city.

3.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S03E12 - AKA A Lotta Worms
3.plot: As Trish makes a move on Sallinger, Jessica intervenes -- and ends up caught in a harrowing dance with the killer.

3.title: FR - Marvel's Jessica Jones - S03E13 - AKA Everything
3.plot: An old friend visits Jessica as she sets out on an agonizing mission and learns the true cost of being a hero.

meta.plot: Hantée par un passé traumatisant, la détective privée Jessica Jones cherche celui qui la persécute avant qu'il ne trouve quelqu'un d'autre à torturer à Hell's Kitchen.

1.title: FR - Malibu Rescue: La série - S01E01 - Fresh Off the Bus
1.plot: A summer of fun begins as the Flounders take control of Tower 2. But Brody’s bad attitude inspires a risky plan -- and a radical transformation.

1.title: FR - Malibu Rescue: La série - S01E02 - Escape from Party Beach
1.plot: After Garvin blames the Flounders for bad buzz, Tyler and the team prepare for a dazzling reputation reboot.

1.plot: As Junior Rescue celebrates Family Day, Lizzie attempts to hide a secret, Dylan pursues a new passion, and Tyler faces his toughest critic.

1.title: FR - Malibu Rescue: La série - S01E05 - Stranger Flings
1.plot: Things take a tender turn as Eric unpacks his feelings. Meanwhile, Gina encounters a new rival, and Dylan opens up to Tyler.

1.title: FR - Malibu Rescue: La série - S01E06 - With a Little Kelp from My Friends
1.plot: Mystery and mischief collide as the boys partake in a super-secret project, and the girls team up for a sticky situation.

1.title: FR - Malibu Rescue: La série - S01E07 - Pier Pressure
1.plot: As the sun begins to set on Junior Rescue season, a staff shake-up leads to a new normal -- and a "special assignment" -- for the Flounders.

1.title: FR - Malibu Rescue: La série - S01E08 - Every Rose Has Its Thornton
1.plot: Dylan, Lizzie, Gina, Eric and Tyler bid farewell to summer with one last mission: to foil Thornton's devious plans.

meta.plot: A l'heure d'enterrer son père, Jolanne de Valcourt, une jeune femme, belle, insoumise et sensuelle, est abominablement trahie par son demi-frère et accusée à tort. Ses aventures la mènent en Inde où elle sera vendue, puis traquée, puis princesse. Entre vengeance et passion, Jolanne devient Rani, héroïne, femme moderne, autant aimée que trahie. Cette série retrace dix ans d'amour et d'aventures entre Jolanne et le bel officier anglais, Craig Walker, dans une Inde du 18ème siècle aussi voluptueuse que raffinée.

1.plot: As Ilana continues her pursuit of Flag, The Bride shows Nina where she was created -- and relives Frankenstein's rocky attempts to woo her.

1.plot: As the Creature Commandos attempt to save The Bride and Nina, GI Robot relives his glory days -- and finally gets his wish.

FR - Le Monde magique de Jérôme Commandeur - S01E05 - Episode 5
