FR - Le Monde magique de Jérôme Commandeur - S01E08 - Episode 8

meta.plot: Un jour, j’ai ouvert mon placard. J’y ai trouvé du latex, du silicone, des invités, des faux-cils, du talon aiguille, des fausses dents, du khôl, des lentilles, de la moumoute, de la talonnette… J’ai tout mis. Pas en même temps bien sûr.

Accusé à tort de trahison, Edmond Dantès, un jeune marin, est emprisonné sans procès au Château d'If, une sinistre forteresse au large de Marseille. Après de nombreuses années de captivité, il s'échappe enfin et, sous l'identité du Comte de Monte-Cristo, il prévoit de se venger de ceux qui l'ont injustement condamné.

1.title: FR - Le Comte de Monte-Cristo - S01E01 - The Letter
1.plot: A 19-year-old sailor is falsely imprisoned for treason in the island fortress Château d'If near Marseille without trial. Escaping after many years in captivity and becoming the Count of Monte Cristo

1.title: FR - Le Comte de Monte-Cristo - S01E02 - The Castle
1.plot: Edmond, imprisoned for ten years, meets Abbé Faria, a fellow inmate digging an escape tunnel, sparking a chance at freedom.

1.title: FR - Le Comte de Monte-Cristo - S01E03 - The Treasure
1.plot: Edmond arrives in Marseille and learns that his father has died and that Mercedes has marries and moved to Paris. During his visit to Mrseille, he encounters a young Italian man named Jacopo with whom he escapes to Italy by boat. After an evening at Jacopo's home, Edmond borrows Jacopo's boat and navigates to the Island of Monte-Cristo in search of the lost treasure.

1.title: FR - Le Comte de Monte-Cristo - S01E04 - The Red Room
1.plot: Five years after Edmond becomes the Count of Monte Cristo, he meets his enemies in Paris. Edmond invites them all to dinner and tells a spooky story about a newborn baby buried alive, which horrifies several of his guests.

meta.plot: Parodie des séries policières enchaînant les séquences invraisemblables et cocasses. Véritable loup solitaire, l'inspecteur Angie Tribeca et ses collègues de la police de Los Angeles, mènent l'enquête sur des affaires des plus sérieuses : du meurtre d'un ventriloque à une vague de suicides de boulangers.

1.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Angie Tribeca is assigned a new partner, Jay Geils, to find the mayor's blackmailer and bring him to justice.

1.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S01E02 - The Wedding Planner Did It
1.plot: Tribeca tracks down a baker's murderer before anyone else gets hurt.

1.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S01E03 - The Famous Ventriloquist Did It
1.plot: Tribeca delves into the salacious world of American ventriloquism to investigate a murder.

1.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S01E04 - The Thumb Affair
1.plot: Tribeca and Geils search high and low for a missing priceless work of art.

1.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S01E05 - Commissioner Bigfish
1.plot: Tribeca and Geils poke around into a prostitution ring, but the lieutenant is afraid of what they might uncover and orders them to stop.

1.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S01E06 - Ferret Royale
1.plot: Illegal pet ferrets are leaking into California, so Tribeca and Geils follow a trail that leads them to a high stakes poker game.

1.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S01E07 - Tribeca's Day Off
1.plot: Ordered to take a day off, Tribeca dabbles in civilian life, while Tanner and Geils solve a murder on a golf course.

1.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S01E08 - Murder in the First Class
1.plot: Another dead passenger arrives at LAX, so the gang goes undercover aboard an airplane to catch the killer in the act.

1.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S01E09 - Inside Man
1.plot: A band of British gangsters robs another bank, and after Tribeca and Geils infiltrate the gang, they somehow get stuck in prison.

2.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S02E01 - Fleas Don't Kill Me
2.plot: A man is found dead in a dog park, and Lieutenant Atkins doesn't think Tribeca is ready for the case because she hates dogs and just woke up from a coma.

2.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S02E02 - Miso Dead
2.plot: Tensions flare between Tribeca and Scholls after the skull of a missing sushi chef is fished out of the ocean. Why? Because they're in a love triangle with Geils. It actually has very little to do with the case.

2.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S02E03 - Beach Blanket Sting-O
2.plot: Geils goes undercover as a lifeguard after a string of suspicious drownings, but Tribeca is worried that he's getting in too deep.

2.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S02E04 - You've Got Blackmail
2.plot: A massive conspiracy is set in motion after a seedy dating website is hacked for seemingly vague reasons.

2.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S02E05 - A Coldie but a Goodie
2.plot: Tribeca believes that a 102-year-old's death isn't as natural as everyone thinks, but her concerns aren't heard because of her probation.

2.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S02E06 - Organ Trail
2.plot: Atkins assigns a romance novelist to aid Geils and Tribeca in their attempt to bust an organ thief at a local hospital. Why? Why not? Does anything have to make sense anymore? Or can shows just do whatever they want with no explanation?

2.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S02E07 - Boyz II Dead
2.plot: Geils and Tanner investigate the mysterious death of a reunited boy band member while Tribeca finally meets with Sgt. Pepper. Why? Seemingly, he's connected to Mayhem Global, but what is Mayhem Global and why do they keep bringing it up?

2.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S02E08 - The Coast is Fear
2.plot: A member of the Coast Guard is murdered, and somehow Tribeca and Geils connect it to Mayhem Global. Why? What is the point of all of this? What is it all leading to?

2.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S02E09 - Contains Graphic Designer Violence
2.plot: When a graphic designer is found dead, all evidence points to Tribeca. Why?! What does it mean?! It's just needless cliffhanger after needless cliffhanger with absolutely no accountability for narrative satisfaction!

2.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S02E10 - Electoral Dysfunction
2.plot: The thrilling conclusion to Season 2. Every question answered. Every twist explained. A logically and emotionally gratifying finale that is sure to silence all critics and guarantee a third season.

3.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S03E01 - Welcome Back, Blotter
3.plot: Angie Tribeca retires to become a stay at home mom. Show’s over, right? Wrong. A trophy hunter goes missing and she’s back on the case, which will definitely take nine more episodes to solve.

3.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S03E02 - Murder Gras
3.plot: Tribeca has a hunch that the trophy hunter hunter has struck again, this time in New Orleans. It’s all gators and gumbo as Tribeca heads to the Big Easy in hopes of catching the killer before he strikes again. But everything is not as it seems to be.

3.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S03E03 - Brockman Turner Overdrive
3.plot: When a beloved college badminton star is the suspect of a hit-and-run, everyone turns a blind eye, because, as we all know, L.A.'s a badminton city. But not Tribeca and Geils, who find "fault" with the case and won't "let" it go.

3.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S03E04 - Turn Me On, Geils
3.plot: A brilliant robotics specialist is found dead in his lab. No one knows who killed him, which makes Tribeca's job a lot harder. The only one who can offer any insight into the case is the victim's magnetic assistant, who takes a liking to Geils.

3.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S03E05 - This Sounds Unbelievable, but CSI: Miami Did It
3.plot: Natalie Portman's in this one, but also a man falls from the sky and the team investigates a lead in space.

3.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S03E06 - Hey, I'm Solvin' Here!
3.plot: When a middle-aged white man is murdered in New York, the team goes there based on Tribeca's belief that the serial killer they've been tracking is the culprit. No one's on board with her theory, but as the main character, she drives the plot.

3.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S03E07 - License to Drill
3.plot: When a sultry woman convinces Geils to investigate whether her husband is having an affair, he dons his P.I. hat, which lands him in trouble. Think Chinatown, because that's where this story comes from.

3.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S03E08 - If You See Something, Solve Something
3.plot: A naked woman crawls out of a child's backpack and doesn't remember a thing. Why? She couldn't tell you. Tribeca helps her trace her steps while Geils and Tanner track down a murderer on the run from prison.

3.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S03E09 - Germs of Endearment
3.plot: When an outbreak of a lethal virus threatens to liquefy everyone in Los Angeles and perhaps the world, the team realizes this might be the season's serial killer's magnum opus.

3.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S03E10 - Go Get 'Em, Tiger
3.plot: People are still solid, but Dr. Scholls turns up missing, and the serial killer is still on the loose. Meanwhile, Lt. Atkins has a beautiful outdoor wedding. Do the two converge? That would tie things up nicely in the end.

4.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S04E01 - The Force Wakes Up
4.plot: After 20 years in prison, Angie is reunited with her old team and son A.J., now part of the Special Division Force. The teams first assignment is to infiltrate a hospital to find a potential assassin of French Ambassador, Pierre Cardin.

4.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S04E02 - Glitch Perfect
4.plot: Tribeca is undercover as a high school glee club coach to stop a highly prolific distributor of malware and computer exploits. But first, her glee club must come in first place at their final competition.

4.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S04E03 - Joystick Luck Club
4.plot: The team investigates an attack on popular E-Sports gamer, Bondevil. A.J. is sent to join and infiltrate the QuarkSpark team where he learns of a secret underground money laundering system within the E-Sports world.

4.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S04E04 - Just the Fat, Ma'am
4.plot: Tribeca is sent undercover to investigate a string of dead models from “Popular Magazine.” The only catch, the fingerprints on all of the bodies belong to dead Peruvian men. The remainder of the team heads to Peru to investigate.

4.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S04E05 - Trader Foes
4.plot: Angie and Team go undercover to infiltrate Lowercase Capital, a successful Wall Street-like corporation, in connection with the murder of an eccentric billionaire.

4.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S04E06 - Freezing Cold Prestige Drama
4.plot: In Fargo, South Dakota, the team is tasked with waiting for the arrival of a certain truck, the contents of which are unknown to the team. Charo and AJ cover up an unfortunate incident which has ties to the mysterious arrival of the truck.

4.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S04E07 - Behind the Scandalabra
4.plot: The team is recruited by the Vice President to cover up a Cabinet members extra-marital affair after the suitor mysteriously dies.

4.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S04E08 - Heading to the Legal Beagle
4.plot: The team works alongside a victim suing a popular law office for covering up negligence at FarmTech, a farming company with an alleged pesticide problem.

4.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S04E09 - Irrational Treasures
4.plot: Atkins' family secret leads the team on a race across the country to beat Pierre Cardin in stealing the Louisiana Purchase.

4.title: FR - Angie Tribeca - S04E10 - Air Force Two
4.plot: After stealing the Louisiana Purchase and kidnapping Cardin, Tribeca and A.J. are wanted fugitives. Tribeca goes undercover one last time to expose Vice President Perry.

meta.plot: Reconstituer le crime élément après élément, établir un scénario possible grâce à la recherche du moindre détail, déterminer le "comment" plutôt que le "pourquoi", mettre à jour le mode opératoire et non plus seulement le mobile... Telle est la mission des enquêteurs de R.I.S.

meta.plot: Lorsque le Président disparaît, Alphonse Dumoulin, professeur d'Histoire à la retraite devient le Président de la République. La tâche s'annonce rude pour le brave homme. En effet, les pires rumeurs circulent sur l'état du pays !

1.title: FR - The Gifted - S01E01 - eXposed
1.plot: A suburban couple is forced to flee from a hostile government after their teenage children begin to show they possess certain powers.

1.title: FR - The Gifted - S01E02 - rX
1.plot: After exerting her powers beyond their limits, Blink goes into a state of shock, forcing Caitlin and Eclipse to go on a mission to find a special serum that will help her to recover. Meanwhile, Reed faces some difficult choices when it comes to helping his family, and Polaris runs into some trouble.

1.title: FR - The Gifted - S01E03 - eXodus
1.plot: In an effort to reunite with one another, Reed cuts a deal with the Sentinel Services and Caitlin and the kids seek help from someone outside the compound. Meanwhile, Thunderbird begins to teach Blink how to control her powers.

1.title: FR - The Gifted - S01E04 - eXit strategy
1.plot: When the mutants devise a plan to take down Sentinel Services, Eclipse seeks out an old friend from his dark past in order to obtain some useful information. Meanwhile, Lauren and Andy attempt to combine their powers in order to help the group.

1.title: FR - The Gifted - S01E05 - boXed in
1.plot: Motivated by a tragic event from his past, Jace throws all the power of the Sentinel Services into finding the Mutant Underground Way Station. Meanwhile, Blink’s vivid dreams lead her to confront Dreamer.

1.title: FR - The Gifted - S01E06 - got your siX
1.plot: Thunderbird coordinates a mission to discover what Sentinel Services had done to an old friend of his and Lauren encounters a new friend with useful powers.

1.title: FR - The Gifted - S01E07 - eXtreme measures
1.plot: Eclipse's ex-lover returns; Reed and Sage find alarming information about Lauren's new friend; Thunderbird helps Blink open up about her past; Jace approves a special surveillance program.

1.title: FR - The Gifted - S01E08 - threat of eXtinction
1.plot: The group faces a threat when they discover a new refugee is a spy working for Sentinel Services; Reed visits his estranged father and learns secrets that could prove useful.

1.title: FR - The Gifted - S01E09 - outfoX
1.plot: The team develops a risky plan to help mutants who are in Sentinel Services' custody. Reed reveals details to Andy and Lauren about the Struckers' family history that could prove to be a game-changer.

1.title: FR - The Gifted - S01E10 - eXploited
1.plot: At a moral crossroads, Jace is forced to hand over something valuable to Dr. Campbell. The team at Mutant HQ is divided on what they should do next, so Reed and Caitlin take matters into their own hands.

1.title: FR - The Gifted - S01E11 - 3 X 1
1.plot: As tensions heat up among the team at Mutant HQ, no one knows who they can trust. Fearing for his family's safety, Reed rethinks their future at the compound. Meanwhile, Dr. Campbell proposes an improved program to Jace that could change everything.

1.title: FR - The Gifted - S01E12 - eXtraction
1.plot: Dr. Campbell attends an anti-mutant summit, attempting to take the Hound program national, and some of the team at Mutant HQ goes on a dangerous mission to stop his efforts.

1.title: FR - The Gifted - S01E13 - X-roads
1.plot: Polaris learns more about her past and makes a crucial decision that could have impactful consequences. Meanwhile, the Mutant HQ comes under attack and, with everything to lose, relationships are put to the test and alliances shift.

2.title: FR - The Gifted - S02E01 - eMergence
2.plot: Reeva Payge purges the Inner Circle of those who disagree with her, leaving her completely in charge. Then, fast-forward six months, when the Mutant Underground saves a girl, but not her family, from a Sentinel raid. Against the group's wishes, Eclipse and Caitlin meet with a criminal hacker to get info on the Inner Circle. Meanwhile, Polaris prepares for the birth of her baby, her contractions magnetizing anything metal and wreaking havoc. She also makes Andy promise to save the baby, no matter what.

2.title: FR - The Gifted - S02E02 - unMoored
2.plot: Thunderbird contacts a mutant lawyer who recruited him to the Underground years ago, hoping she can help him find the Inner Circle. Lauren and Andy have a shared dream, which distracts Andy from his training and prompts Reeva to consider cutting her losses with him, which, in turn, makes Andy second-guess his separation from his sister. Meanwhile, Reed must keep a huge secret from the group and Jace picks up the mutants' trail again

2.title: FR - The Gifted - S02E03 - coMplications
2.plot: Polaris' baby begins to suffer from a deadly illness, leaving the Inner Circle unable to heal her, and prompting them to turn to an unexpected source for help. Meanwhile, Reed and Lauren take an excursion to deliver illegal meds, but Reed's powers complicate their plans. Then, Thunderbird and Blink meet the leader of the Morlocks - a shadowy group of mutants that live underground - who offers to help them find the Inner Circle, but the two factions may not have the same goals.

2.title: FR - The Gifted - S02E04 - outMatched
2.plot: The Struckers, minus Andy, begin to rebuild their broken trust, while Thunderbird, Blink and Eclipse visit Wire, hoping to convince him to help again. But when they get there, they learn that something terrible has happened from Wire's brother, Graph. The team discovers that the Inner Circle is on the way to raid a mutant detention facility, so they make moves to try to intercept them. Meanwhile, Jace is contacted by a member of the Purifiers.

2.title: FR - The Gifted - S02E05 - afterMath
2.plot: As Caitlin and Thunderbird struggle to save the life of a mutant injured in the Inner Circle's chaotic liberation of a psychiatric hospital, they discover clues to the identity of the powerful mutant Polaris and Andy were sent to retrieve. Meanwhile, as Jace joins up with the Purifiers to chase down the escaped mutants, he comes dangerously close to colliding once again with the Mutant Underground.

2.title: FR - The Gifted - S02E06 - iMprint
2.plot: The Inner Circle prepares for a secret ambush, but Polaris is reluctant to join and Reeva tasks Esme with getting Polaris on board. Esme confides in Polaris, revealing her and her sisters' troublesome past. Meanwhile, Thunderbird trains Reed on controlling his powers and The Purifiers attack The Mutant Underground as they attempt to rescue a group of homeless mutants.

2.title: FR - The Gifted - S02E07 - no Mercy
2.plot: Reeva reveals her plans for a major mission for the Inner Circle to secure some needed funds. Meanwhile, the Mutant Underground must contend with Reed's unstable powers, hoping that some medical help from Caitlin and Lauren will keep his destruction in check. Also, Jace is introduced to Benedict Ryan, a well-connected public figure who supports the efforts of the Purifers, but the two may not see eye-to-eye. Then, Thunderbird finally confronts Blink about her dealings with Urg, after weeks of tension over their meeting.

2.title: FR - The Gifted - S02E08 - the dreaM
2.plot: In attempts to stabilize Reed's powers, Reed, Caitlin and Lauren meet with Dr. Risman, a doctor who treats patients with debilitating X genes. However, Lauren finds out Dr. Risman is not who she thought she was. Following the Inner Circle's bank ambush, Thunderbird and Blink continue to work together to chase them down. Meanwhile, Polaris reflects on her troubled relationship with her father and takes steps to protect Dawn from the Inner Circle.

2.title: FR - The Gifted - S02E09 - gaMe changer
2.plot: Tensions within the Inner Circle are at an all-time high, as Andy comes to Rebecca's defense against Reeva. After making an important discovery about Dr. Risman's research, Lauren convinces Reed and Caitlin that they must take action to destroy it. Frustrated with not being taken seriously, Jace begins to strategize with the Purifiers. Meanwhile, the Mutant Underground continues to work on saving mutants. However, tensions flare between Blink and Thunderbird as they confront their differences.

2.title: FR - The Gifted - S02E11 - meMento
2.plot: Reed worries as Lauren becomes intrigued by her ancestors and their violent powers. Lorna begins to reevaluate her trust in the Inner Circle after figuring out the past of Reeva's new trainees. Meanwhile, Benedict Ryan continues to encourage Jace to take action with the Purifiers. Marcos asks Clarice to go to the Morlocks in search of information on the Inner Circle and Thunderbird gets a call from Evangeline.

2.title: FR - The Gifted - S02E12 - hoMe
2.plot: With the Inner Circle and the Purifiers on the rise, and the nation more divided than ever, the dream of the X-Men is on the verge of failure. In attempts to revive the Mutant Underground, Evangeline proposes a country-wide meeting. Meanwhile, Lauren and Andy continue to disagree in their dreams and the Frost Sisters attempt to intervene. Caitlin makes the risky suggestion of connecting with a family member for vital intel, and Lorna tries to secretly investigate Reeva's plans for the Inner Circle.

2.title: FR - The Gifted - S02E13 - teMpted
2.plot: Lauren stops sleeping so she can avoid the forces in her dreams pushing her towards joining Andy and giving in to her dark side. Glow is in trouble after being shot by the Purifiers, and Blink convinces the Morlocks to let Caitlin save Glow. Meanwhile, Polaris learns the details of what Reeva is planning, and Reed helps Lauren fight off her dreams.

2.title: FR - The Gifted - S02E14 - calaMity
2.plot: When one of the Inner Circle goes missing, Reeva intensifies security in their compound, but realizes that her plans may have already been exposed. Furious and paranoid, Reeva resorts to violence. Caitlin and Reed consider using the serum to restrict Lauren's use of her powers, hoping it will help her as she wrestles with nightmares about the Inner Circle and her ancestors. And it's the battle of two extreme ideologies when the Morlocks and the Purifiers come face-to-face in battle.

2.title: FR - The Gifted - S02E15 - Monsters
2.plot: Lauren can't access her powers when it matters most, leaving Caitlin to take matters into her own hands when they are being pursued. Reeva finally reveals her plan for the Inner Circle and it's darker than anyone could have imagined. Meanwhile, Jace confronts some regrets about his actions and is torn between pressures from the Purifiers and his own beliefs.

2.title: FR - The Gifted - S02E16 - oMens
2.plot: Reeva prepares to carry out her plan for the Inner Circle, but not everyone is on the same page. Reed struggles to manage his powers and the family realizes that without enough of the serum, it's only a matter of time before he completely loses control. Frustrated and egged on by Benedict Ryan, Jace and the Purifiers are on the attack, but for Jace, things aren't as black and white as they once were.

meta.plot: Un couple, dont les enfants ont développé des pouvoirs mutants, sont obligés de fuir lorsque le gouvernement menace de les enfermer. Ils rejoignent un réseau clandestin de mutants cachés dans des souterrains et doivent rester unis pour survivre face à l'adversité...

1.title: FR - Imposters - S01E02 - My Balls, Dickhead
1.plot: Maddie tries to hook her latest mark but finds herself drawn to the mysterious Patrick. Ezra and Richard learn that being a con artist is harder than it looks... and make a surprising discovery.

1.title: FR - Imposters - S01E03 - We Wanted Every Lie
1.plot: While Ezra, Richard and Jules find a crucial clue to Maddie’s whereabouts, Maddie's interest in Patrick rings alarm bells for Max, Sally, and their dangerous boss - The Doctor.

1.title: FR - Imposters - S01E04 - Cohen, Lenny Cohen.
1.plot: Ezra, Richard and Jules visit Maddie's parents. Sally makes a discovery with dangerous consequences. As Maddie gets closer to Patrick, Lenny Cohen shows up to set things straight.

1.title: FR - Imposters - S01E05 - Is a Shark Good or Bad?
1.plot: Enjoying their con-artist lifestyle, Ezra, Richard and Jules close in on Maddie. Lenny Cohen cleans up Sally's mess. Maddie is devastated when the Doctor gives her a new assignment.

1.title: FR - Imposters - S01E06 - The Maddie Code
1.plot: Patrick throws Maddie a birthday party with some surprising guests. Max comes to the rescue. Richard makes a shocking discovery.

1.title: FR - Imposters - S01E07 - Frog-Bikini-Eiffel Tower
1.plot: An unanticipated trip home puts Ezra at a crossroads about his future. Maddie and Patrick’s get-away is equal parts romance and deception. Jules comes face-to-face with her past.

1.title: FR - Imposters - S01E08 - In the Game
1.plot: Ezra, Richard and Jules give Maddie some life-altering information. Maddie and Max hatch a plan to save their lives, but they need the bumblers' help. Maddie and Patrick talk marriage.

1.title: FR - Imposters - S01E09 - Ladies and Gentlemen, the Doctor Is In
1.plot: As the wedding nears, Maddie struggles to keep her plan on track, Patrick tries to make a deal with Ezra, and Max teaches Richard tricks of the trade, while Jules has an unexpected encounter.

1.title: FR - Imposters - S01E10 - Always Forward, Never Back
1.plot: As Patrick and Maddie exchange marriage vows, the long-awaited showdown between con artists and FBI agents plays out, though it is unclear whose side Maddie is really on, or who will be victorious.

2.title: FR - Imposters - S02E01 - Fillion Bollar King
2.plot: In an attempt to sell the ring they stole, the Bumblers head to Richard's hometown. Maddie learns that leaving her past behind is harder than she thought.

2.title: FR - Imposters - S02E02 - Trouble Maybe
2.plot: On the run after a violent confrontation, Maddie finds refuge in an unlikely place. Meanwhile, the Bumblers hide out in Mexico as Ezra's conning ways reach risky new heights.

2.title: FR - Imposters - S02E03 - Old Unresolved Sh--
2.plot: Maddie continues to struggle with her demons. The Bumblers have to scramble to find a way back to America when they learn that the Doctor is closing in on Ezra's family.

2.title: FR - Imposters - S02E04 - Andiamo
2.plot: A sudden threat derails Maddie's attempt to find peace of mind. Ezra and Rosa's passion heats up while the Bumblers make their desperate escape across the border.

2.title: FR - Imposters - S02E05 - Maybe/Definitely
2.plot: Richard, Jules, and Poppy hit an unexpected snag in their attempt to retrieve the ring. Ezra arrives to save his family, while Maddie reconnects with her past.

2.title: FR - Imposters - S02E06 - That's Enough. Off You Go.
2.plot: Maddie tracks down the man she thinks could set her free. Jules shares more than a drink with an unlikely confidant. The Doctor makes a surprising decision regarding the Bumblers’ fate.

2.title: FR - Imposters - S02E07 - Maid Marian on Her Tip-Toed Feet
2.plot: Friends and foes converge on the Bumblers as they hide out at Jules' remote family cabin. Maddie, Sally and Max finally reunite for a perilous new con.

2.title: FR - Imposters - S02E08 - Phase Two Sucks
2.plot: In pursuit of the ring, the Bumblers don new identities under Maddie's tutelage; Ezra forms an unlikely relationship with a Toby Jug collector; Max and Sally try to dig up dirt from the Doctor's past.

2.title: FR - Imposters - S02E09 - The World Needs Heroes. Over.
2.plot: Ezra's Toby jug con leads to an unlikely encounter with an old flame; The Bumblers, Maddie, Max, and Sally set in motion their risky plan to take down the Doctor.

2.title: FR - Imposters - S02E10 - See You Soon, Macaroon
2.plot: Niagara Falls is the backdrop as the Bumblers, Maddie, Max, Sally, and Sofia try to stay one step ahead of the Doctor in an attempt to ensure their freedom and make the score of a lifetime.

meta.plot: Maddie est une maîtresse du déguisement et arnaqueuse de première. Elle s'arrange pour que des hommes et des femmes tombent amoureux d'elle, les marient puis disparaît avec leur argent. Tout se complique lorsqu'Ezra, sa cible la plus récente, rencontre une des anciennes victimes de Maggie...

1.title: FR - Private Lives [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Growing up witnessing her parents con and be conned, Cha Joo-eun tries on many hats while embarking on a rugged path of her own.

1.title: FR - Private Lives [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Jeong Bok-gi proves to be a formidable opponent. While working a new gig, Joo-eun meets Lee Jeong-hwan, who unexpectedly sweeps her off her feet.

1.title: FR - Private Lives [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: As Joo-eun looks for answers, the story behind Jeong-hwan's veiled identity is told through his first interactions with Sophia Chung and Kim Jae-wook.

1.title: FR - Private Lives [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: After her love life goes up in smoke, Joo-eun retraces Jeong-hwan's final steps and becomes acquainted with people and places from his real life.

1.title: FR - Private Lives [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Snippets of Jeong-hwan’s double life are revealed during his final mission involving Bok-gi, Jae-wook and a much-sought-after ledger.

1.title: FR - Private Lives [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Jeong-hwan keeps a close eye on people he once trusted. With a common goal in mind, Bok-gi draws up a win-win scenario to earn Joo-eun's partnership.

1.title: FR - Private Lives [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Jae-wook approaches Kim Sang-man with a plan to channel their influence into power, stemming from a bloodstained encounter dating back 20 years.

1.title: FR - Private Lives [VOSTFR] - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Through their networks and expertise, Joo-eun and Jeong-hwan uncover explosive details about each other's true identities.

1.title: FR - Private Lives [VOSTFR] - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: Jae-wook schemes to get rid of Jeong-hwan and Joo-eun and further his political agenda in one fell swoop. Jeong-hwan shows his face to Joo-eun.

1.title: FR - Private Lives [VOSTFR] - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: Joo-eun gains an unlikely ally. Tapping into remnants from past relationships, Bok-gi finds answers about Jae-wook's true motives.

1.title: FR - Private Lives [VOSTFR] - S01E11 - Episode 11
1.plot: Leveraging his knowledge of Jae-wook's strategy, Jeong-hwan secures a meeting with the opposing candidate. Joo-eun takes action to clear her name.

1.title: FR - Private Lives [VOSTFR] - S01E12 - Episode 12
1.plot: Kim Sang-man presents Jeong-hwan with answers and an ultimatum. Determined to get even with Jae-wook, Bok-gi goes after his target.

1.title: FR - Private Lives [VOSTFR] - S01E13 - Episode 13
1.plot: Much to Jae-wook's surprise, Bok-gi introduces herself as the newest member of the campaign team. Joo-eun grows suspicious of Jeong-hwan's past.

1.title: FR - Private Lives [VOSTFR] - S01E14 - Episode 14
1.plot: Bok-gi paints Yoo Byung-jun in a positive light, while Jae-wook deploys his people to bring down their opponent. A key witness comes out of hiding.

1.title: FR - Private Lives [VOSTFR] - S01E15 - Episode 15
1.plot: New evidence brings a traitor to the surface and takes competitors out of the running. Sang-man sets a trap for Jeong-hwan and Jae-wook.

1.title: FR - Private Lives [VOSTFR] - S01E16 - Episode 16
1.plot: Jeong-hwan is tasked with dismantling the GK Technology Innovative Vision Room once and for all. Bok-gi and Jae-wook put the past behind them.

meta.plot: Dans un monde où la confidentialité des données n'existe plus, des escrocs découvrent un sinistre programme de surveillance gouvernemental et une entreprise cupide.

1.plot: Episode 01.

meta.plot: In a town where clubs compete for supremacy, Ando Shintaro, the president of the "Zennichi Civil Engineering" contractors, lived a fulfilling life. Though he wasn't wealthy, he worked hard alongside his fellow colleagues. However, one day, the number one "Club Texas" appear in front of Shintaro and the others and are told that they are now under the umbrella of "Club Texas". Shintaro ponders this and consults with a lawyer regarding buying back the company. However, he is told that it's impossible since "Club Texas" on the number one club. Riki, an employee, goes into "Club Texas" on his own but gets into a fight. Furious, Shintaro rushes in to defeat the person who beat up Riki. However, the number one host there is his older brother that left 10 years ago.
Sous l'égide de Vince McMahon, la WWE a tout connu, la gloire comme la déchéance. Cette série documentaire revient sur le règne controversé du magnat du catch.

1.title: FR - Mr. McMahon : Gourou du catch - S01E01 - Junior
1.plot: Vince McMahon follows in his father's footsteps and takes the family business from the independent wrestling circuit to mainstream sports entertainment.

1.title: FR - Mr. McMahon : Gourou du catch - S01E02 - Heat
1.plot: In the real world, wrestling superstars and storylines — plus Vince's reputation — attract scandal and scrutiny in the media. A new competitor rises up.

1.title: FR - Mr. McMahon : Gourou du catch - S01E03 - Screwjob
1.plot: The lines between reality and kayfabe start to blur as WWE stars take their talents elsewhere, boosting the pedigree of a gritty competitor.

1.title: FR - Mr. McMahon : Gourou du catch - S01E04 - Attitude
1.plot: With the Monday Night Wars in motion, a new era begins at WWE as Vince takes on a bold new persona and the programming enters risqué territory.

1.title: FR - Mr. McMahon : Gourou du catch - S01E05 - Family Business
1.plot: Vince brings his family into the fold and attempts to push the envelope on-air and beyond the ring. A momentous merger changes the wrestling landscape.

1.title: FR - Mr. McMahon : Gourou du catch - S01E06 - The Finish
1.plot: After a tragedy draws attention to wrestling injuries, WWE refocuses on safety and expansion. Vince retires abruptly after unsettling allegations emerge.

meta.plot: In this interactive series, you'll make key decisions to help Bear Grylls survive, thrive and complete missions in the harshest environments on Earth.

1.title: FR - You vs. Wild - S01E01 - Operation Jungle Rescue, Pt. 1
1.plot: A doctor on a mission to deliver malaria vaccines to children is missing in the jungle, and it's up to you to help Bear find her.

1.title: FR - You vs. Wild - S01E02 - Operation Jungle Rescue, Pt. 2
1.plot: Bear needs to travel 27 miles through the thick Central American jungle to deliver medicine to a remote village. But he can't get there without you.

1.title: FR - You vs. Wild - S01E03 - Searching for a Saint Bernard
1.plot: Deep snow, crevasses and avalanches are just some of the threats Bear will face when you help him locate a lost rescue dog in the Swiss Alps.

1.title: FR - You vs. Wild - S01E04 - Lost on Snow Mountain
1.plot: Bear must survive for 24 hours on a frigid mountain pass in the Swiss Alps until help can arrive. Should he stay put or stay moving? It's your call!

1.title: FR - You vs. Wild - S01E05 - A Venomous Adventure, Pt. 1
1.plot: A cargo plane has crash-landed in a scorching desert canyon, and Bear needs your help to find it. But first, will you put him in a plane or a helicopter?

1.title: FR - You vs. Wild - S01E06 - A Venomous Adventure, Pt. 2
1.plot: Explore the desert as you help Bear comb the unforgiving landscape to acquire the venom of a snake, a scorpion and a tarantula. Can you find all three?

1.title: FR - You vs. Wild - S01E07 - Land of the Dragons
1.plot: Stranded on the cliffs above a rocky coastline, Bear has to make his way miles inland through a dense forest to safety -- all with your assistance.

1.title: FR - You vs. Wild - S01E08 - Myth of the Abandoned Mine
1.plot: Bear is dropped into a remote European wilderness near an old mining town. Can you help him find his way back to civilization?

meta.plot: L'humoriste Gad Elmaleh déménage à Los Angeles pour renouer avec son fils. Inconnu aux USA, il réapprend à vivre sans les avantages auxquels la célébrité l'a habitué.

1.title: FR - Huge en France - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Huge en France - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Huge en France - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Huge en France - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Huge en France - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Huge en France - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - Huge en France - S01E07 - Episode 7
FR - Huge en France - S01E08 - Episode 8

meta.plot: Diana Bishop a renoncé depuis longtemps à un héritage familial compliqué pour privilégier ses recherches universitaires, une vie simple et ordinaire. Jusqu’au jour où elle emprunte un manuscrit alchimique : l’Ashmole 782. Elle ignore alors qu’elle vient de réveiller un ancien et terrible secret – un secret convoité par de nombreuses et redoutables créatures. Dont Matthew Clairmont. Un tueur, lui a-t-on dit. Malgré elle, Diana se retrouve au cœur de la tourmente.

1.title: FR - Le Livre perdu des sortilèges : A Discovery Of Witches - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Things get creepy for historian and closet witch Diana Bishop when she calls up a magical manuscript. Her discovery is about to throw her back into the world of magic and into the path of Matthew Clairmont, a centuries old vampire.

1.title: FR - Le Livre perdu des sortilèges : A Discovery Of Witches - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: As Matthew fights to control his cravings, he leaves Diana to face her enemies alone. And those include powerful witch Peter Knox.

1.title: FR - Le Livre perdu des sortilèges : A Discovery Of Witches - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Diana and Matthew's relationship moves forward. But something's about to happen that will cast them both further into danger.

1.title: FR - Le Livre perdu des sortilèges : A Discovery Of Witches - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Diana gets a chilly welcome when she seeks safety at the Clairmont family home. Back in Oxford, trouble is brewing.

1.title: FR - Le Livre perdu des sortilèges : A Discovery Of Witches - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Matthew crosses a dangerous line when he returns to Oxford. Diana discovers his dark past, before something unexpected tears them apart.

1.title: FR - Le Livre perdu des sortilèges : A Discovery Of Witches - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Matthew and Baldwin race to save Diana from Satu's dangerous dark magic. In Oxford, Sophie shocks Agatha with a confession.

1.title: FR - Le Livre perdu des sortilèges : A Discovery Of Witches - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Diana's aunts' home gives up all sorts of secrets when Diana and Matthew pay a visit. Danger looms as Juliette breaks free from Gerbert.

1.title: FR - Le Livre perdu des sortilèges : A Discovery Of Witches - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: With danger at every turn, Diana and Matthew are forced to run. But will they escape in time? Series finale.

2.title: FR - Le Livre perdu des sortilèges : A Discovery Of Witches - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: Reluctant witch Diana Bishop and vampire Matthew Clairmont seek refuge in the fascinating and treacherous world of Elizabethan London. There, they must find a powerful witch to help Diana control her magic and search for the elusive Book of Life.

2.title: FR - Le Livre perdu des sortilèges : A Discovery Of Witches - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: As she continues her search for a mentor, Diana meets wealthy alchemist Mary Sidney. London's vampire ruler demands fealty from Diana and Matthew as he is unnerved by their sudden arrival in the City.

2.title: FR - Le Livre perdu des sortilèges : A Discovery Of Witches - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: In the present, Domenico makes a disturbing discovery in Oxford. Back in 1590, Matthew must beg for forgiveness from Father Hubbard.

2.title: FR - Le Livre perdu des sortilèges : A Discovery Of Witches - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: Another vicious vampire murder rocks present-day Oxford. Marcus makes a breakthrough.

2.title: FR - Le Livre perdu des sortilèges : A Discovery Of Witches - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: Matthew and Diana arrive in France on their journey to face Philippe. Elsewhere, Louisa and Kit cut a swathe through London.

2.title: FR - Le Livre perdu des sortilèges : A Discovery Of Witches - S02E06 - Episode 6
2.plot: Philippe makes a troubling discovery, provoking a conflict with Matthew. Ysabeau, Em and Sarah start to look for a message.

2.title: FR - Le Livre perdu des sortilèges : A Discovery Of Witches - S02E07 - Episode 7
2.plot: Matthew and Diana go to Bohemia to search for Edward Kelley and the Book of Life. There, they encounter the strange Emperor Rudolf II.

2.title: FR - Le Livre perdu des sortilèges : A Discovery Of Witches - S02E08 - Episode 8
2.plot: In 1590, Diana is transfixed as she tries to work out what the Book is telling her. Matthew worries over the Book's power.

2.title: FR - Le Livre perdu des sortilèges : A Discovery Of Witches - S02E09 - Episode 9
2.plot: As Diana and Matthew return to London, Diana learns news that could change everything. The Queen holds Matthew to account.

2.title: FR - Le Livre perdu des sortilèges : A Discovery Of Witches - S02E10 - Episode 10
2.plot: The second series reaches a dramatic conclusion. Realising that she must return to the present, Diana aims to complete her training.

3.title: FR - Le Livre perdu des sortilèges : A Discovery Of Witches - S03E01 - Episode 1
3.plot: Matthew and Diana return to a Sept-Tours in chaos, but amid the darkness they get some wonderful news.

3.title: FR - Le Livre perdu des sortilèges : A Discovery Of Witches - S03E02 - Episode 2
3.plot: Diana is forced to make a confession after being shocked by the appearance of a familiar face - Jack Blackfriars.

3.title: FR - Le Livre perdu des sortilèges : A Discovery Of Witches - S03E03 - Episode 3
3.plot: In New Orleans, Matthew and Marcus attempt to reconnect with Marcus' unforgiving children. Jack struggles to control his blood rage.

3.title: FR - Le Livre perdu des sortilèges : A Discovery Of Witches - S03E04 - Episode 4
3.plot: Matthew is relieved at his reconciliation with the New Orleans vampires. Diana, Phoebe and Sarah struggle to find TJ Weston.

3.title: FR - Le Livre perdu des sortilèges : A Discovery Of Witches - S03E05 - Episode 5
3.plot: Benjamin's plan to bring down the de Clermonts is set into motion, while Matthew and Diana return to Sept-Tours for a christening.

3.title: FR - Le Livre perdu des sortilèges : A Discovery Of Witches - S03E06 - Episode 6
3.plot: After receiving Benjamin's message, Matthew leaves Sept-Tours to track him down. Diana asks for help to get the Book of Life.

3.title: FR - Le Livre perdu des sortilèges : A Discovery Of Witches - S03E07 - Episode 7
3.plot: As Benjamin tortures Matthew to near death, Diana makes plans to rescue him. Revelations from the Book of Life illuminate the long-hidden secrets of creatures.

meta.plot: A Norwegian family vacationing on La Palma faces disaster when a young researcher discovers alarming signs of an imminent volcanic eruption.

1.title: FR - La Palma - S01E01 - Cry Wolf
1.plot: Fredrik and his family arrive on La Palma for their Christmas getaway. Meanwhile, researcher Marie fears the island's volcano could soon erupt.

1.title: FR - La Palma - S01E02 - Take-off
1.plot: Marie and Alvaro try to convince authorities that the ash eruption is only the beginning. Sara wants to get away after an argument between her parents.

1.title: FR - La Palma - S01E03 - Exit Tenerife
1.plot: Jens weighs an unethical opportunity that could help his family. Stranded by the evacuation, Fredrik and Marie search for alternative ways to safety.

1.title: FR - La Palma - S01E04 - Safe Spot
1.plot: With the catastrophic tsunami looming, Jens tries to tell the survivors to reach a safe spot on Tenerife — before it's too late.

1.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S01E01 - The Galaxy Being
1.plot: A radio station engineer named Allan Maxwell establishes contact with an alien being. But when the station's power is turned up, the alien is teleported to Earth where its radioactive nature causes havoc.

1.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S01E02 - The Hundred Days of the Dragon
1.plot: A sinister foreign power replaces the President of the United States with its own agent via the use of a powerful drug allowing the skin to be temporarily molded into any likeness.

1.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S01E03 - The Architects of Fear
1.plot: A noble scheme goes horribly awry when a group of scientists plan an elaborate hoax designed to frighten and ultimately unite humankind.

1.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S01E04 - The Man with the Power
1.plot: A radical experiment gives a college professor incredible power, which his subconcious mind uses to destroy his enemies.

1.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S01E05 - The Sixth Finger
1.plot: A scientist discovers a way to speed up evolution and tries out the process on a simple miner.

1.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S01E06 - The Man Who Was Never Born
1.plot: An astronaut travels to the 23rd Century, where he finds the Earth a blasted wasteland inhabited by monsters.

1.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S01E07 - O.B.I.T.
1.plot: A new invention allows spying on anyone, anywhere.

1.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S01E08 - The Human Factor
1.plot: At a military base far in the arctic, a man invents a machine which allows two minds to contact one another. An earthquake causes a malfunction and two men wake up to find that their minds have switched bodies.

1.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S01E09 - Corpus Earthling
1.plot: A man with a steel plate in his head overhears conversations about global conquest. But where are the voices coming from?

1.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S01E10 - Nightmare
1.plot: In a war action with the planet Ebon, some soldiers are captured, interrogated and tortured.

1.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S01E11 - It Crawled Out of the Woodwork
1.plot: An incredible being made of pure energy imperils the staff of a research lab and hides a deadly secret.

1.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S01E12 - The Borderland
1.plot: A scientist named Ian Fraser invents a machine which can pierce the borderland between this world and... The Afterlife? Maybe. Fraser convinces an industrialist to finance future experiments with the possibility of contacting the rich man's dead son.

1.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S01E13 - Tourist Attraction
1.plot: In a South American country a group of explorers discover a prehistoric monster in an ancient lake. The discovery leads them into conflict with the country's dictator.

1.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S01E14 - The Zanti Misfits
1.plot: Exiles from the planet Zanti arrive on Earth, and a startling truth is uncovered when two human renegades invade their privacy.

1.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S01E15 - The Mice
1.plot: A convict serving a life sentence finds that he has an alternative: change places with an alien.

1.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S01E16 - Controlled Experiment
1.plot: Two Martian investigators probe our custom of homicide.

1.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S01E17 - Don't Open Till Doomsday
1.plot: A young couple's honeymoon is cut short by the horrifying contents of a mysterious box.

1.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S01E18 - ZZZZZ
1.plot: A queen bee assumes a human appearance in order to make an unwary scientist into her new mate.

1.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S01E19 - The Invisibles
1.plot: A government agent infiltrates a secret criminal organization that uses alien parasites to control its members.

1.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S01E20 - The Bellero Shield
1.plot: A scientist captures an alien that can protect itself with an unbreakable shield.

1.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S01E21 - The Children of Spider County
1.plot: Four scientists disappear in one day. All were born in the same county, on the same day. A fifth scientist is in jail and a federal agent is assigned to the case. The fifth man is sprung from jail by a mysterious stranger who says he's the young man's father.

1.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S01E22 - Specimen: Unknown
1.plot: Scientists on a space station discover an unusual and dangerous plant.

2.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S02E01 - Soldier
2.plot: Two soldiers from the future are thrust back through time to the present day.

2.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S02E02 - Cold Hands, Warm Heart
2.plot: After returning from a mission to Venus, an astronaut can't seem to stay warm enough and has strange dreams about encountering a wraith-like being outside his spaceship window.

2.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S02E03 - Behold, Eck!
2.plot: A scientist invents a pair of glasses which enable him to see and communicate with a two dimensional being.

2.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S02E04 - Expanding Human
2.plot: A man experimenting with conciousness expansion drugs becomes super-human and not really human at all.

2.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S02E05 - Demon with a Glass Hand
2.plot: A man with a glass hand attempts to unravel the mystery of who he is.

2.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S02E06 - Cry of Silence
2.plot: A couple of motorists stranded in the desert are stalked by a bunch of tumbleweeds.

2.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S02E07 - The Invisible Enemy
2.plot: A manned mission to Mars is menaced by Martian creatures who swim in the planet's sandy soil.

2.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S02E08 - Wolf 359
2.plot: A college professor recreates the environment of a distant planet in a lab in order to study its evolution... which happens quickly.

2.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S02E09 - I, Robot
2.plot: A robot is put on trial for the murder of his creator.

2.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S02E10 - The Inheritors Part I
2.plot: After being shot in the head, a soldier gains a genius IQ and begins working fervently toward a mysterious goal.

2.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S02E11 - The Inheritors Part II
2.plot: An investigation reveals a desperate plan involving the construction of a spaceship and a group of special children.

2.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S02E12 - Keeper of the Purple Twilight
2.plot: An alien offers his technical knowledge of how to build a ray gun in exchange for a scientist's ability to feel emotions.

2.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S02E13 - The Duplicate Man
2.plot: A man wants to capture a dangerous alien creature. Doing it himself would be way too dangerous, so he has his clone do it.

2.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S02E14 - Counterweight
2.plot: Six future astronauts are put through a simulation of a long space flight.

2.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S02E15 - The Brain of Colonel Barham
2.plot: A dying astronaut agrees to have his brain implanted into a robot body.

2.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S02E16 - The Premonition
2.plot: An out-of-control test flight traps a pilot and his wife in a slow-moving time warp, and they're not alone.

2.title: FR - The Outer Limits - S02E17 - The Probe
2.plot: After flying into a hurricane, the crew of a cargo plane bound for Tokyo is captured by an alien space probe.

meta.plot: The Outer Limits is an anthology tv series of self-contained sci-fi-horror stories, sometimes with a plot twist at the end.
Night brings out the most playful side of Asia's metropolises. This docuseries captures the food, drink, music — and night owls who shine in the dark.

1.title: FR - Midnight Asia: Eat · Dance · Dream - S01E01 - Tokyo, Japan
1.plot: Night falls and adventure calls in neon-swept, sprawling Tokyo for an 85-year-old club DJ, a traveling bartender and playful fetish partygoers.

1.title: FR - Midnight Asia: Eat · Dance · Dream - S01E02 - Seoul, South Korea
1.plot: Rapid change makes for dynamic nightlife in Seoul as soulful fried chicken and local rice wine reign, and indie rockers get inspired by pansori folk.

1.title: FR - Midnight Asia: Eat · Dance · Dream - S01E03 - Mumbai, India
1.plot: Manic. Magic. Mumbai's infectious hustle inspires a mixologist to set a high bar while an MC moves area rap forward and a buttery-snack seller dazzles.

1.title: FR - Midnight Asia: Eat · Dance · Dream - S01E04 - Bangkok, Thailand
1.plot: Creativity bursts from all corners of chaotic Bangkok — be it a hidden gem, a stall of famed skewers, a superhero folk theater or an underground club.

1.title: FR - Midnight Asia: Eat · Dance · Dream - S01E05 - Taipei, Taiwan
1.plot: Come as you are in "Asia's best-kept secret," where a night market serves Michelin-worthy oyster omelets and a red-hot spot spreads the joy of drag.

1.title: FR - Midnight Asia: Eat · Dance · Dream - S01E06 - Manila, Philippines
1.plot: Manila comes alive at night as rappers battle, a queer techno party takes off, and rich and poor alike line up for crispy pork-topped rice porridge.

meta.plot:
Les Frogz sont une des nombreuses familles de nobles qui souhaitent atteindre le trône de fer, mais ce qui les différencie des autres c'est… qu'ils sont vraiment très nuls.

"Le trône des Frogz" est une série parodique de "Game of thrones" filmée à la manière d'un Mocumentaire (faux documentaire parodique comme "Parks and recréations" ou "The Office").

1.title: FR - Le Trône des Frogz - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Le Trône des Frogz - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Le Trône des Frogz - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Le Trône des Frogz - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Le Trône des Frogz - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - Le Trône des Frogz - S01E07 - Episode 7
FR - Le Trône des Frogz - S01E08 - Episode 8

meta.plot: Ingmar Andersson est un ancien cascadeur suédois reconverti en détective privé à Los Angeles. À la tête de sa société « Swedish Dick » depuis 10 ans, il court après les contrats - pour payer ses dettes et rembourser ses clients mécontents - et accepte toutes les missions, des plus sordides au plus extravagantes... C'est lors d'une enquête pour récupérer un ordinateur portable volé qu'il fait la connaissance d'Axel Kruse, un DJ suédois. Si Ingmar est bloqué dans le passé, Axel, quant à lui, est coincé dans le monde digital et totalement déconnecté de la réalité. Les opposés s'attirent ? Banco ! Dès le lendemain les voilà associés au sein de « Swedish Dicks », pour le meilleur mais surtout pour le pire...

1.title: FR - Swedish Dicks - S01E01 - When Ingmar Met Axel
1.plot: A former stuntman Ingmar works as a not-so-successful private investigator in Los Angeles. His last case is to find a stolen laptop of a young DJ Theodore who offers him $8,000. He is led to a struggling DJ named Axel. After the two spend a night at a bar, Ingmar steals the laptop from drunk Axel's hotel room and returns it to Theodore. However, he soon finds out that Theodore is a bartender who was hired by a club owner Tony to steal Axel's music.

1.title: FR - Swedish Dicks - S01E02 - The Blind Leading the Blind
1.plot: Ingmar takes his new colleague Axel to a shooting range where they encounter Ingmar's enemy and founder of the best investigating company in Los Angeles, Jane McKinney. Ingmar bets with Jane that he can make Axel shoot better than one of her guys in one week. Meanwhile, the "dicks" are hired by a blindman Jeff to find out if his wife is having an affair. Axel is introduced to Ingmar's daughter Sarah.

1.title: FR - Swedish Dicks - S01E03 - The Very Brief Adventures of Maintenance Guy and Plant Man
1.plot: The owner of an advertising agency has suspicions about someone stealing and selling his company's ideas. The investigation gets alot more complicated as the agency owner commits suicide.

1.title: FR - Swedish Dicks - S01E04 - Let's Talk About Cults
1.plot: Ingmar is haunted by a ghost of his old friend and stunt partner Tex. A female couple hire the "dicks" to find their missing daughter Rachel who had joined a cult. Axel finds the cult leader Sam and pretends he wants to join.

1.title: FR - Swedish Dicks - S01E05 - Howl Like a Big Dog
1.plot: A young female porn star hires the "dicks" to catch her stalker. Axel is trying to infiltrate inside Jane's detective company.

1.title: FR - Swedish Dicks - S01E07 - The Curse of the North Korean Curse
1.plot: Ingmar finds a way to get a large amount of money, so that he can buy a car from the guy who he suspects for killing his friend Tex. Meanwhile Axel tries to make friends in L.A. and end up hanging out with Ingmars daughter, Sarah.

1.title: FR - Swedish Dicks - S01E08 - Back to School
1.plot: Ingmar tries to set a meeting with Dimitri, a Russian Mafia boss who sells stolen cars, who he suspects for killing his friend Tex a couple of years ago. Meanwhile Axel is hired to solve a case of cyberbullying.

1.title: FR - Swedish Dicks - S01E09 - There’s Something About Tex
1.plot: Swedish Dicks are commissioned to find a stolen sheep, but before they can begin the search, Ingmar is arrested by the FBI. It looks dark for Ingmar until the FBI is willing to offer him a deal.

2.title: FR - Swedish Dicks - S02E01 - A Thief Among Us
2.plot: Ingmar wants the Dicks to go legit and apply for PI licenses, but that creates unexpected immigration trouble for Axel. Meanwhile, Elvis, Robin Hood and Frankenstein's monster ask them to catch a thief on Hollywood Boulevard.

2.title: FR - Swedish Dicks - S02E02 - Dial M for Medium
2.plot: Sarah introduces his friend Eve to Axel and he is immediately interested, but he has to keep their meetings professional - at least until they solve a case that includes Eve, her mother and a medium.

2.title: FR - Swedish Dicks - S02E03 - It Had to be Lou
2.plot: The Dicks hits a mysterious client in a prison, asking them to help his friend convicted of a murder he did not commit. At the same time, Sun is trying to help Axel with her visa problem.

2.title: FR - Swedish Dicks - S02E04 - Floyd Cal Who?
2.plot: When the former suicidal founder of the New Dating Stalkr finally begins to attract users, he hires Swedish Dicks to find the assassin he hired to kill himself.

2.title: FR - Swedish Dicks - S02E05 - Two Dicks Walk Into a Bar
2.plot: Ingmar and Axel are ready to go far, they can even stand up, to find out who it is according to their client Allie is ready to kill for a joke.

2.title: FR - Swedish Dicks - S02E06 - Behind Bars
2.plot: Tex gives Dicksen a case where they are forced to compete against Jane McKinney in prison to find out who is helping prisoners to fly. Axel goes undercover as a prisoner.

2.title: FR - Swedish Dicks - S02E07 - Dawn of the Dicks
2.plot: Ingmar and Axel infiltrate a zombie movie recording as extras to find a kidnapped man. Meanwhile, Sarah and Sun are taking their own case.

2.title: FR - Swedish Dicks - S02E08 - The Swedish FBI
2.plot: The Dicks is hired by SÄPO to reveal the corrupt consul General Leif Sahlin. They bring Sun and Sarah on a bargain at the consulate but it all leads to a host of lies, hip dance and break-ups.

2.title: FR - Swedish Dicks - S02E09 - Girls Day!
2.plot: Jane knows about Axel's immigration status and forces the Dicks to catch Omaha's most wanted mafioso for her. This while Sun uses her North Korean charm to help Sarah get over her ex.

2.title: FR - Swedish Dicks - S02E10 - Till Dicks Do Us Part
2.plot: With Tex as a sax player, Sun as the coordinator and Lou the officiant, the setting for Axel and Eve's wedding is almost ideal. But what has ever gone as planned in the Dicks' world?

meta.plot: Vincent, à la tête d’une start-up, vit depuis 20 ans avec Louise, sa femme d’origine américaine, qui a depuis peu créé un site de location d’appartements. Lorsque le logiciel de pointe développé par Vincent est piraté par la concurrence, le soupçon et le doute s’immiscent entre mari et femme...

1.title: FR - Thanksgiving - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Thanksgiving - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Thanksgiving - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Northern Rescue - S01E01 - Qué Sera
1.plot: After the death of his wife, Sarah, John West packs up his three children and moves from their hectic urban life to his small northern hometown to take command of the local search-and-rescue service.

1.title: FR - Northern Rescue - S01E02 - Making Lemonade
1.plot: Aunt Charlie’s house burns down, so the Wests move into a vacant water park. John meets his SAR team, and Maddie attends court-ordered therapy.

1.title: FR - Northern Rescue - S01E03 - Sarah's Stuff
1.plot: The Wests search Sarah’s belongings for keepsakes. John rescues an injured hiker from a forest fire. Charlie faces an obstacle to rebuilding her home.

1.title: FR - Northern Rescue - S01E04 - D-U-A-L-I-T-Y
1.plot: Taylor puts herself under intense pressure to win a school spelling bee. Scout clashes with a wrestling team rival. Maddie struggles to keep a secret.

1.title: FR - Northern Rescue - S01E05 - 12 Months to the Day
1.plot: A sports rivalry stunt leaves two teens injured and the town powerless. Taylor organizes a party for her parents’ anniversary. Maddie is arrested.

1.title: FR - Northern Rescue - S01E06 - The Little Things
1.plot: Scout gets kicked off the wrestling team. Taylor’s spelling bee blackout goes viral. Maddie and Henry share a kiss while playing truth or dare.

1.title: FR - Northern Rescue - S01E07 - The Dividing Line
1.plot: John and Simmons rescue victims of an island plane crash. Scout conceals his team status from his father. Maddie’s attempt to defend Taylor backfires.

1.title: FR - Northern Rescue - S01E08 - The Bear
1.plot: Scout calls on John to help a critically injured bear. Maddie receives important mail addressed to her mother. Taylor makes peace with Raji.

1.title: FR - Northern Rescue - S01E09 - Wake Up
1.plot: Hurt while rescuing a motocross biker, John is placed into a medically induced coma. Charlie gets a proposal from Alex - to leave Turtle Island Bay.

1.title: FR - Northern Rescue - S01E10 - Dad Knows Best
1.plot: Maddie’s determination to learn the truth about her mother’s past with Rick Walker leads to an emotional confrontation - and exposes a family secret.

meta.plot: Après la mort de sa femme, John West retourne vivre dans sa ville d'origine de Turtle Island Bay, où il y reprend la tête du service de recherche et sauvetage local. Ses trois enfants et lui vont alors vivre leur deuil chacun à leur manière.

1.title: FR - Si je ne t'avais pas rencontrée - S01E01 - If I Hadn't Met You
1.plot: Husband and father of two Eduard suffers a sudden and devastating tragedy. In his grief, he meets a strange woman who offers him a unique opportunity.

1.title: FR - Si je ne t'avais pas rencontrée - S01E02 - The Key
1.plot: Eduard travels to a second parallel universe to change the fate of his loved ones, but is disturbed by the type of man he is in this alternate reality.

1.title: FR - Si je ne t'avais pas rencontrée - S01E03 - They Won't Meet
1.plot: Dr. Everest has Eduard reflect on choices he made right before two critical moments in his life: his father's death, and the first time he met Elisa.

1.title: FR - Si je ne t'avais pas rencontrée - S01E04 - I Shouldn't Have Met Him
1.plot: While trying to stop his college-age self from falling for Elisa in 1991, Eduard lands in a situation that could keep him stuck in the wrong universe.

1.title: FR - Si je ne t'avais pas rencontrée - S01E05 - The Kiss
1.plot: In 1991, Elisa accidentally experiences universe travel and confronts Eduard with her suspicions about his true identity. A different tragedy occurs.

1.title: FR - Si je ne t'avais pas rencontrée - S01E06 - I Don't Go In
1.plot: In the present, Òscar reveals to Eduard a secret Clara recently told him, which reminds Eduard of a time when he and Elisa had a critical fight.

1.title: FR - Si je ne t'avais pas rencontrée - S01E07 - It Is And It Isn't
1.plot: Eduard travels to a universe in which Elisa is a renowned singer, living a life very separate from his. But her gain in life means a new loss for him.

1.title: FR - Si je ne t'avais pas rencontrée - S01E08 - The Wings of a Butterfly
1.plot: Dr. Everest warns Eduard that even a small change can have a great impact, but he ignores her for a second chance at a missed moment with his son.

1.title: FR - Si je ne t'avais pas rencontrée - S01E09 - Sciences Or Arts
1.plot: When Clara and Òscar become convinced Eduard is delusional, he brings them to meet Dr. Everest to prove otherwise. Joan opens up to his son-in-law.

1.title: FR - Si je ne t'avais pas rencontrée - S01E10 - Universe Zero
1.plot: Dr. Everest's mysterious past and scientific endeavors are finally revealed to Eduard, as she shares her own family tragedy.

meta.plot: Eduard, un mari et père qui a perdu sa famille dans un tragique accident, voyage dans des univers parallèles en quête d'un destin plus heureux pour sa femme.

Un torse non identifié échoue sur les rives de la petite ville de Siglufjörður, en Islande. Lorsqu’une tempête rend les routes impraticables et isole la ville du reste du monde, elle bascule dans le chaos : les habitants réalisent qu’ils sont tous de potentiels suspects, mais aussi tous potentiellement en danger. Un flic impitoyable et perturbé risque alors sa vie, sa famille et la sécurité de sa ville pour résoudre le mystère, dans l’espoir de racheter sa réputation ternie.

1.title: FR - Trapped - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: In a small Icelandic fishing port, a ferry docks. That same day a dismembered body is found in the river, sparking an investigation and a call to Reykjavik for detective reinforcements to assist the small local police force. With the ferry held in dock and a bad snowstorm threatening to cut off the town, chief of police Andri is under pressure to deliver results quickly.

1.title: FR - Trapped - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: With no police support able to arrive from Reykjavik until the snowstorm clears, Andri and his colleagues need to work fast. It seems a hopeless situation, but with a suspect in custody awaiting questioning and a body awaiting forensic tests Andri is desperate for them to prove themselves and make a breakthrough in the case.

1.title: FR - Trapped - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: The town is still cut off from all help by snowstorms and pack ice, and the local police have somehow managed to lose both the victim's body and the only suspect. Unable to prove his suspicions about the captain of the ferry, Andri finally gets a new lead when people start sharing photos of the corpse online.

1.title: FR - Trapped - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: With the murderer still at large, unrest is beginning to grow among the still-trapped townspeople and tourists. The police's list of potential suspects is becoming larger, but with discontent growing and the looming threat of an avalanche above the town, they face a race against time to unravel the mystery.

1.title: FR - Trapped - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: The avalanche has caused a total blackout. Plunged into darkness, the town's inhabitants are anxious and afraid. Meanwhile, the mayor has a surprise visitor.

1.title: FR - Trapped - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Amid general disquiet, the town's inhabitants gather in the church, where they demand answers. Police chief Andri Olafsson is tasked with speaking to them and he must tell the truth.

1.title: FR - Trapped - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: The weather is finally improving and the investigation team from Reykjavik arrives. It seems as though real progress is going to be made. But are some things just too good to be true?

1.title: FR - Trapped - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Captain Carlsen agrees to work with the police. On the ferry, it transpires that one crew member has something to hide.

1.title: FR - Trapped - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: Having found the key to the padlock of Hrafn's shed, Andri has a  definitive clue to the identity of the murderer - but it's not who he  was expecting. The identity of the killer will send shockwaves through  the town and Andri faces some very difficult decisions.

1.title: FR - Trapped - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: After an exhausting and traumatic search, at some personal cost, the  local police are finally close to solving the murder that set off the  string of terrible events in their little town.

2.title: FR - Trapped - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: Following a shocking attack on a politician in Reykjavik, Chief of Police Andri makes a return to his rural hometown, a place where the dark events of the past still haunt him.

2.title: FR - Trapped - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: Andri and Hinrika suspect that two young local farmers, Torfi and Skuli, are implicated in Finnur’s murder.

2.title: FR - Trapped - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: Torfi and Skuli remain the best lead for the attack the chief of police is investigating. And Skuli is still on the loose.

2.title: FR - Trapped - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: With Skuli now eliminated from its lines of enquiry, and Mayor Hafdis in the clutches of the Hammer of Thor group, has the team lost precious time in its efforts to save Hafdis?

2.title: FR - Trapped - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: The police have foiled a terrorist plot but they’re left no closer to having solved the mystery of who killed Finnur, or why Gisli took the actions he did.

2.title: FR - Trapped - S02E06 - Episode 6
2.plot: Ketill finds dead animals up by the lake and has his suspicions about why Skuli became so ill hiding out in the mountains. Meanwhile, Ebo is beginning to feel in danger.

2.title: FR - Trapped - S02E07 - Episode 7
2.plot: In the aftermath of another killing at the plant, Vikingur is found covered in blood, and with his fingerprints on the murder weapon.

2.title: FR - Trapped - S02E08 - Episode 8
2.plot: The polluted lake has been discovered and the town's water supply has been turned off to prevent further cases of sickness. Andri and Hinrika are chasing up leads all over town.

2.title: FR - Trapped - S02E09 - Episode 9
2.plot: Now that Thorhildur has given the police the lead they need, Andri must get her out of town before the killer finds out what has happened.

2.title: FR - Trapped - S02E10 - Episode 10
2.plot: The true identity of the killer is revealed and Andri and Hinrika face a race against the clock to protect the people they love.

meta.plot: L'adorable Chip Carlin entre en maternelle, se fait de nouveaux amis et découvre plein de trucs intéressants... avec l'aide de Patate, sa copine, la souris secrète !

1.title: FR - Chip and Potato - S01E01 - Morning Potato!
1.plot: On Chip's first day of Kindergarten, she wants to show that she's able to get ready for school all by herself, just like her big brother Spud.

1.title: FR - Chip and Potato - S01E02 - Chip Starts Kindergarten
1.plot: On Chip's very first day at school, she wants to be first to see and do everything, but she'll have to learn to wait her turn.

1.title: FR - Chip and Potato - S01E03 - Chip Gets Lost
1.plot: Chip volunteers to take the class attendance to the school office, but the school is a pretty big place for a little pug to navigate all on her own.

1.title: FR - Chip and Potato - S01E04 - Car Wash Chip
1.plot: Chip volunteers for her first ever chore: washing her neighbors' RV; the RV is huge compared to little Chip, but she's determined to finish the job.

1.title: FR - Chip and Potato - S01E05 - Chip Goes Rollerskating
1.plot: Chip learns to roller-skate but gets scared that she'll hurt herself.

1.title: FR - Chip and Potato - S01E06 - Chip n Grandma Day
1.plot: Chip and Potato have a fun day out with Grandma in her snazzy new car.

1.title: FR - Chip and Potato - S01E07 - Nico's First Day
1.plot: Chip promises to help Nico on his first day of school -- but gets jealous when he makes a new friend.

1.title: FR - Chip and Potato - S01E08 - Sporty Chip
1.plot: Chip has a tough time in gym class.

1.title: FR - Chip and Potato - S01E09 - Stomp and Stamp's Slide
1.plot: Everyone on Welcome Walk can't wait to try out Stomp and Stamp's new slide.

1.title: FR - Chip and Potato - S01E10 - Show and Tell Chip
1.plot: Potato helps Chip when her show-and-tell object is ruined.

1.title: FR - Go! Go! Cory Carson - S01E01 - Cory's First Day
1.plot: Cory's got big plans for his first day at Motorssori School. First on the agenda? Making friends. But it all feels a bit overwhelming.

1.title: FR - Go! Go! Cory Carson - S01E02 - Chrissy's Best Friend
1.plot: Cory's little sister has a new friend: a shiny red balloon named Loony. But for big brother Cory, keeping Loony safe is a full-time job.

1.title: FR - Go! Go! Cory Carson - S01E03 - Garbage Day
1.plot: Cory's thrilled when his favorite trash truck makes him a "Junior Garbage Apprentice" for the day. He's making the rounds -- and learning a lot!

1.title: FR - Go! Go! Cory Carson - S01E04 - Firehouse
1.plot: A tour of the firehouse led by Freddie's mom sounds exciting until a real-life emergency -- and Cory's behavior -- puts everyone at risk.

1.title: FR - Go! Go! Cory Carson - S01E05 - Oil Spill
1.plot: Mama and Papa are going on a date, so Cory and Chrissy have a babysitter. But Cory's convinced he's a big kid who doesn't really need one.

1.title: FR - Go! Go! Cory Carson - S01E06 - Sleepover
1.plot: Cory can't wait to spend the night at Kimmy and Timmy's house. But everything’s different when he gets there, and it doesn't feel like home.

1.title: FR - Go! Go! Cory Carson - S01E07 - Speed Limits
1.plot: When fun-loving Cory takes a turn as class safety monitor, he gets rid of all the rules -- only to realize that they're there for a reason.

2.title: FR - Go! Go! Cory Carson - S02E01 - Copy Car
2.plot: Little sister Chrissy wants to copy everything Cory does — and it's getting annoying! But sometimes copying someone is the best way to learn.

2.title: FR - Go! Go! Cory Carson - S02E02 - Happy Anniversary
2.plot: It's an afternoon full of surprises when Cory and Chrissy pitch in to help a stressed-out Mama make Papa a special anniversary dinner.

2.title: FR - Go! Go! Cory Carson - S02E03 - Mike's Carcade
2.plot: Cory's training so hard to win the upcoming Go! Go! Dance Party contest that he takes all the fun out of it for Freddie, his frustrated dance partner.

2.title: FR - Go! Go! Cory Carson - S02E04 - Flat Tire
2.plot: Cory gets a flat tire while practicing bumper ball with his friends — and the big game's just hours away! Can Dr. Wiperglass get him patched up to play?

2.title: FR - Go! Go! Cory Carson - S02E05 - Cory's New Bedroom
2.plot: To escape a clingy Chrissy, Cory asks his parents for his own room. But when he finally gets one, something doesn't feel quite right.

2.title: FR - Go! Go! Cory Carson - S02E06 - Grandpa's Treasure
2.plot: Special clues are everywhere when Mama and Papa take Cory and Chrissy on a treasure hunt to remember their grandfather on his birthday.

2.title: FR - Go! Go! Cory Carson - S02E07 - Ice Cream Truck
2.plot: A boiling-hot day in Bumperton Hills has everyone feeling overheated. Cue the sweet song of an ice cream truck ... if Cory and his friends can find it.

meta.plot: Accrochez votre ceinture et partez à l'aventure sur les routes zigzagantes de  Tut-Tut Land avec l'adorable petite auto Cory Bolides.
Six jeunes stagiaires prennent part à la formation de l'Ultimate Garage pour devenir la prochaine génération de grands pilotes de Hot Wheels.

1.title: FR - Hot Wheels Let's Race - S01E01 - A Wheel Good Time / Racing to Success
1.plot: On the first day of racing school, the racers work together to catch a runaway tire in Hot Wheels City. Then it's time for the first Camp Champ race!

1.title: FR - Hot Wheels Let's Race - S01E02 - Scream Machines / Takeout Spinout
1.plot: Can the racers stop Bone Shaker from haunting Hot Wheels City? And who has what it takes to win the tasty food delivery challenge?

1.title: FR - Hot Wheels Let's Race - S01E03 - Keeping the Pace / Car Wash Catastrophe
1.plot: Coop uses the RocketFire car to help two friends at once. The racers save the Ultimate Car Wash from Professor Rearview and his giant octopus.

1.title: FR - Hot Wheels Let's Race - S01E04 - Night Fright / Scavenger Stunt Hunt
1.plot: Mac and his friends drive Glow Racers when the lights go out in Hot Wheels City. The campers team up for a scavenger hunt challenge.

1.title: FR - Hot Wheels Let's Race - S01E05 - Spoiler Warning / Victory Lapse
1.plot: Striker Spoiler teaches the racers how to use boosters. Can they put their new skills to the test for the second Camp Champ race of the season?

1.title: FR - Hot Wheels Let's Race - S01E06 - Getting the Jump / Trashed Tracks
1.plot: The racers show off their best moves in a jump challenge. Coop drives the Total Disposal to clean up supersized trash on the tracks of Hot Wheels City.

1.title: FR - Hot Wheels Let's Race - S01E07 - Pizza with Extra Venom / Shifting Gears
1.plot: Professor Rearview unleashes a giant snake in Hot Wheels City. A game of Capture the Flag teaches a valuable lesson.

1.title: FR - Hot Wheels Let's Race - S01E08 - Pedal to the Meddle / Follow the Lead Car
1.plot: A self-driving car transporter with a T. rex head gets loose in Hot Wheels City. Axle steps on the gas in a Follow the Leader challenge.

1.title: FR - Hot Wheels Let's Race - S01E09 - Eyes on the Prize / Photo Finish
1.plot: A tricky obstacle course tests Coop's concentration skills. When Spark, Mac and Coop delete Brights' photos by mistake, they must race to retake them.

1.title: FR - Hot Wheels Let's Race - S01E10 - In It to Win It / Fired Up!
1.plot: Buckle up, because it's time for the final Camp Champ race of the season — and not even Professor Rearview and his dragon can stand in the racers' way!

meta.plot: Dans un univers fantastique divisé en quatre royaumes où règne la magie, la rebelle Maya, courageuse princesse guerrière, s'apprête à être couronnée pour son quinzième anniversaire. Mais tout bascule quand les dieux du monde des morts réclament sa vie comme tribut au dieu de la guerre, le prix à payer pour racheter le passé trouble de sa famille. Si Maya refuse, le monde entier subira la vengeance des dieux. Afin de sauver sa famille, ses amis et sa propre vie, Maya se lance dans une quête épique pour accomplir une ancienne prophétie annonçant l'arrivée de trois puissants guerriers qui l'aideront à vaincre les dieux et à sauver l'humanité.

1.title: FR - Maya and the Three - S01E01 - Chapter 1: Quinceañera
1.plot: On the day of Maya's coronation, an uninvited guest from the Underworld arrives with shocking news about her origins — then delivers a dire ultimatum.

1.title: FR - Maya and the Three - S01E02 - Chapter 2: The Prophecy
1.plot: A crushing loss sheds new light on an age-old prophecy, sending Maya on a far-flung quest to find three warriors who will help her save the world.

1.title: FR - Maya and the Three - S01E03 - Chapter 3: The Rooster
1.plot: On Luna Island, Maya looks for the Rooster Wizard but winds up with the seemingly ordinary Rico, who's said to be "The Greatest Wizard Who Ever Lived."

1.title: FR - Maya and the Three - S01E04 - Chapter 4: The Skull
1.plot: A search for the Jungle Lands' legendary Skull Archer leads Maya and Rico to a gifted warrior: the reclusive Chimi, known to locals as "Monstruo Blanco."

1.title: FR - Maya and the Three - S01E05 - Chapter 5: The Puma
1.plot: A burly Golden Mountain Barbarian named Picchu joins Maya's party as the third foretold warrior. Later that night, Zatz confronts Maya about her motives.

1.title: FR - Maya and the Three - S01E06 - Chapter 6: Maya and the Three
1.plot: Lord Mictlan’s army attacks Teca, but Maya and her friends fight back. When the gods return, a second battle reveals strengths they didn't know they had.

1.title: FR - Maya and the Three - S01E07 - Chapter 7: The Divine Gate
1.plot: Help springs from a surprising source when Maya and the Three come face-to-face with Lord Mictlan. In the end, a noble friend makes a selfless sacrifice.

meta.plot: Quatre adolescents férus de technologie affûtent leurs talents en jouant les super-héros et en relevant des missions secrètes pour sauver la planète.

1.title: FR - ReBoot: The Guardian Code - S01E01 - Activation
1.plot: On their first day at Alan Turing High, tech-loving teens Austin, Parker, Tamra and Trey discover they're the Next Generation Guardians of Cyberspace.
