1.title: FR - ReBoot: The Guardian Code - S01E02 - Resurrection
1.plot: While Vera adjusts to life as a virtual teenager, the Sourcerer reanimates an old enemy, advancing his mission to destroy the world.

1.title: FR - ReBoot: The Guardian Code - S01E03 - Fortress Command
1.plot: Parker gives himself an unauthorized upgrade. Elsewhere, Megabyte seizes a digital fortress and starts building his Sentinel Army.

1.title: FR - ReBoot: The Guardian Code - S01E04 - Catastrophic
1.plot: Megabyte delivers a distraction in the form of a deceptively cute cat virus while the Sourcerer prepares to launch a larger attack.

1.title: FR - ReBoot: The Guardian Code - S01E05 - Discoveries
1.plot: A curious sphere coughed up in the Codec reveals the surprising origins of the Guardian Code, sending Austin and Parker on a mission to look for more.

1.title: FR - ReBoot: The Guardian Code - S01E06 - Emotional Rescue
1.plot: Wild mood swings threaten to derail an important mission after Vera installs a teenage plug-in to feel the full range of human emotion.

1.title: FR - ReBoot: The Guardian Code - S01E07 - Game Day
1.plot: When Megabyte and his minions attack Virusylum, Trey is forced to make a difficult choice between sports and saving the world.

1.title: FR - ReBoot: The Guardian Code - S01E08 - Artificial Intelligence
1.plot: Vera convinces Austin's mom that technology can make her life better ... until a virus turns her virtual assistant, Alyx, into a big meanie.

1.title: FR - ReBoot: The Guardian Code - S01E09 - Datastorm
1.plot: The Guardians assemble to stop the Sourcerer from zapping the West Coast with a stolen weather satellite. In other news, Austin's mom is dating again!

1.title: FR - ReBoot: The Guardian Code - S01E10 - Mainframe Mayhem
1.plot: It's a reunion of sorts when Megabyte joins forces with his evil sister Hexadecimal and the Guardians run into the original "ReBoot" characters.

meta.plot: Une famille norvégienne en vacances à La Palma se retrouve au cœur d'une catastrophe quand une jeune scientifique découvre des signes d'une éruption volcanique imminente.

1.title: FR - La Palma - S01E01 - Cry Wolf
1.plot: Fredrik and his family arrive on La Palma for their Christmas getaway. Meanwhile, researcher Marie fears the island's volcano could soon erupt.

1.title: FR - La Palma - S01E02 - Take-off
1.plot: Marie and Alvaro try to convince authorities that the ash eruption is only the beginning. Sara wants to get away after an argument between her parents.

1.title: FR - La Palma - S01E03 - Exit Tenerife
1.plot: Jens weighs an unethical opportunity that could help his family. Stranded by the evacuation, Fredrik and Marie search for alternative ways to safety.

1.title: FR - La Palma - S01E04 - Safe Spot
1.plot: With the catastrophic tsunami looming, Jens tries to tell the survivors to reach a safe spot on Tenerife — before it's too late.

meta.plot: Les Power Rangers sont des jeunes qui reçoivent des pouvoirs pour défendre la planète contre des monstres en tout genre. Les premières saisons sont avec les mêmes acteurs et les mêmes costumes, mais ensuite les héros et les costumes de Power Rangers changent chaque année. Toutes les déclinaisons sont des adaptations américanisées de séries sentai japonaises, les scènes non costumées ayant été retournées avec des acteurs occidentaux et les scénarios modifiées pour plaire davantage au public occidental.

1.title: FR - Power Rangers: Dino Charge - S01E01 - Day of the Dumpster
1.plot: Rita Repulsa escapes after 10,000 years of imprisonment determined to conquer Earth but a team of teenagers with attitude stands in her way.

1.title: FR - Power Rangers: Dino Charge - S01E02 - Food Fight
1.plot: Bulk and his gang seek to ruin the food festival while Rita sends a gluttonous pig to eat everything on Earth.

1.title: FR - Power Rangers: Dino Charge - S01E03 - High Five
1.plot: Trini must overcome her fear of heights to save Billy.

1.title: FR - Power Rangers: Dino Charge - S01E04 - Teamwork
1.plot: Kimberly and Trini gather signatures to close down a nearby dumpsite while convincing their teammates to work together more.

1.title: FR - Power Rangers: Dino Charge - S01E05 - A Pressing Engagement
1.plot: Jason battles King Sphinx while trying to break a bench press record at the Angel Grove Gym & Juice Bar.

1.title: FR - Power Rangers: Dino Charge - S01E06 - Different Drum
1.plot: Kimberly's deaf friend is the only hope to rescue a group of girls captured by the Gnarly Gnome and his hypnotic accordion.

1.title: FR - Power Rangers: Dino Charge - S01E07 - I, Eye Guy
1.plot: Rita sends her monster Eye Guy to kidnap Billy's bright young protégé.

1.title: FR - Power Rangers: Dino Charge - S01E08 - For Whom the Bell Trolls
1.plot: Trini's favorite doll is brought to life by Rita Repulsa and commanded to capture the Rangers inside bottles.

1.title: FR - Power Rangers: Dino Charge - S01E09 - Happy Birthday, Zack
1.plot: Zack worries that his friends have forgotten today is his birthday while Rita sends him an unwelcome present.

1.title: FR - Power Rangers: Dino Charge - S01E10 - No Clowning Around
1.plot: The gang fights Rita's minions at a carnival in order to save Trini's cousin Sylvia.

1.title: FR - Power Rangers: Dino Charge - S01E11 - Power Ranger Punks
1.plot: Baboo sneaks a magic potion into Kimberly and Billy's drinks that turns them into angry punks.

1.title: FR - Power Rangers: Dino Charge - S01E12 - Peace, Love and Woe
1.plot: Billy draws on the powers of his friends to rescue the girl of his dreams.

1.title: FR - Power Rangers: Dino Charge - S01E13 - Foul Play in the Sky
1.plot: Kimberly is in trouble when her uncle Steve succumbs to a sleeping potion in the middle of flying an airplane with her on board.

1.title: FR - Power Rangers: Dino Charge - S01E14 - Dark Warrior
1.plot: Billy is inspired by Trini's uncle Howard - a brilliant scientist and expert in martial arts.

1.title: FR - Power Rangers: Dino Charge - S01E15 - Big Sisters
1.plot: Kimberly and Trini look after a mischievous little girl named Maria.

1.title: FR - Power Rangers: Dino Charge - S01E16 - Switching Places
1.plot: Billy's latest invention goes haywire causing him and Kimberly to switch bodies.

1.title: FR - Power Rangers: Dino Charge - S01E17 - Green with Evil Part 1: Out of Control
1.plot: Rita creates her own evil Green Ranger to beat the Power Rangers at their own game.

1.title: FR - Power Rangers: Dino Charge - S01E18 - Green with Evil Part 2: Jason's Battle
1.plot: The Power Rangers work to restore Zordon and Alpha unaware that the new kid in school is actually Rita's evil Green Ranger.

1.title: FR - Power Rangers: Dino Charge - S01E19 - Green with Evil Part 3: The Rescue
1.plot: Femme fatale Scorpina joins Rita as the Green Ranger continues to battle the Power Rangers.

1.title: FR - Power Rangers: Dino Charge - S01E20 - Green with Evil Part 4: Eclipsing Megazord
1.plot: An eclipse of the sun saps the Megazord's power as Rita's forces launch a full scale assault on Angel Grove.

1.title: FR - Power Rangers: Dino Charge - S01E21 - Green with Evil Part 5: Breaking the Spell
1.plot: The mighty Dragonzord awakes after thousands of years as the Rangers try to break the spell over the Green Ranger once and for all.

1.title: FR - Power Rangers: Dino Charge - S01E22 - The Trouble with Shellshock
1.plot: Squatt and Baboo create their own Shellshock monster to impress Rita.

1.title: FR - Beast Games - S01E01 - 1,000 People Fight for $5,000,000
1.plot: I gathered 1,000 people to fight for $5,000,000, the LARGEST cash prize in TV history! I don't know why you're still reading this, go watch it right now! No more spoilers.

1.title: FR - Beast Games - S01E02 - 500 People Trapped in My City
1.plot: The remaining 500 contestants must fight to stay in the MASSIVE city I built from scratch (not joking). The end of the episode may be the craziest thing that's ever happened in television history. Watch it right now!

1.title: FR - Beast Games - S01E03 - The Solitary Experiment
1.plot: What would happen if three best friends were trapped in a room, but only two could escape? Watch and see for yourself right now!

1.title: FR - Beast Games - S01E04 - The Golden Ticket
1.plot: The rules are simple: fight for a seat on the helicopters, or lose $5,000,000. My private island awaits.

1.title: FR - Beast Games - S01E05 - Fight to Win a Private Island
1.plot: You're about to witness someone win a private island AND continue to compete for $5,000,000. I just sent the Navy SEALs to hunt these players down. Stop reading and watch this episode.

1.title: FR - Beast Games - S01E06 - Physical, Mental, Chance...Your Choice
1.plot: I gave the remaining contestants a choice. Play a physical game, play a mental game, or play a game completely left up to chance. No excuses!

1.title: FR - Beast Games - S01E07 - The Elimination Train
1.plot: How much money would it take to eliminate your best friend? Watch this episode as players make the hardest decisions of their lives. This one is brutal.

1.title: FR - Beast Games - S01E08 - Betray Your Friend For $1,000,000
1.plot: The remaining 10 players take their share of $1,000,000 AGAIN. Will they split it evenly or will one of them take it all?

1.title: FR - Beast Games - S01E09 - Bribe Your Way To Finale
1.plot: The Final 10 use all of their current winnings to bribe their way to the finals. Lying and deception are at an all-time high, making it difficult to trust even your closest allies.

1.title: FR - Beast Games - S01E10 - $10,000,000 Coin Flip
1.plot: One contestant flips a coin to potentially double the grand prize to $10,000,000 or get eliminated. Beast Games crowns the winner of season 1.

2.title: FR - Beast Games - S02E01 - Strong vs Smart Compete for $5,000,000
2.plot: 200 of the strongest competitors and smartest minds in the world battle for 100 spots in Beast City to keep fighting for their chance at the $5,000,000 prize. Only the best of each team will advance as the Strong compete in a game of perseverance while the Smart battle in a game of focus - who will move on and who will go home?

2.title: FR - Beast Games - S02E02 - Choose Your Fate
2.plot: After an unexpected twist, the 50 Smartest and 50 Strongest face their biggest decision yet. A $1,000,000 bribe is on the line that could change the course of the entire season: will the contestants accept MrBeast's life-changing offer? Or will they risk it all and bet everything on a challenge of their choice? The stakes couldn't be higher as players fight to earn their place among the Top 50.

2.title: FR - Beast Games - S02E03 - The Obstacle Course
2.plot: The Top 50 face their next brutal challenge, an obstacle course that demands the perfect balance of strength and smarts. As new alliances form and old friendships crumble, every victory counts with only half the contestants advancing. A fan-favorite challenge returns, testing loyalty and shattering promises. Everyone has a price, but who will break first?

2.title: FR - Beast Games - S02E04 - The Survivor Takeover
2.plot: Survivor and Beast Games collide in the biggest competition crossover of all-time! Legendary host Jeff Probst joins MrBeast as contestants arrive on the world-famous Survivor island. Players face a series of iconic Survivor-inspired challenges with a $1,800,000 private island on the line. It all comes down to a Final Tribal Council… who will be Beast Games' newest millionaire?

2.title: FR - Beast Games - S02E05 - Ask for Anything You Want
FR - Beast Games - S02E06 - Hearts Will Be Smashed
2.plot: A battle between brains and biceps takes place 100 feet in the air and across a massive life-sized puzzle to crown the strongest and smartest player in Beast City. Lies and deceit run wild as the winners must decide on three players' hearts to smash, eliminating them from the game entirely! No one is safe in Beast City… but first, will the $10,000,000 Coin even survive the final Cube?

2.title: FR - Beast Games - S02E07 - Bury Me Alive
FR - Beast Games - S02E08 - Would You Steal $1,000,000?
2.plot: Buried underground with $1,000,000 up for grabs, every choice counts as each contestant can secretly take as much money as their heart desires. Personal stakes and old grudges collide as the tension between the players reaches a boiling point. Will they take their fair share, or will a new villain emerge once again?

2.title: FR - Beast Games - S02E09 - Trust Nobody
2.plot: Voting begins... with nothing but a phone and their share of $1,000,000, the remaining players battle in a game of wits and social strategy to determine the Final 6. Friendships are tested and bribes run wild as one player's big secret is threatened to be exposed. How much is a spot in the finale worth, and who's willing to pay the price?

2.title: FR - Beast Games - S02E10 - $5,000,000 Decision
2.plot: Former alliances are shattered as the final six contestants backstab and scheme their way to bring $5,000,000 home. A truly life-changing amount of money is at their fingertips, but will it be Team Strong or Team Smart that is ultimately crowned the next Beast Games champion?!

meta.plot: Un millier de concurrents vont s'affronter dans des épreuves physiques et mentales à couper le souffle, pour tenter de gagner la somme de 5 millions de dollars. Chaque semaine, les participants devront faire preuve de force et d'esprit pour rester dans la course et remporter le premier prix.

1.title: FR - Le (2ème) Meilleur Hôpital de la Galaxie - S01E01 - Sometimes Heads Break
1.plot: Sleech and Klak perform an enticing, dangerous, and super illegal surgery.

1.title: FR - Le (2ème) Meilleur Hôpital de la Galaxie - S01E02 - The Land of Sex and Death
1.plot: Sleech and Plowp wrangle an exploding patient. Outside the hospital, Klak deals with her mom, which is more stressful than an exploding patient.

1.title: FR - Le (2ème) Meilleur Hôpital de la Galaxie - S01E03 - Tomorrow's Death is Yesterday's Problem
1.plot: Sleech and Klak treat a venture capitalist with an illicit time sickness and a great outfit.

1.title: FR - Le (2ème) Meilleur Hôpital de la Galaxie - S01E04 - The Curse of the Orlosh
1.plot: A sexually transmitted infection spreads quickly through the very horny hospital.

1.title: FR - Le (2ème) Meilleur Hôpital de la Galaxie - S01E05 - Beef Sturgeon Sleech
1.plot: A surprising doctor is chosen as temporary chief surgeon! Klak develops a new crush, and Matt goes on a sexy hunt for alien limbs.

1.title: FR - Le (2ème) Meilleur Hôpital de la Galaxie - S01E06 - That's Science, Baby!
1.plot: Happy St. Cthonk's Day! (The St. stands for scientist). While Sleech and Matt unexpectedly spend the holiday together, Klak does something equally festive: an autopsy.

1.title: FR - Le (2ème) Meilleur Hôpital de la Galaxie - S01E07 - Just One More Adjustment
1.plot: The galaxy watches as Sleech tries to save Klak from herself. Unrelated, Matt and Plowp do a lot of crying.

1.title: FR - Le (2ème) Meilleur Hôpital de la Galaxie - S01E08 - Apocalypse Got You Down?
1.plot: Sleech and Klak try to save the world and end up in a surprisingly roomy digestive tract.

meta.plot: Les docteurs Sleech et Klak affrontent un cas extrêmement dangereux et potentiellement révolutionnaire, qui pourrait mettre en péril la nature même de l'existence. Pourtant, au vu de leurs vies personnelles désastreuses, le néant ne paraît pas si dépaysant...
Un animateur idéaliste de la banlieue parisienne arrive au second tour des présidentielles. Mais la France est-elle vraiment prête à élire son premier président noir ?

1.title: FR - En place - S01E01 - Under Way
1.plot: When his verbal joust with presidential hopeful Éric Andréï goes viral, Stéphane finds himself in the limelight — and reluctantly running for office.

1.title: FR - En place - S01E02 - Under Construction
1.plot: As Éric covertly tries to sabotage his campaign, Stéphane and his newly-formed team dodge old scandals and collect signatures to seal his candidacy.

1.title: FR - En place - S01E03 - Uncharted Territory
1.plot: Thanks to Mo’s security cameras, Stéphane identifies the arsonists. Later, they head to Corrèze, a rural town unlikely to appreciate team Blé’s vibe.

1.title: FR - En place - S01E04 - Under Threat
1.plot: Éric tries to capitalize on Stéphane’s injury. Yasmine begins to suspect Will has an ulterior motive. Lamine finds himself in hot water.

1.title: FR - En place - S01E05 - Live on Air
1.plot: After the email scandal, Stéphane and Corinne face off in a televised debate — but pointed questions and "surprise guests" dominate the evening.

1.title: FR - En place - S01E06 - The Final Hurdle
1.plot: With election day around the corner and Lamine on the run, Stéphane tries to salvage his marriage and his campaign. Will he succeed?

2.title: FR - En place - S02E01 - In the Palace
2.plot: With no agenda, no party, no wife and a series of escalating threats, Stéphane and the team prepare for his upcoming inauguration at the Élysée Palace.

2.title: FR - En place - S02E02 - In Sync
2.plot: As Stéphane and Mo secretly handle a diplomatic incident, a royal visit is announced. Lamine inspires housing reform ahead of a celebratory garden party.

2.title: FR - En place - S02E03 - On the Throne
2.plot: With his father in hospital and Marion in Guadeloupe, Stéphane attempts to strike a deal with a demanding Queen of Norway, making Corinne very unhappy.

2.title: FR - En place - S02E04 - On a Mission
2.plot: As Stéphane and the team land in Guadeloupe in search of Marion, they are greeted by angry citizens. Back in Paris, Andréï prepares a military operation.

2.title: FR - En place - S02E05 - In Truth
2.plot: With his back against the wall, Stéphane prepares to make a big announcement. As he faces Cognard live on TV, protestors approach the presidential home.

2.title: FR - En place - S02E06 - On the Run
2.plot: As rioters storm the Élysée Palace, the team takes cover in a bunker. With Andréï desperate to take him down, can Stéphane survive his rival's coup?

1.title: FR - Over There - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: When a U.S. Army unit arrives in Iraq for their first tour of duty, they quickly find themselves engaged in a bloody firefight and discover the essence of who they are as soldiers. Some show more mettle in the face of death, while others become paralyzed

1.title: FR - Over There - S01E02 - Roadblock Duty
1.plot: The squad is assigned to roadblock duty and is forced to shoot two motorists who ignore their orders to stop. Meanwhile, Boâ€™s estranged, alcoholic father visits him in the hospital.

1.title: FR - Over There - S01E03 - The Prisoner
1.plot: The squad helps guard a prisoner who undergoes both physical and mental distress in order to find out vital information.. Bo requests to be taken off morphine. Sergio attends a family support group meeting. Eddy finds himself alone.

1.title: FR - Over There - S01E04 - I Want My Toilets
1.plot: Angel's rifle skills come in handy when a supply truck must make a delivery to a dangerous area. Terry makes the house wheelchair accessible in preperation for Bo's return home.

1.title: FR - Over There - S01E05 - Embedded
1.plot: When Smoke is implicated in the death of a civilian, his mother takes the news hard. An embedded reporter disappears after suggesting the death was an Iraqi setup.  Also, Bo gets his new prosthetic leg.

1.title: FR - Over There - S01E06 - It's Alright Ma, I'm Only Bleeding
1.plot: The squad races against time to rescue journalist John Moffet before he is executed by his abductors. The team also learns a bounty has been placed on Smoke's head. Meanwhile, Bo returns home and Vanessa finally hits rock bottom.

1.title: FR - Over There - S01E07 - Mission Accomplished
1.plot: The squad is assigned to guard a prison that is in not so good condition and soon find themselves in a dangerous situation. Mrs. B temporarily returns home to care for her autistic son.

1.title: FR - Over There - S01E08 - Situation Normal
1.plot: The squad is assigned to protect workers installing a pipeline. Meanwhile, Mrs. B is AWOL in Hollywood mixing with some questionable characters and Bo tries to run on his prosthetic leg.

1.title: FR - Over There - S01E09 - Spoils of War
1.plot: The squad faces a moral dilemma when they discover millions of dollars. Mrs. B returns from being AWOL and finds a friend in Dim. Meanwhile, Bo is training hard to return to his squad and Vanessa is sticking with AA and trying to make amends.

1.title: FR - Over There - S01E10 - Suicide Rain
1.plot: Angel puts his own life at risk when an American is held hostage. Meanwhile, Sergio and Anna's relationship continues to grow, and Venessa tries to make up for her past.

1.title: FR - Over There - S01E11 - Orphans
1.plot: The squad is ordered to evict the residents of an orphanage. Sergio is conflicted over his attraction to Anna. Meanwhile, Terry looks into why Bo has stopped receiving his military pay.

1.title: FR - Over There - S01E12 - Weapons of Mass Destruction
1.plot: As the squad searches for an elusive bomber, they are joined by a squad of undertrained Iraqi soldiers. Meanwhile, Bo confronts his father and Vanessa continues to struggle with her alcoholism.

1.title: FR - Over There - S01E13 - Follow the Money
1.plot: (Season Finale) The squad is assigned to protect a civilian convoy. Lt. Underpants leadership skills take a toll on the squad. Back at home, Bo meets somebody who may be able to help him get back in the Army and Sergio receives surprising news from Anna.

meta.plot: Le quotidien de soldats américains en Irak. En ces temps troublés, ces hommes et femmes en uniformes doivent affronter la mort, ainsi que leurs peurs les plus terribles. Face à l'adversité, des liens très forts commencent à se créer entre eux... Dans le même temps, leurs proches, restés seuls au pays, doivent faire face à l'épreuve de la séparation.

Dodge Tynes, en phase terminale d'une grave maladie, souhaite avant son décès mettre sa femme enceinte à l'abri du besoin. Il accepte alors une offre afin de participer à un jeu mortel. Il découvre bientôt qu'il n'est pas le chasseur...mais la proie.

1.title: FR - Most Dangerous Game [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - The Offer
1.plot: Struggling and desperate, Dodge accepts an offer to get back on his feet financially. But it comes with a price.

1.title: FR - Most Dangerous Game [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - The Motivation
1.plot: Debt and a baby on the way make for desperate times. Dodge grows increasingly concerned about the future of his family.

1.title: FR - Most Dangerous Game [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - The Rules
1.plot: A trip to the hospital reveals a life-changing diagnosis. With nowhere to turn, Dodge is tempted to make a deadly decision.

1.title: FR - Most Dangerous Game [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - The Acceptance
1.plot: The rules are set. The prize is tempting. And the situation is dire. All Dodge has to do is accept...and the game begins.

1.title: FR - Most Dangerous Game [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - The Start
1.plot: The game is on. Paranoia, panic, and fear settle in for Dodge as the hunters could be anywhere. Or anyone.

1.title: FR - Most Dangerous Game [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Wash Hands After Using
1.plot: Crowds are your friend. Dodge ducks into a bustling business center to stay in public-sight and out of danger.

1.title: FR - Most Dangerous Game [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - No Running on the Platform
1.plot: Dodge’s location is revealed to the hunters. Can he escape before it’s too late?

1.title: FR - Most Dangerous Game [VOSTFR] - S01E08 - Please Whisper in Church
1.plot: Dodge tries to find sanctuary in a new location. Meanwhile, Valerie questions the source of newfound money in her bank account.

1.title: FR - Most Dangerous Game [VOSTFR] - S01E09 - Return Tools to Their Place
1.plot: Not all games are fair. Dodge learns a painful lesson when it’s revealed that the hunters have a secret advantage.

1.title: FR - Most Dangerous Game [VOSTFR] - S01E10 - Five for Fighting
1.plot: The stakes get higher the longer Dodge survives. He tries to blend in at a hockey game while Valerie digs deeper into the bank deposits.

1.title: FR - Most Dangerous Game [VOSTFR] - S01E11 - You Always Remember Your First
1.plot: A bad move brings Dodge to the brink of the Detroit boundary. He’s determined to bring the fight back to the city, but the hunters are right on his heels.

1.title: FR - Most Dangerous Game [VOSTFR] - S01E12 - A Ship is Safe Only in Port
1.plot: Hard times can bring out the worst in us all. Dodge continues to fight for his life in the face of what he’s become. But how long can he keep it up?

1.title: FR - Most Dangerous Game [VOSTFR] - S01E13 - Always Get a Second Opinion
1.plot: The game gets complicated when Dodge encounters a gang in the projects. And if they don’t believe his story, there may be even more bloodshed.

1.title: FR - Most Dangerous Game [VOSTFR] - S01E14 - What's Old Is New Again
1.plot: Dodge uncovers a truth that reveals the game isn’t what it seems. And nobody is to be trusted. Not even those closest to him.

1.title: FR - Most Dangerous Game [VOSTFR] - S01E15 - Game Over
1.plot: It’s the final showdown. With the game spiraling out of control, Dodge gives everything he has to bring it all to an end.

meta.plot: C'est l'histoire explosive de trois hommes et femmes qui ont essayé de garder leur amour dans le tourbillon de l'histoire.. À la fin de la dynastie Goryeo !

1.title: FR - My Country: The New Age [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Seo Hwi and Nam Seon-ho want to take an exam to join the military, though for different reasons. They meet Han Hui-jae, who's trying to evade capture.

1.title: FR - My Country: The New Age [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: At the exam, Hwi tastes injustice, and Seon-ho faces an outcome he never desired. Despite warnings, Hui-jae keeps helping Hwi.

1.title: FR - My Country: The New Age [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: There are those who resolve to forget -- and those who don’t. Hui-jae confronts Seon-ho about what happened. Park Chi-do finds Hwi on the battlefield.

1.title: FR - My Country: The New Age [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: While on the run, Hwi hears a difficult truth from Seon-ho. Hui-jae travels with Yi Bang-won as he escorts Queen Sindeok and her sons to safety.

1.title: FR - My Country: The New Age [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Hwi stays away from Hui-jae, who holds on to hope that he is still alive, and keeps an eye on Seo Yeon. A high-ranking nobleman is kidnapped.

1.title: FR - My Country: The New Age [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Seon-ho requests power from Yi Seong-gye. Ihwaru covers up a murder. Hwi and his friends hatch a plan involving Bang-won.

1.title: FR - My Country: The New Age [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Wary of Hwi's intentions, Bang-won tries to figure out what he's after. Seong-gye's council calls for Seon-ho's punishment.

1.title: FR - My Country: The New Age [VOSTFR] - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Hui-jae comes across a man who haunts her memories. Seong-gye issues a warning to Nam Jeon, and declares the heir to his throne.

1.title: FR - My Country: The New Age [VOSTFR] - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: Jeon's true objectives -- as well as Hwi's -- are made clear to Bang-won. Fearing for Yeon's safety, Seon-ho takes her and runs.

1.title: FR - My Country: The New Age [VOSTFR] - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: Devastated by a sudden loss, Hwi takes his rage to Jeon. Six years later, Seon-ho hunts down a thief who's been intercepting precious cargo.

1.title: FR - My Country: The New Age [VOSTFR] - S01E11 - Episode 11
1.plot: Hwi, seeking revenge, conspires with Bang-won. Seon-ho advises Seong-gye on what must be done in order to protect his crown.

1.title: FR - My Country: The New Age [VOSTFR] - S01E12 - Episode 12
1.plot: Bang-won's rebellion strikes, and Seong-gye realizes it too late. Hwi has just one target -- but Seon-ho stands in his way.

1.title: FR - My Country: The New Age [VOSTFR] - S01E13 - Episode 13
1.plot: With no further reason to stay by Bang-won's side, Hwi walks away -- but finds he must contend with Seong-gye's revenge.

1.title: FR - My Country: The New Age [VOSTFR] - S01E14 - Episode 14
1.plot: Seon-ho acquires soldiers. Hui-jae mourns all that Ihwaru has lost. Hwi and Bang-won fool Yi Bang-gan into feeling a false sense of security.

1.title: FR - My Country: The New Age [VOSTFR] - S01E15 - Episode 15
1.plot: Seon-ho acquires soldiers. Hui-jae mourns all that Ihwaru has lost. Hwi and Bang-won fool Yi Bang-gan into feeling a false sense of security.

1.title: FR - My Country: The New Age [VOSTFR] - S01E16 - Episode 16
1.plot: Ahead of the ceremony, Bang-won and Seong-gye each send men after Hwi and Seon-ho, who know what must be done to keep everyone safe.

1.title: FR - Move - S01E01 - Featuring Jon Boogz and Lil Buck
1.plot: With artistry and originality, Jon Boogz and Lil Buck turn to popping and jookin to tell powerful stories that take street dance to the next level.

1.title: FR - Move - S01E02 - Featuring Ohad Naharin
1.plot: Israeli choreographer Ohad Naharin, creator of the Gaga movement technique, pushes the limits of what the body can do — at any age.

1.title: FR - Move - S01E03 - Featuring Israel Galván
1.plot: Breaking with tradition, Spanish dancer Israel Galván redefines flamenco and challenges its gender norms.

1.title: FR - Move - S01E04 - Featuring Kimiko Versatile
1.plot: For Jamaicans, dancehall is more than an expression of resistance, and Kimiko Versatile is more than a dancer: She's a potent symbol of empowerment.

1.title: FR - Move - S01E05 - Featuring Akram Khan
1.plot: Akram Khan weaves magic and memory into intense, immersive pieces that draw from his Kathak roots. Then the world locks down before a major premiere.

meta.plot: Grâce à cette série documentaire, découvrez les talentueux danseurs et chorégraphes qui réinventent l'art du mouvement à travers le monde.
Alors que le sort de l'humanité est en jeu, un groupe de scientifiques et un puissant télépathe s'aventurent dans l'espace à bord d'un vaisseau aux mille secrets.

1.title: FR - Nightflyers - S01E01 - All That We Left Behind
1.plot: A team of scientists join the crew of the Nightflyer on a journey to make contact with alien life.

1.title: FR - Nightflyers - S01E02 - Torches and Pitchforks
1.plot: D'Branin puts his team first as panic spreads. Eris resorts to bold measures to restore balance.

1.title: FR - Nightflyers - S01E03 - The Abyss Stares Back
1.plot: D'Branin investigates the source of the malfunctions. Rowan prepares Thale for first contact.

1.title: FR - Nightflyers - S01E04 - White Rabbit
1.plot: The white rabbit probe puzzles the science team. D'Branin learns a secret from Agatha's past.

1.title: FR - Nightflyers - S01E05 - Greywing
1.plot: Lommie's talents come in handy for D'Branin. Rowan and Tessia develop a theory about alien life.

1.title: FR - Nightflyers - S01E06 - The Sacred Gift
1.plot: D'Branin and his team explore a more permanent solution to their problem.

1.title: FR - Nightflyers - S01E07 - Transmission
1.plot: D'Branin has a breakthrough. Rowan prepares for big changes. Lommie seeks comfort in her past.

1.title: FR - Nightflyers - S01E08 - Rebirth
1.plot: A new threat challenges ship protocol. Mel notices changes in the crew. Lommie returns to Greywing.

1.title: FR - Nightflyers - S01E09 - Icarus
1.plot: D'Branin pushes ahead with his plan. Rowan processes his grief. Agatha finds a way to help.

1.title: FR - Nightflyers - S01E10 - All That We Have Found
1.plot: New orders leave the Nightflyer and its passengers hanging in the balance.

meta.plot: Au fin fond du Texas, dans une petite ville tranquille, votre voisin pourrait être un vampire, une sorcière, un loup-garou... Les habitants tentent de combattre les pressions extérieures des gangs de motards, des policiers suspicieux et de leur propre passé.

1.title: FR - Midnight, Texas - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: When Manfred, a powerful psychic on the run, seeks safe haven in the remote town of Midnight, Texas, he discovers a mysterious community of outsiders with secrets, both human and supernatural.

1.title: FR - Midnight, Texas - S01E02 - Bad Moon Rising
1.plot: Manfred tries to help a new neighbor clear his name by communicating with the murdered victim; Manfred's neighbors help rid his home of the spirits haunting it; Lem and Olivia set out to stop a deadly predator before it kills again.

1.title: FR - Midnight, Texas - S01E03 - Lemuel, Unchained
1.plot: When a dangerous nest of vampires led by an old friend of Lem's arrives in Midnight, Manfred and Olivia join forces to discover their true intentions.

1.title: FR - Midnight, Texas - S01E04 - Sexy Beast
1.plot: The Midnighters band together to stop an ancient succubus who seduces and devours men, and Olivia discovers an unwelcome connection to her past while carrying out a hit.

1.title: FR - Midnight, Texas - S01E05 - Unearthed
1.plot: Manfred turns to Olivia for help when his dark past finally catches up to him, and Bobo must confront his own troubled history after the Sons of Lucifer kidnap Fiji.

1.title: FR - Midnight, Texas - S01E06 - Blinded by the Light
1.plot: When a local girl goes missing, the Midnighters try to find her before law enforcement descends into town. Manfred and Creek discover Aubrey's murder was not an isolated incident -- someone or something is killing young women in Midnight. In the race to find the missing girl, Bobo resolves to get justice for Aubrey. Lem and Olivia join the hunt, not knowing if the killer is human or supernatural. Complicating matters, Fiji is haunted by a demonic entity and seeks answers from the Rev while Joe struggles to maintain the secret that protects his family.

1.title: FR - Midnight, Texas - S01E07 - Angel Heart
1.plot: A bounty hunter from Joe's past arrives in Midnight to punish him for leaving the angelic fold. Manfred takes charge with a plan to lead Fiji, Olivia, Bobo and Lem in an effort to stop this dangerous, nearly immortal foe from killing Joe and Chuy, as well as destroying Midnight. Meanwhile, Creek struggles to recover from her family tragedy. Elsewhere, the Rev refuses to compromise the safety of his neighbors and it costs him dearly.

1.title: FR - Midnight, Texas - S01E08 - Last Temptation of Midnight
1.plot: A faceless supernatural makes a pilgrimage to Midnight to usher in the arrival of a demon from the veil to Hell - the same demon that has been plaguing Fiji. Meanwhile, the Midnighters struggle to fight the effects of the veil to Hell opening in their town, especially Lem and the Rev, whose hunger increases to dangerous levels. Olivia and Bobo make plans of their own to protect the town. Elsewhere, Creek struggles in the face of great loss as Manfred confronts his constant self-medicating.

1.title: FR - Midnight, Texas - S01E09 - Riders on the Storm
1.plot: An apocalyptic sandstorm engulfs Midnight concealing wraith-like demonic spirits heralding the arrival of a demon from Hell. Fiji knows this demon wants her and Bobo vows to protect her, while wondering why the demon has targeted Fiji and no one else. Manfred, Joe and the Rev dig for answers from the past, but when the storm gets too dangerous, Manfred leads the Midnighters to an unlikely hiding spot outside of town. Olivia confronts Lem about their relationship, and Creek helps Manfred when he needs it most.

1.title: FR - Midnight, Texas - S01E10 - The Virgin Sacrifice
1.plot: With Hell literally about to erupt onto Witch Light Road, and Fiji about to be claimed by the Demon who has been tormenting her, Manfred leads the Midnighters to take back their home from the evil forces that occupy it. As Bobo turns his attention to saving Fiji, Olivia and Creek confront the wraiths. Manfred focuses on killing the demon and closing the veil with the help of Lem, Joe, and the Rev. Manfred takes a desperate gamble and risks his life by asking for help from an unlikely source.

2.title: FR - Midnight, Texas - S02E01 - Head Games
2.plot: After shutting the veil to hell, The Midnighters finally settle into a semblance of normality— until the opening of a new hotel rocks their stability once again. Manfred deals with the consequences of ‘taking-in’ six demons. Joe makes a new friend.

2.title: FR - Midnight, Texas - S02E02 - The Monster of the Week Is Patriarchy
2.plot: Manfred investigates a gruesome murder in the hotel. Lem and Olivia’s psychic connection drives a wedge between them. Bobo’s life is put in danger by a series of strange ‘accidents,’ much to Fiji’s concern.

2.title: FR - Midnight, Texas - S02E03 - To Witch Hell and Back
2.plot: Fiji and Manfred try to get to the bottom of who or what is trying to kill Bobo. A guilt-ridden Rev struggles with the weight of his past. Joe embraces his new ‘night job,’ unbeknownst to his husband.

2.title: FR - Midnight, Texas - S02E04 - I Put a Spell on You
2.plot: The Midnighters join forces to protect a newcomer in town. With Bobo still in danger, Fiji's forced to take desperate action to save him. Patience and Manfred bond over their relationship troubles.

2.title: FR - Midnight, Texas - S02E05 - Drown the Sadness in Chardonnay
2.plot: Lem makes a shocking decision. Olivia's past comes back to haunt her. Fiji seeks outside help from her fellow Light Witches. A suicide pits Manfred and Kai against one another.

2.title: FR - Midnight, Texas - S02E06 - No More Mr. Nice Kai
2.plot: An unknown force threatens to reveal all the Midnighters' secrets. Manfred's suspicion towards Kai intensifies. Fiji embraces Dark Magic to save Bobo once and for all.

2.title: FR - Midnight, Texas - S02E07 - Resting Witch Face
2.plot: In the wake of tragedy, Manfred vows revenge. Joe squares off against a former ally to save his husband. Fiji spends a night on the town. Kai gives Patience an ultimatum.

2.title: FR - Midnight, Texas - S02E08 - Patience Is a Virtue
2.plot: Manfred and Kai team up against a common foe. Olivia and Bobo search for a way to bring Fiji back to their side. Joe gets a surprising visitor.

2.title: FR - Midnight, Texas - S02E09 - Yasss, Queen
2.plot: With Midnight, Texas now under the rule of Dark Witches, the surviving Midnighters must band together in one last, desperate attempt to save their town.

1.title: FR - Coincoin et les Z'inhumains - S01E01 - Black Be Black
1.plot: Li'l Quinquin has grown up and now goes by the name of Coincoin. His girlfriend, Ève, has left him for another girl, Corinne, but he continues to run wild with his friend, Fatso. One day, in a field, he discovers a strange black magma that seems to have fallen from the sky. As Inspector Van der Weyden and his loyal assistant Carpentier investigate, new "extra-human" events occur.

1.title: FR - Coincoin et les Z'inhumains - S01E02 - The Extra-Humans
1.plot: Confronted with the irrational, Van der Weyden and Carpentier try to understand: are they seeing signs of alien activity? The invasion already seems to have begun. And as Coincoin seeks solace in the arms of the pretty Jenny, the locals give birth to clones as emotionless as they are disturbing.

1.title: FR - Coincoin et les Z'inhumains - S01E03 - Gunk, gunk, gunk!!!
1.plot: As more and more doubles appear and confusion grows, everyone seems to agree on one point: the end of the world is nigh. As for Van der Weyden and Carpentier, they continue to rush hither and thither and back again without getting closer to understanding anything at all.

1.title: FR - Coincoin et les Z'inhumains - S01E04 - The Apocalypse
1.plot: Van der Weyden and Carpentier, our unfailing representatives of law and order, decide to grasp the bull by the horns. But how can they when everything has become so disorientated and the dead have begun rising from their graves? Even Coincoin and his little gang, caught between fear and excitement, have become entangled in the never-ending carnival dance.

meta.plot: Suite à la découverte inexpliquée d’un magma extraterrestre, Quinquin, qui se fait désormais appeler Coin Coin, et les inspecteurs Roger Van der Weyden et Rudy Carpentier se retrouvent embarqués dans une nouvelle et folle aventure policière et existentielle…

1.title: FR - Philharmonia - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Helene Barizet's first act as new conductor is to choose Selena Riviere, the youngest musician, to take over as concertmaster. With musicians rebelling, what will happen at her first concert?

1.title: FR - Philharmonia - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: The flooding is a serious threat to the orchestra's future, and Helene is confronted with a face from her past. Meanwhile, rumours about her husband's affair and her mother's death circulate.

1.title: FR - Philharmonia - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: The mysterious death of a musician has massive aftershocks. Is the orchestra cursed? Leopold believes that Helene is responsible for the death. And Peter takes an important step.

1.title: FR - Philharmonia - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Taking advantage of a fainting spell by Helene, Leopold replaces her. Musicians threaten to strike, Rafael threatens to withdraw funding, and Helene fears she is a danger to those close to her.

1.title: FR - Philharmonia - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Helene's father has offered her reassurance, so she is determined to fight on and to expose her enemies within the Philharmonia. Will they turn out to be far closer to home than she realises?

1.title: FR - Philharmonia - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Selena has serious problems and Helene goes to Selena's mother to find out about her own past. But time is running out as the final concert is looming, so Helene must play her last card.

meta.plot: Hélène Barizet est une musicienne prodige devenue chef d’orchestre. Nommée à la tête du Philharmonia contre l’avis de la Direction et des musiciens, elle est la première femme à diriger un orchestre permanent. Son audace et sa conduite nourrissent les rancœurs tout autant qu’elles forcent l’admiration. Le Maestro a une saison pour faire sa place et sauver l’orchestre. Elle peut compter sur Selena Rivière, une jeune violoniste virtuose pour l’y aider. Hélène l’a nommée premier violon, bien décidée à lui transmettre sa passion et son génie musical. Mais comment transmettre quand tout ce que l’on souhaite, c’est rompre avec le passé ?

After Marc, an esteemed architect, dies unexpectedly from a heart attack at a construction site, Laurence, his long-time partner, and Nina, his younger wife, find out about each other’s existence. Laurence, devastated and angry, decides to confront Nina, a woman unknown to everyone except Marc’s brother Robin, who returns from Japan for the funeral.

1.title: FR - Double Vie - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Double Vie - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Double Vie - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Double Vie - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Double Vie - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Double Vie - S01E06 - Episode 6

meta.plot: It is the Taisho Period in Japan. Tanjiro, a kindhearted boy who sells charcoal for a living, finds his family slaughtered by a demon. To make matters worse, his younger sister Nezuko, the sole survivor, has been transformed into a demon herself. Though devastated by this grim reality, Tanjiro resolves to become a “demon slayer” so that he can turn his sister back into a human, and kill the demon that massacred his family.

1.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S01E01 - Cruelty
1.plot: It is the Taisho Period (i.e. 1912-1926). Tanjiro Kamado is living a modest but blissful life in the mountains with his family. One day, when he returns from selling charcoal in town, he finds the remains of his slaughtered family in pools of blood after a demon attack. Tanjiro rushes down the snowy mountain with the sole survivor, his sister Nezuko, on his back. But on the way, Nezuko suddenly snarls, turning on Tanjiro.

1.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S01E02 - Trainer Sakonji Urokodaki
1.plot: At Giyu Tomioka's urging, Tanjiro heads for Mt. Sagiri with his sister Nezuko who's been turned into a demon. During the night, Tanjiro catches the smell of blood from inside a temple. He enters, thinking that someone might be hurt, only to come upon a man-eating demon. When the demon attacks, Tanjiro manages to fight back with his hatchet, but the demon's strength is overwhelming. Just as the demon is about to finish him off, Tanjiro is saved by none other than.

1.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S01E03 - Sabito and Makomo
1.plot: The Demon Slayer Corps... An organization that's been hunting down demons since ancient times. Sakonji Urokodaki starts training Tanjiro for Final Selection, the test for joining the unit. Navigating a mountain riddled with booby traps, dry sword swings, waterfall immersion and breathing techniques... A year later, Urokodaki informs Tanjiro that he has nothing more to teach him, and gives him one last hurdle to overcome in front of a giant boulder.

1.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S01E04 - Final Selection
1.plot: To pass Final Selection, one must survive for seven days on Mt. Fujikasane where demons captured by the Demon Slayers have been imprisoned. So begins the battle for survival between the young swordsmen and the demons. Armed with the breathing techniques and stances he'd learned from Sakonji Urokodaki, Tanjiro slashes demon after demon. His two years of training have not gone to waste. But just then, a morphed demon appears out of nowhere.

1.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S01E05 - My Own Steel
1.plot: When day breaks, there are only four swordsmen left standing after the seven-day battle. The guides who greet Tanjiro and the other survivors explain the Demon Slayer Corps system. All four are issued uniforms and Kasugai Crows as messengers, after which they must select the ore for their own Nichirin swords. After gazing hard at each lump of ore, and using his keen sense of smell, the one Tanjiro chooses is...

1.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S01E06 - Swordsman Accompanying a Demon
1.plot: Tanjiro is now clad in the uniform of the Demon Slayer Corps. His Nichirin Sword on his hip, and Nezuko, now awake, in a special box made by Urokodaki on his back, he heads out for his first assignment. A town to the northwest where girls have been vanishing nightly. There, Tanjiro meets Kazumi, haggard with worry after his girlfriend's been abducted. Though he does catch the scent of a demon nearby, there's just no demon in sight. Tanjiro is sure that a demon is behind this sinister incident...

1.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S01E07 - Muzan Kibutsuji
1.plot: Now split into three, the demons have driven Tanjiro into a corner. It is then that Nezuko attacks. Now that she’s become a demon herself, she’s no longer so weak that she needs protection. His mind made up, Tanjiro follows one of the demons into the swamp now spreading across the ground. Waiting for him there is...

1.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S01E08 - The Smell of Enchanting Blood
1.plot: The next mission is in Asakusa, Tokyo. Tanjiro is taken aback by the opulent Taisho Era cityscape, but soon picks up the demon’s scent there. His pursuit of the scent leads him to Muzan Kibutsuji. Tanjiro attempts to strike him down. But Kibutsuji transforms a passerby into demon, triggering a commotion. As Tanjiro desperately tries to get things under control, someone appears before him...

1.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S01E09 - Temari Demon and Arrow Demon
1.plot: It was two demons named Tamayo and Yushiro who came to Tanjiro’s rescue. Using the “Eyeblind” spell, Tamayo guides Tanjiro and Nezuko to her house. There, through his conversation with Tamayo, Tanjiro learns that there is a way to return demons to human form. Just then, two demons in pursuit of Tanjiro locate the house and unleash a furious assault...

1.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S01E10 - Together Forever
1.plot: Tanjiro’s crisis continues. He uses multiple forms of the Water Breathing technique to hold out against Yahaba’s final Blood Demon Art, the "Kouketsu Arrow." Meanwhile, Nezuko and Susamaru are still battling it out. Worried about the outcome, Tamayo unleashes her own Blood Demon Art.

1.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S01E11 - Tsuzumi Mansion
1.plot: Tanjiro's next destination, according to his Kasugai Crow, is to the south-southeast. On the way, Tanjiro runs into his fellow Final Selection survivor, the swordsman Zenitsu Agatsuma. Tanjiro has a hard time dealing with Zenitsu's passive attitude as they head deep into the mountains. They encounter two children whose older brother was taken away right in front of their house. There, Zenitsu hears the sound of a tsuzumi ringing out from somewhere.

1.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S01E12 - The Boar Bares Its Fangs, Zenitsu Sleeps
1.plot: Inside the house, where the rooms spin each time the tsuzumi is played, Tanjiro gets separated from Zenitsu Agatsuma. Without Tanjiro by his side, Zenitsu is overcome by fear and despair as he takes Shoichi through the house. Meanwhile, Tanjiro meets the master of the house, the tsuzumi-playing demon, and an odd-looking man wearing a boar’s head mask.

1.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S01E13 - Something More Important Than Life
1.plot: Every time Kyogai, the master of house, plays his tsuzumi, the room spins and Tanjiro struggles. Debilitated by the fractured bones he sustained in his previous battle, Tanjiro tries to fire himself up as he desperately fights on, but he is overwhelmed by Kyogai's Blood Demon Art. Will he find a way to slice off Kyogai's head?

1.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S01E14 - The House With the Wisteria Family Crest
1.plot: After a desperate fight to the death, Tanjiro prevails over Kyogai. He exits the house to find Zenitsu who had escaped earlier. But it is then that he sees the strange circumstances before him... The battered Zenitsu holding the box containing Nezuko in his arms while the man in the boar's head mask stands in the way with two Nichirin Swords drawn.

1.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S01E15 - Mount Natagumo
1.plot: Their next destination is to the north-northwest. Tanjiro and Nezuko head towards Mount Natagumo with Zenitsu and Inosuke. This mountain is covered with spider webs and is swarming with innumerable spiders. Leaving the cowering Zenitsu behind, Tanjiro and Inosuke head up the mountain where they run into fellow Demon Slayers entangled in spider webs.

1.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S01E16 - Letting Someone Else Go First
1.plot: Tanjiro and Inosuke battle the Demon Slayers trapped by spider webs. After slashing the threads and destroying the webs, they head deeper into the mountain. The farther they advance through the forest, the thicker the threads become, and those under their control start moving in ways impossible for a human being. Stopping the Demon Slayers without hurting them isn't going to be easy, but then Tanjiro makes a certain move...

1.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S01E17 - You Must Master a Single Thing
1.plot: One of the Twelve Kizuki, a direct subordinate of Muzan Kibutsuji, is here somewhere. When Tanjiro slays the Mother Spider Demon of Mt. Natagumo, he learns that a demon who might hold the key to turning Nezuko back into a human is somewhere in this very forest. With the battered Inosuke in tow, he heads deeper into the forest. Meanwhile, Zenitsu trudges forlornly through the woods only to encounter a spider with a human face.

1.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S01E18 - A Forged Bond
1.plot: Tanjiro and Inosuke face off against the Father Spider Demon of Mt. Natagumo. Tanjiro unleashes an attack, only to get hurled away by the demon's overwhelming power. Landing near a river, he comes upon the young demon Rui torturing the Sister Spider Demon. When Rui calls their bond of terror and hatred "a family’s bond," Tanjiro is enraged. So begins the battle between Rui and Tanjiro.

1.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S01E19 - Hinokami
1.plot: Swordsmen in the Demon Slayer Corps known as Hashiras have arrived on Mt. Natagumo. Giyu Tomioka, the Water Hashira, slays the Father Spider Demon with a single strike. Inosuke, thrilled to see such a display of swordsmanship by someone in a totally different league from himself, challenges Giyu to a duel. Meanwhile, Zenitsu lies near death as the poison circulates throughout his body. Just then, the Insect Hashira, Shinobu Kocho appears before him.

1.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S01E20 - Pretend Family
1.plot: When Rui assaults him with his Blood Demon Art, Tanjiro braces himself for certain death. As his life flashes before his eyes, he suddenly remembers his father's dance, the kagura, and unleashes a new, non-Water Breathing attack. Hinokami Kagura Dance. Knowing that he’ll be receiving a simultaneous blow from the demon, he uses his new move to slice off Rui’s head. As Tanjiro crawls towards Nezuko, who lies on the ground, riddled with wounds, someone appears before him.

1.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S01E21 - Against Corps Rules
1.plot: Seeing Tanjiro try to protect Nezuko even as he collapses triggers memories of Rui’s own past. Once a sickly boy, he became a demon after meeting Muzan Kibutsuji who gave him a share of his blood. But after he turns into a demon, his own parents try to kill him. Ever since then, he has been searching for a family. Seeking a bond that he can never hope to acquire...

1.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S01E22 - Master of the Mansion
1.plot: After the battle is over, Tanjiro and Nezuko are taken to the Demon Slayer Corps headquarters. This is where the Hashira Meeting between the Corps leader, Ubuyashiki, and the Hashiras, the most powerful swordsmen in the Corps, is to be held. The Hashiras censure Tanjiro for violating the Demon Slayer Corps by protecting a demon. And then, the Wind Hashira, Sanemi Shinazugawa, raises his sword against Nezuko...

1.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S01E23 - Hashira Meeting
1.plot: Ubuyashiki, the leader of the Demon Slayer Corps, finally appears before Tanjiro. He tells him that he will allow Tanjiro and Nezuko to join the Corps. But the Hashiras are unable to accept this decision right away. The Wind Hashira, Sanemi Shinazugawa, slashes his own arm and taunts Nezuko with his blood, trying to get her to show her true colors as a demon.

1.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S01E24 - Rehabilitation Training
1.plot: The injured Tanjiro, Zenitsu and Inosuke are sent to the home of the Insect Hashira, Shinobu Kocho, for treatment. Two weeks later, Tanjiro and Inosuke start rehabilitation training. But the drills are brutal, and they find themselves broken in spirit. Unaware of the grueling regimen, Zenitsu joins them late and is visibly enthusiastic in front of girls, but...

1.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S01E25 - Tsuguko, Kanao Tsuyuri
1.plot: Tanjiro, who's undergoing rehabilitation training at the Butterfly Mansion, works hard to keep up his Total Concentration Breathing techniques all day long. Though at first, he's helpless against Kanao, a swordswoman in his class who's training him, he slowly but surely begins to make some headway. Seeing Tanjiro devote himself to training every single day, Zenitsu and Inosuke resume training as well, but...

1.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S01E26 - New Mission
1.plot: As Tanjiro and the others are devoted to their rehabilitation training, the absolute master of the demons, Muzan Kibutsuji, gathers the Lower Ranks of the Twelve Kizuki. The demons, too, are preparing to make their next move. As training draws to a close, Tanjiro has improved to the point where he can fight on equal terms with Kanao. Just then, he receives word of a new mission from his Kasugai Crow.

2.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S02E01 - Flame Hashira Kyojuro Rengoku
2.plot: Flame Hashira Kyojuro Rengoku receives new orders: Travel to the Mugen Train, where over forty people have gone missing, and conduct an investigation. Leaving the Demon Slayer Corps Headquarters, he sets off on this new mission.

2.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S02E02 - Deep Sleep
2.plot: Tanjiro's group, fresh from completing their training at the Butterfly Mansion, head to their next mission, the Mugen Train. There they rendezvous with Rengoku, who arrived ahead of them. Tanjiro is overwhelmed by the always-energetic Rengoku, Zenitsu is frightened by the prospect of facing demons as usual, and Inosuke is immensely excited by the sight of the huge machine. But on this train loaded with passengers, a new battle is about to begin.

2.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S02E03 - Should Have Been
2.plot: Tanjiro, Nezuko, Zenitsu and Inosuke join Rengoku on the Mugen Train. Having heard that there may be demons on the train, they are on high alert, but they find themselves falling into a slumber. Within his dream, Tanjiro is reunited with his long lost family. However, it is soon revealed that this is a trap set by Enmu (Lower One).

2.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S02E04 - Insult
2.plot: Tanjiro, Zenitsu, Inosuke and Rengoku have fallen into a deep sleep while under the control of Enmu's Blood Demon Art. As Enmu attempts to use his accomplices to destroy the spiritual cores of Tanjiro and his companions in order to defeat them, Tanjiro realizes that he is inside a dream and searches for a way to wake up. In order to awaken from the dream, Tanjiro makes a decision to use his sword to cut into his own neck.

2.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S02E05 - Move Forward!
2.plot: After waking up from his dream by cutting his own neck, Tanjiro battles Enmu, who is the source of all the turmoil on the train. Enmu appears to be getting pleasure from inflicting pain on the passengers, which only infuriates Tanjiro even more. Tanjiro succeeds in severing Enmu's head, only to discover that Enmu's body is fused with the Mugen Train itself. Tanjiro is backed into a corner, but a freshly-awakened Inosuke comes to assist him and...

2.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S02E06 - Akaza
2.plot: Nezuko, Zenitsu and Rengoku fight against Enmu to protect the passengers. Meanwhile, Tanjiro and Inosuke discover the location of Enmu's neck. They work in tandem to thwart Enmu's Blood Demon Art and sever Enmu's neck. The Mugen Train writhes in pain and derails. What will be the fate of the 200 or so passengers as well as Tanjiro and his friends?

2.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S02E07 - Set Your Heart Ablaze
2.plot: The demon that appeared before Tanjiro and Rengoku after they defeated Enmu was the Upper Three, Akaza. While injured and on the ground, Tanjiro is almost attacked by Akaza and narrowly escapes death when Rengoku quickly strikes back. During the intense battle between Rengoku and Akaza, Akaza suggests to Rengoku that he should also become a demon. Rengoku vehemently refuses Akaza's offer, but his injured body is exhausted and being pushed past its physical limits...

3.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S03E01 - Sound Hashira Tengen Uzui
3.plot: After the Mugen Train incident, Akaza visits Muzan Kibutsuji. Guided by a crow, Tanjiro Kamado heads off to the Rengoku residence to convey Kyojuro Rengoku's last messages to his father and little brother. Tanjiro's group return to the Butterfly Mansion.

3.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S03E02 - Infiltrating the Entertainment District
3.plot: After Tanjiro visits the Rengoku residence and meets Kyojuro's younger brother, Senjuro, to deliver Kyojuro's last message, Tanjiro spends his days training and completing missions. One day, he returns to the Butterfly Mansion to find Sound Hashira, Tengen Uzui, attempting to take Aoi and Naho away on a mission against their will. Tanjiro, Zenitsu and Inosuke offer to go on that mission instead, and they head to their next destination - the Entertainment District.

3.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S03E03 - What Are You?
3.plot: After arriving at the Entertainment District, Tanjiro and his comrades infiltrate each House where Uzui's wives, Suma, Makio and Hinatsuru, work. While working as apprentices and searching for their whereabouts, Inosuke hears that Makio has been shutting herself away from everyone in her room.

3.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S03E04 - Tonight
3.plot: As Tanjiro close in on the demon that has been preying upon the entertainment district. But even as he closes in, the others continue to follow their leads toward their query. Who will find the demon first? And will they be able to survive the confrontation when they do?

3.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S03E05 - Things Are Gonna Get Real Flashy!!
3.plot: After being told of Zenitsu’s disappearance and to leave the Entertainment District by Uzui, Tanjiro and Inosuke decide that they will rescue Zenitsu. That evening, Tanjiro picks up a scent of a demon, which leads him to Koinatsu Oiran being swallowed by Daki’s belt. With Uzui nowhere in sight, Tanjiro must face the Upper Six demon alone.

3.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S03E06 - Layered Memories
3.plot: During the fierce battle with Daki, Tanjiro continues to unleash the Hinokami Kagura, which causes a huge strain on his body. Meanwhile, Inosuke reaches the Belt Demon’s nest and saves people who have been captured. Makio, Suma, and Zenitsu, who have been freed from the belt, join in on the fight. As the ceiling of the nest is broken, Uzui appears wielding his swords.

3.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S03E07 - Transformation
3.plot: Enraged by Daki's contempt for human life, Tanjiro attacks her with more intensity and gradually corners the demon. But he's already gone past his physical limit. As Tanjiro collapses and all seems lost again, Nezuko appears. A vicious battle ensues and Nezuko starts transforming into a more demon-like form...

3.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S03E08 - Gathering
3.plot: After Nezuko attempts to attack innocent bystanders as her demon form advances, Tanjiro is finally able to make her fall asleep by singing a lullaby. Meanwhile, another demon emerges out of Daki's body after being beheaded by Uzui - Gyutaro, Daki's older brother and the other form of Upper Six. Uzui must now face both demons, Daki and Gyutaro.

3.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S03E09 - Defeating an Upper Rank Demon
3.plot: Tanjiro, Zenitsu and Inosuke have joined Uzui in battle. While Zenitsu and Inosuke take on Daki, Tanjiro and Uzui deal with Gyutaro; however, they struggle as the demons have the upper hand with their coordinated attacks. But thanks to Hinatsuru's help and some teamwork from Uzui, Tanjiro's blade finds its way towards Gyutaro's neck...

3.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S03E10 - Never Give Up
3.plot: Tanjiro and Uzui have been separated by Gyutaro’s Blood Demon Art. As Tanjiro joins the struggling Zenitsu and Inosuke, they manage to decapitate Daki at last thanks to their coordinated barrage of sword strikes. However, when Inosuke tries to run off with Daki’s head, he gets pierced by Gyutaro’s scythe. Uzui has also collapsed, leaving Tanjiro and the others with their backs to the wall.

3.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S03E11 - No Matter How Many Lives
3.plot: Uzui deflects all of Gyutaro's Blood Demon Art attacks, and despite getting pierced in the jaw, Tanjiro is able to slice off Gyutaro's head. Though wounded from head to toe, Zenitsu and Inosuke also behead Daki, and they succeed in decapitating both demons at the same time. Just when it seems as though they've defeated the Upper Six demons after a fierce struggle, Gyutaro unleashes his Blood Demon Art...

4.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S04E01 - Someone's Dream
4.plot: An Upper Rank Demon has been defeated for the first time in a hundred years by Uzui, Tanjiro, and his comrades' effort. This news causes a ripple effect not only among the members of the Demon Slayer Corps, but also the Upper Rank Demons, who have been summoned by Muzan Kibutsuji. Meanwhile, Tanjiro is recovering at the Butterfly Mansion when he discovers that he has upset his swordsmith Haganezuka after chipping his sword and decides to head to the village where the swordsmiths live to talk to him in person.

4.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S04E02 - Yoriichi Type Zero
4.plot: Tanjiro intervenes during an argument between a pillar and an apprentice blacksmith and learns of the existence of an amazing training method.

4.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S04E03 - A Sword From Over 300 Years Ago
4.plot: Tanjiro begins his training with Yoriichi Type Zero and is pushed to the limits by Kotetsu's relentless coaching and extreme training. Through this experience, Tanjiro masters a new skill of predicting where the opponent's next move will hit by using his sense of smell. During his training, Tanjiro lands a blow on Yoriichi Type Zero and ends up destroying it, but a sword from over 300 years ago appears from inside...

4.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S04E04 - Thank You, Tokito
4.plot: Hantengu's head is slashed by Muichiro and he splits into two clones. Muichiro is blown away by Karaku. Tanjiro, Nezuko and Genya are stunned when the clones split into more clones. Muichiro rescues Kotetsu from a Goldfish Demon.

4.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S04E05 - Bright Red Sword
4.plot: Tokito continues advancing through the forest and finds Mr. Kanamori. As soon as they arrive at the work hut in the middle of the forest, they are welcomed by Gyokko. Meanwhile, Tanjiro continues his fight against Hantengu.

4.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S04E06 - Aren't You Going to Become a Hashira?
4.plot: Two simultaneous fights continue, Tanjiro, Nezuko and Genya against Hantengu and Tokito against Gyokko. Genya began to show a demonic form. Tanjiro asks him to look for Hantengu's real body, but memories of the past begin to plague Genya.

4.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S04E07 - Awful Villain
4.plot: Genya aims for the neck of the fifth demon that split off from Hantengu, but the demon's neck is shockingly hard, and his sword snaps in half in his attempt to strike it. His gun is also ineffective and Genya is driven into a corner. Realizing that he is unable to sever the neck by himself, he entrusts defeating the fifth demon, which is believed to be the main body, to Tanjiro. Taking on Genya's will, Tanjiro wields his sword against the fleeing demon...

4.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S04E08 - The Mu in Muichiro
4.plot: Muichiro, with the help of air blown by Kotetsu to him, escapes Gyokko's Water Prison Pot. Muichiro finally recalls his tragic past.

4.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S04E09 - Mist Hashira Muichiro Tokito
4.plot: Armed with his memories, Muichiro feels powerful and invincible, convinced that the demonic fifth moon has no chance against him.

4.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S04E10 - Love Hashira Mitsuri Kanroji
4.plot: Tanjiro, Nezuko, and Genya are struggling through an arduous battle against Zohakuten and his five tree dragons. They are forced to fight defensively against the tree dragons using the four emotion demon's powers, and Tanjiro is swallowed by one of them amidst the fight. Just as Tanjiro is close to meeting his demise, Mitsuri arrives in the nick of time and rescues him. And now, Mitsuri faces off against Zohakuten to rescue the captured Nezuko and Genya...!

4.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S04E11 - A Connected Bond: Daybreak and First Light
4.plot: Tanjiro continues the fight against Hantengu. Amidst all his injuries and the Superior Four's skill, will he be able to defeat him? As the battle draws to a close, the Demon Slayer Squad must race against time to end the fight before dawn.

5.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S05E01 - To Defeat Muzan Kibutsuji
5.plot: The Hashira, Sanemi and Iguro, along with their comrades head to an abandoned castle on top of a mountain for a mission, while Tanjiro is being treated at the Butterfly Mansion for the wounds he suffered at the Swordsmith Village. Later on, the Hashira gather at the Ubuyashiki Mansion to hold a Hashira meeting, where Muichiro reveals how the marks manifested. In an effort to strengthen the entire Demon Slayer Corps from the bottom up, the Hashira Training begins...

5.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S05E02 - Water Hashira Giyu Tomioka's Pain
5.plot: Kagaya's Kasugai Crow suddenly appears in front of Tamayo and invites her to the Demon Slayer headquarters — even though she is a demon. Meanwhile, after receiving a letter from Kagaya at the Butterfly Mansion, Tanjiro pays a visit to Giyu, who is not participating in the Hashira Training. At first, Tanjiro is rejected by Giyu but patiently continues to try to talk to him. Giyu, who gives in to Tanjiro's persistence, begins to share the reason why he won't participate in the training.

5.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S05E03 - Fully Recovered Tanjiro Joins the Hashira Training!!
5.plot: After talking with Tanjiro, Giyu is able to overcome his past self and decides to join the training. Meanwhile, Tanjiro's wounds have healed enough to join the training, and heads to his first training with the former Hashira, Uzui.

5.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S05E04 - To Bring a Smile to One's Face
5.plot: After completing training with Uzui, Tanjiro visits the Tokito residence next. The Demon Slayer swordsmen who have already started the training are dispirited by Muichiro's intense training and harsh words. Tanjiro hears the swordsmen discussing if there's anything they can do about it...

5.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S05E05 - I Even Ate Demons
5.plot: After completing Mitsuri's training, Tanjiro heads to train with Iguro. When he arrives at the training site, Iguro is waiting for him, visibly angry. Will he be able to complete this horrifying training where he'll have to fix his sword skills?

5.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S05E06 - The Strongest of the Demon Slayer Corps
5.plot: Tanjiro and Zenitsu head to Himejima's training site deep in the mountains and reunite with Inosuke and Murata. Tanjiro first starts the training by being hit by a waterfall but struggles with the coldness and weight of the water.

5.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S05E07 - Stone Hashira Gyomei Himejima
5.plot: Tanjiro was struggling with Himejima's tasks. Now he finally manages to move the boulder after receiving advice from Genya, whom he meets by chance. With this breakthrough, will Tanjiro be able to overcome Himejima's rigorous training?

5.title: FR - Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - S05E08 - The Hashira Unite
5.plot: During a silent night when the moon shines, Kagaya finally meets Muzan Kibutsuji, who appears at the Ubuyashiki Mansion.

meta.plot: Astrid et Audrey sont mère et fille, avocates spécialisées dans le droit de la famille, et ont fait le pari périlleux de travailler ensemble. Et elle a tellement changé la famille ces dernières années ! D’un bouledogue anglais écartelé par le divorce de ses maitres à une affaire de marchand de gamètes, les dossiers se suivent et ne se ressemblent pas.

1.title: FR - On va s'aimer un peu, beaucoup... - S01E01 - Rose
1.plot: Astrid Lartigues, co-founder of the Lartigues and Lorenzi law firm, asks her daughter Audrey to arrange mediation between young Rose's parents and grandparents. Astrid's partner Sofia Lorenzi deals with a couple in the process of divorcing. The cause of the dispute is who gets custodianship of Lady, their dog.

1.title: FR - On va s'aimer un peu, beaucoup... - S01E02 - Fatou
1.plot: Astrid represents a divorced woman who is accused of harassing her ex-husband's new girlfriend and risks losing custody of her teenaged daughter. Meanwhile, Audrey deals with a couple of adult-film stars who have changed their minds about their prenuptial agreement at the last minute.

1.title: FR - On va s'aimer un peu, beaucoup... - S01E03 - Esteban
1.plot: A restaurant owner with health issues wants to formally adopt the teenager he raised, but the biological father has other ideas. Audrey, still uncomfortable with the idea of having a third child, deals with an error in the civil status of a young couple that could put their upcoming wedding in jeopardy.

1.title: FR - On va s'aimer un peu, beaucoup... - S01E04 - Romain
1.plot: A desperate woman asks Audrey to help her troubled fiancé, whose overbearing mother has had him committed to a mental institution against his will. While Audrey gets closer to handsome prosecutor Eric Leroy, Astrid is forced to end her affair with the president of the bar association.

1.title: FR - On va s'aimer un peu, beaucoup... - S01E05 - Stéphane
1.plot: Astrid Lartigues represents a doctor after one of his wife's patients claims to be his biological daughter. Also, Audrey argues with Paul, and Sofia's gambling debts catch up with her.

1.title: FR - On va s'aimer un peu, beaucoup... - S01E06 - Lazlo
1.plot: An elderly widower with Alzheimer's hires Audrey to convince his estranged children to help with his medical expenses. Sofia, up to her eyeballs in debt, plays a dangerous game when she agrees to counsel an incarcerated crime boss who wants his kids to visit.

1.title: FR - On va s'aimer un peu, beaucoup... - S01E07 - Sofia
1.plot: Audrey and Paul marry, but the festivities are cut short when Sofia is taken into police custody at the reception. Unable to represent Sofia herself, Astrid hires a rival lawyer for her defense. With the firm in chaos, Audrey handles a pair of former clients who now want a divorce.

2.title: FR - On va s'aimer un peu, beaucoup... - S02E01 - Tom
2.plot: Tom and his little sister Lou have run away and spent the night out-of-doors. Their parents are in the middle of divorcing. The tense situation is affecting the two children, afraid of being separated and placed in a home. Tom asks Audrey for help: he wants to sue the parents.

2.title: FR - On va s'aimer un peu, beaucoup... - S02E02 - Émilie
2.plot: Audrey is in hospital, giving birth with Éric at her side. Astrid is contacted by Émilie, a teacher, for her for help. Her pupils have been sent nude photos of her on their mobile phones. She accuses her ex of being responsible.

2.title: FR - On va s'aimer un peu, beaucoup... - S02E03 - Nathalie
2.plot: To everyone's stupefaction, during a family meeting, the mother arrives late and accompanied by her new wife. Divorced several years earlier, she has been receiving alimony paid by her former husband, a payment now called into question. Astrid takes on the case.

2.title: FR - On va s'aimer un peu, beaucoup... - S02E04 - Federico
2.plot: Céline Jauffrin decides to start legal proceedings against Federico Lorca, convinced he is the father of her child. In front of the judge, Lorca refuses to give a biological sample. Sofia, who represents him, feels that the judge has something against her. Audrey has returned to work after giving birth.

2.title: FR - On va s'aimer un peu, beaucoup... - S02E05 - Antoine
2.plot: On returning from a trip abroad, a woman is arrested for child abduction. The father had obtained a court order to stop the child leaving the country. Astrid, well-informed of all the details of the case, knows that the trip was for medical reasons. Audrey learns that Paul is aware of her relationship with Éric. Shattered she asks Roxane to obtain a paternity test.

2.title: FR - On va s'aimer un peu, beaucoup... - S02E06 - Emma
2.plot: After being caught shop-lifting, a teenager, Emma, finds herself at the police station. The security guard who caught her, has accused her of charge of assault and battery. Her parents are divorced and the incident happened during the week when her father was looking after her. Her mother takes advantage to apply for sole custody. Audrey is contacted by a client who wants to have his wife's show banned: he considers it damaging to his reputation.

2.title: FR - On va s'aimer un peu, beaucoup... - S02E07 - Marianne
2.plot: Marianne wants a divorce but her husband has threatened to kill himself if she insists. She gives in for the moment, but despite everything wants to go through with it. She asks Astrid to help.

1.title: FR - La foire aux vanités - S01E01 - Miss Sharp in the Presence of the Enemy
1.plot: Lowly teaching assistant Becky issues headmistress Miss Pinkerton with an ultimatum – pay her properly to teach at her Academy for Young Ladies or find her a station elsewhere. Miss Pinkerton calls Becky's bluff, and Becky is forced to pack away her meagre possessions. Kindly stockbroker's daughter Amelia Sedley takes pity on the poor orphan and offers to take her home for the week.

1.title: FR - La foire aux vanités - S01E02 - Miss Sharp Begins to Make Friends
1.plot: In darkest Hampshire, Becky spends her days as governess to Sir Pitt Crawley’s neglected daughters. Her employer's handsome youngest son, Rawdon, does his best to interest Becky in a flirtation. But Becky's ambition is to get into her employer's good books, and soon she is promoted to the position of Sir Pitt's indispensable secretary.

1.title: FR - La foire aux vanités - S01E03 - A Quarrel About an Heiress
1.plot: Becky lives with rich Aunt Matilda, and her future is looking bright. But as war clouds gather, everyone's fortunes take a tumble.

1.title: FR - La foire aux vanités - S01E04 - In Which Becky Joins Her Regiment
1.plot: When George refuses to apologise for his marriage to Amelia, his father sends him a letter, cutting him off from the family and denying him his inheritance. All the friends set sail for Belgium, where Becky makes use of every opportunity to advance in society.

1.title: FR - La foire aux vanités - S01E05 - In Which Battles Are Won and Lost
1.plot: The Napoleonic Wars enter their decisive moment as the battle of Waterloo gets underway, with George fighting on the front line. Becky has come to the conclusion that war is not such a bad thing, since it presents plenty of opportunities for money to be made.

1.title: FR - La foire aux vanités - S01E06 - In Which a Painter's Daughter Meets a King
1.plot: Becky works out how to live well on nothing a year, but flies too high as she joins the dizzy ranks of lords, ladies and kings.

1.title: FR - La foire aux vanités - S01E07 - Endings and Beginnings
1.plot: Becky is left alone in the world and living in greatly reduced circumstances when Steyne arranges for Rawdon to be shipped overseas. Dobbin discovers that Amelia plans to remarry, a revelation that inspires him to finally confess his feelings for her - but he is not prepared for her reaction. The Sedley family takes a holiday in Germany, where they are unexpectedly reunited with Becky - who gets the chance to perform a single good deed. Last in the series.

meta.plot: Angleterre, première moitié du XIXe siècle. Becky Sharp est une femme hypocrite, ambitieuse et sans scrupules : on assiste à son ascension au sommet de la Société Anglaise et à sa chute. Autour d'elle s'agite, dans une immense fresque, la "Foire aux Vanités".

1.title: FR - Madame Columbo - S01E01 - Word Games
1.plot: Kate Mulgrew is Kate Columbo, wife of the rumpled police lieutenant and - in her own right - a mother, homemaker and reporter for a neighborhood throwaway. In this week's opener, she also demonstrates a knack for investigation after she overhears a neighbor plotting the murder of his wife.
