1.title: FR - Madame Columbo - S01E02 - Murder Is a Parlor Game
1.plot: An apparent suicide is actually the handiwork of a retired Scotland Yard investigator who is teaching a course that Mrs. Columbo is taking.

1.title: FR - Madame Columbo - S01E03 - A Riddle for Puppets
1.plot: A puppet maker is murdered by a tormented ventriloquist who acted at the urging of his "evil" dummy.

1.title: FR - Madame Columbo - S01E04 - Caviar with Everything
1.plot: Two women own a catering firm. Both love the same man. To one, the solution is obvious: murder.

1.title: FR - Madame Columbo - S01E05 - A Puzzle for Prophets
1.plot: A famous psychic engineers the murder of her business partner and appears to have an airtight alibi - she was demonstrating her "powers" to Mrs. Columbo at the time of death.

meta.plot: Cette série met en scène l'épouse du célèbre lieutenant Columbo. Entre son métier de journaliste et l'éducation de sa fille Jenny, la jeune femme se livre à la résolution de quelques enquêtes.

Lors d'une descente dans la cachette d'un chef de mafia, la police découvre une statuette de Madone en plastique pleurant des larmes de sang. Ce phénomène semble inexplicable, d'autant que l'objet énigmatique entraîne tous ceux qui l'approchent dans une extase mystique et bouleverse leur vie.

1.title: FR - Il Miracolo - S01E02 - Lazarus Aside
1.plot: While investigations are continuing, the Premier goes to the place of the miracle together with a priest friend, Father Marcello.

1.title: FR - Il Miracolo - S01E03 - The First Duty of the Living
1.plot: Sandra sends blood to a Phoenix lab to clear the mystery. Meanwhile, strange dreams undermine the skepticism of the Premier.

1.title: FR - Il Miracolo - S01E04 - The Black Substance
1.plot: While the images of Sun's irascibility become viral, Sandra obtains valuable information on the origin of the blood.

1.title: FR - Il Miracolo - S01E05 - The Pilot Flame
1.plot: While the Premier is afraid of losing political consensus, the investigations seem to finally reach a turning point.

1.title: FR - Il Miracolo - S01E06 - The Princess of Swimming Pools
1.plot: Sandra flies to Belgium in the footsteps of Amin Tarek. Sole hopes to repair image damage with an interview.

1.title: FR - Il Miracolo - S01E07 - Mea Culpa
1.plot: A shocking truth emerges from the past of Father Marcello. Meanwhile, the Amin blood test produces an unsettling outcome.

1.title: FR - Il Miracolo - S01E08 - Legal Right Share
1.plot: The miracle has upset everyone's destinies, including secrets surfaced from the past and future choices. But there is time for a final twist.

1.title: FR - Missing - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Missing - S01E02 - Victoria
1.plot: The disappearance of a mentally ill person who may pose a threat to public safety.

1.title: FR - Missing - S01E03 - White Whale
1.plot: Brooke searches for clues to put an elusive serial killer behind bars before he claims another victim.

1.title: FR - Missing - S01E04 - Basic Training
1.plot: Jess goes undercover as a new recruit at a military training academy. Her mission is to determine whether a missing cadet went AWOL or was the victim of foul play.

meta.plot: Ce devait être des vacances pour l’inspectrice Maja Silver... Mais à peine arrivée dans sa petite ville natale, son ancien mentor de la police locale fait une attaque au moment précis où le corps d’une jeune inconnue est retrouvé au bord de l’autoroute. Les autorités à Stockholm confient alors à Maja la direction de l’enquête, qui se complique avec la découverte d’un nouveau cadavre. Encore une adolescente, membre d’un mouvement chrétien sectaire animé par un pasteur au profil sulfureux.

Yeo Wun Gwang était autrefois cascadeur. Aujourd'hui, il est devenu une hallyu star, reconnu principalement pour ses films d'action et pour ses rôles de méchant à l'écran.

Sa popularité étant de plus en plus imposante, celui-ci décide d'engager un garde du corps. Il sélectionne alors le meilleur professionnel en faisant appel aux services de Kim Seol Wu, un agent d'élite connu pour son talent unique et son niveau d'intelligence. Ce dernier ne manque et n'échoue jamais dans les missions qui lui sont confiées, gardant toujours ses sentiments cachés derrière un visage impassible.

Passant de plus en plus de temps ensemble, les deux hommes nouent, au fil du temps, une relation de confiance et d'amitié tout au long des obstacles qu'ils rencontrent.

1.title: FR - Man To man [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Ghost Agent K
1.plot: We meet Kim Seol-woo during a hostage situation, where he takes out the hostage takers against orders. He's recruited by the NIS to become a ghost agent: deeply planted into organizations, fake identities and operating discreetly.

1.title: FR - Man To man [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Working for Un Gwang
1.plot: Neither Woon-Gwang nor his chief celeb manager Cha Do-Ha likes his new bodyguard. If the can't make him leave, they'll just make him want to leave.

1.title: FR - Man To man [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Visiting Chairman Victor
1.plot: After leavening that Woon-Gwang has been involved in a similar accident before, Seol-Woo relays his suspicions to Lee Dong-Hyun, his comrade and mentor.

1.title: FR - Man To man [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Did You Think I Liked You?
1.plot: From Chairman Victor's private collection of precious cultural artefacts, a wood carving catches Seol-Woo's eye. Then the power suddenly goes out.

1.title: FR - Man To man [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Go with Your Feelings
1.plot: For his next task, Seol-woo must get close to Do-ha, but it isn't so easy when she has forbidden him to approach her within a 1-meter radius

1.title: FR - Man To man [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Goldfinger Is Back
1.plot: Seol-woo gets drunk and sends cute text messages, all in the name of his mission. Meanwhile, Congressman Baek tries to make a deal with Jang Tae-ho.

1.title: FR - Man To man [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - From This Moment, I Resign
1.plot: To stop Seol-woo from blowing his cover, Dong-hyun tells him to stay out of the investigation. However, Seol-woo continues his search for the culprit.

1.title: FR - Man To man [VOSTFR] - S01E08 - Being a Bodyguard Was a Disguise
1.plot: Do-ha asks to hear the truth directly from Seol-woo. Meanwhile, Dong-hyun and Seol-woo begin preparation for their next mission, the Black Auction.

1.title: FR - Man To man [VOSTFR] - S01E09 - The Black Auction Mission
1.plot: For the country and Do-ha's father, Un-kwang decides to help Seol-woo. Do-ha, not able to trust Seol-woo, requires him to sign a contract.

1.title: FR - Man To man [VOSTFR] - S01E10 - An Agent's Tactic
1.plot: Jang Tae-ho lays down his conditions to Mo Seung-jae. For their new mission to commence, Seol-woo and Do-ha must first get the approval of Un-kwang.

1.title: FR - Man To man [VOSTFR] - S01E11 - Finding the Mole
1.plot: Seol-woo doesn't pick up Do-ha's phone calls, so she decides to check his workroom. Dong-hyun visits Jang Tae-ho and asks if he knows where K is.

1.title: FR - Man To man [VOSTFR] - S01E12 - The Path
1.plot: All sides involved, including Lee Dong-hyun, Mo Seung-jae and the National Intelligence Service, are continuing the search for the missing videotapes.

1.title: FR - Man To man [VOSTFR] - S01E13 - A Message From "Y"
1.plot: Jang Tae-ho and Lee Dong-hyun discuss Song Mi-eun and her past: She decided to marry Mo Seung-jae, not for his wealth but for her own survival.

1.title: FR - Man To man [VOSTFR] - S01E14 - Lovers Tactic
1.plot: The police find the vehicle involved in the hit-and-run accident. Determined to kill off the bad guys, Seol-woo gets his gun from his workroom.

1.title: FR - Man To man [VOSTFR] - S01E15 - Only the Truth Can Save You
1.plot: For Seol-woo, it's finally time for revenge. For all involved, it's finally time for closure and for punishments to be given where they are due.

1.title: FR - Man To man [VOSTFR] - S01E16 - Life Must Go On
1.plot: For Seol-woo, it's finally time for revenge. For all involved, it's finally time for closure and for punishments to be given where they are due.

1.title: FR - MacGruber [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - A Good Day to Die
1.plot: At the request of General Fasoose, MacGruber is released from prison for one last suicide mission.

1.title: FR - MacGruber [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - The Hungry Lion
1.plot: Captured by his enemy Brigadier Commander Enos Queeth, MacGruber must make an escape or be killed.

1.title: FR - MacGruber [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Brimstone
1.plot: MacGruber races to retrieve the deadly chemical weapon "Brimstone" before Queeth can get to it.

1.title: FR - MacGruber [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - The Scientist
1.plot: The gang goes undercover at a gala in Miami to stop Queeth from synthesizing "Brimstone."

1.title: FR - MacGruber [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Through the Looking Glass
1.plot: Vicki almost gets "Brimstone," but MacGruber gets in the way. Mac goes to Enos Queeth's compound.

1.title: FR - MacGruber [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - The Storm
1.plot: With the team in shambles, MacGruber attacks Queeth's compound to get revenge.

1.title: FR - MacGruber [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - The Architect
1.plot: The plan Queeth set into motion is still alive, and MacGruber must find out who is behind the attacks.

1.title: FR - MacGruber [VOSTFR] - S01E08 - Havencroft
1.plot: With the team back together, all roads lead to the mysterious “Havencroft.”

meta.plot: Après avoir pourri en prison pendant plus d'une décennie, le héros ultime et uber patriote américain MacGruber est enfin libéré. Sa mission : éliminer un mystérieux méchant de son passé, le brigadier commandant Enos Queeth. Avec le monde entier dans la ligne de mire, MacGruber doit rassembler son ancienne équipe afin de vaincre les forces du mal.

Lorsqu'il sort de sa retraite pour venger la mort de son fils, un ancien espion se retrouve coincé entre passé et présent, au cœur d'une guerre entre agences et d'une conspiration qui tire profit du chaos au Moyen Orient.

1.title: FR - L'Espionne de Tanger [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Sira Quiroga, a young seamstress pushed by fate into a risky compromise in which patterns and fabrics of her profession will become the facade of something much murkier and transcendent.

1.title: FR - L'Espionne de Tanger [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Ramiro and Sira arrive in Tangier and discover an exotic world of luxury. Ramiro is always drunk and taking Sira’s money, and the two get in a fight.

1.title: FR - L'Espionne de Tanger [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Commander Vázquez takes Sira to stay with Candelaria, an eccentric woman who’s had problems with the law. Sira won’t eat and stays in bed all day.

1.title: FR - L'Espionne de Tanger [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Candelaria proposes Sira create an exclusive shop in a luxury building in Tétouan. No one shows up at first, until a German woman orders some dresses.

1.title: FR - L'Espionne de Tanger [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Rosalinda needs a dress for tonight. Sira and Jamila work together to make a last-minute miracle. Sira finds out Rosalinda is with Lt. Col. Beigbeder.

1.title: FR - L'Espionne de Tanger [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Rosalinda gets a reporter, Marcus Logan, to help her mother escape in exchange for an interview with Beigbeder. Marcus invites Sira to an elite event.

1.title: FR - L'Espionne de Tanger [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Sira is developing an attraction towards Marcus. Rosalinda appears to be very ill, and when Sira visits she says it’s because her husband has arrived.

1.title: FR - L'Espionne de Tanger [VOSTFR] - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Sira and Marcus decide to steal the debt documents of the husband of one of the shop’s customers. Then he’ll flee Tétouan and say goodbye to Sira.

1.title: FR - L'Espionne de Tanger [VOSTFR] - S01E09 - Episode 9
FR - L'Espionne de Tanger [VOSTFR] - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: Beigbeder tells Sira he’s been relieved of his duties for advising Franco not to ally with the Germans. He asks her to give Rosalinda some letters.

1.title: FR - L'Espionne de Tanger [VOSTFR] - S01E11 - Episode 11
1.plot: Sira decides to help Paquita, but it won’t be easy. With all of the problems from her former life sorted out, she’s ready for a life of intrigue.

1.title: FR - L'Espionne de Tanger [VOSTFR] - S01E12 -
FR - L'Espionne de Tanger [VOSTFR] - S01E13 -
FR - L'Espionne de Tanger [VOSTFR] - S01E14 -
FR - L'Espionne de Tanger [VOSTFR] - S01E15 -
FR - L'Espionne de Tanger [VOSTFR] - S01E16 -
FR - L'Espionne de Tanger [VOSTFR] - S01E17 -

meta.plot: Brooklyn et Malibu se rendent en Europe pour résoudre un mystère quand une jument est volée alors qu'elles sont en vacances dans la campagne anglaise.

1.title: FR - Les Mystères de Barbie : À la poursuite du cheval perdu - S01E01 - Hold Those Horses!
1.plot: The girls arrive at Carson Estate for a weeklong stay with Ken's wealthy aunt. But on their very first night, a prized horse and saddle go missing.

1.title: FR - Les Mystères de Barbie : À la poursuite du cheval perdu - S01E02 - Taking the Reins
1.plot: Everyone's a suspect, so the Barbies hunt for clues to clear their names. Are Lady Puddington's muddy shoes a sign of guilt — or just a fashion crime?

1.title: FR - Les Mystères de Barbie : À la poursuite du cheval perdu - S01E03 - Veering Off Course
1.plot: Denholm seems awfully suspicious... until Lady Carson reveals she might have a motive. Ken and Marcus arrive in London. Cassidy makes an unexpected move.

1.title: FR - Les Mystères de Barbie : À la poursuite du cheval perdu - S01E04 - One Horse Fashion Show
1.plot: Brooklyn and Malibu follow Cassidy to Venice, where they're pulled into a fashion-forward side quest and reunite with an old friend.

1.title: FR - Les Mystères de Barbie : À la poursuite du cheval perdu - S01E05 - As Good as Gondola
1.plot: The teen detectives split up into three different groups: one to find Pepper, one to track down Dietrich, and one to keep an eye on Giovanni.

1.title: FR - Les Mystères de Barbie : À la poursuite du cheval perdu - S01E06 - Back in the Diamond Saddle
1.plot: Surprising confessions come to light as Brooklyn and Malibu team up to protect precious cargo aboard a speeding train headed back to England.

1.title: FR - Les Mystères de Barbie : À la poursuite du cheval perdu - S01E07 - Down to the Wire
1.plot: With the competition looming and Pepper still on the loose, the Carsons need another horse — and someone to ride her. The gang sets a trap for Giovanni.

1.title: FR - Les Mystères de Barbie : À la poursuite du cheval perdu - S01E08 - Jumping to Conclusions
1.plot: The Barbies have a plan to rescue the horses, recover the saddle and win the championship, too. But it'll take everyone on the team to pull it off!

2.title: FR - Les Mystères de Barbie : À la poursuite du cheval perdu - S02E01 - Beach Bash Begins
2.plot: Magic's in the air as Brooklyn and Malibu seek out a juicy new story for their hit podcast while starting summer jobs with pals Ken, Marcus and Nikki.

2.title: FR - Les Mystères de Barbie : À la poursuite du cheval perdu - S02E02 - How the Crystal Ball Bounces
2.plot: Who swiped Martin the Magnificent's crystal? The Barbies consider their suspects while investigating why Madame Celeste is acting even odder than usual.

2.title: FR - Les Mystères de Barbie : À la poursuite du cheval perdu - S02E03 - Now You See Her
2.plot: The plot thickens as the Barbies suspect summertime sabotage. Meanwhile, Ken finds a clue, Councilman Wynin comes clean and Warlock has a rough night.

2.title: FR - Les Mystères de Barbie : À la poursuite du cheval perdu - S02E04 - Welcome to the Fun House
2.plot: Zoe's gone missing, and the mysteries are really piling up. Hoping to uncover some clues, the Barbies attend auditions to be Warlock's new assistant.

2.title: FR - Les Mystères de Barbie : À la poursuite du cheval perdu - S02E05 - Girls Just Wanna Have Sun
2.plot: There's a ghostly green glow coming from the sea caves, then suddenly... it's gone. Later, a bitter feud between Warlock and MC D-Dub explodes on stage.

2.title: FR - Les Mystères de Barbie : À la poursuite du cheval perdu - S02E06 - The Legend of the Acceletrix
2.plot: After the legendary Malibu Moondial is stolen, the Barbies are totally stuck — until they realize they may have overlooked a prime suspect.

meta.plot: À l'approche de ses 16 ans, une ado pas tout à fait comme les autres redécouvre les pouvoirs pleins de feu qu'elle cache depuis toujours et doit affronter ses démons… pour de vrai.

1.title: FR - Jentry Chau, une ado contre les démons - S01E01 - Worst Birthday Ever
1.plot: While celebrating her birthday in Korea, Jentry realizes she can still shoot fire from her hands — and that a ruthless demon's out to steal her soul.

1.title: FR - Jentry Chau, une ado contre les démons - S01E02 - Fifteen Minutes of Flame
1.plot: A portal to the underworld in Texas opens the door to unwelcome guests. A burning secret makes Jentry's first day at Riverfork High School even harder.

1.title: FR - Jentry Chau, une ado contre les démons - S01E03 - Girl with a Pearl
1.plot: Jentry's having haunting visions that seem to reveal the past... but where are they coming from? A determined Gugu trains to master a new skill.

1.title: FR - Jentry Chau, une ado contre les démons - S01E04 - Forget the Alamo
1.plot: Ed tags along on a field trip to the Alamo, where the tour guide's frightening re-enactment of a famous battle goes a bit too far.

1.title: FR - Jentry Chau, une ado contre les démons - S01E05 - Some Gui My Prince Will Come
1.plot: Getting closer to Jentry prompts Michael and Kit to think about who they are — and who they really want to be. A new face stalks the halls at school.

1.title: FR - Jentry Chau, une ado contre les démons - S01E06 - All's Fair in Love and War
1.plot: Deep-fried snacks, a secret Daoist magic market and a towering demon? A day at the State Fair brings big problems to Texas — really, really big.

1.title: FR - Jentry Chau, une ado contre les démons - S01E07 - Into the Zhong
1.plot: While Ed guards the portal to the underworld, Gugu leads Jentry to a dangerous middle realm that holds the answers to questions about her past.

1.title: FR - Jentry Chau, une ado contre les démons - S01E08 - Fifteen Finger Discount
1.plot: Jentry's got a plan to get rid of her powers so she can finally get her life back. But to pull it off, she'll need Kit's help.

1.title: FR - Jentry Chau, une ado contre les démons - S01E09 - Everyone Wins
1.plot: Just when Jentry's starting to feel normal, Michael's worried that he isn't. Spirit Week stirs up big feelings — and plays out on the field with a bang.

1.title: FR - Jentry Chau, une ado contre les démons - S01E10 - A Night with the Stars
1.plot: Worlds collide in an epic clash as chaos comes to Riverfork, summoning demons to the Homecoming game and putting the whole town in danger.

1.title: FR - Jentry Chau, une ado contre les démons - S01E11 - Good Intentions
1.plot: A month after the demon attack, Jentry and Ed steal away to Diyu on important family business. But nothing there is quite as it seems.

1.title: FR - Jentry Chau, une ado contre les démons - S01E12 - Moonie Phases
1.plot: Armed with her mother's memories, Jentry tries to make up for lost time. Meanwhile, the students prepare for a Lock-In at school.

1.title: FR - Jentry Chau, une ado contre les démons - S01E13 - Lock-In
1.plot: Tensions hit a boiling point within the walls of Riverfork High when demons crash the party, forcing Jentry and her friends to fight for their lives.

meta.plot: La jeune espionne McKeyla recrute trois autres lycéennes expertes en sciences et technologie pour former une équipe d'agents secrets.

1.title: FR - Projet MC² - S01E01 - The New Girl
1.plot: New girl and teen spy McKeyla stirs up suspicions in classmates Adrienne, Bryden and Camryn, causing them to do some investigative work of their own.

1.title: FR - Projet MC² - S01E02 - Secret Agenting
1.plot: McKeyla investigates a threat to the prince's space mission while Adrienne, Bryden and Camryn stumble through proving their spy skills.

1.title: FR - Projet MC² - S01E03 - Smart is the New Cool
1.plot: The girls band together in science and friendship. Will they be able to save the prince's space launch in time and become official NOV8 agents?

2.title: FR - Projet MC² - S02E01 - Back to Basics
2.plot: The four girls are demoted back to basics after they make a big deal out of saving the prince in the previous season. They are not allowed on any mission, even as a suspicious figure, Carson Lazarus, a criminal mastermind, is released from jail. Soon after, a figure who calls themselves "Retro" causes all technology to malfunction and glitch in Maywood Glen.

2.title: FR - Projet MC² - S02E02 - No Laughing Matter
2.plot: The Quail allows the four girls to figure out this case. McKeyla becomes increasingly suspicious of Kyle, but soon dismisses the idea of him being Retro just because he knew she liked fro-yo and was wearing a black hoodie, very much like the one Retro wears. They also suspect Devon D'Marco, a troublemaker, as she spray-paints handcuffs on a picture of a drone on a poster about the upcoming launch. All four girls except Bry, who has to babysit, make ways to get detention on Saturday with Devon. Bry runs a vocal recognition as Cam and Adri confront the troublemaker and McKeyla looks through her bag. Devon is proven to be innocent, just using the school's 3D printer to make skulls for her nana's birthday.

2.title: FR - Projet MC² - S02E03 - Trashed
2.plot: When a new point of evidence involving HAVOC points to Carson Lazarus, Adrienne and Bryden comb through her trash looking for clues.

2.title: FR - Projet MC² - S02E04 - Dam Fine Mess
2.plot: Bryden analyzes Retro's voice, which gives the girls a new idea about his or her identity; and they need to use their wiles when a blackout threatens to delay their investigation.

2.title: FR - Projet MC² - S02E05 - Bye Bye Birdie
2.plot: Retro sets a trap for the girls, which causes the Quail to advise them to leave town.

2.title: FR - Projet MC² - S02E06 - Mission Totally Possible
2.plot: When the girls learn about the Quail and McKeyla's super-secret plan to infilerate HAVOC, they enlist some new friends to help out with the mission.

meta.plot: Jack Sullivan est un adolescent de 13 ans. Avec ses amis du collège, ils vivent au sein d'une cabane dans les arbres et affrontent des zombies à la suite d'une apocalypse.

1.title: FR - The Last Kids on Earth - S01E01 - The Last Kids on Earth
1.plot: Living solo in his monster-infested town, 13-year-old Jack will have to think fast, find friends and get creative if he wants to survive.

2.title: FR - The Last Kids on Earth - S02E01 - Mall Quest
2.plot: Fed up with his friends' bickering, Jack hopes a quest to the mall will get the buds back on good terms - because this is going this is getting annoying

2.title: FR - The Last Kids on Earth - S02E02 - Jack the Slayer
2.plot: Jack’s attempts to impress his monstrous new pals upsets June, Quint and Dirk, who feel like he’s taking all the credit.

2.title: FR - The Last Kids on Earth - S02E03 - Bestiary Master
2.plot: Feeling useless when it comes to the fine art of fighting monsters, Quint sets out to prove himself to his friends.

2.title: FR - The Last Kids on Earth - S02E04 - The Zombie Parade
2.plot: While exploring a graveyard, Jack and Quint get emotional — really emotional. Meanwhile, June and Dirk find they have a lot in common. Oh, the horror!

2.title: FR - The Last Kids on Earth - S02E05 - The Thrull of Victory
2.plot: While Thrull trains Jack to go after monsters and zombies with a new attitude, Quint and Dirk dig through trash — and June follows a hunch.

2.title: FR - The Last Kids on Earth - S02E06 - Stay on Target
2.plot: Quint, Dirk and June are pumped for their up-all-night zombie stakeout. But Jack's running late ... and he's supposed to bring the snacks.

2.title: FR - The Last Kids on Earth - S02E07 - June Gloom
2.plot: When the gang visits June's old house, Jack assumes it'll be a fun walk down memory lane. Never assume, Jack. Never assume.

2.title: FR - The Last Kids on Earth - S02E08 - Follow That Butler
2.plot: After adding another monster to the bestiary, Jack, June, Quint and Dirk learn a troubling truth: Their work is far from over.

2.title: FR - The Last Kids on Earth - S02E09 - Always Darkest
2.plot: Jack's vow to never trust another monster is put to the test. Quint, Dirk and June look to acquire a little — well, actually a lot — of weed killer.

2.title: FR - The Last Kids on Earth - S02E10 - Dawn of Rezzoch
2.plot: Quint's been captured, Rezzoch's on a rampage and Jack's got a wish: to put an end to all of this mayhem, once and for all.

1.title: FR - Wonderoos - S01E01 - First Potty Accident
1.plot: It's Hazzy's turn to lead the pajama parade, but he needs to go to the potty. What should he do to avoid an accident? Stop — and listen to his body!

1.title: FR - Wonderoos - S01E02 - First Time Making New Friends
1.plot: Kiki is new to Roo City and wants to meet friends at the playground. She feels shy at first — but soon discovers that saying hello is a great start!

1.title: FR - Wonderoos - S01E03 - First Morning Routine
1.plot: Luly wants to dance before nature class, but skipping her morning checklist will make her late. She learns that a routine keeps everything on track!

1.title: FR - Wonderoos - S01E04 - First Time I Couldn't Fall Asleep
1.plot: The Groovin' Roos concert is tomorrow, and Dewey is too excited to sleep! But if he doesn't calm down, he'll be too tired to enjoy the show.

1.title: FR - Wonderoos - S01E05 - First Glasses
1.plot: Teshi's first trip to the eye doctor is full of new experiences. But asking questions and paying attention during the visit makes him feel less scared.

1.title: FR - Wonderoos - S01E06 - First Sunburn
1.plot: It's pool party time, and Kiki's ready for some fun in the sun. But when she decides to skip out on the sunscreen, she gets a painful sunburn. Ouch!

1.title: FR - Wonderoos - S01E07 - First Snowy Day
1.plot: It's snowing in Roo City, and Dewey wants to play outside with his pals! But will he take the time to put on warm winter clothes to stay safe and cozy?

1.title: FR - Wonderoos - S01E08 - First Time Trying a New Food
1.plot: Hazzy's unsure about tasting a pickle for the first time. But with Teshi and Luly cheering him on, he might just discover a yummy new snack!

1.title: FR - Wonderoos - S01E09 - First Time Losing Something Special
1.plot: When Teshi can't find his favorite stuffed animal, he learns to handle the feelings of losing something important to him with the support of his friends.

1.title: FR - Wonderoos - S01E10 - First Compromise
1.plot: Luly and Kiki are baking cookies for their friends but can't agree on a surprise ingredient. Can they come up with a solution that makes them both happy?

1.title: FR - Wonderoos - S01E11 - First Apology
1.plot: Kiki covers Teshi's puppet, Little T, with bubbles at Hazzy's car wash, which makes Teshi upset. Can Kiki fix things up with an apology?

1.title: FR - Wonderoos - S01E12 - First Time Getting a Shot
1.plot: Hazzy's worried about getting his first shot at the doctor. Will sharing his feelings with the other Wonderoos help him feel better?

1.title: FR - Wonderoos - S01E13 - First Time I Had to Be Calm
1.plot: Dewey's excited to see dinosaur bones and other exhibits at the museum. But he has to learn how to calm down before visiting a special room about space.

1.title: FR - Wonderoos - S01E14 - First Time Talking About Differences
1.plot: Hazzy's painting a picture of the Wonderoos! When Luly notices that Hazzy missed one of her special features, will she say something — or keep it inside?

1.title: FR - Wonderoos - S01E15 - First Long Wait
1.plot: There's a long line for the magic show, and Teshi doesn't want to wait! Will he skip the show or enjoy the time with his pals?

1.title: FR - Wonderoos - S01E16 - First Time Getting Lost
1.plot: Hazzy wanders away from Luly to play a game at the carnival, then realizes he's lost. It's always best to stick with a buddy — and now he knows!

1.title: FR - Wonderoos - S01E17 - First Time at the Dentist
1.plot: Kiki has her very first dentist visit, then goes home for a fun sleepover with friends. But will she do the right thing and brush her teeth before bed?

1.title: FR - Wonderoos - S01E18 - First Time I Didn't Want to Tell the Truth
1.plot: As the Wonderoos set up a surprise birthday party for Hazzy, Dewey sneaks a bite of the cake. Will he tell the truth when his friends ask what happened?

meta.plot: À Zooville, Kiki, Dewey, Hazzy, Luly et Teshi apprennent à se faire des amis, découvrent de nouveaux aliments et font tout plein de nouvelles expériences.

1.title: FR - Centaurworld - S01E01 - Hello Rainbow Road
1.plot: Separated from her Rider during battle, Horse wakes up in a colorful world filled with strange beasts. But where is her trusty friend?

1.title: FR - Centaurworld - S01E02 - Fragile Things
1.plot: The herd sets out to find the way home. Wammawink encourages them to be careful and take it slow, but fearless Horse charges ahead.

1.title: FR - Centaurworld - S01E03 - The Key
1.plot: Horse meets Waterbaby — one of Centaurworld's shamans — and learns about the key: a mysterious object that could reunite her with Rider.

1.title: FR - Centaurworld - S01E04 - What You Need
1.plot: Searching for the next piece of the key, Horse leads the herd into a mysterious forest to see the tree shamans. They grant wishes — but there's a catch.

1.title: FR - Centaurworld - S01E05 - It's Hidin' Time
1.plot: The friends seek shelter in a cave during a storm... but they're not alone. While looking for an exit, they discover strange paintings on the walls.

1.title: FR - Centaurworld - S01E06 - Holes: Part 2
1.plot: The group follows the Rainbow Road into a deep, dark hole, where a Moletaur locks them in jail and informs them that they'll face the judge.

1.title: FR - Centaurworld - S01E07 - Johnny Teatime's Be Best Competition: A Quest for the Sash
1.plot: Zulius brings the herd to Cataur Valley, where the shaman is fuzzy but fierce. To earn a piece of the key, Horse goes glam for a silly competition.

1.title: FR - Centaurworld - S01E08 - Ride the Whaletaur Shaman!
1.plot: Horse hopes to find the final shaman in Merfolk Town. But she's growing discouraged — and looking more and more like a centaur every day.

1.title: FR - Centaurworld - S01E09 - The Rift (1)
1.plot: The herd makes it to the Rift and reminisces about their time together while waiting for Waterbaby to arrive with the final piece of the key.

1.title: FR - Centaurworld - S01E10 - The Rift (2)
1.plot: Horse and Rider face a frightening enemy. Back in Centaurworld, the herd summons up the courage to enter the void and fight for their friend.

meta.plot: Un cheval de guerre est transporté dans un monde étrange peuplé de centaures chantants.

1.title: FR - Ever After High - S01E01 - Stark Raven Mad
1.plot: Apple White is royally ready for Legacy Day! But her world -- and the entire world of Ever After High - will be flipped on its crown if Raven Queen questions her destiny instead of pledging it. Can Apple save her Happily Ever After from becoming a Happily NEVER After?

1.title: FR - Ever After High - S01E02 - True Reflections
1.plot: Mirror, mirror tell me true -- can Apple and Raven find another mirror like you? While Apple usually knows her mirror's answers, she's throne for a loop after Raven's magical aim interferes with her reflection.

1.title: FR - Ever After High - S01E03 - Maddie-in-Chief
1.plot: Madeline Hatter decides to go off script and run against Apple White™ in the Royal Student Council Election. Will Maddie's riddlish-filled debate win over the other students, or is she putting the cup before the kettle?

1.title: FR - Ever After High - S01E04 - Briar's Study Party
1.plot: Professor Rumplestilskin's plan of failing all the students may have worked in the past, but he may have met his match with Briar Beauty. She HAS been studying Forever After, you know. Now, if she can only keep her eyes open long enough to help the other students...

2.title: FR - Ever After High - S02E01 - Blondie's Just Right
2.plot: When Blondie Lockes uses her MirrorCast to prove that Ever After High's legends are true, Headmaster Grimm goes to great lengths to make sure her show ends up being just right.

3.title: FR - Ever After High - S03E01 - Ginger in the Breadhouse
3.plot: Ginger Breadhouse gets a little help from Raven Queen when she tries to prove to everyone that she just wants to bake spellbinding treats, not follow her story.

3.title: FR - Ever After High - S03E02 - Ashlynn's Fashion Frolic
3.plot: Ashlynn Ella’s evil stepsisters try to steal the spotlight at her spelltacular fashion show, but when the clock strikes 12, they find out what it’s like in their stepsister’s shoes.

3.title: FR - Ever After High - S03E03 - An Hexclusive Invitation
3.plot: Ashlynn gets an invitation to the exclusive Blue Moon Forest Fest, but Faybelle Thorn, daughter of the Dark Fairy, is only looking forward to causing trouble.

3.title: FR - Ever After High - S03E04 - Chosen with Care
3.plot: Ashlynn decides who to invite to the Forest Fest, and Dexter works up the nerve to ask Raven out.

meta.plot: Les enfants de célèbres personnages de contes de fées ont grandi. Lycéens, ils doivent désormais choisir quelle sera leur destinée.
Deux ados en apparence ordinaire sont secrètement chargés de traquer des monstres de jeux vidéo qui se sont malencontreusement échappés dans le monde réel.

1.title: FR - Glitch Techs - S01E01 - Age of Hinobi
1.plot: A tournament for the city's best gamers brings together High Five and Miko, two competitors who figure out something suspect is going on.

1.title: FR - Glitch Techs - S01E02 - Tutorial Mode
1.plot: Glitch Tech training turns out to be a bore. But Miko and High Five's attempt to inject some fun into their session ends with gross consequences.

1.title: FR - Glitch Techs - S01E03 - Going, Going, Gauntlet!
1.plot: It's Miko and High Five's first official day on the job! But crisis soon strikes when Miko's high-tech gear gets stolen by a peculiar bird.

1.title: FR - Glitch Techs - S01E04 - Smashozaurs
1.plot: When an ultra-rare, ultra-dangerous glitch turns Casino into a character from his favorite video game, it's up to High Five to save him.

1.title: FR - Glitch Techs - S01E05 - Castle Crawl
1.plot: Miko and High Five arrive at a house where other Glitch Techs have gone missing — and walk right into a familiar game full of surprises.

1.title: FR - Glitch Techs - S01E06 - Alpha Leader
1.plot: What makes a good leader? High Five finds out the hard way when he steps up to head a team against four glitches that are on the loose.

1.title: FR - Glitch Techs - S01E07 - Collection Quest
1.plot: High Five and Bergy romp through the city on a quest for glitches and experience points. Meanwhile, it's sister bonding day for Miko and Nica.

1.title: FR - Glitch Techs - S01E08 - Adventures in Pet Training
1.plot: To figure out a fix for an ailing Ally, Miko enters a pet training simulator. High Five tags along and makes an unlikely friend.

1.title: FR - Glitch Techs - S01E09 - Karate Trainer
1.plot: Eager to level up her skills before a karate tournament, Lexi convinces Miko to fire up a video game simulator to help hone her moves.

2.title: FR - Glitch Techs - S02E01 - The Glitch Modder
2.plot: Miko realizes that being a little weird can be awesome when she meets Ridley, a glitch modder with a mind-blowing lair filled with creative wonders.

2.title: FR - Glitch Techs - S02E02 - Ping
2.plot: High Five seems unusually glum on a job at a game store to take care of a mysterious cube-shaped glitch from the first video game ever.

2.title: FR - Glitch Techs - S02E03 - Ralphie Bear Is Back
2.plot: High Five's childhood dreams come true when the pizza arcade brings back a retired birthday party robot. But it's the miserable opposite for Miko.

2.title: FR - Glitch Techs - S02E04 - BUDS
2.plot: Miko suspects that something is very, very wrong when Mitch suddenly starts acting nice. At a bizarre party, High Five sees that she might be right.

2.title: FR - Glitch Techs - S02E05 - The New Recruit
2.plot: Ridley resurfaces with a newfound desire to become a Glitch Tech. Miko and High Five are delighted ... but they have no idea she's hiding something.

2.title: FR - Glitch Techs - S02E06 - Find the Glitch
2.plot: While gathered together to play a deduction game, the Glitch Techs begin to wonder if there's a glitch pretending to be human among them.

meta.plot: Partis à la rescousse d'un animal en danger, deux personnages que tout oppose font d'intéressantes expériences, comme celle de l'amitié... ou des œufs verts au jambon.

1.title: FR - Green Eggs and Ham - S01E01 - Here
1.plot: Soon after a rare chickeraffe goes missing from the Glurfsburg Zoo, Sam and Guy meet by chance at a diner, setting off a series of extraordinary events.

1.title: FR - Green Eggs and Ham - S01E02 - Car
1.plot: Guy shows up to return Sam's briefcase, only to learn he's got company. Elsewhere, a mother-daughter duo begins a very slow drive through the desert.

1.title: FR - Green Eggs and Ham - S01E03 - Train
1.plot: With the Bad Guys in pursuit, Sam and Guy board a train to Meepville and meet Michellee, a cautious bean counter, and her thrill-seeking daughter, E.B.

1.title: FR - Green Eggs and Ham - S01E04 - Fox
1.plot: Taking a detour to find the chickeraffe some food, Guy and Sam cross paths with an egg-loving fox who's working hard to control his appetite.

1.title: FR - Green Eggs and Ham - S01E05 - Dark
1.plot: While seeking shelter for the night, the trio gets stuck in a junkyard. The only upside for an inventor like Guy? It's full of raw materials.

1.title: FR - Green Eggs and Ham - S01E06 - Box
1.plot: Panic hits the streets of Prinz Pazookle when the locals learn there's a chickeraffe in town. But a colorful carnival is bringing everyone together.

1.title: FR - Green Eggs and Ham - S01E07 - Mouse
1.plot: A singing rodent comes to the rescue in North Shvizelton when Sam and Guy wind up in jail with no real plan to get themselves out.

1.title: FR - Green Eggs and Ham - S01E08 - Rain
1.plot: To escape the Bad Guys -- and stormy weather -- Sam and friends spend the night in Michellee's cabin, but trouble follows. Snerz hires outside help.

1.title: FR - Green Eggs and Ham - S01E09 - Goat
1.plot: Guy and Sam need a next-level plan when Snerz's animal-napper chases them up a cliff. As for the Bad Guys, they're definitely down -- but not out.

1.title: FR - Green Eggs and Ham - S01E10 - House
1.plot: The fugitive friends make a stop in Stovepipe Junction, where Sam gets to meet Guy's family -- and reveals a shocking secret.

1.title: FR - Green Eggs and Ham - S01E11 - Boat
1.plot: Just as Guy's about to try a bite of breakfast, the Bad Guys bust in with the truth about their mission. Under the sea, the plot thickens.

1.title: FR - Green Eggs and Ham - S01E12 - There
1.plot: After a close call on the docks, Guy gets captured and learns he's been duped. Michellee gives her daughter a tour of Meepville.

1.title: FR - Green Eggs and Ham - S01E13 - Anywhere
1.plot: The SnerzDay Gala sets the stage for a surprise ending that's full of twists and turns -- and a heartwarming act of true friendship.

meta.plot: Johnny Test, petit malin de 11 ans, et son chien parlant génétiquement modifié enchaînent les aventures pour sauver leur famille (et le monde) des désastres de tout poil.

1.title: FR - Johnny Test - S01E01 - Johnny to the Center of the Earth
1.plot: Things have been mysteriously disappearing underground, making Johnny and Dukey believe that the people behind this are "mole people". When Johnny accidentally loses his dad's new camera, he must journey to the center of the earth to retrieve it before dinnertime, or he will be grounded.

1.title: FR - Johnny Test - S01E02 - Johnny X
1.plot: Susan and Mary give Gil a piece of their special love "bubble gum", but by accident, it makes him transform. In order to save Gil and the others in pork belly, they have to give Johnny and Dukey some cool super powers.

1.title: FR - Johnny Test - S01E03 - Johnny vs. Bling-Bling Boy
1.plot: Bling-Bling Boy has stolen a device that turns things into gold and Johnny must get it back before dinnertime.

1.title: FR - Johnny Test - S01E04 - Johnny Impossible
1.plot: Johnny tries to get his baseball back from an old man before the baseball game starts.

1.title: FR - Johnny Test - S01E05 - Johnny Test: Party Monster
1.plot: Susan and Mary are having a party and use a device on Johnny in order to make him look good so all the girls at the party will love him, but Johnny turns into a monster.

1.title: FR - Johnny Test - S01E06 - Johnny Test: Extreme Crime Stopper
1.plot: The Extreme Teen Team are on the loose and it's up to Johnny to bring them down.

1.title: FR - Johnny Test - S01E07 - Deep Sea Johnny
1.plot: Johnny uses an invention to breathe underwater, yet sharks and electric eels begin to walk on land and wreak havoc to the beach.

1.title: FR - Johnny Test - S01E08 - Johnny and the Amazing Turbo Action Backpack
1.plot: Bling-Bling Boy steals a backpack and Johnny must retrieve it so Susan and Mary can show it off at the school science fair.

1.title: FR - Johnny Test - S01E09 - Johnny and the Ice Pigs
1.plot: Johnny goes back in time to ask Thomas Edison for a hockey invention and then to gather all of the vicious and ruthless "legends" he could find, in order to form a hockey team which will help the Ice Pigs win a game.

1.title: FR - Johnny Test - S01E10 - Johnny’s House of Horrors
1.plot: Johnny fills the house with some of Hugh's favorite things listed in his notebook. However, Johnny learns that the book was also full of Hugh's least favorite things (most of them scary.) To make matters worse, Lila's boss is coming over for dinner that night.

1.title: FR - Johnny Test - S01E11 - Johnny’s Super Smartypants
1.plot: Johnny wears super smarty pants in order to win the love of a genius girl, Janet Nelson Jr. But later, the pants get a mind of their own.

1.title: FR - Johnny Test - S01E12 - Take Your Johnny to Work Day
1.plot: Johnny sneaks into Lila's car along with Susan and Mary on Take Your Daughter to Work Day, thinking that it's unfair that girls don't have to go to school on this day, but boys do. When the kids get to Lila's workplace, they sneak into a lab and accidentally release a missile.

1.title: FR - Johnny Test - S01E13 - Johnny and the Mega Roboticles
1.plot: Johnny brings a toy, Nasteria, to life. But the toy decides to destroy Porkbelly. Now Johnny needs to stop the evil action figure with a toy force, led by Nasteria's arch enemy, Mega Roboticle.

1.title: FR - Johnny Test - S01E14 - Johnny Gets Mooned
1.plot: Johnny steals a rocket his sisters made to travel to the moon so he can write his report. Unexpectedly, he battles some moon monsters and rescues Canadian astronauts.

1.title: FR - Johnny Test - S01E15 - Johnny Hollywood
1.plot: Johnny uses a gadget to travel into a movie, The Quickest and the Monkiest. But what happens when the gadget gets stuck and the movie has a bad ending?

1.title: FR - Johnny Test - S01E16 - Johnny's Turbo Time Rewinder
1.plot: Johnny's sisters invent a time rewinder that can go back up to 5 minutes and they use it to get Johnny in trouble. Infuriated, he tries multiple times to steal this, but he fails; eventually, he gets a similar one from Bling-Bling Boy.

1.title: FR - Johnny Test - S01E17 - Return of Johnny X
1.plot: Johnny becomes Johnny X again in order to take down Bling-Bling's latest evil invention, Repto-Slicer.

1.title: FR - Johnny Test - S01E18 - Sonic Johnny
1.plot: Johnny and Dukey try Susan and Mary's ultimate scooter and are wanted in the future.

1.title: FR - Johnny Test - S01E19 - Dog Days of Johnny
1.plot: Susan and Mary put a device on Dukey, making him respond to their every command. Now Johnny must stop Susan and Mary, and get his best friend back.

1.title: FR - Johnny Test - S01E20 - Johnny's Pink Plague
1.plot: Johnny uses a device to free everyone of zits.

meta.plot: Jeune collégienne douée pour le rap, Karma résout tous les problèmes, armée de son talent pour les rimes, de son ambition et de son grand cœur.

1.title: FR - Karma’s World - S01E01 - I Am Karma
1.plot: On the first day of middle school, Karma makes a new friend who shares her love of music — then faces a classmate who makes fun of her name.

1.title: FR - Karma’s World - S01E02 - Daddy Daughter Day
1.plot: Karma is torn when the chance to win tickets to a popular rapper's concert clashes with a father-daughter tradition she feels like she's outgrown.

1.title: FR - Karma’s World - S01E03 - Hair Comes Trouble
1.plot: Karma considers changing her hair after a sleepover with her classmates makes her uncomfortable. But her mom teaches her how to love her crown of curls.

1.title: FR - Karma’s World - S01E04 - Major Disaster
1.plot: During a game of fetch at the park, Karma and Keys' energetic dog, Major, goes missing. So Karma brings the neighborhood together to help get him back.

1.title: FR - Karma’s World - S01E05 - This Is For My Girls
1.plot: Karma's ready to make her rap debut in front of the whole class for the Dream Job Jam at school. But a classmate's harsh words make her doubt herself.

1.title: FR - Karma’s World - S01E06 - Best Friends For Never
1.plot: While working on a class project with Switch, Karma realizes she hasn’t been a good friend to Winston, who feels like he's being replaced.

1.title: FR - Karma’s World - S01E07 - Lost For Words
1.plot: When Karma's journal goes missing, she discovers that another student has swiped her rhymes, so she decides to confront him during a rap battle.

1.title: FR - Karma’s World - S01E08 - Karma’s Writer’s Block
1.plot: A way-too-busy Karma gets stuck in a creative rut when she enters a kids poetry contest after promising to help Switch with a major event.

1.title: FR - Karma’s World - S01E09 - Do The Write Thing
1.plot: The Kids' Poetry Slam Jam winner is finally announced! But the results leave Karma feeling like a failure until she learns a valuable lesson from Keys.

1.title: FR - Karma’s World - S01E10 - Switch’s Secret
1.plot: Karma, Winston and Keys discover Switch's secret talent as Switch struggles to tell her parents how she really feels about her upcoming performance.

1.title: FR - Karma’s World - S01E11 - The Hippity And The Hop
1.plot: Ahead of her school's talent showcase, Karma is named the hip-hop captain of an unexpected team. But she soon worries what others will think of her crew.

1.title: FR - Karma’s World - S01E12 - Freestyle Knockout
1.plot: When a popular freestyle show invites Karma to compete, she forms a rap team with Crash but finds herself trying to copy the competition.

1.title: FR - Karma’s World - S01E13 - Legend Of The Lost Lyrics, Part 1
1.plot: To help save the record shop from closing, Karma, Winston and Switch go on a journey to find a treasure hidden in the neighborhood.

1.title: FR - Karma’s World - S01E14 - Legend Of The Lost Lyrics, Part 2
1.plot: The treasure hunt continues as Karma, Keys and her pals try to secure an important clue from Mr. Singal. Later, Karma runs into a familiar face.

1.title: FR - Karma’s World - S01E15 - The Final Showdown
1.plot: Karma and Crash go from teammates to competitors on "Freestyle Knockout." But Karma comes up with a plan to use the spotlight to save the record shop.

meta.plot: Découvrez les histoires qui se cachent sous la surface des cinq océans de notre planète, dans cette série documentaire époustouflante.

1.title: FR - Our Oceans - S01E01 - Pacific Ocean
1.plot: In the world's largest ocean, one mighty current brings the Pacific to life in astonishing ways, from enriching rainforests to sustaining coral reefs.

1.title: FR - Our Oceans - S01E02 - Indian Ocean
1.plot: From the minute mantis shrimp to the mighty sperm whale, inhabitants of the tropical Indian Ocean use their ingenuity to find food and raise their young.

1.title: FR - Our Oceans - S01E03 - Atlantic Ocean
1.plot: In the choppy, unpredictable Atlantic Ocean, fish and mammals must face down predators and navigate the fast-changing climate in order to survive.

1.title: FR - Our Oceans - S01E04 - Arctic Ocean
1.plot: With temperatures mounting and sea ice melting, the creatures of the Arctic Ocean must go to new extremes to survive in a new, warmer world.

1.title: FR - Our Oceans - S01E05 - Southern Ocean
1.plot: In the most remote ocean on Earth, the Global Ocean Current is at its most powerful — and its cold waters are home to some extraordinary species.

1.title: FR - Stretch Armstrong et les Flex Fighters - S01E01 - Confessions of a Teenage Superhero
1.plot: While taking a break from the rigors of high school life, three friends cause a lab accident that results in them gaining incredible superpowers.

1.title: FR - Stretch Armstrong et les Flex Fighters - S01E02 - Pulled in Every Direction
1.plot: When Jake, Nathan and Ricardo are captured by Kane and Rook, instead of being punished, their lives are changed in unimaginable ways.

1.title: FR - Stretch Armstrong et les Flex Fighters - S01E03 - Ninja and the Ghost
1.plot: As they adjust to their new powers, the Flex Fighters encounter a mysterious ninja trying to take down Rook and Charter City.

1.title: FR - Stretch Armstrong et les Flex Fighters - S01E04 - Online Presence
1.plot: When computer hacker Circuit-Stream develops powers to pass through solid objects, it's up to the Flex Fighters to stop him from taking over the city.

1.title: FR - Stretch Armstrong et les Flex Fighters - S01E05 - Stretchipedes
1.plot: While Stretch and the Flex Fighters try to work out their issues, a mysterious villain schemes to take over Rook's latest creation, the Stretchipedes.

1.title: FR - Stretch Armstrong et les Flex Fighters - S01E06 - The Gangs of Old Town
1.plot: The Flex Fighters and Kane must confront former gangster Jack Kinland, who has taken over the criminal underworld with the help of Stretch Monster.

1.title: FR - Stretch Armstrong et les Flex Fighters - S01E07 - Fast Times
1.plot: Quick Charge, a scientist with the ability to skate on electricity, sabotages the city's electric grid in order to carry out revenge on Rook.

1.title: FR - Stretch Armstrong et les Flex Fighters - S01E08 - Lie Sandwich
1.plot: The Flex Fighters must race against Blindstrike to the location of Dr. C's downed plane, where secrets of the dangerous Hyper-Flexarium reside.

1.title: FR - Stretch Armstrong et les Flex Fighters - S01E09 - Singularity Event
1.plot: Stretch's odds of attending the school dance are slim when his powers go haywire after criminals Brick and Mortar hit him with an unknown weapon.

1.title: FR - Stretch Armstrong et les Flex Fighters - S01E10 - Crisis at the Cleo
1.plot: When the mysterious Tech Men take the museum hostage, Stretch and the Flex Fighters must find a way to stop them without revealing their identities.

1.title: FR - Stretch Armstrong et les Flex Fighters - S01E11 - Secret Ninja Party
1.plot: To discover the identity of Blindstrike, Stretch and the Flex Fighters work together with an unlikely ally to locate Dr. C’s secret base.

1.title: FR - Stretch Armstrong et les Flex Fighters - S01E12 - Endgame
1.plot: Stretch and the Flex Fighters race against Stretch Monster to secure a mysterious and dangerous chemical held by Blindstrike.

1.title: FR - Stretch Armstrong et les Flex Fighters - S01E13 - The Age of Flexarium
1.plot: With Stretch Monster’s sinister plan finally revealed, Stretch and the Flex Fighters must stop his Flexarium Army from taking over the world.

meta.plot: Jake Armstrong et ses meilleurs amis se transforment à l'improviste en super-héros et découvrent que leurs moyens d'action dépassent ceux des adolescents ordinaires.
France, 1942. Quatre adolescents dotés de super pouvoirs entrent en résistance.

1.title: FR - Les Emmerdeurs - S01E01 - The Wrong Hands
1.plot: Albert, a French Resistance hero, is on a mission to get hold of an elixir capable of giving strange abilities to whoever drinks it. Unfortunately, the potion ends up in the hands of four teenagers, who do not intend to team up, or to help Albert.

1.title: FR - Les Emmerdeurs - S01E02 - The Grocery Store
1.plot: After convincing Manu, Solange, Lorraine and Pierrot to come with him, Albert tries to contact his leader to get our heroes to the Free Zone. Meanwhile, Pierrot starts having strange visions...

1.title: FR - Les Emmerdeurs - S01E03 - The Brothel
1.plot: After failing to contact the head of Resistance, our heroes have no other choice but to steal Colonel Dietrich’s papers in order to cross the barricades. Undercover in the brothel where the Nazi officer spends his evenings, the teenagers and Albert will have to learn to cooperate to fulfill their mission.

1.title: FR - Les Emmerdeurs - S01E04 - The Communists
1.plot: Finally arrived in the Free Zone, our heroes must cross a bridge that was destroyed by the Communists as a precaution. They will have to fraternize with them in order to make it to the rendezvous point with Lupin, Albert’s best friend. As they stop at an inn, intimacy starts growing.

1.title: FR - Les Emmerdeurs - S01E05 - The Hideout
1.plot: Safe in a Hexagone Network hideout, our heroes must undergo medical tests before they can be released. Unfortunately, there’s a traitor among the Resistance and the Troublemakers fall into a trap. They try to escape, but must face the limits of their powers and the team is divided.

1.title: FR - Les Emmerdeurs - S01E06 - The Separation
1.plot: Albert finds Lorraine with the Communists, and he will have to prove that he isn’t the traitor. Meanwhile, Manu and Solange are on their way out of France. As they’re getting more and more intimate, Solange is caught by Shäffer and Manu flees abroad.

1.title: FR - Les Emmerdeurs - S01E07 - The Captive
1.plot: Pierrot is held by the Nazis. He must resist Dietrich’s tortures to find out the Resistance’s secrets. Schäffer seems to be kinder, and reveals to Pierrot the full extent of his power and how to master it.

1.title: FR - Les Emmerdeurs - S01E08 - The Paladium
1.plot: Albert and Lorraine are tracking down the traitor responsible for the Hexagone Network’s downfall, but discovering his identity might be much more devastating than they thought. Meanwhile, Schäffer tries to win back Solange, who ends up giving in...

1.title: FR - Les Emmerdeurs - S01E09 - The Headquarters
1.plot: Finally together again in the Hexagone leader’s house, Albert, Lorraine and Solange put together a plan to free Pierrot. But Manu isn’t far, and may have a role to play...

1.title: FR - Les Emmerdeurs - S01E10 - The Departure
1.plot: The troublemakers are as united as can be. Freedom is near, and they are waiting at the Leader’s house for the plane that will take them to England. But quickly, doubts arise regarding the last Hexagone members’ reliability… And the Resistants find themselves surrounded by the Nazis.

meta.plot: Dans l'État de New York en 2015, une grande chasse à l'homme est lancée contre deux détenus, condamnés pour meurtre, David Sweat et Richard Matt. Tilly, une employée de la prison, intimement liée aux deux hommes, les aide à s'échapper du pénitencier de Dannemora. Inspirée d'une histoire vraie...

1.title: FR - Escape at Dannemora - S01E01 - Part 1
1.plot: After the June, 2015 prison break from Clinton Correctional Facility in Dannemora, NY, Joyce “Tilly” Mitchell is questioned about her involvement with the two men. Months earlier, Tilly enjoys her job at the prison tailor shop, balancing the temptations of David Sweat, a younger inmate, and her obligations to her husband, Lyle. Richard Matt, an inmate with an artistic talent, supplies oil paintings to guards in exchange for special treatment. Ultimately his attentions turn to Tilly.

1.title: FR - Escape at Dannemora - S01E02 - Part 2
1.plot: Matt has an idea to get out of Dannemora, but Sweat is not interested in taking the risk. Matt begins to help Tilly with an inmate she doesn't get along with in the shop, while Sweat comes to miss the freedoms that come with Matt's protection.

1.title: FR - Escape at Dannemora - S01E03 - Part 3
1.plot: Matt and Sweat run into walls and other obstacles as they search for a way out, but the power of positive thinking helps keep them on track. Tilly begins to feel guilty about her mounting indiscretions, but she has a funny way of showing it.

1.title: FR - Escape at Dannemora - S01E04 - Part 4
1.plot: Excited by the possibility of a new life, Tilly tries her best to avoid Lyle, who is planning something special for their anniversary. Sweat makes progress on the escape route, but feels like he’s doing all the work. Matt likes the arrangement just fine.

1.title: FR - Escape at Dannemora - S01E05 - Part 5
1.plot: On the day of the escape, Matt and Sweat know the smallest mistake can derail their whole plan. But when a stern corrections officer takes over the post in the tailor shop and fellow inmate Murder gets out of the Special Housing Unit, Matt seems attracted to the danger. Tilly and Lyle have a fateful dinner at an all-you-can-eat Chinese restaurant.

1.title: FR - Escape at Dannemora - S01E06 - Part 6
1.plot: In a deep dive into the minds of these individuals, we finally see what Matt and Sweat are capable of outside the prison walls. Tilly’s natural instincts aren’t much better.

1.title: FR - Escape at Dannemora - S01E07 - Part 7
1.plot: Matt and Sweat run for their lives as the tension between them is pushed to the extreme. Tilly gets out of the hospital and does her best to evade the authorities. But as the law closes in, all three are confronted with hard truths about who they really are. Series finale.

1.title: FR - Escape at Dannemora - S01E08 -

meta.plot: La famille McKenna se remet péniblement du décès de leur chef de famille bien-aimé, Patrick. Un espoir apparaît sous la forme d'un livre intitulé "Les jeunes aventuriers" que Patrick a créé pour ses trois fils. Il devient un guide pratique qui fait s'envoler l'imagination de son plus jeune fils, Wyatt, lui permettant de renouer avec son père et de tirer des leçons qui l'aideront dans la vraie vie.

1.title: FR - Les Jeunes Aventuriers - S01E01 - How To Walk on the Moon
1.plot: As the McKenna family struggles to express their feelings about the loss of Patrick, Uncle Terry, Patrick's twin brother, reappears in their lives. The boys are given The Dangerous Book for Boys, and Wyatt soon finds himself caught up in vivid fantasies inspired by it, and must navigate both a mission to the moon and his family's emotions.

1.title: FR - Les Jeunes Aventuriers - S01E02 - How to Play Poker
1.plot: As Beth struggles with the family's rapidly deteriorating financial situation, Tiffany and Uncle Terry try to help out in their own unique ways. Wyatt, meanwhile, travels from the Old West to the Poker World Championship as he learns the importance of when to be honest and when to bluff.

1.title: FR - Les Jeunes Aventuriers - S01E03 - How to be an Explorer
1.plot: With both his mom and his teachers concerned about him, Wyatt is sent to a therapist, where he struggles with the idea that he might be crazy. Meanwhile, Beth tries to keep the family's spirits up at all costs, and Liam, to Dash's delight, finds himself under a troublesome hex.

1.title: FR - Les Jeunes Aventuriers - S01E04 - The Trojan War
1.plot: As money problems deepen, Beth attempts to earn extra income by working as a rideshare driver. Wyatt, wanting to help out, opens a lemonade stand. When Liam and Dash get involved, it quickly leads to an all-out lemonade war with a competing stand.

1.title: FR - Les Jeunes Aventuriers - S01E05 - How to Talk to Girls
1.plot: After Wyatt flames out trying to talk to his fifth grade crush, he turns to Patrick and The Dangerous Book for help on how to talk to girls. Meanwhile, Dash and Terry attempt to bond over a video game, and Liam finds unexpected help with his shop class project.

1.title: FR - Les Jeunes Aventuriers - S01E06 - How to Build a Treehouse
1.plot: Beth kicks Uncle Terry out of the house after his well-intentioned project yields damage to the McKenna home. With a bedroom damaged and the entire family unraveling around him, Wyatt wonders if he might be better off alone.

meta.plot: Un enchaînement d'événements épouvantables est arrivé aux habitants de Saturne, CA dans les douze jours qui ont précédé Noël. La terreur s'installe sous la forme d'arbres de Noël hantés, d'elfes maniaques, de chanteurs tueurs, d'un gâteau aux fruits maudit et plus encore au fil d'une douzaine de contes interconnectés.

1.title: FR - Les Douze jours sanglants de Noël - S01E01 - A Haunting at the End of the Street
1.plot: The ghosts of Christmas like you've never seen them.

1.title: FR - Les Douze jours sanglants de Noël - S01E02 - Killer Firs
1.plot: After the mysterious death of her estranged father, a young woman discovers the family Christmas tree business may be harboring a dark secret.

1.title: FR - Les Douze jours sanglants de Noël - S01E03 - Love Bites
1.plot: A Christmas romance unfolds between a lovelorn vampire and the black sheep of a family sworn to destroy her kind.

1.title: FR - Les Douze jours sanglants de Noël - S01E04 - Reindeer Games
1.plot: A criminal on the run is doomed after he hits and kills one of Santa’s reindeer. His only hope: his New Age mother and the powers he doesn’t believe she has.

1.title: FR - Les Douze jours sanglants de Noël - S01E05 - Coffee Cups
1.plot: A bohemian barista suspects a national coffee chain of brainwashing her customers after the company’s red holiday cups become ubiquitous overnight.

1.title: FR - Les Douze jours sanglants de Noël - S01E07 - Nuts A' Cracking
1.plot: A stuffy, corporate Christmas party turns deadly when the employees are forced to participate in a nightmarish game.

1.title: FR - Les Douze jours sanglants de Noël - S01E09 - Cakes A' Cursing
1.plot: After eating a cursed fruitcake, a cocky food vlogger discovers he only has three days to live.

1.title: FR - Les Douze jours sanglants de Noël - S01E10 - Cameras Rolling
1.plot: A teenage bully determined to ruin Christmas for his little brother gets more than he bargained for when his sinister gift takes on a life of its own.

1.title: FR - Les Douze jours sanglants de Noël - S01E11 - Phantoms Frightening
1.plot: The Cratchit Brothers are hired to stop the phantom of the Saturn Playhouse from ruining the town’s Christmas pageant.

1.title: FR - Les Douze jours sanglants de Noël - S01E12 - Worlds Ending
1.plot: As the clock ticks down to Christmas Eve, the Cratchit Brothers discover the secret of the Playhouse and an ancient evil that threatens to unleash Hell on Earth.

1.title: FR - Papa ou Maman - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Papa ou Maman - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Papa ou Maman - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Papa ou Maman - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Papa ou Maman - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Papa ou Maman - S01E06 - Episode 6

meta.plot: Suite à une infidélité, deux époux décident de divorcer. Mais alors que chacun cherche à conserver la garde exclusive des enfants, César Mendès prend une décision surprenante qui va bousculer le semblant d'équilibre que pensait avoir trouvé la famille, d'autant plus quand les amis et les proches s'immiscent dans l'histoire.

1.title: FR - Mars - S01E01 - Novo Mundo
1.plot: In 2033, the first human mission to Mars enters its atmosphere, while currently, SpaceX attempts to land the world's first reusable rocket.

1.title: FR - Mars - S01E02 - Grounded
1.plot: The Daedalus crew battles harsh Martian terrain to reach base camp. NASA Astronaut Scott Kelly undergoes a mission on the International Space Station.

1.title: FR - Mars - S01E03 - Pressure Drop
1.plot: In 2033, the Daedalus crew struggles to find shelter that can provide protection from radiation. In present day documentary, European Space Agency and Roscosmos partner to launch an orbiter that will help future Mars missions prepare for settlement.

1.title: FR - Mars - S01E04 - Power
1.plot: A new crew arrives on Mars four years after the Daedalus landed to help execute plans for expansion and search for life. McMurdo Station in Antarctica serves as a modern example of how humans will settle Mars.

1.title: FR - Mars - S01E05 - Darkest Days
1.plot: In 2037, the psychological pressures of life on Mars reveal themselves while the crew is trapped inside the habitat. In present-day, scientists study the effects of extreme isolation in various long-term analog missions.

1.title: FR - Mars - S01E06 - Crossroads
1.plot: In 2037, a devastating tragedy in the colony forces everyone on Mars and Earth to question the mission. In present-day, commercial space company SpaceX again attempts to pioneer the rocket technology that would help mankind reach the red planet.

2.title: FR - Mars - S02E01 - We Are Not Alone
2.plot: After almost a decade alone on Mars, scientists at the International Mars Science Foundation’s (IMSF) fully developed Olympus Town settlement prepare for the arrival of a group of highly skilled astronauts working for Lukrum Industries, a for-profit corporation specializing in natural resource extraction. In present day on Earth aboard the world’s northernmost oil platform in the Arctic, extreme conditions make for a Mars-like work environment.

2.title: FR - Mars - S02E02 - Worlds Apart
2.plot: IMSF and Lukrum, now sharing a common water and power source, have established a tenuous coexistence that threatens to dissolve when Kurt and his crew make unexpected headway in their mission to mine the planet, and Hana works to maintain diplomacy between the two camps—until tragedy strikes. Meanwhile, on Earth, Dr. Leslie Richardson asserts her authority as the new IMSF Secretary General. In present day, Greenpeace activists take to the seas to protest Arctic oil drilling in the Barents Sea, and the effectiveness of such tactics are examined.

2.title: FR - Mars - S02E03 - Darkness Falls
2.plot: A solar flare knocks out communications on Mars and forces Olympus Town to locate exobiologist Marta Kamen before tragedy strikes. Meanwhile, the colony is bracing for its first-ever pregnancy on the Red Planet; tragedy strikes Hana (Jihae); and Amelie’s plans to return to Earth are thwarted. In present day, a scientist and his team on Earth brave harsh and dangerous conditions in the pursuit of data that will help predict the effects of glacial melt on global sea levels.

2.title: FR - Mars - S02E04 - Contagion
2.plot: Marta convalesces as a mysterious illness sweeps through Olympus Town and Lukrum Colony. When IMSF realizes one of its own has died as a result, it races to determine the cause, origin and mode of transmission before time runs out—and more lives are claimed. Back in present day, Vladimir Chuprov, a Greenpeace activist, sheds light on an indigenous health crisis being kept quiet by the Russian state to benefit their Arctic oil endeavors.

2.title: FR - Mars - S02E05 - Power Play
2.plot: Lukrum strikes a deal with Russia for exclusive mining rights. Uneasiness spreads over Olympus Town as LT. Commander Mike Glenn undermines Hana and endangers the members of Lukrum Colony as a result. And, a new baby – the first-generation Martian – arrives two months early! In the Arctic Circle in present day, nations attempt to work together to reign in corporate interests, protect fragile ecosystems and preserve indigenous lifestyles while fossil-fuel companies prioritize their own profit over the public good.

2.title: FR - Mars - S02E06 - The Shakeup
2.plot: Lukrum pushes its corporate interest too far and unintentionally jeopardizes the safety of both colonies. IMSF springs into action to stabilize the situation, but for some, it will be too late. In the current climate on Earth, human activity has destabilized the natural world. NASA’s Operation Icebridge studies Arctic sea ice in an attempt to bring awareness to global warming and the dramatically changing state of our planet, the only home we have… for now!

meta.plot: Le vaisseau spatial Daedalus a prévu d'atterrir sur Mars au mois de novembre de l'an 2033, comprenant l'équipage de six astronautes qui va effectuer sa première tentative afin d'établir une colonie permanente sur la Planète Rouge.

1.title: FR - Les Otages du désert - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Les Otages du désert - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Les Otages du désert - S01E03 - Episode 3

meta.plot: En route pour l’aéroport à la fin de leur séjour au Mali, une famille espagnole est poursuivie par des membres d’un groupe salafiste. Les deux enfants, Alejandra et Mario, sont kidnappés sous les yeux de leur père. L’unité d’élite appelée "Les Bérets verts" est alors envoyée par le gouvernement espagnol afin de les libérer. Les parents s’opposent fermement à un assaut militaire qui menacerait la vie de leurs enfants, mais se voient dans l’obligation de suivre le protocole engagé en cas d’enlèvement dans ce pays. La mission, bien que périlleuse, est alors lancée à travers le désert du Sahel afin de libérer les deux otages… Les Forces des Opérations Spéciales disposent pour cela de 72 heures.

Frank Martin est un Transporteur. Il transporte n’importe quoi, n’importe où, pour n’importe qui, dès lors que le client est prêt à payer le prix. Ses règles sont simples. Règle 1 : Jamais de noms. Règle 2 : Ne jamais changer le deal. Règle 3 : Ne jamais ouvrir le colis. Sauf s’il décide de changer les règles : Ce qu’il fait. À chaque fois. Systématiquement.

1.title: FR - Le Transporteur : La série - S01E01 - Trojan Horsepower
1.plot: In Nice, Frank is hired by Dieter's friend Trina to deliver an engine prototype to the Paris Motor Show. They race towards Paris but are pursued by an assassin nicknamed The Wolf. Unfortunately the prototype emits a trackable GPS signal.

1.title: FR - Le Transporteur : La série - S01E02 - Payback
1.plot: Frank's latest job goes completely wrong: he loses his package in a holdup and is accused by his Russian gangster employer of having embezzled the money.

1.title: FR - Le Transporteur : La série - S01E03 - The General's Daughter
1.plot: The Transporter's package is a beautiful young woman who's caught in the crossfire between her disgraced General father, and the criminal syndicate hunting him.

1.title: FR - Le Transporteur : La série - S01E04 - Harvest
1.plot: Frank faces a dilemma when he finds out his package is a heart meant for transplantation stolen by his crime lord client to save his own son and when Inspector Tarconi informs him that another dying boy is waiting for it at the hospital.

1.title: FR - Le Transporteur : La série - S01E05 - Dead Drop
1.plot: In Philadelphia, Frank meets Jack Perkins, his CIA instructor. The blind man is being framed for leaking secret documents. Frank must find a USB key containing evidence that can clear Jack's name and reveal the real mole's identity.

1.title: FR - Le Transporteur : La série - S01E06 - Hot Ice
1.plot: Frank finds himself in Toronto, Canada doing a job for a security company.

1.title: FR - Le Transporteur : La série - S01E07 - Give the Guy a Hand
1.plot: As he's waiting for his package to be delivered in a Toronto parking lot, Frank finds himself faced with a series of strange coincidences. He understands he fell into a trap when the police throws him in jail, accusing him of a crime he didn't commit. His imprisonment is supposed to allow to get a very protected package out of the prison walls: the hand of a mob boss who's just been murdered...

1.title: FR - Le Transporteur : La série - S01E08 - Sharks
1.plot: Frank must transport a million euros from Paris to Marseille while racing against two other elite runners each with the same package and destination. The client whose transporter wins will gain an important missile contract. Word of the race has reached two gangs that decide to try and rob the money but Frank, who needs to prove he's the one and only worthwhile transporter on the market, doesn't intend to let himself be swindled... The task is further complicated by a mysterious hitchhiker, who can not be shaken off and wants to know everything about Frank. Frank manages to end up as the lone transporter to finish the race, but victory is bittersweet, due to the loss of an old friend, who was one of the other two transporters in contention.

1.title: FR - Le Transporteur : La série - S01E09 - City of Love
1.plot: Frank is hired to bring a package from the south of France to Paris. Once there, he realizes the package is a bomb meant for a planned terrorist attack.

1.title: FR - Le Transporteur : La série - S01E10 - The Switch
1.plot: Frank is to pick up a valuable painting from a gallery and bring it to a rich art collector. There is a wild chase during the transfer and a young woman threatens him with a gun and claims that the painting is hers. Fortunately, at this moment the police appears and Frank seizes the opportunity to wriggle out of the situation. But when he delivers the painting to art collector Max Khyber (Hannes Jaenicke), it turns out that it is a fake. Khyber feels betrayed and suspects Frank. He holds Frank prisoner on his property and sends in a dominatrix to get him to to talk, but Frank manages to free himself and goes in search of the original.

1.title: FR - Le Transporteur : La série - S01E11 - 12 Hours
1.plot: Frank has twelve hours to transport a stolen microchip, meant for the development of advanced weaponry, before the rigged package kills him. In a race against time, Frank must find a way to force the client to neutralize the deadly device.

1.title: FR - Le Transporteur : La série - S01E12 - Cherchez la Femme
1.plot: Frank has to transport a young hacker to her new employer. But the employer is not the only one that is interested in the girl. Meanwhile, Frank has a lunch date with Juliette that doesn't exactly turn out to become a romantic moment.

2.title: FR - Le Transporteur : La série - S02E01 - 2B or Not 2B
2.plot: A 12-year-old witnesses the murder of his father, an italian judge

2.title: FR - Le Transporteur : La série - S02E02 - We Go Back
2.plot: Frank is asked to travel to Libya by his old army buddy to rescue their friend and a fellow officer.

2.title: FR - Le Transporteur : La série - S02E03 - Sex, Lies and Videotape
2.plot: Frank is hired to collect a package, a dress that contains DNA evidence

2.title: FR - Le Transporteur : La série - S02E04 - Boom
2.plot: Frank and Cat travel to the Sahara Desert to deliver a briefcase, but they end up stranded over night.

2.title: FR - Le Transporteur : La série - S02E05 - Beacon of Hope
2.plot: Frank and Caterina have to rescue her ex-fiancé, Zac, from a Mauritanian warlord. However Zac won't leave unless they can take a bus load of orphans that he has been caring for with them.

2.title: FR - Le Transporteur : La série - S02E06 - Diva
2.plot: Frank is hired to transport a famous singer who has received an anonymous threat to and from her concert venues.

2.title: FR - Le Transporteur : La série - S02E07 - T2
2.plot: Frank is asked to retrieve a vital document from a villa in Crimea occupied by Russia. The villa is heavily guarded and just getting across the border will be a challenge.

2.title: FR - Le Transporteur : La série - S02E08 - Chimera
2.plot: The FBI hires Frank Martin to retrieve a chemical weapon, codenamed 'Chimera', from a Louis Tien, a Chinese Triad crime lord who operates from a restaurant in Chicago's Chinatown.

2.title: FR - Le Transporteur : La série - S02E09 - Euphro
2.plot: Inspector Tarconi leads a SWAT team to arrest a counterfeit drug dealer in Belarus, but has to ask for Frank's help when things go badly wrong.

2.title: FR - Le Transporteur : La série - S02E10 - Trust
2.plot: Frank is the suspect in the disappearance of a former client.

2.title: FR - Le Transporteur : La série - S02E11 - Sixteen Hands
2.plot: Frank Martin has been hired to transport a thoroughbred racehorse, Daksha, worth ten million dollars, from her stables in Kentucky to the racetrack of the prestigious Belmont Stakes race in New York.

2.title: FR - Le Transporteur : La série - S02E12 - End Game
2.plot: Frank Martin and Caterina Boldieu are posing as an extraordinarily wealthy couple, in order to retrieve a handful of diamonds which have been stolen from their current client, and replace them with infallible fakes.

meta.plot: L'histoire de Mike Traceur, le fils caché de Michael Knight. Recruté par son amie d'enfance Sarah Graiman et son père, le physicien Charles Graiman, il rejoint la Fondation Knight, destinée à lutter contre le crime. Charles est l'inventeur de la nouvelle génération de KITT (acronyme de Knight Industries Two Thousand), une voiture dotée de l'intelligence artificielle. Un jour, un dangereux millionnaire approche Charles pour obtenir un modèle de son extraordinaire invention mais ce dernier refuse. Un homme de main est alors chargé de voler KITT et de tuer le père de Sarah...

1.title: FR - Le retour de K2000 - S01E01 - A Knight in Shining Armor
1.plot: Mike and KITT must deliver a package -- a task that seems easy enough until they learn the package is a man with a code built into his DNA.  The task becomes more difficult when a mysterious woman gets in their way.

1.title: FR - Le retour de K2000 - S01E02 - Journey to the End of the Knight
1.plot: Mike enlists an old Army buddy to help take down a drag racing gang which is also in the business of arms smuggling overseas. Sarah joins Mike and KITT despite her father's disapproval.

1.title: FR - Le retour de K2000 - S01E03 - Knight of the Iguana
1.plot: Mike and Zoe go undercover in Baja as a honeymooning surfer couple in order to stop terrorist weapons from getting into the states. Sarah and Billy are brought into the mix and they quickly find the mission taking an unusual turn.

1.title: FR - Le retour de K2000 - S01E04 - A Hard Day's Knight
1.plot: A lethally poisoned Mike must fake the assassination of a tech bigwig in order to obtain the antidote. Meanwhile, hallucinations and the reemergence of an enigmatic woman shine light on Mike's hazy past.

1.title: FR - Le retour de K2000 - S01E05 - Knight of the Hunter
1.plot: Mike goes undercover as an AWOL Marine in order to find a rogue military officer.  A beautiful undercover agent pairs up with Mike to help him solve the crime.  Back at the SSC, Billy undergoes training with the help of Zoe.

1.title: FR - Le retour de K2000 - S01E06 - Knight of the Living Dead
1.plot: When a tech is murdered inside of Knight Industries, the team must track down the person that infiltrated headquarters before they strike again.  Meanwhile, Mike and Sarah find themselves stuck together during a storm.

1.title: FR - Le retour de K2000 - S01E07 - I Wanna Rock & Roll All Knight
1.plot: Knight Industries tracks down a Bonnie and Clyde-esque couple and find that their true identites will affect a congressional race.  Meanwhile, Mike and KITT must find a way to save Agent Rivai.

1.title: FR - Le retour de K2000 - S01E08 - Knight of the Zodiac
1.plot: Billy tags along with Mike as he heads to Vegas on a mission to stop a money laundering ring, and Billy has his eye on finding romance along the way. Meanwhile, The KITT cave is assessed and also locks horns with an old nemesis, Dr. Graiman.

1.title: FR - Le retour de K2000 - S01E09 - Knight Fever
1.plot: The world is in jeopardy when a devastating computer virus is released. With Kitt infected by the bug, it may mean the ultimate stall out. Elsewhere, Mike becomes jealous when Sarah and her ex-beau reconnect.
