1.title: FR - Le retour de K2000 - S01E10 - Don't Stop the Knight
1.plot: A deranged terrorist has kidnapped a foreign ambassador, sending Michael and KITT out to the rescue. Elsewhere, a damaged robot has Dr. Graiman and Sarah teaming up to repair it.

1.title: FR - Le retour de K2000 - S01E11 - Day Turns Into Knight
1.plot: Michael and KITT continue on a mission to rescue an ambassador and foil the terrorists holding him. The quest becomes even more dangerous when a bomb is placed inside of KITT, set to explode when the car reaches a certain speed. Meanwhile, Sarah receives shocking information regarding her father.

1.title: FR - Le retour de K2000 - S01E12 - Knight to King's Pawn
1.plot: Sarah is upset over her father's death and decides to leave town. A concerned Mike finds the answers he was searching for about his past while looking for Sarah. Now that Dr. Graiman is dead, the NSA has decided to dismantle the SSC and move ahead in creating KITT's nemesis, KARR. The chip which contains KITT's memories and personality is removed and placed inside of KARR, with the permission from Torres'. Mike, Sarah, Billy and Zoe create a plan to find KITT and get it running, then hunt down the evil KARR and destroy it.

1.title: FR - Le retour de K2000 - S01E13 - Exit Light, Enter Knight
1.plot: Mike becomes a hostage in a bank robbery when he becomes entangled with one of the robbers. As he tries to stop the thieves his efforts are hampered by the twists, turns and being uncertain of what the motives for the robbery was all about.

1.title: FR - Le retour de K2000 - S01E14 - Fight Knight
1.plot: Mike's old Army friend recruits his help to investigate the suspicious death of a tough-as-nails drill sergeant Jack Burber. Mike learns that the drill sergeant was participating in an underground fight club for military veterans for extra money. In order to find out what really happened, Mike has to infiltrate the fight club and try not to get himself killed in the ring.Source: NBC

1.title: FR - Le retour de K2000 - S01E15 - Fly By Knight
1.plot: When a plane transporting a 10-year-old federal witness crashes, Mike determines that the accident was faked and that the boy was kidnapped. He clashes with the investigating DEA Agent, who promptly arrests him for interfering with the case. Meanwhile, Sarah fights for more authority over the SSC's future endeavors.

1.title: FR - Le retour de K2000 - S01E16 - Knight and the City
1.plot: During his "decompression" time, Mike visits an old hangout---Sonny's Bar---and helps the new proprietress restore the joint to its original glory. But Mike must square off against a mysterious someone who wants the bar sold, and that person may resort to arson to fulfill that desire.

1.title: FR - Le retour de K2000 - S01E17 - I Love the Knight Life
1.plot: Mike and KITT must find a stolen serum which will result in the recipients maximum physicality when used, before it lands into the wrong hands. Meanwhile, Sarah's new duties have her overwhelmed as she quickly learns what it will take to re-institute the Foundation for Law and Government.

1.title: FR - Le retour de K2000 - S01E18 -

meta.plot: Dans un Japon futuriste et féodal, un guerrier samouraï afro-américain traque l'assassin de son père.

1.title: FR - Afro Samurai - S01E01 - Revenge
1.plot: Afro Samurai is out for revenge. With cold-blooded determination, he sets out on the hunt for Justice, the gunman who killed his father and claimed the Number One Headband.

1.title: FR - Afro Samurai - S01E02 - The Dream Reader
1.plot: Afro wakes from dreams of lost youth to find himself in the care of beautiful Okiku. Even as her tender touch soothes the wounded warrior, a violent plan is in motion that will replace pleasure with pain.

1.title: FR - Afro Samurai - S01E03 - The Empty Seven Clan
1.plot: Afro’s climb of Mt. Shumi is blocked by the fanatical Empty Seven. After attacking with every weapon in their immense arsenal, they unleash Afro’s most lethal opponent yet - himself.

1.title: FR - Afro Samurai - S01E04 - Duel
1.plot: On Mt. Shumi’s snowy peak, Afro faces the vicious two-sword technique of Kuma, a bizarre enemy keenly aware of the horrors of Afro’s past.

1.title: FR - Afro Samurai - S01E05 - Justice
1.plot: Afro Samurai draws his blade on the reclusive gunfighter Justice. One fights for vengeance, the other for supreme power. When the vicious battle ends, Number One will stand above the dead.

meta.plot: Les exploits de Black Dynamite, légende afro-américaine des années 1970, et de son équipe.

1.title: FR - Black Dynamite - S01E00 -
FR - Black Dynamite - S01E01 - Just Beat It or Jackson Five Across Yo' Eyes
1.plot: Pint-sized pop star Michael Jackson finds a best friend in Cream Corn after he is saved from an assassination attempt. But Black Dynamite is soon to discover that the teen idol is actually a vicious alien force who has been torturing his own family. Cream Corn and Dynamite team up to take down the evil star together!

1.title: FR - Black Dynamite - S01E02 - Bullhorn Nights or Murder She Throats
1.plot: Bullhorn falls into the world of adult films while working on a case. Soon he adopts the stage name "Sweet Throat" and gives up crime fighting altogether. Now it's up to Black Dynamite to rescue his sidekick from the pleasures of the porn industry!

1.title: FR - Black Dynamite - S01E03 - Taxes and Death or Get Him to The Sunset Strip
1.plot: Black Dynamite and his crew face their most challenging mission to date as they try and raise $60K before tax day. This situation has forced them into escorting drug-addled comedy icon Richard Pryor to the most important performance of his career.

1.title: FR - Black Dynamite - S01E04 - A Crisis For Christmas or The Dark Side of The Dark Side of The Moon
1.plot: In an effort to be more likeable to the orphans, Black Dynamite agrees to go with O.J. Simpson to the moon to get moon rocks on Christmas. However, O.J. bails and leaves Dynamite on a doomed space rocket, leaving everyone to believe that Black Dynamite is dead. O.J. takes over the whorephanage and now Black Dynamite must find a way to get the moon rocks and return to Earth to stop O.J. Simpson.

1.title: FR - Black Dynamite - S01E05 - Panic on the Player's Ball Express or That's Influenza Sucka!
1.plot: While Black Dynamite is down with the flu, the rest of the crew handles an investigation at the Players Ball, only to end up caught in a hijacking. It's up to Black Dynamite to handle his sinuses and the villains of the day.

1.title: FR - Black Dynamite - S01E06 - The Sh*t That Killed the King! or Weekend at Presley's
1.plot: President Nixon plans to destroy Black Dynamite by flooding the black community with drugs. However the plan backfires when the blacks begin selling them to whites instead of using them, ridding the community of drugs and using the money to drastically improve things. His original plan a failure, Nixon devises an even more sinister plan, and sends Elvis Presley to stop the flow of drugs from the black community.

1.title: FR - Black Dynamite - S01E07 - Apocalypse, This! or For the Pity of Fools (AKA Flashbacks Are Forever)
1.plot: Black Dynamite returns to Vietnam with his crew to find his friend Mr.T who was left for dead.

1.title: FR - Black Dynamite - S01E08 - Honky Kong or White Apes Can't Hump
1.plot: A circus ape falls for Honeybee and kidnaps her. Black Dynamite launches a rescue attempt but encounters his own problems during the mission.

1.title: FR - Black Dynamite - S01E09 - The Race War! or Big Black Cannon Balls Run!
1.plot: Dynamite enters a car race but realizes he's being used to transport a mind-controlling substance to tobacco companies.

1.title: FR - Black Dynamite - S01E10 - That Seed of Kurtis AKA Father is Just Another Word for Motherfucker!
1.plot: Weeks after the events of "Trouble on Puppet Street", the son of That Frog Kurtis, That Bastard Kurtis, enacts his revenge plan on Black Dynamite for killing his daddy on national television. Meanwhile, Black Dynamite finally finds his long-lost father.

meta.plot: Fuyant leur passé, une mère et son fils font de nouvelles rencontres et affrontent les étendues hostiles du Far West américain, où règnent liberté et cruauté.

1.title: FR - À l'aube de l'Amérique - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: At a desolate outpost, Sara and her son Devin forge new connections while searching for a guide to help them navigate treacherous trails further west.

1.title: FR - À l'aube de l'Amérique - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: A frightening encounter takes Sara's party by surprise. A deeply wounded Jacob forms a posse to find Abish. Isaac reconnects with his past.

1.title: FR - À l'aube de l'Amérique - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Following a lead, Jacob joins a bounty hunter's search. Brigham Young rides into Fort Bridger. Sara, Devin and Isaac come face-to-face with evil.

1.title: FR - À l'aube de l'Amérique - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Red Feather vows to fight, Jacob acts on his suspicions and Abish receives shocking news. En route to Crooks Springs, the elements intensify.

1.title: FR - À l'aube de l'Amérique - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: As Devin's leg worsens, Sara faces a terrifying choice. Brigham Young makes Bridger an offer. Abish delivers a stark warning to the Shoshone.

1.title: FR - À l'aube de l'Amérique - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Ignoring the danger, Isaac sets out to rescue Sara. Jacob's search for Abish comes to an end. Bridger celebrates before saying good-bye.

1.title: FR - The Confession Killer - S01E01 - Everything Except Poison
1.plot: The hunt for two missing women leads authorities to Henry Lee Lucas. In court, he drops a bombshell, setting off a media circus and riveting a nation.

1.title: FR - The Confession Killer - S01E02 - Make It Strawberry
1.plot: At Georgetown, Lucas regales visiting officers with stories to clear murder cases. But one Lubbock family will do their own police work to refute him.

1.title: FR - The Confession Killer - S01E03 - War in Waco
1.plot: Suspicions about Lucas’s confessions crescendo as a front-page investigative story hits the newsstands, and an ambitious DA takes on the Texas Rangers.

1.title: FR - The Confession Killer - S01E04 - All the Damn Lies
1.plot: As families long for closure, the manipulation continues. Years later, on death row, Lucas steps up the fight for his life. But the lies don't stop.

1.title: FR - The Confession Killer - S01E05 - Not One Shred of Evidence
1.plot: DNA testing and a close examination of the evidence reveal the truth about Lucas and the officers who let the real killers get away with murder.

meta.plot: Henry Lee Lucas est devenu tristement célèbre en avouant avoir commis des centaines de meurtres. Cette docu-série se penche sur les faits et leurs conséquences horribles.
Cette série documentaire narrée par l'ancien président Barack Obama nous invite à découvrir certains des parcs naturels nationaux les plus spectaculaires de la planète.

1.title: FR - Our Great National Parks - S01E01 - A World Of Wonder
1.plot: From Africa's beaches to Japan's islands to Australia's Great Barrier Reef — the natural world's untamed beauty comes into gorgeous focus.

1.title: FR - Our Great National Parks - S01E02 - Chilean Patagonia
1.plot: Encompassing 24 unique national parks, the magnificent Chilean Patagonia is rapidly becoming one of the most protected places on the planet.

1.title: FR - Our Great National Parks - S01E03 - Tsavo, Kenya
1.plot: In Kenya's Tsavo National Park, thousands of elephants roam the breathtaking, vast landscape, along with hippos, rhinos, hornbills and more.

1.title: FR - Our Great National Parks - S01E04 - Monterey Bay National Marine Sanctuary, USA
1.plot: California's vibrant coastline gets its close-up, with an emphasis on the delicate balance struck between wildlife and humanity.

1.title: FR - Our Great National Parks - S01E05 - Gunung Leuser, Indonesia
1.plot: Next stop: Gunung Leuser National Park in Indonesia — home to some of the most endangered species on Earth, including the rare Sumatran tiger.

1.title: FR - Lockerbie - Autopsie d'un attentat - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: In 1988, the families of those on board flight Pan Am 103 learn that the plane has crashed over Lockerbie, Scotland, killing 270. A terrorism investigation begins.

1.title: FR - Lockerbie - Autopsie d'un attentat - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: The prime suspects for the bombing of flight Pan Am 103 are a Palestinian terror group funded by Iran. But Scottish and FBI investigators are led elsewhere.

1.title: FR - Lockerbie - Autopsie d'un attentat - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: A Libyan double agent provides the evidence needed to bring the two suspects to court. The trial gets underway, but a key witness changes his story.

1.title: FR - Lockerbie - Autopsie d'un attentat - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: A shock verdict leaves the families unsatisfied. Doubt is cast on the court's decision, and 34 years after the bombing, a new suspect is taken into US custody.

meta.plot: Le 21 décembre 1988, le vol 103 de la Pan Am explose au-dessus de la petite ville écossaise de Lockerbie. Le réalisateur John Dower démêle les fils de l'histoire en s'entretenant avec certains des personnages clés de l'affaire qui s'expriment pour la première fois.

En 1899, dans les Alpes suisses, l'ambitieux André Morel envisage un hôtel de luxe cinq étoiles qui resterait ouvert tout au long de l'hiver. Il convainc le riche aristocrate britannique, Lord Fairfax, de l'aider dans cette aventure.

1.title: FR - Winter Palace - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Winter Palace - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Winter Palace - S01E03 - Episode 3

FR - Winter Palace - S01E05 - Episode 5

FR - Winter Palace - S01E07 - Episode 7
FR - Winter Palace - S01E08 - Episode 8

meta.plot: À la suite du naufrage inexplicable d'un chalutier et de ses marins pêcheurs qui demeurent introuvables, Abigail, océanographe, est envoyée par l’IFREMER en mission à Fécamp, sa ville natale, qu'elle a quittée quelques années plus tôt à la suite d'un drame familial. Alors que ses recherches progressent, de nouveaux phénomènes mystérieux se produisent en mer, rendant impossible l'activité des pêcheurs, pourtant essentielle à la vie locale. Abigail va comprendre que ces catastrophes pourraient avoir pour origine une présence sous-marine à même de bouleverser le fragile équilibre entre l'homme et la nature… Et si la cause des perturbations ne correspondait à rien de connu ?

1.title: FR - Rivages - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Rivages - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Rivages - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Rivages - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Rivages - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Rivages - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - Salvation - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: When MIT grad student Liam Cole discovers an asteroid is set to collide with Earth in 186 days, he joins forces with tech billionaire Darius Tanz and the U.S. government to try and stop it – and together they stumble onto the greatest conspiracy never told.

1.title: FR - Salvation - S01E02 - Another Trip Around the Sun
1.plot: Darius and Liam work to invent a theoretically impossible piece of technology to divert the asteroid, and Grace risks everything to help Darius. Also, Liam heads home to Boston to track down critical research, but finds something shocking instead.

1.title: FR - Salvation - S01E03 - Truth or Darius
1.plot: It’s a race against time as Darius must accelerate his plan to stop the asteroid before the Pentagon shuts him down. Also, Grace has to make difficult decisions that could have life or death consequences for millions of people, and Liam and Jillian reunite under surprising circumstances.

1.title: FR - Salvation - S01E04 - The Human Strain
1.plot: In order to prove to Harris and Grace that he’s not a traitor, Darius must reveal one of his most closely guarded secrets. Also, Liam helps Jillian adjust to her new job at Tanz.

1.title: FR - Salvation - S01E05 - Keeping the Faith
1.plot: While Darius works to discover who killed his friend Lazlo, he is forced to reckon with his past, and Liam discovers who’s been selling secrets to the Russians.

1.title: FR - Salvation - S01E06 - Chip Off the Ol’ Block
1.plot: Darius recruits Grace, Harris and Liam for a dangerous mission, and Jillian confronts Liam about his secret.

1.title: FR - Salvation - S01E07 - Seeing Red
1.plot: Grace and Darius slip off to Russia behind Harris’ back in an attempt to stop a potential nuclear conflict. Also, Liam seeks solace with Amanda.

1.title: FR - Salvation - S01E08 - From Russia, With Love
1.plot: Framed for murder, Darius and Grace must try to escape from Russia, and Liam tries to convince Jillian to come back to Tanz.

1.title: FR - Salvation - S01E09 - Patriot Games
1.plot: Grace narrowly escapes a deadly assassin and Darius and Liam forge unlikely alliances.

1.title: FR - Salvation - S01E10 - Coup de Grace
1.plot: Grace and Darius seek answers from the President and Harris discovers deadly secrets.

1.title: FR - Salvation - S01E11 - All In
1.plot: Grace and Harris must forge an alliance when their children’s lives are in jeopardy. Also, Liam presents Jillian with an unusual proposal.

1.title: FR - Salvation - S01E12 - The Wormwood Prophecy
1.plot: Darius, Grace and Harris join forces to prove the president was murdered. Also, Grace tells Zoe the truth.

1.title: FR - Salvation - S01E13 - The Plot Against America
1.plot: Harris, Grace and Darius must topple the illegitimate government, and Darius makes final plans for the ark.

2.title: FR - Salvation - S02E01 - Fall Out
2.plot: After a nuclear incident, the secret of the asteroid becomes public, setting the world on a dangerous course. Darius, Grace, Liam and Harris must adapt to new roles in an ever-shifting landscape of fear and civil unrest.

2.title: FR - Salvation - S02E02 - Detente
2.plot: Darius and Grace must forge an emotional détente to get international cooperation. Liam meets a new scientist who has a mysterious past.

2.title: FR - Salvation - S02E03 - Crimes and Punishment
2.plot: Grace is asked to lie under oath. Darius tasks Liam with a dangerous mission. A shocking act of violence plunges the nation into chaos.

2.title: FR - Salvation - S02E04 - Indivisible
2.plot: Grace embarks on a dangerous mission, and Liam and Darius’ relationship is tested.

2.title: FR - Salvation - S02E05 - White House Down
2.plot: Grace forges a dangerous alliance with Claire’s brother, Alonzo. Also, Harris and Darius must work together to face down Bennett’s forces

2.title: FR - Salvation - S02E06 - Let the Chips Fall
2.plot: Darius and Grace’s relationship is tested, and President Mackenzie attempts to bring the fractured country together while the hacktivist group ReSyst issues a deadly edict.

2.title: FR - Salvation - S02E07 - The Madness of King Tanz
2.plot: Darius vows revenge on the hacktivist group ReSyst, no matter what the cost. Also, Harris discovers a dark secret and Grace reveals one of her own.

2.title: FR - Salvation - S02E08 - Abre Sus Ojos
2.plot: Desperate to defuse a nuclear standoff, Liam receives help from an unlikely source. Also, with Darius missing, Harris and Grace take matters into their own hands.

2.title: FR - Salvation - S02E09 - The Manchurian Candidate
2.plot: Darius, Grace and Harris uncover the darkest secret yet, and Liam reconnects with Jillian.

2.title: FR - Salvation - S02E10 - Prisoners
2.plot: Darius forms a dangerous alliance in order to destroy the dark money forces of Q17. Also, Grace takes action when surprising news jolts her world.

2.title: FR - Salvation - S02E11 - Celebration Day
2.plot: A stand-off at the COPE compound leads to tragic results

2.title: FR - Salvation - S02E12 - Hail Marry
2.plot: The government’s final plans for a doomsday scenario set in motion a surprising chain of events for Grace, Darius and Harris.

2.title: FR - Salvation - S02E13 - Get Ready
2.plot: One last mystery holds the key to saving the world, and Grace must choose how she spends her final days.

meta.plot: Darius Tanz, un pro de la technologie, et Liam Cole, un étudiant diplômé d’ingénierie, font une découverte stupéfiante : un astéroïde entrera en collision avec la Terre dans moins de 6 mois.

Jeune et brillante avocate spécialisée en droit de la famille, Ariane Beauchemin s'est donné pour mission de défendre les victimes et laissés-pour-compte des amours déchirées. Elle se consacre sans relâche à ce défi qui l'entraîne au coeur des causes chargées d'émotion qui sont inhérentes à sa pratique.

FR - Ruptures - S01E02 - Episode 2
