meta.plot: Une directrice d'informations locale a la possibilité de revivre une semaine mortelle et d'arrêter un tueur en série. Si elle échoue, elle perdra sa fille à jamais.

1.title: FR - Somewhere Between - S01E01 - For One to Live
1.plot: Laura Price - she's not crazy, but she knows that her daughter Serena is going to be murdered. She doesn't know who the murderer is, or why she's killed, but she knows exactly when it will happen, where and how. Despite this, all of her attempts to keep her daughter safe fail and Serena's fixed, unmovable, terrifying fate keeps her directly in the path of her killer.

1.title: FR - Somewhere Between - S01E02 - 2.0
1.plot: Determined to prevent a murder, Laura teams up with Nico, a former cop, and they search for the serial killer’s next victim. Can they save her, catch the killer and alter fate?

1.title: FR - Somewhere Between - S01E03 - The Hunter and the Hunted
1.plot: Laura and Nico, devastated at their failure so far in stopping the city’s serial killer, set a trap for him that puts both of them in danger. Meanwhile, Tom becomes worried about Nico and Laura’s partnership, since Tom was the attorney who convicted Nico’s brother Danny.

1.title: FR - Somewhere Between - S01E04 - Fate Takes a Holiday
1.plot: Laura and Nico try to stop the serial killer she believes means to kill Serena, but Laura also learns more about Nico’s disturbing past. Meanwhile, Tom has secrets of his own and is worried that Laura will find out.

1.title: FR - Somewhere Between - S01E05 - Into the Fire
1.plot: Laura is suspicious that Tom is lying to her, so she enlists Nico to follow him.  Also, Laura and Nico go back to Spanish Harbor to investigate how their fates are intertwined.

1.title: FR - Somewhere Between - S01E06 - Madness
1.plot: Laura and Nico take off for Spanish Harbor to track down the identity of the killer. Tom, desperate to get Serena back, sends the police after them. Also, a witness leads Nico to confront Danny, who reveals the shocking truth about Susannah’s murder.

1.title: FR - Somewhere Between - S01E07 - The Fourth Man
1.plot: Laura convinces Nico that they need to find the fourth man from the tattoo photo; while doing so, they learn more about the case 10 years ago against Danny. Also, Laura gives Tom a chance to explain his actions and must decide whether she – and Serena – can trust him.

1.title: FR - Somewhere Between - S01E08 - Destiny's Child
1.plot: Betrayed by Tom, Laura learns that Serena is at the TV station and fears her daughter will suffer the same original fate. Meanwhile, Nico tries to get his hands on evidence that could help save his brother.

1.title: FR - Somewhere Between - S01E09 - Ghost
1.plot: Tom comes to Laura with his own plan to save Serena, but a double-cross turns deadly, and the identity of the real killer is exposed. Meanwhile, with Danny’s execution just hours away, Nico and Laura have to race to try saving him and Serena.

1.title: FR - Somewhere Between - S01E10 - One Must Die
1.plot: As Laura and Nico discover the reason for the vast conspiracy, they might be too late to stop fate from fulfilling its promise, as they race against the clock to try saving Serena – and Danny.

meta.plot:
Une petite fille découvre un cadavre démembré à quelques pas d'une zone militaire secrète. La police est alors prévenue par un appel anonyme et l'inspecteur Thomas Lønnhøiden s'empare de l'affaire. Il arrive à remonter jusqu'à la famille de la fillette. Cependant, les choses prennent une tout autre tournure lorsqu'elle celle-ci décide de fuguer.

Entre scandale d'état, services secrets et disparitions inexpliquées, l'enquête de Thomas Lønnhøiden s'annonce plus que complexe...

FR - Elven : La rivière des secrets - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Elven : La rivière des secrets - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Elven : La rivière des secrets - S01E04 - Episode 4

meta.plot: Après la mort du Roi, la Reine est menacée. Le Premier ministre lui conseille d'épouser l'un des frères du Roi pour conserver son rang. La Reine quitte le palais en secret. La mort du Roi s'ébruite.

1.title: FR - Queen Woo - S01E01 - The King Without an Heir
1.plot: As King Go Nam-mu is out on the battlefield during Goguryeo’s war against Han Dynasty, Queen Woo Hee and Prime Minister Eulpaso occupy the palace in his absence. However, many begin to covet the royal power, and conspiracies among them begin to emerge. The conflict escalates as the King does not yet have an heir to the throne.

1.title: FR - Queen Woo - S01E02 - Death of the King
1.plot: Upon returning from battle, King Go Nam-mu is poisoned and dies. The rumor of this unexpected event soon spreads, and those who seek power conspire. Meanwhile, Queen Woo Hee must protect herself without the King. So with the help of Moogol, she flees to meet the Third Prince.

1.title: FR - Queen Woo - S01E03 - The Empty Throne
1.plot: As instructed, Queen Woo Hee visits the Third Prince to initiate the levirate marriage. However, upon seeing the consequences of his heinous actions, she concludes that the Third Prince is unworthy of any claim to power. Realizing the urgency, she escapes to avoid further complications. Meanwhile, those who have been biding their time sense that the moment has come to reclaim the throne they believe is rightfully theirs.

1.title: FR - Queen Woo - S01E04 - Assassins Attack Queen Woo
1.plot: Word of the king's death travels in the ears of Yeon-bi of Jolbon. His passing gives rise to her ambitions of being the next queen. She travels fast to make the first move. Meanwhile, Queen Woo seeks refuge as groups of assassins close in on her.

1.title: FR - Queen Woo - S01E05 - The Chase
1.plot: Eul Pa So continues to list potential suspects who might be responsible for His Majesty’s death, ultimately concluding that the spy must be someone who knows of the king's demise. Meanwhile, the White Tigers draw closer to Queen Woo, coming within an arm's length of capturing her.

1.title: FR - Queen Woo - S01E06 - The Fourth or the Fifth?
1.plot: Queen Woo is confronted with a life-or-death choice that will shape the destiny of her entire family clan, all while being relentlessly pursued by White Tigers. In the heat of this peril, she senses that someone within her circle is covertly leaking her whereabouts. At the same time, Eul Pa So waits in the shadows, ready to act on the moves he expects her to make.

1.title: FR - Queen Woo - S01E07 - An Inescapable Attack
1.plot: While preparing to leave, the Queen kills the Head Maid after finding out that the Head Maid betrayed her. Believing that Eul Pal So will come and help them with returning to the palace, the Queen takes the risk and goes to the ferry dock despite being chased by the White Tigers. Meanwhile, the Queen decides to make the Fourth Prince the new king through a levirate marriage.

1.title: FR - Queen Woo - S01E08 - The Reason to Fight
1.plot: Bal Gi, Pae Eui, and their soldiers advance to start a war against Queen Woo. Recollecting how he was punished by Nam Mu for desiring the throne, Pae Eui reestablishes his determination to claim the throne. Although the oath of allegiance the five tribes made to King Chung Mo has been broken, Queen Woo still chooses to defend her palace. Then, reinforcements arrive to join hands with Queen Woo.

meta.plot: À travers la formatrice Traci Harmon et la jeune recrue Alex Diaz, cette série met en lumière l'impact de ce métier sur la condition humaine. Harmon est inspirée par un jeune des rues, alors que Diaz apprend qu'être flic ne se résume pas à tout voir en noir ou blanc et qu'il faut composer avec des nuances de gris.

1.title: FR - On Call - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: In the wake of tragedy, LBPD training officer Traci Harmon takes on new trainee, Alex Diaz who on day one is already learning the job is harder than he imagined.

1.title: FR - On Call - S01E02 - Laws of the Universe
1.plot: A chaotic street takeover finds our officers grossly outnumbered, revealing philosophical rifts inside West Division.

1.title: FR - On Call - S01E03 - South of Heaven
1.plot: Diaz learns that Harmon has enemies within West Division, and begins to fear she cannot be trusted.

1.title: FR - On Call - S01E04 - Unsung
1.plot: Desperate for a lead, Harmon goes off book resulting in a major breakthrough and a deadly showdown.

1.title: FR - On Call - S01E05 - Not Your Savior
1.plot: Back on patrol, the rift between Harmon and Diaz comes to a head.

1.title: FR - On Call - S01E06 - L.A. Woman
1.plot: When Diaz's family is threatened, Harmon realizes she must break her own rules to fix it.

1.title: FR - On Call - S01E07 - War Machine
1.plot: A shot caller's revenge mission results in West Division going head to head with an entire gang.

1.title: FR - On Call - S01E08 - How the West Was Won
1.plot: Harmon and Diaz join forces with an elite squad to intercept a major drug shipment.

1.title: FR - Parish - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Desperate to support his family, Gray returns to his criminal roots for one last job. But after things go sideways, Gray can't walk away. The only way out is through.

1.title: FR - Parish - S01E02 - Blood in the Water
1.plot: Gray and Colin clash over a big clean up. Gray dodges his family's growing suspicion. The Tongais pursue new business.

1.title: FR - Parish - S01E03 - Sanctuary
1.plot: Cornered, Gray's allegiance to Horse is put to the ultimate test. The Parish and Tongai families search for their missing loved ones. The Tongais gather intel on their adversary.

1.title: FR - Parish - S01E04 - Impimpi
1.plot: When Anton, an old colleague, learns Gray is working with the Tongais, he forces Gray to choose: his family or Horse. Rose and Makayla work together to survive. Horse searches for a traitor.

1.title: FR - Parish - S01E05 - Kumba
1.plot: Gray and his family face a terrible new normal and reckon with past trauma. Horse singles out the enemy within while expanding his business. He makes Gray an offer he can't refuse.

1.title: FR - Parish - S01E06 - A Good Man
1.plot: Gray discovers unlikely allies as he risks it all for revenge. The Tongais level up their operation, but face an unforeseen obstacle.

meta.plot: Un conducteur de taxi voit sa vie être bouleversée lorsqu'il accepte de servir de chauffeur à un gangster zimbabwéen basé à la Nouvelle-Orléans et impliqué dans le trafic d'êtres humains.

1.title: FR - Le Crime à la racine - S01E01 - The Unthinkable
1.plot: After a double murder sends shock waves through a quiet Swedish town, lead detective John promises the grieving families that he will find the killer.

1.title: FR - Le Crime à la racine - S01E02 - Leave No Stone Unturned
1.plot: As weeks turn into years without answers and his home life slowly falls apart, a desperate John turns to an unlikely ally to help crack the case.

1.title: FR - Le Crime à la racine - S01E03 - Family Tree
1.plot: John and Per's investigative efforts are obstructed by their clashing personalities. A prying journalist adds to the pressure.

1.title: FR - Le Crime à la racine - S01E04 - A Lonely Person
1.plot: With everyone nearing the ends of their ropes, a revelation from an unexpected source leads to a breakthrough in the case.

meta.plot: Un inspecteur et un généalogiste font équipe pour trouver le coupable d'un double homicide choquant commis 16 ans plus tôt, avant que l'affaire ne soit définitivement classée.

1.title: FR - Subteran - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Luca's mission is compromised by the overzealous daughter of a crime family. Cami witnesses a crime over a muted video call, and is forced to run.

1.title: FR - Subteran - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: With Marius's help, Cami disappears for the safety of her son. But when Tili, Crisi's twin sister, pays Marius a visit, Cami must form a new plan.

1.title: FR - Subteran - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Nicolae gives "Sonia" her first task — retrieving the laptop from police evidence. Suddenly Cami's new persona is more than what she bargained for.

1.title: FR - Subteran - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: When the laptop goes missing again, Tili and Dracu's necks are on the line — but while investigating Luca's home, they discover a shocking truth.

1.title: FR - Subteran - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: With Cami's identity exposed and Crisi's fate sealed, Matei's life is on the line. Marius reconnects with a secret partner and tells him everything.

1.title: FR - Subteran - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Cami is interrogated but the police don't seem to believe a word she says. Tili and Dracu hold Matei hostage, waiting for Cami to crack the encryption.

meta.plot: La vie d'une jeune mère est complètement chamboulée quand elle doit cacher sa véritable identité pour échapper au gang de Bucarest qui a tué son fiancé.

1.title: FR - Passenger - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: A missing woman, a dead stag - DI Riya Ajunwa knows something is not right in Chadder Vale. There must be a connection between the two, but what is it?

1.title: FR - Passenger - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Riya is desperate to find out what happened to Katie - but she just wants to talk to Mehmet about plans for the future - and someone's return reopens old wounds.

1.title: FR - Passenger - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: As Chadder Vale reels in grief, Riya struggles to juggle the pieces of her rapidly escalating investigation and pressure mounts on Derek and Kane.

1.title: FR - Passenger - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Riya confronts someone, new evidence shines a light on what happened to Mehmet, and Katie heads back to the forest for answers.

1.title: FR - Passenger - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: John's illness provides Riya with a vital clue, Eddie and Joanne struggle to connect and Lilly confronts her dad with unexpected consequences.

1.title: FR - Passenger - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: When heart-breaking revelations push Riya to Manchester, Ali and Nish must continue investigating on their own.

meta.plot: Installée dans le petit village nordique de Chadder Vale depuis cinq ans, Riya Ajunwa, ancienne détective de la police londonienne, cherche un défi capable de l'aider à se sentir à nouveau vivante. Lorsqu'une fille du coin disparaît en laissant des traces de sang dans sa voiture, la jeune femme pense saisir l'occasion rêvée. Aussi, quand la victime réapparaît le jour suivant comme si rien ne s'était passé, Riya est décontenancée. Suivent une série d’événements étranges et de crimes horribles qui ne semblent pas inquiéter les habitants...

1.title: FR - Action Pack - S01E01 - Fright At The Museum
1.plot: Watts, Wren, Clay and Treena search for sneaky dinosaur bone burglars.

1.title: FR - Action Pack - S01E02 - Catching Cold
1.plot: The Action Pack shakes off snowballs when Cold Snap arrives and freezes the city.

1.title: FR - Action Pack - S01E03 - Mason Impossible
1.plot: Treena's friend Mason makes a big mess when he can't control his feelings.

1.title: FR - Action Pack - S01E04 - Hero Of The Day
1.plot: Mason gets ready for his first mission and helps track down a trowel thief.

1.title: FR - Action Pack - S01E05 - Awesome Possum
1.plot: A pretty possum's on the run after sneaking into the Action Pack's MegaVan.

1.title: FR - Action Pack - S01E06 - Frozen Fiasco
1.plot: Watts' electric charge causes Cold Snap's gadget to freeze the crew.

1.title: FR - Action Pack - S01E07 - Sky's The Limit
1.plot: Clay's little sister makes herself a giant so she can hang out with the big kids.

1.title: FR - Action Pack - S01E08 - All That Llama Drama
1.plot: Wren uses her animal abilities to save a llama trapped in a tunnel.

1.title: FR - Action Pack - S01E09 - A Good Day To Dino
1.plot: Desperate to host a dinosaur-themed tea party, devious Dinah Rex turns the entire town into various dinos using Action Pack's stolen changing ray.

1.title: FR - Action Pack - S01E10 - Trophy Trouble
1.plot: The team competes for a coveted trophy when the academy's superintendent suddenly appears.

meta.plot: Armés de leur bonté, d'un esprit vif et de super-pouvoirs, les jeunes héros de l'Académie Action font équipe pour vaincre les méchants et faire ressortir le bon en eux !

1.title: FR - Kong: King of the Apes - S01E01 - The Adventure Begins
1.plot: As baby Kong grows into a powerful ape, Lukas and his scientist father do all they can to protect him. But someone else wants Kong out of the picture.

1.title: FR - Kong: King of the Apes - S01E02 - Snake in the Grass
1.plot: Lukas, Kong and friends race to save Anita's niece from a giant anaconda, while Richard plots to turn the snake into a high-tech fighting machine.

1.title: FR - Kong: King of the Apes - S01E03 - Kong in 3D
1.plot: When Kong is caught stealing diamonds on live TV, Lukas knows something fishy is going on. Can he uncover the truth and save his pal's reputation?

1.title: FR - Kong: King of the Apes - S01E04 - Poacher's Prize
1.plot: As the team heads to Richard's lab to rescue liger clones, Jonesy finds a way to make Kong invisible. But the camouflage keeps wearing off too soon!

1.title: FR - Kong: King of the Apes - S01E05 - King's Ransom
1.plot: Richard captures one of the team and lays a trap for the others. Kong must confront his biggest fear to save Lukas from a pair of nasty robo-sharks.

1.title: FR - Kong: King of the Apes - S01E06 - Little Bots Big Problems
1.plot: In public, Richard plays the hero to set an evil new plan in motion. Danny and Panchi visit the island in disguise to find out what he's up to.

1.title: FR - Kong: King of the Apes - S01E07 - Botila-Zilla
1.plot: Kong and team scramble to hide from the police and come face-to-face with Richard's latest creation: a robotic T. rex with the mind of Botila.

1.title: FR - Kong: King of the Apes - S01E08 - Bionic Arms Race
1.plot: As Richard sells his biono-bots to armies around the world, Jonesy tries to hack into Botila's system to uncover the grand plan.

1.title: FR - Kong: King of the Apes - S01E09 - Honey I Shrunk the Kong
1.plot: A shrink-ray attack leaves a tiny Kong in the clutches of Richard and Botila. And this time, he can't rely on his super strength to survive.

1.title: FR - Kong: King of the Apes - S01E10 - Kong on Ice
1.plot: As the team races to stop an alarming new threat in the Arctic, Kong learns to fight on ice and Botila takes a defiant step.

1.title: FR - Kong: King of the Apes - S01E11 - Takeover
1.plot: Botila turns the tables on Richard and picks up a disturbing new habit. Lukas and friends consider a surprising request.

1.title: FR - Kong: King of the Apes - S01E12 - Robosquitos
1.plot: As Richard prepares to unleash a swarm of insects armed with sinister powers, Panchi's birthday makes Kong curious about his own birth family.

meta.plot: En 2050, un scientifique diabolique lâche une armée de robots dinosaures, et c'est à Kong et à ses amis qu'il revient de les combattre et de sauver le monde.
Être une femme en 1928 n'était pas simple. Grâce à leur travail de standardiste, quatre jeunes femmes en quête d'indépendance créent une relation qui va changer leur vie.

1.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S01E01 - Chapter 1: Dreams
1.plot: Lidia is used to being a thief, but now she must steal in order to save her life. Different hopes propel each of the women into the workplace.

1.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S01E02 - Chapter 2: Memories
1.plot: Francisco offers Lidia a deal. Marga worries about what she saw at the party. Carlota's father interferes with her life.

1.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S01E03 - Chapter 3: Lies
1.plot: The police are called in when Lidia's identity is questioned. Francisco's wife is suspicious and asks Carolina for help.

1.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S01E04 - Chapter 4: Feelings
1.plot: Marga makes a lunch date with Pablo. Ángeles learns more about Mario's infidelity. Carlota's fantasies surprise her.

1.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S01E05 - Chapter 5: The Past
1.plot: Carolina threatens to reveal who Lidia really is. Miguel tells Carlota she must decide about their relationship. Everything changes for Ángeles.

1.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S01E06 - Chapter 6: Family
1.plot: Lidia helps Ángeles plan her escape. Carlota works to get Sara released from jail. Carlos fights with his father.

1.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S01E07 - Chapter 7: Loss
1.plot: The Cifuentes family mourns their loss. Lidia decides she should be honest with Carlos about her identity.

1.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S01E08 - Chapter 8: Love
1.plot: The new rotary technology divides Lidia's loyalties, and she is forced to choose between Carlos and her friends.

2.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S02E01 - Chapter 9: The Choice
2.plot: As 1928 turns into 1929, Lidia reports to a new boss, Carlota is blackmailed, Marga gets a hidden surprise, and all three rush to Angeles's rescue.

2.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S02E02 - Chapter 10: Pact
2.plot: Lidia directs a cover-up plan, but a theft complicates things and Marga is later caught in a lie. Carlos and Francisco negotiate an alliance.

2.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S02E03 - Chapter 11: Jealousy
2.plot: Marisol tries to drive Marga and Pablo apart. Carlota becomes suspicious of Sara. Lidia noticed a crucial difference between Carlos and Francisco.

2.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S02E04 - Chapter 12: Guilt
2.plot: Sara reveals a secret to Carlota. Angeles learns Inspector Cuevas's weakness. Pablo shows Marga his undying love. Lidia helps end an operator strike.

2.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S02E05 - Chapter 13: Secrets
2.plot: Sarah seeks medical advice. Lidia gets news that complicates her choice between Francisco and Carlos. Marga learns Pablo is hiding a delicate problem.

2.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S02E06 - Chapter 14: Loneliness
2.plot: Lidia gets a tempting offer. Carlota and her friends respond to a plea for help. Angeles takes a risky step in order to learn the witness's identity.

2.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S02E07 - Chapter 15: Opportunities
2.plot: The police find a body. Angeles learns who's been spooking her. Francisco gives Lidia space, while Carlos gives her a surprise. An arrest is made.

2.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S02E08 - Chapter 16: Innocence
2.plot: Carlota gets news about Miguel. Guilt-stricken Marga goes into seclusion. Lidia learns Francisco has made a decision. Angeles finds herself cornered.

3.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S03E01 - Chapter 17: Time
3.plot: Six months later, a catastrophic event deeply affects Lidia, Marga, Carlota, Angeles and their loved ones. Marga gets a surprise visit from an in-law.

3.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S03E02 - Chapter 18: Death
3.plot: With her friends' help, Lidia puts her plan into action. Carlota decides what to do with her inheritance. Angeles tries to earn Pedro Guzman's trust.

3.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S03E03 - Chapter 19: Truth
3.plot: Lidia's desperation worries Carlota and spurs Francisco to offer support. Marga helps Julio cover Pablo's job. Carlota finds a way to promote her cause.

3.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S03E04 - Chapter 20: Revenge
3.plot: Lidia and Francisco visit an orphanage to gather info. Complications arise with Marga when Julio impersonates housebound Pablo, who sneaks back to work.

3.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S03E05 - Chapter 21: Sin
3.plot: Angeles must deflect Guzman's suspicion of a mole. Carlos learns his mother's car was sabotaged and confronts Lidia. Marga has a horrible realization.

3.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S03E06 - Chapter 22: Fight
3.plot: To protect her child, Angeles accepts a deal with Guzman. A phone call gives Lidia a hunch on Eva's whereabouts. Carlota responds to her attackers.

3.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S03E07 - Chapter 23: Hope
3.plot: Lidia turns the tables on her captor. During the king's visit, those fighting for Carlota's cause take drastic measures, forcing her to choose sides.

3.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S03E08 - Chapter 24: Destiny
3.plot: As the situation escalates, Lidia tries to get to Eva, Marga shocks Pablo, Carlota takes a risk, Angeles learn a truth and Francisco attempts a rescue.

4.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S04E01 - Chapter 25: Equality
4.plot: Carlota's new political career faces a major obstacle as Marga suffers heartbreak. Meanwhile, Lidia returns to work and Ángeles pitches an idea to her.

4.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S04E02 - Chapter 26: Liberty
4.plot: As her memory starts to slowly come back, Carlota's friends try to clear her name. Ángeles begins teaching classes. Lidia's former enemy returns.

4.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S04E03 - Chapter 27: Justice
4.plot: Lidia and Carlos argue over a loved one's medical treatment. Óscar makes a shocking discovery about Dulce. Marga gets to know her boss better.

4.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S04E04 - Chapter 28: Fear
4.plot: With Carlota's future looking perilous, Óscar starts falsifying evidence to get her out of prison. A different doctor gives Lidia new hope.

4.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S04E05 - Chapter 29: Life
4.plot: The friends begin concocting a plan to free Óscar from prison and Marga turns to Pablo for assistance. Carlos is surprised by his friend's condition.

4.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S04E06 - Chapter 30: Doubt
4.plot: Carmen creates a deception while Carlos continues to keep Lidia in the dark. Carlota tries desperately to escape from her captor.

4.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S04E07 - Chapter 31: Happiness
4.plot: Lidia is confused and hurt by Carlos's betrayal. An unlikely ally is enlisted to try to free Óscar. Carmen's calculating plan starts falling into place.

4.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S04E08 - Chapter 32: Luck
4.plot: When the prison break is set in motion, the team faces unforeseen consequences. Lidia makes a heartbreaking decision in order to protect Eva.

5.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S05E01 - Chapter 33: War
5.plot: Lidia leaves New York and returns to Madrid in search of Sofía, who has run away to join the Republicans in the Spanish Civil War.

5.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S05E02 - Chapter 34: Hate
5.plot: Lidia's friends — both old and new — help her attempt to force Carlos to call Sofía back from the front lines. Pablo looks for ways to avoid enlisting.

5.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S05E03 - Chapter 35: Courage
5.plot: Óscar and Carlota risk their journalistic integrity in exchange for helping Lidia with Sofía. Marga falls ill while running a dangerous errand.

5.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S05E04 - Chapter 36: Control
5.plot: Carlos and Lidia encounter trouble in their search for Sofía. Carlota visits the western front with James, to Óscar's chagrin. Pablo goes missing.

5.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S05E05 - Chapter 37: Insanity
5.plot: When Madrid falls to the Nationalists, Lidia and most of her friends must face widespread grief and devastation, with long-term consequences.

5.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S05E06 - Chapter 38: Power
5.plot: Lidia's defiance gets her into trouble at the prison camp, while Francisco concocts a plan to free her. Marga confides her secrets to Isidro.

5.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S05E07 - Chapter 39: Patience
5.plot: Lidia is desperate to save her imprisoned friend. Elisa discloses Carlos' fate. Marga realizes who betrayed her. Carmen targets Lidia's loved ones.

5.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S05E08 - Chapter 40: Pain
5.plot: Elisa reveals a startling secret as more of Lidia's friends are endangered. Sofía turns to an old friend for help protecting the prisoners from Carmen.

5.title: FR - Les Demoiselles du téléphone - S05E09 - Chapter 41: Defeat
5.plot: An unexpected ally seeking the ultimate revenge helps Lidia try and enact her plan to free all the  prisoners from the women's prison camp.

meta.plot: In the 14th century, Barcelona is experiencing one of its most prosperous moments. The city has grown to La Ribera, a fishing district in which the largest Marian temple ever known is built: Santa María del Mar. But the construction runs parallel to Arnau Estanyol, a serf of the land who, fleeing the abuses of The feudal lords of the countryside take refuge in Barcelona.

1.title: FR - La Catedral Del Mar - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: In 1319, serf Bernat flees from danger with infant son Arnau to his sister's home in Barcelona, where Arnau is blamed for a tragedy 10 years later.

1.title: FR - La Catedral Del Mar - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: A remarriage leads to a change of residence and occupation for Bernat and Arnau, while Joan is offered an opportunity to get an education.

1.title: FR - La Catedral Del Mar - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Four years pass and famine-stricken serfs revolt against the hoarding nobles. A brave act makes Arnau's dream come true, and he later falls in love.

1.title: FR - La Catedral Del Mar - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Joan hears an alarming confession. Torn between two women, Arnau escapes by running off to war. Searching for Arnau, Aledis has a fateful encounter.

1.title: FR - La Catedral Del Mar - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: After rescuing two children, Arnau is rewarded with a lucrative new career. He later adopts a spirited orphan and gets revenge against the Puigs.

1.title: FR - La Catedral Del Mar - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: After a close brush with death, Arnau starts to see Mar in a different light, but King Pedro has other plans for him. Aledis learns Arnau is alive.

1.title: FR - La Catedral Del Mar - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Convinced Mar is leading Arnau down an evil path of temptation, Joan helps Elionor with a plan to get rid of her. Margarida Puig visits Elionor.

1.title: FR - La Catedral Del Mar - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Joan confesses to Mar. Sahat learns of Arnau's plight and returns to Barcelona, where he devises a plan. Arnau and Francesca are brought face to face.

meta.plot: A newly minted military interrogator arrives at a covert detention center to discover that some of the terrorists held there are not of this world.

1.title: FR - GHOUL - S01E01 - Out of the Smokeless Fire
1.plot: After exposing her father’s anti-government activities, Nida Rahim is inducted as the newest interrogator at the remote Meghdoot 31 detention center.

1.title: FR - GHOUL - S01E02 - The Nightmares Will Begin
1.plot: Flashes of the past begin to haunt Nida. When sect leader Ali Saeed is brought for questioning, his unnerving answers lead her to suspect his motives.

1.title: FR - GHOUL - S01E03 - Reveal Their Guilt, Eat Their Flesh
1.plot: Nida learns of the ghoul inhabiting Saeed. Upon telling her fellow interrogators, she learns the alarming truth about what its presence reveals.

1.title: FR - Great News - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Katie, a frustrated cable news producer, is horrified when her mom, Carol, gets an internship at "The Breakdown."  Despite Katie's best efforts, Carol is instantly beloved by the entire office, including blowhard veteran anchor Chuck. But when Katie hits a roadblock while producing a big story, she realizes that maybe having a mom at work isn't such a bad thing.

1.title: FR - Great News - S01E02 - Bear Attack
1.plot: Katie tries to set workplace boundaries with Carol, but when a big story about an escaped bear lands in her lap, her mom can't help but meddle. Meanwhile, Greg tries to get Chuck and Portia to do a little friendly banter at the end of the show.

1.title: FR - Great News - S01E03 - Chuck Pierce Is Blind
1.plot: Chuck is having cataract surgery and, for the first time ever, must miss a day of work. Carol, eager to shirk her overwhelming intern duties, offers to take care of him. Meanwhile, Katie is excited for a peaceful day but with Chuck gone, Greg is reluctant to be the bad guy. As a result, "The Breakdown" descends into chaos as Greg is forced to say yes to Portia, Justin and everyone else's "great ideas for the show."

1.title: FR - Great News - S01E04 - War Is Hell
1.plot: Katie's secret war reporter boyfriend, Trip, is back in town and working at the MMN offices. Despite Katie's best efforts, Carol quickly uncovers the covert relationship using a plan she stole from "Days of Our Lives". Meanwhile, Chuck, feeling threatened by Trip, is determined to return to the field. Greg and Justin support the idea until they find footage of Chuck's time as a war reporter in the '90s.

1.title: FR - Great News - S01E05 - Snowmageddon of the Century
1.plot: A huge snowstorm traps everyone in the building overnight. Meanwhile, Portia convinces Katie that Chuck's romantically interested in her; and Carol saves the day when she breaks into the offices of their competitor and steals all the morning show's wine.

1.title: FR - Great News - S01E06 - Serial Arsonist
1.plot: Katie gets an opportunity to appear on the air after a field reporter is exposed as an arsonist, leading Carol to embrace the role of stage mom. Meanwhile, Chuck tries to compose a new theme song for the show after growing jealous of Portia's creative pursuits.

1.title: FR - Great News - S01E07 - The Red Door
1.plot: Carol is excited when Chuck asks her to wait for the cable guy at his townhouse, until Chuck gives an ominous warning that tests her curiosity. Meanwhile, Portia's phone gets hacked and Katie struggles not to read her private emails.

1.title: FR - Great News - S01E08 - Celebrity Hacking Scandal
1.plot: Katie secretly investigates a celebrity phone hacking ring behind Greg's back. In Katie's absence, Carol falls into producing a piece on her favorite phone game, "Biscuit Blitz." Meanwhile, Chuck gets in hot water when Portia accuses him of mansplaining.

1.title: FR - Great News - S01E09 - Carol Has a Bully
1.plot: Carol has a midterm she must pass in order to keep her internship. Katie needs to choose between helping her mom and focusing on her hacking story, which she can't seem to crack. Meanwhile, Greg's wealthy estranged grandmother pays a visit to the office. Chuck finds her cold and cruel, but almost immediately falls in love with her.

1.title: FR - Great News - S01E10 - Carol's Eleven
1.plot: Katie makes a huge discovery about the story she's been chasing and, with the help of Carol and the rest of the staff, concocts a scheme to get the story out. Greg struggles with balancing his conflicting loyalties to his family, co-workers and conscience.

meta.plot: S'entendre avec ses collègues peut s'avérer difficile mais travailler avec sa mère ? C'est une tout autre histoire ! La vie de Katie, une jeune productrice d'un journal télévisé, est bouleversée lorsque sa mère décroche un stage dans la chaîne de télévision pour laquelle elle travaille.

Lisa, après avoir été témoin d'un événement cataclysmique sur le quai 7 d'une gare, voit sa propre mémoire fragmentée se réveiller et révéler un lien entre sa propre vie et celle de l'événement dont elle vient d'être témoin.

1.title: FR - Platform 7 - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: A suicide on Platform 7 prompts a female ghost and a Transport Police officer to investigate the details surrounding her death.

1.title: FR - Platform 7 - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Lisa and PC Akash continue to chase down clues about Lisa's death as Akash receives an unexpected lead and Lisa experiences a breakthrough memory.

1.title: FR - Platform 7 - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: A flashback to the beginning of Lisa and Matt's relationship shows how Matt slowly chipped away at her and how it led to a fateful pursuit.

1.title: FR - Platform 7 - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Akash races against time to gather evidence for Lisa's case as Lisa sets out to protect Matt's new love and get justice.

meta.plot: Erica Faure, 41 ans, est une écrivaine à succès de romans policiers. De retour dans sa ville natale pour vider la maison de ses parents décédés, elle découvre le corps sans vie d'Alexandra, sa meilleure amie d'enfance, les veines entaillées. Convaincue que ce n'est pas un suicide, Erica se lance dans une enquête où passé et présent s'entremêlent. Cependant, c'est surtout sa rencontre avec le capitaine Patrick Saab qui va bouleverser sa vie.

1.title: FR - Erica - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Erica - S01E02 - Episode 2

meta.plot: Après un divorce des plus amicaux, un père insouciant mais dévoué s'habitue peu à peu à la vie parentale hors du couple avec une ex rationnelle et leurs deux enfants.

1.title: FR - Marlon - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Exes Marlon and Ashley try a friendly divorce for their children's sake, but things get tricky when Ashley decides to date again. In other events, Marlon struggles to keep a sponsor for his online channel, “The Marlon Way.”

1.title: FR - Marlon - S01E02 - Cleaning Out the Closet
1.plot: Ashley is shocked to learn that Marlon has a storage unit crammed full of things from when they were married and challenges him to have a yard sale to part with it all.

1.title: FR - Marlon - S01E03 - Boys Only Want One Thing
1.plot: Marlon struggles to come to terms with his daughter bringing home a boy for the first time. Yvette uses Stevie to get great seats to a Beyoncé concert.

1.title: FR - Marlon - S01E04 - Exes With Benefits
1.plot: Marlon and Ashley contemplate whether to have no strings attached 'ex-sex.' Yvette babysits Marley and Zack.

1.title: FR - Marlon - S01E05 - Project Kids
1.plot: Feeling that Marley and Zack don't appreciate everything they have, Marlon teaches them a lesson by recreating the projects from his childhood.

1.title: FR - Marlon - S01E06 - Surprises
1.plot: Marlon is stunned to learn that Ashley is treating herself to breast augmentation surgery for her birthday, her first since their divorce. In other events, Stevie tries to guess Yvette's age.

1.title: FR - Marlon - S01E07 - Hospital Party
1.plot: Marlon and Ashley have very different ways of coping when Zack needs surgery.

1.title: FR - Marlon - S01E08 - Coach Marlon
1.plot: Marlon's lack of boundaries leads Ashley to ask for his key to her house back; and Marlon coaches Zack's basketball team.

1.title: FR - Marlon - S01E09 - Appropriate Marlon
FR - Marlon - S01E10 - End of the Road

2.title: FR - Marlon - S02E01 - Model Parent
2.plot: Marlon convinces Ashley to let Zack model for a kids' athletic line after he is approached in a mall. After the shoot, Stevie , Yvette , Marlon and Ashley are horrified to see that the photos have been altered as the shirt he is modeling now contains the phrase "Funky Monkey." Ashley and Marlon decide to pull Zack from the campaign after the advertising executives fail to see the racism of the shirt.

2.title: FR - Marlon - S02E02 - Wingman
2.plot: Marlon offers to be Ashley’s wingman during a night out at a club. All is going well until Marlon meets someone and Ashley finds herself jealous. Yvette gives Stevie a makeover and kisses him in an attempt to make her ex jealous.

2.title: FR - Marlon - S02E03 - Sisters
2.plot: When Marlon’s sisters come to town, he convinces Ashley to pretend they are still married in order to keep them from freaking out and being disappointed in him. As the weekend goes on and the charade gets harder to keep up, Marlon finally confronts them in an epic confession. After receiving a psychic reading from Lenora, Stevie tries to woo Yvette as he thinks they are destined to be together.

2.title: FR - Marlon - S02E04 - Divorce Counseling
2.plot: Marlon and Ashley go to see strong-willed relationship therapist Kamala to help stabilize their rocky divorce. When Marlon exposes Kamala as a fraud, he ends up experiencing a breakthrough and realizes he should try and change his ways. Stevie gives Yvette an intense massage.

2.title: FR - Marlon - S02E05 - Keepin' It 100
2.plot: Marlon decides to buy the house he has been renting since the separation. While prepping for the sale Marlon and Ashley decide that they no longer have to follow the politics of marriage and tell white lies to keep each other happy. They can be totally honest with each other.. "Keep It 100." Yvette and Stevie get involved and the plan eventually backfires when they realize you can be too honest. They all agree to keep it a balmy "77" with a slight breeze.

2.title: FR - Marlon - S02E06 - Man Code
2.plot: Marlon and Stevie see Yvette's fiancé, Demetrius, cheating on her and they disagree whether or not they should tell her. Marlon refuses, claiming they can't break the "man code." Ashley deals with Yvette's new relationship by turning to numerous hobbies. Yvette discovers what is going on and breaks up with Demetrius after he and Marlon get into a fight at her engagement party.

2.title: FR - Marlon - S02E07 - Homecoming
2.plot: Marlon, Stevie, Yvette and Ashley all attend homecoming weekend at Howell University. Stevie is determined to join the independent fraternity that Marlon created because Stevie was always blocked from membership as an undergrad. Ashley and Yvette get caught up with a couple of young co-eds.

2.title: FR - Marlon - S02E08 - Driving Miss Marley
2.plot: Marlon and Ashley discover that Marley purposefully failed her driver's test because she is afraid to drive; Marlon tries to help her face her fears by facing one of his own; Yvette enlists Stevie's help to increase her Uber rating.

2.title: FR - Marlon - S02E09 - Career Day
2.plot: Marlon decides to talk to Zack's classmates about non-traditional careers; his speech backfires and Marlon must reinforce that school is important.

2.title: FR - Marlon - S02E10 - Funeral Party
2.plot: Marlon decides to throw himself a funeral party after attending his barber's funeral; everyone speaks at Marlon's party, talking about the insensitive jokes he made at their expense; Marlon worries that he is too harsh on everyone.

1.title: FR - The Tick - S01E01 - The Tick vs. The Idea Men
1.plot: Tick and Arthur reveal their superhero origin story.

1.title: FR - The Tick - S01E02 - The Tick vs. Chairface Chippendale
1.plot: A criminal mastermind with an evil plan and a face only an interior decorator could love.

1.title: FR - The Tick - S01E03 - The Tick vs. Dinosaur Neil
1.plot: Mutant Dino-Park scientist Neil proves to be a major headache.

1.title: FR - The Tick - S01E04 - The Tick vs. Mr. Mental
1.plot: Mr. Mental hypnotizes The Tick and sends him to steal the Thinking Cap from Pendecker Labs.

1.title: FR - The Tick - S01E05 - The Tick vs. The Breadmaster
1.plot: The Breadmaster is an evil baker that uses baked goods to terrorize The City.

1.title: FR - The Tick - S01E06 - The Tick vs. El Seed
1.plot: El Seed hopes to take over the city by bringing all of the plants and trees to life.

1.title: FR - The Tick - S01E07 - The Tick vs. The Tick
1.plot: A night at the local superhero bar turns explosive thanks to the evil midnight bomber!

1.title: FR - The Tick - S01E08 - The Tick vs. The Uncommon Cold
1.plot: Arthur is nursing The Tick, who is infected with a most uncommon cold!

1.title: FR - The Tick - S01E09 - The Tick vs. Brainchild
1.plot: While Charles's parents discuss child-rearing with no punishinment, their Branchild is ending Earth!

1.title: FR - The Tick - S01E10 - The Tick vs. Pineapple Pokopo
1.plot: Arthur and The Tick try to rescue Yank, a super-genius, space monkey, captured by an evil ruler.

1.title: FR - The Tick - S01E11 - The Tick vs. The Mole-Men
1.plot: The King of the Mole People and his ministers come to the surface for a vacation.

1.title: FR - The Tick - S01E12 - The Tick vs. The Proto-Clown
1.plot: A clown with a major hang-up. Laugh at him and you'll pay the price.

1.title: FR - Picnic at Hanging Rock - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: In the final decade of the 19th century, mysterious widow, Hester Appleyard, arrives in Australia, haunted by a secret past. Here, in the new world, she establishes a successful school for young ladies. But six years later, on Valentine's Day, 1900, the enigmatic headmistress allows her pupils to picnic at Hanging Rock. And there, in the strange brooding landscape, something unthinkable happens.

1.title: FR - Picnic at Hanging Rock - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Hester's three star pupils and a governess have disappeared. Led by a dogged sergeant, local men search for the missing. Has something supernatural befallen them? Or has a human outrage occurred? An aristocratic young Englishman, Michael Fitzhubert, was the last person to see the girls, and when the search is abandoned, he is compelled to return to the Rock where he makes a shocking discovery.

1.title: FR - Picnic at Hanging Rock - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: The missing Rothschild heiress, Irma Leopold, has been found, remarkably unharmed, but claiming to remember nothing. Meanwhile, rumours spread and the sergeant turns his attention to the college. What secrets lie hidden behind the locked gates? His investigation intensifies Hester's paranoia and she grows certain that the young orphan, Sara, knows something about the disappearance.

meta.plot: En 1900, en Australie. Trois élèves et l'une de leurs professeurs disparaissent mystérieusement au cours d'un pique-nique près du site de Hanging Rock.

1.title: FR - Making History - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Having recently discovered time travel, Dan, a facilities manager at a small Massachusetts college, has been transporting himself back to the 1700s to spend time with the colonial woman for whom he's fallen. In the present, Dan is misunderstood by all, and anxious that life is passing him by. But in the 18th century, he's absolutely hilarious - he gets the girl and makes friends. But Dan's actions in the past are messing up the present. That woman he's dating is not just any woman. She's Paul Revere's daughter, Deborah, and Dan's meddling causes her father to delay his famous ride, which may have altered the outcome of the entire American Revolution. To set matters right, Dan enlists the help of Chris, a brilliant, polished and popular history professor at the college, who's now given the incredible opportunity to actually live the history he teaches.

1.title: FR - Making History - S01E02 - The Shot Heard Round the World
1.plot: Dan and Deb head back to colonial times to rescue Chris and help spark the Revolutionary War. Dan and Chris are forced to go undercover as British allies as they simultaneously try to rally the colonists to revolt in the Battle of Lexington. Unexpected friendships are formed and history is remade.

1.title: FR - Making History - S01E03 - The Boyfriend Experience
1.plot: Deborah slowly discovers that Dan may not be the thrilling inventor he claimed to be back in 1776, and questions their budding relationship. To get her back, Dan resorts to desperate (and alarming) measures. Meanwhile, Chris is under intense scrutiny from his mentor, Dr. Cobell, as he works to finally achieve tenure at the university.

1.title: FR - Making History - S01E04 - Chadwick's Angels
1.plot: In need of a victory, the trio heads back to the 1990s to give Dan another shot at his childhood dream: finishing the infamous "Bellybuster" ice cream sundae at a local parlor. As Deb bonds with the parlor's owner, Chris is on a mission to save a life in honor of his late British friend. But all of their plans are derailed when Dan runs into the bully that tormented him.

1.title: FR - Making History - S01E05 - The Touchables
1.plot: In need of some quick cash for Deb to purchase an ice cream parlor, the trio decides to make some money rather than save the world. But after Chris devises a strategy to cash in on the fixed 1919 Chicago World Series baseball game, their get-rich-quick scheme is derailed when they run into the infamous mobster Al Capone.

1.title: FR - Making History - S01E06 - The Godfriender
1.plot: Dan, Deb and Chris find themselves stuck in 1920s Chicago, with Al Capone holding their time travel bag hostage. Chris opts for a play-it-safe plan, using history to take out Capone, while Dan and Deb befriend him instead. As they teach him how to be a better mobster - and husband - they quickly realize that proving their loyalty may not be as easy as they thought.

1.title: FR - Making History - S01E07 - Night Cream
1.plot: With the ever-present threat of losing tenure looming over him, Chris reaches out to John Hancock and Samuel Adams to help spice things up in the classroom in 2017. Meanwhile, Deb's dream of re-opening Chadwick's ice cream parlor is finally coming to fruition, but Dan has a few marketing ideas of his own.

1.title: FR - Making History - S01E08 - The Duel
1.plot: Just as they're heading back to colonial times, John Hancock and Sam Adams meet the woman of their dreams and decide that there's no better way to determine who gets to court her than a classic duel. In the meantime, in hopes of garnering good publicity for Chadwick's, Dan sets up a meeting with a local reporter, who winds up asking some challenging questions about Deborah's identity.

1.title: FR - Making History - S01E09 - Body Trouble
1.plot: Chris' life is in shambles, so Dan plays the time travel card with Dr. Cobell to help get Chris' job back, but his efforts go awry when he accidentally gives him a heart attack instead. Meanwhile, Deb hunts down Hancock and Adams to convince them to return to the past.

meta.plot: Dan Chambers, professeur d'informatique dans une petite université du Massachusetts, découvre qu'il peut voyager dans le temps et se rend à plusieurs reprises au 18ème siècle, où il s'est épris d'une belle jeune femme prénommée Deborah. Seulement, ses actions dans le passé semblent avoir des répercussions sur le présent, d'autant plus que sa prétendante n'est autre que la fille du patriote Paul Revere. Il ne le réalise pas, mais il est peut-être en train d'altérer le déroulement de la Révolution Américaine. Pour que tout rentre dans l'ordre, Dan finit par demander de l'aide à son collègue historien, Chris Parish.

1.title: FR - Bleach Kai - S01E01 - The Day I Became a Shinigami
1.plot: Fifteen-year-old Ichigo Kurosaki has the uncanny ability to see ghosts, but otherwise lives an ordinary life. However, once a Shinigami named Rukia Kuchiki appears before him, everything changes.

1.title: FR - Bleach Kai - S01E02 - A Shinigami's Work
1.plot: After becoming a Shinigami, Ichigo Kurosaki refuses to help Rukia Kuchiki with her work as the local Shinigami of Karakura Town.

1.title: FR - Bleach Kai - S01E03 - The Older Brother's Wish, the Younger Sister's Wish
1.plot: When a Hollowfied Sora Inoue attacks his younger sister, Ichigo Kurosaki and Rukia Kuchiki set out to save her.

1.title: FR - Bleach Kai - S01E04 - Cursed Parakeet
1.plot: When Yasutora Sado receives a parakeet that contains the Soul of a young boy, it is up to Ichigo Kurosaki and Rukia Kuchiki to protect him from the Hollow that is after them.

1.title: FR - Bleach Kai - S01E05 - Beat the Invisible Enemy!
1.plot: Rukia Kuchiki and Yasutora Sado team up to take on the Hollow Shrieker.

1.title: FR - Bleach Kai - S01E06 - Fight to the Death! Ichigo vs. Ichigo
1.plot: At Rukia Kuchiki's behest, Ichigo Kurosaki puts an artificial soul in his body to take care of it and not arouse suspicion while he carries out his Substitute Shinigami duties, but the artificial soul has its own agenda.

1.title: FR - Bleach Kai - S01E07 - Greetings from a Stuffed Lion
1.plot: Ichigo Kurosaki becomes friends with the Modified Soul, Kon, and puts him into a plushie.

1.title: FR - Bleach Kai - S01E08 - June 17, Memories in the Rain
1.plot: Ichigo Kurosaki goes to his mother's grave with the rest of his family.

1.title: FR - Bleach Kai - S01E09 - Unbeatable Enemy
1.plot: Ichigo Kurosaki battles against Grand Fisher.

1.title: FR - Bleach Kai - S01E10 - Assault on Trip at Sacred Ground!
1.plot: While grudgingly attending Don Kanonji's show with the rest of his family, Ichigo Kurosaki is forced to fight a Hollow inadvertently created by Don Kanonji himself.

1.title: FR - Bleach Kai - S01E11 - The Legendary Quincy
1.plot: Ichigo Kurosaki and Rukia Kuchiki meet Uryū Ishida, a Quincy.

1.title: FR - Bleach Kai - S01E12 - A Gentle Right Arm
1.plot: As Ichigo Kurosaki begins his duel with Uryū Ishida, Yasutora Sado gains a new power.

1.title: FR - Bleach Kai - S01E13 - Flower and Hollow
1.plot: Orihime Inoue gains a new power in order to protect Tatsuki Arisawa.

1.title: FR - Bleach Kai - S01E14 - Back to Back, a Fight to the Death!
1.plot: Ichigo Kurosaki and Uryū Ishida work together to defeat a Menos Grande.

1.title: FR - Bleach Kai - S01E15 - Kon's Great Plan
1.plot: Kon decides to run away from the Kurosaki Clinic as Soul Society comes after Rukia Kuchiki.

1.title: FR - Bleach Kai - S01E16 - The Encounter, Abarai Renji!
1.plot: Two Shinigami, 6th Division Lieutenant Renji Abarai and Captain Byakuya Kuchiki, arrive in the Human World to take Rukia Kuchiki back to the Soul Society.

1.title: FR - Bleach Kai - S01E17 - Ichigo Dies!
1.plot: Ichigo Kurosaki loses his Shinigami powers and Rukia Kuchiki is taken back to Soul Society.

1.title: FR - Bleach Kai - S01E18 - Reclaim! The Power of the Shinigami!
1.plot: Ichigo Kurosaki begins his training with Kisuke Urahara to regain his Shinigami powers and save Rukia Kuchiki.

1.title: FR - Bleach Kai - S01E19 - Ichigo Becomes a Hollow!
1.plot: Kisuke Urahara helps Ichigo Kurosaki regain his Shinigami powers.

1.title: FR - Bleach Kai - S01E20 - Ichimaru Gin's Shadow
1.plot: After completing their training, Ichigo Kurosaki and his friends depart to Soul Society to rescue Rukia Kuchiki.

1.title: FR - Bleach Kai - S01E21 - Enter! The World of the Shinigami
1.plot: Ichigo Kurosaki and his friends enter Soul Society.

1.title: FR - Bleach Kai - S01E22 - The Man who Hates Shinigami
1.plot: Ichigo Kurosaki and his friends are forced to find another way into Seireitei due to 3rd Division Captain Gin Ichimaru's intervention.

1.title: FR - Bleach Kai - S01E23 - 14 Days Before Rukia's Execution
1.plot: Ichigo Kurosaki and his friends enter the household of the Shiba Clan.

1.title: FR - Bleach Kai - S01E24 - Assemble! The 13 Divisions
1.plot: As Ichigo Kurosaki and his friends begin their preparations to get into the Seireitei, the Gotei 13 captains assemble for a meeting.

1.title: FR - Bleach Kai - S01E25 - Penetrate the Center with an Enormous Bombshell?
1.plot: Ichigo Kurosaki and his friends enter the Seireitei.

1.title: FR - Bleach Kai - S01E26 - Formation! The Worst Tag
1.plot: Ichigo Kurosaki and his friends are scattered throughout the Seireitei, where they encounter new enemies.

1.title: FR - Bleach Kai - S01E27 - Release the Death Blow!
1.plot: Ichigo Kurosaki completes his battle with 11th Division 3rd Seat Ikkaku Madarame while his friends continue to progress through the Seireitei.

1.title: FR - Bleach Kai - S01E28 - Orihime Targeted
1.plot: Ganju Shiba wins his battle against 11th Division 5th Seat Yumichika Ayasegawa while Uryū Ishida begins his own.

meta.plot: Adolescent de quinze ans, Ichigo Kurosaki possède un don particulier : celui de voir les esprits. Un jour, il croise la route d'une belle Shinigami (un être spirituel) en train de pourchasser une "âme perdue", un esprit maléfique qui hante notre monde et n'arrive pas à trouver le repos. Mise en difficulté par son ennemi, la jeune fille décide alors de prêter une partie de ses pouvoirs à Ichigo, mais ce dernier hérite finalement de toute la puissance du Shinigami. Contraint d'assumer son nouveau statut, Ichigo va devoir gérer ses deux vies : celle de lycéen ordinaire, et celle de chasseur de démons...

meta.plot:
Lors d'une séance de rêve artificiel, un homme nommé Johnson retrouve la mémoire : il est en fait un aventurier redoutable supposé mort. Il découvre ensuite que son bras gauche dissimule une arme redoutable, le rayon delta Psychogun. Après avoir retrouvé son identité, Cobra décide qu'il est temps de reprendre sa vie de flibustier galactique en affrontant de nouveau la terrible Guilde des Pirates de l'Espace. Le robot à la personnalité féminine du nom d'Armanoïde qui l'accompagnait autrefois accepte de l'assister dans sa tâche…

Cobra est une série d'animation japonaise en trente-et-un épisodes de vingt-quatre minutes, créée par Buichi Terasawa d'après le space opera et manga éponyme. Elle a été diffusée pour la première fois au Japon le 7 octobre 1982 sur Fuji Television et en France le 20 février 1985 dans l'émission Cabou Cadin sur Canal+.

C’est un été en apparence ordinaire au Danemark, quand une catastrophe naturelle fait tout basculer : le pays doit être évacué progressivement après avoir été entièrement inondé. Les habitants sont contraints de quitter ceux qu'ils aiment, de renoncer à ce qu’ils ont toujours connu et de ce fait, à une partie d’eux-mêmes.

1.title: FR - Families Like Ours - S01E01 - The Hour Draws Near
1.plot: Most of Denmark's citizens are blissfully unaware that water levels are rapidly rising. We follow 19-year-old student Laura and her family as the life-altering news changes their lives forever.

1.title: FR - Families Like Ours - S01E02 - Separating the Wheat from the Chaff
1.plot: Everyone is relying on Jacob to find the money needed to relocate his extended family to Paris - except Fanny who refuses to be a burden to anyone.

meta.plot: Après avoir atterri dans une école de sorcières, une héroïne maladroite réalise qu'elle y est peut-être à sa place. D'après la série de livres à succès de Jill Murphy.

1.title: FR - Amandine Malabul, sorcière maladroite - S01E01 - Selection Day Part 1
1.plot: Mildred Hubble's world changes when a witch crashes into her balcony. She visits Cackle's Academy where she is amazed by everything - the magic, the potions, and that every student gets their own cat.

1.title: FR - Amandine Malabul, sorcière maladroite - S01E02 - Selection Day Part 2
1.plot: After she visits Cackle's Academy with her new witch friend Maud Spellbody, Mildred attempts to enrol by taking the magical exam.

1.title: FR - Amandine Malabul, sorcière maladroite - S01E03 - Tabby
1.plot: Mildred learns that having a scaredy cat makes life at witching school tough - especially when Ethel Hallow is determined to see her fail.

1.title: FR - Amandine Malabul, sorcière maladroite - S01E04 - New Girl
1.plot: Everyone's excited at the arrival of Enid, a young witch from the famous Nightshade family. Enid sees that Mildred is the local unwitting troublemaker and immediately latches onto her - it's the last thing Mildred needs.

1.title: FR - Amandine Malabul, sorcière maladroite - S01E05 - Pond Life
1.plot: Mildred is having fun jumping high into the air with Enid, using pirated magic to make the grass bouncy. Maud is getting fed up with Enid constantly distracting Mildred - Maud knows Mildred needs to knuckle down if she's going to stand a chance at the academy and can't bear the thought of losing her.

1.title: FR - Amandine Malabul, sorcière maladroite - S01E06 - The Great Wizard's Visit
1.plot: Miss Cackle isn't herself when the Great Wizard visits, leaving her job in jeopardy.

1.title: FR - Amandine Malabul, sorcière maladroite - S01E07 - The Best Teacher
1.plot: Mildred learns not to take shortcuts when a wisdom spell goes wrong.

1.title: FR - Amandine Malabul, sorcière maladroite - S01E08 - Maud's Big Mistake
1.plot: Maud’s panic about parent’s evening pushes her to use a forgetting powder, meanwhile Mildred wonders if her mum is a witch after all.

1.title: FR - Amandine Malabul, sorcière maladroite - S01E09 - The First Witch
1.plot: Mildred goes on a hair-raising journey while looking into her magical heritage, meanwhile Ethel thinks she's queen bee when she grows a wart.

1.title: FR - Amandine Malabul, sorcière maladroite - S01E10 - Spelling Bee
1.plot: There is more than just the Spelling Bee at stake when Miss Hardbroom's rival comes to Cackle's Academy. Meanwhile, Maud and Enid try to help Tabby to catch mice but make things much worse.

1.title: FR - Amandine Malabul, sorcière maladroite - S01E11 - The Mists of Time
1.plot: Mildred learns about Cackle's history when she and Ethel accidently slip into the Cackle's of the past.

1.title: FR - Amandine Malabul, sorcière maladroite - S01E12 - Out of Bounds
1.plot: As the end of year exams loom, Miss Cackle’s secret is still weighing heavy on Mildred’s mind.

1.title: FR - Amandine Malabul, sorcière maladroite - S01E13 - The Worst Headmistress
1.plot: Agatha takes over the school, and without Mildred there, who will save the day?

meta.plot: Négociatrice au sein des forces d’intervention de la police de Stockholm, Eva Thörnblad se rend à Silverhöjd pour régler la succession de son père Johan, riche industriel avec qui elle a rompu tout contact depuis la disparition de sa fille Josefine. Sept ans après les faits et alors que le petit Anton s’est volatilisé, la jeune femme décide de reprendre son enquête. Elle fait la connaissance de Göran Wass, dépêché sur les lieux pour aider la police locale à retrouver le garçonnet. Un soir, en traversant la forêt en voiture, Eva manque de percuter une jeune fille blonde qui ressemble à Josefine…Jordskott, la forêt des disparus

1.title: FR - Jordskott : La forêt des disparus - S01E01 - Part I
1.plot: Criminal inspector Eva Thörnblad returns to her home town of Silverhöjd for the first time in seven years, since her daughter disappeared there without trace. Officially, she's there to arrange her father's funeral, but she has an other motive. Yet another child has disappeared and Eva believes that the perpetrator may be the one who took her daughter.

1.title: FR - Jordskott : La forêt des disparus - S01E02 - Part II
1.plot: The girl that Eva almost drove over turns out to be suffering from some mysterious illness. Can she be Eva's daughter, Josefine, who disappeared seven years ago? And who, in that case, is behind her disappearance? In search of answers, Eva gets in touch with former police officer, Olof Gran, who has a strange enough theory, to say the least. Eva's investigation proves to be more dangerous than she'd imagined.

1.title: FR - Jordskott : La forêt des disparus - S01E03 - Part III
1.plot: The girl who Eva is convinced is her daughter has disappeared from the hospital, and with the lack of leads Eva hooks up with the local police force in the hunt for the man thought to be behind both kidnappings and murders in Silverhöjd. Could it be the man in the pickup van that Eva saw both in the woods and on the ferry? At the Thörnblad farmstead Eva makes a shocking discovery.

1.title: FR - Jordskott : La forêt des disparus - S01E04 - Part IV
1.plot: Someone has got into the Thörnblad farm and has left something there for Eva. Who has been there? And how did they manage to get into the house when doors and windows were locked? Could Eva be on the verge of saving Josefine?  What price has to be paid for it in this case? Göran Wass seems to have his own agenda in Silverhöjd. Who is he working for actually?

1.title: FR - Jordskott : La forêt des disparus - S01E05 - Part V
1.plot: Josefine's condition is just getting worse by the moment and Eva is faced their life's hardest choice, she must choose between her daughter and another girl. How far is Eva willing to go to save the life of the one she loves the most? Meanwhile, Ylva gets an unexpected visitor and Tom is doing his level best to find Esmeralda before she ends up in danger.

1.title: FR - Jordskott : La forêt des disparus - S01E06 - Part VI
1.plot: Eva decides to set a trap for the creature from the woods, but the plan goes horribly wrong. In despair, she tells Wass what she has done. At the same time, Eva finds a secret chamber that hides great secrets and many answers.

1.title: FR - Jordskott : La forêt des disparus - S01E07 - Part VII
1.plot: Tom is in bad shape after the assault at the hearing but wants at all costs find Esmeralda.

1.title: FR - Jordskott : La forêt des disparus - S01E08 - Part VIII
1.plot: Josefine has been kidnapped by Nicklas, whose hid her in the barn. Eva struggles to master the parasite she's swallowed. She has a plan about how she'll be able to rescue the missing children and she enters into a struggle with her father's business. Meanwhile, Tom finds evidence that shocks him.

1.title: FR - Jordskott : La forêt des disparus - S01E09 - Part IX
1.plot: Eva understands more about what happened to her father. Meanwhile, new explosions in the forest has awoken the creature's anger and five children disappear from Silverhöjd children's hospital. The panic spreads and the police seem to have lost their grip completely. Tom decides to tell Wass what he's found at Eva's.

1.title: FR - Jordskott : La forêt des disparus - S01E10 - Part X
1.plot: Eva has been forced to leave Silverhöjd to save Josefine. But she returns in order to be able to, rescue the missing children at all costs. When Eva makes a miscalculation, the lives of the children, and perhaps the entire existence of Silverhöjd is at stake.

meta.plot: Trois générations de la famille de J. Paul Getty s'affrontent en 1973 alors que le petit fils de ce magnat du pétrole est kidnappé en Italie.

1.title: FR - Trust - S01E01 - The House of Getty
1.plot: Trust delves into the trials and triumphs of one of the twentieth century's most iconic dynasties, the Gettys, and explores the complexities at the heart of every family, rich or poor. The series begins in 1973 with the kidnapping of John Paul Getty III.

1.title: FR - Trust - S01E02 - Lone Star
1.plot: As word of his grandson's kidnapping spreads, J. Paul Getty sends his trusted fixer Fletcher Chace to Rome to investigate the mysterious disappearance.

1.title: FR - Trust - S01E03 - La Dolce Vita
1.plot: J. Paul Getty's refusal to pay a single, solitary cent to his grandson's captors has significant, unforeseen consequences in Italy.

1.title: FR - Trust - S01E04 - That's All Folks!
1.plot: Little Paul gets to know his captors, while Primo opens a channel of communication to Gail.

1.title: FR - Trust - S01E05 - Silenzio
1.plot: Little Paul and Angelo try to agree on their next steps, while Primo and Leonardo mobilize the local community.

1.title: FR - Trust - S01E06 - John, Chapter 11
1.plot: When a gruesome discovery is made, the Getty family fears the worst.

1.title: FR - Trust - S01E07 - Kodachrome
1.plot: Old Paul tries to follow through on his plan, Gail grows hopeful, but Big Paul obsesses about the quarrels of the past.

1.title: FR - Trust - S01E08 - In the Name of the Father
1.plot: Leonardo celebrates his son's Confirmation with Primo, Salvatore and the other Calabrians, but unresolved business casts a shadow over the special day.

1.title: FR - Trust - S01E09 - White Car in a Snowstorm
1.plot: An unexpected development prompts Gail to travel to London.

1.title: FR - Trust - S01E10 - Consequences
1.plot: The Gettys and the Italians deal with the repercussions of the kidnapping, and Chace embarks on a new journey.

1.title: FR - Superstition - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Calvin Hastings returns home to reconnect with his family, but the reunion is cut short by a string of killings perpetrated by a supernatural villain only Calvin and his family can take down.

1.title: FR - Superstition - S01E02 - The Dredge
1.plot: The Dredge sends a Trojan horse to the Hastings Funeral Home to gather information about the Ring of Solomon. Calvin and Isaac subdue the intruder, but it comes at a great cost.

1.title: FR - Superstition - S01E03 - Half Truths & Half Breeds
1.plot: Isaac sends a mysterious half-human-half-infernal to help Calvin with the fight in La Rochelle.

1.title: FR - Superstition - S01E04 - Through The Looking Glass
1.plot: While on a case, May is sucked into a mysterious mirror world, and the Hastings must save her before the witch that inhabits the mirror world escapes using May's comatose body as a free ride. Bea, Garvey and Tilly grapple with how to properly bury a known racist.

1.title: FR - Superstition - S01E05 - Tangled Web
1.plot: The Hastings are visited by a local mystic, Aunt Nancy, who believes she has the answer to defeating The Dredge.

1.title: FR - Superstition - S01E06 - Dr. Dredge M.D.
1.plot: The Dredge returns, but this time he inhabits the body of May's old flame, Dr. Kim; Calvin trains; Garvey grapples with her parents' rekindled romance.

1.title: FR - Superstition - S01E07 - Echoes of My Mind
1.plot: The Dredge captures Calvin and tries to torture him into releasing the evil demons imprisoned in his ring; the Dredge's minions descend on the town's Founders Day Festival.

1.title: FR - Superstition - S01E08 - You're Not My Momma
1.plot: Calvin and the gang take on a demonic doll intent on finding justice for her recently deceased, surrogate mom; Isaac strikes an unlikely truce with Mayor Bickley.

1.title: FR - Superstition - S01E09 - Uncle Bubba
1.plot: Garvey and Russ venture into an old house designed by a mysterious clock demon, who traps them inside; Calvin, Isaac, May and Bea's cousin Leon try to free them.

1.title: FR - Superstition - S01E10 - Green-on-Blue
1.plot: Calvin tries to get to the bottom of some mysterious deaths at a nearby military base; Garvey and Russ experiment with her powers; Tilly buries her recently deceased mother.

1.title: FR - Superstition - S01E11 - Back to One
1.plot: The Hastings family is trapped in a time loop designed to end in their deaths unless they can find the root of the loop and break the spell.

1.title: FR - Superstition - S01E12 - Resurrection
1.plot: The Dredge possesses Calvin to break free of the Ring of Solomon and re-inhabit his original body.

meta.plot: Une famille aux dons surnaturels se bat pour préserver sa petite ville du Sud des États-Unis des esprits malins et autres funestes intrusions de l'au-delà.

Londres, 1827. Alors que la police fluviale de la Tamise vient d’appréhender des trafiquants d’opium, le cadavre d’un enfant est découvert. L’inspecteur John Marlott est horrifié quand il découvre qu’il s’agit en fait d’un grotesque assemblage de différents corps. Son enquête à la poursuite du tueur va le mener dans les bas-fonds du Londres du 19ème siècle, un monde fait de prostitution, trafic de drogue, kidnapping, meurtres… mais aussi dans les hautes sphères médicales et politiques à l’heure où le progrès scientifique est en marche.  Une chose est sûre : un pouvoir diabolique est à l’œuvre dans la ville, et apparemment il tente de réanimer les morts dans une curieuse parodie du roman Frankenstein.

1.title: FR - The Frankenstein Chronicles - S01E01 - A World Without God
1.plot: The police apprehend a gang of opium smugglers on the banks of the Thames, but as he stands at the water's edge, Inspector John Marlott makes a shocking discovery. The body of a dead child is washed up on the shore, but further examination of the corpse reveals a grotesque state of mutilation. Home Secretary Sir Robert Peel orders Marlott to lead the investigation, while details of the investigation must remain confidential.

1.title: FR - The Frankenstein Chronicles - S01E02 - Seeing Things
1.plot: After his discovery on the banks of the Thames, Inspector Marlott visits the house of artist and printmaker William Blake, who is on his deathbed. Later, Marlott confers with Nightingale, a local policeman who has been keeping watch on The Fortune of War, a public house where body snatchers are known to gather. The pair create a plan to capture a person of interest who may be able to aid them with their investigation.

1.title: FR - The Frankenstein Chronicles - S01E03 - All the Lost Children
1.plot:
Having escaped the clutches of Billy Oates, Flora throws herself on Marlott's mercy. Believing her to be a key witness to Alice's disappearance, he brings her to his lodgings for safety.

As the investigation continues, Marlott travels to Kentish Town to interrogate Mary Shelley. The connectionbetween her monster and the child corpse cannot be a mere coincidence…

1.title: FR - The Frankenstein Chronicles - S01E04 - The Fortunes of War
1.plot:
Marlott takes a terrified Pritty on their assignation to meet the men who kill for money – they find themselves in the tunnels under Smithfield market, which run from the Fortune of War pub to St Bart's Hospital.

Flora has returned to Marlott's lodgings, but now she is back Marlott intends to use her as bait for the murderous gang, much against Nightingale's wishes.

1.title: FR - The Frankenstein Chronicles - S01E05 - The Frankenstein Murders
1.plot: Boz publishes a newspaper article about the murders which causes a public outcry and infuriates Peel on the eve of the Anatomy Act. Mary Shelley, the author of Frankenstein, follows her own line of enquiry into the medical practice of Sir William Chester, uncovering secrets from the past. Marlott decides to go back to Greenwich where it all began - is there something he is missing?

1.title: FR - The Frankenstein Chronicles - S01E06 - Lost and Found
1.plot: Marlott finally pieces together the movements at the hospital, but the number of suspects continue to plague his mind. Robert Peel meets with William Chester. Marlott gets authorization to use a pistol.

2.title: FR - The Frankenstein Chronicles - S02E01 - Prodigal Son
2.plot: London 1830. John Marlott escapes the Bethlem Hospital seeking his revenge on Lord Daniel Hervey.  The hunter soon becomes the hunted.

2.title: FR - The Frankenstein Chronicles - S02E02 - Not John Marlott
2.plot: John Marlott adopts a new identity and gains employment.  He believes someone is lying about the recent murders of local clergymen and he is determined to uncover the truth in his search for justice.

2.title: FR - The Frankenstein Chronicles - S02E03 - Seeing the Dead
2.plot: Marlott is convinced that Billy Oates and the origin of the fever killing local families will lead him to Lord Daniel Hervey.

2.title: FR - The Frankenstein Chronicles - S02E04 - Little Boy Lost
2.plot: An unexpected encounter with the mysterious Frederick Dipple suggests that Marlott needs to protect his allies, who he realizes are increasingly in danger.

2.title: FR - The Frankenstein Chronicles - S02E05 - The Marriage of Heaven and Hell
2.plot: Marlott's new intelligence brings him closer to a solution and leads him to an apparently deserted tower. However, there are darker and colder dangers inside.

2.title: FR - The Frankenstein Chronicles - S02E06 - Bride of Frankenstein
2.plot: As the police close in John Marlott needs to rescue Esther from Hervey and Dipple, and resurrect both his own and her fortunes in an epic season finale.

meta.plot:
Lors d'une séance de rêve artificiel, un homme nommé Johnson retrouve la mémoire : il est en fait un aventurier redoutable supposé mort. Il découvre ensuite que son bras gauche dissimule une arme redoutable, le rayon delta Psychogun. Après avoir retrouvé son identité, Cobra décide qu'il est temps de reprendre sa vie de flibustier galactique en affrontant de nouveau la terrible Guilde des Pirates de l'Espace. Le robot à la personnalité féminine du nom d'Armanoïde qui l'accompagnait autrefois accepte de l'assister dans sa tâche…

Cobra est une série d'animation japonaise en trente-et-un épisodes de vingt-quatre minutes, créée par Buichi Terasawa d'après le space opera et manga éponyme. Elle a été diffusée pour la première fois au Japon le 7 octobre 1982 sur Fuji Television et en France le 20 février 1985 dans l'émission Cabou Cadin sur Canal+.

1.title: FR - Valérian et Laureline - S01E01 - Time Matters
1.plot: In the year 2417 new space time agent Valerian embarks on his first voyage. In the year 912 he meets the irrepressible Laureline. Despite the best of intentions, they find that they have somehow changed the future and there is much to set aright.

1.title: FR - Valérian et Laureline - S01E02 - Wrong Time Wrong Place
1.plot: After arriving at Central Point, Valerian and Laureline encounter Prince Baral of Aldebaran, who’s on the run from Gork Yodol, an evil tyrant with plans to conquer the galaxy. The partners help the prince escape to his embassy by taking to the sewers, making a dangerous adversary of Gork in the process

1.title: FR - Valérian et Laureline - S01E03 - Modern Times
1.plot: The poverty-stricken partners are hired by three members of the strange Shingouz race to track down a “holy vase” on the planet Furbok. It turns out to be a simple task for Valerian and Laureline, but directly afterward, they're plagued by terrible relentless nightmares that are connected to the relic.

1.title: FR - Valérian et Laureline - S01E04 - Till Time Do Us Part
1.plot: Valerian and Laureline join a group of emigrants en route to Peter, a planet known as the “Promised Land”. Unbeknownst to them, however, one of their newfound friends is a spy for Vlago, which seeks to take over Peter, while another has a bomb implanted in her forehead. With friends like these, indeed...

1.title: FR - Valérian et Laureline - S01E05 - Time Is Up
1.plot: Valerian and Laureline locate a treasure for the rich Zabole, but their client betrays Laureline by leaving her out in space, while Valerian is trapped within Zabole's palace, soon to be married unwillingly to her daughter. Worse, all men who are involved with the women of the Zabole family turn to stone!

1.title: FR - Valérian et Laureline - S01E06 - Doing Time
1.plot: While in a junkyard looking for spaceship parts, Valerian finds an android called RGE, but they're both taken prisoner by Dr. Zessel. Zessel creates an android double of Valerian to pump Laureline for information, while Val and his new android buddy hatch a plot to escape the mad doctor's dungeon.

1.title: FR - Valérian et Laureline - S01E07 - The Ravages of Time
1.plot: Valerian and Laureline explore a mysterious derelict spaceship that went missing 153 years ago. Except they discover that it might not quite be devoid of life...

1.title: FR - Valérian et Laureline - S01E08 - Time Share
1.plot: Valerian rescues Prince Coren from pirates, but during their escape, his ship is damaged, forcing them to land on an uncharted planet. While looking for help, Valerian falls and bangs his head. When he comes to, though, standing over him is a female version of Coren, and this one has a major crush on Valerian.

1.title: FR - Valérian et Laureline - S01E09 - Any Time
1.plot: Valerian and Laureline are to fly a rare creature to a zoo, but before they can, it breaks out of its cage and releases a bird that bites Valerian's shoulder. The bird's poison causes insanity, then death, so it's up to Laureline to get an antidote, which requires a flower from the tree with 100,000 limbs.

1.title: FR - Valérian et Laureline - S01E10 - Time Saving
1.plot: Valerian and Laureline are hired to transport drazel eggs to a safe haven. Easy enough, except that whoever hears a drazel cry is doomed to laugh to death and the babies are due to hatch in 24 hours. Flying a shortcut through the dangerous route 188 leads to an asteroid collision and the loss of precious time.

meta.plot: Année 2417, Valérian est un jeune pilote spatio-temporel très talentueux de Galaxity, la capitale de la Terre. Pour sa première mission, il est envoyé à bord du vaisseau « Tempus Fugit » en Normandie le 5 avril 912. Au cours de cette expédition, il modifie bien malgré lui le passé en sauvant une jeune et belle saltimbanque prénommée Laureline, enfreignant ainsi la loi n°3 des voyages dans le temps. Après avoir pris la fuite face à un cruel seigneur, ils retournent tous deux en 2417 où ils découvrent que la Terre a disparu.

1.title: FR - Vision d'Escaflowne - S01E01 - Fateful Confession
