2.title: FR - Rivalités mortelles - S02E10 - Built for Murder
2.plot: Las Vegas is a playground for top female fitness competitors. Winning is important, and when jealousy spirals out of control, one woman loses her life.

meta.plot: Découvrez les méandres du fonctionnement des relations féminines et de la rivalité qui les oppose parfois. Comment ces dynamiques peuvent-elles mener à des actes de violence ?

Adaptée des romans éponymes, elle raconte les aventures de la famille Grace (les jumeaux, Jared et Simon, leur sœur, Mallory, et leur mère, Helen) quand elle emménage dans la maison ancestrale, à l’abandon, et le mystère qui plane sur l’arrière-arrière-oncle. Celui-ci avait découvert l’existence d’un monde parallèle, alternativement féerique… et un peu inquiétant.

1.title: FR - Les chroniques de Spiderwick - S01E01 - Welcome to Spiderwick
1.plot: Helen and her children, 15-year-old fraternal twins Jared and Simon and their sister Mallory move to their ancestral home, Spiderwick. Jared discovers a boggart and realizes that magical creatures are real! The only one to believe him is his great-aunt Lucinda who implores Jared to find the pages of her father's field guide to magical creatures and protect them from the murderous Ogre, Mulgarath.

1.title: FR - Les chroniques de Spiderwick - S01E02 - The Field Guide to the Fantastical World Around You
1.plot: When Aunt Lucinda goes missing, Helen leads the search, leaving Mallory in charge of her brothers at Spiderwick. Jared is obsessed with finding the magical creature he saw in the attic, enlisting everyone's help to set a trap.

1.title: FR - Les chroniques de Spiderwick - S01E03 - I Will Survive
1.plot: Jared grows paranoid of the evil force conspiring to get Spiderwick's Field Guide. Taking Lucinda's warning to heart, Jared wants to find the pages with Simon alone, but Emiko, Hatcher and Calliope can't help joining the adventure.

1.title: FR - Les chroniques de Spiderwick - S01E04 - Tastes Like Chicken
1.plot: A divide between the twins widens as they split up with Emiko and Hatcher to find more pages. Calliope tries to connect with Simon. Bree tries a different approach to fencing, forcing Mallory to get out of her head and throw a party.

meta.plot: Kayla, jeune patineuse artistique talentueuse, se voit contrainte de tout abandonner quand sa famille suit Mac, son jumeau, admis dans une prestigieuse école de hockey.

1.title: FR - Zero Chill - S01E01 - Come and Take It from Me
1.plot: Mac's off to a rocky start on his quest to impress his new team. Later on, a lonely Kayla makes a connection with a mysterious skater on the ice.

1.title: FR - Zero Chill - S01E02 - Secret Skater
1.plot: While working to unmask the mystery skater, Kayla learns things about Ava and Sky that she didn't expect. Sky opens up to Mac about her past.

1.title: FR - Zero Chill - S01E03 - Sucker Punch
1.plot: Mac wants to bond with his teammates, but his arrogance keeps getting in the way. Kayla tracks down Jacob, and Ava's mom prepares a "special surprise."

1.title: FR - Zero Chill - S01E04 - Ice Breaker
1.plot: Kayla's determined to prove that she and Jacob are the perfect pair. Mac faces off with a former enemy. Ava dons a disguise to be part of the team.

1.title: FR - Zero Chill - S01E05 - We Do Our Talking on the Ice
1.plot: Sky tries to warn Kayla that Jacob has doubts — but it's mistaken for jealousy. Ava makes a big decision. Mac uncovers Kayla's plan to ruin his game.

1.title: FR - Zero Chill - S01E06 - Head Rush
1.plot: As Mac struggles to regain his confidence, Ava pushes her dad to put her on the ice. At the hospital, Holly blames Kayla for putting Sky in danger.

1.title: FR - Zero Chill - S01E07 - Triple Threat
1.plot: Elina makes Kayla an offer, and Bear and Sam get an unexpected visitor. Mac and Kayla both need Sky's support — but who will she choose?

1.title: FR - Zero Chill - S01E08 - Guilt Trip
1.plot: With team morale at an all-time low — and Mac's suffering at an all-time high — Ava makes a confession. Kayla begins her training with Elina.

1.title: FR - Zero Chill - S01E09 - This Is Happening
1.plot: The pressure's on as Kayla works hard to prove that Mac's not the only one who can win. Bear burdens Mac with a secret before the big game.

1.title: FR - Zero Chill - S01E10 - Blade Star
1.plot: Elina sees Kayla's friends and family as a distraction, but Kayla needs them now more than ever. Bear has second thoughts... but is it too late?

meta.plot: Quatre petits génies décident de créer leur propre agence de détectives, et de vloguer leurs aventures. La naissance d'une belle amitié.

1.title: FR - The InBESTigators - S01E01 - The Case of the Curious New Girl / The Case of the Disappearing Deliveries
1.plot: There's a new girl at school who makes quite an impression on Ezra -- then the Inbestigators get their very first case.

1.title: FR - The InBESTigators - S01E02 - The Case of the Missing Solar System / The Case of the Distressed Dancer
1.plot: Pixie's solar system diorama has gone missing, but did she make one in the first place? Maudie figures out who sabotaged Zac's dance recital.

1.title: FR - The InBESTigators - S01E03 - The Case of the Sleepover Secret / The Case of the Big Mouth Challenge
1.plot: Ava is devastated when Pixie stops talking to her after a sleepover. The new boy in school can fit a very big cookie in his mouth -- but how?

1.title: FR - The InBESTigators - S01E04 - The Case of the Pestering Prank Caller / The Case of the Spoiled Sports Day
1.plot: A prank caller keeps bothering Mrs. Maniaci in the middle of her soap opera. Kyle's favorite event of the year goes terribly wrong.

1.title: FR - The InBESTigators - S01E05 - The Case of the Exciting Excursion / The Case of the Very Lost Notebook
1.plot: If Miss Tan doesn't find everyone's permission slips, the class will miss their field trip! Maudie's beside herself after losing her special notebook.

1.title: FR - The InBESTigators - S01E06 - The Case of the Suspect Sprinkler / The Case of the Peculiar Pop Quiz
1.plot: Mrs. Maniaci's roses are ruined by a tampered sprinkler system. The students in Mr. Barker's class seem to be up to something.

1.title: FR - The InBESTigators - S01E07 - The Case of the Science Sabotage / The Case of the Wrecked Rehearsal
1.plot: The Inbestigators get hired to solve a mystery at the science fair, much to Ezra's delight. The star of the school play gets hurt during rehearsals.

1.title: FR - The InBESTigators - S01E08 - The Case of the Perplexing Painting / The Case of the Turtle Thief
1.plot: Someone with great aim has ruined Esther's painting. Later, the Inbestigators need to move fast -- because there's a turtle thief on the loose!

1.title: FR - The InBESTigators - S01E09 - The Case of the Misplaced Mug / The Case of the Sad Little Sister
1.plot: It's an emergency when Mr. McGillick's "World's Best Principal" mug goes missing. Poppy's lost her hat, and now she can't play outside.

1.title: FR - The InBESTigators - S01E10 - The Case of the Disoriented Drone / The Case of the Baffling Birthday
1.plot: A little girl's drone flies off and disappears -- but the Inbestigators witnessed everything. For her birthday, Maudie's dad stops by the office.

meta.plot: Les best-sellers d'Ann M. Martin sont remis au goût du jour dans cette série qui suit les aventures d'un groupe d'amies montant leur propre agence de baby-sitting.

1.title: FR - The Baby-Sitters Club - S01E01 - Kristy's Great Idea
1.plot: A creative concept comes to life as Kristy starts a club with her best friends — and a new classmate. But is she ready to be a team leader?

1.title: FR - The Baby-Sitters Club - S01E02 - Claudia and the Phantom Phone Calls
1.plot: The spooky spirit of Halloween sweeps through Stoneybrook. Meanwhile, Claudia explores budding romance and struggles to connect with her parents.

1.title: FR - The Baby-Sitters Club - S01E03 - The Truth About Stacey
1.plot: As competition heats up for the BSC, Stacey attempts to hide a personal secret and revisits a painful event from her past.

1.title: FR - The Baby-Sitters Club - S01E04 - Mary Anne Saves the Day
1.plot: After dealing with a major dad dilemma, Mary Anne makes a dynamic new friend. Later, a medical emergency puts her caretaking skills to the test.

1.title: FR - The Baby-Sitters Club - S01E05 - Dawn and the Impossible Three
1.plot: To prove herself to the BSC, Dawn agrees to babysit for a family of rowdy kids. Can she keep up with their mischief and mayhem?

1.title: FR - The Baby-Sitters Club - S01E06 - Claudia and Mean Janine
1.plot: A family emergency triggers an emotional feud between Claudia and her older sister. Elsewhere, Mary Anne works to hide her feelings.

1.title: FR - The Baby-Sitters Club - S01E07 - Boy-Crazy Stacey
1.plot: Mary Anne and Stacey team up for an out-of-town job: babysitting kids at the beach. But a cute new crush challenges business and friendship.

1.title: FR - The Baby-Sitters Club - S01E08 - Kristy's Big Day
1.plot: Stoneybrook delights in a day of glitz and glamour as Kristy's mom prepares for a big day. Later, Kristy hits a major milestone, much to her surprise.

1.title: FR - The Baby-Sitters Club - S01E09 - Hello, Camp Moosehead! (1)
1.plot: The BSC braves the great outdoors at a summer sleepaway camp, where they explore archery, theater, activism ... and a dash of chilling mystery.

1.title: FR - The Baby-Sitters Club - S01E10 - Hello, Camp Moosehead! (2)
1.plot: As Stacey deals with a new normal, Kristy leads a crucial search, Dawn and Claudia start a revolution, and Mary Anne finds her place in the spotlight.

1.title: FR - Richie Rich - S01E01 - Man$ion Warming
1.plot: Richie agrees to go to the Swedish House Sensation concert with Murray and Darcy on the same night he promised to be at family game night.

1.title: FR - Richie Rich - S01E02 - Royal Flu$h
1.plot: Richie is assigned to do a school report on a foreign country, so he contacts the king of an island to set up a "research" vacation.

1.title: FR - Richie Rich - S01E03 - The $et Up
1.plot: Richie and Harper set up their dad, Cliff, on a date. Meanwhile, Darcy and Murray decide that they should be trained as Richie's security detail.

1.title: FR - Richie Rich - S01E04 - The Wonderful Thing$ He Doe$
1.plot: When Richie struggles to write a book report on "The Wizard of Oz," his neighbor Tahj convinces him to make a major motion picture as his report.

1.title: FR - Richie Rich - S01E05 - The Madne$$ of Queen Harper
1.plot: Harper is left in charge of Richie when Cliff must leave home for the night. Meanwhile, Murray attempts to tutor Tulip in math.

1.title: FR - Richie Rich - S01E06 - More or Le$$
1.plot: After dealing with numerous disputes between his money spender, Darcy, and his money manager, Murray, Richie decides that the two must trade places.

1.title: FR - Richie Rich - S01E07 - $nowball Effect$
1.plot: Richie, Darcy and Irona go to Antarctica, seeking a new frozen life form. Meanwhile, when Tulip cancels on Harper for girls weekend, Cliff steps in.

1.title: FR - Richie Rich - S01E08 - Good Deed$
1.plot: Richie decides to volunteer at a school, but ultimately does more harm than good; Murray adopts Cliff as his big brother and tries to teach him how to be a responsible grownup.

1.title: FR - Richie Rich - S01E09 - $pooky $tuff
1.plot: Richie is convinced his room is haunted and enlists the help of Darcy, Murray and Irona to try to get rid of the "spirits."

1.title: FR - Richie Rich - S01E10 - Fir$t Love
1.plot: When Irona starts malfunctioning, Richie receives a replacement model, Urona -- and he soon develops his first crush.

meta.plot: Du jour au lendemain, Richie Rich gagne une énorme somme d'argent en transformant ses légumes en énergie verte. Une nouvelle vie remplie d'aventure s'offre à lui.
Oscar et Félix, deux hommes divorcés très différents, partagent un appartement et passent leur temps à se disputer... et se marrer !

1.title: FR - Oscar & Félix - S01E01 - The Laundry Orgy
1.plot: Felix and Oscar try to break up their poker game so that they can go out with the Pigeon sisters.

1.title: FR - Oscar & Félix - S01E02 - The Fight of the Felix
1.plot: A tough hockey player challenges Felix to a boxing match.

1.title: FR - Oscar & Félix - S01E03 - Felix Gets Sick
1.plot: Oscar's date with a stewardess is interrupted by Felix's sickness.

1.title: FR - Oscar & Félix - S01E04 - The Jury Story
1.plot: Oscar and Felix flash back to how they first met, "12 Angry Men" style.

1.title: FR - Oscar & Félix - S01E05 - The Breakup
1.plot: When Oscar throws Felix out of the apartment, he moves in with Murray, then Vinnie, and then the Pigeon sisters.

1.title: FR - Oscar & Félix - S01E06 - Oscar's Ulcer
1.plot: Oscar's ulcer begins to flare up again.

1.title: FR - Oscar & Félix - S01E07 - I Do, I Don't
1.plot: When Felix feels he's responsible for the separation of a young couple on the very day of their wedding he tries to get the stubborn couple back together

1.title: FR - Oscar & Félix - S01E08 - Oscar the Model
1.plot: A monster is created when Felix shucks Oscar into posing for a cologne ad.

1.title: FR - Oscar & Félix - S01E09 - The Big Brothers
1.plot: Oscar and Felix become big brothers to a fatherless boy.

1.title: FR - Oscar & Félix - S01E10 - It's All Over Now, Baby Bird
1.plot: Humorous story about Felix's "dead" parrot.

1.title: FR - Oscar & Félix - S01E11 - Felix is Missing
1.plot: Felix goes missing, and Oscar thinks his buddy is dead.

1.title: FR - Oscar & Félix - S01E12 - Scrooge Gets an Oscar
1.plot: In a parody of A Christmas Carol, Oscar dreams he is haunted by Felix's ghost.

1.title: FR - Son of Zorn - S01E01 - Return to Orange County
1.plot: The animated warrior Zorn travels to California to reconnect with his live-action son and discovers his ex-wife is engaged.

1.title: FR - Son of Zorn - S01E02 - Defender of Teen Love
1.plot: Zorn uses the Stone of Sight to help Alan with his crush, while Edie tells Zorn to move his boxes out of the garage.

1.title: FR - Son of Zorn - S01E03 - War in the Workplace
1.plot: Zorn tries to rally his co-workers when he sees someone stealing hot sauce from the break room and Alan is afraid of showing his legs in gym class during swim unit.

1.title: FR - Son of Zorn - S01E04 - The Weekend Warrior
1.plot: Zorn tries to be a cool dad when Alan spends the weekend with him, only for Alan's friend Jeff to show up.

1.title: FR - Son of Zorn - S01E05 - A Taste of Zephyria
1.plot: Zorn tries to teach Alan about Zephyria, while Edie fights her new neighbors over their talking garden gnome.

1.title: FR - Son of Zorn - S01E06 - A Tale of Two Zorns
1.plot: Zorn uses his body double dummy "Meka-Zorn" to sneak out of work and wait in line for the latest video game in a series that has Alan and Craig bonding, while Edie and Linda take their frustrations with Zorn out on the dummy.

1.title: FR - Son of Zorn - S01E07 - The Battle of Thanksgiving
1.plot: Zorn crashes Edie's Thanksgiving dinner to prove to her mother that he's mature.

1.title: FR - Son of Zorn - S01E08 - Return of the Drinking Buddy
1.plot: Zorn's old friend Headbutt Man is coming to Orange County, only he's now sober. Alan is invited to a party being attended by Nancy, but he has to bring Headbutt Man's daughter with him.

1.title: FR - Son of Zorn - S01E09 - The War On Grafelnik
1.plot: Torn between Christmas and Grafelnik - the Zephyrian holiday of revenge - Alan plays his parents against each other to get better presents.

1.title: FR - Son of Zorn - S01E10 - Radioactive Ex-Girlfriend
1.plot: Zorn reconnects with his radioactive ex-girlfriend Radiana as Craig and Edie prepare for their engagement party.

1.title: FR - Son of Zorn - S01E11 - The Battle of Self-Acceptance
1.plot: Craig asks Zorn to help him become a warrior thinking he's not man enough for Edie.

1.title: FR - Son of Zorn - S01E12 - The Quest for Craig
FR - Son of Zorn - S01E13 - All Hail Son of Zorn

meta.plot: Le légendaire guerrier animé Zorn revient sur la planète Terre après dix  ans d'absence. Un retour qui ne se fait pas sans difficultés, puisqu'il  va devoir reconquérir son ex-femme, ainsi que regagner l'affection de  son fils désormais adolescent. Il prend la décision de rester en  Californie, se dénichant un appartement en banlieue et un emploi  ennuyeux dans la vente de savons.

Une jeune fille, nommée Carter, apprend incidemment que sa mère n'est pas sa génitrice, et qu'elle a en réalité été enlevée à l'âge de trois ans par cette femme qui l'a élevée. Ayant retrouvé la trace de sa famille biologique, elle va rencontrer sa sœur jumelle et son petit frère.

1.title: FR - Finding Carter - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: 16 year old Carter's life is turned upside down when she learns that the mom who raised her is actually her abductor. But after being reunited with her real family, she learns there's more to her kidnapping than meets the eye.

1.title: FR - Finding Carter - S01E02 - The Birds
1.plot: Carter and her new friends plan to trick the police, while an old friend tries to stay in her life, and her relationship with Elizabeth continues to be strained.

1.title: FR - Finding Carter - S01E03 - Drive
1.plot: Bad boy crash enters Carter's life and causes drama in the Wilson family. David continues to sneakily pursue writing his book with his publicist.

1.title: FR - Finding Carter - S01E04 - Now You See Me
1.plot: Bird's painting at her art show upsets Carter, Elizabeth's relationship with David gets even rockier, and a piece of Carter's old life returns.

1.title: FR - Finding Carter - S01E05 - The Heat
1.plot: Carter's ulterior motives backfire when she spends a day with Elizabeth and sees another side of her. David continues to move along with his book plan, and Taylor is initiated into the group during a wild game of 7 Minutes in Heaven.

1.title: FR - Finding Carter - S01E06 - The Fugitive
1.plot: Carter admits to having feelings for Crash; Crash plans to skip bail to avoid jail time.

1.title: FR - Finding Carter - S01E07 - Throw Momma From the Train
1.plot: Carter and Taylor celebrate their birthdays together for the first time since they were toddlers.

1.title: FR - Finding Carter - S01E08 - Half Baked
1.plot: Elizabeth is confronted with the truth, and David makes a shocking request of his wife. The Wilson children try to cope with the drama together, and Carter finds out she was lied to by someone she trusts.

1.title: FR - Finding Carter - S01E09 - Do the Right Thing
1.plot: David has to face up to his lies, while Taylor decides she's ready to take the next step in her relationship with Max. Ofe deals with money troubles, and Carter is blamed for something she didn't do.

1.title: FR - Finding Carter - S01E10 - Love Story
1.plot: Grant and Tyler are furious when Elizabeth chooses to take extreme actions to find her daughter; Carter's choice becomes one of life or death.

1.title: FR - Finding Carter - S01E11 - The Long Goodbye
1.plot: Everyone remains stunned by the previous night's events; Carter's loyalties are tested.

1.title: FR - Finding Carter - S01E12 - One Hour Photo
1.plot: Carter uncovers secrets that could unsettle her family; Max and Taylor's relationship may come to a breaking point.

meta.plot: Quatre ans après sa mort, Kieren Walker reprend sa place au sein de sa famille et retrouve ses marques dans le village où il a toujours vécu. Personne pensait le revoir un jour. Seulement peu de temps après son décès, par une étrange nuit, des milliers de personnes décédées se sont réveillées. Après des mois de réadaptation et de médication, ces zombies sont aujourd'hui rendus à leurs familles...

1.title: FR - In the Flesh - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Partially Deceased Syndrome sufferer Kieren Walker returns home to the cauldron of Roarton, but doesn't receive a warm welcome from all. His parents, Steve and Sue, are undoubtedly pleased to see him, but his sister, Jem, isn't so ready to pick up where they left off when Kieren died back in 2009. Meanwhile, the zombie-hating Human Volunteer Force, led by the violent Bill Macy, are ready to take action against any PDS sufferer reintegrated on their patch.

1.title: FR - In the Flesh - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Feeling trapped at home, Kieren escapes to his grave where he is reunited with his old hunting partner, Amy Dyer, who persuades him to take a dangerous day trip. After fleeing when he is spotted, Kieren discovers that Rick, his former best mate who died in Afghanistan, is back in town and is persuaded by Amy to go and see him at partisan local pub, The Legion. After an awkward reunion, Kieren finds himself on an HVF hunting mission in the woods, where the night patrol has reported live rabid zombies roaming free.

1.title: FR - In the Flesh - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: After visiting the supermarket where he used to hunt with Amy, Kieren remembers that Jem once spared his life. Together, brother and sister confront the demons in their pasts and visit Mr and Mrs Lancaster. Kieren feels momentarily better, but then has to say goodbye to Amy who is leaving Roarton in search of The Prophet. Will Kieren and Rick be able to find peace and acceptance as PDS sufferers in this highly-charged new world?

2.title: FR - In the Flesh - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: Kieren is overjoyed by Amy's return, but has misgivings about her friend Simon.

2.title: FR - In the Flesh - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: Kieren's dreams of escaping Roarton are dashed by Maxine. Jem is humiliated at school.

2.title: FR - In the Flesh - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: Kieren's relationship with Simon takes an unexpected turn.

2.title: FR - In the Flesh - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: Kieren makes a confession which sends shockwaves through the Walker family.

2.title: FR - In the Flesh - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: Kieren is a victim of Roarton's increasing Undead persecution.

2.title: FR - In the Flesh - S02E06 - Episode 6
2.plot: Kieren faces his darkest fears when he turns rabid. Danger descends on PDS sufferers.

meta.plot: Une jeune fille possédant des pouvoirs se voit protégée par un homme tout juste sorti de prison, alors que certaines personnes sont prêtes à tout pour la traquer.

1.title: FR - Believe - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Since she was born, Bo has had gifts she could neither fully understand nor control. But now that she is 10, her powers have become stronger and the threat from malevolent forces that would use her abilities to control the world has grown more dangerous. With her life and future in jeopardy, Bo’s protectors turn to an unlikely source to keep her safe – Tate, a wrongfully imprisoned death row inmate who’s lost his will. Tate and Bo begin an extraordinary journey, changing the lives of everyone they meet as they keep moving to stay one step ahead of the sinister forces after Bo’s power.

1.title: FR - Believe - S01E02 - Beginner's Luck
1.plot: On the run and in desperate need of money, Tate takes Bo to Atlantic City, where she instantly bonds with a struggling mother and her sick child. The involvement of the FBI complicates Skouras’ efforts to covertly recover Bo, while Winter and Channing work to stay one step ahead.

1.title: FR - Believe - S01E03 - Origin
1.plot: Trapped in Manhattan, Bo and Tate encounter a wealthy woman mourning the decades-old loss of her son.

1.title: FR - Believe - S01E04 - Defection
1.plot: As the dragnet closes, Tate puts his freedom at risk to help Bo find the writer of a long-lost love letter. Meanwhile, Winter makes preparations for an escape from Manhattan as Skouras and Agent Ferrell ramp up the effort to bring Tate and Bo into custody.

1.title: FR - Believe - S01E05 - White Noise
1.plot: Bo and Tate resurface in Philadelphia where Bo is drawn toward a young woman and her husband, a blogger whose unrelenting pursuit of a mysterious story is threatening to tear the couple apart. Meanwhile, Skouras takes forceful action to track down a traitor within Orchestra.

1.title: FR - Believe - S01E06 - Sinking
1.plot: With Bo, Winter and Channing in pursuit, Tate travels home to seek out the childhood friends who framed him for murder. Meanwhile at the Orchestra campus, Skouras focuses his attention on the potential of a young telepath.

1.title: FR - Believe - S01E07 - Bang and Blame
1.plot: After an intense confrontation with Zepeda leaves Bo vulnerable, Winter turns to guardians from Bo’s past to protect her once again. As Tate and Winter take risky action to help Bo, revisiting the girl’s past reveals surprising information about Channing’s history. At Orchestra, Skouras pushes Sean to control his telekinetic abilities, with dangerous results.

1.title: FR - Believe - S01E08 - Together
1.plot: Worried that Skouras has developed the ability to locate Bo, Winter sends Channing on a mission to infiltrate the Orchestra campus. Despite Winter’s instructions to keep a low profile, Bo is compelled to help a family man who is in over his head.

1.title: FR - Believe - S01E09 - Prodigy
1.plot: Tate’s efforts to keep Bo focused on her training are sidetracked when Bo has a premonition of a young musical prodigy dying in a car crash. In the wake of Channing’s capture, Winter sets a risky contingency plan in motion. At Orchestra, Skouras tests the powers of Dani, a newly discovered telepath.

1.title: FR - Believe - S01E10 - Collapse
1.plot: When Bo has a premonition of a tragic event in the New York City subway, she convinces Tate to help her in stopping her vision from becoming reality. A confrontation with FBI Agent Ferrell in the subway station quickly changes course when an explosion leaves them trapped underground. Meanwhile, Dani proves herself to Skouras as she settles into her new home at Orchestra.

1.title: FR - Métal Hurlant - S01E01 - King's Crown
1.plot: In an alternate universe, a tournament is held, to determine the successor sovereign. The fighting takes place under the eyes of the king robot.

1.title: FR - Métal Hurlant - S01E02 - Shelter Me
1.plot: A woman regains consciousness in a bomb shelter. Her only companion, a man tells her that the end of the world just happened.

1.title: FR - Métal Hurlant - S01E03 - Red Light / Cold Hard Facts
1.plot: A man tries to escape from a prison located on a distant planet. In 2312, scientists discovered a cryogenically frozen man of the twentieth century.

1.title: FR - Métal Hurlant - S01E04 - Three on a Match
1.plot: Three survivors on a sinking spaceship, competing for scarce oxygen supply on their rescue shuttle whose hull is damaged.

1.title: FR - Métal Hurlant - S01E05 - Master of Destiny
1.plot: Two mercenaries are found on the planet Masters of Doom, which, according to legend, know the date of death of all living beings.

1.title: FR - Métal Hurlant - S01E06 - Pledge of Anya
1.plot: A demon has escaped and is about to surface in humans. A warrior is sending to the world of mortals.

2.title: FR - Métal Hurlant - S02E01 - The Endomorphe
2.plot: When a world is devastated by intergalactic war, a savior is sought.

2.title: FR - Métal Hurlant - S02E02 - Whiskey in the Jar
2.plot: A small-town sheriff receives a visit from a doctor with a talent for saving lives. But there may be more to the "talent" than meets the eye.

2.title: FR - Métal Hurlant - S02E03 - Second Chance
2.plot: Joe, a notorious gambler, is chased by the galaxy's most notorious creditor. How will he escape - or will he get a second chance?

2.title: FR - Métal Hurlant - S02E04 - Loyal Khondor
2.plot: A loyal warrior seeks a magical elixir to cure his Princess of the dreaded "cold disease".

2.title: FR - Métal Hurlant - S02E05 - Second Son
2.plot: Two brothers battle for control of a kingdom with unique values about life and death.

2.title: FR - Métal Hurlant - S02E06 - Back to Reality
2.plot: A so-called "dream fixer" helps his wealthy clients transport themselves into new realities and worlds.

meta.plot: Le dernier fragment d’une planète réduite en poussière par la folie destructrice de ses habitants, est condamné à errer dans l’univers pour l’éternité. Désormais il apporte souffrance et tromperie à ceux qui croisent son chemin. Ce messager maudit s’appelle : LE METAL HURLANT

1.title: FR - Star-Crossed - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: When Emery Whitehill was 6 years old, an alien spacecraft crash-landed in her small town and she met Roman, a 6-year old Atrian boy, who sought refuge with her before being taken away by the authorities. Ten years later, the two are reunited as the first group of Atrian teens is about to enroll in high school in a widely scrutinized social experiment to see if humans and Atrians can live in peace. Both Emery and Roman are surprised at the small-mindedness of their respective communities. Roman’s sister, Sophia, is excited to make new friends, but their fellow Atrians, Teri and Drake, openly distrust all humans. The human students are equally wary of the aliens, especially the school’s queen bee Taylor. Kind-hearted Grayson is drawn to Emery but has a secret that could threaten their new friendship. Only two of Emery’s friends – Julia and Lukas, seem able to accept the Atrians. Emery and Roman find themselves drawn together again but outside forces work hard to keep them apart.

1.title: FR - Star-Crossed - S01E02 - These Violent Delights Have Violent Ends
1.plot: Roman and Sophia prepare for a funeral. Roman is surprised and suspicious when his Uncle Castor shows up in the sector offering to help the family. Meanwhile, Emery tries to talk to Roman about what happened, but he doesn’t want anything to do with her. Upset, Emery turns to Grayson. Meanwhile, the Atrian Seven are invited to the school carnival. However, the fun ends after Drake is kidnapped and Roman finds out the Trags are preparing a hit on Emery and her family at the carnival.

1.title: FR - Star-Crossed - S01E03 - Our Toil Shall Strive To Mend
1.plot: It’s the tenth anniversary of “Arrival Day” and the town is preparing a commemoration for the fallen soldiers. Gloria selects a small group of human teenagers who will spend some time inside the sector to see what it’s like to be an Atrian for a day. In addition, Gloria assigns Emery the task of filming the interactions. While Grayson offers to help her with the project, Roman strongly objects to Emery going inside the sector. Despite Roman’s concern for her safety, Emery decides to move forward with the project. While Sophia is excited to show everyone around her pod, Teri and Drake resent the intrusion and decide to have a little fun at the humans’ expense. However, when Drake is kidnapped during the tour, he’s surprised by who is behind the abduction. Meanwhile, Julia confronts Roman with her suspicions about cyper.

1.title: FR - Star-Crossed - S01E04 - And Left No Friendly Drop
FR - Star-Crossed - S01E05 - Dreamers Often Lie
FR - Star-Crossed - S01E06 - Stabbed With a White Wench's Black Eye
FR - Star-Crossed - S01E07 - To Seek a Foe
FR - Star-Crossed - S01E08 - An Old Accustom'd Feast
FR - Star-Crossed - S01E09 - Some Consequence Yet Hanging in the Stars
FR - Star-Crossed - S01E11 - Give Me a Torch
FR - Star-Crossed - S01E12 - This Trick May Chance to Scathe You
FR - Star-Crossed - S01E13 - Passion Lends Them Power

meta.plot: Une nuit, un vaisseau extraterrestre s'écrase dans une ville de l'Illinois. Une fillette nommée Emery âgée de 6 ans, se retrouve nez à nez avec un alien qu'elle décide d'héberger à l’insu de ses parents. Celui-ci est rapidement retrouvé et se fait tirer dessus. 10 ans plus tard, neuf Atriens (aliens) sont sélectionnés pour voir s’ils peuvent s’adapter à la vie humaine. Parmi eux, Roman, l’alien que Emery avait caché !

Norskov est une série policière dramatique qui se déroule dans une ville industrielle au nord du Danemark. Une ville sombre et triste, marquée par la crise financière mais dont l’esprit communautaire et solidaire est toujours présent. Nous y suivons l’officier Tom Noack, qui retourne dans cette ville qu’il a quitté 20 ans plus tôt, ainsi que ses deux amis d’enfance entre-temps devenus respectivement maire et maître d’oeuvre.

1.title: FR - Norskov : Dans le secret des glaces - S01E01 - Tom Comes Home
1.plot: The town mayor is close to realizing his dream of regenerating a town that is burdened with a problem: drug consumption is spiraling out of control and needs to be stopped at all costs.

1.title: FR - Norskov : Dans le secret des glaces - S01E02 - Diana's Son
1.plot: Tom puts together a special investigation unit, while also supporting friends and family in the face of tragedy. A simple mistake puts Martin’s visionary project at risk.

1.title: FR - Norskov : Dans le secret des glaces - S01E03 - Oliver's Father
1.plot: Tom’s investigation reveals that an acquaintance of a big Swedish drug dealer has moved to town. The case is looking bigger than he first presumed. Oliver is struggling to cope.

1.title: FR - Norskov : Dans le secret des glaces - S01E04 - Jackie Noack
1.plot: Tom and his team get a break in their investigations. Tom’s professional life and his commitment to Oliver and his sister Jackie is getting harder and harder to balance.

1.title: FR - Norskov : Dans le secret des glaces - S01E05 - Martin’s Remorse
1.plot: Tom and his team have a chance to capture two of the smugglers but instead decide to pursue the investigation and go after the kingpin. Martin tells Oliver the truth.

1.title: FR - Norskov : Dans le secret des glaces - S01E06 - Tom’s Suspicion
1.plot: Martin and Oliver’s story is made public which threatens Martin’s business plans, not to mention the dream he and Jackie have. Tom suspects the drug kingpin is someone local.

1.title: FR - Norskov : Dans le secret des glaces - S01E07 - Bondy’s Nephew
1.plot: Bondy takes Oliver under his wing. Martin is struggling at work and at home. Tom’s investigation seems to be falling apart due to a lack of concrete evidence.

1.title: FR - Norskov : Dans le secret des glaces - S01E08 - Oliver’s Battle
1.plot: Martin's business plans are spiralling out of control. Oliver discovers some unpleasant news and Tom begins to connect people, places, and dates in his investigations.

1.title: FR - Norskov : Dans le secret des glaces - S01E09 - Casper’s Dream
1.plot: Tom and his team are close to catching the kingpin, they are just waiting for the right moment to strike. Oliver grows ever suspicious about his Mother’s death.

1.title: FR - Norskov : Dans le secret des glaces - S01E10 - Heart and Star
1.plot: Oliver learns a secret that has fatal consequences. Tom and his team receive backup from the task force and close in on the drug smugglers operation.

1.title: FR - The Secret River - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: In 1813 ex-convict Will Thornhill settles on the beautiful Hawkesbury River. But his plans are soon overshadowed by misunderstandings and conflict with the local Indigenous people.

1.title: FR - The Secret River - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Will's increasing desperation to hold onto 'his' land despite the resistance of the local Indigenous people, leads to his involvement in a brutal incident which will haunt him forever.

meta.plot: En 1806, Will Thornhill, batelier sur la Tamise, est condamné à l’exil à vie après le vol d’une cargaison de bois. Il commence à purger sa peine en Nouvelle-Galles du Sud (le premier État d’Australie). Comme beaucoup de condamnés, il est amnistié au bout de quelques années et après l’acquisition de ses premiers hectares, il part s’installer avec Sal, son épouse, au bord du fleuve Hawkesbury. Mais un problème de taille se dresse au nouveau projet de vie de Will Thornhill : bien qu’il n’y ait nulle trace de barrières ou d’habitations, la parcelle appartient au territoire Darug, une nation aborigène présente sur place depuis 40 000 ans qui n'abandonnera pas ses terres...

Lorsqu'un objet mystérieux s'écrase sur Terre en plein désert, la déflagration libère une vague d'énergie solaire qui arrête un à un les coeurs de personnes apparemment déconnectées les unes des autres. Quelques minutes plus tard, elles se réveillent toutes, changées, et découvrent qu'elles ont désormais pour mission d'empêcher la future et inéluctable Apocalypse. Elles sont les messagers...

1.title: FR - The Messengers - S01E01 - Awakening
1.plot: In the white-hot sun of the New Mexico desert, scientist Vera Buckley watches in fascination as a mysterious object plummets to Earth and explodes in a blinding flash, sending out a shock wave that briefly stops Vera’s heart and panics her techie coworker Alan Harris.

1.title: FR - The Messengers - S01E02 - Strange Magic
1.plot: Drawn together by destiny, Vera, Erin, Joshua, Raul and Peter convene together where they meet the mysterious Rose. Rose reveals that they are angels and their mission is to find and stop the Four Horsemen of the Apocalypse from bringing about the Rapture. Meanwhile, The Man’s real identity is revealed and he continues to tempt Vera with clues about her missing son.

1.title: FR - The Messengers - S01E03 - Path to Paradise
1.plot: On the hunt for the Horseman of War, Joshua, Erin and Peter make great strides for the group. Raul and Vera are more hesitant to believe and when they stray, there are unforeseen consequences. But when Vera discovers her gift, she finally starts to rethink her purpose.

1.title: FR - The Messengers - S01E04 - Drums of War
1.plot: The friends need to identify the Horseman of War and his victim whilst at an international energy summit.

1.title: FR - The Messengers - S01E05 - Eye in the Sky
1.plot: Erin wants peace as Amy celebrayes her birthday. Joshua tries to jumpstart his visions.

1.title: FR - The Messengers - S01E06 - Metamorphosis
1.plot: As the fully united Messengers work to track down the Second Horseman of the Apocalypse, Alan and Vera continue their quest to uncover the genesis stone’s secrets. Meanwhile, Erin begins to discover the price of her gift.

1.title: FR - The Messengers - S01E07 - Deus Ex Machina
1.plot: As the Messengers race to stop the next Horseman, they uncover a cyber plot to kill thousands. Meanwhile, Joshua finds he can no longer escape his past.

1.title: FR - The Messengers - S01E08 - A House Divided
1.plot: The Messengers struggle to stay together and on mission when an unforeseen setback causes them to question whether being an Angel is causing them more harm than good. In the process of pursuing their own desires, the Messengers discover that destiny has a strange way of bringing them back together.

1.title: FR - The Messengers - S01E09 - Death Becomes Her
1.plot: The Man informs the Messengers one of their own has betrayed them and another is in imminent danger, while Amy's drawings predict the arrival of someone who could change the course of everyone's destinies.

1.title: FR - The Messengers - S01E10 - Why We Fight
1.plot: The team travels to California to stop two brothers, one of whom may be the Horseman of Famine.

1.title: FR - The Messengers - S01E11 - Harvest
1.plot: Based on contradictory clues, the Messengers make clashing predictions about who will be the Horseman of Famine. Meanwhile, Vera almost unearths the Horsemen's master plan.

1.title: FR - The Messengers - S01E12 - Spark of Hope
1.plot: The Messengers' powers are tested as they attempt to rescue someone from government lockup. Meanwhile, Joshua has a vision foreshadowing the arrival of a deceptive new adversary.

1.title: FR - The Messengers - S01E13 - Houston, We Have A Problem
1.plot: A battle between the Messengers and the Four Horsemen takes place as the Horsemen try to break the fifth seal in the series finale.

meta.plot: Heroes Reborn débute 5 ans après la fin de la saison 4 de Heroes, à Odessa au Texas, juste après une attaque terroriste dévastatrice. Le rêve de paix est rompu et les « Heroes », ces humains évolués possédant d'extraordinaires capacités, sont accusés d'avoir déclenché cet événement tragique. Ils sont alors forcés de sa cacher ou de fuir aux côtés des plus malintentionnés.

1.title: FR - Heroes Reborn - S01E01 - Brave New World
1.plot: In a new world order, people with extraordinary abilities are in hiding and are hunted by those with nefarious motives following a catastrophic terrorist attack in Odessa, Texas.

1.title: FR - Heroes Reborn - S01E02 - Odessa
1.plot: Those with extraordinary skills continue to adapt to their discovered powers and a new world order in the wake of a terrorist attack in Odessa, Texas.

1.title: FR - Heroes Reborn - S01E03 - Under the Mask
1.plot: Erica Kravid, the powerful woman behind the global conglomerate Renautas, reveals just how far she will go to protect the world from Evos. Tommy finds comfort in sharing his ability with Emily and a new-found popularity at school. In Japan, Miko's  rescue mission comes up against some unexpected obstacles. Elsewhere, Noah Bennet continues to work with Quentin in his search for the truth and Malina is guided by an unseen force. Meanwhile, Luke and Joanne continue on their deadly mission and Carlos' search for answers causes him to dig deep to find the hero within.

1.title: FR - Heroes Reborn - S01E04 - The Needs of the Many
1.plot: In search of someone from his past, Noah Bennet breaks in to Renautas for answers. Miko continues her rescue mission and travels in search of her sword. Elsewhere, Tommy must use his ability to save the life of someone close to him. Meanwhile, Luke comes up against unexpected obstacles in his relationship with his wife, Joanne, while Carlos takes major steps forward in his heroic journey.

1.title: FR - Heroes Reborn - S01E05 - The Lion's Den
1.plot: Noah and Quentin take on Renautas. Miko's plan to retrieve her sword may land her in trouble. Malina's journey bring her closer to the truth. Luke returns home to confront his past. The authorities close in on Tommy. Carlos may have found an unexpected ally and Erica solidifies her plans.

1.title: FR - Heroes Reborn - S01E06 - Game Over
1.plot: Noah Bennet takes matters into his own hands to get much-needed answers. After Tommy makes a startling discovery, he and Emily go on an unexpected journey. Elsewhere, Luke continues to come to grips with the fact that he has become what he has been hunting. Malina finds a surprising ally. Miko stays on the course to save her father, but Erica takes measures to interfere. Meanwhile, Carlos learns more about what is really going on with EVOS from an unlikely source.

1.title: FR - Heroes Reborn - S01E07 - June 13th (1)
1.plot: In an effort to get answers, Noah Bennet joins forces with Hiro Nakamura to return to the day of the tragic events of June 13, 2014 that set everything in motion. On the verge of delivering a speech to commemorate the event, Mohinder Suresh receives a dire message from Angela Petrelli about Erica Kravid's true motives. In Japan, Hachiro Otomo makes a calculated move against Hiro Nakamura. Meanwhile, a much happier Luke and Joanne come to Odessa in hopes of finding a cure to their son's ailment.

1.title: FR - Heroes Reborn - S01E08 - June 13th (2)
1.plot: In the wake of an unspeakable tragedy, Erica Kravid puts her dark plan into motion with Renautas. Hiro and Angela are tasked with an important mission that could change the course of humanity. In Odessa, a distraught Luke and Joanne come to realize their tragic mission after the loss of their son. Meanwhile, Noah Bennet has an unexpected reunion with Matt Parkman. In Japan, the origins of Miko come to light. Elsewhere, the truth behind Carlos' military service is revealed.

1.title: FR - Heroes Reborn - S01E09 - Sundae, Bloody Sundae
1.plot: Noah is on the hunt for Tommy to reveal his past to him and guide him on his destiny to stop a catastrophic event. Taylor's discoveries about her mother, Erica Kravid, leads to her capture by an underground group. Erica escalates her search for Tommy and Malina as the race to finalize her dangerous plans intensifies. Elsewhere, Emily has an unexpected reunion with Joanne. Meanwhile, Dearing leads Carlos closer to finding his kidnapped nephew and Luke and Malina are separated in a violent encounter.

1.title: FR - Heroes Reborn - S01E10 - 11:53 to Odessa
1.plot: The destinies of Noah and Luke finally intersect as Malina unleashes her true power to save those around her. Tommy may need to join forces with his enemy, Erica Kravid, to complete his mission. Meanwhile, Carlos confronts his violent past while under the watchful eyes of Matt Parkman. Elsewhere, Ren is tasked with the impossible mission of finding Miko.

1.title: FR - Heroes Reborn - S01E11 - Send in the Clones
1.plot: Following Noah's mysterious disappearance, Luke and Malina unite to rescue Tommy and save mankind. At the mysterious Sunstone Manor, Carlos and Farah fight alongside The Haitian to take down Matt Parkman and free the prisoners under his control. Tommy and Miko join forces against Erica and her brutal plan for the future.

1.title: FR - Heroes Reborn - S01E12 - Company Woman
1.plot: Tommy helps Erica with her survival plan as the end of civilization approaches; Malina rushes to reunite with Tommy as a plot against them is formed; Matt Parkman's attempts to make sure he and his family are safe could jeopardize Taylor's safety.

1.title: FR - Heroes Reborn - S01E13 - Project Reborn
1.plot: As the clock counts down to the end of the world, Tommy finds himself up against his biggest challenge yet as Erica takes drastic measures to see her plan succeed. Malina tries to fulfill her great-grandmother's prophecy to save the world with the help of Luke and Quentin. Emily and Ren desperately search for Miko. Carlos is faced with a life and death choice.

meta.plot: Stockholm, 1943. Les alliés norvégiens élaborent des plans pour saboter les efforts des nazis sur le point d’obtenir la bombe atomique.

1.title: FR - The Heavy Water War : Les soldats de l'ombre - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: During the second world war, Nobel price winner Werner Heisenberg is the head of the nazis atomic project. Heisenberg needs heavy water for the reactor he is building, only produced by Norwegian Hydro at Vemork. The creator of the heavy water factory, scientist and resistance fighter Leif Tronstad, come to be sucpicious of the german purchase of heavy water and contacts English intelligence.

1.title: FR - The Heavy Water War : Les soldats de l'ombre - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Leif Tronstad assembles a sabotage group named Grouse. The aim is to assist the English commandos to blow up the water plant at Vemork. In Germany, Werner Heisenberg continues his work on the atomic reactor. Grouse is dropped over Hardangervidda and prepare a landing for the Englishmen.

1.title: FR - The Heavy Water War : Les soldats de l'ombre - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: The English mission fails and the allies now wants to bomb the heavy water plant. Leif Tronstad persuades them to submit a Norwegian special force group to blow up the factory. Tronstad collect saboteurs, name the group Gunnerside and start training.

1.title: FR - The Heavy Water War : Les soldats de l'ombre - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Gunnerside lands on Hardangervidda and joins grouse. The twentyseventh of February, 1943, the 9 saboteurs skies down the mountain in the direction of Vemork to blow up the heavy water plant.

1.title: FR - The Heavy Water War : Les soldats de l'ombre - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: The Germans are hard at work rebuilding the heavy water factory after the sabotage. CEO Henriksen at Norwegian Hydro discovers that he is dangerously close to be labeled as a war collaborator and tries negotiate his way out. In England the Americans decide to bomb Rjukan and the factory at Vemork.

1.title: FR - The Heavy Water War : Les soldats de l'ombre - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: The Germans decide to move the heavy water factory to Germany and the allies once again decide to sabotage the German plan. Leif Tronstad arrives back in Norway to conduct operation "Sunshine".

meta.plot: Nous sommes à Lyon, le soir de la Fête de la musique. C'est aussi l'anniversaire de Léa, 17 ans. Comme tant d'autres ce soir-là, Léa et sa cousine Chris sortent pour s'amuser. Mais au petit matin, Léa n'est toujours pas rentrée. Son père, Julien, décide de mener l'enquête alors que sa femme, Florence, fait tout pour maintenir un semblant de normalité. Thomas, le frère aîné, est rongé de culpabilité : il avait promis à sa mère de raccompagner Léa à la maison cette nuit-là. Mais les événements en ont décidé autrement...Inspirée de la série espagnole Desaparecida.

1.title: FR - Disparue - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: When teenager Lea Morel does not return home from a music festival, her  desperate parents contact the police. Lieutenant Molina, freshly  transferred from Paris, uncovers areas of Lea's life that her family  knows nothing about.

1.title: FR - Disparue - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Lea's father Julien is in police custody for lying about his alibi and  refusing to give his actual whereabouts on the night of his daughter's  disappearance. Molina and Camille discover that Lea has beenintroduced to single-seater racing, but wonder how she managed to pay for lessons.

1.title: FR - Disparue - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Julien is woken by a frantic message on his mobile phone from Lea asking him to call her. Molina and his team track the call to the train station. Nicolas, a waiter at Morel and Sons restaurant, shows Julienthe illegal police radio interceptor he has in his car, and as Julien listens to the communications, he begins to shadow their investigations.

1.title: FR - Disparue - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Francis Dupuis is interrogated about the murder of Lea Morel, but he is obviously confused and unclear about details despite his confession. However, when the police search his property they make a surprising and convincing discovery.

1.title: FR - Disparue - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: The waiting is finally over for the distraught Morel family when Lea's body is found in Miribel lake. As they prepare for the funeral, Julien becomes obsessed with identifying everybody who attended her birthday party on the day she went missing, and manages to identify someone who looks out of place in the club.

1.title: FR - Disparue - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: An apparent suicide with a long confession seemingly concludes the case of Lea's murder, but Molina is not convinced.

1.title: FR - Disparue - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: A jeweller identifies the man who bought the pendant found in a grave dug for Lea Morel. The man is questioned, but he has an alibi for the night of the murder. Romain is given a bag of Lea's possessions left at the race track and finds a USB stick with incriminating evidence.

1.title: FR - Disparue - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Molina decides that the police have been chasing a red herring and retraces their investigation into Nicolas Barrault. A search of his possessions turns up one of Jenny's business cards with a handwritten note on the back.

meta.plot: Enfant, Laure a failli mourir lors d'un accident et a été sauvée par une force inconnue qui lui a remis une amulette mystérieuse.  Vingt ans plus tard et désormais étudiante, elle découvre qu'elle fait partie des initiés capables de combattre les ombres du monde des ténèbres qui ont envahi la planète.  En tentant de repousser l'ombre qui pompe l'énergie de sa colocataire, Laure rencontre d’autres initiés, Irina, Mike, Eric et Chris...

1.title: FR - Nox : Les Sentinelles de la Lumière - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Nox : Les Sentinelles de la Lumière - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Nox : Les Sentinelles de la Lumière - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Nox : Les Sentinelles de la Lumière - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Nox : Les Sentinelles de la Lumière - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Nox : Les Sentinelles de la Lumière - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - Nox : Les Sentinelles de la Lumière - S01E07 - Episode 7
FR - Nox : Les Sentinelles de la Lumière - S01E08 - Episode 8
FR - Nox : Les Sentinelles de la Lumière - S01E09 - Episode 9
FR - Nox : Les Sentinelles de la Lumière - S01E10 - Episode 10
FR - Nox : Les Sentinelles de la Lumière - S01E11 - Episode 11

meta.plot: Des princesses provenant de quatre grands fruiyaumes — Myrtille, Kiwi, Ananas et Framboise — se serrent les coudes pour faire de leur univers un monde meilleur.

1.title: FR - Princess Power - S01E01 - Unstoppable Unpoppable Princesses
1.plot: Penny creates a magic bubble to help clear away clutter. But it works a little too well when Mr. Scrumples and a few friends get trapped inside of it!

1.title: FR - Princess Power - S01E02 - Princesses Garden Party
1.plot: Frogs, stormy weather and a lost crown — oh, my! Can Kira and the princesses help acting queen Karina pull off the perfect party in the Kiwi Fruitdom?

1.title: FR - Princess Power - S01E03 - A Whale of a Princess Tale
1.plot: The princess crew rolls out a royal rescue mission when Bea and Sir Benedict discover a friendly whale stuck on the beach.

1.title: FR - Princess Power - S01E04 - Princess Creation Station
1.plot: Rita's promised a friendship bracelet to every kid in the Raspberry Fruitdom! That's a lot of wrists — so she'll need extra hands to help her make them.

1.title: FR - Princess Power - S01E05 - Happy Princess Birthday Fussy
1.plot: It's Ms. Fussywiggles' birthday, and she's ready to take center stage. But disaster after disaster finds her spending the day happily helping others.

1.title: FR - Princess Power - S01E06 - Princess Lights Out
1.plot: When a power outage brings Fruitizen life to a standstill, the determined princesses go the distance to get their Fruitdoms back online.

1.title: FR - Princess Power - S01E07 - Princess Shooting Stars
1.plot: A once-in-a-millennium meteor shower is falling on the night of the very first Four Fruitdoms gathering. Time for a celestial celebration!

1.title: FR - Princess Power - S01E08 - Princess Royal Portrait
1.plot: The princesses pitch in on royal duties at the Raspberry Palace so that Rita can paint an important piece of history: her mom's official portrait.

1.title: FR - Princess Power - S01E09 - A Princess Dad-Dilemma
1.plot: It's a problem of parental proportions when King Barton gets stranded on an island swimming with surprises! Can Bea and her friends swoop in to save him?

1.title: FR - Princess Power - S01E10 - The Great Princess Punchbowl Feastival
1.plot: When all of the Fruitdoms announce they're throwing a festival on the same day, the princesses hatch a plan to combine all four celebrations into one.

1.title: FR - Princess Power - S01E11 - Princess Fun in the Sun
1.plot: The girls join forces to cool off the beach when a heat wave hits the Pineapple Fruitdom on the day of Great Aunt Busyboots' big speech.

1.title: FR - Princess Power - S01E12 - The Princesses and the Bees
1.plot: Raspberry Day is right around the corner, but Rita's berry crop is refusing to grow! Can her can-do crew get things buzzing again?

1.title: FR - Princess Power - S01E13 - Princesses Soccer Spectacular
1.plot: Rita tries to make things easier for a blind soccer player but winds up treating her differently than everyone else on the team. And that's not the goal!

1.title: FR - Princess Power - S01E14 - A Prince in the Princess Pack
1.plot: It's a special day at the Pineapple Palace: Famous poet Gabriela Goldenrod is coming to visit — and so is Penny's little brother, Felipe!

1.title: FR - Prince of Peoria - S01E01 - The Prince Arrives
1.plot: Teddy isn't too sure about the exchange student who's moved in with him. The kid says he's the son of a moose farmer, but that story doesn't add up!

1.title: FR - Prince of Peoria - S01E02 - Teddy vs. The Wild
1.plot: As far as Emil’s concerned, Teddy needs to learn to loosen up. But what should be a fun-filled camping trip ends up being more stressful than planned.

1.title: FR - Prince of Peoria - S01E03 - Emil the Mom Thief
1.plot: With Teddy too busy to hang out, Emil starts bonding with Regina — and Teddy gets jealous. Meanwhile, Sydney goes on a disappointing date.

1.title: FR - Prince of Peoria - S01E04 - A Night at the Hip Hopera
1.plot: Emil feels awful about messing up Teddy's chances to win free tickets to "Fillmore," the most sought-after president-based hip-hop musical ever!

1.title: FR - Prince of Peoria - S01E05 - Teddy's Bakshal
1.plot: Emil throws a birthday party of Teddy's 13th birthday. But things don't go exactly as planned.

1.title: FR - Prince of Peoria - S01E06 - Warehouse Towel Fight!
1.plot: The school bully's on the loose! Teddy knows all too well what he's capable of, but that doesn't stop Emil from taking the guy on in a towel fight.

1.title: FR - Prince of Peoria - S01E07 - Best. Holiday. Ever.
1.plot: Emil and Regina set out to pull the best April Fools Joke on Teddy. But Teddy ends up turning the tables on them.

1.title: FR - Prince of Peoria - S01E08 - The Bro-Posal
1.plot: Emil proposes to Teddy to be his BFF but Teddy is embarrassed. But when an old pen pal Teddy's shows up and starts being BFF's with Emil, Teddy decides to step up.

2.title: FR - Prince of Peoria - S02E01 -
FR - Prince of Peoria - S02E02 -
FR - Prince of Peoria - S02E03 -
FR - Prince of Peoria - S02E04 -
FR - Prince of Peoria - S02E05 -
FR - Prince of Peoria - S02E06 -
FR - Prince of Peoria - S02E07 -
