meta.plot: Prêt à tout pour vivre la vie d'un ado ordinaire, un jeune prince décide de quitter son royaume pour emménager incognito chez une mère célibataire et son fils intello.
Julie a perdu sa passion pour la musique après le décès de sa mère. Mais quand trois fantômes pleins d'énergie débarquent dans sa vie, ils décident de monter un groupe !

1.title: FR - Julie and the Phantoms - S01E01 - Wake Up
1.plot: A year after her mom passed away, Julie plays one of her old CDs. Suddenly, three ghosts appear — the guys from the '90s band Sunset Curve!

1.title: FR - Julie and the Phantoms - S01E02 - Bright
1.plot: When Julie starts singing again, the boys and her best friend Flynn encourage her to fight for a spot in the school music program.

1.title: FR - Julie and the Phantoms - S01E03 - Flying Solo
1.plot: Julie's performance makes a big splash, and the guys try to convince her to join Sunset Curve — but she'll have to come clean to Flynn first.

1.title: FR - Julie and the Phantoms - S01E04 - I Got the Music
1.plot: Flynn books Julie and the Phantoms to play at the school dance, Alex hangs out with his new crush, and the boys decide to teach an old friend a lesson.

1.title: FR - Julie and the Phantoms - S01E05 - The Other Side of Hollywood
1.plot: Willie brings the guys to an exclusive club, where a powerful ghost magician asks them to be in his band. But he's got something up his sleeve.

1.title: FR - Julie and the Phantoms - S01E06 - Finally Free
1.plot: Julie pairs up with Nick for a school performance and learns he broke up with Carrie. The band gets a new gig, but Julie's grounded for missing class.

1.title: FR - Julie and the Phantoms - S01E07 - Edge of Great
1.plot: Julie rehearses with Nick — while daydreaming about Luke. Alex wonders why Willie's been acting so weird. The band plays a party at Julie's house.

1.title: FR - Julie and the Phantoms - S01E08 - Unsaid Emily
1.plot: Julie meets Luke's parents and shares a touching song he wrote. Luke confides in Julie about Caleb and the band's "unfinished business."

1.title: FR - Julie and the Phantoms - S01E09 - Stand Tall
1.plot: Julie and the Phantoms get their dream gig at the Orpheum! But when Caleb interferes, Julie searches for the courage to perform on her own.

1.title: FR - Haters Back Off - S01E01 - Uploding my Fist Video
1.plot: Miranda kicks off her quest for fame by uploading a video to the internet. But the first spiteful comment sends her into a tailspin.

1.title: FR - Haters Back Off - S01E02 - Preeching 2 the Chior
1.plot: Crushed, Miranda quits YouTube and throws her energy into a church choir led by a blond Adonis. Uncle Jim shares a painful lesson from his past.

1.title: FR - Haters Back Off - S01E03 - Netwerking at the Nursing Home
1.plot: Miranda's visit to an ailing aunt turns into an audition when Uncle Jim spots a movie director in the nursing home. A jealous Patrick confronts Owen.

1.title: FR - Haters Back Off - S01E04 - Rod Trip With My Uncle
1.plot: When Keith offers Miranda a chance to perform, Uncle Jim scrambles to find her a bigger gig in Seattle. Emily grows suspicious of Keith's motives.

1.title: FR - Haters Back Off - S01E05 - Staring in a Musicall
1.plot: Bethany's plan to stage a family production of "Annie" goes off the rails when Uncle Jim takes over.

1.title: FR - Haters Back Off - S01E06 - Becuming a Magichin
1.plot: Growing impatient, Miranda skips ahead in the Five-Phase Plan and studies magic with Patrick. But their act hits a last-minute snag.

1.title: FR - Haters Back Off - S01E07 - Starr off the Parade
1.plot: Miranda and Uncle Jim compete with the Mattress Queen for a prime spot in the town parade. Patrick takes a bold step. Bethany gets disturbing news.

1.title: FR - Haters Back Off - S01E08 - i'm famous
1.plot: As Patrick prepares for his big date with Miranda, Owen's CD release party sets the stage for a night of reckoning.

meta.plot: Miranda Sings n'a aucun talent, mais elle est persuadée du contraire. Bien décidée à devenir une superstar, elle s'embarque dans une quête délirante de la célébrité.

1.title: FR - Graceland - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: An undercover FBI agent learns his job requires more than criminal investigations.

1.title: FR - Graceland - S01E02 - Guadalajara Dog
1.plot: Briggs and Mike tilt rival gangs against each other. Mike learns that undercover life has moral complications.

1.title: FR - Graceland - S01E03 - Heat Run
1.plot: Briggs helps Lauren with her case against the Russian Mafia. Charlie's C.I. proves unreliable during a drug deal.

1.title: FR - Graceland - S01E04 - Pizza Box
1.plot: Mike is recruited by a Nigerian drug lord to teach gang members how to shoot. Paige gets Jakes and Tuturro to go undercover with a marijuana farmer.

1.title: FR - Graceland - S01E05 - O-Mouth
1.plot: Mike gets deeper into Bello's organization. Briggs and Charlie resume former identities.

1.title: FR - Graceland - S01E06 - Hair of the Dog
1.plot: Mike convinces Bello to steal from a drug cartel. Briggs helps Charlie cover up bad decisions.

1.title: FR - Graceland - S01E07 - Goodbye High
1.plot: Charlie decides to tell the house about her bust. Briggs must come clean. Mike believes his investigation is ending.

1.title: FR - Graceland - S01E08 - Bag Man
1.plot: The Briggs-Bello alliance is tested due to an ultimatum. Mike must push his limits for the good of the case.

1.title: FR - Graceland - S01E09 - Smoke Alarm
1.plot: Bello's last strike initiates a war that Graceland must stop. Charlie meets an unusual ally. Briggs faces the past.

1.title: FR - Graceland - S01E10 - King's Castle
1.plot: Charlie learns a secret about Briggs and works with a Federale. Mike finds out that Juan is missing.

1.title: FR - Graceland - S01E11 - Happy Endings
1.plot: Briggs and Mike search for the truth about Juan's disappearance. Briggs makes a decision about his future.

1.title: FR - Graceland - S01E12 - Pawn
1.plot: Jangles takes a Graceland member hostage. The housemates unite to save one of their own.

2.title: FR - Graceland - S02E01 - The Line
2.plot: When a cartel puts a hit on Mike, he returns to Graceland, finding the place changed.

2.title: FR - Graceland - S02E02 - Connects
2.plot: Briggs digs up an old connection to help Mike get information. Paige pursues a drug manufacturer.

2.title: FR - Graceland - S02E03 - Tinker Bell
2.plot: The team tries to find the bus line responsible for smuggling contraband into the country. Tuturro sells an antique gun to the son of a cartel leader.

2.title: FR - Graceland - S02E04 - Magic Number
2.plot: Briggs and Charlie attempt to atone for past misdeeds. Jakes uses secrets to sell his story. Turturro examines his limits.

2.title: FR - Graceland - S02E05 - H-A-Double-P-Y
2.plot: The power dynamics are disrupted when Graceland has a surprise visitor. Mike is put in a precarious position. Tuturro risks his cover with Carlito.

2.title: FR - Graceland - S02E06 - The Unlucky One
2.plot: The Solano case is in shambles. Paige is deep undercover within a sex trafficking ring. Mike and Briggs need to take extreme measures.

2.title: FR - Graceland - S02E07 - Los Malos
2.plot: When Mike comes face-to-face with his greatest enemy, he pledges to do whatever it takes to take the man down.

2.title: FR - Graceland - S02E08 - The Ends
2.plot: Charlie tries to bond with a bank robber. Johnny must check his feelings for a cartel leader's daughter. Briggs' life creates complications.

2.title: FR - Graceland - S02E09 - Gratis
2.plot: Johnny pitches an alternative way to traffic drugs to the head of a drug cartel in Mexico. Mike must cover up a horrific crime while undercover.

2.title: FR - Graceland - S02E10 - The Head of the Pig
2.plot: Worried about Mike pushing boundaries, Briggs and Paige plan to use Briggs' cover to end Mike's operation.

2.title: FR - Graceland - S02E11 - Home
2.plot: Briggs learns that someone at Graceland has proof of his past crimes. the team executes a bank heist.

2.title: FR - Graceland - S02E12 - Echoes
2.plot: Even as the agents bait their final hooks against the Solano Cartel, it dawns that Sid may still have a few tricks of his own.

2.title: FR - Graceland - S02E13 - Faith 7
2.plot: As the arrests of Sid and the Solanos near, even the best laid plans begin to crumble.

3.title: FR - Graceland - S03E01 - B-Positive
3.plot: As the agents of Graceland strive to close out their ongoing cases and mend broken relationships, Briggs finds himself coerced into a high-risk undercover operation within the Armenian Mafia.

3.title: FR - Graceland - S03E02 - Chester Cheeto
3.plot: Briggs tries to keep control of Ari Adamian while Charlie struggles with the decision to terminate her pregnancy.

3.title: FR - Graceland - S03E03 - Sense Memory
3.plot: While Mike's visions and addiction to pain medications start affecting his ability to function in the field, Briggs coaxes a former FBI agent out of retirement to help take down Ari.

3.title: FR - Graceland - S03E04 - Aha
3.plot: When Ari Adamian has no recollection of his actions, Briggs helps the Armenian gangster piece together the disturbing details of his lost night.

3.title: FR - Graceland - S03E05 - Piñon Tree
3.plot: The death of an agent leaves the housemates reeling; Briggs and Johnny work to rescue Lucia, who's being held by Carlito Solano; and Mike's visions lead him to a small-time crook with a dangerous secret.

3.title: FR - Graceland - S03E06 - Sidewinder
3.plot: Mike develops a plan to learn about the contents of Gusti's trunk; and Briggs helps Paige go undercover with the Armenian Mafia's shipping company.

3.title: FR - Graceland - S03E07 - Bon Voyage
3.plot: Plans take a turn for the worse when Charlie attempts to pull Amber from Florida; and in an effort to aid Briggs, Paige sets up a bust to pull the plug on the Sarkissian organization. However, things are not always as they seem.

3.title: FR - Graceland - S03E08 - Savior Complex
3.plot: As Charlie and Jakes close in on Germaine, Mike's drug addiction reaches a breaking point when he and Gusti are caught in a dangerous situation.

3.title: FR - Graceland - S03E09 - Hand of Glory
3.plot: While Mike questions Briggs' true motivations in the Sarkissian Case, Charlie devises a new angle to catch Germaine.

3.title: FR - Graceland - S03E10 - Master of Weak Ties
3.plot: Ari rises through the ranks of the Armenian mob; Briggs dodges new suspicions from his housemates; and Charlie and Jakes are one step closer to taking down Germaine.

3.title: FR - Graceland - S03E11 - The Wires
3.plot: Johnny goes undercover to stop a gang war; Jakes and Charlie set out to take over Germaine's business; and Mike begins to piece together Briggs' plan.

3.title: FR - Graceland - S03E12 - Dog Catches Car
3.plot: The feud between the Sarkissians and a local gang heats up; Briggs' motives are revealed; and Mike hunts for the sarin gas.

3.title: FR - Graceland - S03E13 - No Old Tigers
3.plot: The agents struggle in the aftermath of the gang war while Briggs tracks down a loose end in order to bring Ari Adamian to justice.

meta.plot: Les agents de différentes agences gouvernementales, aux objectifs et qualifications diamétralement opposés, sont engagés sur une périlleuse opération d'infiltration. Pour réussir cette mission, ils sont contraints de cohabiter dans une maison secrète, en Californie du Sud.

Two homicide detectives, Christian Walker and Deena Pilgrim, are assigned to investigate cases involving people with superhuman abilities, referred to as “Powers.” Set amidst today’s paparazzi culture, Powers asks the questions, what if the world was full of superheroes who aren't actually heroic at all? What if all that power was just one more excuse for mischief, mayhem, murder, and endorsement deals?

1.title: FR - Powers - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Walker and Pilgrim investigate the death of Olympia, a renowned superhero who is found dead in a sleazy apartment with no clothing and no sign of injury. Information emerges about Olympia's controversial sex life, which may have played a role in his death.

1.title: FR - Powers - S01E02 - Like a Power
1.plot: After Calista tries to find her powers in a more drastic way, she meets RetroGirl whom Christian knows more about than he's letting on. Meanwhile his partner makes her first official Powers arrest. After a while Christian becomes more suspicious about Johnny Royalle's death, and visits Wolf to seek his help.

1.title: FR - Powers - S01E03 - Mickey Rooney Cries No More
1.plot: As a lethal powers-enhancing drug is unleashed on the public, Detectives Walker and Pilgrim seek out the criminal mastermind behind it with the help of iconic Power, Retro Girl. As clues come to light, Walker considers the possibility that Wolfe, his dangerous former mentor turned nemesis, might have the answers he seeks.

1.title: FR - Powers - S01E04 - Devil in a Garbage Bag
1.plot: Johnny realizes that's his new drug is dangerous, but is it too late to stop Wolf before all hell breaks loose?

1.title: FR - Powers - S01E05 - Paint It Black
1.plot: As Retro Girl, Zora and the heroes of the world rush to stop the escape of Wolfe from The Shaft, Walker realizes he must face him alone, the inevitable clash between mentor and disciple that will unravel the deep-seated history between them.

1.title: FR - Powers - S01E06 - The Raconteur of the Funeral Circuit
1.plot: In the wake of the battle to stop Wolfe, the Powers division gathers to mourn the loss of their fellow officers, while Walker seeks answers about his own future and the possibility of becoming Diamond once again. After seeing the uncertain and dangerous side effects of Sway first-hand Johnny Royalle begins unsavory experiments on known subjects of the drug.

1.title: FR - Powers - S01E07 - You Are Not It
1.plot: After Wolfe pleads to end his life, Walker and Pilgrim must act quickly to stop Johnny Royalle from meeting with Wolfe in The Shaft. Meanwhile Zora struggles with her newfound fame, while Calista becomes more desperate to discover if she truly is a Power.

1.title: FR - Powers - S01E08 - Aha Shake Heartbreak
1.plot: In order to persuade him to join his new cause to annihilate Wolfe, Royalle reveals to Walker the true nature of Sway and the inevitable devastation it will cause if Wolfe ever escapes. Meanwhile, as the message of Chaotic Chick spreads rapidly with fatal results, it finds its biggest platform yet in a publicity stunt orchestrated for Retro Girl's charitable foundation.

1.title: FR - Powers - S01E09 - Level 13
1.plot: Walker decides how far he is willing to go to regain his powers, as Johnny Royalle sets the plan in motion to kill Wolfe. Meanwhile, the Powers division tries to catch Royalle in the act and discover where Walker's true allegiance lies.

1.title: FR - Powers - S01E10 - F@#K the Big Chiller
1.plot: Wolfe has escaped prison, it is now up to Christian and Co to stop his reign of terror from sucking the life of all the power teens that took Sway.

2.title: FR - Powers - S02E01 - Caracas 1967
2.plot: The world is turned upside down by the seemingly impossible and horrifying murder of retro girl. Pressure is on the powers division to bring the perpetrator to Justice, but when Walker is pulled off the case for being too close to the victim, and may be a suspect himself, he must go off-the-books to avenge the woman he loved.

2.title: FR - Powers - S02E02 - Funeral of the Century
2.plot: On the day of Retro Girl's funeral, Detectives Walker and Pilgrim prepare to combat violence between rival gangs The Quantums and The Hacks. Hoping to fill her place, Calista makes her public debut as New Retro Girl. Still reeling from Retro Girl's death, and with her murder officially closed, Walker doggedly pursues a suspect he believes to be the real murderer.

2.title: FR - Powers - S02E03 - Hell Night
2.plot: Commander Cross unofficially reopens the Retro girl case, ordering Pilgrim and Walker to lead a covert investigation that may put them in a life-threatening situation. Meanwhile, Los Angeles goes in lockdown mode as gang warfare reaches a fever pitch, pulling the revered Power, SuperShock out of retirement.

2.title: FR - Powers - S02E04 - Stealing Fire
2.plot: New evidence suggests the main suspect and Retro Girl's murder may be a rare power gone rogue. With contempt between the Powers Division and the FBI escalating to a breaking point, Walker attempts to gain Agent Lange's trust.

2.title: FR - Powers - S02E05 - Shaking the Tree
2.plot: In the aftermath of a catastrophic political scandal, Walker and Pilgrim investigate a high-priority suspect and uncover shocking government connections. Meanwhile Triphammer is determined to create a new Powers team, recruiting Zora and a new protégé, Sgt. Tiberio Martinez.

2.title: FR - Powers - S02E06 - Requiem
2.plot: As Calista is about to be crowned the newest shining star of the Powers universe by Conrad Moody III, CEO of the most powerful Powers merchandising company on the planet, a valuable member of the community is murdered. With Walker and Pilgrim suspended, they are powerless to stop the city from unraveling around them.

2.title: FR - Powers - S02E07 - Origins
2.plot: The origins of SuperShock’s complicated and mysterious relationship with Retro Girl are revealed, as Calista, Sgt. Martinez and Zora team up to fill the Powers void left in her absence. The disgraced Senator Brown’s body is discovered, catapulting newly reinstated detectives, Walker and Pilgrim into the investigation.

2.title: FR - Powers - S02E08 - Chasing Ghosts
2.plot: Walker learns that something isn’t quite right with SuperShock, while Pilgrim and Kutter investigate an elusive “Ghost.” Calista’s estranged father unexpectedly comes to town.

2.title: FR - Powers - S02E09 - Slain Dragons
2.plot: Powers start dropping from the sky and Walker suspects an old friend is behind it. Pilgrim pursues Ghost believing he is responsible. Calista confronts SuperShock but the encounter causes her to reconsider being a power.

2.title: FR - Powers - S02E10 - Legacy
2.plot: Powers Division and New Unity plan to capture SuperShock by using The Ghost as bait, but all does not go according to plan, and each would-be-hero must rise to the occasion or suffer the terrible consequences.

meta.plot: Deux jeunes femmes font partie sans le savoir d'une longue lignée de sorcières. Alors qu'elles mènent une existence paisible, une série d’évènements va amener leur mère à leur dévoiler la vérité sur leur héritage familial : elles sont en fait de puissantes et immortelles sorcières.

1.title: FR - Witches of East End - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Joanna Beauchamp and her adult daughters Ingrid and Freya are witches… a secret she has kept hidden from them for the last thirty years. All that may come to an abrupt end when Joanna’s sister Wendy returns to East Haven with a dire warning that a powerful and malevolent force bent on revenge is coming for Joanna, and it will take the combined magic of all the Beauchamp women to defeat it.

1.title: FR - Witches of East End - S01E02 - Marilyn Fenwick, R.I.P.
1.plot: Ingrid discovers mysterious and dangerous family heirlooms that she uses to resurrect her Aunt Wendy. Together, they race to save Freya from Doug, her jilted ex-boyfriend from another lifetime. Joanna is jailed and questioned by the police regarding her murder charge. Dash and Killian have a tense reunion.

1.title: FR - Witches of East End - S01E04 - A Few Good Talismen
1.plot: Joanna's immortal attorney, Harrison, prepares for her murder trial. Afraid for Adam's safety, Ingrid re-evaluates her relationship with him. Penelope recruits Freya to help her mend the rift between Dash and Killian. Wendy seduces an entomologist while trying to gather ingredients for a spell. And Joanna and Harrison try to protect Principal Redmond from the shifter.

1.title: FR - Witches of East End - S01E05 - Electric Avenue
1.plot: Ingrid finds a unique way to mourn for Adam. Joanna and Harrison take their friendship to the next level. Freya meets Dash's ex fiancée Elyse when she returns to deal with some unfinished business.

1.title: FR - Witches of East End - S01E06 - Potentia Noctis
1.plot: Freya makes a startling discovery at Fair Haven while Ingrid has flashbacks to one of her past lives.

1.title: FR - Witches of East End - S01E07 - Unburied
1.plot: The shifter summons a familiar face. Ingrid discovers something startling from her past. A novelist comes to East End to research his new book. Wendy turns over a new leaf, and attempts to get serious with Leo. Joanna reads Freya's tarot cards.

1.title: FR - Witches of East End - S01E08 - Snake Eyes
1.plot: Wendy and Joanna come to blows over a secret Joanna has been keeping for over a hundred years. The shifter threatens Freya. Ingrid suspects Mike's ulterior motives.

1.title: FR - Witches of East End - S01E09 - A Parching Imbued
1.plot: A mysterious professor with old connections to the Beauchamps tries to help Freya regain her powers. Killian makes a decision about his future in East End. Mike reveals an interesting theory to Ingrid. Amidst wedding preparations, Dash tries to solve the mystery of the catacombs.

1.title: FR - Witches of East End - S01E10 - Oh, What a World!
1.plot: Freya's wedding day arrives as do gifts from both Killian and Dash. Joanna and Wendy discover the identity of the shifter. When Ingrid discovers some unnerving details about Mike, he takes dangerous measures to complete his plan.

2.title: FR - Witches of East End - S02E01 - A Moveable Beast
2.plot: All the Beauchamp witches have trouble remembering exactly what happened after the portal opened and fear a mystical presence crossed over to their world. Victor helps Joanna fight what seems to be a losing battle with her argentum poisoning. Ingrid develops a dangerous sleep walking habit while Freya has visions of Killian in danger.

2.title: FR - Witches of East End - S02E02 - The Son Also Rises
2.plot: Joanna is thrilled with Frederick’s return, while Wendy remains suspicious of his behavior. Killian discovers he has a lot in common with new love Eva. Dash reluctantly deals with his blackmailer.

2.title: FR - Witches of East End - S02E03 - The Old Man and the Key
2.plot: Ingrid prepares to move out while Freya tracks down Killian. Dash discovers the identity of his blackmailer and plans revenge. Wendy and Joanna follow Frederick to figure out what his motives are since reconnecting with the family.

2.title: FR - Witches of East End - S02E04 - The Brothers Grimoire
2.plot: Wendy and Tommy have a disastrous series of meetings. Old friends of Frederick’s from Asgard make an unwelcome visit to Fair Haven. Dash and Killian receive their inheritance which yields interesting results.

2.title: FR - Witches of East End - S02E05 - Boogie Knight
2.plot: Freya relives one of her past lives with Killian. Dash does a spell at work without realizing the consequences. Joanna seeks the help of an old friend, Alex. Wendy and Freddie work together to try and stop the Mandragora while Ingrid’s bond with it grows stronger.

2.title: FR - Witches of East End - S02E06 - When a Mandragora Loves a Woman
2.plot: Joanna and Alex must put their past aside and focus on finding the Mandragora. Freya asks Dash to help save Ingrid. Skeptical of Freddie’s loyalty, Wendy is wary of his actions.

2.title: FR - Witches of East End - S02E07 - Art of Darkness
2.plot: Tarkoff, an old friend of the family’s, pays a visit to Joanna and Freddie. Wendy, Freya, Ingrid and Dash attend an art gala where Wendy encounters someone from her past. Killian has doubts about his feelings for Eva.

2.title: FR - Witches of East End - S02E08 - Sex,Lies and Birthday Cake
2.plot: Joanna has to face up to one of her worst fears. It is a milestone birthday for Freya and Frederick. Wendy gives Tommy a surprise. Frederick is feeling the pressure from Tarkoff to get things done.

2.title: FR - Witches of East End - S02E09 - Smells Like King Spirit
2.plot: Tarkoff gains revenge on Frederick. Freya confronts Killian. Dash is issued with an ultimatum. Joanna tries to protect her family.

2.title: FR - Witches of East End - S02E10 - The Fall of the House of Beauchamp
2.plot: Dash's secrets begin to unravel; Joanna is devastated by Tarkoff's actions. Wendy and Joanna decide to reconnect with their father.

2.title: FR - Witches of East End - S02E11 - Poe Way Out
2.plot: Joanna, Freya and Wendy revisit one of their former lives. Dash's one night stand turns out to be somebody better than expected. Ingrid attempts to bond with her grandfather.

2.title: FR - Witches of East End - S02E12 - Box to the Future
2.plot: The Beauchamps travel back in time to the 1840s where Freya encounters Edgar Allan Poe and Joanna is ensnared by a dangerous admirer. Killian does the unthinkable and risks his life for his one true love.

2.title: FR - Witches of East End - S02E13 - For Whom the Spell Tolls
2.plot: Season two ends with Jonanna trying to escape from Tarkoff, while Freya and Wendy race to find a way back to the present. As far as Ingrid, she learned some shocking news about herself from King Nikolaus, and Dash's dark past closes in on him.

1.title: FR - YooHoo to the Rescue - S01E01 - The Stubborn Rhinoceros
1.plot: When a young rhino struggles with a bad habit of head-butting, YooHoo, Chewoo, Roodee, Lemmee and Pammee journey to Indonesia for answers.

1.title: FR - YooHoo to the Rescue - S01E02 - The Bat Sisters and the Starry Night
1.plot: As the sparkling fruit signals a new mission, the team takes a trip to the Philippines, where a fruit bat needs help facing the night.

1.title: FR - YooHoo to the Rescue - S01E03 - The Froggy Trio
1.plot: A choir of cute frogs have lost their voices in Argentina. Can YooHoo and his trusty crew help restore the music?

1.title: FR - YooHoo to the Rescue - S01E04 - The Leap of the Snow Leopard
1.plot: When a sweet snow leopard loses sight of her best friend, YooHoo and the crew report for duty in India.

1.title: FR - YooHoo to the Rescue - S01E05 - Down in the Rabbit Hole!
1.plot: YooHoo guides the crew to Portugal, where they encounter a rousing rabbit mystery that requires some expert solving.

1.title: FR - YooHoo to the Rescue - S01E06 - Fly, Sugar Glider, Fly!
1.plot: It’s time to go Down Under! Join the team as they travel to Australia to help a sensitive sugar glider find her way home.

1.title: FR - YooHoo to the Rescue - S01E07 - Tail-fishing with the Polar Bear
1.plot: YooHoo's team springs into action and travels to the Arctic when a polar bear named Martee hurts his foot.

1.title: FR - YooHoo to the Rescue - S01E08 - The Red Panda Masterpiece
1.plot: YooHoo leads a trip to Nepal to help a cute and cuddly group of red pandas support a painting project.

1.title: FR - YooHoo to the Rescue - S01E09 - The Otter Brotherhood
1.plot: On a trip to Argentina, the team helps a southern river otter with a bold babysitting adventure.

1.title: FR - YooHoo to the Rescue - S01E10 - Sweet Dreams, Baby Moon Bear
1.plot: It’s off to Korea for YooHoo’s crew when a moon bear loses track of his im-paws-ibly adorable friends.

1.title: FR - YooHoo to the Rescue - S01E11 - Keeping Cool with the Giant Panda
1.plot: YooHoo's crew takes a 'round-the-world trip to China to help a snuggly panda beat the heat.

1.title: FR - YooHoo to the Rescue - S01E12 - Chameleon, the King of Hide-and-Seek
1.plot: YooHoo's crew takes a trip to Madagascar, where they help a clever chameleon search for the true meaning of friendship.

1.title: FR - YooHoo to the Rescue - S01E13 - Eating Healthy with the Blue-footed Sula Birds
1.plot: YooHoo and friends journey to the Galápagos Islands to help two blue-footed sula birds catch and prepare a fishy feast.

meta.plot: YooHoo et ses amis se lancent dans des missions magiques à travers le monde pour secourir les animaux en difficulté

1.title: FR - We're Lalaloopsy - S01E01 - Storm E Sky's Ahead
1.plot: The girls get creative when the town square statue they plan to unveil is delayed.

1.title: FR - We're Lalaloopsy - S01E02 - Storm E Rolls In
1.plot: Jewel doesn't see eye to eye with quirky newcomer Storm E Sky.

1.title: FR - We're Lalaloopsy - S01E03 - Spot's Good Hair Day
1.plot: Jewel doesn't like what Storm E's loud rock music does to her hair.

1.title: FR - We're Lalaloopsy - S01E04 - Jewel Bakes a Cake
1.plot: When Crumbs can't bake a cake for Jewel's tea party, what's a princess to do?

1.title: FR - We're Lalaloopsy - S01E05 - Crumbs' Perfect Spoon
1.plot: Dot helps Crumbs improvise when her precious baking spoon goes missing.

1.title: FR - We're Lalaloopsy - S01E06 - Rosy Needs a Hug
1.plot: Rosy and Storm E learn that sometimes they need to ask others for help.

1.title: FR - We're Lalaloopsy - S01E07 - Spot Gets Helpful
1.plot: Spot calls on Storm E's musical talent for the grand opening of Crumbs's new Pet Cafe.

1.title: FR - We're Lalaloopsy - S01E08 - Rosy's Quiet Tea
1.plot: The girls try to help Mouse and Zebra recover from allergies.

1.title: FR - We're Lalaloopsy - S01E09 - Crumbs' Cookie Dress
1.plot: Crumbs and Mouse learn to compromise when designing Crumbs's outfit for the Pet Prom.

1.title: FR - We're Lalaloopsy - S01E10 - A Storm E Holiday
1.plot: The girls receive secret gifts, but Jewel's upset she got rocks.

1.title: FR - We're Lalaloopsy - S01E11 - Storm E Sings Up a Storm
1.plot: Storm E writes songs about each of the girls, unaware that Dot's experimental device is recording her.

1.title: FR - We're Lalaloopsy - S01E12 - Spot Plays Matchmaker
1.plot: Spot tries to help Storm E and Jewel get along.

1.title: FR - We're Lalaloopsy - S01E13 - Forest Finds a Stray
1.plot: When Forest finds a cute little stray poodle, the Lalaloopsy girls search for its owner.

1.title: FR - Watership Down - S01E01 - The Journey and the Raid
1.plot: Based on the classic novel, Watership Down tells the story of a gang of ragtag rabbits embarking on an epic adventure in search of a new home after their warren is destroyed.

1.title: FR - Watership Down - S01E02 - The Escape and the Siege
1.plot: The rabbits find the new home foretold by Fiver but will need all their cunning to fend off an attack in the final part of the story.

1.title: FR - Watership Down - S01E03 -
FR - Watership Down - S01E04 -

meta.plot: Dans cette adaptation du roman classique de Richard Adams, des lapins de garenne se lancent sur un parcours semé d'embûches pour trouver un nouveau territoire.
Finies les chamailleries, place au combat ! Menés par leur brillante créatrice, les robots Shiny et Thunder vont devoir défendre la Terre contre les monstres de l'espace.

1.title: FR - Super Giant Robot Brothers! - S01E01 - Gone and Back Again
1.plot: After fighting his first monster, red robot Shiny blasts into space. But when he meets new bot Thunder on his return, he realizes things are different.

1.title: FR - Super Giant Robot Brothers! - S01E02 - Welcome to G.R.I.T.S.
1.plot: Battling vicious kaiju is only for the bravest. So Thunder brings Shiny back to the base, where young inventor Alex and Colonel Creed test his skills.

1.title: FR - Super Giant Robot Brothers! - S01E03 - Put Me in, Coach
1.plot: Shiny's out to prove he has what it takes to fight with Thunder. After Shiny shows his moves, Alex gives him a shot with his own solo mission.

1.title: FR - Super Giant Robot Brothers! - S01E04 - Upgrades
1.plot: Tired of being under Thunder's shadow, Shiny enlists the help of tech savvy Sarge to level up his fighting skills against the terrorizing kaiju.

1.title: FR - Super Giant Robot Brothers! - S01E05 - Inner Space
1.plot: When kaiju mites attack Shiny and Thunder, Alex and Creed must call on the extermination team. Meanwhile, an alien spy breaks into their headquarters.

1.title: FR - Super Giant Robot Brothers! - S01E06 - Road Trip
1.plot: Shiny and Thunder head to the other side of the planet to battle a two-headed kaiju. But the spy tries to sabotage the mission and take over the base.

1.title: FR - Super Giant Robot Brothers! - S01E07 - Boybotfriend
1.plot: Alex starts to crush on an alien teen genius who crash-lands on Earth after a kaiju battle. But Shiny, Thunder and Creed question his intentions.

1.title: FR - Super Giant Robot Brothers! - S01E08 - Whack-a-bot
1.plot: Vanessa the spy sends off a signal that summons ancient kaiju to spring up from their underground hibernation and start chaos in multiple cities.

1.title: FR - Super Giant Robot Brothers! - S01E09 - Defying Gravity, Bro
1.plot: Shiny reveals a clue that helps Alex begin to locate her parents. Vanessa and her alien overlord decide to accelerate their destructive aerial plans.

1.title: FR - Super Giant Robot Brothers! - S01E10 - The Hand of Fate
1.plot: To save Alex and the world, Shiny and Thunder will need to team up with Dr. Starface and Creed — and show off the strength of their brotherly bond.

meta.plot: Vivez avec Rilakkuma et sa bande une journée riche en péripéties. Vous allez visiter un parc d'attractions qui s'apprête à fermer définitivement ses portes... et un incident va se produire ! En plus des personnages de "Rilakkuma et Kaoru" que vous connaissez, vous rencontrerez de nouveaux amis à la personnalité unique !

1.title: FR - Rilakkuma's Theme Park Adventure - S01E01 - An uneasy feeling
1.plot: Jackpot! Rilakkuma wins free tickets to Nakasugi Land, the local amusement park that will soon be closing its doors forever.

1.title: FR - Rilakkuma's Theme Park Adventure - S01E02 - Game battle with Emiri
1.plot: Rilakkuma has lots of fun playing video games with a new friend, but the big fuzzy bear gets a little dizzy after playing too much. Next stop: teacups!

1.title: FR - Rilakkuma's Theme Park Adventure - S01E03 - Eiji and the jungle tour
1.plot: Kiiroitori ends up getting stuck in a tree. Can Rilakkuma and friends rescue the little bird? Kaoru and Korilakkuma finally make it into the park.

1.title: FR - Rilakkuma's Theme Park Adventure - S01E04 - Clown in love
1.plot: It's way past lunchtime and everyone's getting hungry. Kaoru and Korilakkuma need to get their bentos back from the clown who ran off with them quick!

1.title: FR - Rilakkuma's Theme Park Adventure - S01E05 - Suzune’s an idol
1.plot: Rilakkuma, Tokio and Kiiroitori are all really hungry; luckily, the park employee that's been helping them notices and kindly buys them lunch.

1.title: FR - Rilakkuma's Theme Park Adventure - S01E06 - The secret of the theme park
1.plot: The park secret is out!? As the sun starts to set, Suzune remembers how much she used to love this job. At long last, it's time for her final concert.

1.title: FR - Rilakkuma's Theme Park Adventure - S01E07 - Strategy meeting in the dark
1.plot: The power's out throughout the park and it's getting dark, but Kaoru starts beaming when she finally meets up with Hayate — and the rest of the crew.

1.title: FR - Rilakkuma's Theme Park Adventure - S01E08 - The last parade
1.plot: There's only one way to get the power back on in time for the parade; Korilakkuma has to send her remote controlled ducky into the underground maze.

meta.plot: Dans un monde mystique où règnent dieux et esprits japonais, une petite fille courageuse cherche à suivre les traces de son mystérieux père et à découvrir ses pouvoirs.

1.title: FR - ONI: Thunder God's Tale - S01E01 - Onari's Kushi Power
1.plot: It's a brand new day at Mount Kamigami and the feisty Onari preps for the first day of school — where she will learn her powers for the challenges ahead.

1.title: FR - ONI: Thunder God's Tale - S01E02 - The Mighty Storm Gods
1.plot: With a newfound sense of purpose, Onari tells her classmates how she'll beat the Oni. Meanwhile, an unexpected guest arrives at Mount Kamigami.

1.title: FR - ONI: Thunder God's Tale - S01E03 - The Truth
1.plot: Lost in the Oni village, Onari musters the courage to search for clues about her Kushi power. Back on the mountain, the Kami prepare for the Demon Moon.

1.title: FR - ONI: Thunder God's Tale - S01E04 - The Demon Moon Rises
1.plot: When Naridon's secret comes out, Mount Kamigami falls into utter chaos. Hurt and hopeless, a crestfallen Onari finds an unlikely kindred spirit.

meta.plot: Royal Bee amène toutes ses amies à la Maison des Surprises pour leur montrer son nouveau projet FABULEUX.

1.title: FR - L.O.L. Surprise! House of Surprises - S01E01 - Royal Bee's Big Surprise
1.plot: Royal Bee, Lady Diva, Neonlicious, and Swag are in the house. Lady Diva, Neonlicious, and Swag can't wait to hear Royal Bee's big news. What's she gonna say? Is it really gonna be that surprising?

1.title: FR - L.O.L. Surprise! House of Surprises - S01E02 - Destination Diner
1.plot: Royal Bee bought the diner, now the real work begins! Neonlicious is all in on giving the old diner some extra love, but Lady Diva and Swag are on the fence!

1.title: FR - L.O.L. Surprise! House of Surprises - S01E03 - Lady Diva Drama
1.plot: Royal Bee’s throwing a PARTY! But not everyone’s excited...Royal Bee has the great idea to get Lady Diva to give one of her over-the-top performances to celebrate the diner!

1.title: FR - L.O.L. Surprise! House of Surprises - S01E04 - The Big Diner Party
1.plot: It's almost time for the BIG party at Royal Bee's fabulous diner! Everyone's invited! But where's Lady Diva? The girls are hard at work prepping for the big diner party tonight!

1.title: FR - L.O.L. Surprise! House of Surprises - S01E05 - The Spooky Sleepover
1.plot: The party is all wrapped up and it's time for bed! The guests may have left, but the fun never really ends at the LOL House of Surprises! Tomorrow is Spooky Ooky Ooky Day and the girls are going to sleep over.

1.title: FR - L.O.L. Surprise! House of Surprises - S01E06 - Roller Chick's New Job
1.plot: The Diner is busier than ever! BB’s diner has become THE place to hang! The only trouble is, with so many people to serve, Candylicious can't keep up!

meta.plot: Un groupe d'ados organisent un voyage mémorable au Comic-Con pour voir leur idole, mais déboires hilarants et embrouilles diverses viennent perturber leur plan.

1.title: FR - Best.Worst.Weekend.Ever. - S01E01 - Issue 1
1.plot: When Comic-Con comes to town, three friends plan a surprise for the creator of their favorite comic. But the weekend gets off to a rocky start.

1.title: FR - Best.Worst.Weekend.Ever. - S01E02 - Issue 2
1.plot: After their epic party ... er, "literary event" ... Zed, Treece and Hallie race to find a missing Argo before his dad realizes something's wrong.

1.title: FR - Best.Worst.Weekend.Ever. - S01E03 - Issue 3
1.plot: The hunt for Tom Dunkins leads the Crash Crew to a pet store and a spooky "Blade of Dragons" maze. Patches breaks into Argo's house.

1.title: FR - Best.Worst.Weekend.Ever. - S01E04 - Issue 4
1.plot: Patches grills Zed about his missing mushroom. A new scheme to sneak into Comic-Con forces Argo to confront his fear of performing in public.

1.title: FR - Best.Worst.Weekend.Ever. - S01E05 - Issue 5
1.plot: As a special agent interrogates Zed about the hacker Digilord, Patches lures Treece to the hotel roof. Argo and Zed get stuck in a stinky predicament.

1.title: FR - Best.Worst.Weekend.Ever. - S01E06 - Issue 6
1.plot: When the dumpster walls start closing in, Argo makes a confession to Zed. Later, the friends try to strike a deal with the mushroom's new owner.

1.title: FR - Best.Worst.Weekend.Ever. - S01E07 - Issue 7
1.plot: While Argo deals with the fallout from the crash, Treece and Zed accidentally stumble into a LARPing event, and Hallie reveals a hidden talent.

1.title: FR - Best.Worst.Weekend.Ever. - S01E08 - Issue 8
1.plot: With minutes to go before the colonel's return, a news alert gives the gang fresh inspiration -- and one last chance to make their dream come true.

1.title: FR - Only For Love - S01E01 - No Goodbye, No Farewell
1.plot: Eva’s dream is on the verge of coming true when she plays for a famous singer, but a tragedy swiftly gets in the way. Meanwhile, doors open for Deusa.

1.title: FR - Only For Love - S01E02 - My Own Boss
1.plot: Eva goes to radio personality Alex Fernão with a proposition. César Marcolo falls out with Ana Lígia over Deusa, who has a choice to make.

1.title: FR - Only For Love - S01E03 - I Loved You, But You Didn't Love Me
1.plot: Deusa works on her first single at the studio while Roberta goes to an audition. An unexpected visitor surprises Eva at home.

1.title: FR - Only For Love - S01E04 - Exclusivity
1.plot: Nelton surprises his girlfriend with a cute proposal. While Deusa's solo career gains momentum, a furious Alex voids his arrangement with Eva.

1.title: FR - Only For Love - S01E05 - As If You Were Over Me
1.plot: Eva sees an opportunity to introduce herself to César. After taking a risk during a gig in São Paulo, Deusa tries to make amends with Tadeu.

1.title: FR - Only For Love - S01E06 - Accidents Happen
1.plot: Deusa enjoys her success, but Tadeu is less than thrilled. Eva contemplates two enticing career opportunities as she learns the truth about her mother.

meta.plot: La carrière solo de Deusa affecte sa relation avec Tadeu. Eva cherche une grande voix pour interpréter ses chansons. Leurs rêves musicaux ne tardent pas à se télescoper.

meta.plot: Aidé de ses fidèles alliés Hans Zarkov et Dale Arden, Flash Gordon doit sauver la Terre de l'invasion des troupes de l'Empereur Ming en provenance de la planète Mongo...

1.title: FR - Flash Gordon - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Flash finds out that his scientist father is still alive, the only problem is that his father disappeared through a trans-dimensional rift.

1.title: FR - Flash Gordon - S01E02 - Pride
1.plot: Baylin is Ming's best bounty hunter, but she is stranded on Earth; Tyrus is sent by Ming to fetch her.

1.title: FR - Flash Gordon - S01E03 - Infestation
1.plot: Flash and Baylin travel to Mongo to acquire an antidote after Nick is bitten by an alien parasite.

1.title: FR - Flash Gordon - S01E04 - Assassin
1.plot: Flash is shocked after witnessing a familiar face, his father, exit a rift.

1.title: FR - Flash Gordon - S01E05 - Ascension
1.plot: Flash, Dale and Baylin travel to Mongo and learn about the Dactyl ascension ceremony. Meanwhile, Rankol is pressured into opening a rift.

1.title: FR - Flash Gordon - S01E06 - Life Source
1.plot: Ming sends a hunter to Earth on a mission. Meanwhile, Flash, Baylin and Zarkov find a dead soldier.

1.title: FR - Flash Gordon - S01E07 - Alliances
1.plot: Flash, Baylin and Zarkov visit the Verden on Mongo, where Flash learns more about his father from their leader, Barin; Ming has plans for Barin and Aura.

1.title: FR - Flash Gordon - S01E08 - Revelations
1.plot: Zarkov becomes stranded on Mongo and is arrested in Nascent City. While imprisoned he meets Kreb, somebody who has information about Flash's father.

1.title: FR - Flash Gordon - S01E09 - Til Death
1.plot: Flash falls for Ming's daughter, Aura, after she drugs him with a love potion as part of a scheme to derail her upcoming nuptials with Barin.

1.title: FR - Flash Gordon - S01E10 - Conspiracy Theory
1.plot: Zarkov is abducted by Rankol's bodyguard, Genessa, in a bid to enlist the scientist's help in controlling the rifts.

1.title: FR - Flash Gordon - S01E11 - Random Access
1.plot: Joe learns Flash and Dale's secret after he and Flash fall through a rift while fighting. Elsewhere, Baylin and Dale help bring a child into the world.

1.title: FR - Flash Gordon - S01E12 - Secrets and Lies
1.plot: Flash and Zarkov become deeply involved in a complicated clash between two clans of Mongo. Meanwhile, Joe begins to talk about his "adventures," jeopardising his career.

1.title: FR - Flash Gordon - S01E13 - Sorrow
1.plot: Flash and Dale accompany Baylin back to Mongo for Honor Day, a day of remembrance for the lives lost during an environmental catastrophe known as "The Sorrow."

1.title: FR - Flash Gordon - S01E14 - Stand and Deliver
1.plot: Flash must help Baylin rescue the Verden who have been sold into slavery.

1.title: FR - Flash Gordon - S01E15 - Possession
1.plot: Joe steals a rift blaster which he uses to visit Mongo. Joe intends to secure photographic evidence of the planet's existence.

1.title: FR - Flash Gordon - S01E16 - Thicker Than Water
1.plot: Flash and Aura are kidnapped by a Deviate after he returns to Mongo with Baylin and Zarkov in search of the rift blaster that Joe lost before Rankol does.

1.title: FR - Flash Gordon - S01E17 - Ebb and Flow
1.plot: Flash and the gang visit Mongo after Rankol steals a body of water from Earth.

1.title: FR - Flash Gordon - S01E18 - Blame
1.plot: Flash and Aura search for an antidote for a canton whose water supply is contaminated.

1.title: FR - Flash Gordon - S01E19 - Cold Day In Hell
1.plot: Flash heads to Frigia, a cold area of Mongo, to free the region's queen.

1.title: FR - Flash Gordon - S01E20 - Revolution (1)
1.plot: Ming orders Rankol's execution after he learns that Rankol is a Celetroph. Terek builds a force to rebel against Ming, while Flash is shocked by a discovery he makes in the mainframe room of the Citadel. Dale and Norah, who are being chased by "men in black," escape to Mongo.

1.title: FR - Flash Gordon - S01E21 - Revolution (2)
1.plot: The attack against Ming has begun, though Azura offers Ming assistance in repelling Terek's forces. Dr. Gordon is freed from a mind prison, leading to a brief reunion between father and son.

1.title: FR - Flash Gordon - S01E22 -

meta.plot: Martin mystère, 16 ans, travaille comme agent spécial dans le centre, une organisation secrète spécialisée dans les phénomènes paranormaux.

1.title: FR - Martin Mystère - S01E01 - It Came from the Bog
1.plot: Martin, Diana & Java are sent to France to stop a storybook creature named the Bogeyman from kidnapping naughty children and taking them to his storybook bog world.

1.title: FR - Martin Mystère - S01E02 - Terror from the Sky
1.plot: Martin has to stop mysterious insects that are attacking a remote town in the Alberta Badlands with the aid of an acid-spewing queen and a radioactive meteorite from the Andromeda Galaxy.

1.title: FR - Martin Mystère - S01E03 - Shriek from Beyond
1.plot: Martin, Diana & Java are sent to investigate a town being attacked by a Siren. They soon realize that a sailor had a special relationship with the siren which didn't last long.

1.title: FR - Martin Mystère - S01E04 - The Creeping Slime
1.plot: A mysterious creature starts attacking an oil shack. When Martin and the gang are sent to investigate, they find themselves heading towards a small island. There they meet some very friendly islanders as well as a strange Shaman who has something to hide...

1.title: FR - Martin Mystère - S01E05 - Curse of the Deep
1.plot: Two scuba divers off the coast of Monte Carlo find an old treasure chest then something attacks and grabs one of them.

1.title: FR - Martin Mystère - S01E06 - Nightmare of the Coven
1.plot: In the basement of Nadini College—a private girls-only school in Cap Ferrat, France—three girls are fooling around in the with a beginners guide to magic spells and accidently awaken something.

1.title: FR - Martin Mystère - S01E07 - Mark of the Shapeshifter
1.plot: Workers on a building project go missing because of a local Native American turning into a werewolf and transporting them to a werewolf dimension.

1.title: FR - Martin Mystère - S01E08 - Mystery of the Vanishing
1.plot: When an entire train disappears MD&J discover that it has gone through a space-time portal and ended up in a paradise world – a world inhabited by a seemingly perfect 1960s family named the Appleby’s who have made a deal with Zook, an evil “lava monster” that feeds off the life-force of humans.

1.title: FR - Martin Mystère - S01E09 - It Came from Inside the Box
1.plot: In a small town in Alberta a boy named Wilbur poking around an antiques store finds an old puzzle box which magically unseals itself. At Torrington Academy Diana teases Martin about his insect phobias and being a scardey-cat. They're called to The Centre and sent with Java to investigate a wave of odd occurances in the Alberta town. Wilbur now looks to be half goat and his condition is progressing. Also a farmhouse was destroyed by a storm that appeared and disappeared almost immediately. They find an odd symbol burned into the ground at the farmhouse then things get dangerous when the local sawmill starts running without anyone in it and a giant saw blade breaks free and chases Martin, Diana & Java's car. Martin decoys the blade into embedding itself in a rock then uses the Legendex to identify the symbol as an ancient Arabian symbol meaning Chaos.

1.title: FR - Martin Mystère - S01E10 - Attack of the Sandman
1.plot: At a Vancouver University a sleep researcher is studying a patient's nightmare when something emerges from his monitor. At Torringtom a hyper Diana reveals to Martin her secret to how she aced the midterms is candy. With the sugar high she doesn't need to sleep and she had plenty of energy to study. Martin points out that now midterms are over she can cut back on the sweet stuff but Diana's not interested. Martin accuses her of being addicted and bets that she can't go without sweets for 24 hours. If she loses she does his algebra homework for a month and if she wins Martin forgoes his horror movie marathons for a month. They're called to Centre where Diana faces her first sugary temptations then after a look at MOM's trials of the prototype flying suit it's off to Vancouver where a student at the university has been asleep for three days despite all attempts to wake her. When Martin does a bioscan he finds that her eyes appear totally white while Java finds sand in her room.

1.title: FR - Martin Mystère - S01E11 - Eternal Christmas
1.plot: On Christmas Eve in the Laurentian Mountains, an unlucky guy named Clifford is getting ready for Christmas. He's wishing for a perfect Christmas when he drops the lucky snowglobe he bought which is supposed to grant a wish on Christmas Eve. When it cracks Clifford disappears in a flash of red light.

1.title: FR - Martin Mystère - S01E12 - Return of the Dark Druid
FR - Martin Mystère - S01E13 - They Lurk Beneath
1.plot: An archaeologist accidentally releases an ancient civilization of aliens that have been living underneath the Nasca Lines.

1.title: FR - Martin Mystère - S01E14 - Haunting of the Blackwater
1.plot: The ghost of a former lodge owner begins to haunt his own lodge and Martin Diana and Java must find a way to vanquish him when Diana gets possessed by the spirit.

1.title: FR - Martin Mystère - S01E15 - Mystery of the Hole Creature
1.plot: Martin, Diana and Java are sent to an Indian temple to stop an evil scientist from retrieving the temple's treasure and spirit of darkness, Nadu.

1.title: FR - Martin Mystère - S01E16 - Fright from the Ice
1.plot: When an ancient ice monster is threatening a mountain resort, Martin, Diana and Java must find a way to stop it.

1.title: FR - Martin Mystère - S01E17 - Beast from Within
1.plot: A slug monster named Gastromo makes Martin, Java and M.O.M its hosts and Diana is the only one left who can save them.

1.title: FR - Martin Mystère - S01E18 - Curse of the Necklace
1.plot: When a young woman discovers an ancient Celtic necklace, strange things begin to happen. Martin, Diana & Java investigate and discover that an evil female spirit has inhabited the young woman so she can give out evil candy, which causes people to literally become their costumes.

1.title: FR - Martin Mystère - S01E19 - Revenge of the Doppelganger
1.plot: A woman expels her Doppelganger and it starts going on a rampage, stealing any other woman's face that looks like her.

1.title: FR - Martin Mystère - S01E20 - The Return of the Beasts
1.plot: Martin got two days of detention for dropping the frogs out of the cage. Diana has to help him to catch frogs. Diana and Martin remember how they first met Java. An evil paleontologist recreates mutant dinosaurs to take over the Earth.

1.title: FR - Martin Mystère - S01E21 - Attack of the Mothman
1.plot: A French school student falls victim to an illegal experiment and is transformed into the Mothman.

1.title: FR - Martin Mystère - S01E22 - Summer Camp Nightmare
1.plot: Martin, Diana & Java are sent to a summer camp to destroy a lizard alien that is feeding on the life force of the campers.

1.title: FR - Martin Mystère - S01E23 - The Sewer Thing
1.plot: A research facility custodian is exposed to a dangerous chemical, transforming him into the Ratman.

1.title: FR - Martin Mystère - S01E24 - Scream from the Forest
1.plot: Martin and Diana take some time off from their work at the Center to join their archaeologist father for a weekend in the woods. They encounter a “Synth” that’s determined on reclaiming its territory from local loggers.

1.title: FR - Martin Mystère - S01E25 - The Amazon Vapor
1.plot: When various plants and animals wash up on the shores of the Amazon River, Martin & Diana are sent in to investigate. They uncover that digging by a hydroelectric company has released a strange green mist. Along the way they bump into Martin’s nemesis, Marvin.

1.title: FR - Martin Mystère - S01E26 - The Awakening
1.plot: An ancient Chinese servant tries to revive an ancient emperor and his warriors in order to revive the dynasty.

meta.plot: Dans ce jeu télévisé pour cœurs bien accrochés, personne n'est à l'abri d'épreuves aussi horribles que drôles, pas même les juges. Un sursaut, et c'est la punition !

1.title: FR - Flinch - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Contestants go for a dizzying dip. Target practice takes an electrifying turn. A train carrying special cargo causes a big stink.

1.title: FR - Flinch - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Popping balloons, swinging tires and a chicken-feeding frenzy separate the flinchers from the fearless. Fireworks put a judge in a painful position.

1.title: FR - Flinch - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Jack-in-the-boxes, a flying washing machine and emus receive mixed reactions. The losing judge takes in a big whiff of filth.

1.title: FR - Flinch - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Players feel the burn with hot wax. Later, they dive into a bed of mousetraps, and gags abound when a train reeking of rot rolls through.

1.title: FR - Flinch - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Loud noises lead to massive wedgies, while close encounters with rats set off mousetraps. A balloon-popping challenge gets dumped on one judge.

1.title: FR - Flinch - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: A little boy and a jack-in-the-box give a shocking performance. Contestants get caked with flour. A big bang means a dirty bath.

1.title: FR - Flinch - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Chainsaws, a spinning wheel and a pecking chicken party rattle contestants' composures. Tasting sweet misery, a judge gets a face full of pie.

1.title: FR - Flinch - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Contestants get the boot in a hog-wild challenge before learning that fireworks and rubber bands don't mix. Later, they try to extinguish their fears.

1.title: FR - Flinch - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: Terror comes in the form of a flying barrel, zaps from a brass band and a slap-happy challenge involving a weasel.

1.title: FR - Flinch - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: Players turn into barnyard snacks. A whip-cracking challenge sets off a milk shower. A buzz saw party becomes a true buzzkill.

meta.plot: En plein coeur de la guerre... L'épopée de jeunes Marines engagés dans le conflit irakien. Appartenant au Premier Bataillon de Reconnaissance, ces jeunes soldats sont les premières troupes sur place et doivent faire avec le manque d'équipement, un commandement incompétent et une stratégie floue.

1.title: FR - Generation Kill - S01E01 - Get Some
1.plot: Marines prepare to invade Iraq at the beginning of Operation Iraqi Freedom; while the Marines wait to receive their orders at Camp Mathilda in Kuwait, they learn that Rolling Stone columnist Evan Wright will be embedded with them.

1.title: FR - Generation Kill - S01E02 - The Cradle of Civilization
1.plot: Bravo Company gets an order to treat any Iraqi, holding a weapon, as a hostile.

1.title: FR - Generation Kill - S01E03 - Screwby
1.plot: Bravo Company waits for their next orders, while scoping out a roadside firefight, they watch in shock as a regimental combat team arrives with guns blazing.

1.title: FR - Generation Kill - S01E04 - Combat Jack
1.plot: After capturing an Iraqi airstrip, the First Recon is ahead of the other American and Coalition troops, which gives them time to regroup.

1.title: FR - Generation Kill - S01E05 - A Burning Dog
1.plot: First Recon get their orders to cross a local Iraqi bridge, which gives them their first chance to use local Iraqi citizens. As First Recon gets closer to the bridge, they are ambushed.

1.title: FR - Generation Kill - S01E06 - Stay Frosty
1.plot: First Recon get their next mission, which is to help escort the Iraqi civilians leaving Baghdad from a nearby highway, while trying to help them flee, the men see the humanity in the Iraqi civilians; First Recon come to the realization that since Baghdad is the next stop for American and Coalition forces, their war is almost at a close.

1.title: FR - Generation Kill - S01E07 - Bomb in the Garden
1.plot: Having reached Baghdad, Bravo Team is shocked at the size of the city; while First Recon begin doing their daily patrols in Baghdad, they find out the obstacles that they and the Iraqis face is much greater than they could ever think of.

1.title: FR - Factice - S01E01 -
FR - Factice - S01E02 -
FR - Factice - S01E03 -
FR - Factice - S01E04 -
FR - Factice - S01E05 -
FR - Factice - S01E06 -
FR - Found : Les Oubliés - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Crisis management specialist Gabi Mosely and her team's search for Camilla, a missing 14-year-old in foster care, becomes more complicated than they initially suspected.

1.title: FR - Found : Les Oubliés - S01E02 - Missing While Sinning
1.plot: The team mobilizes to search for Jinny Coe, a personal escort who disappeared near her apartment. News anchor Joy-Ann Reid launches a nationwide search for “Sir,” who abducted Gabi and Bella when they were young. Dhan makes a breakthrough with Zeke.

1.title: FR - Found : Les Oubliés - S01E03 - Missing While Widowed
1.plot: The team launches an investigation for widower Reggie Moore at the request of the doorman at Reggie's building. Gabi comes to a realization about her time with Lacey. Margaret hopes to repair her relationship with someone important from her past.

1.title: FR - Found : Les Oubliés - S01E04 - Missing While a Pawn
1.plot: When 13-year-old Matthew disappears from church, the teams spring into action. Gabi endeavors to keep the divorced parents focused on the search. Gabi is forced to make a devastating choice. Lacey makes a keen observation about Gabi.

1.title: FR - Found : Les Oubliés - S01E05 - Missing While Undocumented
1.plot: The M&A team mobilizes to trace the last steps of 21-year-old Satcha Moncado before she disappeared, knowing her undocumented status makes her more vulnerable. Their search uncovers a greater threat that nearly claims the life of one of our own.

1.title: FR - Found : Les Oubliés - S01E06 - Missing While Addicted
1.plot: When Gabi takes the case of a missing man on behalf of his mother, it causes disagreement among the team. Gabi's dogged pursuit of the truth leads to a shocking revelation.

1.title: FR - Found : Les Oubliés - S01E07 - Missing While Indigenous
1.plot: Native American schoolteacher Denae Wagon decides to deliver her baby on the tribe's reservation in Virginia but disappears before she can make it home. The search is complicated by a tense family dynamic and Denae's high-risk pregnancy.

1.title: FR - Found : Les Oubliés - S01E08 - Missing While Homeless
1.plot: Dhan spearheads the search for a missing unhoused man who's been an integral part of a tight-knit encampment; when Detective Trent shares troubling news about Sir, Gabi goes to great lengths to protect her secret.

1.title: FR - Found : Les Oubliés - S01E09 - Missing While Scamming
1.plot: A social media influencer is kidnapped for ransom. As the team searches for clues, the case becomes more complicated than anticipated. Lacey confronts Gabi about their faltering friendship. Sir remembers troubling moments from his past.

1.title: FR - Found : Les Oubliés - S01E10 - Missing While Indoctrinated
1.plot: Gabi and the team revisit a previous case involving child trafficking, and their heated investigation leads them in a shocking direction. Gabi confronts Sir about another one of his possible victims.

1.title: FR - Found : Les Oubliés - S01E11 - Missing While Interracial
1.plot: When a Black man goes missing, his family turns to M&A, but suspicions begin to swirl when he's implicated in the disappearance of a white woman. Gabi digs in on her search for Annie, the girl she saw at the cabin. Sir reveals why he kidnapped Gabi.

1.title: FR - Found : Les Oubliés - S01E12 - Missing While Eccentric
1.plot: When a confused and battered young woman lands on Zeke’s doorstep and says she was kidnapped and her abductor still has her friends, the team races to put the minimal clues together. Gabi shares devastating news with Dhan.

1.title: FR - Found : Les Oubliés - S01E13 - Missing While Forgotten
1.plot: Gabi unravels as the team receives an anonymous tip about one of its most important cases – a missing girl they’ve been tracking for months. Gabi makes a shocking discovery about Sir.

2.title: FR - Found : Les Oubliés - S02E01 - Missing While Bait
2.plot: Gabi and her team at Mosely & Associates begin to spiral amid Gabi’s shocking revelation. Lacey’s childhood flashbacks begin to resurface, providing vital clues as Sir remains at large.

2.title: FR - Found : Les Oubliés - S02E02 - Missing While Difficult
2.plot: A Black newborn baby is abducted from the hospital while Gabi and the team continue their frantic search for one of their own; someone from Sir's past pays Mosely & Associates a surprise visit; Margaret has a public meltdown.

2.title: FR - Found : Les Oubliés - S02E03 - Missing While Lonely
2.plot: An elderly widower engaged to a murderer disappears on her wedding day; Trent reveals new findings surrounding the death of Sir's mother; Gabi baits Sir with a game of cat and mouse and navigates the fallout within her Mosely & Associates family.

2.title: FR - Found : Les Oubliés - S02E04 - Missing While Perfect
2.plot: As Lacey attempts to readjust to life after her kidnapping, the fractured M&A team assists a 15-year-old boy in finding his missing parents; Sir begins making plans for the future; Trent is forced to make a decision with a case of his own.

2.title: FR - Found : Les Oubliés - S02E05 - Missing While Presumed Dead
2.plot: Margaret reopens a teenage girl's missing-person case after an unidentified 4-year-old boy appears in the D.C. area; Lacey recalls a memory from her kidnapping that leads to a clue in the manhunt for Sir; Gabi makes plans to right her wrongs.

2.title: FR - Found : Les Oubliés - S02E06 - Missing While Gabi Mosely
2.plot: The team investigates a missing girl named Gabi Mosely but questions the motivations behind her disappearance; Dhan tries to rally M&A back together; Margaret faces a setback in her search for Jamie; Sir takes an interest in a missing persons case.

meta.plot: Chaque année, plus de 600 000 personnes sont portées disparues aux États-Unis. Parmi ces cas, plus de la moitié sont des personnes de couleur, trop facilement négligées par le système. Gabi Mosely, elle-même ancienne disparue, est aujourd'hui spécialisée dans les relations publiques et dirige une équipe de gestion de crise qui recherche ces personnes disparues. Mais à l'insu de tous, Gabi Mosely cache elle-même un sombre secret.

A la veille de la Révolution de 1789, Toussaint Louverture prépare Saint-Domingue à se libérer de ses chaînes, imposées par la colonisation française. Fort de caractère, pétri de convictions démocratiques, et empreint alors des valeurs et bienfaits tout neufs de la République naissante, il s'allie à la France après avoir combattu aux côtés des Espagnols, des Anglais et avoir refusé l'alliance avec les Etats d'Amérique. Après la trahison du consul Bonaparte, devenu alors Napoléon en 1804, Saint- Domingue prend le nom de Haïti, car Toussaint, au prix de sa vie aura fait de son pays le premier Etat nègre indépendant où l'esclavage est enfin banni.

1.title: FR - Toussaint Louverture - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Toussaint Louverture - S01E02 - Episode 2

meta.plot: Une jeune villageoise animée de grandes ambitions s'installe en ville et devient vendeuse au Paradise, le tout premier grand magasin du pays.

1.title: FR - The Paradise - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Denise struggles with her new job at The Paradise and catches the eye of its owner.

1.title: FR - The Paradise - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: A customer threatens the reputation of The Paradise, and Denise shines in Moray's eyes.

1.title: FR - The Paradise - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: An unexpected discovery in ladieswear causes ripples throughout the store.

1.title: FR - The Paradise - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Miss Audrey develops a mysterious illness, provoking a rivalry between Denise and Clara.

1.title: FR - The Paradise - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Moray tries to buy the barber shop next door, with disastrous consequences.

1.title: FR - The Paradise - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Will Denise's secret spell the end of her career at the Paradise?

1.title: FR - The Paradise - S01E07 - Episode 7

1.title: FR - The Paradise - S01E08 - Episode 8
