meta.plot: The powerful real-life story of Lali Sokolov, a Jewish prisoner who was tasked with tattooing ID numbers on prisoners' arms in the Auschwitz-Birkenau concentration camp during World War II.

1.title: FR - The Tattooist of Auschwitz - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Heather meets Lali, a survivor of Auschwitz, who tells her his life story of love and survival in the camp.

1.title: FR - The Tattooist of Auschwitz - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Lali takes a huge risk to see prisoner 4562 again, inadvertently putting her in grave danger.

1.title: FR - The Tattooist of Auschwitz - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Lali desperately tries to get medicine for Gita as her condition deteriorates.

1.title: FR - The Tattooist of Auschwitz - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Gita grows worried over the whereabouts of Lali. Once she learns of his fate, she stops at nothing to help him.

1.title: FR - The Tattooist of Auschwitz - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Heather and Lali's relationship reaches a new level. As the war nears its close, the Nazis grow erratic.

1.title: FR - The Tattooist of Auschwitz - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: After escaping the camp and the Russians, Lali heads to Bratislava with no idea if Gita is alive or dead.

1.title: FR - Autiste, bientôt majeur - S01E01 -
FR - Autiste, bientôt majeur - S01E02 -
FR - Autiste, bientôt majeur - S01E03 -
FR - Autiste, bientôt majeur - S01E04 -
FR - Autiste, bientôt majeur - S01E05 -
FR - Autiste, bientôt majeur - S01E06 -
FR - Autiste, bientôt majeur - S01E07 -
FR - Autiste, bientôt majeur - S01E08 -
FR - Autiste, bientôt majeur - S01E09 -

meta.plot: 19-2 nous plonge au cœur du quotidien de deux patrouilleurs du Service de la police métropolitaine. On y suit Ben Chartier et Nick Berrof, entourés d'une bande colorée de confrères qui comme eux, sont aux prises avec leurs propres démons.

1.title: FR - 19-2 - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Three months after a devastating shooting, Montreal cop Nick Berrof is teamed with Benoît Chartier, a rural officer who rubs him the wrong way.

1.title: FR - 19-2 - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: While Ben tries to improve his working relationship with his partner, Capt. Gendron pressures him to provide detailed reports on Nick.

1.title: FR - 19-2 - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Nick continues to obsess about his ex-partner, and his leave from work to care for his son is interrupted when he and Ben must answer a domestic call

1.title: FR - 19-2 - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: When Nick and Ben go with Tyler and Bérangère to question suspects in a gang rape case, Tyler makes a mistake that puts the entire team in danger.

1.title: FR - 19-2 - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Isabelle tries to dissuade Nick from letting Harvey live with him after he's released from the hospital. Ben takes a few days off to go home.

1.title: FR - 19-2 - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Nick and Ben identify a boy involved in a gang fight, but Gendron, for his own reasons, refuses to let them jail the miscreant.

1.title: FR - 19-2 - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Nick and Ben arrest a famous comedian for driving while intoxicated. Ben impresses with his terrific sharpshooting, and Bérangère finds a girlfriend.

1.title: FR - 19-2 - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Nick invites Audrey to spend the weekend with him and Théo, and Isabelle gets jealous; later, Nick and Ben arrest a notorious criminal.

1.title: FR - 19-2 - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: Nick and Ben give each other the silent treatment while on patrol. Audrey is badly hurt during an ambush, and Ben asks Amélie to care for his brother.

1.title: FR - 19-2 - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: While Nick is dealing with bad news about Harvey, Ben is tasked by his former colleagues to find a mole in Montreal who is informing for gangsters.

2.title: FR - 19-2 - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: Ben becomes an SQ informant in order to identify a mole selling info. Nick refuses to sign divorce papers. A quiet day turns tragic.

2.title: FR - 19-2 - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: Tyler turns to alcohol to cope with the recent tragedy. Gendron asks for help from Nick, who is dealing with problems of his own.

2.title: FR - 19-2 - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: Nick worries about his son. As the mole becomes more active, the SQ puts more pressure on Ben. Audrey takes unnecessary risks during an intervention.

2.title: FR - 19-2 - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: A drug dealer's arrest leads to a complaint against Ben and Nick, whose colleagues have started to resent him. Tyler's old demons awaken.

2.title: FR - 19-2 - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: Vince finds himself in trouble after a routine police call. Ben becomes suspicious of Nick, whose anger at Isabelle continues to escalate.

2.title: FR - 19-2 - S02E06 - Episode 6
2.plot: While resuming his romantic pursuits, Nick gets into an argument with his mother. Ben and Amélie assess their relationship.

2.title: FR - 19-2 - S02E07 - Episode 7
2.plot: Ben receives devastating news about his family. Nick upsets Isabelle when he takes drastic measures to save someone in distress.

2.title: FR - 19-2 - S02E08 - Episode 8
2.plot: Ben catches Nick in a lie. A drug raid brings unexpected results. Caught in the middle of a love triangle, Ben sets some boundaries.

2.title: FR - 19-2 - S02E09 - Episode 9
2.plot: The officers are called to a tragic scene that leaves all of them shaken. Nick and Isabelle find it increasingly difficult to control Théo.

2.title: FR - 19-2 - S02E10 - Episode 10
2.plot: A prime suspect slips through Ben's fingers. Théo's troubles are far from over. Tyler makes a decision about his career.

3.title: FR - 19-2 - S03E01 - Episode 1
3.plot: The precinct investigates Sergeant Houle’s suicide. Nick and Ben, who know the truth, decide how to proceed while the rest of the team grieves.

3.title: FR - 19-2 - S03E02 - Episode 2
3.plot: Ben is offered the role of acting sergeant. Bérangère and Val respond to a report of a strange object in an alley and make a horrifying discovery.

3.title: FR - 19-2 - S03E03 - Episode 3
3.plot: Nick and Ben’s explanation regarding the sex trafficking ring leaves Isabelle increasingly suspicious. Meanwhile, Houle’s daughter pays them a visit.

3.title: FR - 19-2 - S03E04 - Episode 4
3.plot: Tyler struggles during a difficult training activity. Isabelle turns up the pressure on Nick and Ben. Théo sees Sandrine in secret.

3.title: FR - 19-2 - S03E05 - Episode 5
3.plot: The failed operation sets the team back. With Tyler in training and Val absent, Bérangère tries to adapt to a new partner.

3.title: FR - 19-2 - S03E06 - Episode 6
3.plot: Nick continues to supply Audrey with illegal painkillers as she struggles with what happened to her. A journalist looks into Bérangère’s private life.

3.title: FR - 19-2 - S03E07 - Episode 7
3.plot: All officers respond to a major gas leak in a residential area that Nick knows well. Théo slowly starts to reconnect with his parents.

3.title: FR - 19-2 - S03E08 - Episode 8
3.plot: Devastated, Ben has only one goal in mind: finding those responsible for the explosion. Nick prepares to go after the elusive leader of the Tours Nord.

3.title: FR - 19-2 - S03E09 - Episode 9
3.plot: While Nick and Ben testify in the prostitution case, Gendron takes control of Station 19. The team organizes a Christmas party for the local children.

3.title: FR - 19-2 - S03E10 - Episode 10
3.plot: The precinct learns the truth about Houle and Ben’s secret investigation. Hunted from all sides, Nick pursues his personal justice at any cost.

1.title: FR - Sauve qui pécho ! - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Single contestants arrive on the island, where they're introduced to potential friends, lovers and foes they'll be living with for the next eight days.

1.title: FR - Sauve qui pécho ! - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: The men race to win a brunch date. Matched couples leave for their first night in Paradise, and reveal their age and jobs to one another.

1.title: FR - Sauve qui pécho ! - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Se-hoon pulls Ji-yeon aside for a chat before the second couple selection. A surprise announcement throws the singles a curveball.

1.title: FR - Sauve qui pécho ! - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: A mesmerizing night in Paradise changes the game for Si-hun. Confused by Jin-taek's actions, So-yeon has a candid talk with Se-hoon.

1.title: FR - Sauve qui pécho ! - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Se-hoon responds to So-yeon's previous advice and confession. Newcomers enter the island, shaking up the game and bringing trouble to paradise.

1.title: FR - Sauve qui pécho ! - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: The men try to push each other out of the game. The women take turns chatting up Hyun-seung. Se-hoon contemplates following his heart.

1.title: FR - Sauve qui pécho ! - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Ji-yeon and Se-hoon clear up misunderstandings. So-yeon and Jin-taek grow closer. In pairs, the singles compete in one final game for Paradise.

1.title: FR - Sauve qui pécho ! - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: On the final day, singles choose the person they want to leave Inferno with. How many couples will depart the island hand-in-hand?

2.title: FR - Sauve qui pécho ! - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: A new group of single men and women arrives at the Inferno, where they make their first impressions and find opportunities to connect while settling in.

2.title: FR - Sauve qui pécho ! - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: The women play a game where the winner gets to go on a brunch date with two men of her choice. The first round of matching takes a shocking turn.

2.title: FR - Sauve qui pécho ! - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: Matched couples finally learn each others' age and profession. Back at the Inferno, disappointed singles take time to reflect on the events of the day.

2.title: FR - Sauve qui pécho ! - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: A charismatic newcomer captures Shin Seul-ki's attention. For the second couple selection, some follow their heart while others seek someone new.

2.title: FR - Sauve qui pécho ! - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: In Paradise, one couple enjoys time at a theme park while another finds surprising common ground. A third couple develops some romantic chemistry.

2.title: FR - Sauve qui pécho ! - S02E06 - Episode 6
2.plot: Jo Yoong-jae and Choi Seo-eun touch base after a night apart. Choi Jong-woo expresses his true feelings. New arrivals shake up the dynamic of the group.

2.title: FR - Sauve qui pécho ! - S02E07 - Episode 7
2.plot: The newcomers pick their dates. Kim Jin-young's growing popularity gives Jong-woo a chance. The ladies wrestle for one of three tickets to Paradise.

2.title: FR - Sauve qui pécho ! - S02E08 - Episode 8
2.plot: Upon having honest discussions with their peers, Lee So-e comes to a thoughtful understanding of herself while Seul-ki becomes further conflicted.

2.title: FR - Sauve qui pécho ! - S02E09 - Episode 9
2.plot: After an intense game, three men claim their ticket to Paradise. Jin-young tries to reconnect with Seul-ki, who wonders what his true feelings are.

2.title: FR - Sauve qui pécho ! - S02E10 - Episode 10
2.plot: As their time at the Inferno comes to a close, singles decide who they'd like to leave the island with. Could this be the start of new love?

meta.plot: Des célibataires cherchent l'amour sur une île déserte que seuls les couples pourront quitter, avec à la clé une escapade romantique dans un lieu paradisiaque.

In a tale of epic scale, French politician Philippe Rickwaert thirsts for revenge against his political enemies. Philippe’s political career is in shambles after he is sacrificed by the presidential candidate from the Left, Francis Laugier, in order to save his election. Step by step, Philippe plots against him and forges an alliance with his closest advisor, Amélie Dorendeu.

1.title: FR - Baron Noir - S01E01 - Jupiter
1.plot: Between the first two rounds of the French presidential election, Mayor of Dunkirk Philippe Rickwaert, the friend and personal advisor to the Socialist candidate Francis Laugier, is warned there will be a financial investigation in a social housing office in Dunkirk which he misused to finance the campaign.

1.title: FR - Baron Noir - S01E02 - 1932
1.plot: While the elections take place, Rickwaert figures out Laugier's new strategy - he has sent his special advisor, Dorendeu, to help a Green candidate to hinder the far-right candidate's chances of retaining its Northern constituency.

1.title: FR - Baron Noir - S01E03 - Solférino
1.plot: Having become increasingly ill, the first secretary of the Socialist Party steps down, triggering a vicious battle over succession to the post. As conflict ensues between Rickwaert and Laugier, Dorendeu finds herself caught in the middle of it all.

1.title: FR - Baron Noir - S01E04 - Bleu
1.plot: While Laugier launches education reforms, Rickwaert decides he can use a student movement against him. In Rickwaert's opinion, pulling the strings behind a demonstration for young people will pave the perfect path for him to return to the heart of politics.

1.title: FR - Baron Noir - S01E05 - Grenelle
1.plot: Rickwaert tries everything he can to charm and get in with the leaders of the opposition. He negotiates with the former right-wing President to support the student demonstrations, causing shockwaves through the political community.

1.title: FR - Baron Noir - S01E06 - Shutdown
1.plot: Rickwaert leads a ruthless battle to maintain his position in Dunkirk and seems to be back on Laugier's side. Laugier stands up to the Germans over EU sanctions on the excessive deficit.

1.title: FR - Baron Noir - S01E07 - Pianoforte
1.plot: While the cards look favorable for France in the European Tug of War, the OHL Dunkirk affair resurfaces, forcing Laugier and Rickwaert to navigate troubled waters between diplomacy and foul play.

1.title: FR - Baron Noir - S01E08 - Pardon
1.plot: After an incriminating court document is released and the media gets hold of it, Rickwaert will risk anything to save his own back...

2.title: FR - Baron Noir - S02E01 - Twins
2.plot: Released from prison between the two rounds of the presidential election, yet still monitored by an electronic bracelet, Philippe Rickwaert attempts to convince socialist candidate Amélie Dorendeu to review her strategy. He wants her to strike an alliance with Michel Vidal, leader of the radical left party. But soon, the Baron Noir is overtaken by his own maneuvers, which threaten to weaken Dorendeu. They now run the risk of a National Front victory.

2.title: FR - Baron Noir - S02E02 - Tourniquet
2.plot: Philippe reunites with his former fiefdom: Dunkirk. In the midst of the legislative elections, he sows discord in his successor's campaign and succeeds in forcing a political compromise that would lead to his comeback as an elected politician.

2.title: FR - Baron Noir - S02E03 - Haram
2.plot: Amélie faces her first political roadblock as she struggles to rally the legislative majority she needs to pass her key Health Act. At the same time, Cyril Balsan, a young member of parliament representing the suburbs, starts to fight against a proposed electoral communitarianism that he believes will benefit Islamists. While helping Amélie, Philippe realizes that his former assistant's struggle could give him the opportunity to get rid of a political enemy of his own. But a few socialist barons, furious at Cyril's accusations, decide to respond by jeopardizing the ...

2.title: FR - Baron Noir - S02E04 - Conversion
2.plot: The parliamentary crisis reaches a new peak. Without an absolute majority, Amelie is more weakened than ever. Yet she refuses to resort to constitutional shortcuts in order to force her way through. Philippe sees the opportunity to persuade her to try the Left Alliance with Michel Vidal. In the meantime, the young President must handle the threat of a Jihadist attack. Facing this adversity transforms Amélie, hardening her resolve. She is determined to become the President she wants to be, according to her own criteria, at the risk of bringing chaos to her relationship...

2.title: FR - Baron Noir - S02E05 - Chouquette
2.plot: Abandoned by Amélie, ruined by his lawsuit, Philippe is in big trouble. At the same time, Amélie brings the socialist barons in line with an iron fist. She gives them no choice but to accept her offer: strike an alliance with the centrists. Refusing the defeat, Philippe undertakes a wild counteroffensive, seeking out a leader able to defy Amélie.

2.title: FR - Baron Noir - S02E06 - Remontada
2.plot: While Cyril imposes himself on the media circuit with a secular-focused political line, and Amélie triumphs with Thorigny as her new Prime Minister, Philippe must face judgment. With Laugier dead, Philippe knows that he will have to accept his responsibility for a corrupt system he did not take advantage of. This sense of injustice drives him to attempt a last-ditch effort and meet the Secretary-General of the Élysée.

2.title: FR - Baron Noir - S02E07 - Diprotodon
2.plot: Philippe trounces the National Front leader during a primetime televised debate, suggesting a referendum on diversity in school. In the meantime, Thorigny schemes with a few center-left and center-right executives, aiming to create a political movement that will challenge Amélie in the next presidential election. Against the backdrop of rapid political reforms, Philippe needs rally Kalhenberg to his cause in time.

2.title: FR - Baron Noir - S02E08 - Sorpasso
2.plot: A riot breaks out in reaction to Mourad Adjaoui's disappearance. Vidal takes advantage of Amélie's enormous political crisis to shatter Philippe's dream by eliminating the possibility of a union within the left party once and for all. Under these dramatic circumstances, Philippe makes the decision to renew contact with Amélie.

3.title: FR - Baron Noir - S03E01 - Check up
FR - Baron Noir - S03E02 - Diaspora
FR - Baron Noir - S03E03 - #MeToo
FR - Baron Noir - S03E04 - Inventaire
FR - Baron Noir - S03E05 - Satanas
FR - Baron Noir - S03E06 - Oui
FR - Baron Noir - S03E07 - Brüder
FR - Baron Noir - S03E08 - Ahou !

1.title: FR - Paradise : Série - S01E01 - Wildcat Is Down
1.plot: It's just another day in Paradise until Agent Xavier Collins discovers one of the world's most powerful individuals has been viciously murdered. Xavier analyzes the crime scene while recalling his complex relationship with the victim.

1.title: FR - Paradise : Série - S01E02 - Sinatra
1.plot: Agent Xavier Collins is interrogated. Samantha Redmond (codename Sinatra) begins to reassure the community as she reflects on how she got to Paradise.

1.title: FR - Paradise : Série - S01E03 - The Architect of Social Well-Being
1.plot: Isolated, Xavier seeks answers on his own and cautiously turns to Dr. Gabriela Torabi. Meanwhile, Billy and Jane feel the pressure from Robinson's investigation.

1.title: FR - Paradise : Série - S01E04 - Agent Billy Pace
1.plot: The citizens of Paradise celebrate at the annual carnival. Xavier and Billy delve deeper into their investigation.

1.title: FR - Paradise : Série - S01E05 - In the Palaces of Crowned Kings
1.plot: Xavier faces the consequences of his investigation, forcing him to consider how to proceed. Meanwhile Cal's family history and his last days are examined.

1.title: FR - Paradise : Série - S01E06 - You Asked for Miracles
1.plot: Xavier and Robinson set their plans in motion while Sinatra works to preserve the status quo in Paradise.

1.title: FR - Paradise : Série - S01E07 - The Day
1.plot: Sinatra and Xavier confront the past, returning to the harrowing day that brought them to Paradise.

1.title: FR - Paradise : Série - S01E08 - The Man Who Kept the Secrets
1.plot: Xavier and Robinson race to find President Bradford’s murderer before it's too late.

2.title: FR - Paradise : Série - S02E01 - Graceland
2.plot: Annie is a tour guide in Memphis, TN when the world ends. Her survival in the ensuing years after The Day is revealed as well as her encounter with a traveling group of survivors.

2.title: FR - Paradise : Série - S02E02 - Mayday
2.plot: Xavier battles the elements and other threats as he follows a broadcast to Atlanta in search of his wife, Teri.

2.title: FR - Paradise : Série - S02E03 - Another Day in Paradise
2.plot: Sinatra wakes to discover a new paradigm in the bunker and takes steps to safeguard its biggest secret.

2.title: FR - Paradise : Série - S02E04 - A Holy Charge
2.plot: Xavier and Annie travel to Atlanta, contrasting life in this new world and the one he left behind in the bunker.

2.title: FR - Paradise : Série - S02E05 - The Mailman
2.plot: Xavier meets Gary and learns what happened to Teri on The Day.

2.title: FR - Paradise : Série - S02E06 - Jane
2.plot: Xavier and Gary set their plan in motion. Back in Paradise, Sinatra takes action, while Gabriela follows a new lead, and Jane's past is revealed.

2.title: FR - Paradise : Série - S02E07 - The Final Countdown
2.plot: Xavier has unfinished business. Meanwhile, Sinatra meets with Link as Paradise prepares for a potential threat.

2.title: FR - Paradise : Série - S02E08 - Exodus
2.plot: Worlds collide. Time is of the essence for Xavier. Link and his team spring into action. Sinatra puts it all on the line.

meta.plot: Une communauté paisible est habitée par certaines des personnalités les plus en vue de la planète. Mais leur tranquillité explose lorsqu'un meurtre choquant est commis et qu'une enquête aux enjeux considérables se met en place.

Couvrant l'impact de plusieurs décennies de Combs sur la musique et la culture populaire, depuis ses débuts en tant que créateur talentueux jusqu'à son arrestation en 2024, la docu-série révèle les allégations insidieuses et terrifiantes d'agression sexuelle, de comportement abusif, de violence et d'autres allégations troublantes qui sous-tendent son succès.

1.title: FR - La chute de P. Diddy - S01E01 - The Making of a Mogul
1.plot: The charges against Combs followed a series of lawsuits filed by multiple defendants accusing him of assorted misconduct. Combs has denied the claims and has pleaded not guilty. He is currently being held in federal custody in Brooklyn as he awaits trial,

1.title: FR - La chute de P. Diddy - S01E02 - Empire Under Fire
1.plot: Diddy’s business empire seems untouchable as it expands beyond music.

1.title: FR - La chute de P. Diddy - S01E03 - Untouchable
1.plot: Combs changes his name and rises to new heights on Broadway and reality TV, soon reaching billionaire status. However, behind his empire, people come forward with allegations of mistreatments like body shaming, physical abuse, sexual assault and brutal rape.

1.title: FR - La chute de P. Diddy - S01E04 - The Fall
1.plot: Publicly, Combs and Cassie become a power couple but witnesses reveal startling allegations of abuse by Combs toward Cassie kept quiet for years.

1.title: FR - Madoff : l'arnaque du siècle - S01E01 - Part 1: Millions to Billions
FR - Madoff : l'arnaque du siècle - S01E02 - Part 2: Catch Me If You Cancer

meta.plot: Entrez dans l'esprit machiavélique du plus grand arnaqueur du siècle. Un illusionniste en col blanc qui avait conquis la confiance aveugle des milliardaires du monde entier. L'argent qu'il utilisait pour payer les intérêts de ses gros clients provenait d'investisseurs plus modestes, qui affluaient par milliers, alléchés par de mirifiques promesses de rentabilité. Jusqu'à ce que la crise de 2008 éclate, que tous demandent à récupérer leur argent, et que l'empire de Bernard Madoff ne s'écroule avec perte et fracas, en même temps que ses clients plongeaient tête la première dans la faillite. Condamné en 2009 à une peine de 150 ans de prison pour escroquerie, Madoff a aussi vu sa famille exploser en vol.

1.title: FR - Votre fidèle serviteur Spider-Man - S01E01 - Amazing Fantasy
1.plot: During high school orientation Peter's life is forever changed. A new era of Spider-Man begins here!

1.title: FR - Votre fidèle serviteur Spider-Man - S01E02 - The Parker Luck
1.plot: Peter begins an exclusive internship, but his first day is way more complicated than he expected.

1.title: FR - Votre fidèle serviteur Spider-Man - S01E03 - Secret Identity Crisis
1.plot: Peter deals with the fallout of his secret revealed. Meanwhile, Lonnie's perfect life falls apart.

1.title: FR - Votre fidèle serviteur Spider-Man - S01E04 - Hitting the Big Time
1.plot: Peter and Norman work through creative differences, while Lonnie undergoes a loyalty test.

1.title: FR - Votre fidèle serviteur Spider-Man - S01E05 - The Unicorn Unleashed
1.plot: Peter makes a new friend. Meanwhile, Lonnie finds himself in the sights of a dangerous gang.

1.title: FR - Votre fidèle serviteur Spider-Man - S01E06 - Duel with the Devil
1.plot: Peter's night off is derailed when he must suit up to stop a mysterious intruder.

1.title: FR - Votre fidèle serviteur Spider-Man - S01E07 - Scorpion Rising
1.plot: Peter and Lonnie face the consequences of their secret lives. Spider-Man faces his biggest threat.

1.title: FR - Votre fidèle serviteur Spider-Man - S01E08 - Tangled Web
1.plot: Norman gives Spider-Man an ultimatum, causing Peter to do some soul-searching.

1.title: FR - Votre fidèle serviteur Spider-Man - S01E09 - Hero or Menace
1.plot: Spider-Man swings into action, as Lonnie looks to settle a score and Norman visits an old friend.

1.title: FR - Votre fidèle serviteur Spider-Man - S01E10 - If This Be My Destiny...
1.plot: Peter's internship takes a dark turn with the arrival of an unexpected visitor.

meta.plot: Peter Parker est en passe de devenir un héros, mais le chemin pour y parvenir n'a rien d'ordinaire.

1.title: FR - Beyond Skinwalker Ranch - S01E01 - Bradshaw Ranch
1.plot: Investigators Andy Bustamante and Paul Beban investigate Bradshaw Ranch in Sedona, AZ, and encounter dangerous radiation levels, a strange temperature anomaly, and a UAP.

1.title: FR - Beyond Skinwalker Ranch - S01E02 - Mt. Wilson Ranch
1.plot: Andy and Paul travel to Nevada, and investigate Mt. Wilson, a property once owned by Robert Bigelow and thought to contain mysterious tunnels that lead to a buried UFO.

1.title: FR - Beyond Skinwalker Ranch - S01E03 - Rocky Mountain Ranch
1.plot: Investigator Katie Paige first encountered terrifying High Strangeness as a 9-year-old while living at Rocky Mountain Ranch in Colorado; now Andy and Paul are bringing her back after 50 years to see if they can capture scientific evidence of the property reacting to her presence.

1.title: FR - Beyond Skinwalker Ranch - S01E03 - Rocky Mountain Ranch
1.plot: Investigator Katie Paige first encountered terrifying High Strangeness as a 9-year-old while living at Rocky Mountain Ranch in Colorado; now Andy and Paul are bringing her back after 50 years to see if they can capture scientific evidence of the property reacting to her presence.

1.title: FR - Beyond Skinwalker Ranch - S01E04 - Thomas Miller Ranch
1.plot: One ranch in Colorado has experienced 16 cattle mutilations and over 15 traffic fatalities on a highway running through the property; Andy and Paul investigate to see if the two are related and come face to face with unexplained phenomenon.

1.title: FR - Beyond Skinwalker Ranch - S01E05 - Bradshaw Ranch Pt. 2
1.plot: Andy and Paul return to Bradshaw Ranch in Sedona, Arizona in search of a rumored secret military base--and find themselves in a situation that could jeopardize the entire Beyond Skinwalker mission.

1.title: FR - Beyond Skinwalker Ranch - S01E06 - Bridgewater Triangle
1.plot: Andy and Paul are in Massachusetts to investigate one of America's oldest sites of High Strangeness and discover that an ancient Native American curse could still be active.

1.title: FR - Beyond Skinwalker Ranch - S01E07 - Navajo Nation
1.plot: Andy and Paul partner with the Navajo Rangers and an experiencer with unprecedented access to forbidden land in Navajo Nation to hunt for evidence of Skinwalkers.

1.title: FR - Beyond Skinwalker Ranch - S01E08 - Chris Bledsoe
1.plot: Andy and Paul travel to Fayetteville, N.C., to investigate a man who has video evidence of his repeated alleged encounters with UAPs and to test his possible quantum entanglement abilities.

1.title: FR - Beyond Skinwalker Ranch - S01E09 - Batting a thousand
1.plot: In this special episode Brandon, Travis, and Erik review the learnings of the Beyond Skinwalker Ranch mission's first season, where Andy and Paul experienced High Strangeness throughout America.

meta.plot: Utilizing a team of reputable professionals working alongside "The Secret of Skinwalker Ranch" veterans, this series explores other sites of unusual activity and "high strangeness" phenomena in an effort to discover if the activity documented on Skinwalker Ranch is not only real, but pervasive.

1.title: FR - Le Hooligan - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: After an unfortunate run in with some of the Kosynierzy men, Kuba is lured into the security and camaraderie of Zyga's inner circle.

1.title: FR - Le Hooligan - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Michał begins to suspect that Kuba's loyalty to his club may get him into a spiral of trouble, while Justyna has a score to settle with a DNA test.

1.title: FR - Le Hooligan - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Recovering from his injury, Kuba struggles to separate the club from the man, and Michał fears for the safety of his family when the police come knocking.

1.title: FR - Le Hooligan - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: When Kuba's new allegiance to Kosynierzy comes under question, he must prove to them that he is truly one of their own... no matter the consequences.

meta.plot: Lorsque son père est libéré de prison, Kuba, 17 ans, a du mal à ne pas suivre ses traces sur la voie du hooliganisme. Après tout, le football, c'est la famille.

Martha Bellamy, Jack Weston et Charlotte "Charlie" Steele sont trois détectives aux approches bien distinctes. A chaque épisode, ils enquêteront sur une nouvelle affaire, chacun adoptant sa propre méthode. Dans cette série où il n'y a pas de script, les dialogues sont improvisés par les acteurs.

1.title: FR - Suspects - S01E01 - Alone
1.plot: A two-year-old girl is abducted from her home and her dysfunctional family comes under immediate suspicion, but then a convicted child killer is also connected to the case.

1.title: FR - Suspects - S01E02 - Calling Card
1.plot: Jack and Charlie investigate an assault on the owner of the Green Pit nightclub in east London and discover the victim's sister unconscious in the cellar, with blood pouring from a head wound. The detectives' efforts to piece together what happened are hampered by the lack of CCTV footage, and the case takes a confusing turn when a 19-year-old student is found dead with a flyer for the club in his pocket.

1.title: FR - Suspects - S01E03 - Hard Target
1.plot: Jack and Charlie's hunt for a serial rapist becomes complicated when the latest woman to be attacked turns out to be Diane Ackerman - the wife of the station's chief superintendent Howard. A routine background check reveals that the police had recently been called to their address and Diane has a bruise on her throat that predates the rape.

1.title: FR - Suspects - S01E04 - Sensitivity
1.plot: Euthanasia campaigner Terence Holland is found unconscious in his penthouse flat by his doctor after an apparent drugs overdose, leading to the assumption that the terminally ill man had found someone to help him die. However, evidence at the scene prompts Martha to speculate that this could be a case of attempted murder.

1.title: FR - Suspects - S01E05 - Eyes Closed
1.plot: Jack and Charlie are called out in the early hours after a 13-year-old girl is stabbed. The hospital reports back that she was eight weeks pregnant, shows signs of possible self-harming and had been previously sexually assaulted, while a number on her mobile phone belongs to the cab driver who drove her to hospital and claimed he did not know her.

2.title: FR - Suspects - S02E01 - Nobody Else (Part One)
2.plot: In the first of a two-part story, DI Martha Bellamy's neighbour, barrister Jonathan Moxton, is discovered at his home with serious head injuries, his wrists bound with a belt and a pair of knickers stuffed in his mouth. DS Jack Weston guesses he was involved in a sex game that went badly wrong and suspicion falls on Saul Hammond, the man who found him.

2.title: FR - Suspects - S02E02 - Nobody Else (Part Two)
2.plot: The body of a student, Michael Collins is found on Crowford common. The killer is suspected to be the person who attacked Moxton.

2.title: FR - Suspects - S02E03 - Vigilante (Part One)
2.plot: Jack leads an investigation into the dark world of child sex offenders. He becomes too emotionally involved within the case after a brutal attack is made on an amateur paedophile hunter Scott Freeman.

2.title: FR - Suspects - S02E04 - Vigilante (Part Two)
2.plot: The suspected leader of the paedophile ring is murdered and the hunt is on to find the killer.

3.title: FR - Suspects - S03E01 - The Artist
3.plot: The London detectives investigate a brutal attack on a popular art teacher at her college.

3.title: FR - Suspects - S03E02 - Victim
3.plot: The team investigates the case of a badly burned young woman who has been dumped in the Thames.

3.title: FR - Suspects - S03E03 - Safe from Harm
3.plot: In the team's investigation of a petrol-bomb attack, Jack sets his sights on a reprobate property developer who has so far managed to elude conviction.

3.title: FR - Suspects - S03E04 - Connections
3.plot: After a teenaged girl is found naked and severely wounded, Charlie tries to identify the victim and connect her to the case of a recent girl gone missing.

4.title: FR - Suspects - S04E01 - AWOL
4.plot: The team investigate a missing persons case when a soldier suffering from PTSD fails to turn up to his mother's funeral.

4.title: FR - Suspects - S04E02 - Revenge
4.plot: The team reopen an old case of a fatal stabbing, after a criminal involved in the original attack is left for dead in a copycat crime.

4.title: FR - Suspects - S04E03 - Ricochet
4.plot: The team are shocked by the shooting in broad daylight of a popular clergyman outside the boxing club that he runs for disaffected youths. Martha suspects that the vicar’s hug-a-hoodie approach has backfired - but the investigation soon moves into far darker territory…

4.title: FR - Suspects - S04E04 - Rough Justice
4.plot: When an elderly widow is brutally attacked in her own home on a notorious London estate, the team set out to find her attacker.

meta.plot: Père célibataire vivant en Alaska, Beef Tobin fait de son mieux pour s'occuper de sa progéniture. Sa seule fille, Judy, laquelle nourrit des ambitions artistiques, commence à travailler dans un centre commercial, un univers très éloigné de l'entreprise familiale à savoir la pêche.

1.title: FR - The Great North - S01E01 - Sexi Moose Adventure
1.plot: While the children's mother is not in the picture, Judy seeks guidance from her new boss, Alyson, and her imaginary friend, Alanis Morissette, who appears to her in the Northern Lights. The family's plans to celebrate Judy's 16th birthday on the family fishing boat go awry after a moose breaks into the Tobin's home.

1.title: FR - The Great North - S01E02 - Feast of Not People Adventure
1.plot: Judy is worried that she and Ham are growing apart when she discovers he's been keeping a secret from her. The rest of the family participates in a town festival.

1.title: FR - The Great North - S01E03 - Avocado Barter Adventure
1.plot: Wolf tries to find the perfect six-month anniversary gift for Honeybee. Meanwhile, Judy interviews Honeybee for the school newspaper and learns about her thrilling early years in Fresno.

1.title: FR - The Great North - S01E04 - Romantic Meat-Based Adventure
1.plot: Worried that she’s inherited Beef’s fear of romance, Judy forces her dad to get back out there by attending a meat auction and singles mixer in the hopes of bringing home a new love, and also maybe some sausages.

1.title: FR - The Great North - S01E05 - Curl Interrupted Adventure
1.plot: Beef enlists Judy to help coach his adult curling team. Meanwhile, Wolf tries to turn the family fishing boat into a sunset cruise for lovers.

1.title: FR - The Great North - S01E06 - Pride & Prejudance Adventure
1.plot: Judy asks her crush to the most romantic dance of the school year, not realizing he's got eyes for someone else. Meanwhile, Beef's Brother, Brian, comes up for a visit from Anchorage.

1.title: FR - The Great North - S01E07 - Period Piece Adventure
1.plot: Judy asks Alyson to help her with an exciting opportunity to lead an art project at school. Meanwhile, the local paper prints a story involving Beef, and the family investigates to discover the truth.

1.title: FR - The Great North - S01E08 - Keep Beef-lievin' Adventure
1.plot: When Moon begins to doubt the existence of Bigfoot, Beef enlists the family's help to get him believing again. Meanwhile, Honeybee gets a surprise visitor from Fresno.

1.title: FR - The Great North - S01E09 - Tusk in the Wind Adventure
1.plot: Beef and Wolf meet their hero, legendary mountain man, Tusk Johnson! Judy and the rest of the Tobin clan become addicted to '80s primetime soap "Dynasty".

1.title: FR - The Great North - S01E10 - Game of Snownes Adventure
1.plot: A blizzard threatens the Tobin family game night. Meanwhile, Beef makes a new friend in the woods.

1.title: FR - The Great North - S01E11 - My Fart Will Go On Adventure
1.plot: While the family prepares for Wolf and Honeybee's wedding, an unexpected guest RSVPs.

2.title: FR - The Great North - S02E01 - Brace/Off Adventure
2.plot: Judy embarks on a journey after getting some unexpected news from the dentist.

2.title: FR - The Great North - S02E02 - The Great Punkin' Adventure
2.plot: A punk band invites Ham to audition after hearing him scream. Meanwhile, Honeybee and Wolf get their first directing gig.

2.title: FR - The Great North - S02E03 - The Yawn of the Dead Adventure
2.plot: Moon, Judy and Ham try to survive Alaska's darkest and spookiest day of the year. Meanwhile, Wolf and Honeybee attempt to replace Beef's favorite shirt.

2.title: FR - The Great North - S02E04 - Wanted: Delmer Alive Adventure
2.plot: After Delmer suffers a concussion while eating soup, the Tobins tell their favorite stories about him in order to keep him awake and alive.

2.title: FR - The Great North - S02E05 - Beef's Craig Beef Adventure
2.plot: When Wolf discovers that Beef secretly wants a jet ski, he formulates a plan to get it; Ham bonds with a novelty singing fish toy.

2.title: FR - The Great North - S02E06 - Skidmark Holmes Adventure
2.plot: Judy's murder mystery party doesn't go exactly as planned; Alyson invites herself on a date with Beef.

2.title: FR - The Great North - S02E07 - Tasteful Noods Adventure
2.plot: Ham is assigned an after-school job at a restaurant as part of "Careers Week," and gets an unexpected surprise. Meanwhile, Moon develops a crush on an older woman.

2.title: FR - The Great North - S02E08 - Good Beef Hunting Adventure
2.plot: During Thanksgiving week, the Tobin kids and Honeybee take part in an old family tradition called The Beef Hunt. Meanwhile, Beef wrestles with his greatest fear.

2.title: FR - The Great North - S02E09 - From Tusk Til Dawn Adventure
2.plot: Former celebrity mountain man, Tusk Johnson, returns to Lone Moose with a big favor to ask of Beef and Wolf. Meanwhile, Honeybee enters a contest to win her own mall kiosk.

2.title: FR - The Great North - S02E10 - Dip The Halls Adventure
2.plot: When Jerry's Bigfoot costume gets stolen a few days before Christmas, Beef helps him track it down. The Tobin kids try to build an elaborate gingerbread village.

2.title: FR - The Great North - S02E11 - Dances With Wolfs Adventure
2.plot: Moon helps Wolf deal with their parents' divorce. Honeybee encounters Lone Moose's most famous City Councilperson, who happens to be an eagle.

2.title: FR - The Great North - S02E12 - Beef Mommas House Adventure
2.plot: Beef joins a local moms' group, while Moon and his friends build a Dread Sled. Meanwhile, the rest of the family digs into the investigation of Wolf and Honeybee's disappearing potholder.

2.title: FR - The Great North - S02E13 - Saved by the Spells Adventure
2.plot: Judy relaunches the Saved by the Spells, a legendary secret society. Meanwhile, Honeybee and Wolf have a surprising week, and Moon makes a new friend on his CB radio.

2.title: FR - The Great North - S02E14 - Stools Rush in Adventure
2.plot: The school is putting on a musical based on "The Perfect Storm," and Judy desperately wants to be one of the leads. Meanwhile, Moon tries to convince his family he's ready to stay home alone for the very first time.

2.title: FR - The Great North - S02E16 - As Goldie As It Gets Adventure
2.plot: Ham befriends an older woman who loves to party. Meanwhile, Judy takes up pottery and is not great at it.

2.title: FR - The Great North - S02E17 - Dead Moon Walking Adventure
2.plot: After seeing something he shouldn't have, Moon incurs Debbie's wrath. Meanwhile, Beef is determined to save his favorite museum from being closed down.

2.title: FR - The Great North - S02E18 - Beef's in Toyland Adventure
2.plot: Beef struggles when the boat needs repairs and he can't fish for a whole week. Meanwhile, Wolf and Honeybee meet the best-looking man in Lone Moose.

2.title: FR - The Great North - S02E19 - Poetry of the Penals Adventure
2.plot: Wolf chaperones Ham and Judy on a school field trip to the abandoned Death Cliff Prison. Meanwhile, Beef accidentally agrees to compose a poem.

2.title: FR - The Great North - S02E20 - Say It Again, Ham Adventure
2.plot: With Crispin's help, Ham tries to re-create a more theatrical version of his coming out. Meanwhile, hoping to record their first true crime podcast, Wolf and Honeybee investigate a local cold case and are shocked by what they uncover.

2.title: FR - The Great North - S02E21 - Slide & Wet-judice Adventure
2.plot: A new indoor water park is opening in Lone Moose, and all of the Tobins want to go, except for Wolf, who's convinced that he's cursed to always lose his swim trunks in front of the entire town.

2.title: FR - The Great North - S02E22 - Papa Don't Fiend Adventure
2.plot: The Tobins spend Father's Day weekend at an RV park and uncover the identity of the Fiend of Family Land. Then, Moon meets a skunk, and Judy thinks she's found a new love.

meta.plot: Fara a 30 ans, sans appart, sans boulot, sans mec, mais avec une forte myopie. Avec sa grand-mère, sa mère et sa sœur sur ses côtes H24, il est temps qu'elle se bouge et qu'elle commence à faire des choix. Entre son meilleur pote qui est peut-être son Muslim Bachelor et ce nouveau gars un peu perché qui tombe amoureux d’elle. Entre ménager sa mère encore bloquée sur le passé et renouer les liens avec son père. Entre constamment se raconter des histoires et enfin affronter la vérité. Lorsque la vie ne cesse de te mettre des claques, il faut se prendre en main et arrêter d’être une «miskina ».

1.title: FR - Miskina, la pauvre - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Miskina, la pauvre - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Miskina, la pauvre - S01E03 - Episode 3

FR - Miskina, la pauvre - S01E06 - Episode 6
