FR - Miskina, la pauvre - S01E08 - Episode 8

meta.plot: Un médium malheureux mais talentueux aide les fantômes de New York à régler les affaires terrestres qui les empêchent de trouver le repos...

1.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S01E01 - The Sexorcism
1.plot: Kevin struggles to help a ghost whose unfinished business involves losing his virginity to an ex-girlfriend.

1.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S01E02 - The Hot God Contest
1.plot: When the ghost of a competitive eater starts unplugging feeding tubes at a hospital, Kevin must convince the recipient of the ghost’s stomach to enter one last hot-dog eating contest.

1.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S01E03 - The Knockoff
1.plot: While helping the ghost of a DVD bootlegger recover the last movie he ever shot, Kevin encounters mafia members looking for the same tape, which just might contain footage of a mob hit.

1.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S01E04 - The Comedium
1.plot: When a deceased stand-up comedian continues to take the stage each night after closing, Kevin looks for the worst audience possible to heckle him into the Light.

1.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S01E05 - Out of Body Issues
1.plot: After Roofie falls for a saleswoman at a clothing store, Kevin must help the ghost of a former employee track down exploitative photos of her taken by the company’s sleazy CEO.

1.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S01E06 - Raising the Dead
1.plot: In an attempt to reconnect with his boyhood crush, Kevin tries to barter for a special gift by exorcising a haunted orphanage… on Halloween.

1.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S01E07 - The Calamityville Horror
1.plot: Roofie brings Kevin along to fix up a teardown he bought online, but when the house locks the two friends inside, Kevin must uncover the reason behind the haunting.

1.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S01E09 - Sixty Feet Under
1.plot: When the Mayor of New York City offers him a career-making case, Kevin encounters the toughest ghost problem he’s ever faced.

1.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S01E10 - Pieces of Sue
1.plot: Kevin races to help the ghost of a friend finish her unfinished business before time runs out.

2.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S02E01 - The Ex-orcism
2.plot: Sue finds herself unable to move on into the light in her new ghost form, though Pac is here to help.

2.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S02E02 - Table for Sue
2.plot: Pac agrees to help out a new upscale restaurant haunted by the ghost of a previous chef, who can’t pass on until a smug Yelp reviewer retracts his dissatisfied critique. Chamomile tricks Pac into working for her.

2.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S02E03 - Ghosts Just Wanna Have Fun
2.plot: Pac must convince a cranky teenage ghost to haunt elsewhere.

2.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S02E04 - Last Dance with Edith Jane
2.plot: Pac helps a 1940’s Broadway dancer train for a nursing home talent show.

2.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S02E05 - The Occult Leader
2.plot: Pac becomes the reluctant cult leader of a group en route to Pluto.

2.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S02E06 - Good Will Haunting
2.plot: Pac takes a job at a school in order to help the ghost of a janitor.

2.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S02E07 - The Blowfish Job
2.plot: Pac's adoptive father TJ shows up in need of Pac's help exorcising his new apartment.

2.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S02E08 - The Spank Job
2.plot: Pac helps a ghost rescue his girlfriend from their Y2K bunker, now trapped beneath a sperm bank.

2.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S02E09 - The Emancipation Apparition
2.plot: Pac and Sue’s romantic staycation at the Waldorf Astoria is interrupted by the ghost of a US President.

2.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S02E10 - The Unholy Trinity
2.plot: Frustrated that they can’t consummate their relationship physically, Pac and Sue hire a sex vessel for Sue to possess.

2.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S02E11 - The Polaroid Flasher
2.plot: Roofie, arrested for drug dealing, needs Pac’s help from prison to obtain a specific bag of weed.

2.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S02E12 - The Ghost of Christmas Presents
2.plot: Pac is visited by the ghost of Santa Claus who needs his help delivering one final present.

2.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S02E13 - Finger Fucked
2.plot: Federal immigration agents crash Pac’s surprise party to celebrate Roofie’s release from prison.

3.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S03E01 - El Caboose
3.plot: In order to afford to leave the seedy massage parlor where he’s been hiding out for the past 6 months, Pac helps the ghost of a Mexican drug mule.

3.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S03E02 - Digging Up The Past
3.plot: Pac moves into Clyde’s apartment, only to realize it is being haunted by Clyde’s former guidance counselor, whose death may have been Clyde’s fault.

3.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S03E03 - Bong Pong
3.plot: Pac and Clyde’s first professional ghost case together involves a dead stoner who can’t remember his unfinished business.

3.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S03E04 - The Cindy 500
3.plot: Pac and Clyde help the ghost of a dead porn star who is refusing to let her daughter get married in peace.

3.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S03E05 - Weeknight at Skillitz
3.plot: Pac and Clyde help the perverted ghost of a famous DJ in order to get entrance to the exclusive nightclub Le Douche.

3.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S03E06 - Hawk Smith
3.plot: In order to meet Instagram celebrity Danny Poker, whom Pac believes has insight into his ghost-seeing abilities, the boys must help the ghost of a wannabe superhero.

3.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S03E07 - Am-Ish
3.plot: Pac finally gets face time with Danny Poker, but is interrupted by the ghost of an Amish man looking for his son; Clyde tries to have an orgy.

3.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S03E08 - The Duchess of Stourbridge
3.plot: When the completely naked ghost of a 17th century Duchess follows him home, Pac must help fix a painting of her before she will let him eat.

3.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S03E09 - The Shawshanked Redemption
3.plot: Persuaded by Danny to take a high profile case, Pac attempts to exorcise a notoriously dangerous prison; Clyde tests out a new form of advertising.

3.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S03E10 - Diaper Training
3.plot: Pac and Danny wake up after a “Boys’ Night In” gone horribly wrong, only to find that Clyde (and Danny’s favorite belt) have gone missing.

3.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S03E11 - Medieval Dead
3.plot: Pac tries to help the ghost of an old-timey King get revenge on the Knight who betrayed him; Clyde makes some new friends.

3.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S03E12 - Abra-Cadaver
3.plot: Pac’s get-rich-quick scheme is derailed by the ghost of a 1980s magician who never got to finish his final trick; Clyde prepares a passive-aggressive dinner.

3.title: FR - RIP : Fauchés et sans repos - S03E13 - Death List Three
3.plot: Pac finally gets answers from Danny, but they’re not exactly the answers he was hoping for…

meta.plot: A Charleston, en Caroline du Sud, une magnifique avocate originaire du Nord et un collègue qui vient de la région opposée ont de grandes difficultés à cacher leur attirance mutuelle alors qu'un scandale sexuel éclate au sein du commissariat de la ville...

1.title: FR - Reckless : La loi de Charleston - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Courtroom adversaries feel an instant romantic attraction in this legal drama, which begins when the newly appointed City Attorney squares off against a defense lawyer in a sex scandal case involving multiple members of the Charleston Police Department.

1.title: FR - Reckless : La loi de Charleston - S01E02 - Parting Shots
1.plot: Things take an unexpected violent turn when Jamie and Roy represent opposing sides in a heated custody case. Meanwhile, Roy's feeling conflicted about how to handle the missing footage from the police department sex tape.

1.title: FR - Reckless : La loi de Charleston - S01E03 - Stand Your Ground
1.plot: A judge suggests that Lee Anne accept a settlement offer in an effort to put an end to the scandal that's embroiling the city; at the same time, Jamie and Roy argue opposing sides in a stand-your-ground case.

1.title: FR - Reckless : La loi de Charleston - S01E04 - Blind Sides
1.plot: When two football players are accused of killing their coach, Jamie and Roy put aside their differences and work together to clear their names. Meanwhile, Preston begs for Jamie’s forgiveness after she sees his face on the Lee Anne Marcus sex tape.

1.title: FR - Reckless : La loi de Charleston - S01E05 - Bloodstone
1.plot: Jamie dedicates herself to clearing the name of a pro bono client wrongfully accused of murder, and enlists Roy’s help with the case. Meanwhile, Knox faces a moral dilemma regarding the Lee Anne Marcus case as he considers running for mayor.

1.title: FR - Reckless : La loi de Charleston - S01E06 - Family Plot
1.plot: Roy agrees to represent his ex-wife’s fiancé in a disputed property deal which may have resulted in murder. Meanwhile, Jamie awaits the results of Lee Anne’s drug test.

1.title: FR - Reckless : La loi de Charleston - S01E07 - Deep Waters
1.plot: When an affluent Charleston socialite goes missing after a boating accident, Jamie and Roy face off over the ensuing wrongful death suit brought against the city. Meanwhile, the tension between Jamie and Roy heats up when they share a dance at the Mayor’s ball. Also, Lee Anne finds support from an unlikely ally, as her case is threatened when another woman brings similar charges of sexual harassment against the city.

1.title: FR - Reckless : La loi de Charleston - S01E08 - When the Smoke Clears
1.plot: When Roy agrees to defend his high school sweetheart against murder charges, the case threatens his family’s reputation and his position at the law firm. Meanwhile, Lee Anne tries to break things off with Terry once and for all.

1.title: FR - Reckless : La loi de Charleston - S01E09 - Damage Control
1.plot: Roy asks Terry to testify against Lee Anne in an attempt to get her sexual discrimination lawsuit against the police department thrown out of court.

1.title: FR - Reckless : La loi de Charleston - S01E10 - Fifty-One Percent
1.plot: Jamie and Roy face off in civil court as Charleston reacts to the Lee Anne Marcus sex tape being leaked to the media. Meanwhile, Knox faces a moral dilemma when he discovers a dirty secret that could derail Joyce Reed’s mayoral campaign.

1.title: FR - Reckless : La loi de Charleston - S01E11 - And So It Begins
1.plot: When Vi's ex-husband is accused of medical malpractice, Jamie works to clear his name, only to find out that a relationship with a former patient could put his entire career at risk. Meanwhile, jury selection in Lee Anne's case is complicated by a possible planted juror. Also, the love triangle between Jamie, Roy and Preston gets even hotter.

1.title: FR - Reckless : La loi de Charleston - S01E12 - Civil Wars (1)
1.plot: Jamie and Roy are on opposite sides of the biggest courtroom battle of their careers when Lee Anne’s sexual harassment case against the Charleston Police Department finally goes to trial and a verdict is rendered. Meanwhile, Jamie and Roy decide whether or not they are ready to take the next step in their relationship.

1.title: FR - Reckless : La loi de Charleston - S01E13 - Civil Wars (2)
1.plot: Jamie and Roy are on opposite sides of the biggest courtroom battle of their careers when Lee Anne’s sexual harassment case against the Charleston Police Department finally goes to trial and a verdict is rendered. Meanwhile, Jamie and Roy decide whether or not they are ready to take the next step in their relationship.

meta.plot: Au cours des 30 dernières années, le milliardaire de l'immobilier new-yorkais Robert Durst a été accusé de meurtre à trois reprises, sans jamais être inculpé. Brillant mais réservé, il a toujours gardé le silence. Jusqu'à maintenant.

1.title: FR - Jinx : la vie et les morts de Robert Durst - S01E01 - Chapter 1: A Body in the Bay
1.plot: A dismembered body discovered in Texas in 2001 is possibly connected to Durst. In 2012, Durst contacts director Andrew Jarecki about an interview.

1.title: FR - Jinx : la vie et les morts de Robert Durst - S01E02 - Chapter 2: Poor Little Rich Boy
1.plot: Robert Durst discusses witnessing his mother's suicide when he was a child and his 1973 marriage to Kathleen McCormack, who disappeared in 1982.

1.title: FR - Jinx : la vie et les morts de Robert Durst - S01E03 - Chapter 3: The Gangster's Daughter
1.plot: Nearly 20 years after his wife disappeared, Robert Durst makes headlines again when his longtime confidante Susan Berman--a potential witness in the disappearance of Kathie Durst--is murdered in LA.

1.title: FR - Jinx : la vie et les morts de Robert Durst - S01E04 - Chapter 4: The State of Texas vs. Robert Durst
1.plot: Two years after the dismembered body of Morris Black washed up on the shores of Galveston, TX, Robert Durst goes on trial with a formidable team of attorneys and a brilliant defense strategy.

1.title: FR - Jinx : la vie et les morts de Robert Durst - S01E05 - Chapter 5: Family Values
1.plot: Present Day: In the 33 years since Kathie Durst disappeared, no progress has been made in finding out what happened to her, or finding her body. Without answers, her family and friends continue to hunt for the truth.

1.title: FR - Jinx : la vie et les morts de Robert Durst - S01E06 - Chapter 6: What the Hell Did I Do?
1.plot: Present day: Nearly a decade has passed since the filmmakers began investigating Robert Durst and his alleged crimes. They have spoken to more than 100 participants in Robert's story, including family, friends, police, lawyers, jurors and journalists in an attempt to get at the truth.

2.title: FR - Jinx : la vie et les morts de Robert Durst - S02E01 - Why Are You Still Here?
2.plot: As new evidence is revealed, Robert Durst is arrested and charged with Susan Berman's murder. But who will support Bob in his time of need?

2.title: FR - Jinx : la vie et les morts de Robert Durst - S02E02 - Friendships Die Hard
2.plot: From jail, Bob makes frequent calls to people who've helped him in the past, including a longtime friend who is keeping his own secret.

2.title: FR - Jinx : la vie et les morts de Robert Durst - S02E03 - Saving My Tears Until It's Official
2.plot: At trial, prosecutors revisit the 1982 disappearance of Bob's first wife Kathie and make the case that Susan helped Bob cover up the crime.

2.title: FR - Jinx : la vie et les morts de Robert Durst - S02E04 - The Unluckiest Man in the World
2.plot: Longtime Durst confidant Stewart Altman defends him on the stand, but when his wife Emily testifies, she reveals crucial new details.

2.title: FR - Jinx : la vie et les morts de Robert Durst - S02E05 - Mostly the Truth
2.plot: Bob takes the stand to tell his version of events, but on cross-examination finds prosecutor Lewin better-prepared than he anticipated.

2.title: FR - Jinx : la vie et les morts de Robert Durst - S02E06 - It Takes a Village
2.plot: After Bob's death, Kathie's family files a lawsuit against his estate – forcing his friends and family to go on the record.

1.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S01E01 - The Mortal Cup
1.plot: One young woman realizes how dark the city can really be when she learns the truth about her past.

1.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S01E02 - The Descent Into Hell Isn't Easy
1.plot:
With the knowledge that Valentine is alive and on the hunt for The Mortal Cup, the Institute is on high alert. Not wasting any time, Jace jumps into action and figures Clary’s memories are the key to finding Jocelyn and The Mortal Cup. Unfortunately, Clary’s memories were wiped leaving her without any recollection of this other life that could help her and the team. With only one other option remaining, Jace, Isabelle and a very reluctant Alec take Clary to the City of Bones to face the powerful Silent Brothers.

Meanwhile, Luke continues his search for Clary, and Simon tries to come to terms with his best friend’s new life.

1.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S01E03 - Dead Man's Party
1.plot:
With Simon being held captive at The Hotel DuMort, Clary pleads with Jace, Alec and Isabelle to help her rescue her best friend. As the team readies for the mission, Jace helps Clary learn more about her Shadowhunter powers, Isabelle turns to her favorite Seelie for Intel, and Alec begins to question Jace's motives and his place in their partnership.

Meanwhile, a very scared Simon gets very up close and personal with Camille, the leader of the vampire clan.

1.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S01E04 - Raising Hell
1.plot:
After getting a clue about who may have wiped Clary's memories, the crew hunts down the High Warlock of Brooklyn, Magnus Bane. With all of the warlocks in hiding from Valentine, the team must lure Magnus out with something he can't refuse - a killer party and something very valuable. But with emotions running high, more may come out of their meeting with Magnus than just the retrieval of Clary's memories.

Meanwhile, Simon doesn't seem to be himself after his recent Downworlder encounter.

1.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S01E05 - Moo Shu to Go
1.plot:
Tensions escalate between Alec and Clary as they don't see eye to eye on the best way to hunt down Valentine. But when Jace and Isabelle are sent on an intel mission to the Seelies by Maryse Lightwood, Alec is put in charge of keeping Clary safe, much to both of their chagrin. With his hard-as-nails mother back in town and Clary's rule-breaking tendencies, Alec finds himself struggling to stick to the Claves rules while keeping his promise to Jace.

Meanwhile, the New York City Werewolf pack begins their hunt for Clary and The Mortal Cup.

1.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S01E06 - Of Men and Angels
1.plot:
With Luke in dire need of help, Jace, Clary and Simon take him to Magnus' lair in hopes of saving his life. Once there, the story of how Valentine came to be evil, and Jocelyn and Luke's past is revealed to Clary in hopes of triggering her memory of what happened to The Mortal Cup.

Meanwhile, Isabelle and Alec are tasked to restore their family name in the eyes of The Clave.

1.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S01E07 - Major Arcana
1.plot:
After piecing together the clues as to where her mother hid the Mortal Cup, Clary, Jace, Alec and Isabelle are on the clock to find its hiding place before anyone else. But with demons and Downworlders lurking everywhere, obtaining the Cup may not be as easy as they had hoped.

Meanwhile, as Simon's symptoms become increasingly worse, he fears he is turning into a vampire.

1.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S01E08 - Bad Blood
1.plot:
With word of Alec, Jace and Isabelle’s “extracurricular activities” with Clary reaching The Clave, a convoy is sent to observe the Lightwoods running the New York Institute. Once The Clave representative arrives, it is very clear how much trouble the Lightwoods are in.

Meanwhile, Clary is faced with a devastating decision.

1.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S01E09 - Rise Up
1.plot:
After the attack, the Institute and The Clave are on high alert and  taking no prisoners to get answers. When Lydia makes a harsh call on the  Seelies, Jace, Clary and Isabelle fear that this decision could be  disastrous and the wrong way to defeat Valentine. Left with no other  choice, the trio takes drastic actions to stop what is about to take  place.

Meanwhile, Simon struggles to deal with his new situation, and Alec is emotionally torn with what is happening at the Institute.

1.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S01E10 - This World Inverted
1.plot:
Clary and Jace get a tip from Meliorn that they can find Valentine by  locating a portal in another dimension, but only Clary can venture into  this new world. What Clary finds in this alternative universe is that  life there is as if the threat of demons no longer existed and  Shadowhunters were no longer needed. While she realizes that this  dimension is the life she always dreamed of, Clary must act fast or she  will lose herself in the alternative world forever.

Meanwhile, Alec and Isabelle must face the consequences of the Downworlder attack.

1.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S01E11 - Blood Calls To Blood
1.plot:
After receiving important intel about Valentine from a surprising ally, Clary, Jace and Luke devise a plan to rescue Jocelyn. With the mission looking almost impossible, the three will stop at nothing to rescue Clary’s mother and put a stop to Valentine once and for all.

Meanwhile, Inquisitor Herondale arrives at the Institute for Isabelle’s trial as Alec turns to Magnus for help.

1.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S01E12 - Malec
1.plot: The Institute is in full swing as everyone is preparing for the wedding of Alec and Lydia. Lydia is getting final touches made on her wedding dress, the wedding decorations are set and Isabelle is trying to figure out a way to throw a traditional, mundane bachelor party for her brother – whether he likes it or not. During what should be a time of great celebration for many is far from it as they examine their relationships. Alec is struggling on two sides – his wedding is one of the biggest days in his life and his parabatai should be at his side, yet he and Jace are still at odds. Alec also continues to struggle with his feelings for Magnus, especially when Magnus won’t give up on Alec. And as the Institute is buzzing with romance, Clary is desperate to work things out with Jace, but he is keeping her at arm’s length.  Meanwhile, Jace, Clary and Magnus go looking for warlock Ragnor Fell to try and find the antidote to awaken Jocelyn.

1.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S01E13 - Morning Star
1.plot:
Jace, who is still reeling from everything that has happened, makes hunting down Valentine his number one priority even though he continues to wrestle with his conflicted feelings. In hopes of finding a way to stop Valentine before it is too late, Clary and Simon must find the key to unlocking Jocelyn's coma. But that key to unlocking Jocelyn’s spell may just undo the Downworlder peace treaty, Simon's relationship with Raphael, and the Vampire clan in the process.

Meanwhile, Alec must deal with the aftermath of his decision and what his choice means for his future.

2.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S02E01 - This Guilty Blood
2.plot: Only hours have passed since Jace left with Valentine and all hell has broken loose at The Institute. Alec, Isabelle and Clary are desperate to find Jace, but are quickly stopped in their tracks with the arrival of Victor Aldertree, who means business about getting the Institute back on track. But getting the New York Shadowhunters in-line with The Clave may be counterintuitive to Alec, Isabelle and Clary's plan to rescue Jace. Meanwhile, Jocelyn has a lot to catch up on now that she is awake.

2.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S02E02 - A Door Into the Dark
2.plot: The hunt is on for Jace Wayland, and Alec and Isabelle hope to reach him before the rest of the Shadowhunters do. With orders from the Clave of “shoot to kill,” the Lightwood siblings must act fast. Also on his own search, Simon turns to Magnus for help when he finds himself at odds with both Raphael and Aldertree. Meanwhile, Clary struggles to find where she belongs since she doesn’t seem to fit into the Shadowhunter world, yet can’t go back to her mundane life.

2.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S02E03 - Parabatai Lost
2.plot: Already cut off from the Institute and his friends, Jace finds his situation worsen when he becomes a target for the New York wolf pack who believe Jace to be a killer. And don’t forget about Aldertree and the Shadowhunters who continue their own hunt for Jace! With Jace becoming the most wanted man in New York, can his friends get to him before everyone else? Meanwhile, Simon is on a search of his own as Raphael puts pressure on him to find Camille.

2.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S02E04 - Day of Wrath
2.plot: Clary continues to struggle with the new Shadowhunter order as Jace is being held in The City of Bones with an unknown fate, and all suspicion in the Shadowhunter world continues to rest on Valentine’s daughter. When duty calls, Clary gets a little reprieve from the family drama as she helps Alec and Isabelle hunt down a powerful demon. But what starts out as a routine mission quickly puts the Institute on high alert, and what happens next will change everything for the Shadowhunters and their Downworlder friends. Meanwhile, Jocelyn has a proposition for Clary as Raphael and Simon ramp up their hunt for Camille.

2.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S02E05 - Dust and Shadows
2.plot: After the recent attack on the Institute, the Shadowhunters are left devastated and wounded. Trying to regroup, each of the Shadowhunters deals with the situation their own way. Meanwhile, Simon moves home but finds it is not so easy to pull off his new life with his family around.

2.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S02E06 - Iron Sisters
2.plot: To help get answers to what Valentine may be planning, Isabelle and Clary are sent on a mission to visit the Iron Sisters. Once there, more truths may be revealed than Izzy and Clary planned. On a mission of their own, Simon and Maia are determined to find Luke who is still missing after the demon attack at the Institute. Meanwhile, Magnus and Alec finally go on their first date.

2.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S02E07 - How Are Thou Fallen
2.plot: Luke’s sister shows up at the Jade Wolf claiming innocence about the recent attack. But with Luke not trusting a word Cleo says, he finds himself at odds with Clary who sees an opportunity to get to Valentine. Yet how far will Clary go to prove she is right about Cleo? Meanwhile, Simon gets dating advice from a surprising source as Isabelle takes a dangerous path.

2.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S02E08 - Love Is a Devil
2.plot: Tasked with arranging his brother Max’s Rune Ceremony, Alex decides this would be the perfect opportunity for his family to get to know Magnus. But with tensions flying among the different Shadowhunters, Max’s big event quickly becomes an evening where they all must face their biggest fears. Meanwhile, Simon makes a bold move as Isabelle finds an unlikely new ally.

2.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S02E09 - Bound by Blood
2.plot: With word getting out that Clary is a key part of Valentine’s plan, the Downworlders are at odds on how to handle the issue. But when Iris activates her blood oath, Clary has more to worry about than hiding from Valentine and the Downworlders. Meanwhile, Isabelle and Raphael get closer as Alec tries to figure out what’s going on with his sister.

2.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S02E10 - By the Light of Dawn
2.plot: The New York Institute is under attack as Valentine’s plan for The Soul Sword is getting dangerously close to coming to fruition. The Shadowhunters must act fast to save their loved ones and the rest of the Downworld. Meanwhile, some of the Downworlders have their own plan to stop Valentine and their target is Clary.

2.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S02E11 - Mea Maxima Culpa
2.plot: Shadowhunters and Downworlders pick up the pieces after Valentine's attack; Jace carries a heavy burden; a greater demon is loose in Manhattan; Izzy encounters a mysterious stranger; Simon tries to understand his new Daylighter status.

2.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S02E12 - You Are Not Your Own
2.plot: Clary feels pressured between choosing Jace or Simon. Izzy settles things with Raphael. Sebastian breaks his father out of prison.

2.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S02E13 - Those of Demon Blood
2.plot: After several Shadowhunters are killed, The Institute turns to controversial methods to prevent a Downworlder uprising.

2.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S02E14 - The Fair Folk
2.plot: Alec has big plans to mend fences with the Downworlders, while Jace and Clary are summoned by the Seelie Queen.

2.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S02E15 - A Problem of Memory
2.plot: Simon goes down a dark path while Alec and team prepares to transport Valentine.

2.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S02E16 - Day of Atonement
2.plot: With everything that Simon has gone through this past year, a family dinner for Yom Kippur – the Jewish Day of Atonement – poses as a real challenge. How can he come clean about being a vampire and especially about what just happened to his family? And if he is stressed out, what if he can’t control his vampire urges? Looking to take care of this himself, Maia insists on helping him out whether he likes it or not. Meanwhile, Clary and Jace go on an unsanctioned mission and test out their newfound rune powers.

2.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S02E17 - A Dark Reflection
2.plot: With two of the three Mortal Instruments missing, everyone is on the hunt for the last one – The Mortal Mirror. Jace and Clary are on the hunt to recover it first before it could fall into enemy hands. But along the way, Clary realizes that her brother Jonathan may be closer than she thought. Meanwhile, Isabelle has a hard time accepting the fact that her little brother Max is growing up, and Maia struggles to bring her guard down with Simon.

2.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S02E18 - Awake, Arise, or Be Forever Fallen
2.plot: After a devastating attack at The Institute, everyone is on high alert as the Shadowhunters close in on their hunt for Jonathan; Simon and Maia help a new Downworlder as the Seelie Queen demands an answer from Magnus and Luke.

2.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S02E19 - Hail and Farewell
2.plot: After centuries of being lied to and treated poorly by The Clave, the Downworlders decide to come together and take matters into their own hands as the hunt for Valentine and Sebastian intensifies. But what starts off as a way to preserve their own, the Downworlders choice to break with the Shadowhunters, could quickly escalate to war.

2.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S02E20 - Beside Still Water
2.plot: Jace and Clary rush to make a final stand, but when a traitor is revealed, Jace and Clary may have a bigger fight on their hands than expected. Meanwhile, Alec and Izzy must fight off a large mass of demons that have unexpectedly shown up, as Luke and Simon head to the Seelie Court to deal with some unfinished business with the Seelie Queen.

3.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S03E01 - On Infernal Ground
3.plot: Secrets abound as the Shadowhunters and Downworlders try to get back to normal after Valentine's death. Clary struggles with keeping her secret about Raziel's wish, while Alec pushes Jace to come clean about whatever Jace and Clary are hiding. Luke must use tough love to keep his secret hidden from Ollie who is on a war path for answers. And Magnus hides his true feelings about his new position in the Warlock community from Alec. Meanwhile, Lilith sets a plan in motion in New York City as Simon spend stime in the Seelie Court.

3.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S03E02 - The Powers That Be
3.plot: The Warlocks’ magic is becoming corrupted by a demonic presence while Izzy and Luke try to track down more information on the recent series of possessions.

3.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S03E03 - What Lies Beneath
3.plot: The Shadowhunters try to track down the new imposing threat, while Jace has a suspicion that Jonathan is back and behind the mundane attacks. Simon tries to figure out what The Seelie Queen did to him during his time in the glade. Alec decides to host a Lightwood family dinner at Magnus’ house after a surprising visit from Maryse.

3.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S03E04 - Thy Soul Instructed
3.plot: Jace’s concerns grow about his mental state and turns to Luke for information on his family’s past. Clary and Izzy go after a rogue vampire and Simon hunts for a new apartment.

3.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S03E05 - Stronger Than Heaven
3.plot: Someone is out to get Simon and Jace is on the hunt to find out who it is, meanwhile Clary turns to Luke to find a way to help Jace. Alec worries about the future of his relationship after learning more about Magnus’ romantic past.

3.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S03E06 - A Window into an Empty Room
3.plot: Clary teams up with Magnus to investigate a recent demon attack. Simon is stunned with he’s visited by someone he never thought he’d see again, and who now won’t seem to leave. Meanwhile, Izzy worries about dinner with her family and a special guest and Luke reaches out to Maryse.

3.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S03E07 - Salt In the Wound
3.plot: With the Owl's identity revealed, Alec, Isabelle, and Clary head to Alicante to try and find a way to stop him. Luke and Simon team up to track Lilith's latest possible victim. Maia reflects on her past.

3.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S03E08 - A Heart of Darkness
3.plot: Magnus, Alec and Isabelle try to reach Jace inside The Owl, but even as powerful as Magnus is, can he help the Lightwoods retrieve their brother from his demon prison? Maia and Jordan join Simon on the hunt for Lilith, while Luke tries to find a way to get to Clary.

3.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S03E09 - Familia Ante Omnia
3.plot: Clary faces down an old foe in an attempt to find answers about Lilith’s plan. Alec and Magnus turn to Lorenzo Rey for help, while Lilith finds a new ally. Luke must choose between his pack and his family, as Simon is forced to deal with his past.

3.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S03E10 - Erchomai
3.plot: In the climactic mid-season finale, the team scrambles to find a way to put a stop to Lilith’s plan coming to fruition. But going up against their biggest opponent yet, their odds are not looking good. Meanwhile, Simon makes a heartbreaking choice with Isabelle’s help and Magnus reconnects with a powerful person from his past.

3.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S03E11 - Lost Souls
3.plot: With the loss of Clary after Lilith’s apartment exploded, Alec, Isabelle and Jace try to come to terms with what has happened. Glad to have their brother back, Alec and Isabelle are still worried about Jace, who is taking the actions of The Owl very hard. Magnus is also mourning the loss of his magic and finds himself in a new position—having to rely on others for help. Meanwhile, Maia tries to help a devastated Simon who has lost his family and his best friend. But unknown to everyone, Clary is alive and finds herself in a new and dangerous predicament.

3.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S03E12 - Original Sin
3.plot: Simon is determined to get rid of the Mark of Cain and, with Isabelle’s help, tries to track down New York’s oldest vampire to get more information on the mark. Now in Paris, Clary desperately tries to find an escape from her current situation. Meanwhile, with his new sense of mortality, Magnus tries to live life to the very fullest.

3.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S03E13 - Beati Bellicosi
3.plot: Jordan and the Praetor try to track down Heidi, while the Shadowhunters try to locate Jonathan. Meanwhile, Luke looks to Maryse for help and Isabelle gets a possible lead on information on what is really going on in the Clave prisons.

3.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S03E14 - A Kiss from a Rose
3.plot: Continuing to track down information on the rumors about misconduct at The Clave’s downworlder prison, Isabelle asks Alec for help. Meanwhile, Magnus succumbs to asking Lorenzo for a favor and Jace takes Clary on a special date.

3.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S03E15 - To the Night Children
3.plot: As the saying goes, “rules are made to be broken.” But what if the rules are there for a reason? Several members of the team must examine the reasoning behind certain rules after consequences to questionable actions come to light. Whether the rules were broken because of love, loyalty or revenge, does the end justify the means?

3.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S03E16 - Stay With Me
3.plot: Clary and Jace come up with a risky plan to get rid of her twinning rune, which may bring an old enemy back into the fray. Meanwhile, Alec is worried about Magnus.

3.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S03E17 - Heavenly Fire
3.plot: Simon and Izzy team up on a secret mission to figure out what the Clave is hiding. Meanwhile, Clary is conflicted about Jonathan as the Shadowhunters try to get answers.

3.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S03E18 - The Beast Within
3.plot: A demon outbreak in New York City on Halloween becomes a top priority at the Institute, but as the Shadowhunters hunt the demons, Jace becomes more worried about Clary. Meanwhile, Alec has to juggle the outbreak with his deep concern about Magnus’ depression.

3.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S03E19 - Aku Cinta Kamu
3.plot: To try and save Clary from Jonathan, Jace goes undercover. Back at the Institute, Isabelle, Simon and Luke race to find a way to finally destroy Clary’s bond with Jonathan. With time running out, can Isabelle create the solution before Jace’s cover is blown?

3.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S03E20 - City of Glass
3.plot: Alec, Jace and Isabelle make a plan to finally get Clary back and stop Jonathan—much to Luke’s and Simon’s chagrin. Meanwhile, an emotionally raw Magnus struggles to deal with his father’s reappearance and Maia must make a tough decision that could affect the rest of her life.

3.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S03E21 - Alliance (1)
3.plot: Clary comes up with a plan that will bring Shadowhunters and Downworlders together, as Alec struggles for a way to help Magnus.

3.title: FR - Shadowhunters : The Mortal Instruments - S03E22 - All Good Things... (2)
3.plot: Jonathan begins his reign of vengeful terror as the Shadowhunters try to find a way to stop him. With only one hope, Clary must make a sacrifice that could have long-lasting implications for all. Meanwhile, wedding bells are in the air for one special couple.

meta.plot: When Clary Fray's mother has disappeared, Clary joins a band of Shadowhunters; demon killing hunters, and gets caught up in a plan to save the world.

1.title: FR - Plan de carrière - S01E01 - Material Adverse Change
1.plot: Focused on making partner at her cutthroat New York City law firm, Ingrid finds her plans thrown off-kilter when a new colleague arrives from London.

1.title: FR - Plan de carrière - S01E02 - Meta-Strategy
1.plot: The search for a missing document and a surprise lunch date crank up the tension between Ingrid and Murphy. Rachel hits it off with a sassy new client.

1.title: FR - Plan de carrière - S01E03 - Change of Venue
1.plot: In an effort to salvage the SunCorp deal, Ingrid heads upstate with Murphy. Rachel helps a flighty heiress, and Tyler deals with major fashion drama.

1.title: FR - Plan de carrière - S01E04 - Due Diligence
1.plot: As her new relationship moves at warp speed, Ingrid competes with Murphy to impress their boss. A reluctant Rachel organizes the firm's talent show.

1.title: FR - Plan de carrière - S01E05 - Out of Office
1.plot: The firm's annual retreat at a swanky resort finds Ingrid and Murphy stuck untangling a thorny SunCorp issue and Rachel tapping into her creative side.

1.title: FR - Plan de carrière - S01E06 - Client Relations
1.plot: With HR investigating the ugly incident at the retreat, Ingrid plays messenger for Marty, while Rachel receives an exciting offer on her 30th birthday.

1.title: FR - Plan de carrière - S01E07 - Talking Points
1.plot: Amid big personal news, Ingrid takes over planning the firm's diversity gala. Rachel makes a bold move at work and Tyler feels under pressure at home.

1.title: FR - Plan de carrière - S01E08 - Consequential Damages
1.plot: On Thanksgiving Day, Ingrid races to finalize the SunCorp deal with Murphy, Tyler faces questions about his future, and Rachel sees a new side of Justin.

1.title: FR - Plan de carrière - S01E09 - Pro Forma
1.plot: With the firm's holiday party — and partner announcements — approaching, Ingrid grows closer to Murphy, Rachel suffers a setback and Tyler branches out.

meta.plot: Gérant amours, amis et attentes familiales, Ingrid Yun fait tout pour devenir associée dans un prestigieux cabinet d'avocats de New York… sans trahir ses valeurs.

L'histoire se déroule dans un manoir de Seattle nommé Rose Red, réputé hanté, qui fait l'objet de l’enquête du parapsychologue Joyce Reardon et de son équipe de psis, qui vont s'exposer à la colère des forces surnaturelles qui résident au manoir.

1.title: FR - Rose Red - S01E01 - Part 1
1.plot: A talented but eccentric parapsychologist hires a group of psychic mediums, including a teenage autistic savant with telekinesis, in order to wake up the horror in a century-old haunted house.

1.title: FR - Rose Red - S01E02 - Part 2
1.plot: The team tours the mansion. Joyce and Steve point out that the home contains many optical illusions as well as an upside-down room and a library with a mirrored floor. Members of the team begin to disappear.

1.title: FR - Rose Red - S01E03 - Part 3
1.plot: As Annie Wheaton falls and is knocked unconscious Rose Red's windows and doors mysteriously open again, prompting Emery to suggests that Annie be killed in order to allow everyone to escape the haunted house.

1.title: FR - Rose Red - S01E04 -
FR - Rose Red - S01E05 -
FR - Rose Red - S01E06 -
FR - Rose Red - S01E07 -
FR - Rose Red - S01E08 -
FR - The Recruit - S01E01 - I.N.A.S.I.A.L.
1.plot: Thrown into the deep end during his first week at the CIA, rookie lawyer Owen Hendricks quickly gets in over his head when he uncovers a possible threat.

1.title: FR - The Recruit - S01E02 - N.L.T.S.Y.P.
1.plot: While scrambling to learn how to navigate the high-stakes world of international espionage, Owen attempts to track down classified information on Max.

1.title: FR - The Recruit - S01E03 - Y.D.E.K.W.Y.D.
1.plot: Owen's crash course in CIA protocols continues as he negotiates with Max, goes on a date with a co-worker and contends with a hostile agency employee.

1.title: FR - The Recruit - S01E04 - I.Y.D.I.A.A.C.
1.plot: When a major snag jeopardizes Max's case, Owen races to find a legal loophole — and urges her not to take matters into her own ruthless hands.

1.title: FR - The Recruit - S01E05 - T.S.L.A.Y.P.
1.plot: Owen's plan to move on from Max suffers a setback when he's ordered back to Phoenix, where credit cards and prying eyes cause problems at work and home.

1.title: FR - The Recruit - S01E06 - I.C.I.N.C.
1.plot: On the heels of his risky negotiations on Max's behalf, Owen faces uncomfortable questions from his colleagues — and friends — about their connection.

1.title: FR - The Recruit - S01E07 - I.M.F.T.B.S.
1.plot: A mission to Geneva to retrieve assets from a Swiss bank account spirals into chaos for Owen and Max, while Hannah's mom pressures her for information.

1.title: FR - The Recruit - S01E08 - W.T.F.I.O.H.
1.plot: The mission with Max takes a dangerous turn as complications arise, bullets fly — and Owen's personal and professional lives collide.

2.title: FR - The Recruit - S02E01 - Y.N.A.H.Y.A.L.
2.plot: After the chaos in Prague, Owen gets benched. But it's not long before he stumbles on a new case — and into a new den of spies in South Korea.

2.title: FR - The Recruit - S02E02 - Y.A.R.A.C.O.T.D.O.P.
2.plot: Owen becomes a human target while digging deeper into the graymail case. Nichka has major intel on a kidnapping — but it won't come for free.

2.title: FR - The Recruit - S02E03 - H.H.I.I.T.K.A.L.
2.plot: An impromptu trip to the Middle East leads to danger. Jang Kyun takes extreme measures to get the answers he seeks.

2.title: FR - The Recruit - S02E04 - A.T.N.W.H.Y.P.A.B.H.
2.plot: With no one else to trust, Owen and Jang Kyun reluctantly team up. Hannah's new romance proves risky. Oliver arranges a meeting with the yakuza.

2.title: FR - The Recruit - S02E05 - W.S.T.W.T.P.
2.plot: Owen and his cohorts race to evade capture when the NIS orders their arrest. To save her own skin, Dawn agrees to lead a perilous mission.

2.title: FR - The Recruit - S02E06 - I.D.N.W.T.B.D.I.
2.plot: Forced to pivot when an operation goes sideways, Owen must rely on new allies, old friends and his own resourcefulness to even the odds.

meta.plot: Recruté par la CIA juste après son diplôme, un jeune avocat frondeur plonge sans préparation dans l'univers redoutable de l'espionnage international.

Dans un futur proche, les jeux s’affichant sur des écrans sont passés de mode. La technologie VR en immersion domine ce marché, mais parmi la multitude de jeux, un grand nombre sont bien souvent nuls et sans intérêt. Certains ont décidé de s’attaquer à ces jeux, comme Rakuro Hizutome, alias Sunraku, qui se plaît à enchaîner les pires d’entre-eux. Mais cette fois, il a décidé de se lancer dans Shangri-La Frontier, un jeu grand public aux quelques trente millions de membres inscrits ! Des amis en ligne, un univers immense, des rencontres avec des rivaux... Rakuro est loin d’imaginer que sa vie, voire son destin et celui de nombreuses personnes, est sur le point de changer lorsqu’il se lance dans cette aventure…

1.title: FR - Shangri-La Frontier - S01E01 - What Do You Play Games For?
1.plot: What makes you game? For every 100 amazing games, there are a thousand that are not good. This is the story of Rakuro Hizutome, a man who loves, and is loved by, crappy video games, and his journey in the world of Shangri-La Frontier, one of the greatest video games of all time. The ultimate "Game x Fantasy" story, about a "crappy game hunter" who challenges one of the greatest games ever made!

1.title: FR - Shangri-La Frontier - S01E02 - A Peculiar One
1.plot: Rakuro fights the Ravenous Python, arrives in the game's second town, and explores its weapons crafting system before venturing out at night.

1.title: FR - Shangri-La Frontier - S01E03 - Black Wolf Nightslayer
1.plot: The battle with Lycagon the Nightslayer leaves Sunraku in an unexpected situation. Soon after, he's barreling down the rabbit hole to a new adventure!

1.title: FR - Shangri-La Frontier - S01E04 - A Trash Game Realignment of Elevated Tastes
1.plot: Sunraku agrees to train under Vysache and he's saddled with the Vorpal Soul Collar which decreases his EXP gain but increases stat point rewards upon leveling up. Afterward Emul offers to join Sunraku's party and they set off for Thirdrema.

1.title: FR - Shangri-La Frontier - S01E05 - Lo, Thou Art Assailed on All Sides
1.plot: On their way to Thirdrema, Sunraku an Emul encounter the area boss Mud Digger in the middle of a swamp which greatly reduces their movement. Being at a disadvantage Sunraku needs figure out how his newly evolved skills work so he can take Mud Digger down.

1.title: FR - Shangri-La Frontier - S01E06 - The Writing Tool Knight-Queen
1.plot: Sunraku encounters Arthur Pencilgon, whom he knows as Pencil Knight from another game called "Unite Rounds". She brings with her a message that he either publish what he knows about the unique scenario or wear a target on his back.

1.title: FR - Shangri-La Frontier - S01E07 - Remnant of the Divinity: The Aberrant Loser
1.plot: Sunraku manages to stave off his attackers and reach Thirdrema, where he and Emul then travel back to Rabituza. Emul then takes Sunraku to the Vorpal Colosseum where he's pitted against 10 opponents to further his training.

1.title: FR - Shangri-La Frontier - S01E08 - The 300-Limit Pandemonium
1.plot: The 10th opponent in the Rabituza arena is the Aberrant Woodmage, a powerful foe combining fast attacks with magic. Underleveled and understatted, Sunraku only needs to survive five minutes to win... but can he make it happen?!

1.title: FR - Shangri-La Frontier - S01E09 - A Dazzling Sea of Trees
1.plot: Sunraku has to make it out of town so he can move on to the Prismatic Forest Grotto, but Ashura Kai and Psyger-0 stand in his way. Once he reaches the grotto itself, a dazzling array of sights await him!

1.title: FR - Shangri-La Frontier - S01E10 - Let's Go Tomb Raiding!!
1.plot: Sunraku continues his way through the Prismatic Forest Grotto where he encounters the area boss Clown Spider. He tells Emul to stay back as he wants to solo it first try with a no-hit run.

1.title: FR - Shangri-La Frontier - S01E11 - The Glimmer of Truth
1.plot: Sunraku speaks with Vysache about their plans to defeat Wethermon the Tombguard. After their discussion Vysache decides to help Sunraku in his endeavor by ascending his weapons.

1.title: FR - Shangri-La Frontier - S01E12 - Regrets Always Lie in the Past
1.plot: Pencilgon sends Sunraku and Oikatzo to the Iron Ruins of the Divinity to grind their levels to at least level 50. While there they encounter the Lifestide Lake Serpent monster.

1.title: FR - Shangri-La Frontier - S01E13 - Only Resentments About the End of Life Remain
1.plot: Pencilgon, Sunraku, and Oikatzo make their way to find the NPC Setsuna of Bygone Days, Wethermon's former lover. She presents to them the Unique Scenario "From the Living World, With Love" which they accept.

1.title: FR - Shangri-La Frontier - S01E14 - Squish
1.plot: Sunraku has encountered a new player named Dragonfly in "BERP". The two engage in a series of matches with bug exploits allowed. Afterwards Sunrakru heads to Rabituza to link his skills at the Skill Garden.

1.title: FR - Shangri-La Frontier - S01E15 - Putting Feelings Into a Moment (1)
1.plot: On the night of the new moon, the members of Ashura Kai are ambushed by a group of allied clans including Psyger-0. Meanwhile, Sunraku, Oikatzo, and Pencilgon confront Wethermon the Tombguard at the Hidden Garden.

1.title: FR - Shangri-La Frontier - S01E16 - Putting Feelings Into a Moment (2)
1.plot: Sunraku and the others are engaged in a battle against Wethermon the Tombguard, and making full use of resurrection items. Ten minutes have passed since the battle began and Wethermon summons his tactical mount "Kirin".

1.title: FR - Shangri-La Frontier - S01E17 - Putting Feelings Into a Moment (3)
1.plot: The battle with Wethermon the Tombguard moves to its next phase. Pencilgon and Oikatzo, exploiting rare items, focus on Kirin who has transformed into a suit of armor. Meanwhile Sunraku goes on the offensive to defeat Wethermon before he crumbles away.

1.title: FR - Shangri-La Frontier - S01E18 - Putting Feelings Into a Moment (4)
1.plot: Items are depleted, weapons and gear are on the verge of breaking, and Wethermon continues his Clear Sky Conquest barrage on Sunraku while Pencilgon and Oikatzo continue their efforts to dismantle Kirin Armor. Sunraku goes all-in to finish the fight.

1.title: FR - Shangri-La Frontier - S01E19 - The World Progresses, the Heroes Are Revealed
1.plot: Wethermon falls into a slumber and Setsuna of Bygone Days leaves behind a hint that will lead to the truth about SLF. Wethermon's subjugation is reported to all players in game. Now, standing before the battle-weary trio are angry members of Ashura Kai...

1.title: FR - Shangri-La Frontier - S01E20 - Current Situations and Next Steps
1.plot: Utopia, SLF's development company, is in a tizzy over the defeat of Wethermon the Tombguard. Sunraku is excited to kick off his bonus unique scenario Vorpal Epic. He then decides to check out the loot he received from defeating Wethermon.

1.title: FR - Shangri-La Frontier - S01E21 - Errands, Cultivation, and Game Progress
1.plot: "Unique monsters make money" Pencilgon suggests forming a clan with Sunraku and Oikatzo. After temporarily splitting, Sunraku returns to the Palace of Rabituza with the Non-Standard Ether Reactor he received from Oikatzo and comes up with a great idea."

1.title: FR - Shangri-La Frontier - S01E22 - The Walking Air Purifier
1.plot: Bilac accepts Sanraku's proposal and they head to the Canyon of Ancient Souls to obtain the magic operations unit necessary for becoming an Ancient Craftsman. Lycagon's Mark causes weak monsters to flee, then they encounter the rare Dullahan General.

1.title: FR - Shangri-La Frontier - S01E23 - Bird and Rabbits VS Chorus of Skeletons
1.plot: Sunraku, Emul, and Bilac face off against the area boss the Humming Lich in the Canyon of Ancient Souls. Struggling to inflict damage, Bilac rushes to rework the Dullahan General's Decapitator into a holy-attribute weapon.

1.title: FR - Shangri-La Frontier - S01E24 - Rare Items, Worth More than Life Itself
1.plot: Sunraku returns to the Canyon Ancient Souls, where he encounters a swarm of Crystal Scorpions that are over level 100. Struggling to acquire the rare materials he seeks, Sunraku watches the scorpions' movements and comes up with a secret plan...

1.title: FR - Shangri-La Frontier - S01E25 - Those Who Illuminate the World's Darkness
1.plot: Bilac finds jewelry among Sunraku's loot. In order to show them to a jeweler, she introduces Sunraku to Aramiys, the swordsman of Cazzeria, and vice captain of the Musketeers in Boots. Later they head to Eighthold where they encounter the Professor.

1.title: FR - The Elusive Samurai - S01E01 - May 22nd
1.plot: The year is 1333, Kamakura. Tokiyuki Hojo, the rightful heir to the regent who rules the Kamakura shogunate, is a kind boy with a heart of gold who dislikes conflict – even though he’s the son of a warrior.

1.title: FR - The Elusive Samurai - S01E02 - The Gentle Uncle
1.plot: Takauji Ashikaga, once considered the guardian of the Kamakura shogunate, stages a rebellion that led to its quick destruction. Tokiyuki’s older brother, Kunitoki, successfully evades the eyes of the warriors loyal to Takauji, and he is placed under the care of their uncle, Muneshige Godaiin.

1.title: FR - The Elusive Samurai - S01E03 - A Forest Inhabited by a God
1.plot: Tokiyuki risks his life and wins a game of tag, defeating the enemy who betrayed his brother. As soon as he arrives in Suwa, Yorishige urges him to begin his lessons and training to take back Kamakura.

1.title: FR - The Elusive Samurai - S01E04 - Sadamune Appears!
1.plot: Tokiyuki spends his days undergoing strenuous training to perfect his sword techniques – something he’s told to do to take back Kamakura for himself. However, everyone was surprised by how weak his swordsmanship was. It turns out that Tokiyuki was much better with another weapon: the bow.

1.title: FR - The Elusive Samurai - S01E05 - Settling the Score! A Dog-Shooting Competition, and Then…
1.plot: Tokiyuki faces off against Sadamune in a dog-shooting competition, even though his opponent excels with the bow and possesses an almost prodigy-like eye for detail. With a large lead in points, Tokiyuki faces defeat as he gets hit.

1.title: FR - The Elusive Samurai - S01E06 - Steal the Imperial Command from Ogasawara's Residence at Night
1.plot: Tokiyuki and Genba sneak into the Ogasawara's residence and successfully infiltrate the warehouse where the Emperor’s Imperial Command is kept. However, Sadamune’s subordinate, Sukefusa Ichikawa, catches on and hears what these two are doing…

1.title: FR - The Elusive Samurai - S01E07 - Children in Winter
1.plot: Tokiyuki reigns in the new year for the first time in Suwa. As the chaos from the downfall lulls throughout the country, skirmishes still break out here and there, and another crisis knocks on Suwa’s doors.

1.title: FR - The Elusive Samurai - S01E08 - A War of Hide and Seek
1.plot:
The Elusive Warriors make their way to Nakayama Manor in the northern extremities of Suwa. There, Tokiyuki meets a young boy named Fubuki.

In a village where Ogasawara and his forces killed all the grown-ups, Fubuki took charge and continually looked after all the children who were left in the aftermath.

The warriors join forces with Fubuki, who’s familiar with military strategies, and go on a mission to meet the enemy.

1.title: FR - The Elusive Samurai - S01E09 - My Buddha
1.plot: The Elusive Warriors engage in a fierce battle with the Seigi Party, a group spearheaded by Shokan himself. Stuck in a small chamber and faced with opponents wearing armor, Tokiyuki uses the “escape” technique he learned from Fubuki to face off against General Shokan.

1.title: FR - The Elusive Samurai - S01E10 - A Perverted Kid and Disturbances of Holy Power
1.plot: Yorishige tells Tokiyuki there are times when he cannot see the future; as some people have come to rely on Yorishige's reputation and power as a god, he cannot reveal this shortcoming to anyone.

1.title: FR - The Elusive Samurai - S01E11 - Samurais Who Are Eager to Die & An Elusive Samurai
1.plot: The imperial court assigns a new provincial official for Shinano: Shinanonokami Kiyohara. Kiyohara did not hesitate to wield his power over people. He was considered a corrupt provincial official who made the people living in his territory suffer.

1.title: FR - The Elusive Samurai - S01E12 - Hang in There, Tokiyuki, Until the Day You Retake Kamakura
1.plot: Hoshina and his army decide to retreat from Kawanakajima after hearing what Tokiyuki and Saemontaro Shinomiya, a Suwa Sect warrior, had to say. But Kiyohara is evil and crafty – he won’t let this slide without a fight.

meta.plot: En 1333, le gouvernement du shogunat de Kamakura tombe lorsqu’un homme de confiance, Takauji Ashikaga, organise une rébellion. Le jeune héritier de la lignée, Tokiyuki Hôjô, est le seul à échapper au massacre grâce à l’aide d’un prêtre, Yorishige Suwa. En fuite et luttant pour rester en vie, l’insaisissable Tokiyuki met en place son plan pour reconquérir sa place à Kamakura.
Aucun démon n'est à l'abri, car Bogdan Boner, l'exorciste autodidacte et amateur d'alcool, revient avec des actes plus inventifs, obscènes et mortels.

1.title: FR - Bad Exorcist - S01E01 - Prohibition From Hell
1.plot: After a statue in hell gets defiled by a drunk demon, the Ruler of Hell raises the drinking age, causing an increase in thefts of alcohol on Earth.

1.title: FR - Bad Exorcist - S01E02 - The Law of Surprise
1.plot: After refusing a demon’s indecent proposal, Boner gets cursed with bad luck and experiences a long — and painful — day.

1.title: FR - Bad Exorcist - S01E03 - Antichristosaur
1.plot: Boner comes up with an idea to trick people into thinking his sidekick, Domino, is an evil demon. Unfortunately, the plan goes south pretty fast.

1.title: FR - Bad Exorcist - S01E04 - When the Devil Is At His Wits End He Sends A Woman
1.plot: After Boner eliminates two of his entrepreneurial henchmen, the Ruler of Hell sends a female demon to seduce him and settle the score.

1.title: FR - Bad Exorcist - S01E05 - Grim Slurper
1.plot: When an immortal monster and his servant come to Earth to feast on human envy, Boner’s usual extermination techniques don’t seem to work.

1.title: FR - Bad Exorcist - S01E06 - Double-Shot Bill
1.plot: Boner thirsts for revenge when a demon gunslinger who once almost killed him returns to Earth.

1.title: FR - Bad Exorcist - S01E07 - A Baby From Hell
1.plot: After a one-night stand with a handsome demon, a woman gives birth to a little monster who immediately starts terrorizing the hospital.

1.title: FR - Bad Exorcist - S01E08 - The Cursed Commercial
1.plot: A meatball commercial with a subliminal message turns people into ravenous demons who will do anything to lay their hands on the advertised delicacy.

1.title: FR - Bad Exorcist - S01E09 - The Golden Buddha
1.plot: When the demon gunslinger returns and steals a golden Buddha figurine, Boner comes up with a plan to capture the dangerous thief.

1.title: FR - Bad Exorcist - S01E10 - Horror At Castel Gandolfo
1.plot: When Pope Francis’ residence gets invaded by an atheist demon, only Boner — armed with his holy-water-thrower and crucifix-knuckle-duster — can help.

1.title: FR - Bad Exorcist - S01E11 - The Angel Wings
1.plot: The Ruler of Hell captures Boner’s illegitimate son and blackmails the exorcist into capturing an angel for him so he can take its wings.

1.title: FR - Bad Exorcist - S01E12 - Lucky Day
1.plot: A man becomes paralyzed after a demon rips off his legs in a dream. To end his nightmare, Boner has to get drunk to enter his subconscious.

1.title: FR - Bad Exorcist - S01E13 - The Possessed
1.plot: When a ruthless demon with the ability to inhabit the body of any living being comes to Earth, not even Boner is safe.

2.title: FR - Bad Exorcist - S02E01 - The Hell Vaccine
2.plot: Boner has no other choice than to vaccinate Marcinek when two demons possess him through hypnosis — but the cure is worse than the disease.

2.title: FR - Bad Exorcist - S02E02 - Ironvader
2.plot: A death metal band that Boner has a score to settle with makes the news, so he decides to go after them.

2.title: FR - Bad Exorcist - S02E03 - The Fallen Angel
2.plot: In exchange for assistance in finding an online troll who questioned his manhood, Boner agrees to help a fallen angel get back into heaven.

2.title: FR - Bad Exorcist - S02E04 - The Diabolic Cartel
2.plot: When a new drug wreaks havoc at a local club and Boner confronts the dealer selling it, a ruthless cartel from hell sends its soldiers after him.

2.title: FR - Bad Exorcist - S02E05 - Gravocop
2.plot: Boner fakes his own death to stop two demons when they partner with the owner of a funeral home to steal human souls.

2.title: FR - Bad Exorcist - S02E06 - Sick Leave
2.plot: Boner goes on sick leave — but his exorcism business can’t stop, so he works remotely through his clueless employees.

2.title: FR - Bad Exorcist - S02E07 - The Cemetarizer
2.plot: After a member of Boner’s crew gets hurt while they hunt for grave robbers, the exorcist has no choice but to punish the culprit.

2.title: FR - Bad Exorcist - S02E08 - The Vampire
2.plot: A man’s potato obsession turns him into a bulletproof, starch-craving monster. To stop him, Boner has to use a more unconventional approach.

2.title: FR - Bad Exorcist - S02E09 - Wanted Dead or Alive
2.plot: When Boner kills his dog, the Ruler of Hell puts out a bounty on him, turning everyone against the exorcist.

2.title: FR - Bad Exorcist - S02E10 - The Exorcist 2050 (1)
2.plot: In 2050, the Ruler of Hell decides to take revenge for years of humiliation caused by Boner and sets out to kill the now retired and decrepit exorcist.

2.title: FR - Bad Exorcist - S02E11 - The Crew of Prince Mieszko I (2)
2.plot: Together with his loyal crew, Boner goes back in time to stop dark forces from interfering with the Christianization of Poland.

2.title: FR - Bad Exorcist - S02E12 - The Exorcist's Assistant (1)
2.plot: There’s a new exorcist in town and he’s looking for an assistant. Frustrated with never getting paid, Marcinek leaves Boner to join the competition.

2.title: FR - Bad Exorcist - S02E13 - Father (2)
2.plot: When Boner’s dad lands in the hospital, the pair go down memory lane to the beginning of the family’s feud with the Ruler of Hell.

meta.plot: Dans l'Amérique d'aujourd'hui, les professionnels de la santé sont confrontés à de nombreux défis au sein d'un hôpital de Pittsburgh, en Pennsylvanie.

1.title: FR - The Pitt - S01E01 - 7:00 A.M.
1.plot: While attempting to distract himself from the anniversary of his mentor's death, Dr. Robby introduces a fresh batch of interns to life in the ER.

1.title: FR - The Pitt - S01E02 - 8:00 A.M.
1.plot: Robby helps siblings navigate their elderly father's end of life care. Later, Samira fends off cops targeting a woman with a misunderstood condition.

1.title: FR - The Pitt - S01E03 - 9:00 A.M.
1.plot: Samira does her best to keep Whitaker on the right track. A teen overdose sparks conflict in the ER.

1.title: FR - The Pitt - S01E04 - 10:00 A.M.
1.plot: Bets are taken on the whereabouts of a stolen ambulance, while Santos learns a hard lesson, and Whitaker helps to tame “The Kraken.”

1.title: FR - The Pitt - S01E05 - 11:00 A.M.
1.plot: Santos and Collins each deal with moral quandaries. Samira’s careful approach earns praise from patients – and reproach from Robby.

1.title: FR - The Pitt - S01E06 - 12:00 P.M.
1.plot: While Robby handles an ultimatum from the hospital, Mel, Javadi, and Collins each handle unique mother-daughter dynamics.

1.title: FR - The Pitt - S01E07 - 1:00 P.M.
1.plot: After examining an influencer with strange symptoms, Samira pushes back against Robby. Santos contends with a patient accused of assault.

1.title: FR - The Pitt - S01E08 - 2:00 P.M.
FR - The Pitt - S01E09 - 3:00 P.M.
1.plot: After a staff debrief from Robby, Dana defuses a waiting room brawl, Whitaker finds common ground with "The Kraken," and McKay faces a crucial error.

1.title: FR - The Pitt - S01E10 - 4:00 P.M.
1.plot: With the Pitt down a staff member, Robby relies on his team to pick up the slack. Later, Santos finally voices her suspicions.

1.title: FR - The Pitt - S01E11 - 5:00 P.M.
1.plot: While Robby tries to keep a developing staffing situation under wraps, Collins guides a surrogate through a difficult delivery.

1.title: FR - The Pitt - S01E12 - 6:00 P.M.
1.plot: When dozens of critical patients flood the ER, Robby and his team struggle to keep up amid quicky diminished supplies.

1.title: FR - The Pitt - S01E13 - 7:00 P.M.
1.plot: As the night shift begins and the death toll rises, Robby refuses to give up on a mass casualty victim – even after Abbott intervenes. Unable to find an attending, Santos and Samira each attempt risky moves to save their patients’ lives.

1.title: FR - The Pitt - S01E14 - 8:00 P.M.
1.plot: As the ER begins to quiet down, Robby struggles to cope with a loss, while Abbott and Samira are challenged by a patient’s rapidly deteriorating condition.

1.title: FR - The Pitt - S01E15 - 9:00 P.M.
1.plot: Robby resorts to unorthodox methods to convince a father to allow treatment for his son. Later, Whitaker tracks down a missing patient.

2.title: FR - The Pitt - S02E01 - 7:00 A.M.
2.plot: On July 4th, Robby meets his replacement for his upcoming sabbatical, and a familiar face returns to the Pitt.

2.title: FR - The Pitt - S02E02 - 8:00 A.M.
2.plot: Distracted by her impending deposition, King suffers a fall. Then, while Al-Hashimi attempts to revolutionize the department's technology, Javadi sizes up the competition.

2.title: FR - The Pitt - S02E03 - 9:00 A.M.
2.plot: After a motorcycle collision, a husband and wife find themselves in the ER. Later, Robby bonds with a Tree of Life survivor.

2.title: FR - The Pitt - S02E04 - 10:00 A.M.
2.plot: With a nearby hospital shuttered on the busiest day of the year, Robby and team must field extra patients, including the victim of a parkour mishap.

2.title: FR - The Pitt - S02E05 - 11:00 A.M.
2.plot: As patients continue to pour in, including a local prison inmate, Robby and Langdon must work together to save a beloved patient.

2.title: FR - The Pitt - S02E06 - 12:00 P.M.
2.plot: As the team deals with a loss, Al-Hashimi and Robby continue to clash over the best course of treatment for a patient showing signs of malnutrition.

2.title: FR - The Pitt - S02E07 - 1:00 P.M.
2.plot: While Dana tends to a sexual assault victim, Abbot helps an officer injured in the field, and Mohan attempts to keep her uninsured patient in the ER.

2.title: FR - The Pitt - S02E08 - 2:00 P.M.
2.plot: In the wake of an IT shutdown, Princess must manage a completely analog ER. Al-Hashimi, Mohan, and King assess a woman with sudden blindness.

2.title: FR - The Pitt - S02E09 - 3:00 P.M.
2.plot: After one of Javadi's patients slips through the cracks, Dana calls in an old friend with experience running a low-tech ER.

2.title: FR - The Pitt - S02E10 - 4:00 P.M.
2.plot: After an incident at a nearby water park, several critical patients are rushed to the Pitt. Later, Al-Hashimi confronts Robby.

2.title: FR - The Pitt - S02E11 - 5:00 P.M.
2.plot: While King struggles to cope with her sister's newfound independence, patients and staff are put on edge by an unexpected presence in the ER.

2.title: FR - The Pitt - S02E12 - 6:00 P.M.
2.plot: After she steps up to defend her trainee, Dana clashes with Robby about her methods – and his upcoming sabbatical.

2.title: FR - The Pitt - S02E13 - 7:00 P.M.
2.plot: As the night shift begins, Mohan's AMA patient is brought back to the ER, Langdon doubts his place in the Pitt, and Robby gets Duke's results.

2.title: FR - The Pitt - S02E14 - 8:00 P.M.
2.plot: After his bike takes a hit in the ambulance bay, Robby levels with Duke. A spinal cord injury forces Langdon to attempt a risky procedure.

2.title: FR - The Pitt - S02E15 - 9:00 P.M.
2.plot: Al-Hashimi reveals details from her medical history, forcing Robby to face an ethical dilemma as he prepares to leave for his sabbatical.

FR - Monster Allergy - S01E02 - Monster Pop Under Oldmill

meta.plot: Zick est un jeune garçon allergique aux monstres. Il peut les voir et les toucher. Il fait la rencontre d'Elena, sa nouvelle voisine, qui devient rapidement sa meilleure amie. Ensemble, ils vont apprendre à contrôler les surprenants pouvoirs de Zick.

Espionne pour une agence indépendante, Samantha réalise - après qu'on ait tenté de la tuer - que tout a probablement été orchestré par sa propre équipe. Une fois guérie de ses blessures, la jeune femme est affectée sur de nouvelles missions. Son avenir est d'autant plus obscur qu'elle ignore en qui elle peut avoir confiance et qui veut sa mort...

1.title: FR - Hunted - S01E01 - Mort
1.plot: Sam Hunter is concluding a mission in Tangier when an attempt on her life leaves her badly injured. She then disappears to a remote location to recover, regroup and retrain. She returns to work unannounced nearly a year later and manages to surprise her co-workers, who are suspicious about her disappearance. The team comes up with a plan to have Sam infiltrate a family headed by powerful millionaire Jack Turner.

1.title: FR - Hunted - S01E02 - LB
1.plot: Sam must kill a kidnapped colleague to keep him from compromising the team under torture but then learns that he has information on who tried to assassinate her in Tangier.

1.title: FR - Hunted - S01E03 - Hourglass
1.plot: The family make their way to a country estate, where Jack Turner and other interested parties bid on the dam contract. Sam attempts to to discover the amount of Turner’s offer and runs into a man from her past, whom she believes could have something to do with the attempt on her life.

1.title: FR - Hunted - S01E04 - Kismet
1.plot: Jack Turner finds himself being forced to bid more than he can afford. Sam aims to find out how he will raise the money in a short time. It looks like Turner has hatched a diabolical plan with hedge fund manager Lewis Conroy and Sam looks for the connection. Aidan finds out some of Sam’s secrets and begins an investigation of his own.

1.title: FR - Hunted - S01E05 - Ambassadors
1.plot: A mysterious assassin tells Sam that he is trying to protect her from Hourglass, a conspiracy orchestrated by five multinational corporations. Sam's investigation of the conspirators takes her to a country estate where she had been years before - it was where she was taken as a child after her mother was murdered and she was kidnapped.

1.title: FR - Hunted - S01E06 - Polyhedrus
1.plot: While Sam and Stephen grow closer, the Byzantium team is perplexed by Jack Turner’s connection to Fatima Zahir (Meera Syal), a Pakistani presidential candidate. As Byzantium races against time, it seems inevitable that Jack will be successful. Meanwhile Sam’s investigations into Hourglass lead her to connect someone from her previous mission with the Pakistani dam – helping her realize who their client is.

1.title: FR - Hunted - S01E07 - Khyber
1.plot: Determined to delve further into Hourglass, Sam makes a startling revelation relating to her past. However, her investigations trigger the interest of Byzantium’s client. When Aidan instructs Natalie to uncover the leak in MI6, her shocking discovery exposes her to dangers on all sides. Byzantium discovers potentially devastating evidence regarding the dam, which Jack Turner plans to use to secure the bid.

1.title: FR - Hunted - S01E08 - Snow Maiden
1.plot: Byzantium is ordered to kill Jack Turner, but when the assassination attempt fails, Sam is exposed as a spy, and trapped inside the house. Turner produces the evidence he has against Byzantium's client, while Sam - secretly being poisoned to death - at last begins to recover terrible memories that explain why the Hourglass conspirators want her dead.

meta.plot: Au Canada, des failles spatio-temporelles commencent à apparaître. Evan Cross, un inventeur de logiciels informatiques qui a découvert une de ces anomalies il y a six ans, crée le Groupe de Projets Spéciaux afin de les examiner...

1.title: FR - Les Portes du temps : Un Nouveau monde - S01E01 - The New World
1.plot: When prehistoric creatures start appearing in Vancouver, it falls to a small team of civilians to handle the deadly predators, and to investigate the Anomalies in time they're coming through.

1.title: FR - Les Portes du temps : Un Nouveau monde - S01E02 - Sisiutl
1.plot: Evan and Mac investigate a prehistoric sea serpent terrorizing the waters near disputed First-Nations territory. Dylan faces a crossroads when Evan recruits her to join his team.

1.title: FR - Les Portes du temps : Un Nouveau monde - S01E03 - Fear of Flying
1.plot: When a cargo plane disappears into an Anomaly, Evan and Dylan attempt a search and rescue mission into the distant and dangerous past.

1.title: FR - Les Portes du temps : Un Nouveau monde - S01E04 - Angry Birds
1.plot: Evan and Dylan are taken hostage by two drug dealers while investigating an Anomaly in a vintage train yard.

1.title: FR - Les Portes du temps : Un Nouveau monde - S01E05 - Undone
1.plot: An Anomaly opens at a local university unleashing a Lycaenops on students, and leaving our team with a dilemma when the creature gets stranded in the present day.

1.title: FR - Les Portes du temps : Un Nouveau monde - S01E06 - Clean Up on Aisle Three
1.plot: Evan, Dylan and Mac face off against a pack of clever little dinosaurs that have taken over a home & garden store.

1.title: FR - Les Portes du temps : Un Nouveau monde - S01E07 - Babes in the Woods
1.plot: An Anomaly opens up near a "Fatal Babes" photo shoot, putting some of Toby's friends – including her ex – in the line of fire.

1.title: FR - Les Portes du temps : Un Nouveau monde - S01E08 - Truth
1.plot: A Pachycephalosaurus shows up in the city, while closer to home Evan comes face-to-face with the same Albertosaurus that killed his wife.

1.title: FR - Les Portes du temps : Un Nouveau monde - S01E09 - Breakthrough
1.plot: When footage of a Triceratops goes viral, Evan and Dylan track the creature to an upscale neighbourhood, and the home of Evan's old rival, Howard Kanan.

1.title: FR - Les Portes du temps : Un Nouveau monde - S01E10 - The Great Escape
1.plot: Evan and Dylan are shocked to find that Leggy, a baby terror bird, is now grown and dangerous… and has escaped from a secret government laboratory.

1.title: FR - Les Portes du temps : Un Nouveau monde - S01E11 - The Inquisition
1.plot: While Dylan and Mac hunt for information on the government's secret lab, Evan goes up against Colonel Henderson Hall, who wants full access to the Anomalies.

1.title: FR - Les Portes du temps : Un Nouveau monde - S01E12 - The Sound of Thunder (1)
1.plot: When Toby is stung by a poisonous Brontoscorpio, Evan and Dylan must chase the creature back through the Anomaly to get a sample of its venom.

meta.plot: Dans ce drame culte, des événements inattendus permettent à Birgitte Nyborg d'accéder au poste de Premier ministre du Danemark et de devenir la première femme au pouvoir.

1.title: FR - Borgen, une femme au pouvoir - S01E01 - Decency in the Middle
1.plot: Three days before an election, party leader Birgitte Nyborg shakes up her campaign by denouncing her closest ally, sensitive information about the prime minister's shopping expenses lands in the wrong hands, and the rising star of the evening news is shaken by an unexpected death.

1.title: FR - Borgen, une femme au pouvoir - S01E02 - Count to 90
1.plot: After a successful election, Birgitte Nyborg looks set to become Denmark's first female prime minister, but allies and opponents do their best to block her way.

1.title: FR - Borgen, une femme au pouvoir - S01E03 - The Art of the Possible
1.plot: A few months into her term the new prime minister faces her first political crisis, and journalist Katrine Fønsmark considers how to deal with her unexpected pregnancy.

1.title: FR - Borgen, une femme au pouvoir - S01E04 - 100 Days
1.plot: The revelation of an American prisoner transport in Greenland causes scandal upon the new government's first one hundred days in office.

1.title: FR - Borgen, une femme au pouvoir - S01E05 - Men Who Love Women
1.plot: The government's agenda on equal opportunities in corporate business brings pressure from the media as well as the country's most powerful businessman.

1.title: FR - Borgen, une femme au pouvoir - S01E06 - State Visit
1.plot: An official visit by the president of a former Soviet republic makes headlines when the president demands the arrest of a prominent political activist visiting Denmark at the same time.

1.title: FR - Borgen, une femme au pouvoir - S01E07 - See No Evil, Hear No Evil, Speak No Evil
1.plot: The discovery of illegal surveillance of a left-wing party brings into question the prime minister's friendship with the party's spokeswoman as well as her faith in her own minister of justice.

1.title: FR - Borgen, une femme au pouvoir - S01E08 - The Silly Season
1.plot: While the prime minister tries to take a family vacation, the publication of a tell-all by a former politician puts spin doctor Kasper Juul on the edge.

1.title: FR - Borgen, une femme au pouvoir - S01E09 - Divide and Rule
1.plot: Allegations of corruption in connection with military spending has consequences even for the prime minister's husband, who has accepted a new job.

1.title: FR - Borgen, une femme au pouvoir - S01E10 - The First Tuesday in October
1.plot: A year after taking office, the prime minister's approval ratings are low, her government is in internal conflict, and her marriage is hanging by a thread. As she prepares for another year in parliament, what can be saved?

2.title: FR - Borgen, une femme au pouvoir - S02E01 - 89,000 Children
