2.plot: A year has passed since we last saw Prime Minister Birgitte Nyborg. In the season opener, Birgitte is visiting soldiers stationed in Afghanistan when their encampment is attacked, and several soldiers are killed. Now she must choose: send the troops home or stage a counterattack?

2.title: FR - Borgen, une femme au pouvoir - S02E02 - In Brussels No One Can Hear You Scream
2.plot: Prime Minister Birgitte Nyborg must appoint a new EU Commissioner. Sejro would seem the obvious choice, but Birgitte is surprised when he not only turns down the post but sees it as a personal slight. Who can she appoint?

2.title: FR - Borgen, une femme au pouvoir - S02E03 - The Last Worker
2.plot: The coalition government is preparing to introduce a new reform package - "A Common Future". But attempts to get agreement on the reforms causes Labour leader Bjørn Marrot serious problems - in the media and within his own party.

2.title: FR - Borgen, une femme au pouvoir - S02E04 - Battle Ready
2.plot: Troels Höxenhaven exploits the hijack of a Danish ship by Somali pirates to try and raise his profile. However, compromising photos of Höxenhaven turn up at the Ekspres.

2.title: FR - Borgen, une femme au pouvoir - S02E05 - Plant a Tree
2.plot: Birgitte Nyborg is about to negotiate the environmental element of the new reform package, but she must face the reality of parties unwilling to compromise. Kasper convinces her that underhanded tactics can help win her a majority for the reform. Meanwhile, Katrine receives an unusual job offer that tests her personal beliefs. And at home, Birgitte's children are clearly affected by their mother's stress; Laura in particular.

2.title: FR - Borgen, une femme au pouvoir - S02E06 - Them and Us
2.plot: Kasper's past returns to haunt him as he clears out his parents former home, whilst the Freedom Party suggest lowering the age of criminal responsibility to 12. A move that reveals fundamental differences in the coalition parties.

2.title: FR - Borgen, une femme au pouvoir - S02E07 - What is Lost Inwardly Must Be Gained Outwardly (Part I)
2.plot: Birgitte's government is losing steam -- internal differences are growing and only compromise legislation is being passed. Just as opinion polls indicate Birgitte may lose the next election, financier Joachim Crohne emerges with an idea that could save her political career. But can his motives be trusted? Meanwhile, Kasper and Katrine are growing close again, but their jobs are at odds: Katrine's role is to uncover secrets, while Kasper's is to conceal them.

2.title: FR - Borgen, une femme au pouvoir - S02E08 - What is Lost Inwardly Must Be Gained Outwardly (Part II)
2.plot: The eyes of the world are on Copenhagen and Birgitte Nyborg as peace talks draw near between North and South Kharun. Everyone has been working around the clock, and although Kasper is now living with Katrine, they rarely see each other. When Birgitte realizes Denmark is only a small piece in a major international power game, her negotiation skills are put to the test. Can she end the bloody civil war?

2.title: FR - Borgen, une femme au pouvoir - S02E09 - The Sanctity of Private Life
2.plot: Laura's illness has worsened over the past few months, and Birgitte now feels terrible about failing to recognize it. When Laura's psychiatrist suggests admitting her to a private psychiatric hospital, Birgitte and Phillip immediately agree. This move becomes problematic when Birgitte's own tax reforms force her to pay out of pocket for the hospital cost. At home, Birgitte and Phillip are rediscovering some of their lost love, despite Philip's continued relationship with Cecilie.

2.title: FR - Borgen, une femme au pouvoir - S02E10 - An Extraordinary Remark
2.plot: In the season finale, Birgitte is on a month leave from her post as prime minister to focus on family, and Hans-Christian Thorsen, Labor Party chairman, has positioned himself to be her possible successor. Birgitte is torn about whether or not she will return to work. Meanwhile, as Kasper and Katrine hunt for apartments together, their plan is derailed by an argument about the possibility of having children. Will one of them relent?

3.title: FR - Borgen, une femme au pouvoir - S03E01 - A Child of Denmark
3.plot: Two and half years later, Birgitte is traveling the world out of politics when suddenly the changing Moderate Party makes her want to return. The problem is, Krause, whom she sent away to EU, is the leader of the party now, and does not want her back. Sojro however tells Birgitte to oust Krause as a leader. Birgitte hires Kathrine to help her, and they try to get the votes together so Birgitte could once again become the leader of the Moderate Party.

3.title: FR - Borgen, une femme au pouvoir - S03E02 - The Land is Built on Law
3.plot: Birgitte is keeping her plan to herself initially, but one by one she involves people. While some are enthusiastic, Sejro does not take the news well, even calling Birgitte a traitor. Meanwhile, Kathrine is struggling with the role of being a (working) mother.

3.title: FR - Borgen, une femme au pouvoir - S03E03 - The Right Shade of Brown
3.plot: Birgitte has attracted lots of followers to her party, but the policy has not been set yet and there is no money. A banker offers a donation of one million but is there a catch? Meanwhile the team is searching for a spokesperson on immigration to debate on TV and Kathrine struggles with her feelings for Kasper.

3.title: FR - Borgen, une femme au pouvoir - S03E04 - Their Loss…
3.plot: Birgitte struggles to get her party recognized particularly by other politicians, but might have a chance to change it when her boyfriend gets sick and is exposed by the media. Meanwhile, Kathrine continues to struggle with her feelings for Kasper who has difficult time understanding why her behavior has changed.

3.title: FR - Borgen, une femme au pouvoir - S03E05 - Thou Shalt Not Commit Adultery
3.plot: Being accepted as a political party, New Democrats must take a stand on a controversial issue of banning buying sex. Through learning about the issue both Birgitte and Kathrine face their prejudices and their views on the issue change as they get personally more involved. It also affects their personal relations.

3.title: FR - Borgen, une femme au pouvoir - S03E06 - Sons of the Past
3.plot: The ex-communist professor joins The New Democrats Party.

3.title: FR - Borgen, une femme au pouvoir - S03E07 - The Fall
3.plot: When the New Democrats are invited to join a broad coalition of opposition parties they think it is the recognition they have been seeking. But Birgitte soon finds she has no bargaining power whatsoever, much to Nete's disgust.

3.title: FR - Borgen, une femme au pouvoir - S03E08 - If You Never Change Your Mind
3.plot: Birgitte quickly realizes that the New Democrats are now minor players in the opposition coalition and she pulls them out of it. The Moderates seem to be proposing things that Birgitte has privately discussed - is there a mole?

3.title: FR - Borgen, une femme au pouvoir - S03E09 - Sense and Sensibility
3.plot: After the leaks to the Moderates, Birgitte decides that the New Democrats need to distinguish themselves from the Moderates. So in a debate she launches a bold attack on their leader Jacob Kruse - will her strategy work?

3.title: FR - Borgen, une femme au pouvoir - S03E10 - The Election
3.plot: Kruse's outburst in the pre-election debate proves fatal to the Moderates and the New Democrats pick up more than double the predicted seats. Suddenly, Birgitte is being courted by both the left and right wing coalition groups.

1.title: FR - Common Side Effects - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Marshall meets his old high school classmate Frances and lets her in on a world-changing secret.

1.title: FR - Common Side Effects - S01E02 - Lakeshore Limited
1.plot: Marshall's forced on the run as the DEA pursues him.

1.title: FR - Common Side Effects - S01E03 - Hildy
1.plot: Marshall visits an old mentor as new pressures mount.

1.title: FR - Common Side Effects - S01E04 - Dumpsite
1.plot: Frances tracks down Marshall in an unlikely location.

1.title: FR - Common Side Effects - S01E05 - Star-Tel-Lite
1.plot: Marshall, Frances, and their crazy neighbors deal with the aftermath of a dangerous incident.

1.title: FR - Common Side Effects - S01E06 - In the System
1.plot: Stuck in jail, Marshall faces new threats.

1.title: FR - Common Side Effects - S01E07 - Blowfish
1.plot: A chance encounter offers a risky opportunity for escape.

1.title: FR - Common Side Effects - S01E08 - Amelia & Wyatt
1.plot: Marshall and his new ally make a bold move.

1.title: FR - Common Side Effects - S01E09 - Cliff's Edge
1.plot: Marshall's mushroom project grows out of hand.

meta.plot: Marshall et Frances, anciens partenaires de laboratoire au lycée, commencent à démêler une conspiration impliquant les grandes sociétés pharmaceutiques et le gouvernement fédéral pour supprimer la connaissance d'un champignon rare qui pourrait être la clé de la guérison de toutes les maladies du monde.

1.title: FR - Perception - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Neuroscience professor Daniel Pierce (Eric McCormack) is recruited by a former student, FBI Agent Kate Moretti (Rachael Leigh Cook), to help out on a case involving the death of a pharmaceutical executive. But Daniel's schizophrenic hallucinations could potentially derail the investigation.

1.title: FR - Perception - S01E02 - Faces
1.plot: Pierce is enlisted to help crack the case of a murdered mail-order bride. A twist marks the investigation when it's discovered the prime suspect suffers from an unusual condition. Elsewhere, Moretti is drawn to a handsome new professor.

1.title: FR - Perception - S01E03 - 86'd
1.plot: Pierce and Moretti race to find clues when a serial killer from 1986 begins killing again. They catch a break when they learn that one of the victims is actually alive. Moretti's dad, one of the investigators on the original case, offers his daughter advice. Pamela Reed also guest-stars as the mother of the surviving victim, while Armin Shimerman is the victim's psychologist.

1.title: FR - Perception - S01E04 - Cipher
1.plot: Pierce tries to crack a coded message left in a newspaper by someone who may be connected to a murder. But time isn’t on his side as another victim’s life could be in danger.

1.title: FR - Perception - S01E05 - The Messenger
1.plot: When a young man in a cult claims to be hearing the word of God, Pierce must determine if it’s actually the word of God or a life-threatening neurological condition. Pierce and Moretti must also figure out if his murder is linked to his drug past or his new life with an organization that may be scamming people out of their life savings. Roger Bart guest-stars as Ethan Kendrick, a high-powered IRS agent looking into the finances of the organization. Meanwhile, the university gives Pierce an award for his research.

1.title: FR - Perception - S01E06 - Lovesick
1.plot: Pierce is called upon to help the FBI investigate the murder of a therapist. Moretti spends more time with Professor Hathaway. And Dean Haley uses Pierce as bait to get a wealthy alumni’s widow to fund a new building.

1.title: FR - Perception - S01E07 - Nemesis
1.plot: Pierce must take a deep look into his own life when he is brought into a case involving a schizophrenic. Meanwhile, Moretti stops at nothing to impress her new boss at the FBI. Guest star Tom Sizemore plays a top-level Irish mobster, while guest star Edward Furlong plays a would-be tough guy who may have played a crucial role in the crime.

1.title: FR - Perception - S01E08 - Kilimanjaro
1.plot: Moretti and Pierce are called upon to solve a crime in their own backyard when a college student is killed in her dorm room. Pierce is forced into the uncomfortable situation of interacting on a personal level with more than one of his students, which forces him to confront difficult truths about his own past. The case comes just as Moretti is beginning to re-evaluate her relationship with Dr. Hathaway.

1.title: FR - Perception - S01E09 - Shadow
1.plot: A student tips off Pierce about a potential conspiracy to cover up the murder of a U.S. Senator.

1.title: FR - Perception - S01E10 - Light
1.plot: Moretti learns that there may be some truth to Pierce's conspiracy theory; Pierce's new doctor forces him to face the truth about Natalie.

2.title: FR - Perception - S02E01 - Ch-Ch-Changes
2.plot: FBI Agent Kate Moretti asks Dr. Daniel Pierce to determine the mental competency of a man being retried for murder. But the trial takes a shocking and unexpected turn when Pierce’s findings question whether the person standing trial is the same person he was six years ago. Meanwhile, Moretti is unpleasantly surprised to discover that the Assistant U.S. Attorney prosecuting the case is her soon-to-be-ex-husband Donnie Ryan.

2.title: FR - Perception - S02E02 - Alienation
2.plot: Pierce and Moretti take on an extraterrestrial case when a woman reports that aliens have abducted her husband. When Pierce and Moretti arrive to investigate, however, they make a startling discovery. Meanwhile, things heat up between Pierce and his real-life girlfriend, Caroline, but his relationship could be jeopardized if he can't get his imaginary girlfriend, Natalie, out of his mind.

2.title: FR - Perception - S02E03 - Blindness
2.plot: When a series of bizarre public murders occur, Pierce realizes that the killer is trying to send a message about inattentional blindness, but Donnie doubts this theory. But Pierce has a trick up his sleeve that can prove his point, and they must scramble to piece together the clues before the clever killer can make any more examples out of innocent victims.

2.title: FR - Perception - S02E04 - Toxic
2.plot: Pierce accepts an invitation to work on a case from a renowned environmental activist concerning a chain of abnormal neurological reactions in a group of young girls. However, upon examining the girls, Pierce discovers that a dark secret is at the root of their ailments. Meanwhile, Moretti questions Pierce’s motives in working on a case without her.

2.title: FR - Perception - S02E05 - Caleidoscope
2.plot: Pierce and Morretti plunge into virtual reality to solve the murder of Kurt Simpson, a man who spent most of his time in a massive multiplayer online game called Caleidoscope. After creating an avatar of himself to investigate the crime, Pierce struggles more than ever to distinguish between reality and fantasy.

2.title: FR - Perception - S02E06 - Defective
2.plot: A new brain device to control tremors seems to have a defect that turns out to be far more serious than a technical malfunction, and Pierce partners with Donnie to investigate. Their unlikely alliance is tested when the case escalates to murder. Meanwhile, Lewicki learns a valuable lesson about dating.

2.title: FR - Perception - S02E07 - Neuropositive
2.plot: When Moretti receives a deathbed confession about the hit-and-run murder of a teenager from 1992, she calls on Pierce to determine the ailing man's credibility. The case becomes complicated, however, when the alleged killer's physician, Dr. Hutchins, reveals that his patient’s tumor has mysteriously disappeared. Pierce and Moretti must dig deeper into the past to uncover the truth behind a shocking series of apparent homicides.

2.title: FR - Perception - S02E08 - Asylum
2.plot: Pierce investigates a stabbing at a psychiatric hospital and becomes convinced that the hospital is full of dark secrets.

2.title: FR - Perception - S02E09 - Wounded
2.plot: Donnie tries to help a war hero who suffers from a neurological disorder; Pierce is surprised by an old flame.

2.title: FR - Perception - S02E10 - Warrior
2.plot: Moretti faces criminal charges after taking matters into her own hands on a dangerous case; Pierce and Donnie try to clear Kate's name.

2.title: FR - Perception - S02E12 - Brotherhood
2.plot: Lewicki's brother shows up unannounced; Kenny is named the key suspect in a homicide case; Lewicki is approached with an offer that makes him question Pierce's loyalty.

2.title: FR - Perception - S02E13 - Cobra
2.plot: Pierce receives a tip that the CIA might be assassinating U.S. citizens; one of Pierce's close friends is murdered; Moretti tries to overcome her trust issues.

2.title: FR - Perception - S02E14 - Obsession
2.plot: Pierce's mental stability is questioned and his job threatened when he is accused of stalking his ex-girlfriend, Caroline Newsome. As the situation escalates, Moretti works to find the real stalker with help from a visiting inspector from Canada.

3.title: FR - Perception - S03E01 - Paris
3.plot: Dr. Daniel Pierce’s picture-perfect new life in Paris is suddenly turned upside down after he is approached by the FBI legat to help with a dangerous international case. Meanwhile, his assistant Max Lewicki and Dean Paul Haley plot to get Pierce to return to Chicago.

3.title: FR - Perception - S03E02 - Painless
3.plot: When a prosecutor mysteriously drops dead in the middle of a courtroom, Pierce and Moretti go on the hunt for a killer. Meanwhile, Moretti and Donnie make some decisions about their future.

3.title: FR - Perception - S03E03 - Shiver
3.plot: After a young victim with a developmental disorder is taken hostage in a bank robbery, Moretti brings in Pierce to interview the boy. When they finally track down the culprits, they discover the case is about much more than money. Meanwhile, Pierce’s estranged father James pays him a visit.

3.title: FR - Perception - S03E04 - Possession
3.plot: Moretti calls on Pierce to examine Elena Douglas, a woman who has confessed to murder and claims to be possessed by the Devil. Meanwhile, Donnie and Moretti’s wedding plans hit a bump in the road.

3.title: FR - Perception - S03E05 - Eternity
3.plot: When renowned neuroscientist Landon Jennings is found dead, Moretti and Pierce must figure out how someone could have gained access to his impenetrable study in order to kill him. Lewicki finds himself with twice the work when Pierce’s father James moves in with them.

3.title: FR - Perception - S03E06 - Inconceivable
3.plot: When an infant is reported stolen, Moretti hunts down the kidnapper and makes a very bizarre discovery. As Pierce and Moretti investigate a related murder, they find that there might be another child out there who needs their help. Meanwhile, Donnie and Moretti discuss their future together when Donnie looks into buying a house in the suburbs.

3.title: FR - Perception - S03E07 - Bolero
3.plot: After Pierce witnesses a gallery owner die during a seizure caused by a video installation, he convinces Moretti that it was actually a murder. Their search for the killer puts them in the middle of a brazen art heist. As Pierce works on the case, he is forced to re-examine his relationship with Natalie.

3.title: FR - Perception - S03E08 - Prologue
3.plot: After a missing FBI agent turns up dead, Pierce is forced to face the one case he was never able to solve. When they discover that the killer is still out there, Pierce agrees to help Moretti, against the wishes of his therapist, Dr. Rosenthal, who believes it will only exacerbate Pierce’s condition.

3.title: FR - Perception - S03E09 - Silence
3.plot: Donnie and Moretti are caught in the crossfire when a sniper shoots up the lobby of the Federal Building. When Pierce determines that the shooter is afraid of Extreme Low Frequency radio waves, he and Moretti take a trip to the Quiet Zone in Virginia, where they think the shooter is hiding out. Meanwhile, an alluring woman named Shelby Buchanan courts Donnie to run for political office.

3.title: FR - Perception - S03E10 - Dirty
3.plot: When Donnie finds himself in a compromising situation, he calls Pierce for help. As the evidence begins to stack against Donnie, Pierce and Moretti struggle with their own fears and doubts, as they work to solve the case. During the chaos, Pierce must deal with his father after he assaults someone at the assisted living facility.

3.title: FR - Perception - S03E11 - Brainstorm
3.plot: After Dr. Daniel Pierce suffers a traumatic injury, his father and his friend must decide if they should allow him to undergo a high-risk surgery; Pierce begins to question everything he sees and hears.

3.title: FR - Perception - S03E12 - Meat
3.plot: Agent Kate Moretti goes under cover to investigate an animal rights group suspected of foul play; Pierce considers making a confession to Kate.

3.title: FR - Perception - S03E13 - Mirror
3.plot: Pierce and Moretti uncover an international scandal while investigating the murders of a Bangladeshi diplomat and a Chicago reporter; Moretti struggles with the preparations for her upcoming wedding.

3.title: FR - Perception - S03E14 - Romeo
3.plot: When a student is found murdered, Pierce tries to find the killer while defending the victim's boyfriend; Pierce must confront his feelings as Kate and Donnie prepare for their wedding day.

3.title: FR - Perception - S03E15 - Run
3.plot: When Moretti goes missing the day of her wedding, Pierce and Donnie set off in pursuit of the runaway bride. They soon learn that Kate has been abducted by a dangerous person from Pierce's own past. Now, Pierce and Donnie must risk everything to save Moretti before it's too late.

meta.plot: Le professeur Daniel Pierce, un neuroscientifique excentrique et paranoïaque qui enseigne à l'université, aide le gouvernement à résoudre des enquêtes complexes. Il fait équipe avec une de ses anciennes élèves, Kate Moretti, responsable de son recrutement au sein du FBI; il pourra également compter sur l'aide de son assistant Lewicki et de son subconscient qui lui parle au travers d'hallucinations...

Tout juste diplômée, le Dr Emily Owens commence son internat en chirurgie au Denver Memorial Hospital, où elle retrouve le Dr Will Collins, dont elle est amoureuse depuis l'école de médecine, mais aussi son ennemie jurée du lycée, Cassandra, et une possible alliée en la personne de Tyra, la fille lesbienne du directeur. Soucieuse de plaire à son mentor, le Dr Gina Bandari, Emily traite ses premiers patients et fait également la connaissance du Dr Micah Barnes...

1.title: FR - Dr. Emily Owens - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Emily Owens, an awkward first-year intern at Denver Memorial Hospital, tries to balance work with romance. In the opener, Emily begins her internship and discovers her old high-school nemesis working there, as well as a guy she had a crush on in medical school.

1.title: FR - Dr. Emily Owens - S01E02 - Emily and ... the Alan Zolman Incident
1.plot: Emily learns that the nurses don't like her when she is assigned a difficult case as revenge. Later, Emily reveals her feelings to Will, and considers using a secret she knows about the chief to get a speedy approval on a procedure.

1.title: FR - Dr. Emily Owens - S01E03 - Emily and...the Outbreak
1.plot: Emily talks about safe sex to some girls at a local high school; and she tries to forget about her feelings for Will.

1.title: FR - Dr. Emily Owens - S01E04 - Emily and ... the Predator
1.plot: Emily and Micah are frantic when they discover their patient needs a kidney transplant immediately, but they are baffled when she mysteriously refuses to accept the kidney from her new husband. Elsewhere, Emily assists Dr. Hamada (Brittany Ishibashi) and Dr. Bandari, with a risky surgery after they discover that one of the babies their patient is carrying for her sister suffers from a defective heart valve. Meanwhile, in an effort to keep Cassandra away from Will, Emily tries to land the job as Dr. Bandari’s research assistant. However, her competition is Cassandra, who is willing to play dirty in order to get what she wants.

1.title: FR - Dr. Emily Owens - S01E05 - Emily and ... the Tell-Tale Heart
1.plot: Emily suffers a major embarrassment in front of her colleagues at the hands of a drug-impaired patient. In the aftermath, Emily decides to follow Dr. Bandari's advice and tries to toughen up. Emily and Will find that a teenage patient needs a partial liver transplant, but they uncover some surprising information when neither of the teen's parents is a match. Meanwhile, Cassandra starts treating Emily better in an effort to learn more about Will, and Tyra sets Emily up on a date with her ex, a fact which she doesn't reveal to Emily.

1.title: FR - Dr. Emily Owens - S01E06 - Emily and ... the Question of Faith
1.plot: Emily treats an infant and a deeply religious man whose faith is shaken following surgery. Meanwhile, Will breaks protocol with a risky diagnosis; and Tyra considers telling her father that she is a lesbian.

1.title: FR - Dr. Emily Owens - S01E07 - Emily and ... the Good and the Bad
1.plot: A beloved flower-delivery man collapses, but he is reluctant to get treatment. Meanwhile, Emily and Will are assigned to help a sick prisoner, but they find it difficult to remain professional and not let his crimes cloud their judgment.

1.title: FR - Dr. Emily Owens - S01E08 - Emily and the Car and the Cards
1.plot: When a female car accident victim is brought into the ER with a spike through her torso, everyone immediately blames her boyfriend for causing the accident. She makes it through surgery, but the doctors find that she may be paralysed. Later, they discover that the boyfriend has lupus, which could be to blame for the accident. The case brings up painful memories for Will. Emily deals with a model with jaw cancer who refuses to undergo surgery. Emily and Cassandra compete for Will's attention as they all prepare for the in-service exam.

1.title: FR - Dr. Emily Owens - S01E09 - Emily and the Love of Larping
1.plot: A man gets admitted in a costume and claims to be King Paravel from the Elvish nation. The man later goes blind which leads Will to believe he is suffering from conversion disorder, a psychiatric problem. Emily refuses to jump to conclusion so quickly. Another patient is a woman diagnosed with cancer who later passes away due to an unexpected cardiac arrest. Her upset daughter sues Micah for medical malpractice. In an attempt to prove that she is not predictable, Emily agrees to let Tyra dress her up for a blind date arranged by Cassandra. Emily shows up to the date beautifully which later causes Will to act jealous. Micah realizes his true feelings for Kelly. Doctor Bendari realizes she has been putting career before life and attempts to change it.

1.title: FR - Dr. Emily Owens - S01E10 - Emily and the Social Experiment
1.plot: After a year long absence, Dr. A.J. Aquino returns to Denver Memorial, but before he can rejoin the staff, the Chief insists that he make peace with Dr. Bandari. Emily is tasked with treating a patient who claims to be a psychic, and is convinced that her tarot cards predict her own impending death. Elsewhere, Cassandra and Dr. Bandari treat a patient who needs a lung transplant, but Micah’s discovery of a new medical issue leaves the patient with a tough decision. Meanwhile, Emily decides to test her theory that Will was jealous of her recent date, so Tyra offers to teach Emily how to flirt.

1.title: FR - Dr. Emily Owens - S01E11 - Emily and the Teapot
1.plot: When Emily, Will and Cassandra compete against each other to be Dr. Bandari's research assistant, feelings get hurt when they have to describe each other's flaws. Emily is determined to solve the medical mystery of a young patient whose x-rays reveals a bullet lodged in his lung, but who has no signs of a gunshot wound or scar. Meanwhile, Emily comes to a revelation about her personal life after diagnosing a daredevil with a rare disease that forces him to change his entire life.

1.title: FR - Dr. Emily Owens - S01E12 - Emily and the Perfect Storm
1.plot: When the hospital is inundated with bus crash victims during a winter storm, Emily is assigned to run triage in the E.R. During the chaos, Emily is forced to do an emergency skull procedure on a heroic Marine who suddenly collapses. Tyra bristles at her father’s lack of respect for her as a doctor, but they later experiences a breakthrough when they perform an emergency c-section together. Meanwhile, Will and Emily secretly work to help an unexpected patient leaving Cassandra to question Will’s true feelings for Emily. Micah finally makes a bold decision in his personal life.

1.title: FR - Dr. Emily Owens - S01E13 - Emily and the Leap
1.plot: Season Finale: Emily's decision about starting a relationship with Micah becomes even more complicated when Will hears about it and begins to feel jealous. Emily and Tyra treat an unruly woman, but after learning of her home hoarding situation, Emily wonders if the woman's personality changes may be caused by her many cats. Now that Cassandra and Will have broken up, Cassandra's strictly professional behavior distracts Will and causes him to misdiagnose their patient. Meanwhile, Micah's sister comes to town after finding out the truth about their mother.

1.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: The small northwest town of Twin Peaks, Washington is shaken up  when the body of the Homecoming Queen, Laura Palmer, is discovered  washed up on a riverbank, wrapped in plastic.

1.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S01E02 - Traces to Nowhere
1.plot: Agent Dale Cooper and Sheriff Harry Truman discover more about the troubled secret life of the murdered Laura Palmer.

1.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S01E03 - Zen, or the Skill to Catch a Killer
1.plot: Agent Cooper demonstrates an unusual deductive technique for the Twin Peaks Sheriff's Department.

1.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S01E04 - Rest In Pain
1.plot: The people of Twin Peaks gather together to attend the funeral of Laura Palmer.

1.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S01E05 - The One-Armed Man
1.plot: Cooper and Truman try to find The One-Armed Man.

1.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S01E06 - Cooper's Dreams
1.plot: Cooper and Truman discover a crime scene in the woods.

1.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S01E07 - Realization Time
1.plot: Dr. Jacoby gets a phone call from Laura Palmer.

1.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S01E08 - The Last Evening
1.plot: The investigation of Laura Palmer's murder reaches a terrifying conclusion.

2.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S02E01 - May the Giant Be with You
2.plot: In the aftermath of the incident at the Great Northern Hotel, the investigation into Laura Palmer's death continues, and information is provided from an unexpected source.

2.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S02E02 - Coma
2.plot: Cooper receives some unsettling news, while Audrey continues to work undercover as a hostess at One Eyed Jacks in Canada.

2.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S02E03 - The Man Behind the Glass
2.plot: Donna meets with Harold Smith, a recluse who may be the key to solving Laura's murder.

2.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S02E04 - Laura's Secret Diary
2.plot: Ben Horne asks Cooper for help in rescuing Audrey, and Donna uncovers a significant piece of evidence at Harold Smith's home.

2.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S02E05 - The Orchid's Curse
2.plot: Donna, after discovering that Harold has Laura's secret diary, hatches a risky plan with Maddy to steal it from his home.

2.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S02E06 - Demons
2.plot: Cooper and Truman cross over into Canada to rescue Audrey, but not all goes according to plan.

2.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S02E07 - Lonely Souls
2.plot: Maddy prepares to leave Twin Peaks, Pete uncovers the truth behind Tojamura's intentions, and Cooper receives a devastating message.

2.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S02E08 - Drive with a Dead Girl
2.plot: Ben receives an unwelcome surprise, Norma's mother arrives in Twin Peaks with a new husband, and Bob covers his tracks.

2.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S02E09 - Arbitrary Law
2.plot: Cooper attempts to locate Laura's killer after the discovery of another victim.

2.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S02E10 - Dispute Between Brothers
2.plot: Blaming Cooper for the death of his brother, Jean Renault plots his revenge as the eccentric FBI agent prepares to leave Twin Peaks.

2.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S02E11 - Masked Ball
2.plot: With Major Briggs missing, Cooper and Truman look for answers.

2.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S02E12 - The Black Widow
2.plot: The investigation into the disappearance of Major Briggs continues, while Bobby tails Hank Jennings at the request of a mentally unstable Ben Horne.

2.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S02E13 - Checkmate
2.plot: Major Briggs has no memory of the place he was taken, but now has an odd tattoo on his neck. Andy and Dick break into Little Nicky's files. Mike and Nadine begin an affair. Evelyn asks James to kill her husband.

2.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S02E14 - Double Play
2.plot: The rivalry between Cooper and Earle is revealed.

2.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S02E15 - Slaves and Masters
2.plot: Agent Cooper finds out who shot him and gets help with his deadly chess game against Windom Earle.

2.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S02E16 - The Condemned Woman
2.plot: Ed proposes to Norma; James and Donna say good-bye; and Audrey meets her fated one.

2.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S02E17 - Wounds and Scars
2.plot: Cooper is attracted to a beautiful, reclusive woman as Truman grieves over Josie's death.

2.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S02E18 - On the Wings of Love
2.plot: Cooper takes the sheriff's department on a midnight spelunking adventure, and Truman finds himself in the deadly embrace of a naked woman.

2.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S02E19 - Variations on Relations
2.plot: While Cooper and Truman try to unlock the secret of Owl Cave, the Miss Twin Peaks contest draws hot competition.

2.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S02E20 - The Path to the Black Lodge
2.plot: While romance blooms for Cooper and Annie, Donna finds a scrapbook that's full of surprises.

2.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S02E21 - Miss Twin Peaks
2.plot: Cooper and the officers prepare for Windom Earle to make his move at the Miss Twin Peaks contest.

2.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S02E22 - Beyond Life and Death
2.plot: Cooper must overcome his deepest fears as he enters the Black Lodge to save Annie from Windom Earle.

3.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S03E01 - Part 1
3.plot:
“My log has a message for you.”

A man observes a mysterious glass box, South Dakota Police discover a hideous crime and Hawk receives a cryptic message about Special Agent Dale Cooper.

3.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S03E02 - Part 2
3.plot:
“The stars turn and a time presents itself.”

Hawk searches for something in the woods while Cooper learns that his fate in the Black Lodge may not be sealed after all.

3.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S03E03 - Part 3
3.plot:
“Call for help.”

Cooper calls for help. Agents Gordon Cole, Albert Rosenfield and Tammy Preston investigate the glass box murders.

3.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S03E04 - Part 4
3.plot:
“…brings back some memories.”

Coop assumes the life of Dougie Jones, as Gordon and Agents Rosenfield and Preston investigate the situation surrounding Coop's doppelganger.

3.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S03E05 - Part 5
3.plot:
“Case files.”

Coop is still trapped as Dougie, going through the motions, as his doppelganger schemes in jail. Meanwhile, new information on Major Garland Briggs turns up.

3.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S03E06 - Part 6
3.plot:
“Don’t die.”

Gordon Cole instructs Albert to meet with an old contact. Hawk makes a discovery involving 'the missing piece' that will help him find Coop. Janey-E fixes Dougie's gambling debt, while Coop is still struggling to put what he knows about his past and the Black Lodge into words. Tragedy strikes after a drug deal takes place.

3.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S03E07 - Part 7
3.plot:
“There’s a body all right.”

Cooper and Janey-E are in for a violent surprise at the Lucky 7 office. Meanwhile, Gordon and Albert try enlisting Diane to figure out the mystery of the man they believe to be Cooper in jail.

3.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S03E08 - Part 8
3.plot:
“Got a light?”

Coop's doppelganger faces a life or death situation. In 1945, a bomb is dropped and modern man's evil is epitomized.

3.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S03E09 - Part 9
3.plot:
“This is the chair.”

More about Dougie Jones comes to light after an attempt on his life. Meanwhile, Gordon Cole discovers connections to Cooper concerning a Blue Rose case and Major Garland Briggs.

3.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S03E10 - Part 10
3.plot:
“Laura is the one.”

The Mitchum brothers find out more about Dougie Jones. In Twin Peaks, Richard Horne's committing horrible acts, and Hawk gets more clues from the Log Lady.

3.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S03E11 - Part 11
3.plot:
“There’s fire where you are going.”

The set-up involving the Mitchum brothers and Dougie reaches its climax while even stranger things start to happen to both the FBI team and the Twin Peaks Sheriff's Department.

3.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S03E12 - Part 12
3.plot:
“Let’s rock.”

An old FBI case gets new recruits after many years while well-known residents of Twin Peaks face problems.

3.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S03E13 - Part 13
3.plot:
“What story is that, Charlie?”

Dougie comes home bearing gifts while Anthony is sent on a risky mission, Evil Cooper wants revenge.

3.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S03E14 - Part 14
3.plot:
“We are like the dreamer.”

Gordon remembers an important moment from his past. Andy, Bobby, Hawk and Truman go to the forest. James hears a story about a glove on his birthday. An unknown facet of Sarah is revealed.

3.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S03E15 - Part 15
3.plot:
“There’s some fear in letting go.”

Big Ed and Norma have a relationship breakthrough. Evil Cooper tries to reconnect with an old friend, while Dougie Jones reaches an electrifying discovery.

3.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S03E16 - Part 16
3.plot:
“No knock, no doorbell.”

Dougie's loved ones care for him in the hospital, and Mr. C heads towards the coordinates. Meanwhile, Diane makes a confession to the FBI.

3.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S03E17 - Part 17
3.plot:
“The past dictates the future.”

Cooper arrives in Twin Peaks.

3.title: FR - Twin Peaks - S03E18 - Part 18
3.plot:
“What is your name?”

Cooper and Diane drive 430 miles. Cooper attempts to help a troubled woman he believes to be Laura Palmer.

meta.plot: Un meurtre a été commis à Twin Peaks, une petite bourgade de l'État de Washington en apparence tranquille. La jeune Laura Palmer est retrouvée morte nue au bord d'un lac, enveloppée dans du plastique. L'agent spécial du FBI, Dale Cooper, envoyé sur place pour démasquer le coupable, mène l'enquête avec le soutien du shérif local, Harry Truman. Ces investigations les amènent à révéler au grand jour les sombres secrets des uns et des autres. Pendant ce temps, d'inquiétants phénomènes se produisent...

1.title: FR - Common Law - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Travis Marks and Wes Mitchell, two of L.A.P.D's finest within the Robbery-Homicide Division, have a sever year track record of being the best. However, their constant disagreements and bickering is having an impact on their work, leading their Captain to take a new approach by sending them to couples counselling with tough-as-nails therapist Dr. Emma Ryan to work through their issues and strengthen their partnership and bond.

1.title: FR - Common Law - S01E02 - Ride-Along
1.plot: Wes and Travis are forced to bring Dr. Ryan along for the ride as they investigate the death of a woman who fell from the balcony of her honeymoon suite.

1.title: FR - Common Law - S01E03 - Soul Mates
1.plot: When Wes and Travis delve into the world of online dating to solve the murder of a thirty year-old woman named Darby Jensen, Wes finds more than he bargains for when he discovers his ex-wife uses the dating site as well.

1.title: FR - Common Law - S01E04 - The Ex-Factor
1.plot: Travis' ex-partner causes tension between the guys when they receive a special assignment to stop a crime ring responsible for stealing high-end vehicles.

1.title: FR - Common Law - S01E05 - The T Word
1.plot: The guys investigate a series of home invasions by a group of thieves and learn that Travis' foster brother could be their leader.

1.title: FR - Common Law - S01E06 - Performance Anxiety
1.plot: The guys' work suffers when they feel pressured to reach an important milestone during the hunt for a pair of criminals emulating Bonnie and Clyde.

1.title: FR - Common Law - S01E07 - Role Play
1.plot: While investigating a murder, Wes and Travis are given an assignment by their counselor. In an effort to get them to learn more about each other, she wants them to view the world through the others' eyes by role playing.

1.title: FR - Common Law - S01E08 - Joint Custody
1.plot: Wes and Travis investigate a cop's shooting and take care of the injured officer's police dog.

1.title: FR - Common Law - S01E09 - Odd Couples
1.plot: Wes and Travis share quarters during a stakeout to monitor the moves of a crime novelist, who may have helped a criminal escape prison.

1.title: FR - Common Law - S01E10 - In-Laws vs. Outlaws
1.plot: When their mentors are called in, Wes and Travis see each other differently.

1.title: FR - Common Law - S01E11 - Hot for Teacher
1.plot: Wes confides in Travis about dreams he's had about Dr. Ryan, which turns out to be a mistake. Elsewhere, Dr. Ryan's fiancé may be withholding information about a body found at his construction site.

1.title: FR - Common Law - S01E12 - Gun!
1.plot: After being kicked out of Dr. Ryan's group, Wes and Travis make a deal with their eccentric new therapist to get them out of counseling for good. But when a run-in with the members of the Special Investigations Section leads Travis to blow his top, the detectives realize that they don't just need to go back to therapy-they need Dr. Ryan. Chastened, the duo offers to tell Dr. Ryan the story of how they ended up in counseling in the first place if she'll take them back.

meta.plot: Wes Mitchell et Travis Marks sont les meilleurs flics de leur commissariat. Malheureusement, ils ne peuvent plus se supporter. Après que l'un a braqué son arme sur l'autre, leur capitaine les oblige à suivre une thérapie de couple pour améliorer leur entente et éviter qu'ils ne s'entretuent.

1.title: FR - The River - S01E01 - Magus
1.plot: Dr. Emmet Cole, adventurer and TV personality goes missing deep in the Amazon. After a string search for him, his family and friends hold a memorial service in his honor. His wife, Tess, tries to face the reality of her husband death, while her son, Lincoln, is more than ready to move on. Six months later Emmet's location beacon catches a mysterious signal. Tess and Lincoln join her and Emmet's film crew on a journey through the Amazon to find him.

1.title: FR - The River - S01E02 - Marbeley
1.plot: The spirit of Dr. Emmet gets into Jahel, the message is clear, go home! Tess then is determined to go and find clues to Cole's whereabouts. While on the mission, they discover a tree with children dolls that is suspected to guard of the "spirit of the abandoned girl" who drowned in the river. Then, a member of the crew goes missing and they realize they have to survive the nightmare of an angry spirit.

1.title: FR - The River - S01E03 - Los Ciegos
1.plot: When the crew of the Magus goes blind from tree spores, lone holdout AJ must overcome his most-paralyzing fear to find a cure before the blindness becomes permanent; the local tribe stalks the crew and judges if they are worthy to stay in the jungle.

1.title: FR - The River - S01E04 - A Better Man
1.plot: The Magus team encounters one of Emmet's colleagues who disappeared six months ago and discover he's been the victim of a mystical curse that is a life or death matter. But when the others plan to leave and continue the mission, Lincoln must face this challenge and be the moral compass.

1.title: FR - The River - S01E05 - Peaches
1.plot: The Magus crew are run aground by another vessel, and soon learn that the seemingly welcoming crew members of a ship claiming to have come to their rescue have in fact a very different agenda, causing a dire, life-and-death situation. The crew also make a shocking discovery that will leave one of them in tears.

1.title: FR - The River - S01E06 - Doctor Emmet Cole
1.plot: The Magus crew arrive at Sahte Falls and find footage that Emmet filmed of the days leading up to his disappearance. Lincoln and Tess have no choice but to watch as Emmet battles for survival on his way to the mysterious Source of all magic. Meanwhile, Lena has a confession to make to one of her crewmates.

1.title: FR - The River - S01E07 - The Experiment
1.plot: The Magus crew find themselves in a stark predicament as they're stalked by a cannibalistic terror while searching through an abandoned research facility following mysterious clues that suggest Dr. Emmet Cole may still be alive. Meanwhile, security force leader Kurt is forced to make a heavy personal sacrifice when it comes to the safety of the crew.

1.title: FR - The River - S01E08 - Row, Row, Row Your Boat
1.plot: With a course now plotted for their final destination, the Magus crew suddenly finds itself in complete chaos when a member of their own is shot dead, leading Jahel to call upon the spirit of the Boiúna to help, against the wishes of her father. The crew's quest is threatened further by the unknown killer, as the situation continues to spiral out of control.

meta.plot: Un aventurier célèbre, star de la télévision, est porté disparu lors d'un voyage au fin fond de l'Amazonie. Durant des années, accompagné de sa femme et de son fils, le Dr Emmet Cole a partagé - via son show télé - ses découvertes de contrées éloignées. Aujourd'hui, la chaîne finance une expédition filmée façon télé réalité pour tenter de le retrouver. Une équipe de cameramen suit de près les recherches menées entre autres par la famille et des amis du disparu. Tous embarquent à bord d'un bateau qui remonte l'Amazone et va les amener à faire des rencontres pour le moins effrayantes...

Sinbad accidentally kills the son of the powerful Lord Akbari in a fist fight. As recompense for the blood debt, Sinbad's brother is killed in front of his eyes. Sinbad escapes, but his grandmother uses a magic talisman to curse him for the death of his brother. The curse prevents Sinbad from staying on land for more than one day; if he tarries the talisman will choke him to death. This prohibition against remaining on land leads to a life of adventure at sea that holds many wonders. Sinbad is unaware that he is still being hunted by Lord Akbari, who does not consider Sinbad's brother's death as sufficient payment of the blood debt.

1.title: FR - Sinbad - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot:
When street rat Sinbad accidentally kills Lord Akbaris son, Akbari kills Sinbads brother in revenge. Sinbad escapes, but his grandmother Safia places a curse on him that until he atones for his sins he cant stay on dry land for more than 24 hours.

Sinbad stows away on the Providence, but magical sea creatures attack and all on board die except for Sinbad; Anwar, the ship's doctor; Gunnar, a Norse trader; Nala, a noblewoman on the run; Rina, a thief and the ship's Cook.

1.title: FR - Sinbad - S01E02 - Queen of the Water-Thieves
1.plot:
The crew are captured by Water-Thieves, a feral tribe. Sinbad tries to seduce their fierce leader Razia to save himself, but despite satisfying her, he learns she will kill him that night.

Sinbad escapes with the help of Razia's chained Roc, a giant mythical bird, and creates a diversion allowing his friends to escape. Sinbad returns to Razia's chamber and frees the Roc, but Razia attacks him. As his curse kicks in and is about to destroy him, the Roc swoops in and rescues Sinbad.

1.title: FR - Sinbad - S01E03 - House of Games
1.plot:
When Anwar loses The Providence in a bet to merchant Abdul-Fahim, Sinbad confides about the curse- he will die unless they get the ship back.

The gang follow Abdul-Fahim to a gaming-house and Sinbad wins back the ship. But the twisted gaming-house owners, twins Faris and Essam, challenge Sinbad to free his friends from a series of enchanted rooms before his curse kills him.

He succeeds, but Faris petulantly demands to keep Sinbad as his plaything. Rina becomes concerned about the others and whilst the brothers fight, rescues the curse-stricken Sinbad and drags him out of the casino. The crew welcome Rina back and Sinbad confesses to them about his curse.

1.title: FR - Sinbad - S01E04 - Old Man of the Sea
1.plot:
Running low on water with Cook severely dehydrated, the crew find a strange old man on a deserted ship. They are unaware it is Death come to reclaim his bride, Nala, who ran away from their ritual wedding.

Nala agrees to wed Death, believing it will bring back her dead father. Realising who the old man is, Sinbad rushes to save Nala, but in vain. It is only when Death accidentally reveals he has no knowledge of Nalas grief that the spell breaks and Nala escapes. The rain comes, reviving Cook.

1.title: FR - Sinbad - S01E05 - Hunted
1.plot:
Gunnar and Sinbad are ambushed by the Khaima, a band of warriors, who avenge injustice. Their leader, Obsidian, sentences Gunnar to death for his brutal Viking past.

Taryn creates a magical Stalker, which hunts down Sinbad at the Khaima campjust as Obsidian is about to kill Sinbad and Gunnar. The Khaima slash at the Stalker, but it repairs itself.

As Gunnar urges, Sinbad defeats the Stalker by mastering his anger. Obsidian pardons Gunnar and invites him to join the Khaima, but Gunnar declines.

1.title: FR - Sinbad - S01E06 - The Siren
1.plot: Attacked by a sea creature, Sinbad wakes, rescued by mysterious Roisin. Sinbad falls for her, unaware she is stealing his memories and the people in them from him. Rina find Roisin as she is about to kill Sinbad and offers her memories for his life. Rinas bad memory of how her mother sold her into slavery destroys Roisin, returning Sinbads memories. Sinbad has a vision of his grandmother calling for help and sets off back to Basra to rescue her, unaware it is a trap set by Taryn and Akbari.

1.title: FR - Sinbad - S01E07 - Homecoming
1.plot: Sinbad returns to Basra to rescue his grandmother, but it is a trap set by Akbari and Taryn. Akbari duels Sinbad, who gets the upper hand. Sinbad spares Akbari and apologises for the death of Akbaris son, breaking the curse. To Sinbads shock Taryn kills Akbari, telling Sinbad she can lead him to his brother in the Land of the Dead. Safia disrupts Taryns magic, causing Taryn to collapse. Before she dies Safia hints that Sinbad is special. Nala stays to rebuild Basra as the others sail on.

1.title: FR - Sinbad - S01E08 - Kuji
FR - Sinbad - S01E09 - Eye of the Tiger
FR - Sinbad - S01E10 - For Whom the Egg Shatters
FR - Awake - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: When Detective Michael Britten regains consciousness following his family's car accident, he is told that his wife Hannah perished, but that his teen son, Rex, has survived. As he tries to put the pieces of his life back together he awakens again in a world in which his wife is very much alive, but his son Rex died in the accident. In order to keep both of his loved ones alive he begins living two dueling realities. Trying to regain some normalcy Michael turns to his work solving crimes in both worlds with the help of two different partners, Detective Isaiah "Bird" Freeman and Detective Efrem Vega. He begins to solve impossible cases by using his dueling realities to gain unique perspectives and link clues that cross over from world to world. Helping Michael to navigate his new existence are his bureau assigned therapists Dr. Evans and Dr. Lee..

1.title: FR - Awake - S01E02 - The Little Guy
1.plot: Detective Michael Britten continues to deal with his parallel versions of reality. In one world he's looking for ways to reconnect with his son, Rex, by offering him some normalcy while they deal with his mother's death. In the other, Britten works to understand the emotions that his grieving wife, Hannah  is going through. Meanwhile, a witness in the murder of a homeless man tells Britten and his rookie partner, Vega that a "small guy" was spotted at the scene of the crime. When that clue crosses over into the case Britten is working on in his other reality, Bird, is confused by his partner's sudden interest in the height of the suspects they are investigating. Meanwhile, Britten's captain, shows growing concern over his behavior. Later, the events surrounding the fateful accident that changed Britten's life come into question and throughout, Dr. Lee and Dr. Evans continue to present their dueling theories on Britton's condition.

1.title: FR - Awake - S01E03 - Guilty
1.plot: Rex is kidnapped by an escaped convict Michael arrested 10 years ago; an investigation in Michael's other reality gets in the way of an event honoring his deceased son; clues from both realities lead to Michael's sanity being questioned.

1.title: FR - Awake - S01E04 - Kate is Enough
1.plot: While investigating an alleged suicide during an upscale yacht party with Detective Vega, Detective Britten runs into Rex's former babysitter Kate. Later, in a case Britten is investigating with Bird, Kate appears again, this time as a suspect. Dr. Lee and Dr. Evans try to help him make sense of his run in with these two very different versions of the same woman.

1.title: FR - Awake - S01E05 - Oregon
1.plot: Detective Britten suddenly becomes a suspect in his own case when an FBI agent, Santoro, questions his methods of tracking down a serial killer thought to be dead. Meanwhile, in the wake of her son's death, Hannah is finding comfort in exploring the possibility of moving to Oregon and going back to school.

1.title: FR - Awake - S01E06 - That's Not My Penguin
1.plot: While working a hostage situation with Detective Vega, Detective Michael Britten unexpectedly finds himself collaborating with Dr. Lee. In an effort to calm down Gabriel Wyath -- a patient who has threatened to blow up a mental hospital -- Britten is compromised, and the effects follow him into his other reality. Meanwhile, Rex introduces his girlfriend, Emma, to his dad and Bird shows concern over Britten's lack of focus due to his sleepless nights.

1.title: FR - Awake - S01E07 - Ricky's Tacos
1.plot: An unexpected tip leads Detective Britten to an empty warehouse that was tied to a case he was investigating prior to the accident. His curiosity causes concern for Captain Harper. Meanwhile, Hannah prepares for the move to Oregon. Bird and Britten investigate a mysterious suicide, while Detective Vega and Britten work on a 3 year-old homicide. Later, Dr. Lee gives Britten the key to solving one of his cases while Dr. Evans helps him make a decision about the move.

1.title: FR - Awake - S01E08 - Nightswimming
1.plot: Detective Britten helps reunite and prepare a couple for a new life in the witness protection program; an introduction between Detective Vega and Britten's longtime informant doesn't go smoothly.

1.title: FR - Awake - S01E09 - Game Day
1.plot: The final play in a big football rivalry happens differently in Detective Britten's two realities; Rex's heart is broken; Vega and Hannah plan a going-away party for Britten.

1.title: FR - Awake - S01E10 - Slack Water
1.plot: Detective Britten and Bird look into what appears to be a case of gang violence, but clues from his other reality force him to look a little closer. Meanwhile, Hannah uses her intuition to talk through a tough situation with Rex's girlfriend Emma. Later, Captain Harper finds herself having to take back a promise and Detective Vega is planning Britten's going away party.

1.title: FR - Awake - S01E11 - Say Hello to My Little Friend
1.plot: An unusual dream disrupts Britten's ability to switch realities, and a mysterious man causes him distress; Captain Harper becomes increasingly concerned over Britten's erratic behavior.

1.title: FR - Awake - S01E12 - Two Birds
1.plot: Detective Britten doesn't know who to trust when the truth behind the accident begins to reveal itself and a high-ranking conspiracy threatens both of his realities. In a moment of frustration, Britten decides to take the law into his own hands and goes after Detective Hawkins, putting himself and Bird in the crosshairs of the conspirators. Captain Harper is instructed to clean up the mess. Later, when questioned about his partner, Detective Vega begins to have concerns about his Captain's intentions.

1.title: FR - Awake - S01E13 - Turtles All the Way Down
1.plot: As Britten starts to realize the truth behind the accident, a conspiracy threatens both of his realities; Britten goes after Detective Hawkins; Dr. Lee and Dr. Evans come together in a debate that forces Britten to choose a path.

meta.plot: À la suite d'un violent accident de voiture, l'agent de police Michael Britten se met à vivre dans deux réalités parallèles : dans l'une, sa femme a survécu et son fils est décédé ; dans l'autre, cette situation est inversée. Michael, voulant garder sa famille au plus proche de lui, va vivre une sorte de « double vie ». Cependant, il commence à remarquer des liens étranges entre les deux réalités. Les événements et les personnes d'une réalité à l'autre ne sont pas toujours ceux qu'il croit connaître…
A woman puts everything on the line to achieve her goal of being able to move into a luxury penthouse in the Gangnam District. In the process, she gradually finds herself turning into a monster.

1.title: FR - The Penthouse - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Yoon Hee's daughter dreams to be a classical singer. Despite her mom's disapproval, she's a feisty middle school student who pursues singing. One day, she visits the most famous soprano in Korea, Cheon Seo Jin. She wants to take her lessons and pleads her to accept her. Right when Seo Jin was astonished to hear her voice, Yoon Hee barges in, and the two meet unexpectedly.

1.title: FR - The Penthouse - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: All of Hera Club's middle schoolers aim to top the entrance audition to Cheong Ah Arts High School. Everyone busily takes their lessons and works hard and so does Ro Na, Yoon Hee's daughter. The big day arrives and everyone patiently waits for the results. A surprising name tops the list of successful applicants. It's an unheard girl named Min Seol A.

1.title: FR - The Penthouse - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Seo Jin urges Seol A to sign a paper saying that she’ll give up her acceptance to Cheong Ah Arts High. Seol A doesn’t back down and firmly states how she’ll attend the school no matter what. On top of that, Seol A also mentions how she knows about Seo Jin and Dan Tae’s secret illicit love affair.

1.title: FR - The Penthouse - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Due to Seol A’s death, Ro Na, the first on the waiting list of Cheong Ah Arts High automatically gets accepted. Unlike Ro Na’s jovial heart, Yoon Hee is confused and nonplussed at the news. She can’t remember what happened the day she went to Hera Palace.

1.title: FR - The Penthouse - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Files of Hera Club kids harassing Seol A is spread online and the Hera Club parents find ways to circumvent the situation. They decide to shift the attention to Yoon Hee and make sure Ro Na is suspended from school. However, an unexpected man stands up for her at the emergency parent meeting.

1.title: FR - The Penthouse - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Su Ryeon visits Congressman Cho to reveal the truth behind the countless orphans who were adopted but deported back. The two get in a fight as the discussion heats up and Mr. Yoon accidentally kills Congressman Cho by trying to protect Su Ryeon. Right then, the doorbell rings and Yoon Hee appears.

1.title: FR - The Penthouse - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Yoon Hee decides to sell the Bosuk Village home she bought for her daughter’s sake. However, on the day Yoon Hee was supposed to sell the house, she sees the news of the city’s new redevelopment plan. Bosuk Village will be the main redeveloped area and she and Ro Na be rich now.

1.title: FR - The Penthouse - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Su Ryeon intentionally allows Yoon Hee to see her husband having an affair with Seo Jin. Using Yoon Hee’s sympathy toward her, Su Ryeon moves on with her plans in bringing down Joo Dan Tae. The first step is by purchasing the building in the center of Myeongdong’s new shopping center site.

1.title: FR - The Penthouse - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: Because Yoon Hee won the auction bid for the Myeongdong house, Joo Dan Tae tries to win her over by offering a deal. However, Yoon Hee remains rigid and clearly states that she will not sell the building to Joo Dan Tae. The Hera Club men are infuriated and this time, Attorney Lee steps in to convince Yoon Hee in selling the Myeongdong house.

1.title: FR - The Penthouse - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: Yoon Hee moves into Hera Palace and the whole Hera Club is astonished. More surprisingly, it was Joo Dan Tae who wrote a recommendation letter, allowing her move-in. Ro Na and Yoon Hee enjoy their first day at Hera Palace while the others scheme to get her out.

1.title: FR - The Penthouse - S01E11 - Episode 11
1.plot: Yoon Chul spots Seo Jin enjoying an intimate time with Joo Dan Tae. He's devastated inside and decides to get a divorce. Meanwhile, Cheong A’s audition to select the school’s ambassador is held and all of the Hera Club kids participate. As they audition, Seok Hoon hints a warm support to Ro Na, and Eun Byeol burns with jealousy.

1.title: FR - The Penthouse - S01E12 - Episode 12
1.plot: Everyone practices hard to perform well at the Cheong A Ambassador Audition. Eun Byeol is on the verge to ruin herself as she grows agitated about competing against Ro Na and Seok Kyung. Seeing her daughter in panic, Seo Jin buys the audition script and hands it over to Eun Byeol to practice.

1.title: FR - The Penthouse - S01E13 - Episode 13
1.plot: Yoon Hee finds out how badly Joo Dan Tae needs to meet Logan Lee to sell the Myeongdong plot of land. She and Su Ryeon plan to get back at Joo Dan Tae by arranging Logan and Dan Tae’s meeting at all costs. Will Logan buy Yoon Hee’s story and help her out?

1.title: FR - The Penthouse - S01E14 - Episode 14
1.plot: At the lighting ceremony hosted to impress Logan Lee, Joo Dan Tae faces an unexpected surprise. Another hideous warning calling out Min Seol A’s death takes place and all Hera Club members are taken aback. Right then, Seo Jin steps up to confront Su Ryeon and exposes Su Ryeon’s relationship with Min Seol A.

1.title: FR - The Penthouse - S01E15 - Episode 15
1.plot: Yoon Hee finds out how Ro Na has been misunderstanding her relationship with Yoon Chul. She decides to get back at Seo Jin for deliberately using her daughter to instigate Eun Byeol. Seo Jin and Yoon Hee meet, with another surprise guest Seo Jin would’ve never thought of in her dreams.

1.title: FR - The Penthouse - S01E16 - Episode 16
1.plot: Seo Jin covers up her father’s death as an acute heart attack and acts as if she had nothing to do with it. After the funeral, she secures her position as the new director of the Cheong A Arts Foundation. Meanwhile, Logan Lee offers a co-investment plan to Joo Dan Tae.

1.title: FR - The Penthouse - S01E17 - Episode 17
1.plot: Yoon Hee scans her memory to the night when Min Seol A died. She remembers that she was the one who pushed Seol A off the balcony of the 47th floor. Before she could even handle the truth, Su Ryeon confesses how she’s been using Yoon Hee to reveal the truth behind Seol A’s wrongful death.

1.title: FR - The Penthouse - S01E18 - Episode 18
1.plot: Yoon Hee sees Dan Tae as a chance to elevate her daughter, Ro Na’s school life. Despite feeling some guilt about slowly growing distant from Su Ryeon, she partners with Dan Tae to also hide the fact that she’s the killer of Min Seol A. Meanwhile, Eun Byeol feels disgusted toward her mom after finding out about her affair with Mr. Joo.

1.title: FR - The Penthouse - S01E19 - Episode 19
1.plot: On the day of Seo Jin's inauguration ceremony as the new director of Cheong A Foundation, a surprise text spread across the school. She's accused of forging Eun Byeol's admissions to Cheong A Arts High and captured. Dan Tae is also sued for embezzlement and finds out it was Logan Lee who reported him.

1.title: FR - The Penthouse - S01E20 - Episode 20
1.plot: Seo Jin and Yoon Hee both beg Su Ryeon to stop now. They can’t bear seeing their daughters suffer from their wrongdoings, now being exposed. Su Ryeon tells them to turn themselves in and pay for what they did to Min Seol A.

1.title: FR - The Penthouse - S01E21 - Episode 21
1.plot: Yoon Hee admits to killing Su Ryeon at the police station, but there’s actually a real culprit behind Su Ryeon’s murder. Joo Dan Tae planned to frame Yoon Hee and kill Su Ryeon together with Cheon Seo Jin. The two happily enjoy their freedom as Yoon Hee gets arrested.

2.title: FR - The Penthouse - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: Dan Tae and the residents of Hera Palace prepare a proposal for Seo Jin. However, police officers barge in and arrest Dan Tae as the murderer of Su Ryeon. While Yoon Hee turns herself in, she runs into Dan Tae and Seo Jin at the police station. Now that Dan Tae is a new suspect, other residents also start to believe that he killed his own wife.

2.title: FR - The Penthouse - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: When Yoon Chul introduces Yoon Hee as his wife, everyone gets shocked especially Eun Byeol. Seo Jin can’t stop thinking about Yoon Chul and it leads Seo Jin and Dan Tae to have a huge fight. Meanwhile, the doctor warns Seo Jin not to sing for awhile, but she can’t give up on her concert as it can damage her reputation.

2.title: FR - The Penthouse - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: Seo Jin is shocked to find out that Yoon Hee sang for her instead of Young Ran. The more Yoon Hee tries to bring Seo Jin down, Seo Jin feels insecure. She gets mad at Secretary Do and tells him to find a way to stop her. Meanwhile, Dan Tae also notices that Seo Jin is hiding something from him and questions Secretary Do to discover her secret.

2.title: FR - The Penthouse - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: Out of the blue, Yoon Chul visits Seo Jin at the hotel where she’s supposed to meet Dan Tae. As Dan Tae arrives, Seo Jin quickly hides Yoon Chul in the closet. Meanwhile, Ro Na comes back to Cheong A Arts High School and Ma Ri gets furious after finding out that her daughter, Jenny is being bullied by Seok Kyung and her friends.

2.title: FR - The Penthouse - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: Seok Kyung threatens Seo Jin with a secret she claims to know about her for the grand prize given at the Cheong A Art Festival. Ma Ri flips out on the parents who bullied Jenny and warns them she won't back away until everyone involved gets punished. Meanwhile, Seo Jin finds her mother and sister in her office with a non-disclosure agreement and tells her to step down from being the director.

2.title: FR - The Penthouse - S02E06 - Episode 6
2.plot: A janitor who found Ro Na on the staircase runs into the auditorium, screaming when Seo Jin announces the grand prize winner of the Cheong A Art Festival. Ro Na goes unconscious and Yoon Hee suspects Eun Byeol. When Seo Jin realizes that the culprit was Eun Byeol, she goes back to school to find the trophy in Eun Byeol's locker and runs into Yoon Hee and Ma Ri.

2.title: FR - The Penthouse - S02E07 - Episode 7
2.plot: Eun Byeol is going mad day by day, and Seo Jin calls Yoon Chul for help. When Yoon Hee finds out that Yoon Chul is also involved in Ro Na’s death, she runs to Cheong A Medical Center to find him. Dan Tae uses Seo Jin’s weakness to gain more power and wealth, and Yoon Hee uses her biggest secret to bring her down in front of the public.

2.title: FR - The Penthouse - S02E08 - Episode 8
2.plot: Yoon Hee meets Ae Gyo for the first time, and she is surprised as she looks just like Su Ryeon who is supposed to be dead. Seok Hoon tries to figure out what Eun Byeol has done to Ro Na, but Eun Byeol can’t remember anything that happened during the Cheong A Art Festival. Meanwhile, Yoon Chul is too guilty to stay by Yoon Hee’s side anymore, and he decides to leave her.

2.title: FR - The Penthouse - S02E09 - Episode 9
2.plot: Yoon Hee and Logan try to persuade Ae Gyo to stay away from Dan Tae, and they leak information that Dan Tae was hiding to get back at him. Furthermore, Seo Jin is about to be kicked out of the director position of Cheong A Art High School. Meanwhile, Seok Hoon believes there is something his father, Dan Tae, is hiding about Su Ryeon’s death.

2.title: FR - The Penthouse - S02E10 - Episode 10
2.plot: Yoon Chul is arrested after Mr. Park confessed that he bribed him to give a fake confession. Yoon Chul admits the crime as he has no choice but to protect Eun Byeol. After hearing the news, Seo Jin runs to the police station to meet him. Meanwhile, Yoon Hee also visits Yoon Chul to tell him something she has been hiding all along.

2.title: FR - The Penthouse - S03E11 - Episode 11
2.plot: Joo Dan Tae tries to escape on a boat as a fugitive. However, when he wakes up, he finds himself confined and as Baek Jun Ki. Meanwhile, evidence that Seo Jin may be the murderer in Oh Yoon Hee's death surfaces. Later, she gets abducted by Su Ryeon and Logan, and then everything she ever dreamed of starts to cave in on her.

2.title: FR - The Penthouse - S03E12 - Episode 12
2.plot: Seo Jin survives and recovers in the hospital. However, Su Ryeon believes her mental state is all just an act. Meanwhile, loan sharks wait by her hospital bedside, keeping watch as Eun Byeol tries to fight them off. Later, Dan Tae escapes from the mental hospital in Japan and calls Seok Hoon for help.

2.title: FR - The Penthouse - S02E13 - Episode 13
2.plot: Yoon Hee decides to take her punishment as she feels sorry for Su Ryeon and her daughter, Seol A. However, the rest of the members of the Hera Club claim their innocence throughout the trial for Seol A’s case. Meanwhile, Logan comes back to Korea to propose to Su Ryeon, and Su Ryeon gets rid of Dan Tae’s and Seo Jin’s belongings in the penthouse.

3.title: FR - The Penthouse - S03E01 - Episode 1
3.plot: Finally, Su Ryeon spends a pleasant time with her kids, Seok Hoon and Seok Kyung. However, Seok Kyung is not happy how Su Ryeon and Seok Hoon are overly generous to Ro Na. The newlywed couple, Dan Tae and Seo Jin, go through a tough time adjusting to prison life, and they try their best to find a way to get out from there with their money and power. Meanwhile, Su Ryeon witnesses Logan's death right before her eyes, and she strongly believes that it was done by Dan Tae.

3.title: FR - The Penthouse - S03E02 - Episode 2
3.plot: The moment Seo Jin is released from prison, she visits her daughter, Eun Byeol, but Eun Byeol avoids her. Therefore, she decides to retrieve everything back from Dan Tae and her stepmother. Meanwhile, on the day of the performance test, students are getting ready at the examination hall for Seoul University of Music, and Seok Kyung relays a shocking message to Jenny just before the test.

3.title: FR - The Penthouse - S03E03 - Episode 3
3.plot: Su Ryeon stops Jun Ki from shooting Dan Tae at the restaurant since Seok Kyung was with him. Jun Ki finally meets Su Ryeon and tells her the truth behind Dan Tae’s real identity and Logan’s death. To take his revenge, Jun Ki meets everyone around Dan Tae. Meanwhile, Hera Palace residents suspect Yoon Hee of taking Logan’s 10 billion dollars which he received as an inheritance under Seol A's name.

3.title: FR - The Penthouse - S03E04 - Episode 4
3.plot: Yoon Hee straight away notices that Dong Pil was hiding something for Dan Tae. Since Yoon Hee is searching around to find the truth behind Dan Tae's crime, Dan Tae decides to get rid of her by using his people. Meanwhile, Ro Na and Seok Hoon try to help Eun Byeol as Bun Hong was getting more and more obsessive over her.

3.title: FR - The Penthouse - S03E05 - Episode 5
3.plot: After discovering Oh Yoon Hee's body, Yoo Dong Pil falls victim to Joo Dan Tae and drops to his knees, begging for his life. As a result, he gets told to get rid of Oh Yoon Hee's body. Meanwhile, due to Joo Dan Tae's scheme, Jin Bun Hong holds an emergency press conference claiming that Oh Yoon Hee kidnapped Ha Eun Byeol.

3.title: FR - The Penthouse - S03E06 - Episode 6
3.plot: Seo Jin becomes the director at the Cheong A Arts Center. Later, Eun Byeol wakes up at the hospital, and despite the good news of her getting into Seoul National University, she becomes frantic as she accuses Seo Jin of killing Oh Yoon Hee. Meanwhile, Ma Ri vows to help Su Ryeon takedown Joo Dan Tae as Su Ryeon figures out what Yoon Hee wanted to mention before she died.

3.title: FR - The Penthouse - S03E07 - Episode 7
3.plot: Cheong A Constructions and Dohae Construction continue their fight on who gets the rights to the Cheonsoo District redevelopment project until the very end with lobbyists fighting hard on both sides. As Dan Tae believes his plan to be foolproof, he asks Seo Jin for even more money. However, when things don't go the way he planned, he takes a big risk in an attempt to make up for his losses.

3.title: FR - The Penthouse - S03E08 - Episode 8
3.plot: Su Ryeon becomes desperate after finding out that Seok Kyung is her biological daughter and that Ju Dan Tae may have taken her somewhere else other than Italy. To help find Seok Kyung, Seok Hoon fools Dan Tae into thinking that he wants to take over his father's business and starts digging for clues. Meanwhile, Ro Na shines at the Cheong A Arts Residence Audition.

3.title: FR - The Penthouse - S03E09 - Episode 9
3.plot: Joo Dan Tae and Cheon Seo Jin celebrate together for having their plan go through, blaming Logan's supposed death on Su Ryeon. However, they each know that soon the other will be after their throat. Meanwhile, Logan reunites with Su Ryeon, and he tells her everything that happened. With Yoon Chul's help, they vow to punish Seo Jin and Dan Tae for their crimes.

3.title: FR - The Penthouse - S03E10 - Episode 10
3.plot: Su Ryeon and Logan get Dan Tae and Seo Jin right where they want them, fighting against each other. With Ma Ri, Dong Pil, and Yoon Chul on board, they take it further and use Baek Jun Ki and Jin Bun Hong to empty their pockets dry. As they throw evidence that can destroy them at their faces, Seo Jin and Dan Tae fight each other to survive.

3.title: FR - The Penthouse - S03E11 - Episode 11
3.plot: Joo Dan Tae tries to escape on a boat as a fugitive. However, when he wakes up, he finds himself confined and as Baek Jun Ki. Meanwhile, evidence that Seo Jin may be the murderer in Oh Yoon Hee's death surfaces. Later, she gets abducted by Su Ryeon and Logan, and then everything she ever dreamed of starts to cave in on her.

3.title: FR - The Penthouse - S03E12 - Episode 12
3.plot: Seo Jin survives and recovers in the hospital. However, Su Ryeon believes her mental state is all just an act. Meanwhile, loan sharks wait by her hospital bedside, keeping watch as Eun Byeol tries to fight them off. Later, Dan Tae escapes from the mental hospital in Japan and calls Seok Hoon for help.

3.title: FR - The Penthouse - S03E13 - Episode 13
3.plot: Su Ryeon defeats Dan Tae and sends him plummeting to his death. However, he takes down Hera Palace, blowing it up as he planned. Logan saves Su Ryeon from the explosion, and later, they go after their last target, Seo Jin. Meanwhile, Yoon Chul wakes up and discovers that Seo Jin's dementia is all a sham.

3.title: FR - The Penthouse - S03E14 - Episode 14
3.plot: Su Ryeon falls over the cliff and doesn't resurface. The rescuers search to no avail. Meanwhile, Seo Jin stands trial for the murder of Oh Yoon Hee and the attempted murder of Su Ryeon. Eun Byeol's testimony against her mother shocks everyone in court. Three years later, at Ro Na and Seok Hoon's recital, Logan chases a woman who looks like Su Ryeon.

1.title: FR - Motel California (VOSTER) - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Motel California (VOSTER) - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Motel California (VOSTER) - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Motel California (VOSTER) - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Motel California (VOSTER) - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Motel California (VOSTER) - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - Motel California (VOSTER) - S01E07 - Episode 7

meta.plot: Emily, Payson, Kaylie et Lauren sont des adolescentes, mais déjà des gymnastes de haut niveau. Elles ne rêvent que d'une chose : être sélectionnées dans l'équipe américaine pour participer aux Jeux olympiques. Il n'y aura pas de place pour tous.

1.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: A new girl, Emily Kmetko, comes to train with they veterans at the gym and finds that they are both impressed and threatened by her.

1.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S01E02 - Where's Marty
1.plot: The exit of Coach Marty and one of "The Rock's" top guns, Lauren, causes chaos at the gym. Prompting Payson, Kaylie and Emily (with Becca in tow) to head for Denver with a plan to confront them about their defection. All of this happens at the same time as the Cruz's (Ronnie and Alex) invite everyone to the mansion for a meeting. Meanwhile, Lauren is less than pleased at the cool greeting she receives at the new gym. And shocked by the discovery that she makes concerning her father and his 'Personal Assistant', Summer.

1.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S01E03 - Blowing Off Steam
1.plot:
Tensions are still high at The Rock as the girls continue on without direction and with the surprise return of Lauren, Steve and a possible new heavyweight coach. Before the new coach's strict workout regimen takes effect, Emily, Payson and Kaylie decide to hit up a high school party to blow off some steam. Once at the party, Emily has an uncomfortable run-in with Razor, Kaylie has a fight with Carter after he realizes she lied to him, and Payson can't believe she's wasting her time at such a trivial event. Bringing more stress than fun to their lives, it's not exactly how the girls envisioned their evening.

Meanwhile, Lauren's birthday takes a wrong turn when Summer shows up at her birthday dinner.

1.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S01E04 - Sunday, Bloody Sasha, Sunday
1.plot: After busting them for going to the party, Sasha puts the girls through a rigorous day of training and team building.

1.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S01E05 - Like Mother, Like Daughter, Like Supermodel
1.plot:
With a lack of funds facing The Rock team for Nationals, Kim and the other mothers decide to host a mother-daughter fashion show. But what starts as a fun idea ends up causing trouble for everyone. Ronnie is so busy with the details that Kaylie feels ignored, especially at a time when she could really use her mother’s advice about love and sex. With her mother out of the country, Lauren is paired up with Summer, much to her chagrin, but tries to use this opportunity to catch Carter’s eye. Furious at Chloe for spilling secrets to Damon, Emily is mortified for her “out there” mother to even be at the gym, let alone to walk a runway with her, while Payson, not wanting to waste time with “girlie things,” tips off Kim that maybe she hasn’t been a great role model in the feminine world. Will all the mother-daughter teams get it together in order to raise the money, or will the whole show become a nightmare that puts everyone at each other’s throats?

Meanwhile, after spotting her with Carter, Summer gets the feeling that Lauren is over her head in the boy department and tries to help by opening up.

1.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S01E06 - Between a Rock and a Hard Place
1.plot:
Taking a gamble that the girls are ready and can use the motivation for Nationals, Sasha invites Marty and the Denver team to The Rock for an invitational meet. Payson is determined to show that she is the best, but when an old injury flares up, it might have devastating results.
