Emily is also resolved to show what she can do, but Sasha has other, less advanced plans for her. But with reigning Nationals champion Kelly Parker (guest star Nicole Anderson, “JONAS”) in tow, are the girls really ready for the Denver gym and this challenge?

Meanwhile, Carter has to rethink his relationship with Kaylie when Sasha and Lauren give him an ultimatum.

1.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S01E07 - Run, Emily, Run
1.plot: The Rock is gearing up for Nationals, and with that comes more pressure, while Emily has to deal with the consequences of her actions.

1.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S01E08 - All's Fair in Love, War and Gymnastics
1.plot: With everyone gearing up for Nationals, the pressure is on at The Rock. To celebrate, the Cruz family is hosting the Nationals send-off party where, it turns out, everyone has his/her own agenda. Still dealing with her back pain, Payson decides to take a fellow gymnast up on his offer for some anti-inflammatory medicine behind her Mom's back. Summer plays a new card in her relationship with Lauren to see if she could finally turn things around. Lauren, on the other hand, has decided to make her final move to break up Carter and Kaylie for good, with explosive results. But with all the drama going down at the party, what should be a fun event turns out to be something very different.

1.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S01E09 - Where's Kaylie
1.plot: When Carter comes clean about his infidelity Kaylie takes off the night before leaving for Nationals, and the girls must track her down before it's too late.

1.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S01E10 - All That Glitters
1.plot: The National Gymnastics Championship in Boston has arrived and now everything the girls of the Rock have been working for is at stake. Can Emily pull it together on the biggest stage of her life? Can Lauren put aside her anger towards...everyone and pull off a gold medal winning meet. Can Payson get past the back pain and finally beat Kelly Parker on the National stage? Find out in the Mid-Season finale.

1.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S01E11 - The Eleventh Hour
1.plot: Kaylie faces the challenges of being a national champion; Payson tries to come to terms with her injury.

1.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S01E12 - Follow The Leader
1.plot: The girls devise a plan to get Marty fired; Sasha attempts to find a place for Payson at the gym.

1.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S01E13 - California Girls
1.plot: Kaylie and Nicky pose for a spread in the Seventeen magazine. They're billed as the golden couple, but there's definitely tension on set.

1.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S01E14 - Are We Having Fun Yet?
1.plot:
Payson's life is about to get a bit harder when she has to become a regular high school student after being home schooled all her life. With the chaos at school, Payson feels more like a loser than ever and she becomes the new target for the school queen bee. Things get even worse when Kaylie, Emily and Lauren show up to see her. But when she meets a fellow loner Ike, things start getting better. Is Payson going to survive High School?

Meanwhile, Sasha tries to make the annual Open House a fun activity. When he pairs Kaylie and Nicky for a special performance, the fun is over for the two of them.

1.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S01E15 - Loves Me, Loves Me Not
1.plot: Valentine's Day is just around the corner and whether they like it or not, the girls have to face the ones they love. Payson receives flowers and chocolates from her new friend at school, which prompts The Rock parents to over-analyze the situation. Meanwhile, Summer and Sasha share a "moment" of their own.

1.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S01E16 - Save the Last Dance
1.plot: The girls all attend the prom at Payson's school, and Emily unexpectedly sees Damon there. Meanwhile, Lauren discovers that her dad is dating Chloe; Carter tries to reconnect with Kaylie; and a doctor suggests an experimental procedure for Payson's back.

1.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S01E17 - Hope and Faith
1.plot: Emily finds out that her mother is dating Steve after Lauren confronts Chloe. Meanwhile, Payson has an appointment with a top-ranked back surgeon; and the National Team must prove their worth and step up their game.

1.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S01E18 - The Great Wall
1.plot: The girls raise the bar with their training in preparation for a competition against the Chinese team, but troubles at home and confidence issues plague them. Meanwhile, the moms hold a fund-raiser to cover the Chinese team's travel expenses.

1.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S01E19 - The Only Thing We Have To Fear
1.plot: The Girls get ready for China. While the mothers help out making the girls feel welcome when they go, Damon and Emily confess their feelings toward each other, which makes Razor feel even worse, and Lauren tries to convince her Dad to break up with Chloe.

1.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S01E20 - Are We Family?
1.plot: In the season finale, everything is put on the line as the girls go up against the Chinese team to prove once and for all that they're the best.

2.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S02E01 - Friends Close, Enemies Closer
2.plot: After going rogue and defeating the Chinese National Team but going against the NGO, the The Rock girls are at their best. But when they find out the National Team is having team practices without them before an Invitational meet in France, the girls are not that confident that they will make the cut. And now Payson is back and she is determined to get to the top once again, but is she really ready? And Carter and Lauren's relationship is starting to heat up, but when will they let Kaylie know about it?

2.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S02E02 - All or Nothing
2.plot: After being allowed back on the U.S. National Team, the girls head to France where everything is left on the mat in order to get one step closer to achieving their dream. With cockiness, jealousy, sabotage and self-doubt at an all-time high, as well as Ellen Beals constantly looming over the girls, the pressure is almost too much to bear. For Kaylie and Lauren, the bickering continues, while Emily pines for Damon and Payson puts her Olympic future on the line. Will Emily be able to have it all – gymnastics and the boy she loves? And will Payson be able to defy the odds and qualify for the National Team?

2.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S02E03 - Battle of the Flexes
2.plot: When the men's Olympic champion, Austin Tucker, begins temporarily training at The Rock, egos clash when he tries to move the girls' equipment. To settle the matter between the male and female athletes, Sasha decides the two must compete for gym space, but there's a catch – the girls must perform on the men's apparatuses and vice versa. With Payson unsure about her future in the gymnastics world, Kaylie, Emily and Lauren are forced to face the men on their own. Will they be able to beat the boys and have the gym they made famous remain theirs? And will Payson choose to fight for her dream, or forever leave the sport that destroyed her?

2.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S02E04 - And the Rocky Goes To
2.plot: The Rock gears up for the annual awards banquet dinner, The Rocky Awards, and Lauren is determined to win the Miss Congeniality award the best way she knows how – with bribery and cheating. But even after all the free smoothies, barrettes and massages, will Lauren get her way or will she be usurped by a silent but strong contender – Emily?

2.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S02E05 - I Won't Dance, Don't Ask Me
2.plot: With World tryouts in the near future, Sasha pushes the girls to better their already difficult floor routines. During what should be a time to focus, Lauren instead finds herself looking to Carter to say the "L" word, while at the same time trying to one-up Emily. Lauren is not the only one facing challenges: Kaylie faces struggles on and off the mat, while Payson wonders if she can ever be the graceful flower Sasha envisions her being.

2.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S02E06 - Party Gone Out of Bounds
2.plot: Austin throws a party at his lake house and invites the girls, but Kaylie doesn't want them go because she wants them to focus on their training. Sasha and Summer go on their first date while trying to keep their relationship under wraps.

2.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S02E07 - What Are You Made Of?
2.plot: Kaylie, Lauren, and Emily have their final National Team practice before World Team tryouts, and Ellen Beals seems to have it out for Emily before the practice even starts!

2.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S02E08 - Rock Bottom
2.plot:
An ultimatum backfires on Chloe, and Emily struggles to help out her brother, Brian.

After a rough National Team practice, the girls must deal with the outcome. Thrown by the truth behind Emily's scholarship, both the Tanners and the Kmetkos must deal with the outcome of two very angry girls and two adults who are no longer sure they can trust each other. And when information surfaces about Lauren's relationship with Carter, could that secret be the nail in the coffin for Chloe and Steve? And with the true identity of the Kipman Group out there, will Emily be willing to swallow her pride and accept the money to keep her dream alive?

2.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S02E09 - If Only...
2.plot: Lauren's mother returns to Boulder to forge a relationship; Damon takes Emily on a date.

2.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S02E10 - At the Edge of the Worlds
2.plot: World Team tryouts have finally arrived, and The Rock girls have to fight for spots on the team.

2.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S02E11 - The New Normal
2.plot: Kaylie is put in rehab for her eating disorder and makes a new friend, Maeve, a model who has been in and out of rehab before. Sasha decides to leave The Rock and move back to Romania. Emily is told that under her probation that she is under house arrest and must wear an ankle monitor.

2.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S02E12 - Free People
2.plot: The Rock gets a new coach, and everyone (especially Payson) is a little skeptical about her ability to coach them properly. Lauren, however, sees this as an opportunity to get off on the right foot with a new coach that doesn't know about her manipulative tricks.

2.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S02E13 - The Buddy System
2.plot: After being made co-captains, Lauren and Payson are at each other's throats. Steve finds the altered video of Payson and Sasha's kiss and confronts Lauren about it. Emily finally discovers that Chloe's new job is at a strip club.

2.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S02E14 - Life Of Death
2.plot: The Rock girls prepare for a meet with the Pinewood Club, the worst-ranked gym club in the country. The girls worry that the Pinewood Club won't give them enough of a competition to prepare them for an up-coming international meet in Hungary. Meanwhile, Damon and Kaylie become closer as he starts recording his album at the recording studio in Kaylie's house.

2.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S02E15 - Hungary Heart
2.plot: On the way to the international meet in Hungary, the girls get a connecting flight to Romania to convince Sasha to come back to The Rock.

2.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S02E16 - Requiem For A Dream
2.plot: Emily's worst fears about Damon spending so much time with Kaylie are realized when Kaylie confesses to kissing Damon.

2.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S02E17 - To Thine Own Self Be True
2.plot: Kaylie finally returns to training at The Rock, but the public is under the impression that her time away from the gym was from an ACL injury, not rehab for anorexia. Soon after, Sasha announces that Kelly Parker is going to replace Emily on the World team, and that Kaylie will be replaced, as well, since she has not had enough time to train.

2.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S02E18 - Dog Eat Dog
2.plot: Kelly Parker's manager, Shelia, arrives at the gym and starts scheming to make Kelly the most recognizable girl on the team, which includes trying to get Kelly to sabotage Kaylie by exposing her anorexia to the public. Meanwhile, Payson and Max come across a stray puppy while out jogging, and as they try to keep the puppy hidden until they can find it a home, Lauren becomes jealous of the amount of time they're spending together.

2.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S02E19 - What Lies Beneath
2.plot: Shelia continues her quest to ruin Kaylie, which now involves taking away Kaylie's new endorsement deal with Healthy Bar. However, after hearing Kaylie give an interview about how Kelly should be the team captain because of her experience and accomplishments, Kelly starts to feel differently about their rivalry. At the same time, Kim and Summer start to put the pieces together about the true origins of the Payson/Sasha kiss video.

2.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S02E20 - Worlds Apart

3.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S03E01 - Smells Like a Winner
3.plot: The Rock girls meet their new coach for the national team.

3.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S03E02 - It Takes Two
3.plot: Coach MacIntire introduces a new training technique that pairs up each of the girls with a permanent training partner.

3.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S03E03 - Time Is of the Essence
3.plot: With only six weeks to go until the Olympics, Coach MacIntire is starting to feel the pressure as it appears his coaching style is not yielding the results everyone was expecting.

3.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S03E04 - Growing Pains
3.plot: The girls are visited by their families, and Payson's dad gives her some bad news while Kaylie tries to curb her parents' feuding by making Austin tag along to a family dinner. Elsewhere, Lauren is advised to consult a doctor about her condition.

3.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S03E05 - Dream On
3.plot: The girls compete in the semi-qualifications. Meanwhile, Kelly's mother tries to take down Kaylie; Payson gets overprotective about Lauren's health issues; and a new curfew halts Payson's burgeoning romance.

3.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S03E06 - Listen to the Universe
3.plot: Lauren is heart-broken to discover that her heart condition will require surgery and wonders how this will affect her chances of making the Olympic team.

3.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S03E07 - Truth Be Told
3.plot: Lauren undergoes an experimental procedure, and her recovery time weighs heavily on her future as a possible Olympic gymnast. Elsewhere, Jordan's world is shaken by the arrival of an unexpected visitor.

3.title: FR - Championnes à tout prix - S03E08 - United Stakes
3.plot: In the series finale, Payson boldly changes her floor routine, jeopardizing her spot on the team. Meanwhile, Kaylie's shocked by her drug-screening results; Lauren weighs her recovery against her Olympic dreams; and Jordan won't accept help from Kaylie.

1.title: FR - Case Sensitive - S01E01 - The Point of Rescue (1)
1.plot: When the bodies of a mother and her young daughter are found in the bathroom of their luxury home, new DS Charlie Zailer and her junior colleague DC Simon Waterhouse investigate. The pair immediately clash, disagreeing over whether the case is a murder-suicide or something even more sinister. Elsewhere, young mother Sally Thorne tells her best friend that she had an affair with the husband of the dead woman, and her friend warns her to stay away.

meta.plot: Charlie Zailer et Simon Waterhouse s'affairent à résoudre des enquêtes criminelles basées sur les romans de Sophie Hannah.

Michael Holt est un brillant neurochirurgien dont la clientèle ne compte que des personnes très fortunées. Un jour, il croise par hasard Anna, son ex-femme qu'il n'a pas vue depuis des années, et passe la soirée avec elle. Seulement, le lendemain, il découvre qu'Anna est morte dix jours plus tôt, et qu'il est le seul à la voir et à l'entendre. Anna lui demande de reprendre sa mission au sein du dispensaire qu'elle dirigeait..

1.title: FR - A Gifted Man - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: After the ghost of Michael's ex-wife visits him from the afterlife and asks him to help continue running her low income clinic, he finds himself rushing back and forth between taking care of his own patients at Holt Neuro and her less fortunate patients at the clinic.

1.title: FR - A Gifted Man - S01E02 - In Case of All Hell Breaking Loose
1.plot: Michael works double duty trying to save a pregnant personal friend he recently diagnosed with a brain tumor and a little boy with sickle cell disease.

1.title: FR - A Gifted Man - S01E03 - In Case of Discomfort
1.plot: While interviewing doctors to run the clinic, Michael helps a man who passed out, but refuses care due to lack of insurance. Meanwhile, as Michael evaluates a woman, he notices lesions on her brain that require immediate surgery, even as he doesn't know the exact diagnosis.

1.title: FR - A Gifted Man - S01E04 - In Case of Separation Anxiety
1.plot: Michael hires a new director for the clinic. Will she be able to run things?

1.title: FR - A Gifted Man - S01E05 - In Case of Loss of Control
1.plot: Michael must decide if it is worth risking his practice to save a patient's life. Meanwhile, he courts Evan "E-Mo" Morris, a neuropsychiatrist to join his practice after E-Mo determines a patient's diagnosis by reading her body language.

1.title: FR - A Gifted Man - S01E06 - In Case of Memory Loss
1.plot: While at the clinic, Michael runs into a former football star that he performed successful surgery on years ago, and is now a shell of his former self, living on the streets. At Holt Neuro, Michael examines a patient who suffers from post-traumatic stress disorder.

1.title: FR - A Gifted Man - S01E07 - In Case of Exposure
1.plot: When Michael finds out a patient with a malignant brain tumor committed a horrible crime, he struggles with whether to save the man's life. Meanwhile, a female firefighter who appears to be disoriented is brought to Holt Neuro for evaluation.

1.title: FR - A Gifted Man - S01E08 - In Case of Missed Communication
1.plot: In this holiday episode, the staff at Clinica Sonando celebrates Thanksgiving. Meanwhile, Michael must save the life of Rita’s son. who is injured in a motorcycle accident after returning for a Thanksgiving reunion with his family.

1.title: FR - A Gifted Man - S01E09 - In Case of Abnormal Rhythm
1.plot: Michael and Kate are forced to work together to try and save a patient with a deadly virus. Meanwhile, at Holt Neuro, as Michael treats a nervous bride-to-be who is experiencing headaches, he notices her mother is exhibiting symptoms of a serious condition.

1.title: FR - A Gifted Man - S01E10 - In Case of a Bolt From the Blue
1.plot: While tending to patients at the clinic during a blizzard, Michael shows signs of a severe condition that requires immediate surgery.

1.title: FR - A Gifted Man - S01E11 - In Case of (Re)Birth
1.plot: Michael and E-Mo clash over a patient's treatment; a teenager abandons her baby at the clinic after giving birth.

1.title: FR - A Gifted Man - S01E12 - In Case of Blind Spots
1.plot: Michael saves a man from drowning and learns his identity is a mystery. Meanwhile, Kate discovers a girl she mentors has serious issues that she has failed to notice.

1.title: FR - A Gifted Man - S01E13 - In Case of Complications
1.plot: A distraught woman takes the Clinica staff hostage after Michael testifies for a former patient who he believed suffered uncontrollable urges due to a brain tumor.

1.title: FR - A Gifted Man - S01E14 - In Case of Co-Dependents
1.plot: When a spoiled pop star comes to Holt Neuro experiencing unusual symptoms, and a young girl at the Clinica exhibits similar symptoms on the same day, it forces both teams of doctors to try and piece together their common link.

1.title: FR - A Gifted Man - S01E15 - In Case of Letting Go
1.plot: When Michael's high school sweetheart comes to Holt Neuro with an irreversible condition, he will stop at nothing to try and save her, until Anna intervenes. Meanwhile, Zeke deals with the news that his best friend's cancer has returned.

1.title: FR - A Gifted Man - S01E16 - In Case of Heart Failure
1.plot: Michael learns that a patient at the clinic has a special connection to Anna. Meanwhile, Michael reunites with an old friend who is suffering from a rare illness.

meta.plot: Ce qui ne vous tue pas vous rend plus fort ! Mais ce dicton ne s'applique pas au chasseur le plus faible de toute l’humanité, Jinwoo Sung. Après avoir été mortellement blessé lorsqu’il est tombé par hasard sur un double donjon caché, Jinwoo est miraculeusement rescapé. Au bord de la mort, il entrevoit une quête et saisit une opportunité qui lui permet dès lors de gagner en puissance très rapidement. À présent, il souhaite découvrir les secrets de ses pouvoirs et du donjon qui les a engendrés.

1.title: FR - Solo Leveling - S01E01 - I'm Used to It
1.plot: Around ten years ago, gates that connected our world to another dimension began to appear, leading to the rise of hunters who would traverse these gates to fight the magic beasts within. Sung Jinwoo, E-Rank hunter, is the weakest of them all.

1.title: FR - Solo Leveling - S01E02 - If I Had One More Chance
1.plot: Jinwoo and his party appear to have cleared a low-level dungeon, when a hidden path to an unfamiliar temple is revealed. There they encounter a set of commandments and a group of monsters that cause them absolute despair.

1.title: FR - Solo Leveling - S01E03 - It's Like a Game
1.plot: Jinwoo remains behind in the temple dungeon to save his few surviving party members, and with a swing from the god statue's blade, his life comes to an end—or so it seems, before he wakes up in a hospital bed.

1.title: FR - Solo Leveling - S01E04 - I've Gotta Get Stronger
1.plot: Having entered the instance dungeon located inside the subway, Jinwoo levels up time and time again by fighting waves of magic beasts. As he gradually makes his way forward, he finds a long stairway leading deeper underground.

1.title: FR - Solo Leveling - S01E05 - A Pretty Good Deal
1.plot: Jinwoo joins a party led by Hwang Dongsuk to meet the headcount necessary for a C-Rank dungeon. Joined by another temporary hire, Yoo Jinho, the party defeats beasts without much trouble, but Jinwoo has suspicions about the group's lack of a healer.

1.title: FR - Solo Leveling - S01E06 - The Real Hunt Begins
1.plot: While the C-Rank dungeon raid by Jinwoo and the others seems to be progressing well, the moment they step into an area covered in mana stones with a sleeping dungeon boss, things take a wrong turn.

1.title: FR - Solo Leveling - S01E07 - Let's See How Far I Can Go
1.plot: As Jinwoo continues his training, he completes a daily quest one day by doing more than the quest requires, and a key that leads to a certain item appears in front of him.

1.title: FR - Solo Leveling - S01E08 - This Is Frustrating
1.plot: Jinwoo answers a Hunter's Association request to take part in the raid of a D-Rank dungeon, where he encounters a few familiar faces.

1.title: FR - Solo Leveling - S01E09 - You've Been Hiding Your Skills
1.plot: At the D-Rank raid, Jinwoo is reunited with four of the Cartenon Temple survivors. Together, they explore the dungeon with Kang Taeshik and his men. After splitting up, they hear a scream, and then...

1.title: FR - Solo Leveling - S01E10 - What Is This, a Picnic?
1.plot: Jinwoo survives tragedy once again, but Woo Jinchul warns him that Hwang Dongsoo, an S-Rank hunter, may be after his life. Determined to grow stronger, Jinwoo teams up with Jinho to raid a succession of C-Rank dungeons, but they attract attention...

1.title: FR - Solo Leveling - S01E11 - A Knight Who Defends an Empty Throne
1.plot: Out of the blue, a "job-change quest" pops up in Jinwoo's window. Feeling that it may help him get stronger, he enters the gate. Inside, he fights wave after wave of enemies, culminating in a knight who brings back memories of the Cartenon Temple.

1.title: FR - Solo Leveling - S01E12 - Arise
1.plot: Drained from endless battle, Jinwoo sees a phantom of his past self. To overcome his own past as the Weakest Hunter of All Mankind, he struggles to find a way to clear the job-change quest.

2.title: FR - Solo Leveling - S02E01 -
FR - Solo Leveling - S02E02 -
FR - Solo Leveling - S02E03 -
FR - Solo Leveling - S02E04 -
FR - Solo Leveling - S02E05 -
FR - Solo Leveling - S02E06 -
FR - Solo Leveling - S02E07 -

meta.plot: Set during the Cold War period in the 1980s, The Americans is the story of Elizabeth and Philip Jennings, two Soviet KGB officers posing as an American married couple in the suburbs of Washington D.C. and their neighbor, Stan Beeman, an FBI Counterintelligence agent.

1.title: FR - The Americans - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: The arranged marriage of Philip and Elizabeth Jennings grows more passionate and genuine by the day, but is constantly tested by the escalation of the Cold War. Tensions heighten upon the arrival of a new neighbor, Stan Beeman, an FBI agent.

1.title: FR - The Americans - S01E02 - The Clock
1.plot: When Philip and Elizabeth are given an urgent task to plant a bug in Defense Secretary Caspar Weinberger's office, they risk exposure when an unwilling maid of the Weinberger home refuses to cooperate. Stan closes in on a member of the Soviet Rezidentura in an effort to uncover the identities of deep cover Directorate S operatives.

1.title: FR - The Americans - S01E03 - Gregory
1.plot: Philip and Elizabeth discover that their murdered colleague Robert had a wife they never knew about. As they try to determine what she knows and where her allegiance lies, Stan's investigation into Robert's death puts him hot on their trail.

1.title: FR - The Americans - S01E04 - In Control
1.plot: When an assassin attempts to kill President Reagan, Philip and Elizabeth scramble to handle the fallout within the KGB. Meanwhile, Stan pressures his source within the Rezidentura to find out if the KGB was responsible for the attempted assassination.

1.title: FR - The Americans - S01E05 - COMINT
1.plot: A crucial agent crumbles under emotional distress and threatens to topple a valuable network of KGB informants. Professionally, Philip and Elizabeth are tasked with infiltrating the FBI's new communications encryption system while personally they are forced to grapple with one of the darker aspects of life as a spy.

1.title: FR - The Americans - S01E06 - Trust Me
1.plot: A mole hunt within the KGB causes suspicion amongst allies and shatters trust within the Jennings' marriage. Meanwhile, Stan's plan to keep his mole safe puts her at even greater risk of discovery.

1.title: FR - The Americans - S01E07 - Duty and Honor
1.plot: Philip and Elizabeth's troubled marriage is further tested when a mission to discredit a Polish pro-democracy leader reunites Philip with his old flame.

1.title: FR - The Americans - S01E08 - Mutually Assured Destruction
1.plot: Philip and Elizabeth must stop an assassin from taking out key US scientists, while Stan and the FBI hunt the same man. Grannie shocks Elizabeth with the truth of what happened between Philip and Irina in New York.

1.title: FR - The Americans - S01E09 - Safe House
1.plot: Philip and Elizabeth are put to the test when a routine mission goes horribly wrong. Stan and the FBI are pushed to their limit when one of their own goes missing.

1.title: FR - The Americans - S01E10 - Only You
1.plot: Stan pursues a lead that puts him on the trail to one of Gregory's crew members, closing the gap between him and Elizabeth, and reigniting some of the deepest conflicts between her and Philip.

1.title: FR - The Americans - S01E11 - Covert War
1.plot: Events in Moscow strike a personal chord for Elizabeth, leading her to take on a dangerous mission she can't complete without Philip's help, and placing the couple on a collision course with both Grannie and the FBI.

1.title: FR - The Americans - S01E12 - The Oath
1.plot: One of Elizabeth's agents has key intel for sale, but she and Philip find themselves taking increasingly greater risks for what could well be a set-up. Meanwhile, Stan's pursuit of Directorate S suddenly begins to yield unexpected results.

1.title: FR - The Americans - S01E13 - The Colonel
1.plot: When Philip and Elizabeth are ordered to go through with a meeting that could potentially be a set-up, they find themselves confronted with unexpected truths about their relationship. Stan's investigation puts him and the FBI even closer to Philip and Elizabeth.

2.title: FR - The Americans - S02E01 - Comrades
2.plot: Elizabeth comes back from her injury and straight into what should have been a routine mission – but it goes awry, leaving her and Philip in fear not only for themselves but for their whole network… and family. Paige's suspicions have only grown in her mother's absence. Meanwhile, Stan continues to fall for the Russian agent who has started to play him.

2.title: FR - The Americans - S02E02 - Cardinal
2.plot: As Philip investigates the fallout from the last operation, Elizabeth sticks close to home, concerned for her family until she gets a mysterious distress signal. Meanwhile, a walk-in arrives at the Rezidentura - providing both Nina and Stan with unique opportunities.

2.title: FR - The Americans - S02E03 - The Walk In
2.plot: Philip and Elizabeth complete their next mission - but not without complications - and Philip's fears about Elizabeth's readiness for action deepen. Stan tracks the KGB walk-in which leads to much praise at work and a deepening of his attachment to, and dependence on, Nina. Meanwhile, Paige snoops into her mother's family background and Oleg begins to scrutinize Nina's secret operation.

2.title: FR - The Americans - S02E04 - A Little Night Music
2.plot: Just when Philip and Elizabeth think they have a quiet road ahead, an old friend returns to complicate things. Not only do they have to intercept a target who could prove valuable to the Soviet Union, but they also have to take on an important rogue mission without the support of the Centre. Divisions inside the Rezidentura deepen between Oleg and Arkady and there’s an upheaval at the FBI as the chickens come home to roost for Agent Gaad. Meanwhile, Martha’s frustrations threaten to blow Philip’s cover.

2.title: FR - The Americans - S02E05 - The Deal
2.plot: Philip and Elizabeth are finally assigned a new handler as Philip works to clean up the mess of the last operation and Elizabeth, in disguise as Clark's sister Jennifer, does her best to smooth things over with Martha. As Stan searches for a missing scientist, Oleg and Arkady continue to argue over how best to handle the situation on their side, leaving Nina once again caught between the FBI and KGB.

2.title: FR - The Americans - S02E06 - Behind the Red Door
2.plot: A dangerous Naval officer becomes the key to Philip and Elizabeth’s mission as well as a potential threat to their family's safety. Lucia, a Sandinista intelligence officer working with the Jennings, is tasked with getting Elizabeth access to Capitol Hill. Stan struggles with the potential costs of protecting Nina.

2.title: FR - The Americans - S02E07 - ARPANET
2.plot: Philip uses his agent Charles Duluth to help him gain access to an early precursor to the Internet so that the KGB can bug American government communications. Nina faces the threat of a potential FBI polygraph exam, bringing her closer to KGB colleague Oleg.

2.title: FR - The Americans - S02E08 - New Car
2.plot: Philip and Elizabeth both find themselves faced with painful turns in their various missions. Stan fights to gain access to an American military program that could give him the upper hand in his battle of wills with Oleg.

2.title: FR - The Americans - S02E09 - Martial Eagle
2.plot: Philip and Elizabeth’s long-planned mission turns ugly, impacting each of them in different ways. Stan digs in deeper at work as his personal life continues to unravel.

2.title: FR - The Americans - S02E10 - Yousaf
2.plot: A new mission with international stakes has Philip calling on Annelise for assistance just as an old foe returns to D.C. with a vendetta. Stan makes a discovery that could put the FBI hot on the trail of illegals.

2.title: FR - The Americans - S02E11 - Stealth
2.plot: Elizabeth makes a shocking discovery about Kate. Philip pursues a contact for information about stealth. Stan continues his pursuit of the illegals.

2.title: FR - The Americans - S02E12 - Operation Chronicle
2.plot: With Larrick closing in, Elizabeth rushes to exfiltrate Jared while Philip readies Fred for a crucial mission. Arkady finally plays his hand, forcing Stan to make an impossible choice.

2.title: FR - The Americans - S02E13 - Echo
2.plot: No one is safe as Philip and Elizabeth evacuate their children while trying to complete the mission. Stan holds Nina's future in his hands.

3.title: FR - The Americans - S03E01 - EST Men
3.plot: Tensions simmer between Philip and Elizabeth as they disagree over handling orders from the Centre. When Elizabeth loses key intel, Philip enlists Annelise on a mission with an unexpected outcome. Stan tries a new approach to mending his marriage with Sandra amidst learning tough news about Nina.

3.title: FR - The Americans - S03E02 - Baggage
3.plot: Elizabeth and Philip come together to deal with a mission gone wrong but struggle to reconcile their increasingly opposing ideologies. Stan welcomes a Soviet defector, Zinaida, to America. Nina acclimates to her new living arrangements.

3.title: FR - The Americans - S03E03 - Open House
3.plot: Danger mounts for Elizabeth and Philip as they get closer to the inner circle of the C.I.A. Afghan Group. Stan monitors Zinaida. Agent Aderholt challenges Agent Gaad on a crucial operation. Arkady tasks Oleg and Tatiana with gathering high--‐level intel. Martha proposes a lifestyle change to Clark.

3.title: FR - The Americans - S03E04 - Dimebag
3.plot: Philip faces a moral dilemma while developing an asset. Philip and Elizabeth’s friction escalates. Stan develops a theory with serious repercussions for national security. Paige makes a surprising birthday wish.

3.title: FR - The Americans - S03E05 - Salang Pass
3.plot: Philip juggles the many women in his life while Elizabeth takes drastic measures to complete a mission. Stan asserts a plan to save Nina with an unlikely ally.

3.title: FR - The Americans - S03E06 - Born Again
3.plot: Gabriel has surprising information. Elizabeth begins to take family matters into her own hands. Stan receives upsetting news from his past and turns to Sandra for support.

3.title: FR - The Americans - S03E07 - Walter Taffet
3.plot: Philip and Elizabeth feel the weight of a new family secret while following up on the KGB’s interests in South Africa. Stan faces struggles both at work and at home. Martha confronts a shocking development.

3.title: FR - The Americans - S03E08 - Divestment
3.plot: Martha and Clark’s marriage meets its most challenging test yet. As pressures on Philip intensify, Elizabeth turns to Gabriel with a difficult request. Nina receives a new assignment that reconnects her with her past.

3.title: FR - The Americans - S03E09 - Do Mail Robots Dream of Electric Sheep
3.plot: Philip and Elizabeth struggle with the gravity of unexpected collateral damage. Stan and Oleg hatch a risky plan to help save Nina.

3.title: FR - The Americans - S03E10 - Stingers
3.plot: Philip and Elizabeth deploy a plan for the C.I.A.’s Mujahideen visitors. Tensions at the Jennings’ home escalate.

3.title: FR - The Americans - S03E11 - One Day in the Life of Anton Baklanov
3.plot: Philip and Elizabeth's home and work lives collide in new and dangerous ways. Nina struggles to figure out her next steps. Arkady assigns Oleg and Tatiana to an operation with uncertain potential.

3.title: FR - The Americans - S03E12 - I Am Abassin Zadran
3.plot: Martha hosts an unexpected guest. Philip and Elizabeth must work a formidable Mujahideen commander. Paige acts out.

3.title: FR - The Americans - S03E13 - March 8, 1983
3.plot: Elizabeth and Paige take a trip that lands them in treacherous territory. After an emotionally charged mission, Philip turns to an unlikely source for solace. Stan’s plan to save Nina culminates in unforeseen ways.

4.title: FR - The Americans - S04E01 - Glanders
4.plot: Philip and Elizabeth deal with the fallout of all they’ve wrought. What will happen when the FBI finds out about Gene’s suicide? How will Pastor Tim deal with the revelation that they are Russian spies? And will they be able to handle a dangerous, new bioweapons assignment?

4.title: FR - The Americans - S04E02 - Pastor Tim
4.plot: Philip tries with increasing desperation to get rid of a sensitive and dangerous package as family tensions in the Jennings House reach a boiling point when Paige shares a secret of her own.

4.title: FR - The Americans - S04E03 - Experimental Prototype City of Tomorrow
4.plot: Paige copes with new burdens that come with her family’s secret as Philip and Elizabeth struggle to contain their cover without destroying their daughter.

4.title: FR - The Americans - S04E04 - Chloramphenicol
4.plot: A devastating flaw during a mission forces Philip, Elizabeth, William and Gabriel to confront the depths of their patriotism… and their mortality. In Russia, in striving to be a better person, has Nina put her life on the line?

4.title: FR - The Americans - S04E05 - Clark's Place
4.plot: Philip must consider his life with Martha and make a crushing choice from which there is no coming back.

4.title: FR - The Americans - S04E06 - The Rat
4.plot: Martha must finally face the truth she has denied – and her life may never be the same. Plus, a chilling new development in William’s work forces the Jennings to face the realities of what a biological war would mean.

4.title: FR - The Americans - S04E07 - Travel Agents
4.plot: The KGB and the FBI both race to track down a vital agent… everything is at stake.

4.title: FR - The Americans - S04E08 - The Magic of David Copperfield V: The Statue of Liberty Disappears
4.plot: The Jennings’s approach their breaking points as both Philip and Elizabeth must handle loyal agents. Will they make it through with their patriotism – and sanity – intact?

4.title: FR - The Americans - S04E09 - The Day After
4.plot: The Day After premieres, making the stakes - and terrible consequences - of the Cold War plain. Even with that in mind, will Elizabeth be able to complete the painful process of the "Patty" operation?

4.title: FR - The Americans - S04E10 - Munchkins
4.plot: When Paige’s long-ago indiscretion threatens to resurface and destroy the family, Philip and Elizabeth find themselves scrambling – and Paige finds herself reevaluating who her parents really are.

4.title: FR - The Americans - S04E11 - Dinner for Seven
4.plot: Elizabeth completes the last steps of a very personal operation… but at what cost?

4.title: FR - The Americans - S04E12 - A Roy Rogers in Franconia
4.plot: As Paige deals with last episode’s trauma, she sees her mother in a new light… and finds she has inherited some of her parents’ skills. Plus, has Oleg reached his breaking point with Stan?

4.title: FR - The Americans - S04E13 - Persona Non Grata
4.plot: Philip and Elizabeth are in a high-stakes race against the FBI to recover a hazardous package. Will they get there in time? And will Paige follow her parents into the family business?

5.title: FR - The Americans - S05E01 - Amber Waves
5.plot: The Jennings struggling to contain the risks from Paige's growing relationship with Matthew Beeman. The Centre sends Philip and Elizabeth on an operation unlike any they've ever had before, straining their family and marriage to its limits.

5.title: FR - The Americans - S05E02 - Pests
5.plot: Stan and Oleg wrestle with the harsh consequences of their complicated history as Philip and Elizabeth face a new mission with devastating implications for their country.

5.title: FR - The Americans - S05E03 - The Midges
5.plot: Philip and Elizabeth tell Paige more about the family business, but pressing new questions arise when an operation takes a ghastly and unexpected turn. Meanwhile, a sensitive package jeopardizes Oleg’s life back home.

5.title: FR - The Americans - S05E04 - What's the Matter with Kansas?
5.plot: Philip and Elizabeth have qualms about a new assignment, while a specter from Philip’s past creates unforeseen dangers. At the FBI, Stan makes a shocking play that could throw his career into turmoil.

5.title: FR - The Americans - S05E05 - Lotus 1-2-3
5.plot: Philip and Elizabeth receive surprising news about Henry -- and shattering news about a past operation. Stan might be falling in love, but Philip wonders if something darker is going on.

5.title: FR - The Americans - S05E06 - Crossbreed
5.plot: Gabriel stuns Philip and Elizabeth with a sudden announcement and a crushing revelation about Philip's past. Stan and Aderholt draw a fly into their web while Oleg and Ruslan ambush their first suspect.

5.title: FR - The Americans - S05E07 - The Committee on Human Rights
5.plot: As Paige becomes even more enmeshed in her parents' world, tensions with Matthew Beeman come to a head, Philip and Elizabeth's honeytraps take surprising turns, and Stan faces the consequences of overplaying his hand at the FBI.

5.title: FR - The Americans - S05E08 - Immersion
5.plot: A secret brings Elizabeth and Paige together. Back in Moscow, Oleg's own secrets put him under KGB suspicion and a new twist in the Morozov operation creates an opportunity that changes everything.

5.title: FR - The Americans - S05E09 - IHOP
5.plot: Philip and Elizabeth are thrown off balance when things with Tuan take an unexpected turn. Henry makes a startling proposition and Stan has a disturbing encounter with Frank Gaad’s widow.

5.title: FR - The Americans - S05E10 - Darkroom
5.plot: Paige’s snooping leads Philip and Elizabeth to make a choice that could shift the balance of their lives forever. Stan and Aderholt’s recruitment of Sofia suddenly bears fruit.

5.title: FR - The Americans - S05E11 - Dyatkovo
5.plot: A surprise assignment from the Centre divides Philip and Elizabeth, forcing them into a moment of profound crisis. Stan gives Henry a tour of the FBI.

5.title: FR - The Americans - S05E12 - The World Council of Churches
5.plot: As Philip and Elizabeth grapple with a momentous decision, Tuan takes matters into his own hands in the Morozov operation. Back in Russia, Oleg’s investigation collides with the realities of the Soviet system.

5.title: FR - The Americans - S05E13 - The Soviet Division
5.plot: In the season finale, Philip and Elizabeth race against the clock as a life hangs in the balance, while Stan faces an uncertain future.

6.title: FR - The Americans - S06E01 - Dead Hand
6.plot: It’s autumn, 1987, and as a major arms control summit looms, Elizabeth is pushed to her limits as never before. Philip, meanwhile, has settled into running the newly expanded travel agency – until an unexpected visitor makes a disquieting request.

6.title: FR - The Americans - S06E02 - Tchaikovsky
6.plot: Elizabeth targets an old source who could tip the balance of the upcoming summit, as Philip deals with business at the travel agency. Stan learns an old friend is back in town.

6.title: FR - The Americans - S06E03 - Urban Transport Planning
6.plot: In the aftermath of a disastrous operation, Philip and Elizabeth clash about how to handle things with Paige. Stan struggles to contain the growing risks of Sofia and Gennadi's fraying relationship.

6.title: FR - The Americans - S06E04 - Mr. and Mrs. Teacup
6.plot: After picking up a distressing piece of intelligence, Elizabeth takes extreme measures to get close to a Soviet negotiator. Philip shares some stunning news with Henry.

6.title: FR - The Americans - S06E05 - The Great Patriotic War
6.plot: As the summit fast approaches, Elizabeth enlists Philip’s help for a mission that could yield game-changing intel.

6.title: FR - The Americans - S06E06 - Rififi
6.plot: A sudden assignment pulls Elizabeth away from her family at a crucial moment. At the FBI, a major development leads Aderholt to approach Stan about an urgent investigation.

6.title: FR - The Americans - S06E07 - Harvest
6.plot: Philip and Elizabeth come together for a perilous operation unlike any they've ever had before. Stan and Henry spend a little quality time together.

6.title: FR - The Americans - S06E08 - The Summit
6.plot: With the arms control summit under way, a shocking revelation from Philip throws Elizabeth - and her work - into turmoil. Stan follows a dangerous hunch.

6.title: FR - The Americans - S06E09 - Jennings, Elizabeth
6.plot: Elizabeth wrestles with competing loyalties, and Philip has an encounter that turns into much more than he had bargained for.

6.title: FR - The Americans - S06E10 - START
6.plot: In the series finale, the Jennings face a choice that will change their lives forever.

1.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S01E01 - Echoes of Thunder
1.plot: As the human kingdom of Katolis braces for an attack by Moonshadow elves, King Harrow makes plans to send sons Callum and Ezran away to a safe place.

1.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S01E02 - What Is Done
1.plot: Determined to make up for her mistake, Rayla sneaks into the castle and corners Callum. Lord Viren offers the king a way to survive the attack.

1.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S01E03 - Moonrise
1.plot: With night falling, Rayla and the princes race to share what they've found and stop the attack. But first they'll have to get past Claudia.

1.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S01E04 - Bloodthirsty
1.plot: Excited about his newfound powers, Callum convinces the others to travel to the Banther Lodge for a magic cube. Katolis prepares to crown a new king.

1.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S01E05 - An Empty Throne
1.plot: Callum struggles to control his magic, General Amaya clashes with Lord Viren, and a trip down the river takes a hair-raising turn.

1.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S01E06 - Through the Ice
1.plot: After a run-in with a soldier, Rayla leads the princes to high ground. Viren gives Soren and Claudia secret orders as they set out on their mission.

1.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S01E07 - The Dagger and the Wolf
1.plot: In a nearby village, Callum and Ezran seek help for the egg while Rayla hunts down a magic blade. Claudia collects ingredients for a tracking spell.

1.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S01E08 - Cursed Caldera
1.plot: Ellis leads the friends to the Cursed Caldera but warns it's crawling with nasty monsters. Viren tries to force Runaan to talk.

1.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S01E09 - Wonderstorm
1.plot: Ezran, Callum and Rayla each put their special talents to use as they make their way up the mountain in a desperate bid to save the egg.

2.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S02E01 - A Secret and a Spark
2.plot: Before marching on toward Xadia, Callum begs Lujanne for a magic lesson, and Ezran tries to teach the dragon prince to fly. But danger is closing in.

2.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S02E02 - Half Moon Lies
2.plot: After a fierce showdown with Rayla, Soren and Claudia argue about the best way to deal with the princes. Rayla worries she's kept a secret too long.

2.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S02E03 - Smoke and Mirrors
2.plot: Callum searches for a way to tell Ezran the sad news, and Rayla sets a trap for Claudia and Soren. Viren watches a mysterious figure in the mirror.

2.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S02E04 - Voyage of the Ruthless
2.plot: After saying goodbye to Phoe-Phoe, the gang teams up with a pirate to cross a bay, where Callum tries to forge a connection with the sky arcanum.

2.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S02E05 - Breaking the Seal
2.plot: At the summit of the five kingdoms, Viren fights to win the support of a young queen. Flashbacks reveal a key moment from King Harrow's reign.

2.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S02E06 - Heart of a Titan
2.plot: The attack on the Magma Titan has devastating consequences for two kingdoms. In his letter, Harrow shares a lie, a secret and a wish for the princes.

2.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S02E07 - Fire and Fury
2.plot: When Soren picks a fight with a dragon, chaos breaks out -- and Rayla faces a difficult decision. A defeated Viren returns to the figure in the mirror.

2.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S02E08 - The Book of Destiny
2.plot: Callum pays a price for dabbling in dark magic. Claudia searches desperately for a way to help Soren, and Ezran makes a heartbreaking discovery.

2.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S02E09 - Breathe
2.plot: After using his gift to help Claudia, Ezran makes an important decision about the quest. Callum wakes up with a new understanding of primal magic.

3.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S03E01 - Sol Regem
3.plot: To cross into Xadia, Rayla and Callum must find a way past a fearsome dragon who was blinded in a battle with a human.

3.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S03E02 - The Crown
3.plot: At his first High Council meeting, King Ezran faces a flurry of difficult decisions. Rayla guides Callum through a wonderland of magical creatures.

3.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S03E04 - The Midnight Desert
3.plot: A mysterious stranger offers Rayla, Callum and Zym a ride across the Midnight Desert. With Katolis in danger, Ezran makes a startling announcement.

3.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S03E05 - Heroes and Masterminds
3.plot: Rayla and Callum race across the desert to find Nyx. As Katolis prepares for war, Ezran gets help from an unlikely source.

3.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S03E06 - Thunderfall
3.plot: On the march to Xadia, Viren reveals how Avizandum, the Dragon King, met his end. Phoe-Phoe takes Ezran on an epic journey.

3.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S03E07 - Hearts of Cinder
3.plot: As Team Zym begins the steep climb up to the Dragon Queen's lair, Viren and Aaravos play a nasty trick on the Sunfire elves.

3.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S03E08 - Dragonguard
3.plot: With Viren's glowing army closing in on the Storm Spire, Rayla, Callum and friends must decide whether to flee to safety or stay and fight.

3.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S03E09 - The Final Battle
3.plot: Determined to save the Dragon Prince at any cost, the friends brace for a fiery showdown with Viren -- who still has a few surprises up his sleeve.

4.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S04E01 - Rebirthday
4.plot: Two years later, Claudia finally completes her resurrection spell, Ezran plans a surprise for Katolis, and Janai takes Amaya on a secret mission.

4.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S04E02 - Fallen Stars
4.plot: Facing another journey up the steep Storm Spire, Viren panics. Janai's brother pushes back against her plans. Callum attempts to decode the mirror.

4.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S04E03 - Breathtaking
4.plot: An unexpected visitor leaves Callum reeling. Soren puts on a show to welcome the dragons — while in Xadia, his sister searches their lair.

4.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S04E04 - Through the Looking Glass
4.plot: The story of Aaravos's dark past comes to light. Claudia prepares to open the chrysalis. The tension between humans and Sunfire elves boils over.

4.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S04E05 - The Great Gates
4.plot: While Ezran and team set out on a quest to visit the Archdragon of Earth, Claudia and Viren try to communicate with the mysterious being.

4.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S04E06 - The Drakewood
4.plot: Zym helps the friends search the forest for a missing Soren. In the Sunfire elves' camp, Queen Janai calls a tribunal to decide the architect's fate.

4.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S04E07 - Beneath the Surface
4.plot: As N'than guides the heroes through the treacherous Path of Despair, Soren tries to convince Claudia to change her ways.

4.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S04E08 - Rex Igneous
4.plot: At last, the friends come face to face with the mighty dragon — only to discover he's expecting gifts. Karim hatches a plot to dethrone the queen.

4.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S04E09 - Escape from Umber Tor
4.plot: Dark spells, dirty tricks and a very unusual map ignite a fiery confrontation in Rex Igneous's lair. Janai squares off against her brother.

5.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S05E01 - Domina Profundis
5.plot: While Ezran awaits an audience with the Archdragon of the Ocean, Rayla hunts for answers about her parents, and Callum hits a roadblock in his research.

5.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S05E02 - Old Wounds
5.plot: Worried by Claudia's relentless pace, Terry dreams up a creative solution. Rayla and Callum set out for Lux Aurea. Ezran prepares to address the dragons.

5.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S05E03 - Nightmares and Revelations
5.plot: Callum and Rayla arrive in Xadia to find royal wedding planning in full swing. Claudia and Terry make their way down the river while Viren sleeps on.

5.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S05E04 - The Great Bookery
5.plot: As Callum scours Lux Aurea's library for lore of the Startouch elves, Amaya clears the air with Rayla. Karim meets a powerful potential ally.

5.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S05E05 - Archmage Akiyu
5.plot: Ezran convinces the group to look for an eccentric ocean mage with critical information. Karim calls in a debt. Claudia tries to communicate with Viren.

5.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S05E06 - Bait and Switch
5.plot: In search of seaworthy transportation, Rayla leads the way to an unsavory port town run by a cunning elf. Claudia takes a stand.

5.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S05E07 - Sea Legs
5.plot: The Ruthless sails into dangerous waters, with Finnegrin in hot pursuit. Queen Janai and her guards face a deadly infiltrator seeking the Sun Seed.

5.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S05E08 - Finnegrin's Wake
5.plot: Held captive aboard the Sea Legs, Callum and his crew must dig deep to win their freedom. Janai faces her brother once again.

5.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S05E09 - Infantis Sanguine
5.plot: While Zubeia fights for her life and Viren arrives at a crossroads, the race toward Aaravos' prison leads those who seek him deep beneath the waves.

6.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S06E01 - Startouched
6.plot: A shocking reversal leaves Claudia grief-stricken. Home in Katolis, Callum, Rayla and Ezran debate what to do with the Pearl that imprisons Aaravos.

6.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S06E02 - Love, War and Mushrooms
6.plot: Soren travels to Xadia, where he and Corvus follow a mysterious trail into the woods. Janai faces her frustrations — and her future.

6.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S06E03 - The Frozen Ship
6.plot: On their journey to the Starscraper, Rayla and Callum spend a chilly night at an unusual campsite. Terry offers Claudia some comfort.

6.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S06E04 - The Starscraper
6.plot: The Celestial Elves greet Callum and Rayla with a puzzling prophecy. Karim presents a gift to Sol Regem. Soren returns home to a surprise.

6.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S06E05 - Moonless Night
6.plot: To prove themselves as the Chosen Two, Rayla and Callum set out to end the storms swirling around the Starscraper. Viren tries to right past wrongs.

6.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S06E06 - Moment of Truth
6.plot: Memories of Soren's childhood weigh heavily on Viren. Kosmo uses his new powers to help Callum see his true self clearly.

6.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S06E07 - The Red Wedding
6.plot: Sol Regem emerges from his long exile — on Janai and Amaya's wedding day. Hoping to make peace with Karim, Ezran rides into danger.

6.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S06E08 - We All Fall Down
6.plot: Callum and Rayla head to the Moon Nexus. When Katolis faces a devastating attack, Soren turns to an unlikely source for help.

6.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S06E09 - Stardust
6.plot: A visit to the spirit realm forces Rayla to make a heartbreaking choice. Aaravos shares a story from his past with Claudia.

7.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S07E01 - Death Alive
7.plot: Atop the Starscraper, Kosmo receives an ominous prophecy about the fate of Xadia. As Callum returns to a devastated Katolis, Aaravos hatches a new plot.

7.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S07E02 - True Heart
7.plot: Tensions rise as Ezran grapples with rebuilding Katolis and deciding Runaan's punishment. Meanwhile, Claudia, Aaravos and Terry search for a hidden map.

7.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S07E03 - The Glittering Bones
7.plot: Terry leads the group to the Garden of Innocents, where Aaravos and Claudia craft a primal stone. In Lux Aurea, Janai faces a tough decision about Karim.

7.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S07E04 - Unfinished Business
7.plot: After an emotional reunion, Rayla undergoes a ritual to reverse her banishment. Terry has a heartbreaking realization about Claudia.

7.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S07E05 - Sticky Fingers
7.plot: Desperate to stop Claudia, Terry exposes Aaravos' terrible plans. Amaya appeals to Karim one last time, while Callum and Rayla share a peaceful moment.

7.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S07E06 - Inversion
7.plot: In a last-ditch effort to change Claudia's mind, Soren surprises her with someone familial. Back at the Silvergrove, Callum battles his inner darkness.

7.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S07E08 - Dying Light
7.plot: A shocking betrayal turns the tide in Aaravos' favor. With Eternal Night upon them, Callum and his allies rally in a desperate final stand.

7.title: FR - Le Prince des Dragons - S07E09 - Nova
7.plot: As the final battle reaches its climax, Callum chooses to embrace his destiny. Claudia's interference forces Rayla to make a heart-wrenching decision.

meta.plot: Une extraordinaire découverte pousse deux princes humains à s'allier à un elfe assassin au cours d'une quête épique pour ramener la paix dans leurs territoires en guerre.

1.title: FR - Je s'appelle Groot - S01E01 - Groot's First Steps
1.plot: Baby Groot takes his first steps out of his pot, only to learn you have to walk before you can run.

1.title: FR - Je s'appelle Groot - S01E02 - The Little Guy
1.plot: Groot discovers a miniature civilization that believes the seemingly enormous tree toddler is the hero they’ve been waiting for.

1.title: FR - Je s'appelle Groot - S01E03 - Groot's Pursuit
1.plot: Groot investigates a spooky noise that’s been haunting the Quadrant, which leads to an intense dance off.

1.title: FR - Je s'appelle Groot - S01E04 - Groot Takes a Bath
1.plot: Everybody needs some alone time to relax and wash up, but things go quite differently when you’re a Flora Colossi toddler.

1.title: FR - Je s'appelle Groot - S01E05 - Magnum Opus
1.plot: Groot sets out to paint a family portrait of himself and the Guardians, only to discover just how messy the artistic process can be.

2.title: FR - Je s'appelle Groot - S02E01 - Are You My Groot?
2.plot: Groot stumbles across a strange egg in a nest while exploring the alien planet of Terma. He instantly falls for the little creature that emerges when the egg cracks, adopting it as his own.

2.title: FR - Je s'appelle Groot - S02E02 - Groot Noses Around
2.plot: When Groot discovers a bionic nose-shaped device that grants him a sense of smell, he quickly learns not to stick his new nose where it doesn't belong.

2.title: FR - Je s'appelle Groot - S02E03 - Groot's Snow Day
2.plot: After landing on the icy planet of Falligar, Groot fashions a snowman with scraps of junk, inadvertently creating an unstoppable snowman-robot that wreaks havoc.

2.title: FR - Je s'appelle Groot - S02E04 - Groot's Sweet Treat
2.plot: As an intergalactic ice cream truck approaches, Groot—desperate to get a treat— frantically scours the ship for coins

2.title: FR - Je s'appelle Groot - S02E05 - Groot and the Great Prophecy
2.plot: In this adventure narrated by The Watcher, Groot finds himself in the heart of an ancient Drez-Lar temple with a mythic prophecy he must fulfill to save the universe.

meta.plot: Quand Groot découvre l'odorat, il apprend très vite à ne pas mettre son nez là où il ne faut pas.

1.title: FR - Les barons de la drogue - S01E01 - The Animal
1.plot: The biggest jungle manhunt in Colombian history could take cocaine kingpin Otoniel down.

1.title: FR - Les barons de la drogue - S01E02 - Titan
1.plot: Agents discover links between Middle-East terrorists and Colombian cartels.

1.title: FR - Les barons de la drogue - S01E03 - Target One
1.plot: The story of Curtis Warren, the most successful drugs trafficker in British history.

1.title: FR - Les barons de la drogue - S01E04 - Invisible Cartel
1.plot: Escobar is gone, the Cali Cartel is history a new mysterious and violent cartel emerges.

meta.plot: Lorsque les autorités décident de prendre en chasse Otoniel, il se retire dans l'ombre de son empire et déclenche une gigantesque chasse à l'homme militaire.

À la suite de l'attaque de Pearl Harbor, le 7 décembre 1941, de jeunes américains pleins d'espoirs s'engagent dans l'armée pour défendre leur pays face à l'invasion japonaise. Ces soldats sont envoyés dans les îles du Pacifique où l'ennemi gagne du terrain. Ils n'ont aucune idée de l'enfer qui les attend. Les désillusions se mêlent vite à la peur, et la mort devient leur lot quotidien. Ce qu'ils vont vivre les changera à jamais. Suivez le parcours de trois marines américains - Robert Leckie, John Basilone et Eugene Sledge - au lendemain de l'attaque de Pearl Harbor jusqu'au retour à la maison des soldats après la capitulation japonaise…

1.title: FR - Le Pacifique - S01E01 - Guadalcanal/Leckie
1.plot: In the immediate aftermath of the Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor, Marine Sgt. John Basilone prepares to ship out and confront the enemy somewhere in the Pacific, while budding journalist Robert Leckie enlists in the Marine Corps.  Eugene Sledge, unable to enlist because of a heart murmur, says farewell to his best friend, Sidney Phillips, who is about to leave for boot camp.  Exactly eight months after Pearl Harbor, the 1st Marine Division, including Leckie and Phillips, lands on Guadalcanal in order to secure its strategically vital airfield and prepare for the inevitable counterattack.

1.title: FR - Le Pacifique - S01E02 - Basilone
1.plot: Basilone and the 7th Marines arrive on Guadalcanal to reinforce Leckie and the rest of the 1st Marine Division as they continue to defend the crucial airstrip.  Basilone plays a key role in repelling a nighttime Japanese attack, but suffers a frightful personal loss.  After four months of continuous action, the exhausted and disease-ridden members of the 1st Marine Division are evacuated off the island.

1.title: FR - Le Pacifique - S01E03 - Melbourne
1.plot: Physically and mentally debilitated after the four-month ordeal on Guadalcanal, Leckie, Basilone and thousands of their comrades land in Melbourne, where they are greeted by adoring crowds and viewed as the saviors of Australia. While his buddies carouse, Leckie becomes deeply attached to an Australian woman and her first-generation Greek family. Meanwhile, Basilone is awarded the Medal of Honor and is asked to return home to help sell U.S. war bonds.

1.title: FR - Le Pacifique - S01E04 - Gloucester/Pavuvu/Banika
1.plot: Finally enlisted as a Marine, Sledge trains for combat at Camp Elliott. The 1st Marine Division lands at Cape Gloucester on the Japanese-held island of New Britain. As Leckie and the other Marines battle the Japanese, they quickly realize that the more ominous enemy is the smothering jungle itself. Having survived Gloucester and stationed on the godforsaken island of Pavuvu, Leckie begins displaying the physical and mental effects of combat and is sent to a naval hospital on nearby Banika for psychiatric observation.

1.title: FR - Le Pacifique - S01E05 - Peleliu Landing
1.plot: Basilone’s celebrity grows as he travels across the country on the war bonds tour. On Pavuvu, Sledge, assigned to the 5th Marines, 1st Marine Division, is briefly reunited with Phillips and Leckie rejoins his company. Sledge then gets his first taste of combat as he, Leckie, and the rest of the 1st Marine Division meet fierce Japanese resistance while landing on the intricately and heavily defended coral island of Peleliu.

1.title: FR - Le Pacifique - S01E06 - Peleliu Airfield
1.plot: Despite the suffocating 115-degree heat and a lack of clean drinking water, Sledge, Leckie and the other Marines confront the highly-fortified enemy as they attempt to capture the Peleliu airfield. After seeing his comrades badly injured, Leckie himself is wounded and evacuated from the island. Sledge witnesses the shocking truth about what is sometimes required to survive and fight another day.

1.title: FR - Le Pacifique - S01E07 - Peleliu Hills
1.plot: The Marines, including the newly christened “Sledgehammer,” continue the battle of Peleliu against an enemy determined to fight to the last man. Devastated by the loss of a revered leader, and witnessing unimaginable barbarity on both sides, Sledge veers to the very edge of moral collapse. Their objective finally secured, the Marines return to Pavuvu fundamentally changed by their experience on Peleliu.

1.title: FR - Le Pacifique - S01E08 - Iwo Jima
1.plot: Increasingly frustrated by his role campaigning for war bonds, Basilone convinces the Marines to allow him to train troops headed for combat. Transferred to Camp Pendleton, he enjoys a whirlwind romance with an initially reluctant female Marine, Lena Riggi. But the couple know they are living on borrowed time, as Basilone is soon to take part in the Marine landing on Iwo Jima.

1.title: FR - Le Pacifique - S01E09 - Okinawa
1.plot: After battling across the island of Okinawa for more than a month, Sledge and the rest of the 1st Marine Division are ordered to relieve an Army division that has been in combat against the most strongly defended Japanese position on the island. The primordial conditions and the moral dilemma posed by the presence of civilians put tremendous strain on the physical and psychological endurance of Sledge and the other Marines.

1.title: FR - Le Pacifique - S01E10 - Home
1.plot: After the Japanese surrender, Leckie, healed from his wounds, leaves the hospital and returns home, while Sledge heads back to Alabama to be reunited with his family and Sid Phillips. Lena visits Basilone’s home and has an emotional meeting with his family. Leckie adjusts to post-war life by resuming his old job and starting a new relationship, but for Sledge, unsure why he survived the war seemingly unscathed, adjustment will require more time.

1.title: FR - Flashpoint - S01E01 - Scorpio
1.plot: The team has to deal with a disturbed man who has just murdered his estranged wife and who has now taken a woman hostage outside of an office building. However, the situation only gets worse when his son arrives on the scene.

1.title: FR - Flashpoint - S01E02 - First In Line
1.plot:
A dying girl desperately needs a heart transplant and her father will do whatever it takes to make sure she gets one. Even if it means endangering his own life.

The team is called and Parker attempts to defuse the situation.

1.title: FR - Flashpoint - S01E03 - The Element of Surprise
1.plot: The team helps out some undercover agents who are involved in a major drug bust. However, the operation goes wrong when a customer gets in the middle of it.

1.title: FR - Flashpoint - S01E04 - Asking For Flowers
1.plot: When a cop is being held hostage by an enraged family member, the team have to set aside their own feelings to resolve the situation. However, the tables turn when the hostage may not be who the team thinks.

1.title: FR - Flashpoint - S01E05 - Who's George
1.plot: The SRU are called to a bank to deal with a hostage situation; Parker faces one of his toughest negotiations when the robber isn't who he thought.

1.title: FR - Flashpoint - S01E06 - Attention Shoppers
1.plot: When a group of girls torment a troubled teen at the mall, the teenage rivalry turns deadly. The SRU is forced to put a lock down in place to control the situation.

1.title: FR - Flashpoint - S01E07 - He Knows His Brother
1.plot: When the SRU responds to a violent altercation between a young man and his father, the boy flees the police and runs into the woods, sending the team on a manhunt.

1.title: FR - Flashpoint - S01E08 - Never Kissed a Girl
1.plot: When a young man holds a courtroom hostage in an attempt to clear his name for a crime he didn't commit, an SRU team member is in the wrong place at the wrong time and must find a way to safely defuse a critical situation.

1.title: FR - Flashpoint - S01E09 - Planets Aligned
1.plot: The SRU attempts to rescue a kidnapped girl who is being held at a booby-trapped house, but while on the job they learn that one of the abductors is a teen who went missing several years earlier.

1.title: FR - Flashpoint - S01E10 -
FR - Flashpoint - S01E11 -
FR - Flashpoint - S01E12 -
FR - Flashpoint - S01E13 -

2.title: FR - Flashpoint - S02E01 - Eagle Two
2.plot: The team have to protect some VIPs, only to find they have a kidnapping on their hands and limited time to rescue the victim.

2.title: FR - Flashpoint - S02E02 - Backwards Day
2.plot: "Backwards Day " is the eleventh episode in the first season of the Canadian police drama television series Flashpoint. The episode first aired on January 16, 2009. In international markets, this episode is billed as episode 11 of season 1, while in North America, the episode aired as the second episode of season 2.

2.title: FR - Flashpoint - S02E03 - Haunting the Barn
2.plot: "Haunting the Barn" is the twelfth episode in the first season of the Canadian police drama television series Flashpoint. The episode first aired on January 23, 2009. In international markets, this episode is billed as episode 12 of season 1, while in North America, the episode aired as the third episode of season 2.

2.title: FR - Flashpoint - S02E04 - Between Heartbeats
2.plot: "Between Heartbeats" is the thirteenth episode in the first season of the Canadian police drama television series Flashpoint. The episode first aired on February 13, 2009. In international markets, this episode is billed as episode 13 of season 1, while in North America, the episode aired as the fourth episode of season 2.

2.title: FR - Flashpoint - S02E05 - Business as Usual
2.plot: When three men take the CEO of a mortgage company hostage, the SRU team is called to the scene to diffuse the situation. Jules recovers from being shot and the team reluctantly looks at recruits to fill her spot

2.title: FR - Flashpoint - S02E06 - The Fortress
2.plot: When the SRU is called to the scene of an upper class household where four hostages are being held, they discover that the hostage taker is actually the boyfriend of the family's nanny.

2.title: FR - Flashpoint - S02E07 - Clean Hands
2.plot: The SRU must decide how to respond against a colleague after discovering a federal agent they're working with during the transport of a serial killer is sabotaging their mission.

2.title: FR - Flashpoint - S02E08 - Aisle 13
2.plot: SRU has to deal with a sniper that has taken over City Hall, who just happens to be the son of a man Ed killed during a mission. Meanwhile, a team member's health is in question after being caught in the line of fire.

2.title: FR - Flashpoint - S02E09 - The Perfect Family
2.plot: A couple kidnaps the baby they gave up for adoption.

2.title: FR - Flashpoint - S02E10 - Remote Control
2.plot: The SRU is called in when a bank employee whose wife is being held captive hacks into the computer system to steal money to pay off her captors.

2.title: FR - Flashpoint - S02E12 - Last Dance
2.plot: The team must track down a young woman dying of a brain disease when she and her finacé go on a crime spree.

2.title: FR - Flashpoint - S02E13 - Exit Wounds
2.plot: The SRU team is deployed to a hospital to end a stand-off between gang members and a man trying to protect his wounded brother.

2.title: FR - Flashpoint - S02E14 - One Wrong Move
2.plot: A wave of terrorist bombs shuts down the city, pushing Team One to the limit and putting one of their own on the line.

2.title: FR - Flashpoint - S02E15 - Never Let You Down
2.plot: The SRU unit must rescue a woman from a delusional man who insists she is his missing daughter.

2.title: FR - Flashpoint - S02E16 - Just a Man
2.plot: Model prisoner Anton Burrows is up for parole but is denied when the victim’s family, the Amiris, speaks against him. Moments later, a ruthless gang incites a riot at Langstaff Maximum Security and takes the Amiris hostage. The SRU are called in and Ed is surprised to find an old friend acting as riot spokesman. Investigation leads the team to suspect the gang is plotting a break, but they discover the gang’s true agenda is much worse.

2.title: FR - Flashpoint - S02E17 - Custody
2.plot: The SRU respond when a distraught man takes a lawyer at gunpoint.

3.title: FR - Flashpoint - S03E01 - Unconditional Love
3.plot: Team One must resolve a standoff at a seedy motel with a fugitive who has shot two police officers and taken a teenager, Paul Wilder, hostage. At first, Paul seems like a good kid in a bad situation, but as the team digs deeper it uncovers chilling secrets that reveal Paul is far from innocent. What began as a standoff ends as a desperate chase through the city’s sewer system, and it’s up to Parker to stop Paul from making a mistake that will change him forever. Meanwhile, Ed discovers that his cop brother Roy might have been responsible for one of the officers getting shot … and that his wife is, unexpectedly, expecting.

3.title: FR - Flashpoint - S03E02 - Severed Ties
3.plot: Maggie Perrello was the perfect mother until an addiction to prescription meds spiraled out of control. It cost Maggie a stint in jail, and the loss of her beloved daughters Becky and Riley into foster care. Now she’s out of jail, clean and sober, and yearns to bring her children home. When Maggie discovers that she can’t have her kids back, she turns desperate and kidnaps Becky and Riley. Team One answers the call. But when an unexpected complication threatens Becky’s safety, will Parker (Enrico Colantoni) be able to convince Maggie to make the ultimate sacrifice?

3.title: FR - Flashpoint - S03E03 - Follow the Leader
3.plot: Two Brothers become involved with a white supremacy group planning a terrorist attack.

3.title: FR - Flashpoint - S03E04 - Whatever it Takes
3.plot: A high school athlete threatens suicide after being kidnapped and beaten.

3.title: FR - Flashpoint - S03E05 - The Other Lane
3.plot: While investigating a shots fired call in an upscale neighborhood, the SRU team encounters a group of gun runners. Among them, Ed's brother.

3.title: FR - Flashpoint - S03E06 - Jumping at Shadows
3.plot:
A girl calls a 911 dispatcher to say an intruder in trying to break in, the dispatcher doesn't believe that an actual intruder is breaking into the house until gunshots are heard. When SRU arrives on scene there is no sign of the girl. 

Greg's son comes for a visit.

3.title: FR - Flashpoint - S03E07 - Acceptable Risk
3.plot: In the wake of a museum gala shooting spree, the SRU's actions and judgments are called into question; however, the investigator seems to be focusing on Sgt. Parker in particular.

3.title: FR - Flashpoint - S03E08 - Collateral Damage
3.plot: Team One is out to capture a man for the murder of his daughter after escaping from a transport van for prisoners.

3.title: FR - Flashpoint - S03E09 - Thicker Than Blood
3.plot: Team One arrives on the scene of a bank robbery where a man claiming to be Roger Finch has turned to desperate measures after trying to withdraw $40,000 from his account. But the case is not so simple: the Team discovers the bank robber is actually Garth Scarrow (J.D. Nicholsen), and the real Roger Finch (Hamish McEwan) has gone missing. Finch has been kidnapped by the bank robber’s daughter, Ava (Erin Karpluk) and her husband Mark (Warren Christie). But it's not his money they're after. As Finch's secret past comes to light, the couple leads the Team to a hospital showdown. Roger Finch holds the key to a child's life... and Ava and Mark will stop at nothing to save their son.

3.title: FR - Flashpoint - S03E10 - Terror
3.plot: The Team receives an urgent call from Jules (Amy Jo Johnson) on her day off – she and her date Steve are trapped in a restaurant with a gunman (Aaron Poole) who’s shot a waiter and is now holding hostages and making incoherent demands. Team One works with Jules on the inside, fighting to calm the gunman down before the waiter dies, but its clear there’s more to this simple hostage-taking. Team One discovers that this delusional man is merely a pawn in a much more horrific act of terror, targeting a local mosque.

3.title: FR - Flashpoint - S03E11 - No Promises
3.plot: Spike (Sergio Di Zio) discovers his former mentor may be implicated in a tangled case involving corruption, drug dealers and an attempted gang execution.

3.title: FR - Flashpoint - S03E12 - I'd Do Anything
3.plot: Complications arise in a high-risk SRU raid when an informant gets caught in a dangerous game of love, murder and betrayal.

meta.plot: Une plongée dans la vie des membres de la Strategic Response Unit, une force de police canadienne spécialisée dans les opérations paramilitaires. Prises d'otages, désamorçages de bombes, démantèlements de gangs... Tous les jours, ces policiers pas comme les autres mettent leur vie en jeu pour sauver celles des autres.

meta.plot: Quatre adolescents de la Terre sont choisis pour sauver un royaume fantastique appelé Gorm. En chemin, les quatre héros apprendront l'importance du respect de la nature, le don de soi et le pouvoir de l'amitié et de l'unité face à l'adversité. Chacun se verra attribuer un Gormiti personnel, l'un des esprits guerriers légendaires et courageux de Gorm, qui les guidera et les soutiendra émotionnellement. Que ce soit en tant que figure paternelle manquante pour Carter, meilleur ami tant recherché pour Skye, frère aîné sage pour Zane ou ami de confiance pour Glen, chaque Gormiti sera crucial pour guider les héros dans leurs aventures.
