1.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Mary Jane Paul (Gabrielle Union) is part of a growing American statistic-- the single, black female. A news anchor with style, class and almost everything else a girl could want; she reports on the lives of others every night, but now we pull the curtain.

1.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S01E02 - Storm Advisory
1.plot: Andre comes face to face with David at Mary Jane’s house. Meanwhile, changes are afoot at SNC and after an anchor is unceremoniously fired, Mary Jane, Kara and Mark all fear for their jobs. Lisa struggles with a bout of depression.

1.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S01E03 - Girls Night In
1.plot: Mary Jane has a big talk with Andre, leaving her to ponder her future. Meanwhile, friction develops between Kara and Mary Jane when Kara revamps Mark’s show; and a woman inches closer to Paul Sr.

1.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S01E04 - The Huxtables Have Fallen
1.plot: Patrick learns of Mary Jane's affair with Andre. To help her sort through her dilemma, Patrick takes her to visit their voice of reasoning Aunt Toni. She is once again conflicted about her feelings for Andre and decides to once and for all give him an answer in regards to his marriage proposal. Meanwhile, a former business partner declines further partnership with Patrick, resulting in damaging affects to Patrick's sobriety.

1.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S01E05 - Mixed Messages
1.plot: Mary Jane meets a man online; Kara’s changes prove too much for Mark. Patrick learns that celebrating his sobriety is bigger than it just being about him, Kara and Mark figure out a way to effectively communicate and work together and Mary Jane admits her addiction.

1.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S01E06 - Exposed
1.plot: Mary Jane and Andre have decided to settle in together at her home in domestic bliss. Meanwhile, Helen is disappointed with Paul Sr. for not receiving a platinum table at an exclusive gala, so he finds an unlikely source in hopes of obtaining one. While Andre declines his invitation to accompany Mary Jane at the gala, she unexpectedly runs into her ex David. Also, Mary Jane is faced with a challenging decision at SNC involving a fellow journalist.

1.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S01E07 - Hindsight is 20/40
1.plot: When Andre sees a picture of Mary Jane with David at the gala he starts questioning if she is still involved with him.

1.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S01E08 - Blindsided
1.plot: A picture stirs up drama between Mary Jane and Andre. Meanwhile, Patrick breaks news that he's moving out; a drug run turns violent; Niecy announces a plan following her delivery; Kara mulls over a custody issue involving her sons.

1.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S01E09 - Uber Love
1.plot: Mary Jane confronts several people; Lisa and Mary Jane's friendship is put to the test.

2.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S02E01 - People in Glass Houses Shouldn't Throw Fish
FR - Being Mary Jane - S02E02 - Freedom
FR - Being Mary Jane - S02E03 - Mary Jane Knows Best
FR - Being Mary Jane - S02E04 - Sleepless in Atlanta
2.plot: Kara protects Mary Jane; Niecy shields her and Treyvion from his father; Patrick struggles to find balance.

2.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S02E05 - No Eggspectations
2.plot: Dr. Marrs delivers news; Cameron and Niecy negotiate; PJ is offered a business opportunity.

2.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S02E06 - Pulling the Trigger
2.plot: Mary desires to become pregnant; Mary's friendship with Lisa is strained; David makes a surprise appearance.

2.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S02E07 - Let's Go Crazy
2.plot: Mary Jane moves forward with her life; Kara must make a decision to stay partners with Mary Jane.

2.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S02E08 - One Is the Loneliest Number
2.plot: A fatal Atlanta school shooting; Mary Jane and Sheldon's courtship advances; Gael helps Kara find a new purpose.

2.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S02E09 - Line in the Sand
2.plot: Mary Jane gets nominated for an Emmy; Patrick discovers what happened to Tracy.

2.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S02E10 - Primetime
2.plot: Mary Jane does some shop therapy; Paul Jr. decides about a job.

2.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S02E11 - Reading the Signs
2.plot: Mary Jane's rant goes viral; Sheldon struggles; Mark's perspective on dating.

3.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S03E01 - Facing Fears
3.plot: In the Season 3 premiere, Mary Jane is rushed to the hospital following her accident; Paul Sr. handles David; and Helen deals with Lisa.

3.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S03E02 - Louie, Louie
3.plot: Mary Jane is stuck in the house with nothing to do; Cedric reveals his plans; and SNC hires a hot replacement for Mary Jane.

3.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S03E03 - Sparrow
3.plot: Mary Jane is forced to confront her feelings after Lisa's suicide, dealing with her family and facing David.

3.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S03E04 - Being Kara
3.plot: Kara's life spins out of control; Mary Jane helps Niecy land her first job.

3.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S03E05 - Hot Seat
3.plot: When SNC decides to keep Marisol in the Primetime seat, Mary Jane's tenacity will lead her to explore unconventional methods.... As Niecy's rift with Patrick continues, she'll reach out to her mother.....

3.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S03E07 - If the Shoe Fits...
3.plot: Mary Jane's birthday takes a backseat to family drama.

3.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S03E08 - Wake Up Call
3.plot: Mary Jane sits in on a journalism lecture and hears harsh opinions of her show; Patrick is surprised with a family intervention about his drug use.

3.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S03E09 - Purging and Cleansing
3.plot: Mary Jane begins a life cleanse; Cece blackmails Mary Jane; Patrick and Paul Sr. clash over custody of D'Asia.

3.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S03E10 - Some Things Are Black and White
3.plot: Mary Jane goes on a date with GG and is put on the spot; David's mom has a heart-to-heart with MJ; Kara finds herself in hot water at work.

4.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S04E01 - Getting Nekkid
4.plot: Looking for change in her career and attitude, Mary Jane has an interesting encounter with a new man.

4.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S04E02 - Getting Naked
4.plot: Mary Jane is pitted against her idol Ronda while Niecy tries to balance her life.

4.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S04E03 - Getting Real
4.plot: An interview with a fiery reality star makes Mary Jane a social media sensation. Things rapidly heat up with Lee.

4.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S04E04 - Getting Schooled
4.plot: Mary Jane's new position as web correspondent fuels her rivalry with Justin as she pursues the story of a teen boy beaten for wearing a skirt.

4.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S04E05 - Getting Served
4.plot: Mary Jane and PJ feel homesick while Niecy's rash decision has some dire consequences.

4.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S04E06 - Getting Home
4.plot: Traveling to Atlanta to cover a news story, Mary Jane's reunion with her family goes into a tailspin when Lee shows up unexpectedly.

4.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S04E07 - Getting Judged
4.plot: A leaked story in the press about Mary Jane threatens to derail one of the most important moments of her career.

4.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S04E08 - Getting Risky
4.plot: Mary Jane and Justin go rogue to chase a story as Mary Jane frets about meeting Lee's baby momma.

4.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S04E09 - Getting Serious
4.plot: Justin cooks up a plan to get Mary Jane in the anchor chair while she and Lee decide whether or not they should have a baby together.

4.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S04E10 - Getting It
4.plot: Mary Jane joins forces with Justin, setting forth a plan that could oust Ronda from the anchor chair, but Kara gets caught in the crossfire.

4.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S04E11 - Feeling Raw
4.plot: Distrustful of Justin after Kara's firing, Mary Jane tries to make it work with Lee, but resisting Justin is undermining her performance in the coveted co-anchor spot of the morning show.

4.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S04E12 - Feeling Conflicted
4.plot: Since Kara is having a tough time in arbitration with her wrongful termination claim, Mary Jane and Justin decide not to confess that they're seeing each other.

4.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S04E13 - Feeling Exposed
4.plot: Kara's discovery that Mary Jane is sleeping with Justin sends their friendship into a tailspin and upsets the power dynamic at the studio. Sensing there's more to Mary Jane's break up with Lee, Helen sends Niecy to New York.

4.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S04E14 - Feeling Friendless
4.plot: Feeling alienated, Mary Jane allows her own party to be transformed into a media event. Niecy returns to Atlanta invigorated and ready to set her dreams in motion. Patrick becomes a montor to a rowdy activist.

4.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S04E15 - Feeling Hashtagged
4.plot: Mary Jane and Justin's relationship goes viral. Frank, an old family friend of Helen and Paul's, stirs long-forgotten memories of a love triangle that clouded the early years of their marriage.

4.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S04E16 - Feeling Ambushed
4.plot: Mary Jane and Justin's relationship is tested when their notoriety on social media leads to discoveries about Justin's past. Kara makes her own discovery about the girlfriend of one of Orlando's teammates.

4.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S04E17 - Feeling Lost
4.plot: Word of Lee's brimming success and new girlfriend throws Mary Jane's already tenuous relationship with Justin into doubt...

4.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S04E18 - Feeling Destined
4.plot: After learning that Paul and Helen are getting a divorce, the Paterson family struggles to cope with the imminent changes.

4.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S04E19 - Feeling Seen
4.plot: Mary Jane uncovers information about Justin's past that spin their love into a new phase. Meanwhile, Kara and Justin are forced to take down a dark horse who has entered the race for the executive producer slot.

4.title: FR - Being Mary Jane - S04E20 - Feeling Tested
4.plot: After learning she has a say in who replaces Garrett, Mary Jane questions Justin's overtures toward her; Kara helps Orlando in his transition from athlete to broadcaster.

meta.plot: La vie et les petits tracas d'une animatrice de télé d'Atlanta toujours célibataire...

Royal Crackers était autrefois le roi des snacks, mais l'empire s'effondre. Lorsque le patriarche de la famille, le tyrannique fondateur de l'entreprise, Theodore Hornsby Sr., se retrouve dans un «super coma», le reste des Hornsby prendra leur manque de talent et de sens des affaires et tentera de faire de Royal Crackers le succès qu'il était autrefois.

1.title: FR - Royal Crackers - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Tragedy strikes the Hornsby family when their beloved patriarch and founder of Royal Crackers, Theodore Hornsby Sr., falls into a 'super coma'.

1.title: FR - Royal Crackers - S01E02 - Theo's Comeback Tour
1.plot: Theo kicks off his solo career by going on a world tour. Meanwhile, back at the Hornsby Manor, Stebe and Deb take the opportunity to experiment with hard drugs.

1.title: FR - Royal Crackers - S01E03 - Factory 37
1.plot: Royal Crackers' most profitable factory is due for an inspection, but when a brand new no-nonsense health inspector arrives, the team has to work extra hard to make sure Factory 37 is up to code.

1.title: FR - Royal Crackers - S01E04 - Stebe
1.plot: When Theo's old charismatic friend and former bandmate shows up unexpectedly at the Hornsby Manor, Stebe is thrown into a full-blown identity crisis.

1.title: FR - Royal Crackers - S01E05 - Business Mom
1.plot: Deb becomes the target of intense internet backlash after an altercation at the local grocery store earns her widespread infamy.

1.title: FR - Royal Crackers - S01E06 - Mayworth
1.plot: A botched birthday party makes Theodore Hornsby Sr. recount a troubling event from his past.

1.title: FR - Royal Crackers - S01E07 - The .1%
1.plot: The Hornsby family attends a deviant billionaire's annual yacht party, which is reserved exclusively for "The .1%," the richest billionaires in the world.

1.title: FR - Royal Crackers - S01E08 - Casa de Darby
1.plot: The Hornsby's head to Burbank, California when Stebe lands Royal Crackers a lucrative brand integration deal with a very popular Latin American sitcom, "Casa De Papa."

1.title: FR - Royal Crackers - S01E09 - CrackerCon
1.plot: It's time for the team to head to beautiful Primm, Nevada and attend the Super Bowl for global snack food companies, "CrackerCon."

1.title: FR - Royal Crackers - S01E10 - Craftopia
1.plot: When Matt's computer is destroyed by an internet prankster named Zane, he takes a job at Royal Crackers to save enough money to buy a replacement.

1.title: FR - The American Farm - S01E01 -
FR - The American Farm - S01E02 -
FR - The American Farm - S01E03 -
FR - The American Farm - S01E04 -
FR - The American Farm - S01E05 -
FR - The American Farm - S01E06 -
FR - The American Farm - S01E07 -

meta.plot: Plus de dix ans après sa mort présumée, Adam Warren, le fils d'une femme politique de l'Etat du Maine, refait surface. Alors qu'il tente de retrouver ses marques au sein de sa famille, le bonheur de son retour laisse peu à peu place à la suspicion. Est-il vraiment celui qui'il prétend être ?

1.title: FR - The Family - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Ten years on from disappearing without trace, a politician's son returns causing repercussions through their family and the local community.

1.title: FR - The Family - S01E02 - All You See Is Dark
1.plot: Hank meets Adam. Danny reveals his suspicions about Adam to Bridey. Nina feels haunted by her past.

1.title: FR - The Family - S01E03 - Of Puppies and Monsters
1.plot: Gabe Clements lets Nina know how he would like to deal with the investigation. Adam goes back to the bunker to see if it can help him to remember anything. Claire's motives end up being questioned.

1.title: FR - The Family - S01E04 - Feathers or Steel
1.plot: Meyer and Clements hunt a child kidnapper whose MO is similar to Adam's abductor. Bridey arouses Willa's suspicions while seeking information on Adam. In the past, Claire pushes Hank to share more about Adam's kidnapping and makes a painful discovery about John.

1.title: FR - The Family - S01E05 - I Win
1.plot: Hank blames a member of the Warren family when he ends up being badly beaten. Bridey receives the paternity test results she had done on Adam.

1.title: FR - The Family - S01E06 - Nowhere Man
1.plot: Adam is used as bait to lure a pock-marked man but things don't go as planned; the police continue pursuing Doug; Adam reveals unexpected news to Claire.

1.title: FR - The Family - S01E07 - All the Livelong Day
1.plot: Flashbacks reveal details of Adam's return to Red Pines, playing out against the backdrop of Willa's deceitful ways. John drops some major news on Claire, driving her to struggle with an agonizing decision.

1.title: FR - The Family - S01E08 - Sweet Jane
1.plot: Claire deals with the emotional ramifications of Willa's scheming. Nina is determined to find out where Adam disappears to every night. Willa exposes another family secret. Hank's role in Adam's kidnapping is revealed.

1.title: FR - The Family - S01E09 - Betta Male
1.plot: Detective Meyer follows Adam's therapy sessions as he attempts to find some clues about his past. Claire attempts to keep an eye on Ben.

1.title: FR - The Family - S01E10 - Fun Ways to Tell Boyfriend You're Pregnant
1.plot: Bridey ends up betraying Willa for some press attention. Hank thinks that he has found important evidence in Adam's case.

1.title: FR - The Family - S01E11 - Election Day
1.plot: Nina is at turmoil with the Warrens as she and Hank try to expose Adam's kidnapper. Willa and Claire's conspiracy reaches a breaking point.

1.title: FR - The Family - S01E12 - What Took so Long?
1.plot: Nina closes in on Jane. Claire suffers an emotional breakdown when visiting Ben and Adam's prison. Secrets finally arise.

meta.plot: Louisa Durrell, dont le mari est mort il y a quelques années déjà, est bientôt sans le sou. Mère de 4 enfants qui lui compliquent bien l’existence, elle décide de quitter la Grande-Bretagne et emmène sa famille à Corfou, en Grèce.

1.title: FR - La folle aventure des Durrell - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: In 1935, beleaguered Bournemouth mother Louisa Durrell decides to uproot her family and build a new life on the sun-drenched island of Corfu. However, with money problems and four unruly children to care for, even a new start might not be enough to banish her troubles.

1.title: FR - La folle aventure des Durrell - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Larry falls dangerously ill, and it falls to Theo and his neighbour Sven to put their rudimentary medical skills to the task of saving his life. The family's money worries continue, but Spiros brings them good news from a surprising source. Gerry adds to his growing menagerie, while Margo is emotionally wounded - but gets little sympathy from Leslie.

1.title: FR - La folle aventure des Durrell - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Margo takes great pride in her new job at the surgery, but after a chance encounter with a recluse, she begins to realise where her greatest talent lies. Louisa grows closer to Sven, but as Gerry befriends a convict and Leslie begins spending all his time in the local bars, she begins to suspect she has made a mistake bringing her children to Corfu.

1.title: FR - La folle aventure des Durrell - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Leslie falls in with a bad crowd and ends up being falsely accused of armed robbery, prompting Louisa to take desperate measures to save him. Margo takes a shine to a gardener at the Villa Mavrodaki, Captain Creech returns, and the family realises the extent of Gerry's passion for animals when he turns his bedroom into a centre for scientific learning.

1.title: FR - La folle aventure des Durrell - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: The family faces the unwanted arrival of a domineering aunt, while Larry's girlfriend also pays a visit - giving the unwelcome relative an opportunity to voice her disapproval of the whole family. Sven makes an offer that helps Louisa cope with adversity and Margo falls in love - but Gerry is more concerned with his newly acquired owlets.

1.title: FR - La folle aventure des Durrell - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: The family prepares for a celebration, and Margo is determined to persuade the reclusive Countess Mavrodaki to attend. Sven is put to the test by his potential family, but seems to make a good impression. Gerry begins to question whether keeping animals in his personal zoo is fair, and considers releasing them into the wild.

meta.plot: Six ans après que Yugo et son équipe ont vaincu Qilby, les larmes d'Ogrest inondent le royaume d'Amalia. Pour le contrecarrer, il faut trouver les six Dofus manquants.

1.title: FR - Wakfu: The Quest for the Six Eliatrope Dofus - S01E01 - Book I: The Trone of Ice
1.plot: It's been six years since the World of Twelve was saved from Qilby. But now Ogrest is crying again, and his tears are flooding the Sadida kingdom.

1.title: FR - Wakfu: The Quest for the Six Eliatrope Dofus - S01E02 - Book II : Ush
1.plot: Yugo and his pals are held captive in Count Harebourg's icy prison, where they discover three prisoners trapped in blocks of ice.

1.title: FR - Wakfu: The Quest for the Six Eliatrope Dofus - S01E03 - Book III : Dragon Mountain
1.plot: When Percedal decides to directly attack the terrifying Ogrest, the destiny of the World of Twelve is again in the hands of Yugo and his team.

1.title: FR - The Letter for the King - S01E01 - Storm Clouds Gather
1.plot: Pressured by his father and mocked by his peers, 15-year-old Tiuri competes to become a Knight of Dagonaut - just as the kingdom faces a dark threat.

1.title: FR - The Letter for the King - S01E02 - Isn't She a Sweetheart?
1.plot: With the Red Riders and Novices hot on his trail, Tiuri makes his way to Mistrinaut, where the mayor's daughter takes a keen interest in his mission.

1.title: FR - The Letter for the King - S01E03 - At the End of the World
1.plot: The Red Riders drive their captives high into the snowy mountains. Caught in a storm, Tiuri and Lavinia take shelter inside an ominous monastery.

1.title: FR - The Letter for the King - S01E04 - Danger Knights
1.plot: On a ship headed toward Unauwen, Tiuri and Lavinia meet a mysterious passenger who seems to know the secret of Tiuri's past - and his destiny.

1.title: FR - The Letter for the King - S01E05 - Spiral
1.plot: Ardanwen guides the group to an eerily empty town. Lavinia helps Tiuri practice controlling his powers. A startling discovery divides the Novices.

1.title: FR - The Letter for the King - S01E06 - When the Blood Moon Rises
1.plot: As the Blood Moon nears and Viridian prepares for his homecoming, Tiuri and friends wrestle with doubt, betrayal and a daunting final test.

meta.plot: Entre anciennes prophéties, pouvoirs magiques et compagnons capricieux, un jeune apprenti chevalier se lance dans une aventure épique pour sauver son royaume.

1.title: FR - The Dark Crystal: Age of Resistance - S01E01 - End. Begin. All the Same.
1.plot: In the land of Thra, a young guard discovers a terrible secret about the Skeksis overlords who control the planet -- and its powerful Crystal of Truth.

1.title: FR - The Dark Crystal: Age of Resistance - S01E02 - Nothing Is Simple Anymore
1.plot: As Deet sets out on her quest, Aughra awakens from a long journey, Rian flees the castle, and Brea searches for the meaning of the mysterious symbol.

1.title: FR - The Dark Crystal: Age of Resistance - S01E03 - What Was Sundered and Undone
1.plot: Brea struggles with her unsavory new duties, Deet and Hup get a hostile welcome from the Stonewood clan, and Rian begs his Maudra for help.

1.title: FR - The Dark Crystal: Age of Resistance - S01E04 - The First Thing I Remember Is Fire
1.plot: While Brea races to solve a puzzle in a hidden room beneath the throne, the Chamberlain hatches a plan to catch Rian and win back the Emperor's trust.

1.title: FR - The Dark Crystal: Age of Resistance - S01E05 - She Knows All the Secrets
1.plot: A missing Landstrider herd and an unexpected visit from the Skeksis put the All-Maudra on edge. Aughra summons Rian and the others to Dream Space.

1.title: FR - The Dark Crystal: Age of Resistance - S01E06 - By Gelfling Hand ...
1.plot: Lore breaks out of his chamber to help Brea. As news of the General's deed spreads, Seladon calls the other Maudras to the Citadel.

1.title: FR - The Dark Crystal: Age of Resistance - S01E07 - Time to Make ... My Move
1.plot: At the Circle of the Suns, the weary travelers receive an unsettling surprise -- and a lesson in Thra's history. The Emperor recruits a new army.

1.title: FR - The Dark Crystal: Age of Resistance - S01E08 - Prophets Don't Know Everything
1.plot: While Deet leads Rian on a harrowing journey through the tunnels of Thra, Seladon visits the Castle of the Crystal and sees a new side of the lords.

1.title: FR - The Dark Crystal: Age of Resistance - S01E09 - The Crystal Calls
1.plot: Desperate to save one of their own, the Skeksis make a deal with Aughra. Rian and Deet continue their search for the Dual Glaive.

1.title: FR - The Dark Crystal: Age of Resistance - S01E10 - A Single Piece Was Lost
1.plot: As the Gelfling and the Skeksis prepare for a fateful battle, the Scientist starts work on a new secret weapon.

meta.plot: Alors que des seigneurs assoiffés de pouvoir épuisent toute vie de la planète Thra, un groupe de courageux Gelflings unissent leurs forces pour repousser les ténèbres.

1.title: FR - Robozuna - S01E01 - Game Changer Part One
1.plot: Playful teenager Ariston wants to prove that his robot buddy Mangle has what it takes to turn into a Combatabot and become a Robozuna star.

1.title: FR - Robozuna - S01E02 - Game Changer Part Two
1.plot: When Ariston and Mangle go to the first big Robozuna match, Mangle gets into the action! But they face a tougher fight when they return home.

1.title: FR - Robozuna - S01E03 - Team Natrix
1.plot: As Team Veredus prepares to take on Corvus's Team Natrix, Mangle and Ariston get distracted by a mission that could help them, but hurt the team.

1.title: FR - Robozuna - S01E04 - Lightening Harvesters
1.plot: The team helps a lightning harvester hold off a Corvus attack, then takes on Team Capra to try to keep its Robozuna winning streak alive.

1.title: FR - Robozuna - S01E05 - Breakout
1.plot: Teamwork is the key as the Veredus crew breaks into the Corvus prison on a dangerous mission to find Feronia.

1.title: FR - Robozuna - S01E06 - Ariston’s Dream
1.plot: Motivated by a hopeful dream, Ariston takes Mangle to find Niven. But it leaves the team short-handed for a big Robozuna game.

1.title: FR - Robozuna - S01E07 - Lightning in a Bottle
1.plot: Just when the team thinks it's time to take a break and rest, they're called on for help defending a lightning harvester camp from Commander Vermis.

1.title: FR - Robozuna - S01E08 - Rematch
1.plot: After Team Natrix unleashes a massive Robozuna robot called Megabatabot, it leaves the arena on a rampage, and Team Veredus must protect the town.

1.title: FR - Robozuna - S01E09 - Free for All Part I
1.plot: While Team Veredus and Team Vulpes work together in a big midseason tournament, the other Freebot Fighters head to the Corvus prison.

1.title: FR - Robozuna - S01E10 - Free for All Part II
1.plot: The midseason tournament comes to a thrilling end, but the Freebots have their hands full trying to stop Danuvia's plan to build an invincible army.

meta.plot: Un garçon et son robot artisanal participent à la compétition la plus ardue de l'univers... tout en essayant de libérer leur nation de l'oppression d'un empire maléfique.
Devenu roi du Ciel bleu, Darel doit mener une importante mission pour sauver un marcheur de rêves et laisse le village sous la protection des jeunes de Kulipari.

1.title: FR - Kulipari: Dream Walker - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: As the Kulipari thrive in their new settlement of Nova Australis, Chief Bindi of the Gecko tribe seeks Darel's help to rescue his kidnapped son.

1.title: FR - Kulipari: Dream Walker - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: While the Kulipari youth deal with a snake problem, Darel and his party descend upon Cardigal, where Darkan's guards scour the area for intruders.

1.title: FR - Kulipari: Dream Walker - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Darel dons a disguise to rescue Ponto deep inside the dungeons of Darkan's fortress. Stinger and the triplets tend to a poisoned Jir back home.

1.title: FR - Kulipari: Dream Walker - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: As Jir's condition worsens, the Kulipari youth search for a rare flower to be used in an antidote. Lady Fahlga offers to help Darel in locating Ponto.

1.title: FR - Kulipari: Dream Walker - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: With all of Cardigal focused on the tournament, Captain Killara offers Darel and his rescue party a way to slip inside Darkan's palace undetected.

1.title: FR - Kulipari: Dream Walker - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Per Killara's plan, Darel and party find themselves easily infiltrating the palace dungeon. But a cleverly set trap awaits their arrival.

1.title: FR - Kulipari: Dream Walker - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: The events that transpired during Darel's rescue attempt are shown from Killara's viewpoint. Lady Fahlga gets an opportunity to exact her revenge.

1.title: FR - Kulipari: Dream Walker - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: The Kulipari youth rush to deliver the antidote to Jir. Chained to each other, Marmoo and Ponto must fight together to survive the tournament.

1.title: FR - Kulipari: Dream Walker - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: Darel and Lady Fahlga hatch an escape plan, urging Ponto to persuade Killara's soldiers to convince prisoners inside Darkan's castle to revolt.

1.title: FR - Kulipari: Dream Walker - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: While Koa's body floats in a trance-like state, his mind struggles inside the dreamworld as a battle for his soul rages on between Sergu and Jarrah.

meta.plot: Courageuses et héroïques, des grenouilles intrépides entrent en guerre contre des araignées et des scorpions bien décidés à en finir avec les petits amphibiens.

1.title: FR - Kulipari: An Army of Frogs - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: While a young frog named Darel dreams of becoming a Kulipari warrior, evil forces are conspiring to attack his home in the Amphibilands.

1.title: FR - Kulipari: An Army of Frogs - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: When Darel's negligence wrecks the marketplace, the Chief bans him from further training. But the Scorpion King's army is fast approaching.

1.title: FR - Kulipari: An Army of Frogs - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: When Scorpion soldiers break through the Veil that shields the Amphibilands, Darel must use his Kulipari training to protect himself.

1.title: FR - Kulipari: An Army of Frogs - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: When the Scorpion soldiers capture Darel's best friend, Gee, in the forest, Darel uses his Kulipari training to track him down.

1.title: FR - Kulipari: An Army of Frogs - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: A tough-talking Darel dons a disguise to join a squad of lizard mercenaries and rescue Gee from enemy territory. But his skills are put to the test.

1.title: FR - Kulipari: An Army of Frogs - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: While Darel and Gee work together to do serious damage to the Scorpion base camp, their friends and family in the Amphibilands prepare for war.

1.title: FR - Kulipari: An Army of Frogs - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Darel and Gee go on a treacherous journey to find the Turtle King and seek his help in saving the Amphibilands from certain doom.

1.title: FR - Kulipari: An Army of Frogs - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: The time has come for the Spider Queen to break down the Veil and the Turtle King's spell, allowing the Scorpions to invade the Amphibilands.

1.title: FR - Kulipari: An Army of Frogs - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: With help from the Kulipari, the villagers fight to protect the Amphibilands from the Spider Queen and the Scorpion King’s invading army.

1.title: FR - Kulipari: An Army of Frogs - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: A snowy mountaintop holds the key to saving the Amphibilands, and it's up to Darel and the Kulipari to make the dangerous journey.

1.title: FR - Kulipari: An Army of Frogs - S01E11 - Episode 11
1.plot: Darel speaks to the Rainbow Serpent, who delivers an important message. The Spider Queen makes Lord Marmoo stronger than ever.

1.title: FR - Kulipari: An Army of Frogs - S01E12 - Episode 12
1.plot: As danger swirls around them, Darel and the Kulipari seek allies to help defend the Amphibilands from Lord Marmoo's army.

1.title: FR - Kulipari: An Army of Frogs - S01E13 - Episode 13
1.plot: Darel and the Kulipari lead the banished amphibians through the desert, where finding water becomes a matter of life and death.

meta.plot: Les amis gourmands Gaufrette et Mochi ont désormais leur propre restaurant et font découvrir à leurs clients affamés de bons petits plats et des saveurs du monde entier !

1.title: FR - Waffles + Mochi's Restaurant - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Waffles + Mochi's Restaurant - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Waffles + Mochi's Restaurant - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Waffles + Mochi's Restaurant - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Waffles + Mochi's Restaurant - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Waffles + Mochi's Restaurant - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - Waffles + Mochi's Restaurant - S01E07 -
FR - Waffles + Mochi's Restaurant - S01E08 -
FR - Waffles + Mochi's Restaurant - S01E09 -
FR - Waffles + Mochi's Restaurant - S01E10 -
FR - Sea of Love - S01E01 - Bruda's Pie
1.plot: At the school picnic, the friends follow their noses to a perfectly baked plankton pie that Bruda made with his mom. Good thing he's got enough to share!

1.title: FR - Sea of Love - S01E02 - Bobbi's Tooth
1.plot: Bobbi's lost his wiggly tooth, and it's fallen into the Ticklish Reef. Can his ocean friends help him find it? Yes, they can — with a side of giggles!

1.title: FR - Sea of Love - S01E03 - Playhouse
1.plot: While his pals are playing nearby, Puri befriends a baby sea spider! The others are scared at first, but they soon learn there's nothing to be afraid of.

1.title: FR - Sea of Love - S01E04 - Uncle Tao
1.plot: Wayu saw something strange while playing ball near the school, but her friends don't believe her — until a game of peekaboo opens everyone's eyes!

1.title: FR - Sea of Love - S01E05 - Volcano Lunch
1.plot: Bruda's making lunch for his mom but needs Wayu's help when he doesn't have all the ingredients. It's the nicest — and spiciest — meal Mom's ever had!

1.title: FR - Sea of Love - S01E06 - Jellyfish Bus
1.plot: Bobbi is usually bold, but he's nervous about trying something new: taking a field trip on a special squishy bus! All he needs is a little encouragement.

1.title: FR - Sea of Love - S01E07 - Wayu and the Coral
1.plot: Shhh! The kids must stay quiet and patient while they wait for the rare rainbow coral to bloom. After all, it only happens once in a blue moon!

1.title: FR - Sea of Love - S01E08 - Fluffy Rock
1.plot: Puri finds a rock that's furry — with a fluffy tail and two long ears! But it's actually an unusual animal who's eager to make art with new friends.

1.title: FR - Sea of Love - S01E09 - Bruda's Pop-up Book
1.plot: Bruda's so proud of the pop-up book he made with his mom... so it's especially hard for Bobbi to find the courage to admit that he broke it.

1.title: FR - Sea of Love - S01E10 - Digging for Treasure
1.plot: Puri leaves his tidy home to play at Wayu's house, where she lives with her grandparents, cousins, uncles and aunts — and the rules are really different!

1.title: FR - Sea of Love - S01E11 - Hide and Seek
1.plot: Bruda's size works against him in hide-and-seek, so he's got to be extra creative. He just needs to find the right hiding place!

1.title: FR - Sea of Love - S01E12 - Bobbi in Bed
1.plot: The kids figure out a way to play a game together, even though Bobbi's sick in bed. Now he's just got to stay calm so he can pay attention to the clues!

1.title: FR - Sea of Love - S01E13 - Photo Day
1.plot: Wayu's trying to stay neat and clean on school picture day, and it's getting in the way of having fun! But a great smile is all that really matters.

1.title: FR - Sea of Love - S01E14 - Color Dancing
1.plot: Each of the kids brings a crayon to school, and Miss Aim encourages them to get their colors "talking." The end result is art that's lovely to look at.

1.title: FR - Sea of Love - S01E15 - The Littlest Gift
1.plot: Everyone brings gifts to school to honor Miss Aim on Teacher's Day. Bruda's worried that his isn't big enough — but it came from the heart.

meta.plot: Bruda, Bobbi, Malou et Louri, une bande d'animaux marins, partent à l'aventure dans l'océan, où la vie quotidienne réserve son lot de magie !
Dans ce combat culinaire féroce, 80 outsiders baptisés les "cuillères noires" et maîtrisant le mariage des saveurs se mesurent à 20 grands chefs, ou "cuillères blanches".

1.title: FR - Le Choc des toques - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Eighty cooks enter the kitchen, where they promptly prepare their best dishes to impress the judges and win a spot to compete with the White Spoon chefs.

1.title: FR - Le Choc des toques - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: From a school lunch plate to a simple steak, Black Spoon cooks whip up their signature dishes as the harsh and unpredictable elimination round continues.

1.title: FR - Le Choc des toques - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Advancing Black Spoon contestants and iconic White Spoon chefs face off in an intense culinary battle, both teams using the same main ingredient.

1.title: FR - Le Choc des toques - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: From a traditional Korean food matchup to a fine dining showdown, the Black vs. White battle intensifies. Will youthfulness trump experience?

1.title: FR - Le Choc des toques - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: The kitchen heats up as Black Spoons take on White Spoons, including multiple Michelin-star chefs. But with the blindfolds on, it's anyone's game.

1.title: FR - Le Choc des toques - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Moving on to the team challenge, the surviving chefs deal with clashing egos and rising tension. Can they unite to create a winning dish?

1.title: FR - Le Choc des toques - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Culinary tensions rise as one team's ingredient hoarding forces the other to scramble to come up with a dish. But soon, a shock awaits some chefs.

1.title: FR - Le Choc des toques - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: In a twist, chefs show off their talents using convenience mart goods. Three teams then face off to create the best restaurant, bumping into a surprise.

1.title: FR - Le Choc des toques - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: Feelings of betrayal turn into a chance to create a successful restaurant. Soon, the restaurants' fates rest on the appetites of 20 mukbang vloggers.

1.title: FR - Le Choc des toques - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: In their most personal task, the semifinalists pour heart and soul into their dishes — from bibimbap to pasta — portraying their lives through food.

1.title: FR - Le Choc des toques - S01E11 - Episode 11
1.plot: The top chefs endure their second mission: a grueling marathon of cooking incorporating one unique ingredient. The heat is on as chefs leave one by one.

1.title: FR - Le Choc des toques - S01E12 - Episode 12
1.plot: After escaping from hell, the two finalists give it their all to become Korea's best. When only a unanimous vote will determine a winner, who will shine?

2.title: FR - Le Choc des toques - S02E01 - Episode 1
FR - Le Choc des toques - S02E02 - Episode 2
FR - Le Choc des toques - S02E03 - Episode 3
FR - Le Choc des toques - S02E04 - Episode 4
FR - Le Choc des toques - S02E05 - Episode 5
FR - Le Choc des toques - S02E06 - Episode 6
FR - Le Choc des toques - S02E07 - Episode 7
FR - Le Choc des toques - S02E08 - Episode 8
2.plot: In this round, the chefs face a daunting task: create a signature dish with minimal ingredients. The next comes a battle of dishes in harmony.

2.title: FR - Le Choc des toques - S02E09 - Episode 9
2.plot: Pairs of chefs attempt to wow the judges, creating synergy regardless of cooking genre or expertise — but a surprise puts some at risk of elimination.

2.title: FR - Le Choc des toques - S02E10 - Episode 10
2.plot: Chefs give it their all to make it through the semifinals. They feel the pressure as they battle against the clock and a limited set of ingredients.

2.title: FR - Le Choc des toques - S02E11 - Episode 11
2.plot: Seven semifinalists compete for a spot in the finals, blessed with a limitless pantry with all kinds of ingredients. The highest-scoring chef advances.

2.title: FR - Le Choc des toques - S02E12 - Episode 12
2.plot: With one chef secured in the finals, the rest go knife-to-knife — this time restricted to a single ingredient— churning out a dish every round.

2.title: FR - Le Choc des toques - S02E13 - Episode 13

meta.plot: Cette série révèle les récentes catastrophes naturelles telles qu'elles se sont produites en temps réel à travers des images capturées par des témoins oculaires qui se sont retrouvés au mauvais endroit au bon moment et qui ont hardiment brandi leurs téléphones portables pour capturer l'œil de la tempête.

1.title: FR - Catastrophes naturelles : survivre au pire - S01E01 - Trapped in a Twister
1.plot: Hundreds of cameras capture a rare tornado outbreak in 2023 as it struck Rolling Fork, Mississippi and Little Rock, Arkansas; when a twister hits Lewistown, Illinois, a group of tornado spotters find themselves trapped in the eye of the deadly storm.

1.title: FR - Catastrophes naturelles : survivre au pire - S01E02 - Derecho Superstorm
1.plot: Hundreds of people in Nebraska and Iowa capture videos of their terrifying escapes as a powerful derecho superstorm tears through the region.

1.title: FR - Catastrophes naturelles : survivre au pire - S01E03 - Hellfire in Hawaii
1.plot: Maui faces the worst natural disaster in its history in 2023, as hurricane-force winds fuel wildfires that catch residents off guard. As eyewitnesses attempt to flee the flames, they film their harrowing attempts to escape from the eye of the storm.

1.title: FR - Catastrophes naturelles : survivre au pire - S01E04 - Half-Country Hurricane
1.plot: Hundreds of cameras capture Hurricane Ida as the Category 4 storm slams the Louisiana coast in 2021, but when the superstorm shifts to the Northeast, eyewitnesses film harrowing encounters with tornadoes and flooding all the way to New York City.

1.title: FR - Catastrophes naturelles : survivre au pire - S01E05 - Snowmageddon
1.plot: Snowmageddon. When a rare multi-day blizzard buries thousands in Buffalo, one woman must brave arctic conditions to save a man freezing to death outside her home.

1.title: FR - Catastrophes naturelles : survivre au pire - S01E06 - Texas Tornado
1.plot: When a tornado outbreak strikes Texas and Kansas in 2022, eyewitnesses capture the chaos as twisters wreak havoc on the structures around them.

meta.plot: Ayla, une jeune fille riche et gâtée, perd la mémoire suite au choc d'avoir perdu son père. Etant donné qu'aucun de ses proches ne se manifeste, elle est envoyée au centre El Bosque. C'est là qu'elle rencontre Inés et Les Mirror, un groupe de danse. Elle va aussi se découvrir une étrange capacité : les sentiments des autres lui sont révélés dans des visions musicales. Sa tante Esmeralda la surveille de près. Elle craint que sa nièce la prive de la fortune qu’elle vient d’hériter.

1.title: FR - Ayla - S01E01 - Out of Place
1.plot: Ayla, after losing her memory, arrives at the El Bosque shelter, where her new life will begin.

1.title: FR - Ayla - S01E02 - The Girl with No Past
1.plot: Ayla meets Step by Step, The Mirrors' biggest dance rivals.

1.title: FR - Ayla - S01E03 - Zombies & Co.
1.plot: Ayla discovers a clue about her past and a problem arises that complicates The Mirrors' rehearsals.

1.title: FR - Ayla - S01E04 - Saving El Bosque
1.plot: The Mirrors are looking for ideas to raise funds for El Bosque and get into the Move You.

1.title: FR - Ayla - S01E05 - To 10K... and Beyond!
1.plot: It is the day of the performance at the mall and The Mirrors are busy with the preparations.

1.title: FR - Ayla - S01E06 - Move You, Here We Go!
1.plot: The Mirrors enter the Move You, but it will not be easy to live up to it.

1.title: FR - Ayla - S01E07 - Training Day
1.plot: The Mirrors suffer with Valen's training. Ayla and David make plans for their first date.

1.title: FR - Ayla - S01E08 - Shattering Mirror
1.plot: Tension grows between The Mirrors and their participation in the contest is in danger.

1.title: FR - Ayla - S01E09 - Ayla Screws It Up
1.plot: Sofía takes the step to apologize and reunite The Mirrors.

1.title: FR - Ayla - S01E10 - A Matter of Dance or Death
1.plot: Ayla goes looking for Yago to convince him to return to the Move You with her.

1.title: FR - Ayla - S01E11 - A Farewell, a Dance and a Kiss
1.plot: The Mirrors and the rest of the residents of El Bosque prepare a farewelll party for Sami.

1.title: FR - Ayla - S01E12 - Don't Let Fate Catch You with Messy Hair!
1.plot: The Mirrors join forces with the Step by Step to save a centennial tree.

1.title: FR - Ayla - S01E13 - Happy Birthday, Paola
1.plot: It's Paola's birthday and The Mirrors decide to give her a surprise party.

1.title: FR - Ayla - S01E14 - Too Much Trouble
1.plot: Esmeralda orders Eric to boycott The Mirrors so that they fail the exams. Kako faces a dilemma.

1.title: FR - Ayla - S01E15 - Sweet Challenges
1.plot: The high school celebrates a Gastronomic Festival. The Mirrors receive anonymous love notes.

1.title: FR - Ayla - S01E16 - The Final Vote
1.plot: The Mirrors have to decide who will replace Sofía in the Move You.

1.title: FR - Ayla - S01E17 - The Class Weirdo
1.plot: Yago is focused on preparing for the duel and Ayla wants to help him win over David.

1.title: FR - Ayla - S01E18 - Don't Tell Yago
1.plot: Ayla and Yago are getting closer. David has a plan to make Yago nervous.

1.title: FR - Ayla - S01E19 - Second Chances
1.plot: The Move You semifinal is soon and Sofía proposes a game to The Mirrors to have fun dancing.

1.title: FR - Ayla - S01E20 - The Mirrors' Worst Day Ever
1.plot: The Mirrors are ready for the Move You, but Eric and David are not going to make it easy for them.

1.title: FR - Ayla - S01E21 - Dance-Off
1.plot: When Step by Step dance with Kaboom's song, The Mirrors have to improvise their perfomance.

1.title: FR - Ayla - S01E22 - As Far as We Go
1.plot: The Mirrors receive the bases for the final. The Step by Step team are mad at David.

1.title: FR - Ayla - S01E23 - The Mirrors' Secret
1.plot: Esmeralda wants to prevent Ayla from dancing in the final and she gives Eric an unpleasant task.

1.title: FR - Ayla - S01E24 - One Step Closer
1.plot: The Mirrors prepare a day of indian activities that will inspire them for their Bollywood choreo.

1.title: FR - Ayla - S01E25 - Unreachable Star
1.plot: Kako composes a song for Noe and Ayla has a new memory that may be significant.

1.title: FR - Ayla - S01E26 - Ayla Says Enough
1.plot: Inés and Julia gather clues about Esmeralda. Ayla has a plan to convince Sofía.

1.title: FR - Ayla - S01E28 - A Dance Straight to the Heart
1.plot: Ayla tries to get Yago to forgive her. Sofia is nervous about Erika Gruber's visit.

1.title: FR - Ayla - S01E29 - Not So Secret
1.plot: Ayla is getting closer to knowing who she is and Sofía goes to the Erika Gruber's audition.

1.title: FR - Ayla - S01E30 - Grand Finale
1.plot: It is the Move You finale. Segura finds the key to the case and Esmeralda's patience is running out.

meta.plot: Vincent Daron, brillant et fantasque avocat à la cour de Bordeaux, est à la tête d’un célèbre cabinet familial qu’il a fondé avec son frère Jean-Michel. Mais lorsque ce dernier décède, Daron découvre, avec stupéfaction, que son frère a légué l’intégralité de ses parts à Pauline Lefranc, une jeune avocate qui vient tout juste de lui donner du fil à retordre lors d’un procès et qui n’a aucun lien avec la famille !

1.title: FR - Le Daron - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Le Daron - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Le Daron - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Le Daron - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Le Daron - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Le Daron - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - Concordia - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: After 20 years of success, the AI-driven town of Concordia plans to expand to Germany, but the plan is threatened when analyst Oliver Miller is found dead.

1.title: FR - Concordia - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: As the Concordia team grapples with Oliver's breach, they discover he was meeting with an outsider who has since fled the country and is now the primary suspect.

1.title: FR - Concordia - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Oliver Miller is revealed to be more than a lonely analyst; he's been leaking private data from Concordia to THE FACELESS, an anti surveillance group. The suspicion arises that the group might still be inside the system. Now, a desperate race against time begins to patch the hack and stop the Faceless before Concordia's hard earned success unravels.

1.title: FR - Concordia - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: The Gothenburg police close Oliver's case, blaming THE FACELESS for his death. But when a second mysterious death occurs, Isabelle starts to suspect that s omething more sinister is at play. Finding abnormalities in the evidence, she traces it back and wonders if the truth is in fact connected to the founders of the town and Concordia's origins.

1.title: FR - Concordia - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: As the German launch nears, Isabelle discovers that Conco rdia's birth was no coincidence, revealing an original sin that threatens everything. Her bond with Concordia weakens, while Thea's grows as it offers a solution to her personal struggles. Meanwhile, THE FACELESS aim to sabotage the expansion by targeting Saxony ’s Minister President.

1.title: FR - Concordia - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Isabelle uncovers more disturbing truths about the two mysterious deaths. The revelations tear Isabelle’s life apart with h er husband, NOAH, and mother in law and town founder, JULIANE, at the center of it. As the net closes around THE FACELESS, expansion proceeds, driven by Noah and Juliane, with Isabelle left to choose where her loyalties lie.

meta.plot: Concordia est une petite communauté expérimentale qui, grâce à une intelligence artificielle, assure la protection de la ville et de ses citoyens qui acceptent d'être sous une surveillance totale et permanente. Le modèle de Concordia va être mis à mal lorsque l’un des habitants de la communauté est retrouvé assassiné.
Chirurgiens et des épithésistes tentent de reconstruire un visage a des patients souffrant de maladies génétiques et de traumatismes.

1.title: FR - Chirurgie du visage : un nouvel espoir - S01E01 - The Elephant's Trunk
1.plot: Peter undergoes surgery to try to rebuild his nose after losing it to cancer, and surgeons battle to reattach Jack's jaw after an e-scooter crash.

1.title: FR - Chirurgie du visage : un nouvel espoir - S01E02 - The First Thing You Look At
1.plot: A simple toothache leads to a deadly flesh-eating infection in Terry's eye. Anita makes the heart-breaking decision to have one of her eyes removed.

1.title: FR - Chirurgie du visage : un nouvel espoir - S01E03 - I Miss My Old Face
1.plot: Kamil has lost half of his nose and needs prosthetist Nigel's help. Plus, surgeon Vijay pieces together Dean's shattered jaw and cheekbone.

1.title: FR - Chirurgie du visage : un nouvel espoir - S01E04 - I Just Want a New Nose
1.plot: After enduring years of torment over her looks, Holly wants a straighter nose. Plus, Leo has become isolated since losing his left eye to cancer.

1.title: FR - Chirurgie du visage : un nouvel espoir - S01E05 - Hole in The Face
1.plot: Alex has become a prisoner in his own home after having his nose surgically removed. Plus, an infected insect bite has left a gaping hole in Tracey's neck.

1.title: FR - Chirurgie du visage : un nouvel espoir - S01E06 - I Can't Smile
1.plot: Brenda is paralyzed down one side of her face and desperately wants her smile back. Plus, surgeon Vijay attempts a difficult procedure to straighten Meghan's jaw.

1.title: FR - Chirurgie du visage : un nouvel espoir - S01E07 - A Walking Miracle
1.plot: After falling off a balcony, part of Alfie's skill is missing, and his brain is unprotected. Plus, Sue hopes an artificial eye will bring back her confidence.

1.title: FR - Chirurgie du visage : un nouvel espoir - S01E08 - Do I Look Like Me?
1.plot: After a car crash broke several of her bones, 16-year-old Emily needs Vijay to rebuild her face. Dave needs the paralyzed side of his face lifted.

1.title: FR - Saudi Pro League : Coup d'envoi - S01E01 - A New Dawn
1.plot: The arrival of Ronaldo to the Saudi Pro League's Al Nassr has sparked hopes of a new legacy with the local players and the team's return to glory.

1.title: FR - Saudi Pro League : Coup d'envoi - S01E02 - Stepping Up
1.plot: With Neymar injured, Al Hilal's squad must rise to the challenge. Can they fill the void and keep their title hopes alive amidst mounting pressure?

1.title: FR - Saudi Pro League : Coup d'envoi - S01E03 - A Fight for Legacy
1.plot: Al Ittihad's addition of Benzema and a boost in teamwork focus, inspires a whole new generation of up-and-coming talent – like 16-year-old Talal Haji.

1.title: FR - Saudi Pro League : Coup d'envoi - S01E04 - Under Pressure
1.plot: Steven Gerrard takes the helm at Ettifaq. After a lackluster season, he's on a mission to turn things around and reignite the club's legendary status.

1.title: FR - Saudi Pro League : Coup d'envoi - S01E05 - Call It a Comeback
1.plot: Al-Ahli aims for an Asian Champions League qualification under Matthias Jaissle. Can they bounce back from their 2022 relegation with a new partnership?

1.title: FR - Saudi Pro League : Coup d'envoi - S01E06 - Final Whistle
1.plot: As the season draws to a close, each club must give it their all to hit their goals. Will they succeed in hitting the back of the net?

meta.plot: Dans cette série documentaire passionnante sur le football, des icônes mondiales rallient des stars locales et transforment le championnat saoudien pour la saison 2023/2024.

1.title: FR - 900 jours sans Anabel - S01E01 - Where is Anabel?
1.plot: A normal day turns into a nightmare when Anabel is kidnapped while jogging. The kidnappers soon contact her family, issuing exorbitant ransom demands.

1.title: FR - 900 jours sans Anabel - S01E02 - Proof of Life
1.plot: A failed police operation prompts a request for proof of life, but the kidnappers' response only raises more questions.

1.title: FR - 900 jours sans Anabel - S01E03 - Poisoned Message
1.plot: The entire country unites for Anabel's release. After a long silence, the police share the kidnappers' voices, shedding new light onto the case.

meta.plot: À travers des enregistrements inédits des ravisseurs, cette série documentaire revient sur l'enlèvement d'Anabel Segura qui a tenu l'Espagne en haleine pendant 900 jours.

The Last Woodsmen nous emmène au cœur d'une nature sauvage et isolée avec ces bûcherons courageux et hautement qualifiés qui risquent littéralement leur vie. Sur une barge flottante à des centaines de kilomètres de la civilisation, le bûcheron vétéran Jared Douglas met tout en jeu pour récolter le plus gros bois du monde. Un seul faux pas dans cette industrie à haut risque peut coûter des dizaines de milliers de dollars, voire une vie. Il est rejoint au bout du monde par une équipe soudée de bûcherons qui, munis uniquement de haches et de scies mécaniques manuelles, abattent des arbres massifs et de grande valeur qui peuvent valoir jusqu'à 70 000 dollars chacun.

1.title: FR - The Last Woodsmen - S01E01 - Jared vs. Goliaths
1.plot: Jared Douglas and his old-school logging crew risk life and limb to harvest the planet's biggest, most valuable trees. But getting these giants from the forest to market could kill him.

meta.plot: Julia George, productrice ambitieuse à la tête du journal télévisé numéro un, profite de la notoriété des clients de Jake Gregorian, avocat charismatique, pour faire grimper l'audimat. Ensemble, ces as de la manipulation influencent l'opinion publique et contrôlent les gros titres du pays, à défaut de maîtriser leur attirance mutuelle.

1.title: FR - Notorious - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: The number one cable news program in the country, learns internet mogul Oscar Keaton has been issued an arrest warrant for fleeing the crime scene of a hit-and-run. She wants the exclusive scoop on the high-profile story, and, during a live interview, it looks like she’s blindsiding the mogul’s lawyer and friend, Jake Gregorian.

1.title: FR - Notorious - S01E02 - The Perp Walk
1.plot: As Sarah’s funeral approaches, Jake’s feelings may be clouding his ability to defend and protect an out-of-control Oscar from the press. Julia wants to locate Sarah’s brother and only living family, to give Sarah a voice as well as to get an exclusive scoop on an alleged family argument. Also, Jake takes on a baby kidnapping and the mother’s appearance on LHL uncovers an unexpected lead.

1.title: FR - Notorious - S01E03 - Friends and Other Strangers
1.plot: When a beloved rock star/humanitarian falls into a coma, Julia puts her job on the line to air a tape showing him taking advantage of a woman backstage at one of his concerts. Jake represents the woman who gave the controversy-stirring tape to LHL. Meanwhile, Louise is uncharacteristically unnerved by a news story; Ella helps Ryan track the origins of the mysterious photos sent to Julia; and stunning news is revealed about Oscar during an interview with Sarah's brother.

1.title: FR - Notorious - S01E04 - Tell Me a Secret
1.plot: After Megan provides Julia with breaking news about a murdered college football player, a young man is accused of killing the student via an app which allows users to broadcast anonymous messages. Jake decides to take on the case once he learns the suspect is the son of a high school friend. Meanwhile, Levi is troubled by photos and information revealed during Oscar's interview from jail,

1.title: FR - Notorious - S01E05 - Missing
1.plot: Jake and Julia search for the biological parents of an unborn baby. Meanwhile, Julia worries if a scathing LHL interview triggered a horrific incident; and Oscar learns the truth about Sarah and Jake's affair.

1.title: FR - Notorious - S01E06 - Kept and Broken
1.plot: After his affair with Sarah is exposed on live TV, Jake learns a troubling secret about his former lover and is blindsided by new allegations. Meanwhile, the media fervor over a wealthy missing girl prompts Julia to undertake a personal search for a lesser-known victim whose life is in danger.

1.title: FR - Notorious - S01E07 - Chase
1.plot: After Jake’s dramatic arrest on LHL for Sarah’s murder, he seeks refuge from the paparazzi at Julia’s home while Bradley and Ella work frantically to clear his name. Later, Jake discovers a terrible truth and goes to great lengths to find the person he now suspects is the real killer.

1.title: FR - Notorious - S01E08 - The Burn Book
1.plot: Disgraced and former TV news host Dana Hartman turns to Julia and Jake for help when her rebellious daughter becomes a suspect in the murder of her aspiring filmmaker boyfriend. Singer and reality-star Ray J gets caught up in the case when he announces the murder weapon belonged to him.

1.title: FR - Notorious - S01E09 - Choice
1.plot: Jake furiously works different angles of the murder case against Maya Hartman, daughter of disgraced news anchor Dana Hartman. He thinks Dana could help by pleading her daughter’s case on LHL, even though Louise hijacked a previous interview by showing a sex tape of Dana with Maya’s boyfriend. Max is against Louise and Julia’s dangerous and clandestine trip to Mexico to get the LHL exclusive with drug kingpin Carlos Mora aka “El Toro.”

meta.plot:
Jane Porter est inspecteur à la police de New York. Elle est fiancée à un collègue, Michael Foster, et sa jeune sœur, Nicki, la rejoint pour ses études.

Un jour, lors d’une intervention, elle rencontre un homme que son oncle prétend fou et arriéré car il l’a sauvé de la jungle où il a vécu pendant presque 25 ans. Le prétendu muet se met à parler à Jane, à travers la paroi de verre de sa cage.

John Clayton, dit Tarzan, résiste à son oncle pour obtenir sa liberté. Il est au-dessus des mesquineries de ce dernier qui ne pense qu’à obtenir ses actions et ses voix au conseil d’administration de la Greystocke Industries.

Heureusement, Jane va s’intéresser au jeune homme, même après l’incident entre lui et Michael, à qui cela va coûter la vie. Elle va tenter de l’aider à gagner son autonomie et sa liberté avec l’aide de sa tante, Kathleen Clayton.

1.title: FR - Jane et Tarzan - S01E01 - Pilot (1)
1.plot: Strong-willed NYPD detective Jane Porter's perfectly ordered life turns upside down when a routine case unexpectedly leads her to primal and passionate Tarzan, now loose in the urban jungles of New York City. After plucking the mysterious feral man from his wild home, Tarzan's billionaire uncle, the CEO of powerful Greystoke Industries, stops at nothing to "civilize" Tarzan in his own image.

1.title: FR - Jane et Tarzan - S01E02 - Secrets and Lies (2)
1.plot: Tarzan risks exposure when he assists Jane with a police case, helping her find a group of men responsible for attacking a young woman in Central Park.  When Jane's fianc' Michael discovers that Tarzan is alive, he makes a deal with Richard Clayton , offering to help capture his nephew. Meanwhile, Jane contacts Tarzan's aunt, Kathleen Clayton in hopes that she will offer Tarzan shelter and protection.

1.title: FR - Jane et Tarzan - S01E03 - Wages of Sin
1.plot: Jane and Sam hit a dead-end while investigating a young boy's  disappearance, and Jane enlists Tarzan's help to use his extraordinary tracking skills to find the child. When Sam learns of Tarzan's involvement and his role in Michael's  death, he must decide whether to turn him in or keep Jane's secret.

1.title: FR - Jane et Tarzan - S01E04 - Rules of Engagement
1.plot: Richard Claytons fears come true as he discovers that his estranged sister Kathleen is harboring Tarzan and thinks that she is not only after Tarzan's share of the family fortune, but also control of Greystoke Industries. Meanwhile, Jane attempts to stop the sole witness to Michael's death from testifying and possibly incriminating Tarzan before Richard can get to him.

1.title: FR - Jane et Tarzan - S01E05 - Emotional Rescue
1.plot: When a friend of Jane's sister Nicki goes missing, they suspect a man she met over the Internet may be responsible. Meanwhile, as the search for Michael's killer continues, Jane begs Tarzan to keep out of sight for his own safety, but when Nicki lands in grave danger, Tarzan finds it impossible not to help.

1.title: FR - Jane et Tarzan - S01E06 - Surrender
1.plot: The lone witness to Michael's death is coerced by Richard to come forward to name Tarzan as the one responsible for the crime, incriminating Jane as well. While Kathleen contemplates giving Richard her shares of Greystoke Industries in exchange for Tarzan's safety, Tarzan considers returning to the jungle.

1.title: FR - Jane et Tarzan - S01E07 - For Love of Country
1.plot: When Tarzan and Jane flee into the mountains to escape the vengeful cops seeking to arrest them, a car accident leaves them stranded in the woods where Jane must place her trust in Tarzan and rely on his jungle skills to survive.

1.title: FR - Jane et Tarzan - S01E08 - The End of the Beginning
1.plot: When the police finally capture Jane, Tarzan agrees to turn himself in to Richard in exchange for Jane's safety and freedom. With Tarzan in his clutches, Richard attempts to have him declared legally insane so that he can claim legal custody of him and his Greystoke shares. Meanwhile, Kathleen fights to free them both.

1.title: FR - Enjoy ! - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Enjoy ! - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Enjoy ! - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Enjoy ! - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Enjoy ! - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Enjoy ! - S01E06 - Episode 6

meta.plot: Abel, livreur à vélo pour l’appli Enjoy!, Igor, jeune avocat, Yass, stagiaire dans une chaîne info prête à tout pour le scoop : trois destins qui, sans vraiment le vouloir, vont se téléscoper sous le rouleau compresseur d’une société dont le tout, tout de suite, est le moteur principal.

1.title: FR - The Mist - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: When the residents of Bridgeville, Maine find themselves engulfed by a foreboding mist containing a myriad of inexplicable and bizarre threats, their humanity is put to the test. What will people do to survive when blinded by fear?

1.title: FR - The Mist - S01E02 - Withdrawal
1.plot: The Mist has settled over town as Eve, Alex, and other mallgoers try to manage the rising panic. Meanwhile, Kevin, Adrian, Mia, and Jonah venture out into the mist to get to Kevin's family.

1.title: FR - The Mist - S01E03 - Show and Tell
1.plot: At the church, Connor locks up Mia, Jonah and Kevin in the basement. Back at the mall, Jay confronts Alex to try and convince her he didn't rape her.

1.title: FR - The Mist - S01E04 - Pequod
1.plot: Kevin, Mia, Jonah, and Adrian arrive at an abandoned gas station where Kevin tries to reason with Clay amid fears of the wherabouts of his child. At the mall bookstore, Alex comes face to face with the Mist.

1.title: FR - The Mist - S01E05 - The Waiting Room
1.plot: Kevin and the others reach the hospital, where Kevin has an unexpected and painful encounter with his brother, Mike.

1.title: FR - The Mist - S01E06 - The Devil You Know
1.plot: At the hospital, Kevin becomes an involuntary test subject on what drives the Mist; after Nathalie discusses her theories about "The Black Spring," she has a violent encounter with Link.

1.title: FR - The Mist - S01E07 - Over the River and Through the Woods
1.plot: The gang finds unlikely sanctuary in the psych wing of the hospital; tensions at the mall escalate about the remaining food rations; Nathalie and Romanov have a final confrontation.

1.title: FR - The Mist - S01E08 - The Law of Nature
1.plot: Nathalie gains full control of the remaining parishioners; at the mall, Alex and Jay continue to grow closer until Eve intervenes; Adrian and the gang make a stop at Adrian's home; Kevin makes a shocking discovery.

1.title: FR - The Mist - S01E09 - The Waking Dream
1.plot: Adrian, Mia and Jonah return with somber news; an enraged Kevin heads toward the mall with Vic; the group at the mall turns on Alex and Eve.

1.title: FR - The Mist - S01E10 - The Tenth Meal
1.plot: Tensions at the mall finally come to head, and the group makes a discovery which could provide answers about the origins of the mist.

meta.plot: Adaptation du roman homonyme de Stephen King, dans lequel un groupe de personnes est bloqué dans un supermarché à cause d'une brume surnaturelle dans laquelle se cachent d'horribles créatures.

Agathe Koltès, commandant de police de 50 ans, belle, drôle et charismatique, débarque à Vannes pour y prendre ses nouvelles fonctions, précédée de sa réputation de grand flic. Mais ses nouveaux collègues ignorent qu’elle est la mère de Mathilde Sirach, la toute jeune commissaire de 30 ans qui a tenté en vain de s’opposer à son arrivée. Les retrouvailles de la mère et la fille sont orageuses et Mathilde ordonne à Agathe de garder le secret sur leur lien de famille pour ne pas compliquer sa vie au commissariat. Et si Agathe mène les enquêtes, la patronne c'est Mathilde ! Entre gravité, humour et émotion, elles vont apprendre à se redécouvrir au fil des affaires qu'elles vont devoir résoudre ensemble, entre terre et mer, Bretagne oblige !

1.title: FR - Agathe Koltès - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Agathe Koltès - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Agathe Koltès - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Agathe Koltès - S01E04 - Episode 4
