meta.plot: Une jeune femme, inspecteur de police, découvre qu'elle peut communiquer  avec son père, mort 20 ans plus tôt, grâce à un transmetteur de radio.

1.title: FR - Frequency - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: When Detective Raimy Sullivan discovers that she can communicate with her deceased father on an old ham radio, she warns him of events that will lead to his death so he can circumvent his fate.

1.title: FR - Frequency - S01E02 - Signal and Noise
1.plot: When Raimy and Frank speak over the ham-radio and she lets him know that her mom will be murdered unless Frank can figure out a way to warn her, she also delivers devastating news regarding Stan Moreno. Meanwhile, in 2016, Raimy follows a lead in the Nightingale case, and in 1996, Frank and Satch work together to follow the same lead.

1.title: FR - Frequency - S01E03 - The Near Far Problem
1.plot: When Raimy uncovers evidence in the Thomas Goff case, she relays this information to Frank over the ham radio, which prompts him to take matters into his own hands while ignoring a strong warning from Satch. Meanwhile, Gordo talks Raimy into going out for a drink where she has an interesting encounter with Daniel, who still considers her a complete stranger and possible stalker. Lastly, Raimy struggles to adapt to life without Julie, and Frank tries to adapt to life with her.

1.title: FR - Frequency - S01E04 - Bleed Over
1.plot: With the date of Julie’s abduction rapidly approaching, Raimy and Frank each work to gather information from a girl whose mother was taken by the Nightingale. Meanwhile, Raimy meets Kyle who immediately remembers her from a brief encounter in the past. She doesn’t recognize him at first, but flashes of their night together come rushing back to her.

1.title: FR - Frequency - S01E05 - Seven Three
1.plot: When Frank helps Raimy uncover clues from the past to help solve a present day murder case, it brings up two different memories of her first day in the NYPD. Through Frank, Raimy continues to learn more about Stan which begins to cause friction with Satch. Meanwhile, Frank has trouble controlling his jealousy as he struggles to give Julie her space.

1.title: FR - Frequency - S01E06 - Deviation
FR - Frequency - S01E07 - Break, Break, Break
1.plot: Raimy and Satch’s detective work begins to pay off when a cold case victim leads them to their biggest break; a room where the Nightingale held his first victim.

1.title: FR - Frequency - S01E08 - Interference
1.plot: Raimy and Satch  discover a shocking connection to the Nightingale’s first kill. When Raimy shares this news with Frank, he works to dig up additional information. Meanwhile, Frank and Julie are forced to have an honest conversation, and Raimy has a surprise visitor.

1.title: FR - Frequency - S01E09 - Gray Line
1.plot: Raimy and Frank make a startling discovery about the Nightingale.

1.title: FR - Frequency - S01E10 - The Edison Effect
1.plot: Frank and Raimy put a plan in motion for Frank to kill the Nightingale.

1.title: FR - Frequency - S01E11 - Negative Copy
1.plot: Raimy and Frank end up in the thick of things. Meanwhile, Frank learns the meaning behind a betrayal.

1.title: FR - Frequency - S01E12 - Harmonic
1.plot: Raimy and Frank make a huge discovery while continuing their search for the Nightingale.

1.title: FR - Absurd Planet - S01E01 - Strangest Things
1.plot: Say hello to Mother Nature’s all-star cast of confounding beasts, featuring Madagascar’s own death-metal lizard: the satanic leaf-tailed gecko.

1.title: FR - Absurd Planet - S01E02 - Raging Waters
1.plot: Dive into an undersea world that's swimming with flirty amphibians, fishy friends, and sea-slug vacuums that keep things clean.

1.title: FR - Absurd Planet - S01E03 - Mate Expectations
1.plot: Time to talk about the birds, the bees and all the other animals with strange mating rituals. When two scorpions make love, it’s anything but lovely.

1.title: FR - Absurd Planet - S01E04 - The Cycle of Life
1.plot: For Earth’s largest rodent, life’s a beach. For mayflies, it lasts only one day. What counts isn’t quantity, but quality — and occasional cannibalism.

1.title: FR - Absurd Planet - S01E05 - H2 wOah
1.plot: Bizarre dramas unfold in the world’s wet and wild oceans, including a leopard seal and a crustacean that team up to ruin an octopus's day.

1.title: FR - Absurd Planet - S01E06 - Extremeliest
1.plot: The miraculous Jesus Christ lizard and goo-spewing bombardier beetle stand out among nature’s oldest, fastest and just plain kookiest creatures.

1.title: FR - Absurd Planet - S01E07 - The Flight Stuff
1.plot: Take to the skies to discover amazing murmurations of starlings and adorably pudgy puffins. Don’t mind the flying snakes, those wingless weirdos.

1.title: FR - Absurd Planet - S01E08 - Eat Prey Live
1.plot: A butterfly that drinks turtle tears is just one of many organisms with unusual appetites and even odder methods of hunting and digesting their food.

1.title: FR - Absurd Planet - S01E09 - Fights Camera Action
1.plot: Get ready for a rumble in the jungle. Whether clawing, crashing or headbanging, animal gladiators like to fight if love or status is on the line.

1.title: FR - Absurd Planet - S01E10 - Strangerer Things
1.plot: The parade of curiosities kicks off with a tiny lizard that fits on a fingertip and monkeys with huge noses. Some Hawaiian sand is fish poop — fact.

1.title: FR - Absurd Planet - S01E11 - We're All the Same
1.plot: Humans share a surprising number of traits with their critter kin, such as using tools, yawning, soaking in saunas and flipping real estate.

1.title: FR - Absurd Planet - S01E12 - Absurd is the Word
1.plot: Did you know goats speak in different regional dialects? Incredible facts about everyday animals lead to one conclusion: being different is awesome.

meta.plot: Racontée par Dame Nature et sa troupe d'étranges créatures, cette série scientifique offre un aperçu humoristique du quotidien des animaux les plus incroyables au monde.

1.title: FR - Country Comfort - S01E01 - Crazy
1.plot: Harmony leads to heartache as aspiring singer Bailey's big break falls to pieces. But a chance encounter on a stormy night leads to new possibilities.

1.title: FR - Country Comfort - S01E02 - Teardrops on My Guitar
1.plot: As Bailey settles in over breakfast, Dylan kick-starts his career as her new manager. Will a last-minute audition lead to stardom... or serious drama?

1.title: FR - Country Comfort - S01E03 - Sign, Sign, Everywhere a Sign
1.plot: Beau and the kids get cleaned up for a church wedding — and encounter an unexpected guest at the house. Meanwhile, Cassidy struggles with her faith.

1.title: FR - Country Comfort - S01E04 - My Girl
1.plot: Bailey and the Haywoods make the best of bittersweet news as Beau prepares to replace his late wife's mare. Brody reconnects with an old friend.

1.title: FR - Country Comfort - S01E05 - Blue
1.plot: While Tuck and Brody struggle with sibling rivalry, Bailey struggles to balance a big audition and a LeAnn Rimes concert with Cassidy.

1.title: FR - Country Comfort - S01E06 - Summer Lovin'
1.plot: Beau and Summer's relationship takes center stage after she asks him to spend the night. Elsewhere, Brody and Tuck prepare for a double date night.

1.title: FR - Country Comfort - S01E07 - You're Nobody Till Somebody Loves You
1.plot: On the heels of exciting news, Bailey struggles to keep her past out of her present and future. Meanwhile, Beau navigates a bad case of heartache.

1.title: FR - Country Comfort - S01E08 - Back in the Saddle Again
1.plot: Boone's big ask leads to a big answer. The following morning, Beau tries to minimize his birthday, much to the dismay of Bailey and the kids.

1.title: FR - Country Comfort - S01E09 - You Matter to Me
1.plot: It's lights, camera, action for Bailey as a Rocky Top Records film crew stops by the ranch… and encounters a less-than-cinematic day of disaster.

1.title: FR - Country Comfort - S01E10 - Bless the Broken Road
1.plot: Bailey's time to shine finally arrives - but the Haywoods aren't ready to say goodbye. Brody revisits his feelings for Jo, and Boone drops a bombshell.

meta.plot: Alors que sa carrière et sa vie privée déraillent, Bailey, une chanteuse de country en herbe accepte de travailler comme baby-sitter pour Beau, un cowboy endurci et ses cinq enfants. Grâce à sa persévérance et son charme, cette apprentie nounou parvient à trouver sa place dans le foyer et à combler l'absence de la figure maternelle. À sa plus grande surprise, Bailey trouve également dans cette famille mélomane le groupe qui lui manquait pour la remettre sur la voie de la célébrité.
Les univers s'entrechoquent lors de cet événement spécial issu de quatre séries comiques mêlant visages connus, apparitions surprise et esprit de compétition.

1.title: FR - GAME ON: A Comedy Crossover Event - S01E01 - The Big Show Show: The Big Games
1.plot: The Big Show and his daughters do their best to help Cassy triumph over an arch-frenemy in a series of seriously silly family vs. family games.

1.title: FR - GAME ON: A Comedy Crossover Event - S01E02 - Mr. Iglesias: Olympic Effort
1.plot: Inspired by the Olympics, Mr. Iglesias teaches his class about privilege — and the importance of playing by the rules — during an SAT prep class.

1.title: FR - GAME ON: A Comedy Crossover Event - S01E03 - Ashley Garcia: Pasadena 2020
1.plot: Tensions mount as Tío Victor fights to reclaim his burrito recipe from a cross-town rival. Can a series of Coffee House Games put an end to the drama?

1.title: FR - GAME ON: A Comedy Crossover Event - S01E04 - Family Reunion: Remember the Family's Feud?
1.plot: The competition between the McKellans and their longtime rivals, the McCoys, heats up at the Columbus Country Games ... until the grandbabies go missing.

meta.plot: Petit lama, adorable personnage d'une série de livres pour enfants, prend vie dans cette chaleureuse série sur la famille, l'amitié et l'apprentissage des plus petits.

1.title: FR - Llama Llama - S01E01 - Zoom! Zoom! Zoom!
1.plot: Llama and Grandpa gear up for the town's annual Fast Forward Derby.

1.title: FR - Llama Llama - S01E02 - Lost Tooth
1.plot: When Llama loses his tooth, Mama helps him retrace his steps.

1.title: FR - Llama Llama - S01E03 - Last Day of Summer
1.plot: Llama and the gang get creative when weather ruins their last-day-of-summer plans.

1.title: FR - Llama Llama - S01E04 - Bully Goat
1.plot: Gilroy Goat's "goofing around" goes a bit too far for his friends.

1.title: FR - Llama Llama - S01E05 - Forgotten Fuzzy
1.plot: Llama forgets to bring his favorite stuffed animal to a sleepover at Gram and Grandpa's.

1.title: FR - Llama Llama - S01E06 - Home with Mama
1.plot: A bad cold keeps Llama home from school.

1.title: FR - Llama Llama - S01E07 - Llama Llama Red Pajama
1.plot: Llama has trouble saying goodnight after a special day with Mama.

1.title: FR - Llama Llama - S01E08 - Time to Share
1.plot: A playdate with Nelly Gnu teaches Llama an important lesson about sharing.

1.title: FR - Llama Llama - S01E09 - Llama Llama Shopping Drama
1.plot: A marathon shopping day with Mama leads to major drama at the grocery store.

1.title: FR - Llama Llama - S01E10 - Lucky Pajamas
1.plot: Llama's convinced that his red pajamas bring him luck.

1.title: FR - Llama Llama - S01E11 - Snow Show
1.plot: Llama's asked to judge a snow sculpture contest ... but that means choosing between his friends' designs!

1.title: FR - Llama Llama - S01E12 - Secret Santa
1.plot: The kids at school play Secret Santa.

1.title: FR - Llama Llama - S01E13 - Spring Fever
1.plot: It's the first day of spring, and Llama's already overscheduled.

1.title: FR - Llama Llama - S01E14 - Happy Birthday Llama Llama
1.plot: Llama's friends seem too busy to play ... but he's in for a surprise!

1.title: FR - Llama Llama - S01E15 - Llama Llama Lemonade
1.plot: A heat wave prompts Llama to open a lemonade stand.

meta.plot: Des images et des séquences exaltantes d'animaux rarement observés, mais aussi la dure réalité de l'impact qu'a l'homme sur les habitats et les espèces de notre planète.

1.title: FR - Our Planet - S01E01 - One Planet
1.plot: Witness the planet's breathtaking diversity -- from seabirds carpet-bombing the ocean to wildebeests eluding the wild dogs of the Serengeti.

1.title: FR - Our Planet - S01E02 - Frozen Worlds
1.plot: On the unforgiving frontier of climate change, polar bears, walruses, seals and penguins find their icy Edens in peril.

1.title: FR - Our Planet - S01E03 - Jungles
1.plot: Jungles and rainforests are home to an incredible variety of species like preening birds, intelligent orangutans and remarkable ambitious ants.

1.title: FR - Our Planet - S01E04 - Coastal Seas
1.plot: From fearsome sharks to lowly urchins, 90 percent of marine creatures live in coastal waters. Protecting these habitats is a battle humanity must win.

1.title: FR - Our Planet - S01E05 - From Deserts to Grasslands
1.plot: Cameras follow desert elephants seeking sustenance, bison roaming North America grasslands and caterpillars living the good life underground.

1.title: FR - Our Planet - S01E06 - The High Seas
1.plot: Venture into the deep, dark and desolate oceans that are home to an abundance of beautiful -- and downright strange -- creatures.

1.title: FR - Our Planet - S01E07 - Fresh Water
1.plot: The need for fresh water is as strong as ever. However, the supply is becoming increasingly unpredictable for all manner of species.

1.title: FR - Our Planet - S01E08 - Forests
1.plot: Examine the fragile interdependence that exists between forests' wide variety of residents, including bald eagles, hunting dogs and Siberian tigers.

2.title: FR - Our Planet - S02E01 - Chapter 1: World on the Move
2.plot: Be it buffalo, polar bears, humpback whales or albatross chicks, migration is a vital survival strategy for animals to feed, reproduce and find homes.

2.title: FR - Our Planet - S02E02 - Chapter 2: Following the Sun
2.plot: As summer spreads across our solar-powered planet, honey bees toil, snow geese breed, tadpoles awaken and lions stalk wildebeest in search of lush grass.

2.title: FR - Our Planet - S02E03 - Chapter 3: The Next Generation
2.plot: Left to fend for themselves until they find their footing, baby sea turtles, elephant seal pups, pumas and crabs bravely trek towards adolescence.

2.title: FR - Our Planet - S02E04 - Chapter 4: Freedom to Roam
2.plot: As snow geese, antelope, army ants and gray whales dodge predators and pollution, get a closer look at how the modern world impacts animal migration.

meta.plot: Kwai Chang Caine retrouve la trace de son fils Peter Caine, qui est devenu flic. Ensemble, ils vont faire équipe pour résoudre des enquêtes...

1.title: FR - Kung Fu [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Initiation (1)
1.plot: Shaolin priest Kwai Chang Caine reunites with his long-lost son, detective Peter Caine.

1.title: FR - Kung Fu [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Initiation (2)
1.plot: Kwai Chang and Peter team up to fight an old enemy of the Caines' who is taking over Chinatown.

1.title: FR - Kung Fu [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Shadow Assassin
1.plot: The Caines help the author of a book about a Shaolin cult when his friends start turning up dead.

1.title: FR - Kung Fu [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Sunday at the Hotel with George
1.plot: Kwai Chang and Peter encounter a gang of thieves during a wedding reception.

1.title: FR - Kung Fu [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Sacred Trust
1.plot: A thug is murdered after threatening a student, and Kwai Chang is charged.

1.title: FR - Kung Fu [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Force of Habit
1.plot: Kwai Chang helps a physically abused wife who happens to be married to Peter's new work partner.

1.title: FR - Kung Fu [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - Pai Gow
1.plot: When losers at high-stakes pai gow are murdered, the Caines go under cover.

1.title: FR - Kung Fu [VOSTFR] - S01E08 - Challenge
1.plot: Kwai Chang's nemesis, the crime lord Tan, returns to Chinatown.

1.title: FR - Kung Fu [VOSTFR] - S01E09 - Disciple
1.plot: Kwai Chang's student is involved with an illegal fight ring

1.title: FR - Kung Fu [VOSTFR] - S01E10 - Rain's Only Friend
1.plot: Peter questions his vocation after he accidentally shoots a bystander.

1.title: FR - Kung Fu [VOSTFR] - S01E11 - Secret Place
1.plot: A maniac holds a busload of high-schoolers hostage.

1.title: FR - Kung Fu [VOSTFR] - S01E12 - Dragon's Eye
1.plot: A survivalist kills any encroachers, barring the Caines from a rare medicinal plant.

1.title: FR - Kung Fu [VOSTFR] - S01E13 - Blind Eye
1.plot: Capt. Blaisdell's blind wife is brutally beaten; later her attacker stalks her again.

2.title: FR - Kung Fu [VOSTFR] - S02E01 - Return of the Shadow Assassin
2.plot: Alone, Peter must face the Shadow Assassin, who can kill with his thoughts.

2.title: FR - Kung Fu [VOSTFR] - S02E02 - May I Ride with You
2.plot: Caine asks Peter if he can spend the day with him, wanting to see how Peter spends a normal day.   Guest Stars- Natalie Radford, Henry Czerny, and Dominic Zamprogna.   Special Guest Star- Regis Philbin

2.title: FR - Kung Fu [VOSTFR] - S02E03 - Dragon's Daughter
2.plot: Tan's daughter has returned to Chinatown and is stalking young men in order to flush out her father's killer, Kwai Chang Caine.  It is up to Peter and Caine to stop her.   Guest Stars-Marla Suchantza, Jonathan Whittakar, and Sam Malkin.

2.title: FR - Kung Fu [VOSTFR] - S02E04 - An Ancient Lottery
2.plot: The Ancient wins the lottery with a ticket given to him as a goodwill gesture by a greedy developer and upcoming politician.  Now Tan wants it.   Guest Stars-Chuck Shamata, Joel Wyner, Amanda Tapping, and James Spiddel.

2.title: FR - Kung Fu [VOSTFR] - S02E05 - Laurie's Friend
2.plot: Peter enlists the help of a young girl, who is psychic, to help find a gun that has been used in the murder of a cop.  Caine discovers the girl has a psychic protector --- another Caine!   Guest Stars-James Purcell, Heather Brown, and Linda Thomson.

2.title: FR - Kung Fu [VOSTFR] - S02E06 - Temple
2.plot: Caine and Peter return to Braniff, wherein lies the temple were Peter grew up.  They meet the widow of one of the priests from the temple.  She needs their help since some very familiar townspeople are harrassing her and her son.   Guest Stars-Kerrie Keane, Christopher Redman, Kevin Jubenville, Colin Fox, and Robert Collins.

2.title: FR - Kung Fu [VOSTFR] - S02E07 - Only the Strong Survive
2.plot: Peter goes undercover in a Kung Fu tournament to help save a little girl who has been kidnapped.   Guest Stars-Bo Svenson, Alex Carter, and Christine Reeves.

2.title: FR - Kung Fu [VOSTFR] - S02E08 - Out of the Woods
2.plot: Peter takes a few days off work, and he and his father go camping.  They come across a group of lost campers and an escaped criminal and his sons.

2.title: FR - Kung Fu [VOSTFR] - S02E09 - Tournament
2.plot: An industrialist, who holds a grudge against Caine, sponsors a martial arts tournament.  When Caine enters the tournament, Peter follows him, on a special undercover assignment.

2.title: FR - Kung Fu [VOSTFR] - S02E10 - The Bardo
2.plot: Peter is wounded in the line of duty, but he cannot be operated on, because his  life signs are fluctuating.  Caine finds out that Peter's soul is being held in the Bardo, an in-between realm of memories, including those of Caine abandoning Peter.

2.title: FR - Kung Fu [VOSTFR] - S02E11 - The Possessed
2.plot: The Church is trying to exorcise a man who is possessed. However, something goes wrong and the demon possesses other people, instead. Somehow, Caine gets involved and tries to help a troubled man who has been possessed.

2.title: FR - Kung Fu [VOSTFR] - S02E12 - Warlord
2.plot: To save his father who is  dying, a Chinese warlord  insists that Caine use his healing skills to cure the warlord's father.

2.title: FR - Kung Fu [VOSTFR] - S02E13 - The Innocent
2.plot: Caine is one of the jurors in a murder trial.  He is the only juror who believes that the defendent is innocent.

meta.plot: Il y a dix ans, un mystérieux artefact se nommant « Pandora Box » a été trouvé sur Mars avant d'être ramené sur Terre. Mais lors d'une conférence pour présenter sa découverte, la Pandora Box fut activée et un mur tomba du ciel pour diviser le Japon en trois régions : Seito à l'ouest, Hokuto au nord, et Touto à l'est.

1.title: FR - Kamen Rider Build [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Kamen Rider Build Chapter
1.plot: Sento Kiryu demonstrates how he transforms into Kamen Rider Build Rabbit/Tank Form and introduces his new Best Match: Build Gorilla/Mond Form.

1.title: FR - Kamen Rider Build [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Night Rogue Chapter
1.plot: Gentoku Himuro films a FausTube video in their secret lab base showing his viewers three things: his transformation into Night Rogue, the combination of the Transteam Gun and the Steam Blade: the Steam Rifle, and the Steam Rifle's finisher: Steam Shot with a Faust Bottle.

1.title: FR - Kamen Rider Build [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Night Rogue Chapter
1.plot: Gentoku Himuro films a FausTube video in their secret lab base showing his viewers three things: his transformation into Night Rogue, the combination of the Transteam Gun and the Steam Blade: the Steam Rifle, and the Steam Rifle's finisher: Steam Shot with a Faust Bottle.

1.title: FR - Kamen Rider Build [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Kamen Rider Cross-Z Chapter
1.plot: Ryuga Banjo demonstrates how to transform into Kamen Rider Cross-Z and use the Dragonic Finish. However, the simulation come to a close as Ryuga's trousers are unexpectedly ripped.

meta.plot: En acceptant un poste à la prison de Tihar, un agent intègre promet de rétablir la justice face à la corruption effroyable qu’il y découvre.

1.title: FR - Black Warrant : En sursis [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - The Snake
1.plot: In 1981, Sunil Kumar Gupta joins Tihar Jail as a warden and learns more about its workings from DSP Rajesh Tomar. A surprise inspection leads to chaos.

1.title: FR - Black Warrant : En sursis [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Gallows
1.plot: As a death warrant is issued against prisoners Ranga and Billa, journalist Pratibha Sen seeks to interview them. Sunil makes a statement to the media.

1.title: FR - Black Warrant : En sursis [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Macho
1.plot: An investigation into a jailbreak holds Mangat responsible. Meanwhile, Sunil learns more about the inmates who call Tihar home.

1.title: FR - Black Warrant : En sursis [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Team Player
1.plot: When an incident sparks a gang war, Tomar urges the Haddis and Tyagis to reconcile. Dahiya harbors a secret that later leads to a brawl with Sunil.

1.title: FR - Black Warrant : En sursis [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Prison Food
1.plot: Sunil pushes for legal aid reforms for prisoners, but an irate Tomar decides to punish him, even as both grapple with personal troubles.

1.title: FR - Black Warrant : En sursis [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - The Blanket
1.plot: The prisoners stage a hunger strike amidst poor living conditions. A high-profile inmate faces execution. Sunil makes a shocking discovery.

1.title: FR - Black Warrant : En sursis [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - Double Life Sentence
1.plot: As nationwide riots break out, the prison falls into disarray and Tomar's leadership is questioned. Sobhraj asks Sunil for a favor.

1.title: FR - Demande aux étoiles [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Coming from two different backgrounds, Gong Ryong and Eve Kim embark on a space mission. But trouble strikes after launch, jeopardizing their expedition.

1.title: FR - Demande aux étoiles [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Upon arriving in space, Ryong panics as Eve threatens to ruin his secret mission. Shortly after, a crisis emerges, forcing Ryong to attempt a novel feat.

meta.plot: Issus de deux mondes différents et investis de missions distinctes, une astronaute et un touriste se rencontrent dans l'espace… et ne tardent pas à s'éprendre l'un de l'autre.
À Tokyo en 1979, quatre sœurs en apparence heureuses découvrent la liaison de leur père vieillissant et libèrent des émotions longtemps refoulées.

1.title: FR - Asura [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: One wintry morning, the usually reserved Takiko calls her three sisters for a meeting, sharing shocking news about their father's affair.

1.title: FR - Asura [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Troubled by the news, Makiko has an ominous dream. The sisters find a letter about the affair in the local newspaper — but who could have written it?

1.title: FR - Asura [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Sakiko deals with a painful betrayal, Takiko falls in love, Tsunako's affair takes a dangerous turn and Makiko catches their mother somewhere surprising.

1.title: FR - Asura [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: When Kotaro accidentally starts a fire, the sisters return to their childhood home to manage the aftermath with plenty of bickering and laughter.

1.title: FR - Asura [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Chaos erupts and egos flare as Kotaro takes a lodger, Tsunako meets her son's fiancée, Makiko confronts suspicions, and the family gathers for a wedding.

1.title: FR - Asura [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: While Sakiko struggles with Hide's erratic behavior, Makiko tries to distract herself by arranging a marriage partner for the reluctant Tsunako.

1.title: FR - Asura [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: As unexpected situations spiral out of control, can the Takezawa sisters put aside their differences and long-standing tensions to support each other?

1.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: During the early years of the Revolutionary War, a Long Island farmer is recruited to spy on the British army.

1.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S01E02 - Who by Fire
1.plot: To prevent Anna being blamed for the murder of a Royal Officer, Abe must find the culprit; Ben and Caleb interrogate Simcoe.

1.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S01E03 - Of Cabbages and Kings
1.plot: On the run from the British, Ben is betrayed by his own militia. Abe travels with Richard to New York to spy. Mary confronts Anna.

1.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S01E04 - Eternity How Long
1.plot: Abe and Richard grapple with orders to dig up gravestones; Ben and Caleb try to get their intelligence to General Washington.

1.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S01E05 - Epiphany
1.plot: Celeb and Ben follow mysterious orders; Washington's army crosses into enemy territory.

1.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S01E06 - Mr. Culpeper
1.plot: Abe heads to New York and runs into a desperate patriot along the way. Ben is tasked with creating America's first spy ring.

1.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S01E07 - Mercy Moment Murder Measure
1.plot: An old threatening presence returns to Setauket, worrying Abe that Anna is no longer protected.

1.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S01E08 - Challenge
1.plot: Anna looks for enemy intelligence at an exclusive gentleman's party against Abe's wishes.

1.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S01E09 - Against Thy Neighbor
1.plot: Simcoe tries to hunt out the rebel conspirators in Setauket. Ben is sent away on a secret mission.

1.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S01E10 - The Battle of Setauket
1.plot: Mary struggles when she realizes that Abe is a spy working for the other side. Ben and Caleb hope to save Patriot families when they carry out a raid on Setauket.

2.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S02E01 - Thoughts of a Free Man
2.plot: A spy in London sends an urgent message to America. Mary impedes Abe's attempt to restart the spy ring. Benedict Arnold arrives in camp.

2.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S02E02 - Hard Boiled
2.plot: Abe gathers intelligence in New York. Simcoe escapes his punishment. John André attends a ball in Philadelphia and meets Peggy Shippen.

2.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S02E03 - False Flag
2.plot: Ben sets a trap to capture a traitor in camp. Richard discovers Abe is conspiring with Major Hewlett. Caleb collides with Robert Rogers.

2.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S02E04 - Men of Blood
2.plot: Abe tries to recruit a new agent; Caleb and Rogers race to hunt down intelligence from London; Andre's history is exposed.

2.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S02E05 - Sealed Fate
2.plot: Abe makes one last effort to recruit a spy inside New York. Ben must determine who is a double agent.

2.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S02E06 - Houses Divided
2.plot: Anna, Ben, and Caleb devise ways of rescuing the abducted Major Hewlett. Mary attempts to motivate Judge Woodhull into action.

2.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S02E07 - Valley Forge
2.plot: George Washington teeters on the edge of madness. Abe and Hewlett endure great hardships at the hands of their respective captors, though the latter's ends unexpectedly.

2.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S02E08 - Providence
2.plot: The French join the fray. Caleb makes an uncomfortable trip and Abe makes an even more uncomfortable choice. Robert Rodgers finds himself unexpectedly unemployed.

2.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S02E09 - The Prodigal
2.plot: Abe returns from prison with critical intel. Tensions rise between Hewlett and Simcoe. Arnold rescues Peggy from a rebel mob.

2.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S02E10 - Gunpowder, Treason, and Plot
2.plot: Abe plots to assassinate Major Hewlett, then receives a proposition from an unlikely ally. Ben fights at the Battle of Monmouth (June 28, 1778). Benedict Arnold continues to covet Peggy Shippen.

3.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S03E01 - Valediction
3.plot: In the third-season premiere, Abe covers up a murder with an unlikely accomplice. Elsewhere, Benedict Arnold abuses his power as he settles into a new home in Philadelphia.

3.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S03E02 - Cold Murdering Bastards
3.plot: Anna tries to save the ring after Abe's cover is blown. Benedict Arnold  seeks Washington's help against charges of treason. Townsend sends a  signal.

3.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S03E03 - Benediction
3.plot: Peggy gets Benedict Arnold to contact the British. Caleb plans an ambush for Simcoe. Anna tries to save Major Hewlett.

3.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S03E04 - Hearts and Minds
3.plot: Ben is rescued by a mysterious woman. Abe tries to stop Anna from  marrying Hewlett. Arnold begins negotiations with the British. Andre  betrays Peggy.

3.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S03E05 - Hypocrisy, Fraud, and Tyranny
3.plot: Townsend uncovers a British counterfeiting operation. Rogers threatens to destroy Abe's spying ring. Simcoe threatens Richard.

3.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S03E06 - Many Mickles Make a Muckle
3.plot: Washington goes to Benedict Arnold's Philadelphia ball. Abe tries to stop Rogers from reaching Townsend. Old friends and enemies collide.

3.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S03E07 - Judgment
3.plot: Mary attempts to kill Simcoe by herself. Benedict Arnold defends himself in his court-martial. Ben reunites with his savior.

3.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S03E08 - Mended
3.plot: The Culper Ring is resurrected in time to save Washington's army. Simcoe terrorizes Setauket as he hunts for Rogers. Anna infiltrates New York.

3.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S03E09 - Blade on the Feather
3.plot: Benedict Arnold plots to give West Point to the British. Andre negotiates for Peggy. Abe plots a revolt in Setauket.

3.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S03E10 - Trial and Execution
3.plot: The captured spies on both sides of the war head to the gallows. Benedict Arnold demands glory revenge.

4.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S04E01 - Spyhunter General
4.plot: Benedict Arnold rounds up spies in New York. Abe plots to destroy essential British supplies, but he will need his father's help.

4.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S04E02 - The Black Hole of Calcutta
4.plot: When one of the Culper Ring members is captured, Arnold seeks to interrogate him - with the help of a ruthless Colonel Simcoe.

4.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S04E03 - Blood for Blood
4.plot: Abe's scheme to rescue Caleb turns deadly. Anna faces a difficult decision. Arnold suspects Peggy is keeping a secret from him.

4.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S04E04 - Nightmare
4.plot: Amidst a growing rebellion in camp, the Culper Ring must chart a new course. Arnold finds an unlikely ally. Rivington teaches Townsend a lesson.

4.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S04E05 - Private Woodhull
4.plot: Seeking revenge against Simcoe, Abe travels to New York and meets Benedict Arnold. A visitor from Anna's past comes to the continental camp.

4.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S04E06 - Our Man in New York
4.plot: The plot to kidnap Benedict Arnold is hatched; Peggy learns Cicero's secret; Washington and the French clash over strategy.

4.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S04E07 - Quarry
4.plot: Ben's plan to kidnap Benedict Arnold conflicts with Abe's plan to kill Simcoe; changing loyalties turn enemies into allies.

4.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S04E08 - Belly of the Beast
4.plot: Abe and Simcoe settle their score; Ben appeals to Gen. Washington; Townsend risks everything while Caleb seeks redemption.

4.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S04E09 - Reckoning
4.plot: Washington heads south to lay siege on Yorktown; Abe volunteers for the Continental Army; Peggy goes into labor.

4.title: FR - TURN : Washington's Spies - S04E10 - Washington's Spies
4.plot: The fate of the Culper Ring is revealed; the American War of Independence comes to an end; a settling of accounts between shadows and spies; America struggles to begin.

meta.plot: Été 1778. Un fermier new yorkais nommé Abe Woodhull recrute des amis d'enfance pour former avec eux un groupe d'espions, qui inversera le cours de l'histoire des États-Unis dans son combat pour l’indépendance...

La détective Annie Redford enquête sur son premier cas de meurtre, assisté de Blake Albrighton, médecin légiste. Le corps de Niall Swift est retrouvé au pied de Carn Mohr Moutain, tandis qu'un coeur humain s'échoue sur les bords d'un lac.

1.title: FR - Loch Ness - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: A murder in a small Scottish town sends the community into shock, and local detective Annie Redford is thrust into her first murder case.

1.title: FR - Loch Ness - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Following the discovery of a human heart on the shores of the loch, forensic psychologist Blake Albrighton is brought onto the team.

1.title: FR - Loch Ness - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: The police hold an appeal for the safe return of Jonjo. Anxiety is exacerbated by the fact that Jonjo suffers from bipolar disorder and has neglected his medication.

1.title: FR - Loch Ness - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: As Annie becomes more entrenched in the investigation, Alan feels increasingly marginalised and their relationship begins to suffer.

1.title: FR - Loch Ness - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Marr continues to be a person of interest and when a police search warrant is granted, his house and possessions are pulled apart, he finally snaps and goes after Evie.

1.title: FR - Loch Ness - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Despite being threatened with arrest by Quigley, Albrighton continues to obsess over evidence. About to leave, he hears something that makes things click into place. Unable to face Quigley, Albrighton risks his life to prove he's right.

meta.plot: Dans cette série d’anthologie pour enfants, une figure masquée collectionne les contes de magie noire, les rencontres mystiques et les technologies bizarres.

1.title: FR - Les Chroniques de la peur - S01E01 - Slapstick
1.plot: Have you ever been embarrassed by your family? Have you ever wished they were different people? Jessie is fed up with her embarrassing family and makes a deal with a worrisome puppet.

1.title: FR - Les Chroniques de la peur - S01E02 - Cat Food
1.plot: Have you ever wondered what might be going on behind closed doors? A door just across the street might have behind it something you wouldn't want to get within a mile of. Stu tricks his mum into giving him a day off sick from school, but just what is that creepy old lady opposite up to?

1.title: FR - Les Chroniques de la peur - S01E03 - Trolled
1.plot: If you had a chance to do something totally anonymously, and no one would ever find out, just how far would you push it?  Sam has a promising future ahead of him at school, but his anonymous posts on the school social media site could be his downfall.

1.title: FR - Les Chroniques de la peur - S01E04 - Marti
1.plot: If you give your life over to technology, how long before it gives itself over to you? Kym just wants to be like the other girls in high school, but the arrival of her perfect new phone starts to unravel everything.

1.title: FR - Les Chroniques de la peur - S01E05 - A Boy Called Red
1.plot: Do you believe in fate? Is there really something out there shaping our every decision? Or are we the ones in charge of shaping our own future? Vincent takes a trip back to his father's family home, but as he checks out the house he finds there is something unexplained lurking in the cellar.

1.title: FR - Les Chroniques de la peur - S01E06 - The Call
1.plot: Have you ever felt uncomfortable in your own skin? What if there were a reason for that? One that you wished you never went searching for...  Pearl dreams of the sea, she sees it and hears it - but what is it that is calling her?

1.title: FR - Les Chroniques de la peur - S01E07 - Bravery Badge
1.plot: You know that feeling - when you get something stuck in your head. What if it was really stuck? And there was nothing you could do to get it out? On a girl scout trip to the most remote woodland, Dent really wishes she could call a cab home.

1.title: FR - Les Chroniques de la peur - S01E08 - Spaceman
1.plot: Being away from home is scary enough. But imagine if home was on the other side of the universe, and you had no idea how you were ever going to get back. Spud and Thomas go for a ramble through the woods looking for a den but they find so much more than that.

1.title: FR - Les Chroniques de la peur - S01E09 - Kindlesticks
1.plot: Did you have an imaginary friend? Do you wonder whether they were so imaginary after all? If it's true for one of them, surely it's true for all of them. Maybe it's still standing right next to you now. Esme, the world's worst babysitter, takes a job with a nice new family. However, this time she could be out-foxed.

1.title: FR - Les Chroniques de la peur - S01E10 - Shed No Fear
1.plot: Do you have a shed? A cellar? Anywhere dark? A place where things can hide in the shadows, watching, waiting. Are you sure you don't have a shade lurking in your home right now? Greg has a hunch that all is not well with his friend Dave. When he follows him to his aunt's shed, the adventure is only just beginning.

1.title: FR - Les Chroniques de la peur - S01E11 - The Traveller
1.plot: Some people believe that if you do something bad, then eventually something bad will happen to you. But what if it wasn't just an invisible force but a being, a creature that you couldn't outrun? Jodie and Brandon find themselves stuck in-between time, and they are not alone.

1.title: FR - Les Chroniques de la peur - S01E12 - Side Show Part One
1.plot: How much do you trust your memories? Are you so sure they're real? Are you willing to bet your life upon them? We meet Ace, our amazing aromatologist in an old-fashioned circus, but just how did he get there and where does he really belong?

1.title: FR - Les Chroniques de la peur - S01E13 - Side Show Part Two
1.plot: Mysterious stories. As Ace starts to make sense of his few memories of his past, a plan comes together to get him home, but plans don't always go to plan.

2.title: FR - Les Chroniques de la peur - S02E01 - One More Minute
2.plot: There's nothing wrong with playing video games. But how long is too long to play?

2.title: FR - Les Chroniques de la peur - S02E02 - Itchy
2.plot: When headlice begin to infest his small town, Gabe may be the only person who can help.

2.title: FR - Les Chroniques de la peur - S02E03 - Help
2.plot: Artificial intelligence can be helpful. But does it have access to too much information?

2.title: FR - Les Chroniques de la peur - S02E04 - The Many Place
2.plot: Three siblings on a rainy vacation in Australia explore their mysterious hotel.

2.title: FR - Les Chroniques de la peur - S02E05 - The Unfortunate Five
2.plot: What if instead of punishment you had yoga and mindfulness exercises?

2.title: FR - Les Chroniques de la peur - S02E06 - No Filter
2.plot: When selfie-obsessed Kiera downloads an app to erase all her flaws, a shocking side effect sends her running to her tech-savvy sister for help.

2.title: FR - Les Chroniques de la peur - S02E07 - Only Child
2.plot: When Mia's baby brother comes home from the hospital, strange things start happening around the house -- and Mia gets all the blame.

2.title: FR - Les Chroniques de la peur - S02E08 - The Takedown
2.plot: Just as Alexa gets a chance to compete against the boys for a spot at wrestling regionals, a mysterious text message offers her a special "gift."

2.title: FR - Les Chroniques de la peur - S02E09 - Tilly Bone
2.plot: Vlogger Cass's birthday sleepover ended in disaster. But why? Rewind through the footage for clues.

2.title: FR - Les Chroniques de la peur - S02E10 - Splinta Claws
2.plot: A holiday mishap leaves friends Lawrence and Mikey locked in a department store after closing time -- with a creepy mechanical Santa on their trail.

meta.plot: Steve Arnott est chargé d'enquêter sur la mort d'un policier, tué par erreur par l'un de ses collègues lors d'une opération terroriste...Il est alors transféré dans la brigade AC12 dirigée par Ted Hastings. Cette unité s'occupe des affaires de corruption qui affectent l'image de la police auprès des concitoyens. L'inspecteur en chef Tony Gates, récemment gratifié d'une récompense annuelle, entre alors dans le collimateur des agents de l'unité spéciale...

1.title: FR - Line of Duty : Enquêtes internes - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: When Steve Arnott is transferred to a police anti-corruption unit, he finds his target is the city's top detective, Tony Gates. Can Gates really be as good as he appears? Arnott must engage in a cat-and-mouse struggle to uncover Gates' secret.

1.title: FR - Line of Duty : Enquêtes internes - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Having been duped into covering up Jackie's crime, Gates is desperate to sever ties with her. But, as Arnott and Fleming close in on his secret, Gates is plunged into an even more dangerous situation than he first thought.

1.title: FR - Line of Duty : Enquêtes internes - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Arnott is convinced Gates played a part in Jackie's disappearance. With Fleming's help, the anti-corruption team tries to trap Gates into revealing his involvement in covering up Jackie's crimes.

1.title: FR - Line of Duty : Enquêtes internes - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Desperate for proof of Gates's corruption, Fleming pushes her relationship with him to the limit. But her behaviour causes Morton to question if she might not be such a loyal colleague after all.

1.title: FR - Line of Duty : Enquêtes internes - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: With Gates on the run, the anti-corruption team come under pressure to close the case once and for all. Arnott is forced to make some tough decisions about where his loyalties lie. Fleming and Hastings go all out to catch Gates, leading to a shattering conclusion.

2.title: FR - Line of Duty : Enquêtes internes - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: A brutal ambush on a police convoy leaves three officers dead and a protected witness fighting for his life. AC-12 turn their spotlight on Lindsay Denton, the officer who led the convoy but escaped unscathed.

2.title: FR - Line of Duty : Enquêtes internes - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: Following the tragedy at the hospital, AC12's Kate Fleming is planted undercover in Lindsay Denton's Missing Persons Unit. But Lindsay in turn gathers compromising evidence against the anti-corruption team.

2.title: FR - Line of Duty : Enquêtes internes - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: Lindsay is denied bail and finds herself targeted in prison. Growing increasingly desperate, she tells Kate about a relationship with an executive police officer and her theory of why she is being framed.

2.title: FR - Line of Duty : Enquêtes internes - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: Following the violent attack she suffered in prison, Lindsay is granted special dispensation to visit her dying mother. Meanwhile, deputy chief constable Dryden shrugs off allegations about his relationship with Lindsay and possible links to the ambush.

2.title: FR - Line of Duty : Enquêtes internes - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: Lindsay fights for her life as troubling details emerge of a vicious conspiracy involving corrupt police officers. With growing evidence of links between DCC Dryden and the ambush, Hastings is under pressure to arrest his senior officer.

2.title: FR - Line of Duty : Enquêtes internes - S02E06 - Episode 6
2.plot: AC12's investigation finally exposes a vicious criminal gang run from within the police. But while Steve now appears convinced of Lindsay's innocence, Kate remains determined to prove she had a role in the ambush.

3.title: FR - Line of Duty : Enquêtes internes - S03E01 - Episode 1
3.plot: Sergeant Danny Waldron and his armed response team shoot dead a hardened criminal.

3.title: FR - Line of Duty : Enquêtes internes - S03E02 - Episode 2
3.plot: After the shooting at the drugs house, DC Fleming increases the pressure on Danny Waldron.

3.title: FR - Line of Duty : Enquêtes internes - S03E03 - Episode 3
3.plot: DS Steve Arnott believes there is a dark secret in Danny Waldron's past.

3.title: FR - Line of Duty : Enquêtes internes - S03E04 - Episode 4
3.plot: Fresh testimony launches AC-12 back on the trail of a corrupt officer.

3.title: FR - Line of Duty : Enquêtes internes - S03E05 - Episode 5
3.plot: Loyalties are divided when DS Steve Arnott comes under scrutiny from his colleagues.

3.title: FR - Line of Duty : Enquêtes internes - S03E06 - Episode 6
3.plot: DS Steve Arnott is arrested on suspicion of murder but continues to protest his innocence.

4.title: FR - Line of Duty : Enquêtes internes - S04E01 - Episode 1
4.plot: DCI Roz Huntley is under intense pressure from her superiors to apprehend a serial murderer after months of fruitless investigation.

4.title: FR - Line of Duty : Enquêtes internes - S04E02 - Episode 2
4.plot: AC-12 crank up their investigation into Operation Trapdoor. Kate makes progress in her undercover role.

4.title: FR - Line of Duty : Enquêtes internes - S04E03 - Episode 3
4.plot: As AC-12 wrestle with the new forensic evidence casting doubt over Tim Ifield, Kate is approached by another woman claiming to have been assaulted by Michael Farmer.

4.title: FR - Line of Duty : Enquêtes internes - S04E04 - Episode 4
4.plot: Roz's husband Nick is brought in for questioning by AC-12. But while Nick denies any involvement in Steve's attack, his suspicions about Roz mount.

4.title: FR - Line of Duty : Enquêtes internes - S04E05 - Episode 5
4.plot: DCI Roz Huntley struggles to allay her husband's suspicions. AC-12 find a new angle to pursue their case against her.

4.title: FR - Line of Duty : Enquêtes internes - S04E06 - Episode 6
4.plot: While Nick Huntley faces lengthy questioning, AC-12 remain convinced of Roz's involvement.

5.title: FR - Line of Duty : Enquêtes internes - S05E01 - Episode 1
5.plot: Following the deadly hijack of a police convoy, AC-12 target a ruthless organised crime group known to have links with corrupt officers.

5.title: FR - Line of Duty : Enquêtes internes - S05E02 - Episode 2
5.plot: Kate and Steve attempt to track down a lead. A fresh police leak enables another audacious raid, while Steve’s attempts to gather information put him in a dangerous situation.

5.title: FR - Line of Duty : Enquêtes internes - S05E03 - Episode 3
5.plot: Corbett's most daring plan yet requires McQueen to exploit links with corrupt police officers.

5.title: FR - Line of Duty : Enquêtes internes - S05E04 - Episode 4
5.plot: Tensions rise in the OCG following the events at Eastfield. With troubling questions hanging over the identity of ‘H', suspicions mount at AC-12.

5.title: FR - Line of Duty : Enquêtes internes - S05E05 - Episode 5
5.plot: As the hunt for 'H' intensifies, Steve and Kate wonder if Hastings is guarding a dark secret.

5.title: FR - Line of Duty : Enquêtes internes - S05E06 - Episode 6
5.plot: In a nail-biting 90-minute finale, Hastings's secrets are laid bare. Will 'H' be revealed at last?

6.title: FR - Line of Duty : Enquêtes internes - S06E01 - Episode 1
6.plot: DCI Jo Davidson receives new information about the whereabouts of a suspect in the unsolved murder of investigative journalist Gail Vella. En route to raid the property, she spots an armed robbery in progress and stops the convoy. Suspicious of her motives, AC-12 launch an investigation. Still dealing with the fallout from their explosive investigation into undercover officer John Corbett, AC-12 soon realise they are facing their most enigmatic adversary yet.

6.title: FR - Line of Duty : Enquêtes internes - S06E02 - Episode 2
6.plot: Having opened an official inquiry into DCI Jo Davidson and Operation Lighthouse, AC-12 begin to suspect a cover up. Steve and Chloe dig into Gail Vella’s controversial reporting for clues to her murder, and find links to previous AC-12 cases. Their investigation takes a shocking turn when they begin to scrutinise Jo's personal life.

6.title: FR - Line of Duty : Enquêtes internes - S06E03 - Episode 3
6.plot: On the strength of evidence from a new witness, DCI Jo Davidson brings Terry Boyle back in for questioning about Gail Vella's murder. Kate is torn between loyalty to Jo and wanting to assist AC-12's investigation, and tensions increase when Kate encounters a face from the past with links to organised crime.

meta.plot: Mandela est né à Mvezo, un village d'Afrique du Sud, le 18 juillet 1918. Le garçon est prénommé Rolihlala, ce qui signifie « fauteur de troubles ». Arrière-petit-fils du roi Thembu de l'ethnie Xhosa, Mandela est baptisé « Nelson » par son institutrice. Quelques années plus tard, il quitte le domicile parental pour suivre des études de droit…

1.title: FR - Il s'appelait Mandela - S01E01 - Part 1: Troublemaker and Defiance
1.plot: After his father's death and backing out of an arranged marriage, Nelson flees his village and heads to Johannesburg, where he continues his work as a underground revolutionary.

1.title: FR - Il s'appelait Mandela - S01E02 - Part 2: Spear of the Nation and Total Strategy
1.plot: Despite personal financial hardship, Nelson takes on the grueling task of raising funds for the ANC. Once he ends up at Robben Island serving a life sentence, his friend Oliver keeps the struggle alive on the outside.

1.title: FR - Il s'appelait Mandela - S01E03 - Part 3: Brains Not Blood and A New World
1.plot: Mandela is finally released from prison but his liberation does not come without cost as he is unable to reconcile his marriage. With the country in a state of contention, Mandela is the only man who can unify a divided nation.

meta.plot: Dans une dictature où la stérilité a frappé les femmes, ces dernières sont divisées en trois catégories : les Épouses, qui dominent la maison, les Marthas, qui l'entretiennent, et les Servantes, dont le rôle est la reproduction.

1.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S01E01 - Offred
1.plot: Offred, one the few fertile women known as Handmaids in the oppressive Republic of Gilead, struggles to survive as a reproductive surrogate for a powerful Commander and his resentful wife.

1.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S01E02 - Birth Day
1.plot: Offred and her fellow Handmaids assist with the delivery of Janine’s baby, prompting Offred to recall her own daughter’s birth. Offred draws closer to Ofglen while dreading a secret meeting with the Commander.

1.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S01E03 - Late
1.plot: Offred visits Janine’s baby with Serena Joy and remembers the early days of the revolution before Gilead. Ofglen faces a difficult challenge.

1.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S01E04 - Nolite Te Bastardes Carborundorum
1.plot: Punished by Serena Joy, Offred begins to unravel and reflects on her time with Moira at the Red Center. A complication during the Ceremony threatens Offred’s survival with the Commander and Serena Joy.

1.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S01E05 - Faithful
1.plot: Serena Joy makes Offred a surprising proposition. Offred remembers the unconventional beginnings of her relationship with her husband.

1.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S01E06 - A Woman's Place
1.plot: A Mexican Ambassador visiting Gilead questions Offred about her life as a Handmaid. Serena Joy reflects on her marriage and the role she once played in Gilead’s inception.

1.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S01E07 - The Other Side
1.plot: Remembering her family’s treacherous escape attempt, a shocking revelation from life before Gilead provides a new perspective on Offred’s life.

1.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S01E08 - Jezebels
1.plot: The Commander surprises Offred with a secret adventure in Gilead. Nick’s troubled past leads to his recruitment by the Sons of Jacob.

1.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S01E09 - The Bridge
1.plot: Offred embarks on a dangerous mission for the resistance. Janine moves to a new posting. Serena Joy suspects the Commander’s infidelity.

1.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S01E10 - Night
1.plot: Serena Joy confronts Offred and the Commander. Offred struggles with a complicated, life-changing revelation. The Handmaids face a brutal decision.

2.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S02E01 - June
2.plot: Offred reckons with the consequences of a dangerous decision while haunted by memories from her past and the violent beginnings of Gilead.

2.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S02E02 - Unwomen
2.plot: Offred adjusts to a new way of life. The arrival of an unexpected person disrupts the Colonies. A family is torn apart by the rise of Gilead.

2.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S02E03 - Baggage
2.plot: Offred reflects on her relationship with her mother as she navigates her way through Gilead. In Little America, Moira tries to cope with the trauma she endured.

2.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S02E04 - Other Women
2.plot: A baby shower provokes a troubling shift in Offred’s relationship with Serena Joy. Offred reckons with the choice she made that led her to become a Handmaid.

2.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S02E05 - Seeds
2.plot: Offred spirals as a Gilead ceremony disrupts her relationship with Nick. Janine tries to adjust to life in the Colonies, jeopardizing her friendship with Emily.

2.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S02E06 - First Blood
2.plot: Offred finds unexpected allies and obstacles in her search for a way to protect Hannah. The Commander prepares for the dedication of a new Red Center. Nick struggles with his new assignment.

2.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S02E07 - After
2.plot: An attack sends shockwaves through both Gilead and Little America. Serena Joy makes a dangerous choice in order to protect her family. Moira searches for someone from her past.

2.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S02E08 - Women's Work
2.plot: A sick baby tests Offred and Serena. Janine finally faces Naomi.

2.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S02E09 - Smart Power
2.plot: The Waterfords embark on a diplomatic trip abroad. Serena faces the temptation of life outside Gilead. Luke and Moira grapple with survivor’s guilt. Offred seeks support from allies.

2.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S02E10 - The Last Ceremony
2.plot: A frustrated Serena becomes desperate. The Commander tries to make amends with Offred. Nick pushes Eden farther away. Offred is faced with an unexpected reunion.

2.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S02E11 - Holly
2.plot: Offred faces a grueling challenge alone as she recalls her life as a mother. Serena Joy and the Commander deal with the fallout of their actions towards Offred.

2.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S02E12 - Postpartum
2.plot: Offred is sent to a familiar place. Nick is rocked by Gilead’s brutal response to a crime. Emily is assigned to a mysterious new house.

2.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S02E13 - The Word
2.plot: Serena and the other Wives strive to make change. Emily learns more about her new Commander. Offred faces a difficult decision.

3.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S03E01 - Night
3.plot: June embarks on a bold mission with unexpected consequences. Emily and Nichole make a harrowing journey. The Waterfords reckon with Serena Joy’s choice to send Nichole away.

3.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S03E02 - Mary and Martha
3.plot: June helps Marthas with a dangerous task while navigating a relationship with her pious and untrustworthy new walking partner. Emily and Luke struggle with their altered circumstances.

3.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S03E03 - Useful
3.plot: June navigates a meeting where she must face both Commander Waterford and Nick. Serena Joy attempts to recuperate at her mother’s home. Lawrence teaches June a hard lesson about the difficult decisions he makes as a Commander.

3.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S03E04 - God Bless the Child
3.plot: June negotiates a truce in the Waterfords’ fractured relationship. Janine oversteps with the Putnam family, and a still-healing Aunt Lydia offers a brutal public punishment.

3.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S03E05 - Unknown Caller
3.plot: June and Serena grapple with a new revelation about Nichole, leading to an incident that will have far-reaching ramifications.

3.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S03E06 - Household
3.plot: June accompanies the Waterfords to Washington D.C., where a powerful family offers a glimpse of the future of Gilead. June makes an important connection as she attempts to protect Nichole.

3.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S03E07 - Under His Eye
3.plot: June escalates her risky efforts to find Hannah. Emily must face her past crimes as the ongoing international diplomatic crisis becomes more complicated.

3.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S03E08 - Unfit
3.plot: June and the rest of the Handmaids shun Ofmatthew, and both are pushed to their limit at the hands of Aunt Lydia. Aunt Lydia reflects on her life and relationships before the rise of Gilead.

3.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S03E09 - Heroic
3.plot: Confined in a hospital, June’s sanity begins to fray. An encounter with Serena Joy forces June to reassess her recent actions.

3.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S03E10 - Witness
3.plot: June must deal with a devious ploy on the part of Commander Waterford.

3.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S03E11 - Liars
3.plot: A return to Jezebels puts everything in jeopardy; Serena Joy and Commander Waterford take a clandestine trip.

3.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S03E12 - Sacrifice
3.plot: Gilead leadership is rocked by losses among their own. Luke and Moira adjust to new arrivals in Canada. June worries about disruptions to her plan, only to have tragedy strike the entire household.

3.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S03E13 - Mayday
3.plot: With her plan in place, June reaches the point of no return on her bold strike against Gilead and must decide how far she’s willing to go. Serena Joy and Commander Waterford attempt to find their way forward in their new lives.

4.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S04E01 - Pigs
4.plot: On the run, June and the fugitive Handmaids seek refuge. In Gilead, Aunt Lydia reels from the loss of 86 children on Angels’ Flight. The combative Waterfords, in custody in Toronto, learn of June’s feat.

4.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S04E02 - Nightshade
4.plot: June plots revenge at the local Jezebels, before she and the Handmaids plan to leave the farm for the next safe house. In Toronto, Moira deals with the fallout of June’s choices, and Serena and Fred are bound together by a miracle.

4.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S04E03 - The Crossing
4.plot: Captured by Gilead, June faces a vengeful Aunt Lydia and endures a torturous interrogation. Nick and Lawrence collaborate to protect June. In Toronto, Luke struggles with how to help June and Hannah.

4.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S04E04 - Milk
4.plot: June takes a harrowing journey with Janine, trying to escape Gilead, as Janine remembers a stressful experience in her past. In Toronto, Serena tries to manipulate Rita, who seeks advice from Moira.

4.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S04E05 - Chicago
4.plot: June seeks out more active rebels in the Chicago war zone, while Janine tries to help her fit in with their new group of survivors. Moira goes on her first field aid mission.

4.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S04E06 - Vows
4.plot: After a shocking reunion with a dear friend, June contemplates the possibility of freedom, and confronts the unfulfilled promises she’s made to herself and to Luke.

4.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S04E07 - Home
4.plot: June contends with joy, pain and rage as she acclimates herself to vastly changed circumstances.

4.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S04E08 - Testimony
4.plot: June confronts Fred and Serena in court and challenges Emily to face a painful reminder of her Gilead past. Lawrence presents Aunt Lydia with a newly captured, familiar handmaid.

4.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S04E09 - Progress
4.plot: June and Luke work together to save Hannah, reaching out to Lawrence and Nick for help. Serena and Fred greet unexpected visitors from Gilead. Janine tries to assist Aunt Lydia when a Handmaid-in-training goes on a hunger strike at the Red Center.

4.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S04E10 - The Wilderness
4.plot: June draws on all her resources and relationships, risking everything to ensure her own kind of justice.

5.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S05E01 - Morning
5.plot: June confronts the consequences of killing Fred. A scared Serena makes an unexpected decision.

5.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S05E02 - Ballet
5.plot: June struggles to move on with her life in Toronto. Serena plans an elaborate memorial. Aunt Lydia and Janine prepare Esther for her first posting as a Handmaid.

5.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S05E03 - Border
5.plot: June and Moira join a rebel outpost. As a pregnant widow, Serena tries to restore her status. Aunt Lydia questions her strict methods of dealing with Handmaids.

5.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S05E04 - Dear Offred
5.plot: June fights her need for violent revenge as Serena settles into her new role in Toronto. Rattled by Janine, Aunt Lydia makes a surprising suggestion to Lawrence.

5.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S05E05 - Fairytale
5.plot: June and Luke embark on a dangerous quest. Serena gets to know her new hosts.

5.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S05E06 - Together
5.plot: June and Luke’s mission puts them in serious jeopardy. Serena senses a threat from her benefactors. Lawrence and Nick make a shocking power move.

5.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S05E07 - No Man's Land
5.plot: June and Serena find themselves in a desperate situation.

5.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S05E08 - Motherland
5.plot: June considers a tempting but risky offer from a surprise visitor. Serena hits rock bottom and searches for allies.

5.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S05E09 - Allegiance
5.plot: June and Luke prepare for a rescue mission. Serena tries new tactics with her oppressive hosts. Lawrence makes a surprising proposal to elevate his status.

5.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S05E10 - Safe
5.plot: Under threat, June must find a way to keep herself and her family safe from Gilead and its violent supporters in Toronto.

6.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S06E01 - Train
6.plot: June and Serena's journey takes an unexpected turn. Moira makes a bold decision. Nick deals with a powerful visitor.

6.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S06E02 - Exile
6.plot: June tries to settle in a new community. Serena seeks sanctuary. Luke and Moira take a big risk.

6.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S06E03 - Devotion
6.plot: June struggles to save her loved ones. Commander Lawrence welcomes diplomats to New Bethlehem. Aunt Lydia searches for Janine.

6.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S06E04 - Promotion
6.plot: June disrupts the rebel's plans. Commander Lawrence gains power and influence

6.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S06E05 - Janine
6.plot: June and Moira go undercover. Serena and Nick make consequential choices.

6.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S06E06 - Surprise
6.plot: June hides in an unexpected place.

6.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S06E07 - Shattered
6.plot: After a shocking revelation, June spirals. Serena plans for a prestigious future.

6.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S06E08 - Exodus
6.plot: June and Moira execute their dangerous plan. Serena makes a big commitment.

6.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S06E09 - Execution
6.plot: June faces her biggest challenge as Gilead cracks down on the rebels.

6.title: FR - The Handmaid's Tale : La Servante écarlate - S06E10 - The Handmaid's Tale
6.plot: June reflects on her experiences in Gilead and decides what to do next.

meta.plot: Une soirée d'été de 1984, un garçon de 5 ans disparaît dans une région rurale du sud de la Suède. L'enquête policière ne permet pas de découvrir la vérité. Vingt ans plus tard, Vera, la grande sœur du garçon, dirige une séance de thérapie de groupe à Stockholm, lorsqu'un jeune homme décrit un souvenir d'enfance étrangement ressemblant à cette disparition. Vera, ébranlée, rentre chez elle et décide de découvrir ce qui s'est passé en cette année 1984.

1.title: FR - End of Summer - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: It's a beautiful late summer evening in southern Sweden in the late 90s when little Billy disappears without a trace. The search eventually ends. Twenty years later, his sister Vera meets a young man whose story and appearance closely resemble her missing brother. She returns home to find answers.

1.title: FR - End of Summer - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - End of Summer - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - End of Summer - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - End of Summer - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - End of Summer - S01E06 - Episode 6

FR - Bref - S01E08 - Episode 8

FR - Bref - S02E02 - Episode 2
