meta.plot: Un trentenaire au chômage, obsédé par une fille rencontrée en soirée, fait part de ses états d'âme et de ses réflexions sur les problèmes du quotidien.

1.title: FR - The Commoner - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - The Commoner - S01E02 - Episode 2

meta.plot: Durant 9 ans, Harald, le prince héritier et Sonja Haraldsen, une jeune fille du peuple, se battent pour le droit de se marier. Selon la constitution norvégienne, la décision revient au roi Olav. Au risque de provoquer l’effondrement de la monarchie, le couple tient tête à la cour, au gouvernement et à la presse. Tout cela, par amour.
Un trio soudé règne sur un quartier animé de Mexico, jusqu'à ce qu'une soudaine tragédie brise leur union et que deux d'entre eux deviennent adversaires.

1.title: FR - Los Reyes de oriente - S01E01 - The Secret
1.plot: As Santos prepares for his police academy graduation, Javo tries to keep his budding romance a secret. But events soon take a dark turn.

1.title: FR - Los Reyes de oriente - S01E02 - Free Fall
1.plot: Mike probes a crime while Malena faces more losses. A failed carjacking lands Javo in dangerous territory, dragging family members with him.

1.title: FR - Los Reyes de oriente - S01E03 - Love Triangle
1.plot: After a suspect is identified, commotion erupts, but Mike remains suspicious. Herminia's wishes lead Javo to make a stunning proposition to Mariano.

1.title: FR - Los Reyes de oriente - S01E04 - Cain & Abel
1.plot: Mike prepares to come clean, but what he discovers causes friendships — and family ties — to sever. Javo finds himself doing something unimaginable.

1.title: FR - Los Reyes de oriente - S01E05 - Revelations
1.plot: Javo's defiance intensifies. Mike makes a promise to Herminia. Heidi heads to an unlikely source for advice — and uncovers a secret.

1.title: FR - Los Reyes de oriente - S01E06 - We Were Kings
1.plot: Startling alliances force Mike to make his toughest decision yet. Heidi delivers a shocking confession. The day of reckoning arrives for Javo.

1.title: FR - La Créature de Kyŏngsŏng - S01E01 - Najin
1.plot: Facing financial ruin, Jang Tae-sang agrees to track down a missing person — but two figures trail him. Meanwhile, sinister operations occur underground.

1.title: FR - La Créature de Kyŏngsŏng - S01E02 - Mother
1.plot: Yoon Chae-ok and Yoon Jung-won find a lead on Myeong-ja, leading them to a hospital. Soon, a calamity traps the two inside, leaving Tae-sang concerned.

1.title: FR - La Créature de Kyŏngsŏng - S01E03 - Signal
1.plot: Tae-sang decides to reenter the hospital, but discovers that Ryu Sachimoto is nearby. At the hospital, Chae-ok and Jung-won devise a risky rescue plan.

1.title: FR - La Créature de Kyŏngsŏng - S01E04 - Imprinting
1.plot: Reunited in their search for Myeong-ja, Tae-sang and Chae-ok attempt to also save other survivors. But soon, the monster makes itself known.

1.title: FR - La Créature de Kyŏngsŏng - S01E05 - Desperation
1.plot: After coming face to face with the creature, Tae-sang and Chae-ok get captured. But as one plans his escape, the other stays to find a person dear to her.

1.title: FR - La Créature de Kyŏngsŏng - S01E06 - Chaos
1.plot: Tae-sang steadfastly remains to save Chae-ok and the captives. On a mission to find her mother, Chae-ok learns the grisly truth — and confronts the beast.

1.title: FR - La Créature de Kyŏngsŏng - S01E07 - Chase
1.plot: With only 10 minutes to act, Tae-sang and Chae-ok risk it all to get everyone to safety. But just as all goes to plan, one of them may not get out alive.

1.title: FR - La Créature de Kyŏngsŏng - S01E08 - Awakening
1.plot: An unlikely acquaintance becomes Tae-sang's ticket out of the hospital. After a touching reunion, Tae-sang and Chae-ok encounter a transformed Myeong-ja.

1.title: FR - La Créature de Kyŏngsŏng - S01E09 - Atrocity
1.plot: After a series of grisly deaths, Ishikawa finds Myeong-ja in her new state. Tae-sang shares a tender moment with Chae-ok, unaware of her hidden plan.

1.title: FR - La Créature de Kyŏngsŏng - S01E10 - Tear
1.plot: In order to rescue Chae-ok and stop the atrocity, Tae-sang and Jung-won forge a plan. But just as the coast seems clear, Yukiko Maeda stands in the way.

2.title: FR - La Créature de Kyŏngsŏng - S02E01 - Ho-jae
2.plot: On a mission to clear his name, Jang Ho-jae searches for a mysterious woman. On the job, Chae-ok encounters a familiar person from decades ago.

2.title: FR - La Créature de Kyŏngsŏng - S02E02 - Sign
2.plot: While looking for the same person, Ho-jae ends up saving Chae-ok, who's being chased by a mysterious being. Ho-jae begins to wonder more about his past.

2.title: FR - La Créature de Kyŏngsŏng - S02E03 - Pieces Of Memories
2.plot: Chae-ok agrees to work with Ho-jae to find Seung-jo, but they soon find themselves in peril. Meanwhile, Chae-ok's monstrous instincts begin to surface.

2.title: FR - La Créature de Kyŏngsŏng - S02E05 - The Creature
2.plot: In his effort to save Chae-ok, Ho-jae makes a momentous decision. Having sustained severe injuries, they must battle through a treacherous escape.

2.title: FR - La Créature de Kyŏngsŏng - S02E06 - Bait
2.plot: After a test subject wreaks havoc in public, Jeonseung Biotech goes into damage control. Fate drives Ho-jae and Chae-ok to confront the company head-on.

2.title: FR - La Créature de Kyŏngsŏng - S02E07 - Marginal Man
2.plot: As Ho-jae's enemy threatens to hurt those closest to him, he risks everything to protect them. Will he survive the ferocious beasts and save Chae-ok?

meta.plot: Au printemps 1945, un jeune homme et une jeune femme luttent pour leur survie dans un monde sinistre, tout en combattant des monstres engendrés par la cupidité humaine.

Il s’appelle Alphonse et vit en France. "Je suis là, Mesdames, pour satisfaire tous vos désirs, même les plus inavouables. Toutes. Je deviendrai qui vous voudrez : votre amour de jeunesse, votre idole, votre animal de compagnie ou votre bourreau. Quel que soit votre physique ou votre âge, vous serez la plus belle femme du monde" promet-il selon un tarif, à négocier.

1.title: FR - Alphonse - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Alphonse gets assaulted by mafia men at a job he struggles to keep. On paid leave in therapy, he discusses his mother’s disappearance when he was a child. Returning to work, he’s immediately let go by his boss and in the same day learns his estranged father is in hospital. Their rekindling is rocky, especially when Alphonse finds out that his father has secretly worked as a gigolo his whole life.

1.title: FR - Alphonse - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Telling his wife Margot he’s found success in a new day job, Alphonse secretly replaces his father as a gigolo servicing aging Parisian women. Though he stumbles out of the gate, struggling to keep his high-maintenance clientele satisfied, he soon discovers the work helps him come into his own. His clever wife, however, doesn’t stay fooled for long.

1.title: FR - Alphonse - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Alphonse’s top client Adèle has a troublesome grandson who’s after her money by hook or by crook. Alphonse and his father lock horns over management of the business when it becomes apparent Alphonse is a prodigy. Margot begins an affair with the couple’s lesbian mortgage advisor. Alphonse’s long-lost mother, recently widowed in Italy, takes a trip back to Paris.

1.title: FR - Alphonse - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Alphonse and Adèle conspire to get her grandson imprisoned. Margot catches Alphonse with his pants down, yet once the truth is revealed their marriage is reborn. Jacques attempts to go back to work only to find he may be in love with Marthe, the most difficult of clients. Adèle succumbs to failing health and bequeaths her remaining fortune to Alphonse.

1.title: FR - Alphonse - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Vengeful and greedy, Adèle’s grandson hires deadbeat private detective Wilfried to track down his grandmother’s wealth. Newly enriched, Alphonse wants to treat his wife to the lavish life they always dreamed of, but Jacques feels the money is rightfully his and makes off with it. We learn Alphonse’s mother was forced to abandon the family under duress.

1.title: FR - Alphonse - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Alphonse and Margot have to improvise a jet-setter’s vacation in Nice. Lonely in Paris, Alphonse’s mother calls an escort service that comes highly recommended. After proposing marriage to Marthe, Jacques gets outmaneuvered by Wilfried and loses the money to him. Alphonse’s first client back from vacation is a beautiful woman with a Southern accent.

meta.plot: Un groupe de détectives dotés de pouvoirs paranormaux mène des enquêtes souvent dangereuses dans le plus grand secret, là où la police et l’armée refusent d’intervenir. Atsushi Nakajima a été chassé de son orphelinat. Sans-le-sou, il croise la route de ces étranges détectives tandis qu’ils pourchassent un tigre mangeur d’hommes terrorisant la population…

1.title: FR - Bungo Stray Dogs - S01E01 - Fortune Is Unpredictable and Mutable
1.plot: Driven out from his orphanage, Nakajima Atsushi wanders the streets of Yokohama on the bring of starvation. Determined to live, a chance encounter with a drowning stranger changes his fate...

1.title: FR - Bungo Stray Dogs - S01E02 - A Certain Bomb
1.plot: Despite joining the Armed Detective Agency, Nakajima lacks conviction that he'd be of any use. Just as he's about to bid the agency farewell, a bomber takes over the agency with one of the agency employees as his hostage...!

1.title: FR - Bungo Stray Dogs - S01E03 - Yokohama Gangster Paradise
1.plot: Now an official member of the Agency after passing their entrance exam, Atsushi is assigned to his first case right away with Tanizaki and Naomi. Though deceptively simple on the surface, there's more than meets the eye...

1.title: FR - Bungo Stray Dogs - S01E04 - The Tragedy of the Fatalist
1.plot: Though saved from the Port Mafia by Dazai's intervention, Atsushi feels responsible for bringing trouble to the Agency's door. Rather than risk another attack because of him, Atsushi decides to leave the Agency and makes a call to the Port Mafia...

1.title: FR - Bungo Stray Dogs - S01E05 - Murder on D Street
1.plot: After repelling the Port Mafia's Black Lizards with deceptive ease, Atsushi is tasked with accompanying Rampo to a case. Skeptical of the self-dubbed great detective who seems to lack all common sense, Atsushi is about to witness Rampo's ability first-hand...

1.title: FR - Bungo Stray Dogs - S01E06 - The Azure Messenger
1.plot: The Agency investigates a series of disappearances in Yokohama. Kunikida enlists the help of a hacker named Taguchi Rokuzou, but all they find are photos of the victims and mention of a mysterious figure called the Azure Messenger. They follow the trail of clues to an abandoned hospital...

1.title: FR - Bungo Stray Dogs - S01E07 - Love for the Disease Called Ideals
1.plot: Following the Azure Messenger's bomb threat, the Armed Detective Agency must race to prevent the deaths of hundreds, which would taint the Agency forever. However, Dazai's seemingly distracted by Sasaki Nobuko, the lone survivor of their raid on the abandoned hospital...

1.title: FR - Bungo Stray Dogs - S01E08 - Teaching Them to Kill, Then to Die
1.plot: Dazai goes missing, but the Agency operatives feel it's just business as usual. Meanwhile, Atsushi accompanies Yosano Akiko on a shopping expedition, where they are suddenly plunged into the middle of a terrorist bomb threat by one of the Port Mafia...

1.title: FR - Bungo Stray Dogs - S01E09 - The Beauty Is Quiet Like a Stone Statue
1.plot: Kyouka was made into an assassin by those who abused her ability, and Atsushi can't help but feel sympathy toward her. Unable to turn her in to the military police, Atsushi ends up taking her out on a date. Meanwhile, Akutagawa is busy berating his former supervisor--Dazai.

1.title: FR - Bungo Stray Dogs - S01E10 - Rashomon and the Tiger
1.plot: Dazai has a face-off with his ex-partner, Chuuya, as Chuuya attempts to uncover Dazai's true intentions for letting himself get captured. Meanwhile, Atsuhi faces Akutagawa's intense and inexplicable hatred for him, as the ship continues on to the meeting place where he will be handed off in exchange for the bounty on his head...

1.title: FR - Bungo Stray Dogs - S01E11 - First, an Unsuitable Profession for Her. Second, an Ecstatic Detective Agency
1.plot: In the aftermath of Atsushi and Dazai's abduction, the Agency must decide what to do with Kyouka, the loose end. Meanwhile, the Port Mafia also deliberates what to do with Akutagawa, now comatose, as his enemies seek vengeance...

1.title: FR - Bungo Stray Dogs - S01E12 - Borne Back Ceaselessly into the Past
1.plot: Francis, the leader of The Guild, a North American organization of gifted members, is the one responsible for the bounty on Atsushi's head. Fukuzawa refuses Francis's offer to buy out the Agency, but their agents begin to disappear...
