meta.plot: Du légendaire John Ward, immortalisé dans la fiction sous le nom de Jack Sparrow, et de l'explorateur anglais Francis Drake, qualifiés de pirates par leurs ennemis mais de héros par leurs camarades, aux célèbres Pirates des Caraïbes, entourés de mythes.

1.title: FR - Pirates: Behind the Legends - S01E01 - Francis Drake - For Queen and Country
1.plot: Circumnavigation is the pinnacle of Drake's career, cementing him in history as the world's most controversial pirate.

1.title: FR - Pirates: Behind the Legends - S01E02 - Grace O’Malley - The Pirate Queen of Ireland
1.plot: Grace O’Malley, the Pirate Queen of Ireland. Her rise from wanted pirate to Chieftain is won through a warrior’s sword and a woman’s grit.

1.title: FR - Pirates: Behind the Legends - S01E03 - John Ward - The English Pirate of North Africa
1.plot: The Englishman turned Algerian pirate starts his remarkable ascent from petty pirate to a notorious menace, becoming ruler of the Tunisian empire.

1.title: FR - Pirates: Behind the Legends - S01E04 - Henry Morgan - The Lieutenant Pirate
1.plot: A brilliant strategist, Morgan takes humans, treasure and Spanish colonial towns with no mercy later  becoming Lieutenant Governor of Jamaica.

1.title: FR - Pirates: Behind the Legends - S01E05 - William Kidd - The Treasure Hunter
1.plot: Captain Kidd, the treasure hunter. When the legitimate prizes of the Red Sea are not to be found, Kidd quickly turns from pirate hunter to pirate.

1.title: FR - Pirates: Behind the Legends - S01E06 - Blackbeard
1.plot: Blackbeard is a terrifying figure with a diverse crew of pirates seeking equality and treasure, aboard the stolen flagship The Queen Anne’s Revenge.

1.title: FR - Pirates: Behind the Legends - S01E07 - Calico Jack, Anne Bonny, Mary Read: Rebel Spirits
1.plot: The notorious pirate run town of Nassau is soon to be shaken by the English crackdown on lawlessness in the Caribbean. Living off plunder and raiding, Calico Jack, Anne Bonny and Mary Read form a troublesome trio who successfully rob ships and live off the spoils of the sea until they are captured by pirate hunters and tried for piracy.

1.title: FR - Pirates: Behind the Legends - S01E08 - Roberts - The Last Great Pirate
1.plot: Bartholomew Roberts aka Black Bart, the most successful pirate of the Golden Age, his fleet amassing 450 stolen ships. From his humble beginnings as a Welsh sailor, Roberts quickly becomes captain of a pirate ship, showing his shrewd captainship he writes down a  pirate code. His piracy almost brings West Indies trade to a standstill until he is hunted down by the English crown.

meta.plot: Ken et Ryu sont deux amis d'enfance ayant appris les arts martiaux ensemble. Des années plus tard, Ken invite Ryu pour parcourir le monde et ainsi améliorer leurs techniques de combats.

1.title: FR - Street Fighter II: V - S01E01 - The Beginning of a Journey
1.plot: Ryu receives an unexpected letter from his best friend Ken Masters, inviting him to America. Ryu decides to accept and meets in San Francisco with his old friend. After catching up, they go to a pub, where they find and easily beat up some military thugs. Afterward, the leader of the thugs, Sergeant Guile, enters the bar.

1.title: FR - Street Fighter II: V - S01E02 - The King of the Air Force
1.plot: Guile and Ryu fight each other, though it is obvious Guile has the upper hand. The sergeant easily overpowers Ryu, and then leaves the bar with his men, telling Ryu that he has guts. Ken takes Ryu home, then fights Guile at the Air Force Base in San Francisco, badly losing as well. This double defeat motivates the two boys to travel to Hong Kong in hopes of improving their fighting skills.

1.title: FR - Street Fighter II: V - S01E03 - Landing in Hong Kong
1.plot: Ryu and Ken convince their young tour guide, Chun Li, to follow them to the Devil's Battle Cage in Kowloon Palace. Once there, Ryu enters the illegal martial arts tournament, easily defeating all his rivals, much to the chagrin of the Palace's boss, who orders to kill them on sight.

1.title: FR - Street Fighter II: V - S01E04 - Darkness at Kowloon Palace
1.plot: Ryu, Ken, and Chun Li fight their way out of Kowloon Palace, defeating all the foes they encounter. They almost get out of the infamous area, when boss Lean unleashes his two henchmen, Sodom and Gomorrah, to stop them from escaping. Ryu and Ken defeat them, only to find Lean has Chun Li held hostage.  Chun Li's father Dorai, who is a policeman, shoots Lean in the hand just as he is about to fire at Ryu and Ken. All of them safely return to the boy's hotel, where Chun Li says she will take them to go see the martial arts master-turned-actor Fei Long next morning.

1.title: FR - Street Fighter II: V - S01E05 - Hot Blooded Fei Long
1.plot: Ryu, Ken, and Chun Li visit Fei Long, who is filming a movie. The young actor picks Ken as a sparring partner for his next action scene, stating that "fights have to be real". Fei Long and Ken engage in a hard battle all over the set, only to be stopped by the film director when Ken hits Fei Long in the face, worrying about the actor's wellbeing.

1.title: FR - Street Fighter II: V - S01E06 - Appearance of the Secret Technique
1.plot: Ryu, Ken, and Chun Li go shopping at a shopping mall. Once there, Ryu meets a strange old man who seems to be about to die. The old man insists on the boy taking him somewhere private, where he could use his ki to get his health back. Fascinated, Ryu follows the old man who teaches him about Master Daruma and his Hadou technique.

1.title: FR - Street Fighter II: V - S01E07 - The Revenge of Ashura
1.plot: Evil drug cartel Ashura sets up a plan to kill Dorai, using Chun Li as bait. When Ashura's henchmen try to kidnap the girl, though, their plan falls apart, due to Chun Li's resistance and Ryu and Ken's intervention. The three then go to the family dojo to stop another Ashura attempt at Dorai's life, which is successfully foiled with the help of Fei Long.

1.title: FR - Street Fighter II: V - S01E08 - Trap, Prison, and the Scream of Truth
1.plot: Ryu and Ken decide to go to Thailand in hopes of learning Muay Thai. Once at Bangkok airport, Ashura's boss Donu plants some heroine in Ryu's backpack, who is then arrested and sent to prison. Here he endures brutal torture from Warden Nuchi and taunting from other prisoners, eventually coming to confront Sagat, a disgraced Muay Thai champion. Meanwhile, Ken does what he can to free Ryu from prison.

1.title: FR - Street Fighter II: V - S01E09 - The Superstar of Muay Thai
1.plot: Sagat and Ryu battle each other in the prison courtyard, ending the fight in a draw. Sagat calls the fight off, realizing he and Ryu are kindred spirits and tells him that he also ended up in prison because of Ashura. Meanwhile, Ken tries and fails to capture Donu after a car chase, but manages to free Ryu from prison. Both Ryu and Ken are being served an expulsion decree, and must leave the country in 24 hours.

1.title: FR - Street Fighter II: V - S01E10 - Dark Omen
1.plot: Ryu and Ken go to Ashura's secret hideout building, where they manage to defeat and capture Donu and his henchmen, bringing them to the police's custody. After this, they barely escape an attempt on their life, which prompts them to follow the killer to another Ashura's hideout in the forest, led by Zochi. Meanwhile, Dorai reaches Bangkok to interrogate Donu, but the boss is killed by Soong, another Ashura's killer who infiltrated Thai police. Dorai and the Thai police follow Soong to the forest hideout, where Ken and Ryu managed to fight off the criminals. With all of Ashura's men arrested, Sagat is freed from prison, after his innocence is proven. He then tells Ryu that if he wishes to learn about Hadou, he should travel to India, where a monk named Dhalsim lives.

1.title: FR - Street Fighter II: V - S01E11 - Visitation of the Beasts
1.plot: Ryu and Ken reach Kolkata, where they first help a local doctor to fight off some local thugs. Then, they reach Dhalsim's village in the hopes of learning more about Hadou. The monk, though, refuses to teach them anything, because he considers the two boys "beasts with an aggressive spirit", unworthy to be taught the technique. Meanwhile, a group of criminals enters the village's Cave of Ancients, where the village's treasure is stored, but some of them die in the attempt.

1.title: FR - Street Fighter II: V - S01E12 - The Deadly Phantom Faceoff
1.plot: The surviving criminals threaten the villagers in order to be handed over the treasure. Ryu and Ken accept to enter the cave to save the villagers' lives. Once inside, the two boys hallucinate over the cave's mist and start to fight each other, thinking they're both fighting the "cave's monster". After almost killing themselves in the fight, they realize the hallucination and get the treasure to the criminals, only to be threatened to be killed together with the villagers. Dhalsim paralyzes the two criminals and then heals Ryu and Ken's injuries, accepting to teach the boys the ways of Hadou.

1.title: FR - Street Fighter II: V - S01E13 - The Legend of Hadou Ken
1.plot: Dhalsim teaches Ryu how to use Hadou. Ryu tries to master the Hadouken technique but fails to master it. He then decides to face his inner self again in the Cave of Ancients. Here he first fights an imaginary Guile and then shoots his Hadouken at an imaginary Dhalsim. After being told he must become his own master in learning the Hadou technique, the two boys leave the village and receive an invitation from Chun Li to gather in Barcelona, Spain, where her father is to receive an award for shutting down the Ashura crime syndicate.

1.title: FR - Street Fighter II: V - S01E14 - The Bloodthirsty Prince
1.plot: Ryu, Ken, and Chun Li go to see a corrida, where matador Vega Fabio La Cerda is scheduled to fight. Vega immediately notices Chun Li's beauty and falls in love with her. The four meet up a couple more times after the bullfighting arena, and each time Vega shows more affection towards Chun Li. In the middle of the night, Vega casts a love potion on Chun Li with a kiss, and manages to escape the room just as Ken notices someone is there.

1.title: FR - Street Fighter II: V - S01E15 - Clash of the Titans
1.plot: Vega anonymously invites Ken and Chun Li to a party. The two accept the invitation, while Ryu stays behind to keep practicing his Hadouken. When at the party, Chun Li drifts off into a daze, and Ken is forced to accept Vega's invitation to the steel deathmatch cage in the middle of the room. Defeating the toreador would be, in fact, the only way to save Chun Li from her stupor.

1.title: FR - Street Fighter II: V - S01E16 - The Unveiled Ruler
1.plot: The battle between Ken and Vega continues. Vega easily has the advantage, as he breaks both of Ken's feet and draws a lot of blood with his claws. Despite this, Ken manages to fare pretty well against the matador, and manages to score a few hard hits in before Vega wears him down. The deathmatch is watched very closely by Shadowlaw boss, Bison, who learns who Chun Li and Ken really are and plots how to take advantage of the situation.

1.title: FR - Street Fighter II: V - S01E17 - The Despot's Commander
1.plot: After a bloody battle, Ken uses the Shoryuken on Vega and manages to finish him off, impressing Bison with his skills and awakening Chun Li from her stupor. Both Ken and Chun Li are taken in a secret room where they meet Bison. Ken gets anaesthetised, while Chun Li tries to fight her way out. Ryu recovers from the fatigue and continues to practice Hadouken on the beach. Shadowlaw's infiltrator Balrog welcomes British assassin Cammy White and tasks her to kill Dorai, falsely claiming he is a drug kingpin who infiltrated Interpol.

1.title: FR - Street Fighter II: V - S01E18 - The Beautiful Assassin
1.plot: Chun Li tries to fight Bison, but is quickly overpowered. Both her and Ken are taken prisoners by Bison, who later calls Ken's father and asks for a 1 billion dollars ransom to free the boy. Meanwhile, Cammy White prepares to carry out her mission to kill Dorai.

1.title: FR - Street Fighter II: V - S01E19 - Special Orders to the Iron Men
1.plot: Cammy seems to successfully kill Dorai in his hotel room. Meanwhile Ken's father reaches out to CIA (led by an old college friend) to rescue his son from captivity. CIA dispatches two special commandos, Nash and Guile, to carry out the mission. On the beach, Ryu is attacked by Shadowlaw wrestler Zangief, who was tasked by Bison to capture the boy and take him to the organization's headquarters.

1.title: FR - Street Fighter II: V - S01E20 - Unknown Explosive Force
1.plot: With the help of his driver, Zangief knocks out Ryu and captures him just before Guile and Nash arrive on the beach. The two commandos then search the villa where Vega and Ken fought the night before, only to find nothing. While Dorai struggles between life and death in the Intensive Care Unit, Ryu awakens in Shadowlaw's headquarters. Bison offers the boy to join Shadowlaw, which Ryu refuses. A fight erupts between the two, but Bison easily defeats Ryu, seemingly being able to interfere with the boy's Hadouken.

1.title: FR - Street Fighter II: V - S01E21 - Compulsion Towards Vengeance
1.plot: While Ken struggles to recover while chained to a bed, Ryu is about to be implanted a cyberchip that would put him under complete Bison's control. Guile and Nash find Zangief's jeep, which brings them to a lead to Bison's island. Fei Long arrives in Barcelona and, as soon as he hears of Dorai's supposed death, rushes to the hospital where he meets Interpol Chief Barrack. Meanwhile, during a conversation with Cammy, Balrog starts to fear that Dorai might not be dead.

1.title: FR - Street Fighter II: V - S01E22 - Rising Dragon, Into the Sky
1.plot: Ken finally awakes from his tormented sleep, but he's too weak to break his chains. His struggles though awaken his ability to handle the Hadou technique and to break free from his prison. Ryu is implanted with the cyberchip and falls under Bison's control. Nash and Guile decide to take action and infiltrate Shadowlaw's island.

1.title: FR - Street Fighter II: V - S01E23 - The Icy Light of Their Eyes
1.plot: Interpol Chief Barrack brings Fei Long to Dorai's bedside, explaining to him the whole situation and asking him to help him protect Dorai. Meanwhile, Balrog summons Cammy to the hospital, insisting that she finishes her job. Cammy begins to have suspicions on Balrog, but accepts to continue follow his orders for now. While Nash and Guile observe the situation, Ken manages to re-enter the fortress and finds Chun Li, who has been implanted a cyberchip too.

1.title: FR - Street Fighter II: V - S01E24 - Nightmare Reunion
1.plot: Ken discovers that both Chun Li and Ryu have been somewhat subjugated and tries, slowly but surely, to summon the Hadou-Shoryuken to break the wall that separates him from them. Bison orders Ryu to focus on summoning the Hadouken. Guile and Nash infiltrate the fortress and decide to go separate ways to cover more ground. Ken's escape is discovered by Bison, who understands that also him is capable of harvesting ki. Ken finally breaks the wall and tries to escape with Ryu, only to find his friend menacingly adopting an attack stance.

1.title: FR - Street Fighter II: V - S01E25 - Fight to the Finish: Round One
1.plot: Bison orders Ryu to attack Ken, who refuses to engage and tries to convince (to no avail) his friend to snap out of his control. Guile runs into Zangief and engages in a fight with him. Cammy enters Dorai's hospital room, but her attempt to finish her job is foiled by Fei Long, who confronts her.

1.title: FR - Street Fighter II: V - S01E26 - Fight to the Finish: Round Two
1.plot: Guile eventually manages to defeat Zangief in the Shadowlaw's fortress. Cammy and Fei Long continue their fight in the hospital room. Ryu and Ken keep fighting under Bison's watch. Nash fights his way into the fortress' control room, where he confronts Bison. Shadowlaw's boss easily overpowers the CIA commando and chokes him to death.

1.title: FR - Street Fighter II: V - S01E27 - Fight to the Finish: Round Three
1.plot: Guile reaches the control room, where he finds the lifeless body of his friend Nash. Realizing it was Bison, he attacks him in extreme rage, only to be easily defeated. Fei Long manages to convince Cammy that she was in fact hired by Shadowlaw to kill Dorai, and not by Interpol. Once back to the hotel, Cammy confronts Balrog, who eventually reveals at gun's point he set her up. Fei Long and Barrack bust in the hotel room just in time to save Cammy and arrest Balrog. Ryu and Ken both use their Hadou techniques against each other, eventually resulting in the cyberchip being knocked off Ryu's forehead.

1.title: FR - Street Fighter II: V - S01E28 - Fight to the Finish: Round Four
1.plot: Finally free from Bison's control, Ryu ends his fight with Ken and the two resolve to save Chun Li, who is still under Bison's control. Guile regains his senses and confronts again Bison, who then orders Chun Li to fight the commando and Zoltar to evacuate the base before Interpol can get on the island. Bison then teleports himself, Guile and Chun Li in the sanctuary area of the base, where they are met by Ryu and Ken. The meeting is short-lived, as Chun Li and Guile are teleported out of the base to continue their fight, while the base itself self-destructs.

1.title: FR - Street Fighter II: V - S01E29 - Fight to the Finish: Final Round
1.plot: Ryu, Ken and Bison are sent to a mysterious dimension, which seems to be the origin of both Bison's psychic powers and Hadou. Here Bison asks the two boys to join Shadowlaw, which of course refuse. A battle between the three ensues, where Bison seems to continue having the upper hand. Meanwhile, Guile keeps fighting against Chun Li, unable to overpower the girl until the chip falls off her forehead. Ken manages to weaken Bison with his Hadou-Shoryuken, allowing Ryu to finish him off with a combination of Hadou moves. With Bison finally defeated, Ken decides to go back home in America, while Ryu decides to sail away and keep explore his true self.

1.title: FR - Street Fighter II: V - S01E30 -

meta.plot: Andy, un Négateur doté de la capacité « Undead », cherche depuis longtemps une personne pouvant lui offrir une « vraie mort ». Fûko Izumo apporte le malheur à quiconque la touche en raison de sa capacité « Unluck ». Tous deux décident de rejoindre l'Union, une organisation qui a pour but de contrôler le monde et de le protéger des phénomènes inexpliqués. Ainsi ils explorent les mystères du monde tout en cherchant « la plus belle des morts qui soient ».

1.title: FR - Undead Unluck - S01E01 - Undead and Unluck
1.plot: An "Undead" man who is said to have an immortal body suddenly appears in front of Fuko Izumo, who has the power of "Unluck." Saying that he finally found someone with the power to grant him a true death, he sweeps Fuko away...

1.title: FR - Undead Unluck - S01E02 - Union
1.plot: Andy makes a move on Fuko, thinking an even greater unluck will happen. To prevent physical assault, Fuko explains that the higher her likability for the other person is, the larger the unluck becomes...

1.title: FR - Undead Unluck - S01E03 - How to Use My Unluck
1.plot: A Union member will be on the move for a UMA investigation to Russia. Learning that if they can enter the Union if they kill that member, Andy and Fuko head out towards Lake Baikal!

1.title: FR - Undead Unluck - S01E04 - Do You Love the Change in Me?
1.plot: The girl painting together with Fuko at Lake Baikal was Gena, the Negator that captured Andy in the past! Andy looks for a chance to fight back trying to figure out exactly what she negates. As a result, he realizes that Gena is Unchange, the Negator who negates objects from changing forms. Gena thinks Fuko has stolen her long crush Andy from her and shows emotions of rivalry out of jealousy against Fuko. As Gena’s attacks continue, Fuko notices something...

1.title: FR - Undead Unluck - S01E05 - United We Negate
1.plot: Andy and Fuko are taken to the Roundtable where Union members await. There, Apocalypse delivers the new round of quests. Apocalypse is the first "Artifact" found on Earth who forces unreasonable tasks on the Union. Fuko poses the question to the members who think it's only natural to embark on their quests and suggests change, but the leader Juiz thinks otherwise.

1.title: FR - Undead Unluck - S01E06 - Spoil
1.plot: According to Union agent reports, the town of Longing definitely had the UMA Spoil and zombies that they've created. Andy makes a flashy show immediately after arriving in town!

1.title: FR - Undead Unluck - S01E07 - Dream
1.plot: Fuko learns from children hiding in an underground shelter about what happened in the town and how they aren’t zombies yet. Andy and the gang fight together with the zombies, the total town warfare against Spoil begins!

1.title: FR - Undead Unluck - S01E08 - Victhor
1.plot: Spoil transitions to Phase 2. For this type of UMAs, capture is complete when the core within its body is extracted. However, Spoil decomposes anything that gets near and fires a decomposition laser if you get away, and defeating him is proving to be extremely difficult.

1.title: FR - Undead Unluck - S01E09 - Return
1.plot: Victor is Andy's other face that shows up when the Card on his forehead is removed. The Union members all challenge him to return the aggressive Victor back into the current form of Andy...

1.title: FR - Undead Unluck - S01E10 - Result
1.plot: Apocalypse reads out the results of the quests before the Union members. With the failure of the sixth quest, Apocalypse adds the UMA Galaxy as a penalty...

1.title: FR - Undead Unluck - S01E11 - Rio de Janeiro
1.plot: The Negator Unrepair is confirmed located near a black market auction. Negators, UMAs, and Artifacts that the Union hasn’t been able to manage are circulate this market so Andy and Fuko infiltrate the venue...

1.title: FR - Undead Unluck - S01E12 - Activate
1.plot: The Union and the Negator Hunters have infiltrated the black market auction venue for a new Negator. Andy and Fuko hurry towards the auction item storage, to stop the Negator Hunters who seek revenge against the world.

1.title: FR - Undead Unluck - S01E13 - Tatiana
1.plot: While Tatiana fights members of the Negator Hunters, she receives a report that Fuko was wounded by Unrepair. Tatiana unleashes her powers in order to save Fuko!

1.title: FR - Undead Unluck - S01E14 - Crimson Bullet
1.plot: A huge explosion occurs from within the luxury liner sends Andy and company up into the air. They find Rip and company among the rubble. If they let Rip get away, Fuko will die. A roller-coaster ride of a battle ensues.

1.title: FR - Undead Unluck - S01E15 - Under
1.plot: Fuko and Andy head over to right outside Chikara’s school in order to hear his reply about joining the Union. Rip, who was supposedly dead, suddenly shows up as a young boy. Chikara over hears their conversation...

1.title: FR - Undead Unluck - S01E16 - Revolution
1.plot: Apocalypse reads out the quests that have the 100th penalty on the line. However, Billy suddenly declares that it’s impossible for the Union to kill God, and tries to take off with the Roundtable...

1.title: FR - Undead Unluck - S01E17 - Outsmart
1.plot: To regain the Roundtable, the Union commences an operation with Andy and Fuko as central members. Andy chops his head off while being kissed by Fuko. His head turns into a Parts Bullet and goes into Burn's stomach.

1.title: FR - Undead Unluck - S01E18 - Cry for the Moon
1.plot: The Union regains control of Apocalypse, but the Roundtable has been seized. Juiz starts telling the members how this world is in a Loop of destruction and reconstruction by the hands of God, and that the Union is an organization she created to thwart such actions.

1.title: FR - Undead Unluck - S01E19 - Undead + Unluck
1.plot: The possibility has risen that Fuko’s bible in life “To You, From Me” was a manga drawn with an Artifact. Andy and Fuko are tasked with checking the status of the raw manuscripts and gaining intel about Anno Un.

1.title: FR - Undead Unluck - S01E20 - Anno Un
1.plot: Andy and Fuko await for Anno Un on a bench in Stanley Park. Before they know it, Anno is reading Fuko’s manga and declares that they know what the pair is looking for...

1.title: FR - Undead Unluck - S01E21 - Memento Mori
1.plot: Andy's memories become a book thanks to Autumn's claw that Anno Un materialized. Using the Artifact Soul Caliber, Anno Un plucks out Fuko's soul to send her inside Andy's book. The journey to learn about Andy begins.

1.title: FR - Undead Unluck - S01E22 - Profile
1.plot: Fuko arrives at Victor's memories but is killed by him shortly. Time flies by and Fuko moves on to the final chapter. While Fuko searches Shinjuku for Andy, Victor's blades are unleashed!

1.title: FR - Undead Unluck - S01E23 - A Story I Won't See Coming
1.plot: Anno Un's true self is Akira Kuno. Young Akira's came across the Artifact, "G-Liner." This Artifact allows the first person to touch it to see the past and future events of the current loop in its entirety. This incident greatly changes his future destiny.

1.title: FR - Undead Unluck - S01E24 - To You, From Me
1.plot: Now that Autumn is stronger, individual attacks are of no use. Anno Un asks Andy and the gang to buy some time to draw the most powerful Artifact necessary in capturing Autumn...

meta.plot: Johnny Bolt recrute un groupe de crapules pour un dernier casse. La cible : un impitoyable baron du crime doté de super-pouvoirs. Tout devrait bien se passer...

1.title: FR - Super Crooks - S01E01 - Electro Boy
1.plot: A regular kid named Johnny Bolt suddenly finds that he can control electricity. Soon enough, he starts testing the limits of his newfound powers.

1.title: FR - Super Crooks - S01E02 - Kasey
1.plot: As soon as he's released from prison, Johnny meets up with his old supervillain friends, who try to pull him into a very intriguing gem heist.

1.title: FR - Super Crooks - S01E03 - Man Mountain
1.plot: Things don't go as planned with the heist, and Johnny and the crew end up getting chased by cops and superheroes through the streets of San Francisco.

1.title: FR - Super Crooks - S01E04 - The Praetorian
1.plot: Johnny and his friends are confronted by Praetorian, a superhero who relishes using his seemingly endless abilities to punish them.

1.title: FR - Super Crooks - S01E05 - The Heat
1.plot: In Chicago, Carmine introduces Johnny and Kasey to the other supervillains. They've all been chosen for their specific powers and their nameless status.

1.title: FR - Super Crooks - S01E06 - The Gladiator
1.plot: Carmine and his crew steal a plane and fly off to rescue TK, who's on a heavily guarded aircraft protected by Gladiator.

1.title: FR - Super Crooks - S01E07 - The Supermax
1.plot: While waiting for the final member of their crew to show up, Carmine shares his plan with everyone else and gives them one last chance to drop out.

1.title: FR - Super Crooks - S01E08 - The Union of Justice
1.plot: The night before hitting the Union of Justice headquarters, Johnny and Kasey have an early celebration and vow to walk away from crime after this heist.

1.title: FR - Super Crooks - S01E09 - Count Orlok
1.plot: While confronting their old friend Praetorian, Carmine and the crew realize they've made a major miscalculation and have to think on their feet.

1.title: FR - Super Crooks - S01E10 - Carmine
1.plot: Johnny's old supervillain buddies take him out for a celebration and as usual, try to pull him into one last harebrained job.

1.title: FR - Super Crooks - S01E11 - Casino Grand Granite
1.plot: To save Carmine, Johnny tries to get the crew back together for another heist he's planned using information he gathered while serving time in supermax.

1.title: FR - Super Crooks - S01E12 - The Bastard
1.plot: Kasey and Roddy disguise themselves as professors for a meeting with Christopher Matts while Carmine, Johnny, TK and Josh case the casino.

1.title: FR - Super Crooks - S01E13 - SUPER CROOKS
1.plot: Christopher Matts sends Praetorian to stop Johnny and his crew — but this time, the supervillains have Gladiator on their side.

meta.plot: Pour retrouver la mémoire, un coiffeur armé de ciseaux se reconvertit en assassin, mais incapable de faire du mal à une mouche, il finit mêlé à une âpre lutte de pouvoir.

1.title: FR - Scissor Seven - S01E01 - How to Get Rich
1.plot: Cash-strapped Seven flunks a crash course in professional killing and opens a hair salon as a cover. First assignment: cut off a bride's hair.

1.title: FR - Scissor Seven - S01E02 - Blind Your Eyes
1.plot: Meow, the Chief of Cats, hires Seven to wipe out an old flame. But after hearing a star-crossed interspecies love story, he attempts to make peace.

1.title: FR - Scissor Seven - S01E03 - Seven vs. Thirteen
1.plot: It's scissors versus sword as Seven faces off against Thirteen. He's no match for his deft opponent — so he transforms into half a durian.

1.title: FR - Scissor Seven - S01E04 - Assassinating Underpantsman
1.plot: The Island Purity Society summons Seven to kill an underwear collector, but Seven encourages everyone to embrace their differences.

1.title: FR - Scissor Seven - S01E05 - Assassinating a Domineering Grannie
1.plot: Seven shape-shifts into a cardboard box and contends with a stabby, swindling fruit vendor whose grandson got a bad haircut from Seven's shears.

1.title: FR - Scissor Seven - S01E06 - Assassinating a Pretty Girl
1.plot: Cola, Seven's next target, enlists his help in checking off a bucket list of mischievous deeds, but the client who hired Seven has a secret.

1.title: FR - Scissor Seven - S01E07 - Assassinating Captain Jack
1.plot: On behalf of the underfunded coast guard, Seven agrees to kill the captain of a submarine that's threatening the island.

1.title: FR - Scissor Seven - S01E08 - Bodyguard Dachun
1.plot: Hired by a woman to assassinate her husband, Seven confronts — and bonds with — impervious bodyguard He Dachun, who makes a heartrending sacrifice.

1.title: FR - Scissor Seven - S01E09 - Crisis on the Island
1.plot: Seven teams up with islanders to stop the Prince of Stan from extracting an energy rock and destroying the island, but Stan's technology is too robust.

1.title: FR - Scissor Seven - S01E10 - Thousand Demon Daggers
1.plot: Thirteen comes to Seven's aid in a heated clash with the Prince of Stan. Seven recalls his past as a prominent figure in Xuanwu.

1.title: FR - Scissor Seven - S01E11 -
FR - Scissor Seven - S01E12 -
FR - Scissor Seven - S01E13 -
FR - Scissor Seven - S01E14 -

2.title: FR - Scissor Seven - S02E01 - Super Scissors
2.plot: He Dachun enlists Seven's help defeating a group of assassins newly arrived on the island. A tin of hair wax saves the day.

2.title: FR - Scissor Seven - S02E02 - Thirteen vs. Seven
2.plot: Thirteen seeks to deliver on her promise and destroy Seven, but she must first overcome an assassin's worst enemy — emotion.

2.title: FR - Scissor Seven - S02E03 - Protecting Mad Bark
2.plot: Mad Bark is outplayed by a new killer: a guitar-strumming dog whose acoustic "Magical Sound of Sadness" strikes a lethal chord.

2.title: FR - Scissor Seven - S02E04 - The Stan Trip
2.plot: With Seven's hands tied by an invisible lizard assassin, Cola convinces the Prince of Stan to take her to Stan.

2.title: FR - Scissor Seven - S02E05 - Again, We Meet Captain Jack
2.plot: Captain Jack returns to settle scores with Seven, who summons the powers of the Thousand Demon Daggers.

2.title: FR - Scissor Seven - S02E06 - Revenge of King Pheasant
2.plot: King Pheasant, now a special soldier for Stan, kidnaps Seven and Xiao Fei and sets out to kill Da Bao, but a ghost from the past returns.

2.title: FR - Scissor Seven - S02E07 - Plum Blossom Eleven
2.plot: Seven prepares for a date with Thirteen. When he falls for a trap, he finds a way out of the bind by channeling his tonsorial qi.

2.title: FR - Scissor Seven - S02E08 - Two Heroes
2.plot: Back in the past, Seven joins the Shadow Killers, faces off against Redtooth and sets out in search of the Thousand Demon Daggers.

2.title: FR - Scissor Seven - S02E09 - Redtooth
2.plot: Redtooth arrives on the Island to confront Chairman Jiang, who activates the powerful White Lily Blossom with Seven's help.

2.title: FR - Scissor Seven - S02E10 - Fate
2.plot: Seven reconnects with his old self, but to defeat the Blood Demon, he must harness the power of Xuanwu martial arts — and the barber within.

3.title: FR - Scissor Seven - S03E01 - Farewell
3.plot: After word spreads about Seven's triumph over the Blood Demon, Seven realizes he must leave the island in order to keep its residents safe.

3.title: FR - Scissor Seven - S03E02 - Dai Bo & Seven
3.plot: Da Bao sets out with Xiao Fei in search of Seven and recalls how Seven once bent over backwards to help him find an antidote.

3.title: FR - Scissor Seven - S03E03 - Excuse Me, Is This the Xuanwu Country?
3.plot: Seven makes a stopover in Dali Nation, known for its beautiful people — but an overlord with dark mirror magic has turned everyone hideous.

3.title: FR - Scissor Seven - S03E04 - Tenderness of a Tough Man
3.plot: Plum Blossom Eleven talks He Dachun into escorting her to Xuanwu, but Flying Bird Gate members capture her, demanding their martial arts script back.

3.title: FR - Scissor Seven - S03E05 - Rock Hard Country
3.plot: Seven arrives at He Dachun's hometown, where he must win a pentathlon against the muscular Coach Chen to save Xiao Fei from being eaten.

3.title: FR - Scissor Seven - S03E06 - Superpower Country
3.plot: In Superpower Country, Seven encounters Pingan, a boy with mind control powers. A searing battle with the Prince of Stern erupts.

3.title: FR - Scissor Seven - S03E07 - Sneaking Into Xuanwu Country
3.plot: As Cola's life hangs by a thread, Seven sneaks into Xuanwu with Da Bao and Xiao Fei to find the medicine to cure her.

3.title: FR - Scissor Seven - S03E08 - Master Green Phoenix's Scheme
3.plot: In Xuanwu, Seven faces the powerful Eyeless Sorcerer and undergoes a transformation. Thirteen struggles to choose a side.

3.title: FR - Scissor Seven - S03E09 - Memories That You Don't Want to Forget Even in Pain
3.plot: Seven fends off Xuanwu assassins while under the influence of the blade's powers, as memories of life on Chicken Island begin to fade.

3.title: FR - Scissor Seven - S03E10 - Who Is the One You Want to Protect
3.plot: Shadow assassin Manjusaka confronts Seven. In a true test of her powers, Thirteen engages in a heated clash with Blackbird.

meta.plot: Dans un petit port industriel gallois, des policiers hantés par l'échec rouvrent l'enquête abandonnée trente ans plus tôt sur les meurtres de trois adolescentes. Ce poignant thriller inspiré de faits réels explore les mécanismes de l'impunité et du deuil impossible.

1.title: FR - Steeltown Murders - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: As the CID reopen an investigation into three murders from 1973, DCI Paul Bethell tries to piece together a past that has haunted both him and a community for almost 30 years.

1.title: FR - Steeltown Murders - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: With the swabbing operation set in motion, Paul looks to not only find his killer, but to eliminate individuals whose past has been defined by false accusations and rumours.

1.title: FR - Steeltown Murders - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Through groundbreaking, familial DNA technology, the team in ‘02 manage to locate the killer. However, without 100 per cent certainty, Paul may have to rethink his approach.

1.title: FR - Steeltown Murders - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: As Paul searches for higher approval to proceed with Kappen’s exhumation, the team are concerned that his tunnel vision could leave them in a worse situation than they once were.

1.title: FR - Mémoire vive - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Mémoire vive - S01E02 - Episode 2

meta.plot: Esther Lefèvre a passé une partie de sa vie en tant que greffière au service d’un juge d’instruction et profite désormais d’une retraite sans histoire. Mais lorsqu’on lui diagnostique un début d’Alzheimer, un secret qu’elle s’était efforcée d’enfouir au fond de sa mémoire remonte à la surface. Elle extrait de ses archives une liste de noms et commence à éliminer, une à une, les personnes qui y sont mentionnées, se muant en une justicière énigmatique et maladroite. Alors qu’elle met en oeuvre sa vengeance avant que l’oubli ne la gagne, une jeune flic talentueuse et fonceuse, Célia Le Goff, voit son quotidien basculer lorsqu'elle découvre qu’un tueur en série laisse des messages à son intention sur les corps de ses victimes.

1.title: FR - L'Intruse - S01E01 -
FR - L'Intruse - S01E02 -
FR - L'Intruse - S01E03 -
FR - L'Intruse - S01E04 -
FR - Monsieur Parizot - S01E01 - Episode 1

meta.plot: Si nous connaissons monsieur Parizot comme le client emblématique du Camping Paradis, nous ne savons pas comment la mascotte de Tom Delorme et son équipe occupe son temps le reste de l’année. Dans sa maison de Colmar, ce jeune retraité s’adonne à la pratique intensive du cyclisme et assouvit une passion pour la littérature criminelle et les films policiers. Quand l'opportunité se présente, le détective amateur Christian se transforme en Hercule Poirot pour mener l'enquête à sa façon...

1.title: FR - African Dream : 60 jours pour changer de vie - S01E01 - Africa Here We Come
1.plot: Three families uproot their lives in America and move to Africa.

1.title: FR - African Dream : 60 jours pour changer de vie - S01E02 - How Did We Get Here?
1.plot: Everyone's comfort level is tested as they try to adjust to African life.

1.title: FR - African Dream : 60 jours pour changer de vie - S01E03 - Do We Fit In?
1.plot: It's hot -- and Africa's climate isn't for the fainthearted. Who endures?

1.title: FR - African Dream : 60 jours pour changer de vie - S01E04 - Survival of the Fittest
1.plot: Leaving the city provides the families with a much-needed breath of fresh air -- and unexpected spiritual awakenings.

1.title: FR - African Dream : 60 jours pour changer de vie - S01E05 - What's In A Name?
1.plot: A colorful ceremony bestows new African names upon one family as they begin planning for a promising African future.

1.title: FR - African Dream : 60 jours pour changer de vie - S01E06 - Feels Like Home

meta.plot: Quatre familles afro-américaines plient bagage et prennent le risque de partir vers une nouvelle patrie, celle des opportunités : l'Afrique. Attirées par des logements bon marché et des paysages pittoresques, ces familles parcourent 8 000 kilomètres pour trouver l'amour, un emploi et une vie meilleure. Elles devront d'abord survivre à l'inévitable choc culturel, mais si elles parviennent à tenir les 60 premiers jours, leur vie pourrait être changée à jamais.
Un ado discret rejoint un groupe de cadets choisis pour se lier à des Robots-Mechas venus de l'espace pour défendre la Terre contre une invasion extraterrestre.

1.title: FR - Mech Academy : Les cadets - S01E01 - Underdogs
1.plot: When two new Robo Mechs arrive, scrappy young academy custodian Stanford is determined to bond with them — and prove he's worthy of becoming a pilot.

1.title: FR - Mech Academy : Les cadets - S01E02 - Evolution
1.plot: Stanford joins Frank and Maya as a Mech Cadet, but his lack of training shows. A jealous Olivia's mood shifts thanks to a surprising offer.

1.title: FR - Mech Academy : Les cadets - S01E03 - Know Your Enemy
1.plot: During a training exercise led by Captain Tanaka, fiercely competitive Maya learns a valuable lesson. Dr. Miller studies the recovered Sharg eggs.

1.title: FR - Mech Academy : Les cadets - S01E04 - For All Humanity
1.plot: Captain Tanaka readies Earth's defenses when a suspicious object appears in Mars' orbit. A chilling discovery forces a lockdown of the Sky Corps campus.

1.title: FR - Mech Academy : Les cadets - S01E05 - Ghosts
1.plot: A discouraged Stanford turns to his mom for support. With the other Robos sidelined, Captain Tanaka and Maya search for the remaining Sharg.

1.title: FR - Mech Academy : Les cadets - S01E06 - Veritas
1.plot: Ava uncovers a shocking secret about Hero Force One. In the wake of a stunning reversal, a grateful Stanford grows closer to his fellow Cadets.

1.title: FR - Mech Academy : Les cadets - S01E07 - All For One
1.plot: Captain Tanaka leads the Cadets in an epic battle when a surprise attack puts Global Defense Ring units all over the world in jeopardy.

1.title: FR - Mech Academy : Les cadets - S01E08 - The Einstein-Rosen Bridge
1.plot: Olivia takes it upon herself to check out the approaching Sharg ship. But when she spies something terrifying, the other Cadets rush to her aid.

1.title: FR - Mech Academy : Les cadets - S01E09 - Dark Matter
1.plot: The team has Stanford's back as he attempts a daring repair in space outside of his Robo. A sinister threat targets the Sky Corps campus.

1.title: FR - Mech Academy : Les cadets - S01E10 - Family
1.plot: Tanaka and the Mech Cadets decide to take on the Queen Sharg — but the plan is risky, putting more than one life at risk. Can they pull it off?

meta.plot: Amateurs de farces et de bandes dessinées, les deux petits garnements Georges et Harold s'amusent à transformer leur directeur d'école en un super-héros en slip.

1.title: FR - Les aventures extraordinaires de Capitaine Superslip - S01E01 - Captain Underpants and the Frenzied Farts of Flabby Flabulous
1.plot: George and Harold get revenge on their gym teacher by writing him into a ridiculous new comic. But the joke's on them when life imitates art.

1.title: FR - Les aventures extraordinaires de Capitaine Superslip - S01E02 - Captain Underpants and the Dreadful Debacle of DJ Drowsy Drawers
1.plot: A school dance sounds like fun -- but only if the boys can keep their music teacher from playing DJ and putting everyone to sleep.

1.title: FR - Les aventures extraordinaires de Capitaine Superslip - S01E03 - Captain Underpants and the Horrible Hostilities of the Homework Hydra
1.plot: To get out of an epic assignment, George and Harold go back in time to the moment homework was invented to try and stop it before it starts.

1.title: FR - Les aventures extraordinaires de Capitaine Superslip - S01E04 - Captain Underpants and the Vexing Villiany of the Vile Vimpire
1.plot: After Erica critiques their comic book, George and Harold create a brand-new character -- a vampire who sucks the joy out of everything.

1.title: FR - Les aventures extraordinaires de Capitaine Superslip - S01E05 - Captain Underpants and the Terrifying Perlious Misfortune of the T.P. Mummy
1.plot: A T.P. prank gone wrong leads to clogged toilets -- and a fateful explosion -- that turns the boys' new French teacher into a mummy.

1.title: FR - Les aventures extraordinaires de Capitaine Superslip - S01E06 - Captain Underpants and the Squishy Predicament of the Stanley Peet's Stinky Pits
1.plot: Holy guacamole! George and Harold are so determined to win an avocado-growing contest that they accidentally turn their science teacher into a monster.

1.title: FR - Les aventures extraordinaires de Capitaine Superslip - S01E07 - Captain Underpants and the Costly Conundrum of the Calamitous Claylossus
1.plot: Rumors swirl around the shadowy Bo Hweemuth, a mysterious student with secret gifts who has the whole school living in fear.

1.title: FR - Les aventures extraordinaires de Capitaine Superslip - S01E08 - Captain Underpants and the Jarring Jerkiness of the Judge J.O.R.T.S.
1.plot: The boys' latest comic inspires their jorts-wearing Spanish teacher to become a superhero with otherworldly powers.

1.title: FR - Les aventures extraordinaires de Capitaine Superslip - S01E09 - Captain Underpants and the Strange Strife of the Smelly Socktopus
1.plot: After Erica compares her suspension to a vacation, a jealous George and Harold pull every prank in the book so they can get suspended, too.

1.title: FR - Les aventures extraordinaires de Capitaine Superslip - S01E10 - Captain Underpants and the Flustering Mindless Woe of the Flushable Memory Wipes
1.plot: A chocolate-pudding "incident" sends George and Harold into hiding. But there's a new principal when they come back -- and no one remembers them!

1.title: FR - Les aventures extraordinaires de Capitaine Superslip - S01E11 - Captain Underpants and the Soggy Salvation of the Swirling Sweatnami
1.plot: The boys travel back in time to stop Mr. Krupp from becoming a bully, only to find that their plan has turned him into a ruthless businessman.

1.title: FR - Les aventures extraordinaires de Capitaine Superslip - S01E12 - Captain Underpants and the Sickening Fumes of Smartsy Fartsy
1.plot: To steal Mr. Krupp's rule book from a tightly locked safe, the boys cook up a super-intelligent gas cloud who winds up turning against them.

1.title: FR - Les aventures extraordinaires de Capitaine Superslip - S01E13 - Captain Underpants and the Troublesome Treachery of the Thieving Toot Fairy
1.plot: It's a race against time as George and Harold try to get Mr. Krupp fired before he can have them expelled. But first: a faceoff with the Toot Fairy!

meta.plot: Baby Boss invite son grand frère Tim au travail pour lui montrer les ficelles du business dans cette série inspirée du film d'animation à succès.

1.title: FR - The Boss Baby: Back in Business - S01E01 - Scooter Buskie
1.plot: The constantly crying "worst baby in the world" is making life miserable for all of his neighbors.  Can Boss Baby's field team turn things around?

1.title: FR - The Boss Baby: Back in Business - S01E02 - Cat's in the Cradle
1.plot: Competition for cuteness heats up when a stray kitten appears on the Templetons' doorstep and the family decides to take him in.

1.title: FR - The Boss Baby: Back in Business - S01E03 - Family Fun Night
1.plot: Family Fun NIght turns into Baby Work Night when trouble follows the Templetons to the grand opening of a seemingly purr-fect restaurant.

1.title: FR - The Boss Baby: Back in Business - S01E04 - Formula for Menace: A Dekker Moonboots Mystery
1.plot: Tim's alter ego, space detective Dekker Moonboots, steps in to solve a Baby Corp mystery -- and mounting clues suggest it's an inside job.

1.title: FR - The Boss Baby: Back in Business - S01E05 - Monster Machine
1.plot: The Field team enters one of their own in the prestigious Lil' Dumpling Pageant to make sure the winner is someone Baby Corp can trust.

1.title: FR - The Boss Baby: Back in Business - S01E06 - The Constipation Situation
1.plot: A backed-up Boss Baby is forced to take a sick day when his system stalls -- and he can't go boom-boom. Now it's up to tim ti take over.

1.title: FR - The Boss Baby: Back in Business - S01E07 - The Boss Babysitter
1.plot: The brothers stay home with a babysitter while their parents go out for the night.  Boss Baby wants to make her look bad -- but she's just too good.

1.title: FR - The Boss Baby: Back in Business - S01E08 - Into the Belly of the Den of the House of the Nest of Cats
1.plot: While Tim works overtime to do good in the neighborhood, Staci and Boss Baby go undercover to rescue Jimbo from a house that's crawling with cats.

1.title: FR - The Boss Baby: Back in Business - S01E09 - Spirit Day
1.plot: The team suits up to stop Mega FAT CEO Baby from winning an office spirit day contest that's totally rigged.  Because nobody likes a bully.

1.title: FR - The Boss Baby: Back in Business - S01E10 - Par Avion
1.plot: A "free" family vacation comes at a cost when Tim's tasked with keeping a plane full of babies calm on an eight-hour flight to Paris.

1.title: FR - The Boss Baby: Back in Business - S01E11 - Cat Cop!
1.plot: The Templetons cross paths with a "Cat Cop" with connections to cunning villain Bootsy Calico.  Tim masters the art of negotiation.

1.title: FR - The Boss Baby: Back in Business - S01E12 - Hang in There, Baby
1.plot: An after-hours break-in to save Boss Baby's job transforms a do-gooding Tim into the daring Tim Templeton: Unleashed.

1.title: FR - The Boss Baby: Back in Business - S01E13 - Six Well-Placed Kittens
1.plot: With Bootsy Calico's plan in full swing, Boss Baby rallies his co-workers to bring Calico and his kittens down and save the town.

1.title: FR - Cinq majeur - S01E01 - Meet the Hoopers (1)
1.plot: LeBron faces a minutes restriction, Jayson aims to cement his legacy with a championship, and Jimmy taps into his diverse interests for an on-court edge.

1.title: FR - Cinq majeur - S01E02 - Meet the Hoopers (2)
1.plot: Anthony stays focused on competing amid buzz about his bright future, while Domantas strives to balance family life with his demanding road schedule.

1.title: FR - Cinq majeur - S01E03 - Survival of the Fittest
1.plot: Rest and recovery regimens are especially vital for the players as the league's first In-Season Tournament brings playoff-level intensity — and injuries.

1.title: FR - Cinq majeur - S01E04 - Father Christmas
1.plot: The players enjoy a festive morning with their families before the Christmas Day games, where Jayson and LeBron go head-to-head in a holiday showdown.

1.title: FR - Cinq majeur - S01E05 - The Struggle Is Real
1.plot: Jimmy works on a country music project, Domantas learns of his All-Star snub, and Jayson faces backlash after losing to a shorthanded Lakers squad.

1.title: FR - Cinq majeur - S01E06 - All Star, Baby
1.plot: LeBron achieves a historic milestone post-All-Star break, Jimmy plays through grief, and Anthony prepares to welcome his firstborn.

1.title: FR - Cinq majeur - S01E07 - Push
1.plot: The players reflect on fatherhood as Anthony embraces his new role as a dad. On the court, the teams battle to secure top seeds and playoff berths.

1.title: FR - Cinq majeur - S01E08 - I'm Here!
1.plot: The season ends for Domantas as Jimmy and the Heat take on the 76ers in the Play-In Tournament. Anthony shines in a game against his idol, Kevin Durant.

2.title: FR - Cinq majeur - S02E01 - Play to Win
2.plot: As the road to the NBA Finals begins, Tyrese, Jaylen, Kevin, James and Shai reawaken rivalries and their relentless pursuit of basketball immortality.

2.title: FR - Cinq majeur - S02E02 - Love & Basketball
2.plot: Shai silences last year's champions while juggling fatherhood and fame. James rewrites his personal playbook. A tough loss tests Tyrese's confidence.

2.title: FR - Cinq majeur - S02E03 - Time Keeps on Slippin'
2.plot: As the basketball season barrels ahead, our five superstars face different crossroads. But greatness is on the clock — and the grind is unrelenting.

2.title: FR - Cinq majeur - S02E04 - Mama's Boys
2.plot: Jaylen reflects on his roots. Shai visits his hometown of Toronto. As the holidays bring joy, a high-stakes clash on the court sparks wild trade rumors.

2.title: FR - Cinq majeur - S02E05 - Ring Chasing
2.plot: A blockbuster trade rocks the league. Through rumors and doubt, Kevin chases milestones. In Paris, pressure mounts on and off the court for Tyrese.

2.title: FR - Cinq majeur - S02E06 - Changing of the Guards
2.plot: Tyrese and Shai face off in a potential Finals preview. Jaylen stays grounded as Boston finishes near the top of the league. Kevin suffers a setback.

2.title: FR - Cinq majeur - S02E07 - What the Hali
2.plot: The NBA playoff gauntlet begins. Heartbreak comes for Jaylen and the Celtics as Tyrese leads the Pacers on a red-hot run. Shai dominates against Denver.

2.title: FR - Cinq majeur - S02E08 - Collision Course
2.plot: All the blood, sweat and ice baths have led to this. With legacy on the line, Tyrese and Shai lead their teams on a collision course for the NBA crown.

meta.plot: Cette série sportive captivante suit Jimmy Butler, Anthony Edwards, LeBron James, Domantas Sabonis et Jayson Tatum tout au long de la saison de NBA 2023-2024.

1.title: FR - Être un Hilton - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Marie-Claude Savard meets boxer Alex Hilton, who agrees to tell the incredible story of the Hilton brothers, who left their mark on Quebec.

1.title: FR - Être un Hilton - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Were the Hilton brothers controlled by the Montreal mafia? Marie-Claude explores the darker side of the clan's history.

1.title: FR - Être un Hilton - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: As she prepares to step into the ring, Marie-Claude understands what it means “to be a Hilton” and what has happened to this clan.

meta.plot: Série documentaire sur le destin tragique des plus grands boxeurs des années 80 et 90 au Québec, les frères Hilton : Dave, Matthew et Alex. Marie-Claude Savard raconte l’histoire invraisemblable de cette famille, recueille des confidences troublantes sur l’implication de la mafia montréalaise, et accompagne Alex Hilton qui tente de reprendre sa vie en main.aire portée par Marie-Claude Savard, sur l’histoire tragique des boxeurs Dave, Matthew et Alex Hilton.

César Casalonga a deux passions dans la vie : son métier de conseiller politique où il excelle comme stratège et son patron, Paul Francoeur, qu’il accompagne depuis 20 ans dans l’ascension qui doit le conduire à la présidence de la République.

1.title: FR - Dans l'ombre - S01E01 - 50,47 %
FR - Dans l'ombre - S01E02 - The black cat
FR - Dans l'ombre - S01E03 - The response
FR - Dans l'ombre - S01E04 - Chosen by lightning
FR - Dans l'ombre - S01E05 - Dancing on a Volcano
FR - Dans l'ombre - S01E06 - The smell of gasoline
FR - Un soupçon - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Un soupçon - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Un soupçon - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Un soupçon - S01E04 - Episode 4

meta.plot: Librement inspiré d'une histoire vraie. Qui est Isabelle ? Une meurtrière ou une mère au foyer ? C’est ce que veut comprendre la capitaine de gendarmerie Mathilde Delboscq chargée de l’enquête sur la mort du mari d’Isabelle... C’est le début d’une enquête, puis d’une plongée dans la vie d’une femme au destin unique.

1.title: FR - Lethally Blonde - S01E01 - Too Fast Too Furious
1.plot: When detectives respond to a 911 call from a lavish Miami apartment, they uncover a bloody scene with a wildly successful social media influencer at the center; as they piece events together, it's clear a lot is going on behind closed doors.

1.title: FR - Lethally Blonde - S01E02 - The Porn Identity
1.plot: All-American Midwestern hunk Timothy Boham's innocent modeling career catapults him into porn industry stardom; when Tim tries to escape the vicious cycle of selling his body for money, running from his past proves to be deadly.

meta.plot: Nick Monohan, un officier de police de Chicago, se fait offrir le rôle de chef de police dans une banlieue exclusive et clôturée nommée The Gates (littéralement « les portes »). Mais ce qui semblait un lieu de résidence paradisiaque pour la famille Monohan tourne rapidement au cauchemar, car une grande partie des habitants de la ville est constituée de créatures surnaturelles de toutes sortes. Nick tentera donc de faire régner l’ordre dans la communauté, tout en protégeant sa famille des vampires, loups-garous, sorcières et succubes qui l’entourent.

1.title: FR - The Gates - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: The Monohan family move into their new home in The Gates, an exclusive community of perfectly manicured lawns and friendly neighbors. But things grow complicated when Nick Monohan, the new Chief of Police, has to investigate those neighbors in a missing persons case during his first day on the job. Claire and Dylan Radcliff fight to hide not only their involvement in Nick's case, but their rather unusual family secret. Meanwhile, Charlie Monohan tries to adjust to his new school, finding a friend in the beautiful but unavailable Andie Bates. Just when his family is finally settling in, Nick's world is rocked by a late-night caller with some terrible news.

1.title: FR - The Gates - S01E02 - What Lies Beneath
1.plot: Nick investigates the death of the last Chief of Police, disturbed by what he's starting to discover about The Gates. Claire Radcliff deals with the repercussions from her recent transgression, fighting to put the past behind her. At school, Andie struggles to sort out her blossoming feelings for Charlie. And Brett works hard to keep dating Andie while fighting off Lukas' tempting offer to "come running" .

1.title: FR - The Gates - S01E03 - Breach
1.plot: There's been a robbery at the McCallisters', setting off a series of similar mysterious robberies around town. Meanwhile Brett does his best to get his relationship back on track with Andie, though she still finds herself drawn to Charlie; Lukas encourages Brett to join the pack and blow off a little steam; Leigh is not herself when she loses an important package, and possibly her connection with Marcus; and Claire reunites with an old friend who questions her transformation to a humble housewife.

1.title: FR - The Gates - S01E04 - The Monster Within
1.plot: A missing hunter casts unwanted attention on Brett and the pack, creating tension with Coach Ross. Meanwhile Nick and Dylan try to put their differences aside during The Gates Father/Daughter Dance, with mixed results; and Andie and Charlie's relationship looks like it's headed for smooth sailing, until an unexpected secret turns everything upside down.

1.title: FR - The Gates - S01E05 - Repercussions
1.plot: Nick is forced into an alliance with a vampire; Marcus looks into Teresa's disappearance; a recent discovery threatens Andie's new relationship.

1.title: FR - The Gates - S01E06 - Jurisdiction
1.plot: Nick asks Dylan for help finding the killer when a neighbor is murdered by a vampire; Claire tries to end her arrangement with Christian; Andie decides to not take her medicine.

1.title: FR - The Gates - S01E07 - Digging the Dirt
1.plot: Dylan and Nick search for a damaging secret about Frank; social politics threaten Sarah's pool party; Devon experiments with Internet dating.

1.title: FR - The Gates - S01E08 - Dog Eat Dog
1.plot: Nick tries to defuse a possible turf war between werewolves and vampires; Brett and Andie's relationship rekindles; Mia turns to Devon for guidance.

1.title: FR - The Gates - S01E09 - Identity Crisis
1.plot: An FBI agent searches for a criminal who may have taken refuge in The Gates; Andie grows weaker by the day; Charlie finds himself with an unexpected new crush; Dylan and Claire struggle to repair their bond.

1.title: FR - The Gates - S01E10 - Little Girl Lost
1.plot: Dylan and Claire ask Nick for help after Emily is kidnapped. Nick's search will lead him outside The Gates and to some horrific truths about their vampire past. Sarah, who's feeling left out, presses Nick for details about the case. The realities of Brett's relationship with Andie surface while Charlie becomes aware that those around him are not human.

1.title: FR - The Gates - S01E11 - Surfacing
1.plot: Nick's past comes back to haunt him - again. Emily's Aunt Nancy shows up with a social worker to find out all about the Radcliffe's home life and Claire fears this could be dangerous for her family. Dana makes a concerted effort to reunite Charlie and Andie but romance is put on the back burner when someone or something schemes to torment the Monohan family.

1.title: FR - The Gates - S01E12 - Bad Moon Rising
1.plot: Vanessa and Frank's latest decision may just tear apart The Gates. Sarah shuns those around her and seeks temporary relief with Devon after learning that The Gates abounds with Supernaturals, but she's going to learn that Devon is the one person she can't trust. Brett is enraged that Andie and Charlie are back together but his extreme actions to remedy this will have far-reaching effects.

1.title: FR - The Gates - S01E13 - Moving Day
1.plot: Devastated by recent events, the Monohans decide to leave The Gates; the Radcliffes pursue Devon; Brett desperately searches for Andie.

meta.plot: Week-End Family nous plonge au cœur d’une tribu « super recomposée » : un père, ses ex, ses filles… Et sa nouvelle compagne. Une tribu chaotique, drôle, et irrésistible qui se retrouve chaque week-end.

1.title: FR - Week-End Family - S01E01 - Fresh Start
1.plot: The girls find out that Fred has been hiding his relationship with Emma, who is due back to Canada.

1.title: FR - Week-End Family - S01E02 - Zero Waste
1.plot: The girls’ mothers want to get to know Emma at Sunday Brunch but they picked the worst weekend!

1.title: FR - Week-End Family - S01E03 - Double Axel
1.plot: The family is gifted Axel, a virtual assistant, and confronts the importance of privacy.

1.title: FR - Week-End Family - S01E04 - The Deep End
1.plot: Fred is ill so this weekend, Emma has to take care of the girls all by herself.

1.title: FR - Week-End Family - S01E05 - The Neighbor's Get Together
1.plot: At the neighbors’ get-together, secrets are revealed and Emma meets her new thesis advisor.

1.title: FR - Week-End Family - S01E06 - The Ranch's Farewell
1.plot: As the family takes part of the Sunday’s flea market, they have to let go of certain things.

1.title: FR - Week-End Family - S01E07 - Back to Nature
1.plot: The family embarks on a Treasure Trail in the Fontainebleau forest to celebrate Vic’s birthday.

1.title: FR - Week-End Family - S01E08 - Do-Over
1.plot: As Emma has doubts about her new life, the girls prepare a surprise.

2.title: FR - Week-End Family - S02E01 - Operation Venice
2.plot: One year of living together calls for a celebration! Following Stan’s bad advice, Fred challenges himself to take Emma to Venice without leaving Paris. To make things harder, Romy decides that she wants to live with her dad during the week since Helena, now pregnant, won’t stop talking about her baby. Vic refuses to take a shower or change her clothes. Clara, obsessed with the issue of overconsumption, imposes drastic cuts on the whole family. Fred’s romantic evening is off to a rough start!

2.title: FR - Week-End Family - S02E02 - Surprise Surprise
2.plot: Grandma Jo, Fred’s mother, shows up by surprise. Fred is certain that she is going to announce that she wants to move in with him and the family for good. Grandma Jo indeed has something to tell Fred, but it is not what he thinks. On their end, Romy and Vic put themselves in a complicated situation and try to save Helena’s “gender reveal” party.

2.title: FR - Week-End Family - S02E03 - The Party
2.plot: For her tenth birthday, Romy wants to organize a legendary party. She needs all hands on deck: Vic is in charge of entrances and exits and Clara has to get the cake. As for Fred and Emma, they only have one mission: to stay away from the living room. This is not a problem for Emma who has an important meeting. But for Fred, it’s a nightmare.

2.title: FR - Week-End Family - S02E04 - Who Framed Fred
2.plot: When Fred gets home, things are in disarray: Vic has not started reading the book she will be tested on next Monday, Romy was caught cheating at school, and Clara has catastrophic grades on her drivers’ test. The worst comes when Fred sees his ratings as a physio on the Internet: a certain Coconut12 gave him a zero. With the girls’ help, along with Emma and Stan, Fred tries to find out who the troll is.

2.title: FR - Week-End Family - S02E05 - Your Mothers and Me
2.plot: Vic tries to understand if her feelings for Nolan are reciprocal and asks her sisters for advice. But, since Emma is away at a seminar this weekend, Fred is alone with his daughters and is determined to meddle in their business. In order to show Vic what mistakes not to make, Fred dives into his past and tells the girls how he met their mothers.

2.title: FR - Week-End Family - S02E06 - All Aboard!
2.plot: The entire family gets together to organize the summer holidays and it is not an easy feat. Emma proposes to handle it before realizing that it is a much more arduous task than it seems. Especially since Vic and Clara reveal certain things that leave Fred shocked and complicates things further. While Romy is busy and no one knows what she’s up to, Fred challenges Clara to realize a number of impossible tasks.

2.title: FR - Week-End Family - S02E07 - Radio Caroline
2.plot: Emma runs into Caroline, an old college friend who is a real word mill. Unable to get a sentence in, Emma lets Caroline believe that she does not have any children and introduces Clara as her neighbor. When the job that Caroline gets for Clara turns into a fiasco, things get complicated for Emma. Meanwhile, Fred tries his best to put together a piece of furniture to give as a present to Jean and Helena, who is very close to having the baby.

2.title: FR - Week-End Family - S02E08 - Home Sweet Home
2.plot: The family gets an impromptu visit from a real estate agent who has come to deliver some bad news: their apartment’s owner has decided to sell, and the visits start tomorrow. The family has mixed feelings about this. Fred, in a panic, tries to come up with ways to discourage potential buyers with the girls’ help so that they can keep the apartment. Emma starts imagining their lives elsewhere…

1.title: FR - Ridley Jones - S01E01 - Ready or Not, Here I Com
1.plot: A special necklace has gone missing, and if Ridley can't find it, her mom could lose her job!

1.title: FR - Ridley Jones - S01E02 - Some Like It Hot
1.plot: Ridley must rescue a pint-sized penguin from the desert.

1.title: FR - Ridley Jones - S01E03 - Fly Like an Eagle
1.plot: Dudley the dodo causes a museum mix-up when he switches exhibits.

1.title: FR - Ridley Jones - S01E04 - My Dinner with Ismat
1.plot: Egyptian queen Ismat wants to hide her family's royal routine from her friends.

1.title: FR - Ridley Jones - S01E05 - Un-Fit for a Queen
1.plot: Ismat shares a secret with Ridley and Fred the bison during a sleepover.

1.title: FR - Ridley Jones - S01E06 - Peaches, We Have a Problem
1.plot: Space monkey Peaches must help her friends avoid the new security system.

2.title: FR - Ridley Jones - S02E01 - Bison Ball
FR - Ridley Jones - S02E02 - Dude, Where's Our Egg?
FR - Ridley Jones - S02E03 - Northern Lights
FR - Ridley Jones - S02E04 - Slow Place Like Home
FR - Ridley Jones - S02E05 - A Stamp for Mama

meta.plot: Ridley et ses amis protègent les trésors du Muséum d'histoire naturelle et gardent son secret magique en sécurité : tout prend vie la nuit !

1.title: FR - Oggy and the Cockroaches The Next Generation - S01E01 - Bitter Chocolate
1.plot: Oggy gets a box of cherry-chocolates delivered to his home and goes inside to enjoy them. However, the roaches - Joey, Marky and Dee Dee have decided to take it for themselves, and a chase begins throughout the house. Jack nurses Oggy and vows to get back the box of sweets, even if it involves blowing up the house.

1.title: FR - Oggy and the Cockroaches The Next Generation - S01E02 - It's All Under Control
1.plot: During an afternoon, Jack is snoozing on his hammock while Oggy is tending the garden. The cockroaches jump into Jack's head so that they can control him to wreak havoc on Oggy.

1.title: FR - Oggy and the Cockroaches The Next Generation - S01E03 - The Lottery Ticket
1.plot: Oggy and Jack won the lottery ticket number for a massive sum of money, but the cockroaches want the lottery ticket for the much-needed money as well.

1.title: FR - Oggy and the Cockroaches The Next Generation - S01E04 - The Time Machine
1.plot: Poor Oggy, as usual, gets in an accident involving Jack against the cockroaches in retaliation of his cake being eaten, ending up being squashed into a disk. To make sure he'll never repeat that mistake twice, Jack builds a time machine to go back in time and prevent the accident. Unfortunately for him, turning forward - and back - the clock may yield unwanted results.

1.title: FR - Oggy and the Cockroaches The Next Generation - S01E05 - Oggy and the Babies
1.plot: Oggy and Jack, after eradicating the cockroaches from their house, receive 3 baby kittens that look like Jack - little do they knew and suspect that these bundles of joy are actually the roaches in disguise, obviously in retaliation for being kicked out of the house.

1.title: FR - Oggy and the Cockroaches The Next Generation - S01E06 - So Lonely
1.plot: Oggy finally manages to remove the cockroaches out of his home permanently, but gradually regrets doing so, as he starts to miss them, leading to a severe tantrum.

1.title: FR - Oggy and the Cockroaches The Next Generation - S01E07 - Baby Doll
1.plot: Oggy is playing with his doll and its included playhouse. The cockroaches, however, have taken the playhouse for themselves and when Marky spots the doll, he falls in love with it. This results in Oggy making an all-out siege on the playhouse to take back what's rightfully his.

1.title: FR - Oggy and the Cockroaches The Next Generation - S01E08 - A Tip for the Road
1.plot: Oggy, in order to get his driver's license, takes driving lessons with the driving instructor. The cockroaches, of course, try their best to shift the chaos into turbo.

1.title: FR - Oggy and the Cockroaches The Next Generation - S01E09 - A Dog Day Afternoon
1.plot: Oggy arrives at home after shopping and trips over a small pup. He takes it inside and start pinching his own nose as a squeezing toy to play with the pup. When Jack arrives he, of course, begins to think that Oggy has gone crazy as Jack and the pup are not seen simultaneously.

1.title: FR - Oggy and the Cockroaches The Next Generation - S01E10 - It's a Long Way Down
1.plot: While Jack takes up mountain climbing, Oggy intends on reading a good book from his library, only to end up getting stranded in some very high book shelves by the cockroaches, while Jack is having problems of his own at the mountain. Looks like it's going to be a real long way down for both of our feline friends...

1.title: FR - Oggy and the Cockroaches The Next Generation - S01E11 - Bugball
1.plot: Oggy gets his hands on a new, super bouncing-ball. He decides to try it out and it soon bounces all over the house, wrecking everything in its path. And things don't get any better when Joey accidentally swallows it.

1.title: FR - Oggy and the Cockroaches The Next Generation - S01E12 - Emergency Room
1.plot: Oggy was sent to the hospital when he tripped over down the stairs in pursuit while Jack watched over him. Unfortunately for him, the cockroaches decide to take a visit to the hospital - just to make an already bad situation worse for Oggy.

1.title: FR - Oggy and the Cockroaches The Next Generation - S01E13 - Occupied
1.plot: Oggy desperately needs to use the bathroom, but the cockroaches have it occupied and do all what they can to keep him out.

meta.plot: Oggy, un chat anthropomorphe, préférerait passer ses journées à regarder la télévision et à manger, mais est harcelé en permanence par trois cafards : Joey, Marky et Dee Dee. Les méfaits burlesques des cafards vont du pillage du réfrigérateur d'Oggy au détournement du train dans lequel il vient de monter. Dans de nombreuses situations, Oggy est également aidé par Jack, qui est plus violent et colérique que lui et est également agacé par les cafards. Bob, un bouledogue colérique, apparaît également dans la série et est le voisin d'Oggy.

FR - Little Angel Face - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Little Angel Face - S01E03 - Episode 3
