1.title: FR - Kerviel : Un trader, 50 milliards - S01E01 - Just One Man
1.plot: On January 24, 2008, French bank Société Générale announces a sudden loss of €4.9 billion, leading to an investigation of trader Jérôme Kerviel.

1.title: FR - Kerviel : Un trader, 50 milliards - S01E02 - Delta One
1.plot: When the bank discovers €50 billion in hidden trades, a specialist is brought in to sell the positions and divert a market crash.

1.title: FR - Kerviel : Un trader, 50 milliards - S01E03 - The Idol
1.plot: As charges loom, Kerviel speaks out against the system he claims encouraged his risky trades, using the media frenzy to rally public opinion.

1.title: FR - Kerviel : Un trader, 50 milliards - S01E04 - And Yet, It Governs Us
1.plot: In the years following his trial, Kerviel's case reveals deep flaws in the global financial system as further testimonies come to light.

meta.plot: Le 24 janvier 2008, la Société Générale, l'une des plus grandes banques françaises, provoquait un séisme en annonçant une perte de 4,9 milliards d'euros, liée à une fraude commise par l'un de ses traders, alors inconnu.  Du choc initial à la saga médiatico-judiciaire qui a suivi, cette série documentaire retrace , en 4 épisodes , les événements clés de cette affaire devenue un symbole des dérives de la finance:  Le choc de l’annonce, les trois jours où la banque a cherché à limiter ses pertes dans la plus grande discrétion, et examine la personnalité complexe de Jérôme Kerviel, un homme traqué par les médias, placé aux cœurs d'un combat judiciaire avec de forts enjeux politiques.

1.title: FR - United We Fall [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Bill and Jo juggle a typical day that starts with a parent-teacher conference and ends with a trip to the ER. After defending their parenting style, or lack thereof, to teachers, doctors and social workers, they find comfort in the fact that their kids are healthy and happy and that they’re all in this together.

1.title: FR - United We Fall [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - The Biter
1.plot: At Chuy’s insistence, Bill and Jo finally enroll Lulu in preschool only to discover she is a biter. While they navigate incident reports and overprotective parents, Sandy explores their family history with an ancestry DNA kit.

1.title: FR - United We Fall [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Date Night
1.plot: Bill and Jo reluctantly ask Sandy to babysit after Chuy and Brie convince them to join their weekly date night. And while Bill and Jo discover they’re a bit rusty at romance, Sandy discovers she’s a bit rusty at parenting.

1.title: FR - United We Fall [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Participation Trophy
1.plot: In an attempt to get Emily interested in something other than her tablet, Bill and Jo enroll her in her uncle Chuy's soccer clinic. Sandy's infamous gift-giving habit gets out of hand.

1.title: FR - United We Fall [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - My Favorite Marta
1.plot: Jo steps in as a role model for her teenage niece Marta, much to her strict father Chuy's dismay; while under the influence of post-colonoscopy drugs, Sandy inadvertently professes her love for her first husband, Dave.

1.title: FR - United We Fall [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - You're Doing It Wrong
1.plot: Bill and Jo take their niece Marta in after she clashes with her father, while Bill regrets playing matchmaker when he gets wind of Dave’s plans to propose to Sandy.

meta.plot: Le quotidien compliqué de Jo et Bill, un couple qui élève ses deux jeunes enfants avec l'aide de leurs deux familles respectives, très voire trop impliquées dans leur éducation. Mais ensemble et avec beaucoup d'amour, tout semble possible...
À cause d'une vidéo devenue virale, Toon, jeune compositeur solitaire et asocial, voit ses pires cauchemars se réaliser quand il accède soudainement à la célébrité.

1.title: FR - Toon [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Party
1.plot: It's Toon's birthday and all he wants to do is kick back with a new video game. But he's about to learn that his sister's got something big planned.

1.title: FR - Toon [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Talk
1.plot: After his impromptu performance goes viral, Toon is asked to be a guest on a talk show. Elise -- now Toon's manager -- bumps into an old rival.

1.title: FR - Toon [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Deadline
1.plot: Tick, tick, tick... Toon and Nina have just one day to impress a record label by writing and completing an all-new song from scratch.

1.title: FR - Toon [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Music Video
1.plot: There's been a massive miscommunication about Toon's vision for his music video and now nobody's happy. Cue the buckets of white body paint!

1.title: FR - Toon [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Nieuwegein
1.plot: Things get real weird real quick when a woman mistakes Toon for her blind date. Also, Nina investigates her ex's odd interest in her online photos.

1.title: FR - Toon [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Condolences
1.plot: Toon and Nina are roped into taking part in a charity's fundraising video. Later, the pair attends a fan's awkward funeral.

1.title: FR - Toon [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - Jury
1.plot: Toon is asked to serve as guest judge on a DJ talent show. It's good publicity, but there's a problem -- he knows nothing about electronic dance music.

1.title: FR - Toon [VOSTFR] - S01E08 - Finale
1.plot: Set to perform a show that could turn Nina and him into international stars, Toon struggles with a troublesome truth: fame isn't for him.

2.title: FR - Toon [VOSTFR] - S02E01 - A Palace of Mold
2.plot: Elise asks Toon to drop his videogame controller and come to Berlin to talk some sense into the increasingly famous -- and out-of-control -- Nina.

2.title: FR - Toon [VOSTFR] - S02E02 - Fishtank Manager Legends
2.plot: Seeking to capitalize on her brother's popularity with gamers, Elise brings Toon to a gamer event where he makes some unexpected connections.

2.title: FR - Toon [VOSTFR] - S02E03 - Dinner With Friends
2.plot: Toon -- who can't cook and has no friends -- tries to put together a dinner party in order to fool Becky into thinking he actually has a life.

2.title: FR - Toon [VOSTFR] - S02E04 - Open Your Potential
2.plot: Robbie can't wait to speak at a motivational seminar. Meanwhile, Toon and Becky can't wait to escape. Also, Nina's guitarist just isn't feeling it.

2.title: FR - Toon [VOSTFR] - S02E05 - Eighty
2.plot: After Becky's vlog goes viral, Toon reaps the rewards. Also, Toon swings by a neighbor's birthday party and Nina's band hits a breaking point.

2.title: FR - Toon [VOSTFR] - S02E06 - Bachelor Party
2.plot: Toon struggles to make his life as a reality TV star look at least kind of interesting. Robbie organizes a bachelor party for Dylan.

2.title: FR - Toon [VOSTFR] - S02E07 - Premiere
2.plot: Toon and Nina stumble through an uncomfortable encounter while mingling at the premiere of "The Deportation."

2.title: FR - Toon [VOSTFR] - S02E08 - Bunnik
2.plot: Oblivious to the outside world, Toon and Nina lay low in Bunnik. Meanwhile, across the country and on TV, people wonder: Is Toon a sociopath?

1.title: FR - En Service - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: In the wake of tragedy, LBPD training officer Traci Harmon takes on new trainee, Alex Diaz who on day one is already learning the job is harder than he imagined.

1.title: FR - En Service - S01E02 - Laws of the Universe
1.plot: A chaotic street takeover finds our officers grossly outnumbered, revealing philosophical rifts inside West Division.

1.title: FR - En Service - S01E03 - South of Heaven
1.plot: Diaz learns that Harmon has enemies within West Division, and begins to fear she cannot be trusted.

1.title: FR - En Service - S01E04 - Unsung
1.plot: Desperate for a lead, Harmon goes off book resulting in a major breakthrough and a deadly showdown.

1.title: FR - En Service - S01E05 - Not Your Savior
1.plot: Back on patrol, the rift between Harmon and Diaz comes to a head.

1.title: FR - En Service - S01E06 - L.A. Woman
1.plot: When Diaz's family is threatened, Harmon realizes she must break her own rules to fix it.

1.title: FR - En Service - S01E07 - War Machine
1.plot: A shot caller's revenge mission results in West Division going head to head with an entire gang.

1.title: FR - En Service - S01E08 - How the West Was Won
1.plot: Harmon and Diaz join forces with an elite squad to intercept a major drug shipment.

meta.plot: À travers la formatrice Traci Harmon et la jeune recrue Alex Diaz, cette série met en lumière l'impact de ce métier sur la condition humaine. Harmon est inspirée par un jeune des rues, alors que Diaz apprend qu'être flic ne se résume pas à tout voir en noir ou blanc et qu'il faut composer avec des nuances de gris.
Brillant avocat de la défense, Cleaver Greene a un comportement parfois autodestructeur, n'hésitant pas à prendre les situations à contrepied...

1.title: FR - Rake - S01E01 - Serial Killer
1.plot: Criminal defense attorney Keegan Deane's personal shortcomings get him in one professional pickle after another in this comedy-drama, which begins with a serial killer's confession that may or may not be the work of the Los Angeles police chief. Meanwhile, a client remunerates Keegan with an expensive fish, but he needs to collect the money from a sushi restaurant so he can pay his bookie part of his gambling debt.

1.title: FR - Rake - S01E02 - A Close Shave
1.plot: Keegan defends three Amish bakers when they're accused of attempted murder for shaving off the beard of a bishop who was trying to save a woman he thought was in danger. Meanwhile, Scarlet and Ben plan a recommitment ceremony; and Keegan meets a woman on social media who shares his penchant for gambling.

1.title: FR - Rake - S01E03 - Cancer
1.plot: A mom commits insurance fraud to fuel her gambling addiction by saying her son has cancer, so Keegan searches for an approach to appeal to the jury's emotions. Meanwhile, Keegan breaks his promise to Finn to have skateboarder Tony Hawk come to his school for an auction; and an unexpected competitor takes Keegan's poker winnings.

1.title: FR - Rake - S01E04 - Cannibal
1.plot: A death in Ben's family forces him to ask Keegan to take over a case in which the mayor's chief economic adviser is accused of murdering—and eating—a young accountant. Meanwhile, Mikki makes a decision about her career.

1.title: FR - Rake - S01E05 - Bigamist
1.plot: A chef is accused of bigamy, but Keegan thinks he can convince the jury that it's not a crime—until news breaks of his other romantic relationships. Meanwhile, Mikki needs Keegan's help when a former client starts harassing her; and Scarlet faces a legal problem.

1.title: FR - Rake - S01E06 - Jury Tamperer
1.plot: A woman is charged with jury tampering after seducing a juror to get her daughter out of jail, which forces Keegan to take an unusual approach to a case and place the blame on the city for a wrongful conviction. Meanwhile, Finn won't stop sleeping with his teacher; and Keegan tries to sabotage Mikki's romance with David.

1.title: FR - Rake - S01E07 - Three Strikes
1.plot: The mayor's ban on plea deals challenges Keegan to find a way to get an old friend off the hook when he's charged with a third-strike robbery he didn't commit. Meanwhile, Ben's firm may get a new lawyer; Scarlet mulls a career move; and Keegan doesn't think Maddy can spend an entire day with her boyfriend.

1.title: FR - Rake - S01E08 - Staple Holes
1.plot: Ben takes over the law firm after the death of his father and hires Keegan, who manages to win his first case despite being completely unprepared for it, but he doesn't get the reaction he expected from the partners. Meanwhile, Leanne wants to be on Keegan's staff at Ben's firm; Bruce can't accept the fact that Maddy broke up with him; Scarlet rethinks the launch of her campaign for DA; and a new wrinkle develops in Keegan's relationship with the mayor's wife.

1.title: FR - Rake - S01E09 - Hey, Good Looking
1.plot: Keegan defends a woman charged with killing her husband, but also finds himself a suspect in the murder of the mayor. Meanwhile, Maddy tires of Bruce's stalker behavior; and Ben and Scarlet's loyalty to Keegan becomes a bone of contention.

1.title: FR - Rake - S01E10 - 50 Shades of Gay
1.plot: Mikki's former pimp, Jules, is charged with assault after an altercation with an influential agent whose status in Los Angeles prohibits witnesses from speaking out, even though it's clear that Jules is innocent. Meanwhile, Scarlet's DA campaign hits a roadblock; and Maddy has a confrontation with Finn's teacher.

1.title: FR - Rake - S01E11 - Remembrance of Taxis Past
1.plot: Keegan solicits support for Scarlet's DA campaign from a popular former governor of California, but is unnerved by Maddy's choice of a political consultant who happens to be her ex-lover. Meanwhile, Mikki's fiancé could be a formidable opponent for Scarlet.

1.title: FR - Rake - S01E12 - A Man's Best Friend
1.plot: Keegan defends a doctor who's accused of animal cruelty after an explicit video is stolen. Meanwhile, the race for DA between Scarlet and David gets ugly when personal information is leaked to the press; the Feds want to look at the financial records at Ben's firm; and Maddy rekindles a romance with an ex-girlfriend.

1.title: FR - Rake - S01E13 - Mammophile
1.plot: Keegan must use a highly unusual tactic to defend a new client and his mother, who both confess to committing the same murder in order to protect the other. Meanwhile, as a result of Finn's school auction, Keegan is stuck with Louis, an annoying boy whose father was the only bidder on the "A Day with a Lawyer" auction item. Also, Keegan discovers that Mikki is dating someone he knows.

meta.plot: Huit ans après avoir pris les rênes de l'entreprise familiale à la suite de son frère, la femme d'affaires anglo-israélienne Nessa Stein est nommée à la Chambre des Lords pour son engagement dans le processus de paix en Palestine. Lorsque son nouvel associé palestinien meurt dans d'étranges circonstances, elle est obligée de repousser la troisième phase d'un ambitieux projet en cours depuis des années consistant à connecter la Cisjordanie à un réseau de fibres optiques. C'est alors que Kasim, le fils d'une amie proche de Nessa, est kidnappé, et de mauvais souvenirs remontent à la surface.

1.title: FR - The Honourable Woman - S01E01 - The Empty Chair
1.plot: Powerful businesswoman Nessa Stein is thrown head-first into a game of political cat-and-mouse when a Palestinian businessman with close connections to her family's empire is killed.

1.title: FR - The Honourable Woman - S01E02 - The Unfaithful Husband
1.plot: Nessa's past, including her kidnap eight years previously in Gaza, is dug up by MI6 boss Sir Hugh Hayden-Hoyle, who is intent on getting answers despite being blocked by the CIA.

1.title: FR - The Honourable Woman - S01E03 - The Killing Call
1.plot: Nessa's security advisor follows a lead as he hunts down the missing boy. Meanwhile, her brother Ephra makes a startling discovery that could blow the family, and its work, apart.

1.title: FR - The Honourable Woman - S01E04 - The Ribbon Cutter
1.plot: Going back eight years, a younger Hayden-Hoyle climbs the ranks of MI6 whilst Nessa and Atika endure atrocities during their time held captive in Gaza and their captors scheme as to how she can best serve their cause.

1.title: FR - The Honourable Woman - S01E05 - Two Hearts
1.plot: As their captivity continues, we discover the secret that will bond Atika and Nessa forever. Meanwhile, an academic in Tel Aviv working at a university funded by the Steins uncovers corruption that could have far-reaching consequences.

1.title: FR - The Honourable Woman - S01E06 - The Mother Line
1.plot: When a Palestinian businessman makes Nessa an offer regarding the cabling initiative in the Middle East, Nessa discovers the full cost of her release from captivity eight years ago.

1.title: FR - The Honourable Woman - S01E07 - The Hollow Wall
1.plot: Hayden-Hoyle uncovers an international government cover-up in relation to the Stein wiretap and Ephra is drawn into making a fatal mistake. In Palestine, an act of terrorism stuns the Stein family and the wider international community and has far reaching repercussions.

1.title: FR - The Honourable Woman - S01E08 - The Paring Knife
1.plot: Hayden-Hoyle uncovers that Nessa has been manipulated both by people close to her and by governments intent on exploiting her work. A thrilling climax in the desert wastelands sees Nessa fighting to save her life and the kidnapped child's as she attempts to make her way home.

1.title: FR - The Honourable Woman - S01E09 -

meta.plot: Dodger suit les exploits du tristement célèbre pickpocket, The Artful Dodger, et du gang de Fagin alors qu'ils trouvent des moyens ingénieux de survivre aux conditions sinistres et d'exploitation du début de l'époque victorienne à Londres dans les années 1830.

1.title: FR - Dodger - S01E01 - Runaways
1.plot: Twelve-year-old orphan Jack Dawkins escapes a mill owner’s clutches. With the help of new friend Charley, they make it to London, where they first meet Fagin’s infamous gang.

1.title: FR - Dodger - S01E02 - Waxworks
1.plot: Gang member Tom returns to find his bed taken by the new boy, while a dangerous money-making opportunity arises at the unveiling of Madame Tussaud’s Queen Victoria waxwork.

1.title: FR - Dodger - S01E03 - Imposter
1.plot: A new scam is afoot as Dodger disguises himself as a posh lost boy in order to get in with a well-to-do family - the question is, will Dodger’s conscience get the best of him?

1.title: FR - Dodger - S01E04 - Mudlarks
1.plot: Charley falls into the hands of the riverside-dwelling ‘mudlarks’ and is sent on a dangerous mission by the truly terrifying Lucifer.

1.title: FR - Dodger - S01E05 - Phantom
1.plot: Fagin’s gang fight to save Tang’s life, Dodger scores a leading role at a haunted theatre, whilst Polly strikes a questionable deal with the enemy.

1.title: FR - Dodger - S01E06 - Mummy
1.plot: Dodger encounters a ‘mummy unrolling’ - a posh craze in Victorian times - and reckons it’s too good an opportunity to be missed - think of all the pockets to be picked!

meta.plot: La procureure Sylvia van Maele et Lars van Deurnen, du service d'information et d'enquête fiscales, unissent leurs forces pour s'attaquer à la criminalité financière : un univers opaque fait de sociétés boîtes aux lettres, de blanchiment d'argent, et d'entorses aux réglementations fiscales internationales. Lorsque les frontières entre la vie personnelle et la vie professionnelle de Sylvia s'effondrent, elle doit faire confiance à son intuition pour survivre, et mener à bien son enquête.

1.title: FR - Ennemi juré - S01E01 - Where's My Money
1.plot: After an aborted raid, Sylvia is about to lose her job when she receives an unexpected tip-off.

1.title: FR - Ennemi juré - S01E02 - House Rules
1.plot: When doubts arise about the threats on her life, Sylvia must choose: her investigation or Julius.

1.title: FR - Ennemi juré - S01E03 - Citizen Martin
1.plot: Guided by Nina's podcast, Sylvia and Lars dig deep into Martin Heezink's background.

1.title: FR - Ennemi juré - S01E04 - Zero-Sum
1.plot: After a fatal leak, Sylvia suspects one of her colleagues is corrupt. Lars tries to settle a debt.

1.title: FR - Ennemi juré - S01E05 - Crimefighters
1.plot: After another assassination, Sylvia and Lars follow the trail of money abroad.

1.title: FR - Ennemi juré - S01E06 - Je Maintiendrai
1.plot: Nina's breakthrough threatens both her and Julius. Together, Sylvia and Koppers try to save Julius.

1.title: FR - Ennemi juré - S01E07 - Maginot
1.plot: Sylvia and her family flee to France but remain at risk. Marcus seeks international assistance.

1.title: FR - Ennemi juré - S01E08 - Active Memory
1.plot: Martin is willing to cooperate and talk, but demands to speak to Sylvia only.

meta.plot: Onze mois après le début de la guerre d'indépendance, la capitaine Solari aura besoin de tous ses talents de pilote de Zaku pour affronter le nouveau Gundam de la Fédération Terrestre.

1.title: FR - Gundam : Requiem pour une vengeance - S01E01 - Haunted Forest
1.plot: The Red Wolf Squadron joins the battle on the European front to reclaim Cluj-Napoca. Later, Captain Solari notices something amiss.

1.title: FR - Gundam : Requiem pour une vengeance - S01E02 - Broken
1.plot: With the battle lost, an injured Captain Solari retreats with Dr. Kasuga and Lieutenant Lesean. They regroup with an infantry unit and plan an escape.

1.title: FR - Gundam : Requiem pour une vengeance - S01E03 - Junkyard
1.plot: Awakening from a nightmare, Captain Solari finds the base in ruins. She later rallies weary mechanics to assemble Zaku II units from spare parts.

1.title: FR - Gundam : Requiem pour une vengeance - S01E04 - Night Caller
1.plot: With scrappy Zaku II units, Captain Solari and Lesean mount a strong defense against the Federation mobile suits. Later, an unexpected visitor arrives.

1.title: FR - Gundam : Requiem pour une vengeance - S01E05 - The River
1.plot: Captain Solari’s convoy ambushes an EFF vehicle, but a Zeon patrol jeopardizes the mission before they can reach the outpost.

1.title: FR - Gundam : Requiem pour une vengeance - S01E06 - Convoy to Oblivion
1.plot: While Captain Solari struggles with survivor's guilt, the convoy is attacked. She decides to stay behind to secure an escape route to the spaceport.

1.title: FR - On en mangerait… ou pas : Spécial fêtes - S01E01 - All-Star Cakemas!
1.plot: Three all-stars create mind-blowing decoys of reindeer, nutcrackers and holiday wreaths. Guest judges: Rachel Bloom, Wayne Brady and Sebastian Maniscalco.

1.title: FR - On en mangerait… ou pas : Spécial fêtes - S01E02 - Snow Many Cakes
1.plot: In a jolly quest for redemption, a trio of past runner-ups replicates snow-day essentials. Guest judges: Hannah Berner, Tiffany Haddish and Devon Walker.

1.title: FR - On en mangerait… ou pas : Spécial fêtes - S01E03 - Season's Eatings
1.plot: Turkey, ham and fondue are on the menu in this battle for a spot in the finale. Guest judges: James Austin Johnson, Chris Witaske and Sasheer Zamata.

1.title: FR - On en mangerait… ou pas : Spécial fêtes - S01E04 - Tis the Season for a Winner
1.plot: The all-stars face a festive finale first: creating stunning interactive treats for the win! Guest judges: Terry Crews, Punkie Johnson and Randall Park.

meta.plot: Dans cette version festive du concours de pâtisserie, d'anciens candidats reviennent créer de délicieuses répliques de patins à glace, de figurines Casse-Noisette et autres rennes.

1.title: FR - La Guerre selon Churchill - S01E01 - The Gathering Storm
1.plot: Driven by a childhood conviction to save Britain, Winston Churchill forges a path from soldier to prime minister amid the looming threat of German forces.

1.title: FR - La Guerre selon Churchill - S01E02 - His Finest Hour
1.plot: Serving as PM and Minister of Defense, Churchill rallies the nation with speeches, aiming to attract US support as Hitler launches the Blitz on London.

1.title: FR - La Guerre selon Churchill - S01E03 - The Day of Destiny
1.plot: Churchill's unyielding efforts secure US entry into the war. But to defeat Nazi Germany, he must ally with Stalin and Roosevelt to form a Second Front.

1.title: FR - La Guerre selon Churchill - S01E04 - Out of the Storm
1.plot: As the war ends, Churchill navigates a shifting global landscape dominated by US-Soviet tensions, decolonization and the emerging nuclear era.

meta.plot: Cette série documentaire captivante explore le rôle crucial de Winston Churchill lors de la Seconde Guerre mondiale et les évènements qui ont fait de lui un dirigeant emblématique.

1.title: FR - Corbeaux - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Corbeaux - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Corbeaux - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Corbeaux - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Corbeaux - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Corbeaux - S01E06 - Episode 6

meta.plot: Quand des corps commencent à apparaître, avec comme signature commune un os de corbeau enfoncé dans la gorge, deux enquêtrices coriaces, Gabrielle et Clémence, doivent faire équipe pour élucider ces crimes qui choquent la province... et le monde entier. Les circonstances les forceront à se révéler l'une à l'autre, à souder un lien impérissable et à se questionner sur ce qui est de l'ordre du réel ou non.

1.title: FR - Echoes of the Past - S01E01 - The Beginning and the End
1.plot: When his sister dies in a scuba accident, Yehia is sent to prison for her murder. 15 years later, he emerges with one objective — revenge.

1.title: FR - Echoes of the Past - S01E02 - Doubt
1.plot: A shocking incident at a factory leaves everyone scrambling for answers. Layla begins to question the past, and claims to know who killed Nadia.

1.title: FR - Echoes of the Past - S01E03 - To Remember, or Not to Remember
1.plot: Layla makes an unlikely partner in her own hunt for the truth, but learns of a disturbing fight. At a lavish party, Yehia is caught in a chase.

1.title: FR - Echoes of the Past - S01E04 - Videotapes
1.plot: Yehia seeks tapes from the day of Nadia's murder. But to get to them, he'll need to get past a hired killer. Layla confronts her father about the past.

1.title: FR - Echoes of the Past - S01E05 - Back to the Past
1.plot: Yehia returns to the only place he believes they will find answers — the scene of the crime. Mona uncovers a startling revelation from her own past.

1.title: FR - Echoes of the Past - S01E06 - PTSD
1.plot: When Mona returns to Cairo, her presence throws everything into question. Yehia confronts a new source about Nadia's death.

1.title: FR - Echoes of the Past - S01E07 - The Price
1.plot: Layla questions Yehia about his intentions. Yassin approaches his wife with a startling ultimatum.

1.title: FR - Echoes of the Past - S01E08 - Truth and the Rebirth
1.plot: With Yehia closing in on his targets, Layla interrogates her family to finally learn why the past continues to haunt their present.

meta.plot: Accusé du meurtre de sa sœur, Yehia est farouchement déterminé à obtenir vengeance et démasquer le vrai coupable.

1.title: FR - Gangnam Project, l'aventure K-pop - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Hannah arrives in Korea, and gets more than she bargained for when she’s assigned to tutor one of OME’s top trainees, Chan-Mi.

1.title: FR - Gangnam Project, l'aventure K-pop - S01E02 - K-Flop
1.plot: When Ken suggests that Hannah tries living a day-in-the-life of a trainee, she quickly struggles to find her footing.

1.title: FR - Gangnam Project, l'aventure K-pop - S01E03 - K-Crushed
1.plot: Hannah faces challenges in her first official K-pop class when she’s paired up with Chan-Mi to write a song.

1.title: FR - Gangnam Project, l'aventure K-pop - S01E04 - Bad Rep
1.plot: Insecure about her inability to rap, Hannah does anything she can to show she can keep up with the other trainees.

1.title: FR - Gangnam Project, l'aventure K-pop - S01E05 - Trainee Wreck
1.plot: When a secret is revealed, Hannah must prove to her peers that she has the talent and drive to be an OME trainee.

1.title: FR - Gangnam Project, l'aventure K-pop - S01E06 - Boys, Clothes, Money
1.plot: Unimpressed with the lyrics for Astra’s debut song, Hannah decides to write something more meaningful.

1.title: FR - Gangnam Project, l'aventure K-pop - S01E07 - Family K-Drama
1.plot: An unexpected visitor arrives in Korea and challenges everything Hannah thought she knew about her family.

1.title: FR - Gangnam Project, l'aventure K-pop - S01E08 - Interview
1.plot: Hannah helps a distracted Chan-Mi prepare for an important interview with a potential Showcase sponsor.

1.title: FR - Gangnam Project, l'aventure K-pop - S01E09 - Dress Rehearsal
1.plot: Tensions rise between Hannah, Sun Hee, and Mina as they struggle to rehearse for Showcase without a leader.

meta.plot: Hannah Shin, une fan de K-pop métisse dont la mère est canadienne et le père coréen, obtient la chance de toute une vie : devenir tutrice d’anglais dans une des plus importantes sociétés de production de divertissements coréenne, One Mile Entertainment (OME). OME est à l’origine du lancement des carrières des meilleurs Idols de la K-pop et Hannah devra travailler avec leur star montante, Chan-Mi.

Marie-Antoinette est âgée d’à peine 14 ans quand elle quitte l’Autriche et sa mère pour épouser le dauphin en France. C’est encore une jeune enfant têtue et dissipée qui doit se plier aux règles françaises, nombreuses et compliquées. La jeune princesse souffre rapidement de ne pouvoir vivre sa vie comme elle l’entend. Elle est constamment sous pression pour perpétuer la lignée des Bourbons. Une mission plus compliquée que prévue : même si la relation entre Marie-Antoinette et Louis XVI s’améliore au fil du temps, sept années leur seront nécessaires pour consommer leur mariage.

1.title: FR - Marie-Antoinette - S01E01 - The Slap
1.plot: Marie Antoinette is just a teenager when she is forced to leave Austria to marry the Dauphin of France. She must deliver an heir in order to secure an alliance between the two nations, but she is unprepared for the royal family that awaits her.

1.title: FR - Marie-Antoinette - S01E02 - Rival Queens
1.plot: When Louis refuses to share his bed with her, Marie Antoinette realizes that producing an heir will not be straightforward. She turns to Madame du Barry for help but a rivalry begins to form between the Favorite and the Dauphine.

1.title: FR - Marie-Antoinette - S01E03 - Pick a Princess
1.plot: The royal family spends some holidays in Fontainebleau. Marie-Antoinette learns about du Barry's plan, who looks for a fiancée for Provence. Will the second pretender to the throne of France be able to birth the Bourbon heir before Louis and Marie-Antoinette perform their duty?

1.title: FR - Marie-Antoinette - S01E04 - Queen of France
1.plot: Marie Antoinette and Louis are about to make their first official visit to Paris. But when the King becomes seriously ill, the succession suddenly becomes a reality.

1.title: FR - Marie-Antoinette - S01E05 - Rebel Queen
1.plot: Louis may now be King, but Marie Antoinette is determined to launch her reign as the Queen of France. However, as her political advice is ignored and Provence and Joséphine threaten to deliver an heir, a chill sets in the royals' marriage.

1.title: FR - Marie-Antoinette - S01E06 - Deus Ex Machina
1.plot: Antoinette's brother Joseph comes to Versailles to save the marriage, but realizes he will have his work cut out in uniting this estranged couple, still childless after seven years. Time is running out to save the Franco-Austrian alliance.

1.title: FR - Marie-Antoinette - S01E07 - The Ostrich Bitch
1.plot: Marie Antoinette is pregnant at last, but her reputation is attacked when pornographic pamphlets challenging the legitimacy of her unborn child appear at Versailles. The castle is locked down and an investigation takes place in order to uncover the traitor.

1.title: FR - Marie-Antoinette - S01E08 - Queen of Hearts
1.plot: Louis becomes increasingly confident in his position as King as he throws himself into supporting the American War of Independence. Marie Antoinette spends her time at the Petit Trianon where she begins to fall for a familiar face.

2.title: FR - Marie-Antoinette - S02E01 - The Worst Winter
2.plot: Marie Antoinette and Louis embrace modern rule, but enemies lurk everywhere, even in Versailles.

2.title: FR - Marie-Antoinette - S02E02 - A Poison Pen
2.plot: Marie Antoinette’s affair with Fersen reignites--could it be part of a carefully orchestrated plot?

meta.plot: Suis Goldie et ses amis dans de grandes aventures à Framboiseville, leur ville adorée. Ensemble, ils apprendront que la différence a du bon et que c’est génial d’être différent !

1.title: FR - Goldie - S01E01 - Giant Surprise / Stuck
1.plot: Goldie tries to find the perfect present for Teeny. Goldie's friends band together to help her out of a sticky situation.

1.title: FR - Goldie - S01E02 - Tall Teeny / Pilroy
1.plot: Realizing she's too short for rides at the fair, Teeny tries to grow taller. Petey's imaginary friend goes missing.

1.title: FR - Goldie - S01E03 - The Hiding Spot / Frand or Foe
1.plot: Goldie struggles to play hide-and-seek like her friends. When she can't fit inside Teeny's house for a sleepover, Goldie gets creative.

1.title: FR - Goldie - S01E04 - Birds of a Feather / Mayor Teeny
1.plot: Goldie works hard to find a best friend for everyone. Teeny steps into an important job for the day.

1.title: FR - Goldie - S01E05 - Li'l Cutie / Boysenween
1.plot: Inspired by Teeny's cat adoption, Goldie looks for a pet of her own. Goldie makes a costume for a magical springtime holiday.

1.title: FR - Goldie - S01E06 - Damage Control / Petey the Stargazer
1.plot: Mrs. Petunia searches for a new home. When Petey stops believing in aliens, Goldie tries to reignite the magic.

1.title: FR - Goldie - S01E07 - The Choir / The Egg
1.plot: Goldie joins the choir but worries she's too loud. Upon finding an egg in her nest, Goldie does her best to care for it.

1.title: FR - Goldie - S01E08 - Super Goldie / A Mammoth Friend
1.plot: Goldie flies into action as her new heroic persona. A cuddly pal shares the same big feelings as Goldie.

1.title: FR - Goldie - S01E09 - Teeny Ball / A Crushing Nightmare
1.plot: Teeny creates a game — but it might just have too many rules. Goldie has a nightmare and faces a new fear.

1.title: FR - Goldie - S01E10 - Goldie on a Roll / Big Time Trouble
1.plot: Goldie's friends team up to build a giant pair of roller skates. Goldie travels back in time to undo an embarrassing moment.

1.title: FR - Goldie - S01E11 - My Fair Goldie / Flying Solo
1.plot: As the mayor's dinner party approaches, Goldie worries she isn't fancy enough. Goldie struggles to take care of herself while Romeo is away.

1.title: FR - Goldie - S01E12 - Goldie's Tooth / Wooly's News
1.plot: The tooth fairy leaves Goldie a special surprise. Goldie feels sad when Wooly shares tough news.

1.title: FR - Goldie - S01E13 - Earworm / The First Snow
1.plot: Goldie and Romeo write a catchy new tune that sweeps Boysenberg. A frosty surprise sparks major excitement.

meta.plot: L’enthousiaste Trico propose à ses amis moutons toutes sortes de nouveautés. En bouleversant ainsi leur quotidien dans les alpages, Trico ne facilite pas la tâche de Wanda, une brebis dure à cuire chargée de la sécurité du troupeau. Car le loup, opiniâtre et calculateur, va profiter de toutes ces perturbations pour tenter de croquer des moutons !

1.title: FR - Karaté Mouton - S01E01 - Wanda's Apprentice
1.plot: Trico's gadgets keep distracting Wanda's apprentice; Wolf tricks Wanda into teaching him karate; Wanda plays soccer with the flock.

1.title: FR - Karaté Mouton - S01E02 - Top Dog!
1.plot: Trico's lawnmower makes Wanda jealous; Wanda performs feats of strength; Trico's disappearing magic tricks amaze Wanda.

1.title: FR - Karaté Mouton - S01E03 - Red Card for Wanda
1.plot: A mysterious object takes Wanda, Trico and Wolf on a wild ride; Trico's stench terrorizes the flock; Trico tries to teach Wanda how to read.

1.title: FR - Karaté Mouton - S01E04 - Robot Mower Rampage
1.plot: Wanda has trouble playing sidekick to Trico; Wanda doesn't like what she sees in the mirror; Trico and Wolf switch outfits.

1.title: FR - Karaté Mouton - S01E05 - Wonder Wanda
1.plot: Trico gets a new hairdo; the flock hires a sheepdog when Wanda gets injured; Wanda can't seem to follow the rules of the road.

1.title: FR - Karaté Mouton - S01E06 - Trico's Magic Show
1.plot: Trico's whoopee cushion doesn't amuse Wanda; Wanda, Trico and Wolf get lost in the woods; with Wolf away, Wanda learns to relax.

1.title: FR - Karaté Mouton - S01E07 - The Thingy
1.plot: Wanda and Trico run a footrace; Trico adopts a new pet; Trico gets jealous of Wanda's new gadget.

1.title: FR - Karaté Mouton - S01E08 - Smells Like Trouble
1.plot: Wanda and Trico struggle after a bad night of sleep; the flock experiments with different exercise styles; Wanda and Wolf battle with boulders.

1.title: FR - Karaté Mouton - S01E09 - Bad Teacher
1.plot: Wolf learns to attack from above; Trico's novelty fangs freak out Wanda; when Wanda hurts her back, only Trico's magic hands can help her.

1.title: FR - Karaté Mouton - S01E10 - Wannabe Hero
1.plot: Wanda and Trico keep Wolf safe while he sleepwalks; Trico and Wolf train for a boxing match; Trico protects Wanda from tickle attacks.

1.title: FR - Karaté Mouton - S01E11 - Mirror, Mirror Who's the Strongest?
1.plot: Wanda and Trico don't want to share the swing; Trico gives Wanda a present she doesn't appreciate; a fly gets on Trico's nerves.

1.title: FR - Karaté Mouton - S01E12 - Sheep in Wolf's Clothing
1.plot: Trico builds an outhouse for the flock; Wanda tries herding with a whistle; Wanda gets emotional over a romantic story.

1.title: FR - Karaté Mouton - S01E13 - Trico's Fake Hair
1.plot: Wanda learns how to let loose; Trico doesn't want to share his snack; Trico introduces Wanda to blowing bubbles.

2.title: FR - Karaté Mouton - S02E01 - Trico's Treats
FR - Karaté Mouton - S02E02 - Spring Forks
FR - Karaté Mouton - S02E03 - A Screw Loose
FR - Karaté Mouton - S02E04 - The Heatwave
FR - Karaté Mouton - S02E05 - New Friend
FR - Karaté Mouton - S02E06 - Trampoline Competition
FR - Karaté Mouton - S02E07 - Charge!
FR - Karaté Mouton - S02E08 - A Sticky Situation
FR - Karaté Mouton - S02E09 - Scratchy Wool
FR - Karaté Mouton - S02E10 - Knock, Knock...
FR - Karaté Mouton - S02E11 - Dances with Wolf
FR - Karaté Mouton - S02E12 - The Call of The Sea
FR - Karaté Mouton - S02E13 - Stronger Together

meta.plot: Une force maléfique menace les rues sombres et épaisses du Londres de la révolution industrielle lorsqu'un groupe de héros surnommés Les Licornes se réveille accidentellement dans le corps d'adolescents au lieu des hôtes adultes qu'ils ont incarnés par le passé.

1.title: FR - Unicorn: Warriors Eternal - S01E01 - The Awakening (1)
1.plot: A young girl, unwittingly infused with magical ability, soon discovers that she is part of a group of eternal heroes destined to fight a supernatural evil throughout time.

1.title: FR - Unicorn: Warriors Eternal - S01E02 - The Awakening (2)
1.plot: Melinda and Copernicus seek the remaining heroes of Unicorn while the supernatural evil unleashes a sinister force to stop them.

1.title: FR - Unicorn: Warriors Eternal - S01E03 - A Fateful Encounter
1.plot: Melinda's mental struggle causes her to seek out the normality of Emma's old life, while Edred, Seng and Copernicus are embroiled in a citywide manhunt for Unicorn.

1.title: FR - Unicorn: Warriors Eternal - S01E04 - What Lies Beneath
1.plot: An evil foe traps Unicorn aboard an ancient ship where the specter of a vanquished crew will encompass their doom.

1.title: FR - Unicorn: Warriors Eternal - S01E05 - The Past Within
1.plot: Emma and Melinda relive moments from the past as Unicorn struggles in the present to contain a creature born out of her magic.

1.title: FR - Unicorn: Warriors Eternal - S01E06 - The Mystery of Secrets
1.plot: Melinda and Edred seek a mechanical genius to fix Copernicus while Seng searches for the solution across the Sea of Time.

1.title: FR - Unicorn: Warriors Eternal - S01E07 - The Heart of Kings
1.plot: Unicorn's quest to fix Copernicus leads them into a blood war for control over Edred's homeland.

1.title: FR - Unicorn: Warriors Eternal - S01E08 - Darkness Before the Dawn
1.plot: Unicorn's search for their evil foe leads them to discover something that will change their lives forever.

1.title: FR - Unicorn: Warriors Eternal - S01E09 - A Love's Last Light
1.plot: Unicorn's struggle with the Evil Entity takes them to an unexpected place where their foe's power grows exponentially.

1.title: FR - Unicorn: Warriors Eternal - S01E10 - The End of the Beginning
1.plot: Emma attempts to find her way back to Unicorn, while they struggle to hold out against the growing power of the Evil Entity.

meta.plot: Alors que la nuit tombe sur la ville, Yoyo, Gluglu, Bibou et tous leurs amis masqués unissent leurs forces pour former une toute nouvelle équipe de superhéros, le Cercle des Héros. C'est l'occasion de découvrir Lilifée, Ourski et Bastet.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques : Power Heroes, le cercle des Héros - S01E01 - Heroes Everywhere
1.plot: An asteroid heads for Earth, with the power to turn our heroes into villains. But help arrives from an unexpected source.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques : Power Heroes, le cercle des Héros - S01E02 - The Whiff Of Badness
1.plot: Ice Cub wants to prove how amazing his polar sniffing power is.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques : Power Heroes, le cercle des Héros - S01E03 - An Yu's Birthday
1.plot: By playing a mean birthday trick, Night Ninja tries to get An Yu to destroy the museum.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques : Power Heroes, le cercle des Héros - S01E04 - Newton's New Asteroid
1.plot: Newton wants to check out an asteroid, but it's a trap

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques : Power Heroes, le cercle des Héros - S01E05 - Moon Music
1.plot: Luna takes Owlette's voice, imperiling the school music concert.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques : Power Heroes, le cercle des Héros - S01E06 - I Scream For Wolfies
1.plot: Catboy encourages Ice Cub to mess around with his snowballs but the Wolfies take advantage

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques : Power Heroes, le cercle des Héros - S01E07 - An Yu And The Gekkos
1.plot: An Yu finds it difficult to be a hero when things aren't the way she is used to.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques : Power Heroes, le cercle des Héros - S01E08 - Pirate Ice Storm
1.plot: Pirate Robot evades Ice Cub.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques : Power Heroes, le cercle des Héros - S01E09 - Lilyfay
1.plot: Fairy Lilyfay is rescued.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques : Power Heroes, le cercle des Héros - S01E10 - Iceworld (1)
1.plot: Ice Cub faces incredible dangers in the icy world to discover the source of new cool powers.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques : Power Heroes, le cercle des Héros - S01E11 - Iceworld (2)
1.plot: Ice Cub faces incredible dangers in the icy world to discover the source of new cool powers.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques : Power Heroes, le cercle des Héros - S01E12 - It's A Cat Thing
1.plot: Pharaoh Boy unleashes a terrible cat villain in the city. But this cat is more than meets the eye in a different perspective for our heroes.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques : Power Heroes, le cercle des Héros - S01E13 - The Dance Of Two Cats
1.plot: Catboy and Bastet's rivalry and egos and failure to work together cause them to fall for Pharaoh Boy's plan to take them over with a special dance

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques : Power Heroes, le cercle des Héros - S01E14 - Space Fairy Hero
1.plot: When Night Ninja captures Ice Cub, it falls to Lilyfay to realize she can be a hero and save him.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques : Power Heroes, le cercle des Héros - S01E15 - Lilyfay And The Lake
1.plot: Lilyfay wants a beautiful vehicle to look the part and be a PJ

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques : Power Heroes, le cercle des Héros - S01E16 - Luna The Sun Girl
1.plot: Bastet's inexperience leads to Luna becoming more powerful

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques : Power Heroes, le cercle des Héros - S01E17 - Cats On Wheels
1.plot: Catboy fights Night Ninja and his Ninjalino’s, who have stolen a vase from the museum.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques : Power Heroes, le cercle des Héros - S01E18 - Heroes of Iceworld
1.plot: Romeo steals ultimate ice power from Iceworld which he uses to freeze the new HQ and send it drifting into somewhere even colder: deep space!

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques : Power Heroes, le cercle des Héros - S01E19 - Gloop the Third (1)
1.plot: Newton wants to be a space expert; when the team gets glooped by Gloop the Third, only Newton can stop him, but to do so, he has to take himself less seriously.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques : Power Heroes, le cercle des Héros - S01E20 - Gloop the Third (2)
1.plot: The trapped heroes watch as the spaceship lands, and another alien bigger than the first three comes out of it.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques : Power Heroes, le cercle des Héros - S01E21 - Wolfy Riders
1.plot: It is night, and the Wolfy Kids are racing through The Park with their Wolf Wheelz until the PJ Masks show up with their PJ Riders to stop them.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques : Power Heroes, le cercle des Héros - S01E22 - Gekko Muscles In
1.plot: Greg, Connor and Amaya are in The Park, where Greg shows his friends a scrapbook he made about their first adventures, when the team consisted of just the three of them.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques : Power Heroes, le cercle des Héros - S01E23 - The Christmas Ninjalinos (1)
1.plot: It's Christmas season, and Night Ninja has a plan to make the holiday special for him and his Ninjalinos. They steal the book about Ice World from the Museum.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques : Power Heroes, le cercle des Héros - S01E24 - The Christmas Ninjalinos (2)
1.plot: It's the day before Christmas eve, and the heroes are still no closer to stopping Night Ninja. Gekko is sure they can get the other Ninjalinos into the Christmas spirit, just like the two he already saw last night, and perhaps even Night Ninja himself.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques : Power Heroes, le cercle des Héros - S01E25 - The Super Gloopster
1.plot: Owlette is being pursued by Gloop and the Gloopets in their Gloopster.

meta.plot: Lorsque Kiya et ses deux meilleurs amis, Jay, et Motsie, enfilent leurs bandeaux ornés des mystiques cristaux de Kimoja, ils se transforment en super-héros

1.title: FR - Kiya et les héros de Kimoja - S01E01 - Kiya and the Kite Monster
1.plot: When Kiya discovers that Motsie and Jay have made their own kites for the kite festival, she decides she can build her own.

1.title: FR - Kiya et les héros de Kimoja - S01E02 - Cosmic Catastrophe
1.plot: Daddy Jo is excited to watch the meteor shower.

1.plot: Jay is thrown off his game when he makes a few mistakes and begins to doubt himself.

1.title: FR - Kiya et les héros de Kimoja - S01E04 - Take a Step Back
1.plot: Zane keeps annoying Kiya!

1.title: FR - Kiya et les héros de Kimoja - S01E05 - Kiya's Potluck
1.plot: MC Harmony is sad, so Kiya invites her to their evening Potluck Supper.

1.title: FR - Kiya et les héros de Kimoja - S01E06 - Musical Mash-up
1.plot: Jay is asked to play the old Kimoja guitar in a concert to celebrate the Boabab tree.

1.title: FR - Kiya et les héros de Kimoja - S01E18 - Bugging Out
FR - Kiya et les héros de Kimoja - S01E19 - Ready Set Freeze
FR - Kiya et les héros de Kimoja - S01E20 - Honey Camp
1.plot: Marianne takes the group for a camping trip in the Nature Reserve.

1.title: FR - Kiya et les héros de Kimoja - S01E21 - Jay and the Super Fans
FR - Kiya et les héros de Kimoja - S01E22 - We Heart Art
FR - Kiya et les héros de Kimoja - S01E23 - Primadonna's Detective Agency
1.plot: Jay gets upset when Primadonna is praised for finding a lost kid when she didn't.

1.title: FR - Kiya et les héros de Kimoja - S01E24 - Day of the Slugs
1.plot: When Motsie saves Kimoja from the slugs, Jay realizes that he underestimated her.

1.title: FR - Kiya et les héros de Kimoja - S01E25 - Galactoslug Gets His Groove
FR - Kiya et les héros de Kimoja - S01E26 - The Primadonna Puzzle
1.plot: When Kiya discover Primadonna has taken Daddy Jo’s kebabs she lets her anger get the best of her.

1.title: FR - Papa est un chasseur d'aliens - S01E01 - The Bounty Hunter
1.plot: Birthday boy Sean and his sister, Lisa, plan to spend the weekend with their dad. But when he's called into work, they both decide to secretly tag along.

1.title: FR - Papa est un chasseur d'aliens - S01E02 - Bucky Quanto's
1.plot: Terry's latest mission brings him and the stowaways to the galaxy's best wing spot, where ruthless killers, an old partner and intergalactic chaos await.

1.title: FR - Papa est un chasseur d'aliens - S01E03 - Pit Stop
1.plot: At a convenience store, Sean makes a new pal and a frustrated Lisa confides in a stranger. But a sticky situation soon forces them into action.

1.plot: A quest to find a ship part on a scrap planet takes a wild turn when the kids venture off on their own while another bounty hunter tracks Terry down.

1.title: FR - Papa est un chasseur d'aliens - S01E05 - Chillion-5 (1)
1.plot: Terry surprises the kids with a trip to the happiest place in the galaxy — until a heartbreaking sight upsets them and puts the family at odds.

1.title: FR - Papa est un chasseur d'aliens - S01E06 - Chillion-5 (2): Rise of the Chillas

1.plot: Glorlox brings his bounty to the Conglomerate with unexpected consequences. Aboard the ship, the kids hatch a scheme that leads to an epic battle.

1.title: FR - Papa est un chasseur d'aliens - S01E10 - The Bounty Hunters
1.plot: Terry and the kids race through space to make it home before Mom does. Back on Earth, Lisa and Sean learn the truth, and an unwanted visitor appears.

2.title: FR - Papa est un chasseur d'aliens - S02E01 - Abduction
2.plot: When Terry goes missing, Tess leaves Lisa and Sean at home with grandma to rescue him alone... unless the kids can find their own way into space.

2.title: FR - Papa est un chasseur d'aliens - S02E02 - Jailbreak
2.plot: Tess and the team head to the nearest bounty containment facility to break Terry out. The first step? Using a decoy to gain access to the building.

2.title: FR - Papa est un chasseur d'aliens - S02E03 - Ocanom Grind
2.plot: The group heads to a planet that doubles as an elite gambling destination to get intel on the Widowmaker. But there's a strict "no kids allowed" rule.

2.title: FR - Papa est un chasseur d'aliens - S02E04 - This is Doloraam
2.plot: The Hendrix kids make an interesting discovery about their family history. Meanwhile, Terry stands trial in a distant kingdom. Can he clear his name?

2.title: FR - Papa est un chasseur d'aliens - S02E05 - Old Friends
2.plot: Tess brings the crew to Veeger-79 to ask an old friend for help but gets hit with some hard truths instead. Terry learns more about Tess' past.

2.title: FR - Papa est un chasseur d'aliens - S02E06 - Wolves & Sheep
2.plot: Adja and Tess make plans to infiltrate a dangerous space station to track down the bot that took Sean and Lisa — but they'll need Blobby's help.

2.title: FR - Papa est un chasseur d'aliens - S02E07 - For the Throne
2.plot: After the EHC returns precious cargo to the Doloraami Empire, a marvelous family reunion is interrupted by a fight — to the death.

2.title: FR - Papa est un chasseur d'aliens - S02E08 - Tales of Doloraam (1)
2.plot: As the kingdom prepares for battle, a difficult decision faces the Hendrix family: return to their home on Earth or fight alongside the Doloraami?

2.title: FR - Papa est un chasseur d'aliens - S02E09 - Tales of Doloraam (2)
2.plot: To win the battle, the Hendrixes must find and destroy the person who's secretly controlling the Beta Bots — with a little help from an unexpected ally.

meta.plot: Un chasseur de primes intergalactique assume son devoir de père envers et contre tout quand ses deux enfants embarquent par mégarde avec lui et perturbent sa mission.
Rappelé à la vie active pour identifier la source d'une cyberattaque meurtrière, un ancien président des États-Unis découvre un vaste réseau de mensonges et de complots.

1.title: FR - Zero Day - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Former President George Mullen's comfortable retirement is upended after he's asked to lead an investigation into a horrific cyberattack.

1.title: FR - Zero Day - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Mullen's commission investigates a hacking ring. President Mitchell weighs retaliation. A powerful figure has demands for Roger.

1.title: FR - Zero Day - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Mullen's initial arrests draw blowback from the public — especially TV pundit Evan Green. Alex faces pressure to investigate her father.

1.title: FR - Zero Day - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: A shock to the financial system increases scrutiny on Mullen's commission. Valerie investigates Proteus. Roger must make a difficult choice.

1.title: FR - Zero Day - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: A personal tragedy reopens old wounds for the Mullen family. Speaker Dreyer pushes for a change in leadership. Sheila testifies before Congress.

1.title: FR - Zero Day - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: A new threat creates further unrest across the nation. As he narrows in on the culprit, Mullen is faced with an agonizing decision.

1.title: FR - Gagné ou Perdu - S01E01 - Coach's Kid
1.plot: Laurie's insecurity about the upcoming championship manifests into a sentient blob called Sweaty.

1.title: FR - Gagné ou Perdu - S01E02 - Blue
1.plot: Umpire Frank, a pro on the field, lives his life from the sidelines, unable to let down his guard.

meta.plot: À l'approche d'un match important, huit personnages voient leur vie hors du terrain bouleversée.
